    const managedTimerIds = [];
    function managedSetInterval(fn, ms) {
        const id = setInterval(fn, ms);
        managedTimerIds.push(id);
        return id;
    }
    function managedSetTimeout(fn, ms) {
        const id = setTimeout(() => {
            const idx = managedTimerIds.indexOf(id);
            if (idx >= 0) managedTimerIds.splice(idx, 1);
            fn();
        }, ms);
        managedTimerIds.push(id);
        return id;
    }

        ],

        panelAdvancedOpen: false,

    function clonePresetForStorage(preset, override = {}) {
        const now = Date.now();
        return Object.assign({
            id: `preset-${now}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`,
            name: 'Custom preset',
            text: '继续',
            category: 'custom',
            builtin: false,
            createdAt: now,
            updatedAt: now
        }, preset || {}, override);
    }

    function getPromptPresetTextLimit(sourceConfig = null) {
        const cfg = sourceConfig || activeConfigRef || DEFAULT_CONFIG;
        const shortLimit = clampNumber(cfg.maxPromptPresetTextChars, 280, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT);
        const longLimit = clampNumber(cfg.longPromptPresetMaxChars, shortLimit, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        return cfg.allowLongPromptPresets ? longLimit : shortLimit;
    }

    function normalizePresetText(text, sourceConfig = null) {
        const limit = getPromptPresetTextLimit(sourceConfig);
        return normalizeText(text).slice(0, limit);
    }

    function getPromptPresetStorageLabel(sourceConfig = null) {
        const cfg = sourceConfig || activeConfigRef || DEFAULT_CONFIG;
        const limit = getPromptPresetTextLimit(cfg);
        return `${cfg.allowLongPromptPresets ? 'long opt-in' : 'bounded'} · max ${limit} chars`;
    }

    function getPromptLibraryStats() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const quota = clampNumber(config.promptPresetLibrarySoftQuotaChars, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT, 400000);
        let totalChars = 0;
        let custom = 0;
        let userSaved = 0;
        let longCount = 0;
        let archived = 0;
        for (const preset of presets) {
            const len = String(preset?.text || '').length;
            totalChars += len;
            if (!preset?.builtin) custom += 1;
            if (preset?.savedByUser) userSaved += 1;
            if (len > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT) longCount += 1;
            if (preset?.archived) archived += 1;
        }
        return {
            total: presets.length,
            custom,
            userSaved,
            longCount,
            archived,
            visible: Math.max(0, presets.length - archived),
            totalChars,
            quota,
            pct: quota ? Math.round((totalChars / quota) * 100) : 0
        };
    }

    function getPromptLibraryStatsText() {
        const stats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        const archiveText = stats.archived ? ` · archived ${stats.archived}${getPromptPickerShowArchived() ? ' shown-local' : ' hidden-local'}` : '';
        return `Library: ${stats.total} presets · custom ${stats.custom} · user-saved ${stats.userSaved} · long ${stats.longCount}${archiveText} · ${stats.totalChars}/${stats.quota} chars (${stats.pct}%) · ${getPromptLibraryBackupSummary()} · ${getPromptLibraryTrashSummary()}`;
    }

    function getPromptLibraryFingerprint() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        let hash = 2166136261;
        function mix(value) {
            const text = String(value || '');
            for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i += 1) {
                hash ^= text.charCodeAt(i);
                hash = Math.imul(hash, 16777619) >>> 0;
            }
            hash ^= 1249;
            hash = Math.imul(hash, 16777619) >>> 0;
        }
        for (const preset of presets) {
            const sig = preset?.textHash || makeBoundedSignature(String(preset?.text || ''), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash;
            mix(preset?.id);
            mix(preset?.name);
            mix(preset?.category);
            mix(sig);
            mix(String(preset?.textLength || String(preset?.text || '').length));
            mix(preset?.builtin ? 'builtin' : 'custom');
            mix(preset?.archived ? 'archived' : 'active');
        }
        return hash.toString(36);
    }

    function buildPromptLibraryManifestPayload() {
        const stats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        const presets = getPromptPresets().map((preset) => {
            const text = String(preset?.text || '');
            const sig = makeBoundedSignature(text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
            return {
                id: preset.id,
                name: preset.name,
                category: preset.category || '',
                builtin: !!preset.builtin,
                savedByUser: !!preset.savedByUser,
                source: preset.source || '',
                archived: !!preset.archived,
                pinned: (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).includes(preset.id),
                active: (config.activePromptPresetIds || []).includes(preset.id),
                textLength: preset.textLength || text.length,
                originalLength: preset.originalLength || text.length,
                textHash: preset.textHash || sig.hash,
                createdAt: preset.createdAt || null,
                updatedAt: preset.updatedAt || null,
                savedAt: preset.savedAt || null
            };
        });
        return {
            version: 3,
            manifestOnly: true,
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            fingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
            stats,
            activePromptPresetIds: (config.activePromptPresetIds || []).slice(),
            pinnedPromptPresetIds: (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).slice(),
            showArchived: getPromptPickerShowArchived(),
            longPresetsOptIn: !!config.allowLongPromptPresets,
            compactStorageSnapshot: !!config.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot,
            presets
        };
    }

    function copyPromptLibraryManifest() {
        const payload = buildPromptLibraryManifestPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json); } catch {}
        prompt('Copy prompt library manifest JSON (metadata only, no prompt text):', json);
        pushLog(`Copied prompt-library manifest · ${payload.presets.length} presets · fp ${payload.fingerprint}`);
    }

    function buildLocalUiSnapshotPayload() {
        const localState = readLocalPanelState();
        const pos = getLocalPanelPosition();
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'local-ui-snapshot',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            storage: {
                kind: 'sessionStorage',
                key: getLocalPanelStateKey(),
                browserWideShared: false,
                shouldNotBroadcastConfigSync: true
            },
            localUi: {
                collapsed: getPanelCollapsed(),
                advancedOpen: getPanelAdvancedOpen(),
                density: getPanelDensity(),
                theme: getPanelThemeMode(),
                promptSearchSet: !!getPromptPickerSearchText(),
                promptSearchLength: getPromptPickerSearchText().length,
                archivedShown: getPromptPickerShowArchived(),
                debug: isDebugEnabled(),
                actionBadgesVisible: getActionBadgesVisible(),
                position: pos ? { left: Math.round(pos.left), top: Math.round(pos.top) } : null,
                rawKeyCount: Object.keys(localState || {}).length,
                updatedAt: localState?.updatedAt || null
            },
            boundary: {
                localOnlyKeys: LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.slice(),
                sharedConfigResidue: getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload().storedLocalOnlyKeys || [],
                summary: getLocalPanelStateSummary()
            },
            syncTimelineLatest: state.lastSyncBoundaryEvent || 'none',
            localUiCache: { summary: getLocalUiCacheSummary(), entryCount: buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload().entryCount },
            rule: 'This payload is text-free and describes only this tab/chat UI state. It does not include prompt bodies or user message text.'
        };
    }

    function copyLocalUiSnapshot() {

            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy local UI snapshot JSON (no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Local UI snapshot shown for manual copy');
    }



    function listLocalUiSessionCacheEntries() {
        const prefix = `${STORAGE_KEY}:local-panel-state:`;
        const currentKey = getLocalPanelStateKey();
        const now = Date.now();
        const entries = [];
        try {
            for (let i = 0; i < sessionStorage.length; i += 1) {
                const key = sessionStorage.key(i);
                if (!key || !key.startsWith(prefix)) continue;
                const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(key) || '';
                let parsed = null;
                let parseOk = false;
                try { parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {}; parseOk = !!parsed && typeof parsed === 'object'; } catch {}
                const updatedAt = Number(parsed?.updatedAt) || 0;
                entries.push({
                    key,
                    keyTail: key.slice(prefix.length).slice(0, 96),
                    isCurrent: key === currentKey,
                    bytesApprox: raw.length,
                    parseOk,
                    updatedAt: updatedAt || null,
                    ageMs: updatedAt ? Math.max(0, now - updatedAt) : null,
                    rawKeyCount: parseOk ? Object.keys(parsed || {}).length : 0,
                    stale: !updatedAt || (now - updatedAt > 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
                });
            }
        } catch (error) {
            entries.push({ key: '(scan failed)', keyTail: String(error).slice(0, 120), isCurrent: false, bytesApprox: 0, parseOk: false, updatedAt: null, ageMs: null, rawKeyCount: 0, stale: false });
        }
        entries.sort((a, b) => Number(b.isCurrent) - Number(a.isCurrent) || Number(b.updatedAt || 0) - Number(a.updatedAt || 0));
        return entries;
    }

    function buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload() {
        const entries = listLocalUiSessionCacheEntries();
        const totalBytesApprox = entries.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (Number(item.bytesApprox) || 0), 0);
        const staleCount = entries.filter((item) => item.stale && !item.isCurrent).length;
        const invalidCount = entries.filter((item) => !item.parseOk).length;
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'local-ui-cache-audit',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            storage: 'sessionStorage',
            scope: 'this browser tab only',
            currentKey: getLocalPanelStateKey(),
            entryCount: entries.length,
            staleNonCurrentCount: staleCount,
            invalidCount,
            totalBytesApprox,
            entries: entries.slice(0, 40).map((item) => ({
                keyTail: item.keyTail,
                isCurrent: item.isCurrent,
                bytesApprox: item.bytesApprox,
                parseOk: item.parseOk,
                updatedAt: item.updatedAt,
                ageMinutes: item.ageMs == null ? null : Math.round(item.ageMs / 60000),
                rawKeyCount: item.rawKeyCount,
                stale: item.stale
            })),
            recommendation: staleCount || invalidCount ? 'Prune local UI cache can remove stale/invalid non-current session UI records without touching shared config or prompt text.' : 'Local UI cache is clean.',
            rule: 'This payload is text-free. It audits only per-tab sessionStorage records created for local panel UI state.'
        };
    }

    function getLocalUiCacheSummary() {
        const audit = buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload();
        return `entries=${audit.entryCount} · stale=${audit.staleNonCurrentCount} · invalid=${audit.invalidCount} · approx=${audit.totalBytesApprox} chars · storage=sessionStorage`;
    }

    function copyLocalUiCacheAudit() {
        const payload = buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog('Copied local UI cache audit · text-free');
            setStatus('Local UI cache audit copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy local UI cache audit JSON (no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Local UI cache audit shown for manual copy');
    }

    function pruneLocalUiSessionCache(reason = 'manual-local-ui-cache-prune') {
        const entries = listLocalUiSessionCacheEntries();
        const removable = entries.filter((item) => !item.isCurrent && (!item.parseOk || item.stale));
        if (!removable.length) {
            pushLog('Local UI cache prune: nothing stale/invalid to remove');
            setStatus('Local UI cache clean');
            return 0;
        }
        if (!confirm(`Remove ${removable.length} stale/invalid local UI session record(s) in this tab?\n\nThis does not touch Global, Scope, prompt library, saved prompts, backups, trash, or other tabs.`)) return 0;
        let removed = 0;
        for (const item of removable) {
            try { sessionStorage.removeItem(item.key); removed += 1; } catch {}
        }
        recordSyncBoundaryEvent('local-ui-prune', reason, { removed });
        pushLog(`Local UI cache pruned · removed ${removed}`);
        setStatus(`Local UI cache pruned: ${removed}`);
        safeUpdatePanel(reason);
        return removed;
    }

    function getActionOwnershipShortLabel(owner) {
        const text = normalizeText(owner || '');
        if (!text) return '';
        if (/explicit text/i.test(text)) return 'text';
        if (/manual guarded artifact|manual artifact/i.test(text)) return 'manual';
        if (/text-free audit/i.test(text)) return 'audit';
        if (/tab\/chat-local|local/i.test(text)) return 'local';
        if (/browser-wide|shared|scope|blacklist|whitelist|automation behavior|artifact setting/i.test(text)) return 'shared';
        return 'info';
    }

    function clearPanelActionOwnershipBadges(root) {
        if (!root) return 0;
        let cleared = 0;
        for (const button of Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('button[id]'))) {
            if (button.hasAttribute('data-ac-owner') || button.hasAttribute('data-ac-owner-label')) cleared += 1;
            button.removeAttribute('data-ac-owner');
            button.removeAttribute('data-ac-owner-label');
            const baseTitle = button.getAttribute('data-ac-base-title');
            if (baseTitle !== null) button.title = baseTitle;
        }
        return cleared;
    }

    function annotatePanelActionOwnership(reason = 'update') {
        try {
            const root = document.getElementById(PANEL_ID);
            if (!root) return;
            if (!getActionBadgesVisible()) {
                clearPanelActionOwnershipBadges(root);
                state.panelOwnershipBadgeCount = 0;
                state.lastPanelOwnershipBadgeAt = `hidden · ${reason} @ ${nowTime()}`;
                return;
            }
            const payload = buildPanelActionOwnershipPayload();
            const owners = payload.buttonOwners || {};
            let annotated = 0;
            for (const button of Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('button[id]'))) {
                const owner = owners[button.id] || '';
                if (!owner) {
                    button.removeAttribute('data-ac-owner');
                    button.removeAttribute('data-ac-owner-label');
                    continue;
                }
                const label = getActionOwnershipShortLabel(owner);
                button.dataset.acOwner = label;
                button.dataset.acOwnerLabel = label;
                const baseTitle = button.getAttribute('data-ac-base-title') || button.title || '';
                if (!button.getAttribute('data-ac-base-title')) button.setAttribute('data-ac-base-title', baseTitle);
                const prefix = `Ownership: ${owner}`;
                button.title = baseTitle && !baseTitle.startsWith('Ownership:') ? `${prefix}
${baseTitle}` : prefix;
                annotated += 1;
            }
            state.panelOwnershipBadgeCount = annotated;
            state.lastPanelOwnershipBadgeAt = `${reason} @ ${nowTime()}`;
        } catch (error) {
            state.panelRenderFailureCount = (state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0) + 1;
            state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `ownership badge annotation failed: ${error?.message || error}`;
            console.error('[AutoContinue] ownership badge annotation failed:', error);
        }
    }


    function getChecklistStatus(ok, label, details = '') {
        return { status: ok ? '✅' : '⚠️', label, details };
    }

    function buildRegressionChecklistPayload() {
        let snap = null;
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { snap = { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; }
        const validation = validatePromptLibraryState();
        const storage = getPromptStoragePressureSummary();
        const explicitSend = !!(snap && snap.sendBtn && isSafeComposerSubmitButton(snap.sendBtn));
        const stopAsSend = !!(snap && snap.sendBtn && isStopButtonLike(snap.sendBtn));
        const longOptIn = !!config.allowLongPromptPresets;
        const stats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        return {
            version: 1,
            type: 'regression-checklist',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            groups: {
                safety: [
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'No microphone / dictation / voice click fallback', 'blocked by dangerous-button guard'),
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'No download/open/share/menu click fallback', 'blocked by dangerous-button guard'),
                    getChecklistStatus(!config.safeEnterSubmitFallback, 'Enter fallback is off by default', `safeEnterSubmitFallback=${!!config.safeEnterSubmitFallback}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'No geometry-only right-button fallback', 'send requires explicit submit/send evidence'),
                    getChecklistStatus(!stopAsSend, 'Stop answering is not treated as Send', stopAsSend ? 'stop-like submitter detected as send candidate' : 'ok')
                ],
                automation: [
                    getChecklistStatus(isGlobalEnabled(), 'Global switch is on', isGlobalEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'),
                    getChecklistStatus(isAllowedByScope(), 'This chat is allowed by scope', getScopeBlockReason()),
                    getChecklistStatus(config.ignoreWhenHidden === false, 'Background/hidden pages allowed by default', `ignoreWhenHidden=${!!config.ignoreWhenHidden}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.crossTabWakeHub, 'Wake hub enabled', `wakeHub=${!!config.crossTabWakeHub}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker, 'Background heartbeat enabled', `heartbeat=${!!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle, 'Steady audit enabled', `steady=${!!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!snap?.composerText, 'Composer has no user draft to protect', snap?.composerText ? 'draft present, auto-send should pause' : 'empty')
                ],
                submit: [
                    getChecklistStatus(!snap?.isGenerating || !explicitSend, 'Generating state does not expose a safe send button', snap?.isGenerating ? 'generating' : 'not generating'),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!snap?.composer || !!snap?.continueBtn || !!snap?.isGenerating, 'Composer/continue/generating state detected', snap?.error || 'state readable'),
                    getChecklistStatus(!snap?.sendBtn || explicitSend || snap?.isGenerating, 'Send candidate is explicit or not needed', snap?.sendBtn ? getButtonDebugInfo(snap.sendBtn) : 'none')
                ],
                rounds: [
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'Round counter does not gate the v116/v120 auto core', `rounds=${state.autoRounds}/${config.maxAutoRounds}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!state.roundPendingProof || !!state.pendingAutoPrompt || snap?.isGenerating, 'Pending proof has a plausible source', state.roundPendingProof ? 'pending' : 'none')
                ],
                promptLibrary: [
                    getChecklistStatus(validation.ok, 'Prompt library validation passes', validation.ok ? 'ok' : `${validation.issues.length} issue(s)`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot, 'Compact config snapshot enabled', `compact=${!!config.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'Diagnostics/checklists are text-free', 'prompt bodies are excluded'),
                    getChecklistStatus(!longOptIn || stats.longPresets >= 0, 'Long presets require user opt-in', `longOptIn=${longOptIn}`)
                ],
                storage: [
                    getChecklistStatus(true, 'Storage pressure summary available', storage),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.promptPresetAutoBackup, 'Prompt library auto backup enabled', `backup=${!!config.promptPresetAutoBackup}`),
                    getChecklistStatus(!!config.promptPresetTrashEnabled, 'Prompt trash enabled', `trash=${!!config.promptPresetTrashEnabled}`)
                ]
            },
            promptLibraryFingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
            promptLibraryStats: stats,
            promptLibraryValidation: { ok: validation.ok, issueCount: validation.issues.length },
            storageSummary: storage,
            failureReportAvailable: true
        };
    }

    function copyRegressionChecklist() {
        const payload = buildRegressionChecklistPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog('Copied regression checklist · text-free');
            setStatus('Checklist copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy regression checklist JSON (checked status only, no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Regression checklist shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildFailureReportPayload() {
        let snap = null;
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { snap = { error: String(error).slice(0, 220) }; }

        const validation = validatePromptLibraryState();
        const storage = getPromptStoragePressureSummary();
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const nextActions = [];
        const add = (bucket, code, detail, action = '') => bucket.push({ code, detail: String(detail || '').slice(0, 260), action: String(action || '').slice(0, 260) });

        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) add(blockers, 'global-snoozed', getGlobalSnoozeSummary(), 'Click Resume now or wait for the timed pause to expire.');
        else if (!isGlobalEnabled()) add(blockers, 'global-off', 'Global switch is off', 'Turn Global on, or use Only this chat / Allow all chats.');
        if (!isAllowedByScope()) add(blockers, 'scope-blocked', getScopeBlockReason(), 'Use This chat / Only this chat, or adjust whitelist/blacklist.');
        if (config.ignoreWhenHidden && document.visibilityState === 'hidden') add(blockers, 'hidden-paused', 'Background tab is paused by Active tab only', 'Set Background: allowed if this page is part of the automation chain.');
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now()) add(blockers, 'conversation-locked', `Locked for ${formatRemainMs(state.conversationLockedUntil - Date.now())}`, 'Unlock current conversation after checking for repeated continue prompts.');
        if (snap?.composerText) add(blockers, 'draft-present', 'Composer has existing text; auto-send should not overwrite user draft', 'Send/save/clear the draft manually, then retry.');
        if (state.roundPendingProof && !snap?.isGenerating && !state.pendingAutoPrompt) add(warnings, 'stale-round-pending', 'Round proof is pending but there is no active generation/pending prompt', 'Reset rounds or copy diagnostics if it persists.');
        if (snap?.isGenerating) add(warnings, 'generating', 'Page is currently generating; Stop answering must not be treated as Send', 'Wait for generation to finish before expecting the next continue action.');
        if (!snap?.composer && !snap?.continueBtn && !snap?.isGenerating) add(warnings, 'composer-missing', snap?.error || 'Composer/continue button not detected', 'Refresh page or copy diagnostics; ChatGPT DOM may have remounted.');

        const safeSend = !!(snap?.sendBtn && isSafeComposerSubmitButton(snap.sendBtn));
        const stopAsSend = !!(snap?.sendBtn && isStopButtonLike(snap.sendBtn));
        if (snap?.sendBtn && !safeSend && !snap?.isGenerating) add(warnings, 'unsafe-send-candidate', getButtonDebugInfo(snap.sendBtn), 'Do not broaden selectors; capture diagnostics and add explicit safe selector only if verified.');
        if (stopAsSend) add(blockers, 'stop-button-candidate', getButtonDebugInfo(snap.sendBtn), 'This is Stop answering, not Send; wait until generation ends.');
        if (!validation.ok) add(warnings, 'prompt-library-issues', `${validation.issues.length} validation issue(s)`, 'Run Verify library or Audit library; repair after backup if needed.');
        if (String(storage).includes('pressure') || String(storage).includes('large')) add(warnings, 'storage-pressure', storage, 'Run Storage audit / Compact config / Trim backups if saves become unreliable.');
        if (!config.crossTabSendGuard) add(warnings, 'send-guard-off', 'Cross-tab send guard is disabled', 'Enable it unless intentionally testing.');

        if (!blockers.length && !warnings.length) nextActions.push('No obvious blocker detected. If automation still stalls, copy diagnostics + this failure report after the page has been idle for one tick cycle.');
        if (blockers.some((item) => item.code === 'scope-blocked')) nextActions.push('Use Only this chat if only the current conversation should auto-continue.');
        if (blockers.some((item) => item.code === 'global-snoozed')) nextActions.push('Resume now if this page should participate before the snooze expires.');
        if (blockers.some((item) => item.code === 'global-off')) nextActions.push('Turn Global on before testing automation.');
        if (warnings.some((item) => item.code === 'unsafe-send-candidate')) nextActions.push('Do not re-enable geometry fallback; add only explicit safe submit evidence.');
        if (snap?.isGenerating) nextActions.push('During generation, verify diagnostics shows Send button is not a safe submitter when it is Stop answering.');

        return {
            version: 1,
            type: 'failure-report-playbook',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            status: state.statusText,
            visibility: document.visibilityState,
            hasFocus: document.hasFocus?.() || false,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            nextActions,
            signals: {
                global: isGlobalEnabled(),
                globalSnooze: getGlobalSnoozeSummary(),
                allowedByScope: isAllowedByScope(),
                scopeMode: config.scopeMode,
                backgroundAllowed: config.ignoreWhenHidden === false,
                generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
                continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
                safeSendButton: safeSend,
                stopAsSend,
                composerPresent: !!snap?.composer,
                composerDraftPresent: !!snap?.composerText,
                roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                lease: readSendLease() ? 'active' : 'none',
                promptLibraryOk: validation.ok,
                promptLibraryIssues: validation.issues.length,
                promptLibraryFingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
                storageSummary: storage
            },
            recentLogs: state.logs.slice(0, 8).map((line) => String(line || '').slice(0, 220))
        };
    }

    function copyFailureReport() {
        const payload = buildFailureReportPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied failure report · ${payload.blockers.length} blocker(s), ${payload.warnings.length} warning(s)`);
            setStatus('Failure report copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy failure report JSON (blockers/actions only, no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Failure report shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildAutomationPreflightPayload() {
        let snap = null;
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { snap = { error: String(error).slice(0, 220) }; }
        const validation = validatePromptLibraryState();
        const storage = getPromptStoragePressureSummary();
        const safeSend = !!(snap?.sendBtn && isSafeComposerSubmitButton(snap.sendBtn));
        const stopAsSend = !!(snap?.sendBtn && isStopButtonLike(snap.sendBtn));
        const profile = {
            globalEnabled: isGlobalEnabled(),
            globalNotSnoozed: !isGlobalSnoozed(),
            backgroundAllowed: config.ignoreWhenHidden === false,
            keepWarm: !!config.keepAliveWhenVisible,
            refreshResume: !!config.aggressiveAfterRefresh,
            bottomAssist: !!config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue,
            steadyAudit: !!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle,
            wakeHub: !!config.crossTabWakeHub,
            backgroundHeartbeat: !!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker,
            foregroundWakeFanout: !!config.foregroundWakeFanout,
            crossTabSendGuard: !!config.crossTabSendGuard,
            guardedClickFirewall: !!config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall,
            strictSubmitter: !!config.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit,
            enterFallbackOff: !config.safeEnterSubmitFallback
        };
        const missing = Object.entries(profile).filter(([, ok]) => !ok).map(([key]) => key);
        const blockers = [];
        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) blockers.push({ code: 'global-snoozed', detail: getGlobalSnoozeSummary(), action: 'Click Resume now or wait for the timed pause to expire.' });
        if (!isAllowedByScope()) blockers.push({ code: 'scope-blocked', detail: getScopeBlockReason(), action: 'Use This chat / Only this chat / Allow all chats if this page should participate.' });
        if (snap?.composerText) blockers.push({ code: 'draft-present', detail: 'Composer has existing text; auto-send should not overwrite it.', action: 'Send/save/clear the draft manually before automation.' });
        if (stopAsSend) blockers.push({ code: 'stop-button', detail: 'The current submit-looking control is Stop answering.', action: 'Wait until generation completes.' });
        const warnings = [];
        if (!safeSend && !snap?.continueBtn && !snap?.isGenerating) warnings.push({ code: 'no-safe-submit', detail: 'No explicit safe send/submit button is visible right now.', action: 'This can be normal while composer is empty; post-fill probes will verify after inserting the auto prompt.' });
        if (!validation.ok) warnings.push({ code: 'prompt-library-validation', detail: `${validation.issues.length} prompt-library issue(s)`, action: 'Run Verify library or Audit library before large prompt maintenance.' });
        if (String(storage).includes('pressure') || String(storage).includes('large')) warnings.push({ code: 'storage-pressure', detail: storage, action: 'Run Storage audit / Compact config / Trim backups.' });
        return {
            version: 1,
            type: 'automation-preflight',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            profile,
            missingProfileItems: missing,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            scopeNote: 'Apply automation defaults does not change scope mode, whitelist, blacklist, prompt text, or saved prompt bodies.',
            signals: {
                visibility: document.visibilityState,
                hasFocus: document.hasFocus?.() || false,
                generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
                continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
                safeSendButton: safeSend,
                stopAsSend,
                composerPresent: !!snap?.composer,
                composerDraftPresent: !!snap?.composerText,
                promptLibraryOk: validation.ok,
                promptLibraryIssues: validation.issues.length,
                storageSummary: storage
            }
        };
    }

    function copyAutomationPreflight() {
        const payload = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied automation preflight · ${payload.missingProfileItems.length} missing profile item(s)`);
            setStatus('Preflight copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy automation preflight JSON (settings/blockers only, no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Automation preflight shown for manual copy');
    }


    function getSettingsCheckpointKeys() {
        return [
            'globalEnabled', 'enabled', 'globalSnoozeUntil', 'scopeMode', 'whitelistConversationIds', 'blacklistConversationIds',
            'ignoreWhenHidden', 'keepAliveWhenVisible', 'keepAlivePulseMs', 'aggressiveAfterRefresh',
            'autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue', 'bottomTriggerThresholdPx', 'scrollSettleMs', 'hiddenTickWhenAllowed',
            'steadyAuditWhenIdle', 'steadyAuditMs', 'hiddenSteadyAuditMs', 'crossTabWakeHub', 'crossTabWakeMinIntervalMs',
            'schedulerHealthAuditMs', 'schedulerStaleMs', 'observerHealthAuditMs', 'backgroundHeartbeatWorker',
            'backgroundHeartbeatMs', 'foregroundWakeFanout', 'foregroundWakeFanoutMs', 'crossTabSendGuard', 'sendLeaseMs',
            'guardedAutomationClickFirewall', 'strictSubmitterRequestSubmit', 'safeFormSubmitFallback', 'safeEnterSubmitFallback',
            'pollMs', 'idleAfterFinishMs', 'refreshResumeDelayMs', 'cooldownMs', 'maxAutoRounds', 'minAssistantChars',
            'refreshResumeMinAssistantChars', 'refreshResumeAllowAssistantPresenceGate', 'sendRetryDelayMs', 'sendRetryMaxAttempts', 'submitAfterFillDelayMs',
            'submitAfterFillMaxMs', 'postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs', 'submitProofTimeoutMs',
            'hotkeysEnabled', 'hotkeys', 'maxLogEntries'
        ];
    }

    function buildSettingsCheckpointPayload(reason = 'manual') {
        const keys = getSettingsCheckpointKeys();
        const settings = {};
        for (const key of keys) {
            try {
                settings[key] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(config[key]));
            } catch {
                settings[key] = config[key];
            }
        }
        return {
            version: 1,
            type: 'settings-checkpoint',
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            promptLibraryFingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
            note: 'This checkpoint intentionally excludes promptPresetLibrary, continueText, prompt stacks, backups, trash, archived presets, and any saved prompt bodies.',
            keys,
            settings
        };
    }

    function readSettingsCheckpoint() {
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(SETTINGS_CHECKPOINT_KEY);
            if (!raw) return null;
            const checkpoint = JSON.parse(raw);
            if (!checkpoint || checkpoint.type !== 'settings-checkpoint' || !checkpoint.settings || checkpoint.containsPromptText !== false) return null;
            return checkpoint;
        } catch {
            return null;
        }
    }

    function getSettingsCheckpointSummary() {
        const checkpoint = readSettingsCheckpoint();
        if (!checkpoint) return 'none';
        const ageMs = Date.now() - Date.parse(checkpoint.createdAt || 0);
        const age = Number.isFinite(ageMs) && ageMs >= 0 ? formatRemainMs(ageMs).replace(/^0s$/, 'now') : 'unknown age';
        const count = Array.isArray(checkpoint.keys) ? checkpoint.keys.length : Object.keys(checkpoint.settings || {}).length;
        return `${count} setting key(s) · ${checkpoint.createdAt || 'unknown time'} · age ${age} · text-free`;
    }

    function saveSettingsCheckpoint(reason = 'manual') {
        const payload = buildSettingsCheckpointPayload(reason);
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(SETTINGS_CHECKPOINT_KEY, JSON.stringify(payload));
            pushLog(`Settings checkpoint saved · ${payload.keys.length} key(s) · text-free`);
            setStatus('Settings checkpoint saved');
            safeUpdatePanel('settings-checkpoint-save');
        } catch (error) {
            alert(`Could not save settings checkpoint: ${error?.message || error}`);
            pushLog('Settings checkpoint save failed');
        }
    }

    function restoreSettingsCheckpoint() {
        const checkpoint = readSettingsCheckpoint();
        if (!checkpoint) {
            alert('No settings checkpoint found.');
            return;
        }
        const when = checkpoint.createdAt || 'unknown time';
        const count = Array.isArray(checkpoint.keys) ? checkpoint.keys.length : Object.keys(checkpoint.settings || {}).length;
        if (!confirm(`Restore ${count} text-free settings from ${when}?\n\nThis will not overwrite saved prompt texts or the prompt library.`)) return;
        const before = buildSettingsCheckpointPayload('before-restore');
        try {
            for (const key of Object.keys(checkpoint.settings || {})) {
                if (['promptPresetLibrary', 'continueText', 'promptPresets', 'knownContinueTexts', 'activePromptPresetId', 'activePromptPresetIds', 'pinnedPromptPresetIds'].includes(key)) continue;
                config[key] = checkpoint.settings[key];
            }
            migrateConfig(config);
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('settings-checkpoint-restore');
            markDirty(true);
            safeUpdatePanel('settings-checkpoint-restore');
            pushLog(`Settings checkpoint restored · ${count} key(s); prompt library preserved`);
            setStatus('Settings checkpoint restored');
            try { sessionStorage.setItem(`${SETTINGS_CHECKPOINT_KEY}:last-before-restore`, JSON.stringify(before)); } catch {}
        } catch (error) {
            alert(`Restore failed: ${error?.message || error}`);
            pushLog('Settings checkpoint restore failed');
        }
    }


    function getRuntimeRepairSummary() {
        const lease = readSendLease();
        const parts = [];
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) parts.push('pending prompt');
        if (state.pendingSendRetry) parts.push('pending retry');
        if (state.roundPendingProof) parts.push('round proof');
        if (state.awaitingGrowth) parts.push('awaiting growth');
        if (isConversationLocked(Date.now())) parts.push('conversation lock');
        if (lease && lease.owner === TAB_ID) parts.push('own lease');
        if (lease && Number(lease.expiresAt) <= Date.now()) parts.push('expired lease');
        if (!parts.length) return state.lastRuntimeRepairAt ? `clean · last ${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - state.lastRuntimeRepairAt)} ago` : 'clean';
        return `repairable: ${parts.join(', ')}`;
    }

    function repairRuntimeState(reason = 'manual') {
        const before = {
            pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
            pendingSendRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
            roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
            awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
            locked: isConversationLocked(Date.now()),
            lease: readSendLease() ? 'present' : 'none'
        };

        state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
        state.pendingSendRetry = null;
        state.roundPendingProof = false;
        state.roundPendingSince = 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = '';
        state.awaitingGrowth = false;
        state.conversationLockedUntil = 0;
        state.lockHandledSignature = '';
        state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = false;
        state.lastRuntimeRepairAt = Date.now();
        state.lastRuntimeRepairReason = reason;
        state.lastActionReason = `runtime-repair:${reason}`;

        // Do not steal an active lease from another tab. Only clear our own/expired lease.
        try {
            const lease = readSendLease();
            if (lease && (lease.owner === TAB_ID || Number(lease.expiresAt) <= Date.now())) {
                localStorage.removeItem(getSendLeaseKey());
            }
        } catch {}

        saveRoundRuntime('runtime-repair');
        updateRounds();
        updateLockInfo();
        publishWakeHub('runtime-repair');
        markDirty(true);
        safeUpdatePanel('runtime-repair');
        setStatus('Runtime repaired');
        pushLog(`Runtime repaired · ${reason} · before=${Object.entries(before).filter(([, v]) => v && v !== 'none').map(([k]) => k).join(', ') || 'clean'}`);
    }

    function applyAutomationDefaults() {
        const before = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
        config.globalEnabled = true;
        config.enabled = true;
        config.ignoreWhenHidden = false;
        config.keepAliveWhenVisible = true;
        config.aggressiveAfterRefresh = true;
        config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue = true;
        config.steadyAuditWhenIdle = true;
        config.crossTabWakeHub = true;
        config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker = true;
        config.foregroundWakeFanout = true;
        config.crossTabSendGuard = true;
        config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall = true;
        config.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit = true;
        config.safeFormSubmitFallback = true;
        config.safeEnterSubmitFallback = false;
        config.pollMs = clampNumber(config.pollMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.pollMs, 500, 10000);
        config.refreshResumeDelayMs = clampNumber(config.refreshResumeDelayMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.refreshResumeDelayMs, 500, 30000);
        config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs = clampNumber(config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.hiddenSteadyAuditMs, 2500, 60000);
        config.backgroundHeartbeatMs = clampNumber(config.backgroundHeartbeatMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs, 1200, 30000);
        config.foregroundWakeFanoutMs = clampNumber(config.foregroundWakeFanoutMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.foregroundWakeFanoutMs, 1200, 30000);
        saveConfig();
        publishWakeHub('automation-defaults');
        markDirty(true);
        safeUpdatePanel('automation-defaults');
        const after = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
        pushLog(`Automation defaults applied · missing ${before.missingProfileItems.length} -> ${after.missingProfileItems.length}; scope unchanged`);
        setStatus('Automation defaults applied');
    }


    function collectVersionArtifactCandidates() {
        const candidates = [];
        const seen = new Set();
        const nodes = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a, button, [role="button"]'));
        const filePattern = /chatgpt_auto_continue_(?:history_)?v(\d+)(?:_v(\d+))?[^\s"'<>]*\.(?:txt|zip)/i;
        for (const node of nodes) {
            let label = '';
            try {
                label = normalizeText([
                    node.getAttribute?.('download') || '',
                    node.getAttribute?.('title') || '',
                    node.getAttribute?.('aria-label') || '',
                    node.getAttribute?.('href') || '',
                    node.innerText || node.textContent || ''
                ].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
            } catch { label = ''; }
            if (!label) continue;
            const match = label.match(filePattern);
            if (!match) continue;
            const filenameMatch = label.match(/chatgpt_auto_continue_[^\s"'<>]*\.(?:txt|zip)/i);
            const filename = filenameMatch ? filenameMatch[0].slice(0, 180) : label.slice(0, 180);
            if (seen.has(filename)) continue;
            seen.add(filename);
            const startVersion = Number(match[1]) || null;
            const endVersion = match[2] ? Number(match[2]) : startVersion;
            const inAssistant = !!node.closest?.('section[data-turn="assistant"], [data-message-author-role="assistant"]');
            candidates.push({
                filename,
                startVersion,
                endVersion,
                kind: /\.zip$/i.test(filename) ? 'history-zip' : 'script-txt',
                assistantOrigin: inAssistant,
                visible: isVisible(node),
                nodeName: (node.tagName || '').toLowerCase() || 'unknown'
            });
        }
        candidates.sort((a, b) => (b.endVersion || 0) - (a.endVersion || 0) || String(a.filename).localeCompare(String(b.filename)));
        return candidates.slice(0, 80);
    }

    function buildHistoryBundleAuditPayload() {
        const candidates = collectVersionArtifactCandidates();
        const txtVersions = candidates.filter((item) => item.kind === 'script-txt' && item.endVersion).map((item) => item.endVersion);
        const zipBundles = candidates.filter((item) => item.kind === 'history-zip');
        const newestTxt = txtVersions.length ? Math.max(...txtVersions) : null;
        const newestBundle = zipBundles.length ? zipBundles[0] : null;
        const missingKnown = [];
        // v96 was never present in the sandbox history; keep it explicit so audit output does not look like silent data loss.
        if (!candidates.some((item) => item.endVersion === 96 || /v96/i.test(item.filename))) missingKnown.push('v96 not observed; historically absent from available sandbox files');
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'version-history-bundle-audit',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            currentScriptVersion: Number(String(SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL).replace(/\D/g, '')) || null,
            detectedCandidates: candidates.length,
            newestTxtVersion: newestTxt,
            newestBundle: newestBundle ? {
                filename: newestBundle.filename,
                startVersion: newestBundle.startVersion,
                endVersion: newestBundle.endVersion,
                assistantOrigin: newestBundle.assistantOrigin,
                visible: newestBundle.visible
            } : null,
            candidateSummary: candidates.slice(0, 24),
            knownGaps: missingKnown,
            safetyRules: [
                'This audit is text-free and only scans artifact filenames/metadata from visible page controls.',
                'It does not click, download, open links, or inspect prompt/user/assistant message bodies.',
                'Use the external ZIP manifest SHA-256 for authoritative archive integrity; this in-page audit is only a page-state hint.'
            ],
            nextActions: newestBundle ? ['Use the previously generated ZIP manifest for SHA-256 verification', 'Keep newest .txt and history .zip separate from installed userscript state'] : ['If you need an archive, ask to package all available versions again', 'Use Copy version audit after installing any single version']
        };
    }

    function getHistoryBundleAuditSummary() {
        const payload = buildHistoryBundleAuditPayload();
        return `candidates=${payload.detectedCandidates} · newestTxt=${payload.newestTxtVersion || 'none'} · bundle=${payload.newestBundle?.filename || 'none'}`;
    }

    function copyHistoryBundleAudit() {
        const payload = buildHistoryBundleAuditPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied history bundle audit · ${payload.detectedCandidates} candidates`);
            setStatus('History audit copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy version history bundle audit JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('History bundle audit shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildReleaseGatePayload() {
        const safeCall = (name, fn, fallback = null) => {
            try { return fn(); } catch (error) { return fallback || { error: String(error).slice(0, 180), source: name }; }
        };
        const health = safeCall('healthSummary', buildHealthSummaryPayload, { level: 'unknown', blockers: [], warnings: [] });
        const versionAudit = safeCall('versionAudit', getVersionAuditPayload, { ok: false, mismatches: ['version audit failed'] });
        const buttonAudit = safeCall('buttonAudit', buildPanelButtonAuditPayload, { ok: false, blankCount: null, issues: ['button audit failed'] });
        const boundary = safeCall('boundaryAudit', getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload, { ok: false, storedLocalOnlyKeys: ['boundary audit failed'] });
        const safety = safeCall('safetySentinel', buildSafetySentinelPayload, { level: 'warning', warnings: ['safety sentinel failed'] });
        const preflight = safeCall('automationPreflight', buildAutomationPreflightPayload, { ready: false, blockers: ['preflight failed'], missingProfileItems: [] });
        const storage = safeCall('promptStorage', getPromptStoragePressureSummary, { level: 'unknown' });
        const history = safeCall('historyBundleAudit', buildHistoryBundleAuditPayload, { newestTxtVersion: null, newestBundle: null, knownGaps: [] });
        const templateValidation = safeCall('schemaValidationPack', () => buildSupervisorSchemaValidationPack('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', smokeSummary: 'schema validation unavailable', smokeResults: [] });
        const nexusyncBindingValidation = safeCall('nexusyncBindingValidation', () => buildNexusyncBindingValidationPack('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', validationSummary: { failCount: 1, failedIds: ['nexusync binding validation unavailable'] } });
        const nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation = safeCall('nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation', () => validateNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['nexusync protocol adoption validation unavailable'] });
        const supervisorLoopValidation = safeCall('supervisorLoopValidation', () => validateSupervisorLoopFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['supervisor loop validation unavailable'] });
        const commandReceiptValidation = safeCall('commandReceiptValidation', () => validateCommandReceiptFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['command receipt validation unavailable'] });
        const commandEvidencePairingValidation = safeCall('commandEvidencePairingValidation', () => validateCommandEvidencePairingFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['command evidence pairing validation unavailable'] });
        const supervisorLoopExampleValidation = safeCall('supervisorLoopExampleValidation', () => validateSupervisorLoopExampleFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['supervisor loop example validation unavailable'] });
        const supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation = safeCall('supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation', () => validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['supervisor smoke harness validation unavailable'] });
        const supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation = safeCall('supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation', () => validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['supervisor smoke result relay validation unavailable'] });
        const realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation = safeCall('realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation', () => validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['real loop archival envelope validation unavailable'] });
        const realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation = safeCall('realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation', () => validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicyFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['real loop replay-runner policy validation unavailable'] });
        const supervisorRunnerSplitValidation = safeCall('supervisorRunnerSplitValidation', () => validateSupervisorRunnerSplitFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['supervisor runner split validation unavailable'] });
        const ownerApprovalArtifactValidation = safeCall('ownerApprovalArtifactValidation', () => validateOwnerApprovalArtifactFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['owner approval artifact validation unavailable'] });
        const ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation = safeCall('ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation', () => validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['owner approval receipt binding validation unavailable'] });
        const ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation = safeCall('ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation', () => validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['owner approval consumption validation unavailable'] });
        const ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation = safeCall('ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation', () => validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['owner approval execution checklist validation unavailable'] });
        const executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation = safeCall('executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation', () => validateExecutionChecklistRelayFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['execution checklist relay marker validation unavailable'] });
        const markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation = safeCall('markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation', () => validateMarkerHashBindingRelayAckFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['marker hash binding relay ACK validation unavailable'] });
        const relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation = safeCall('relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation', () => validateRelayAckHashChainFinalizerFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['relay ACK hash-chain finalizer validation unavailable'] });
        const finalArchiveIndexAckValidation = safeCall('finalArchiveIndexAckValidation', () => validateFinalArchiveIndexAckFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['final archive index ACK validation unavailable'] });
        const archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation = safeCall('archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation', () => validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbeFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['archive index completion probe validation unavailable'] });
        const archiveRepairPlanValidation = safeCall('archiveRepairPlanValidation', () => validateArchiveRepairPlanFixtures('release-gate'), { decision: 'hold', failCount: 1, failedIds: ['archive repair plan validation unavailable'] });
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (health?.level === 'blocked') blockers.push('health-summary-blocked');
        if (Array.isArray(health?.blockers)) blockers.push(...health.blockers.map((item) => `health:${String(item).slice(0, 80)}`));
        if (versionAudit?.ok === false) blockers.push('version-audit-mismatch');
        if (buttonAudit?.ok === false || Number(buttonAudit?.blankCount || 0) > 0) warnings.push('panel-button-audit-needs-attention');
        if (boundary?.ok === false || (Array.isArray(boundary?.storedLocalOnlyKeys) && boundary.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length)) warnings.push('shared-local-boundary-residue');
        if (safety?.level === 'warning' || (Array.isArray(safety?.warnings) && safety.warnings.length)) blockers.push('safety-sentinel-warning');
        if (preflight?.ready === false && Array.isArray(preflight?.blockers) && preflight.blockers.length) warnings.push('automation-preflight-blockers-present');
        if (['warn', 'critical'].includes(String(storage?.level || '').toLowerCase())) warnings.push(`storage-pressure-${storage.level}`);
        if (templateValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-template-validation-hold');
        else if (templateValidation?.decision && templateValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-template-validation-${templateValidation.decision}`);
        if (nexusyncBindingValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('nexusync-canonical-binding-validation-hold');
        else if (nexusyncBindingValidation?.decision && nexusyncBindingValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`nexusync-canonical-binding-validation-${nexusyncBindingValidation.decision}`);
        if (nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('nexusync-protocol-adoption-validation-hold');
        else if (nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation?.decision && nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`nexusync-protocol-adoption-validation-${nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation.decision}`);
        if (supervisorLoopValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-loop-validation-hold');
        else if (supervisorLoopValidation?.decision && supervisorLoopValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-loop-validation-${supervisorLoopValidation.decision}`);
        if (commandReceiptValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('command-receipt-validation-hold');
        else if (commandReceiptValidation?.decision && commandReceiptValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`command-receipt-validation-${commandReceiptValidation.decision}`);
        if (commandEvidencePairingValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('command-evidence-pairing-validation-hold');
        else if (commandEvidencePairingValidation?.decision && commandEvidencePairingValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`command-evidence-pairing-validation-${commandEvidencePairingValidation.decision}`);
        if (supervisorLoopExampleValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-loop-example-validation-hold');
        else if (supervisorLoopExampleValidation?.decision && supervisorLoopExampleValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-loop-example-validation-${supervisorLoopExampleValidation.decision}`);
        if (supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-smoke-harness-validation-hold');
        else if (supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation?.decision && supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-smoke-harness-validation-${supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation.decision}`);
        if (supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-smoke-result-relay-validation-hold');
        else if (supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation?.decision && supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-smoke-result-relay-validation-${supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation.decision}`);
        if (realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('real-loop-archival-envelope-validation-hold');
        else if (realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation?.decision && realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`real-loop-archival-envelope-validation-${realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation.decision}`);
        if (realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('real-loop-replay-runner-policy-validation-hold');
        else if (realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation?.decision && realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`real-loop-replay-runner-policy-validation-${realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation.decision}`);
        if (supervisorRunnerSplitValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('supervisor-runner-split-validation-hold');
        else if (supervisorRunnerSplitValidation?.decision && supervisorRunnerSplitValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`supervisor-runner-split-validation-${supervisorRunnerSplitValidation.decision}`);
        if (ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision && ownerApprovalArtifactValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-artifact-validation-${ownerApprovalArtifactValidation.decision}`);
        if (ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-receipt-binding-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation?.decision && ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-receipt-binding-validation-${ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation.decision}`);
        if (ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-consumption-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation?.decision && ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-consumption-validation-${ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation.decision}`);
        if (ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-execution-checklist-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation?.decision && ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-execution-checklist-validation-${ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation.decision}`);
        if (executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('execution-checklist-relay-marker-validation-hold');
        else if (executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation?.decision && executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`execution-checklist-relay-marker-validation-${executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation.decision}`);
        if (markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('marker-hash-binding-relay-ack-validation-hold');
        else if (markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation?.decision && markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`marker-hash-binding-relay-ack-validation-${markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation.decision}`);
        if (relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer-validation-hold');
        else if (relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation?.decision && relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer-validation-${relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation.decision}`);
        if (finalArchiveIndexAckValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('final-archive-index-ack-validation-hold');
        else if (finalArchiveIndexAckValidation?.decision && finalArchiveIndexAckValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`final-archive-index-ack-validation-${finalArchiveIndexAckValidation.decision}`);
        if (archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('archive-index-completion-probe-validation-hold');
        else if (archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation?.decision && archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`archive-index-completion-probe-validation-${archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation.decision}`);
        if (archiveRepairPlanValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('archive-repair-plan-validation-hold');
        else if (archiveRepairPlanValidation?.decision && archiveRepairPlanValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`archive-repair-plan-validation-${archiveRepairPlanValidation.decision}`);
        const currentVersion = Number(String(SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL).replace(/\D/g, '')) || null;
        if (history?.newestTxtVersion && currentVersion && Number(history.newestTxtVersion) < currentVersion) warnings.push('page-history-audit-does-not-yet-see-current-txt-artifact');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'release-gate-summary',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 20),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 24),
            summary: {
                healthLevel: health?.level || 'unknown',
                healthScore: health?.score ?? null,
                versionOk: versionAudit?.ok ?? null,
                buttonOk: buttonAudit?.ok ?? null,
                blankButtons: buttonAudit?.blankCount ?? null,
                boundaryOk: boundary?.ok ?? null,
                safetyLevel: safety?.level || (Array.isArray(safety?.warnings) && safety.warnings.length ? 'warning' : 'ok'),
                automationReady: preflight?.ready ?? null,
                storageLevel: storage?.level || 'unknown',
                supervisorTemplateValidation: templateValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorTemplateSmokeSummary: templateValidation?.smokeSummary || null,
                supervisorTemplateSmokeFailCount: Array.isArray(templateValidation?.smokeResults) ? templateValidation.smokeResults.filter((item) => !item.ok).length : null,
                nexusyncBindingValidation: nexusyncBindingValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                nexusyncBindingFixtureFailCount: nexusyncBindingValidation?.validationSummary?.failCount ?? null,
                nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation: nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                nexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtureFailCount: nexusyncProtocolAdoptionValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                supervisorLoopValidation: supervisorLoopValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorLoopFixtureFailCount: supervisorLoopValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                commandReceiptValidation: commandReceiptValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                commandReceiptFixtureFailCount: commandReceiptValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                commandEvidencePairingValidation: commandEvidencePairingValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                commandEvidencePairingFixtureFailCount: commandEvidencePairingValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                supervisorLoopExampleValidation: supervisorLoopExampleValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorLoopExampleFixtureFailCount: supervisorLoopExampleValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation: supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorSmokeHarnessFixtureFailCount: supervisorSmokeHarnessValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation: supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtureFailCount: supervisorSmokeResultRelayValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation: realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                realLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixtureFailCount: realLoopArchivalEnvelopeValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation: realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyFixtureFailCount: realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                supervisorRunnerSplitValidation: supervisorRunnerSplitValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                supervisorRunnerSplitFixtureFailCount: supervisorRunnerSplitValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                ownerApprovalArtifactValidation: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                ownerApprovalArtifactFixtureFailCount: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation: ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                ownerApprovalReceiptBindingFixtureFailCount: ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation: ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                ownerApprovalConsumptionFixtureFailCount: ownerApprovalConsumptionValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation: ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixtureFailCount: ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation: executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                executionChecklistRelayMarkerFixtureFailCount: executionChecklistRelayMarkerValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation: markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                markerHashBindingRelayAckFixtureFailCount: markerHashBindingRelayAckValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation: relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                relayAckHashChainFinalizerFixtureFailCount: relayAckHashChainFinalizerValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                finalArchiveIndexAckValidation: finalArchiveIndexAckValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                finalArchiveIndexAckFixtureFailCount: finalArchiveIndexAckValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation: archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                archiveIndexCompletionProbeFixtureFailCount: archiveIndexCompletionProbeValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                archiveRepairPlanValidation: archiveRepairPlanValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                archiveRepairPlanFixtureFailCount: archiveRepairPlanValidation?.failCount ?? null,
                newestTxtVersion: history?.newestTxtVersion || null,
                newestBundle: history?.newestBundle?.filename || null
            },
            nextActions: blockers.length
                ? ['Do not widen send/click selectors; inspect Copy safety sentinel, schemaValidationPack(), and Copy version audit first', 'Use Copy audit lite or Copy audit pack for deeper text-free context', 'Rollback to the last version confirmed to auto-trigger if release gate remains hold']
                : warnings.length
                    ? ['Install only after a quick smoke test on one tab', 'Use Copy quick support if behavior differs across tabs', 'Keep v116/v120 auto-trigger core unchanged']
                    : ['Safe to smoke-test this userscript on one ChatGPT tab first', 'Keep Global/Snooze/Scope visible during first run', 'Package history ZIP after confirming install if you need archival continuity'],
            safetyRule: 'Release gate is text-free and read-only. It does not click, download, submit, inspect prompt bodies, or change shared/local state.'
        };
    }

    function copyReleaseGateSummary() {
        const payload = buildReleaseGatePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied release gate · ${payload.decision}`);
            setStatus(`Release gate copied: ${payload.decision}`);
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy release gate JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Release gate shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildConfigDriftPayload() {
        const automationExpected = {
            globalEnabled: true,
            ignoreWhenHidden: false,
            keepWarmEnabled: true,
            aggressiveAfterRefresh: true,
            bottomAssistEnabled: true,
            steadyAuditEnabled: true,
            wakeHubEnabled: true,
            backgroundHeartbeatWorker: true,
            foregroundWakeFanout: true,
            crossTabSendGuard: true,
            safeFormSubmitFallback: true,
            safeEnterSubmitFallback: false,
            strictSubmitterRequired: true
        };
        const safetyExpected = {
            safeEnterSubmitFallback: false,
            strictSubmitterRequired: true,
            crossTabSendGuard: true,
            artifactAssistantOriginOnly: true,
            artifactNewestAssistantOnly: true,
            artifactRespectCurrentChatScope: true,
            artifactIdleStableGuard: true
        };
        const deviations = [];
        function checkGroup(group, expected) {
            for (const [key, expectedValue] of Object.entries(expected)) {
                const actual = config[key];
                if (typeof actual === 'undefined') {
                    deviations.push({ group, key, expected: expectedValue, actual: 'missing', severity: 'warn' });
                } else if (actual !== expectedValue) {
                    deviations.push({ group, key, expected: expectedValue, actual, severity: key === 'safeEnterSubmitFallback' || key === 'strictSubmitterRequired' ? 'safety' : 'info' });
                }
            }
        }
        checkGroup('automation-defaults', automationExpected);
        checkGroup('safety-defaults', safetyExpected);
        const boundary = (() => { try { return getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { ok: false, error: String(error).slice(0, 160) }; } })();
        const health = (() => { try { return buildHealthSummaryPayload(); } catch (error) { return { level: 'unknown', error: String(error).slice(0, 160) }; } })();
        const releaseGate = (() => { try { return buildReleaseGatePayload(); } catch (error) { return { decision: 'unknown', error: String(error).slice(0, 160) }; } })();
        const safetyDrift = deviations.filter((item) => item.severity === 'safety');
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'config-drift-audit',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            releaseGate: { decision: releaseGate.decision || 'unknown', blockers: (releaseGate.blockers || []).length || 0, warnings: (releaseGate.warnings || []).length || 0 },
            health: { level: health.level || 'unknown', score: health.score ?? null },
            automationExpected,
            safetyExpected,
            deviations,
            deviationCount: deviations.length,
            safetyDeviationCount: safetyDrift.length,
            boundaryResidue: {
                ok: !!boundary.ok,
                storedLocalOnlyKeys: boundary.storedLocalOnlyKeys || [],
                compactLocalOnlyKeys: boundary.compactLocalOnlyKeys || []
            },
            recommendations: safetyDrift.length
                ? ['Do not install/ship this state until safety drift is resolved', 'Use Automation defaults only if you intend to restore safe automation defaults', 'Inspect Copy safety sentinel before changing submit/click logic']
                : deviations.length
                    ? ['Review whether deviations are intentional per-page/shared settings', 'Use Copy state map and Copy boundary audit if drift looks like wrong cross-page sync', 'Use Automation defaults to restore automation-chain defaults without changing prompt bodies']
                    : ['Config drift audit is clean for known automation/safety baselines']
        };
    }

    function copyConfigDriftAudit() {
        const payload = buildConfigDriftPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied config drift audit · deviations=${payload.deviationCount}`);
            setStatus('Config drift copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy config drift audit JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Config drift audit shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildConfigRepairPlanPayload() {
        const drift = (() => { try { return buildConfigDriftPayload(); } catch (error) { return { deviations: [], safetyDeviationCount: null, boundaryResidue: {}, error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const boundary = drift.boundaryResidue || {};
        const deviations = Array.isArray(drift.deviations) ? drift.deviations : [];
        const safety = deviations.filter((item) => item && item.severity === 'safety');
        const automation = deviations.filter((item) => item && item.group === 'automation-defaults' && item.severity !== 'safety');
        const artifact = deviations.filter((item) => item && /^artifact/.test(String(item.key || '')));
        const localResidue = Array.from(new Set([...(boundary.storedLocalOnlyKeys || []), ...(boundary.compactLocalOnlyKeys || [])]));
        const steps = [];
        if (safety.length) {
            steps.push({ priority: 'P0', action: 'restore-safety-defaults', text: 'Restore strict submitter / Enter fallback / guarded send defaults before testing automation.', keys: safety.map((item) => item.key).slice(0, 20) });
        }
        if (automation.length) {
            steps.push({ priority: 'P1', action: 'apply-automation-defaults', text: 'Use Automation defaults to restore background/wake/heartbeat/guard settings without changing Scope, black/white lists, or prompt bodies.', keys: automation.map((item) => item.key).slice(0, 24) });
        }
        if (artifact.length) {
