            steps.push({ priority: 'P1', action: 'verify-artifact-guards', text: 'Keep artifact auto-download guarded by assistant origin, newest version, current chat scope, and idle-stable checks.', keys: artifact.map((item) => item.key).slice(0, 20) });
        }
        if (localResidue.length) {
            steps.push({ priority: 'P2', action: 'scrub-shared-config', text: 'Run Scrub shared config to remove local-only UI/debug residue from browser-wide config snapshots.', keys: localResidue.slice(0, 24) });
        }
        if (!steps.length) {
            steps.push({ priority: 'OK', action: 'no-repair-needed', text: 'Known config drift checks are clean; do not change settings just for repair.' });
        }
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'config-repair-plan',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            readOnly: true,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            driftSummary: {
                deviationCount: deviations.length,
                safetyDeviationCount: safety.length,
                automationDeviationCount: automation.length,
                artifactDeviationCount: artifact.length,
                localOnlyResidueCount: localResidue.length,
                releaseGate: drift.releaseGate || null,
                health: drift.health || null
            },
            repairSteps: steps,
            recommendedButtons: steps.map((step) => {
                if (step.action === 'restore-safety-defaults' || step.action === 'apply-automation-defaults') return 'Automation defaults';
                if (step.action === 'scrub-shared-config') return 'Scrub shared config';
                if (step.action === 'verify-artifact-guards') return 'Copy safety sentinel + Copy config drift';
                return 'No action';
            }),
            nonGoals: [
                'Does not change configuration by itself.',
                'Does not inspect, export, or save prompt/user/assistant message bodies.',
                'Does not alter v116/v120 auto-trigger core or widen send/click selectors.'
            ],
            nextActions: steps.some((step) => step.priority === 'P0')
                ? ['Do not install broadly until P0 safety drift is resolved', 'Use Copy safety sentinel after applying safe defaults', 'Smoke-test on one tab only']
                : steps.some((step) => step.priority === 'P1')
                    ? ['Apply only the relevant defaults if the drift is unintended', 'Use Copy trigger trace after repair to confirm automation path', 'Keep Scope/blacklist choices intentional']
                    : ['No repair needed; keep current settings and continue smoke testing']
        };
    }

    function copyConfigRepairPlan() {
        const payload = buildConfigRepairPlanPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied config repair plan · steps=${payload.repairSteps.length}`);
            setStatus('Config repair plan copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy config repair plan JSON (text-free, read-only):', json);
        pushLog('Config repair plan shown for manual copy');
    }

    function buildSafeAuditPackPayload() {
        const manifest = buildPromptLibraryManifestPayload();
        const validation = validatePromptLibraryState();
        const storage = getPromptStoragePressureSummary();
        return {
            version: 1,
            type: 'safe-audit-pack',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            promptLibraryFingerprint: manifest.fingerprint,
            promptLibraryStats: manifest.stats,
            promptLibraryValidation: {
                ok: validation.ok,
                issueCount: validation.issues.length,
                issues: validation.issues.map((issue) => String(issue || '').slice(0, 180))
            },
            promptStorage: storage,
            regressionChecklist: buildRegressionChecklistPayload(),
            failureReport: buildFailureReportPayload(),
            automationPreflight: buildAutomationPreflightPayload(),
            configBoundaryAudit: getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(),
            syncEventTimeline: buildSyncEventTimelinePayload(),
            panelActionOwnership: buildPanelActionOwnershipPayload(),
            panelButtonAudit: buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(),
            healthSummary: buildHealthSummaryPayload(),
            quickSupportNote: buildQuickSupportNotePayload(),
            releaseNote: buildReleaseNotePayload(),
            upgradePlan: buildUpgradePlanPayload(),
            auditIndex: buildAuditIndexPayload(),
            auditLite: buildAuditLitePayload(),
            runtimeSnapshot: buildRuntimeSnapshotPayload(),
            backgroundTriage: buildBackgroundTriagePayload(),
            triggerTrace: buildTriggerTracePayload(),
            safetySentinel: buildSafetySentinelPayload(),
            historyBundleAudit: buildHistoryBundleAuditPayload(),
            releaseGate: buildReleaseGatePayload(),
            configDrift: buildConfigDriftPayload(),
            configRepairPlan: buildConfigRepairPlanPayload(),
            actionBadgeLegend: buildActionBadgeLegendPayload(),
            localUiSnapshot: buildLocalUiSnapshotPayload(),
            localUiCacheAudit: buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload(),
            settingsCheckpoint: getSettingsCheckpointSummary(),
            manifest,
            diagnosticsText: getDiagnosticsText()
        };
    }

    function copySafeAuditPack() {
        const payload = buildSafeAuditPackPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied safe audit pack · fp ${payload.promptLibraryFingerprint} · text-free`);
            setStatus('Safe audit pack copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy safe audit pack JSON (metadata/diagnostics only, no saved prompt text):', json);
        pushLog('Safe audit pack shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildAuditLitePayload() {
        const health = (() => { try { return buildHealthSummaryPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const quick = (() => { try { return buildQuickSupportNotePayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const failure = (() => { try { return buildFailureReportPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const versionAudit = (() => { try { return getVersionAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const buttonAudit = (() => { try { return buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const boundary = (() => { try { return getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const validation = (() => { try { return validatePromptLibraryState(); } catch (error) { return { ok: false, issues: [String(error).slice(0, 180)] }; } })();
        const manifest = (() => { try { return buildPromptLibraryManifestPayload(); } catch (error) { return { fingerprint: 'error', stats: {}, error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const memory = (() => { try { return getMemoryPressureLevel(); } catch (error) { return { level: 'unknown', error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'safe-audit-lite-support-pack',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            health: {
                level: health?.level || 'unknown',
                score: health?.score ?? null,
                blockers: Array.isArray(health?.blockers) ? health.blockers.slice(0, 8) : [],
                warnings: Array.isArray(health?.warnings) ? health.warnings.slice(0, 8) : [],
                nextActions: Array.isArray(health?.nextActions) ? health.nextActions.slice(0, 8) : []
            },
            quickSupport: quick,
            failure: {
                blockers: Array.isArray(failure?.blockers) ? failure.blockers.slice(0, 12) : [],
                warnings: Array.isArray(failure?.warnings) ? failure.warnings.slice(0, 12) : [],
                nextActions: Array.isArray(failure?.nextActions) ? failure.nextActions.slice(0, 12) : []
            },
            automationPreflight: {
                ok: preflight?.ok ?? null,
                missingProfileItems: Array.isArray(preflight?.missingProfileItems) ? preflight.missingProfileItems.slice(0, 24) : [],
                blockers: Array.isArray(preflight?.blockers) ? preflight.blockers.slice(0, 12) : []
            },
            versionAudit: { ok: versionAudit?.ok ?? null, mismatches: Array.isArray(versionAudit?.mismatches) ? versionAudit.mismatches : [] },
            panelButtonAudit: {
                ok: buttonAudit?.ok ?? null,
                buttonCount: buttonAudit?.buttonCount ?? null,
                blankCount: buttonAudit?.blankCount ?? null,
                missingFallbackCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit?.missingFallbackIds) ? buttonAudit.missingFallbackIds.length : null,
                missingOwnershipCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit?.missingOwnershipIds) ? buttonAudit.missingOwnershipIds.length : null,
                missingRouterCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit?.missingRouterIds) ? buttonAudit.missingRouterIds.length : null
            },
            configBoundary: { ok: boundary?.ok ?? null, storedLocalOnlyKeys: Array.isArray(boundary?.storedLocalOnlyKeys) ? boundary.storedLocalOnlyKeys : [] },
            configRepairPlan: (() => { try { const plan = buildConfigRepairPlanPayload(); return { steps: plan.repairSteps.length, priorities: plan.repairSteps.map((step) => step.priority).slice(0, 8), recommendedButtons: plan.recommendedButtons.slice(0, 8) }; } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })(),
            promptLibrary: {
                fingerprint: manifest?.fingerprint || 'unknown',
                stats: manifest?.stats || {},
                validationOk: validation?.ok ?? null,
                issueCount: Array.isArray(validation?.issues) ? validation.issues.length : null,
                issues: Array.isArray(validation?.issues) ? validation.issues.map((issue) => String(issue || '').slice(0, 160)).slice(0, 20) : []
            },
            memory: {
                level: memory?.level || 'unknown',
                heap: memory?.heap?.text || memory?.heap || 'n/a',
                timers: memory?.timers ?? null,
                reasons: Array.isArray(memory?.reasons) ? memory.reasons.slice(0, 8) : []
            },
            backgroundTriage: (() => { try { const bg = buildBackgroundTriagePayload(); return { status: bg.status, blockers: bg.blockers, warnings: bg.warnings, nextActions: bg.nextActions }; } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })(),
            sizePolicy: 'Lite pack intentionally omits diagnosticsText, full manifest bodies, long logs, prompt bodies, and user/assistant message text. Use Copy audit pack only for deep review.'
        };
    }

    function copyAuditLite() {
        const payload = buildAuditLitePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied audit lite · ${payload.health.level || 'unknown'} · text-free`);
            setStatus('Audit lite copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy audit lite JSON (text-free compact support pack):', json);
        pushLog('Audit lite shown for manual copy');
    }



    function buildBackgroundTriagePayload() {
        const now = Date.now();
        let snap = null;
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { snap = { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; }
        const hidden = document.visibilityState === 'hidden';
        const focused = document.hasFocus ? document.hasFocus() : null;
        const schedulerStale = isSchedulerStale(now);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) blockers.push(getGlobalSnoozeRemainingMs(now) > 0 ? 'global-snoozed' : 'global-off');
        if (!isAllowedByScope()) blockers.push('scope-blocked');
        if (hidden && config.ignoreWhenHidden) blockers.push('hidden-paused-by-active-tab-only');
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > now) blockers.push('conversation-locked');
        if (snap?.composerText && snap.composerText !== normalizeText(config.continueText)) blockers.push('user-draft-present');
        if (!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker) warnings.push('background-heartbeat-off');
        if (!config.foregroundWakeFanout) warnings.push('foreground-wake-fanout-off');
        if (!config.crossTabWakeHub) warnings.push('wake-hub-off');
        if (!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle) warnings.push('steady-audit-off');
        if (!config.keepAliveWhenVisible) warnings.push('keep-warm-off');
        if (schedulerStale) warnings.push('scheduler-stale');
        if (hidden) warnings.push('browser-hidden-tab-throttling-may-delay-timers');
        if (focused === false && !hidden) warnings.push('visible-but-not-focused-allowed');
        if (snap?.isGenerating) warnings.push('already-generating');
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) warnings.push('pending-auto-prompt');
        const status = blockers.length ? 'blocked' : warnings.length ? 'watch' : 'ready';
        const nextActions = [];
        if (blockers.includes('hidden-paused-by-active-tab-only')) nextActions.push('Turn Background to allowed, or apply Automation defaults.');
        if (blockers.includes('scope-blocked')) nextActions.push('Use This chat / Only this chat / Allow all chats depending on intended scope.');
        if (blockers.includes('user-draft-present')) nextActions.push('Clear or send the existing composer draft before automation can safely write its prompt.');
        if (warnings.includes('background-heartbeat-off') || warnings.includes('wake-hub-off') || warnings.includes('steady-audit-off')) nextActions.push('Use Automation defaults to re-arm background heartbeat, wake hub, steady audit, and keep warm without changing prompt text.');
        if (warnings.includes('scheduler-stale')) nextActions.push('Use Repair runtime if the page appears stuck, then copy runtime snapshot if stale state returns.');
        if (!nextActions.length) nextActions.push('Background/non-focused automation gates look ready; if Chrome still delays hidden pages, compare wake timestamps after a foreground page fanout.');
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'background-trigger-triage',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            status,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            visibility: document.visibilityState || 'unknown',
            hasFocus: focused,
            backgroundAllowed: !config.ignoreWhenHidden,
            hiddenTickWhenAllowed: !!config.hiddenTickWhenAllowed,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            scheduler: {
                stale: schedulerStale,
                lastTickAgoMs: state.lastTickAt ? now - state.lastTickAt : null,
                lastObserver: state.lastObserverHealthCheck || 'none',
                managedTimers: managedTimerIds.length,
                skippedBusyTicks: state.skippedBusyTicks || 0,
                skippedThrottleTicks: state.skippedThrottleTicks || 0
            },
            wake: {
                keepWarm: !!config.keepAliveWhenVisible,
                steadyAudit: !!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle,
                steadyAuditMs: config.steadyAuditMs,
                hiddenSteadyAuditMs: config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs,
                wakeHub: !!config.crossTabWakeHub,
                lastWakeRx: state.lastWakeHubRx || 'none',
                lastWakeTx: state.lastWakeHubTx || 'none',
                backgroundHeartbeat: !!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker,
                backgroundHeartbeatMs: config.backgroundHeartbeatMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs,
                lastBackgroundHeartbeat: state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat || 'none',
                foregroundWakeFanout: !!config.foregroundWakeFanout,
                foregroundWakeFanoutMs: config.foregroundWakeFanoutMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.foregroundWakeFanoutMs,
                lastForegroundFanout: state.lastForegroundFanout || 'none'
            },
            pageState: {
                generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
                continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
                sendButton: !!snap?.sendBtn,
                composerEmpty: !snap?.composerText,
                users: snap?.userCount ?? null,
                assistants: snap?.assistantCount ?? null,
                error: snap?.error || null
            },
            runtime: {
                pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                pendingRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
                awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
                roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                locked: !!(state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > now),
                lastAction: state.lastActionReason,
                statusText: state.statusText
            },
            nextActions
        };
    }

    function copyBackgroundTriage() {
        const payload = buildBackgroundTriagePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied background triage · ${payload.status} · text-free`);
            setStatus('Background triage copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy background triage JSON (text-free non-focused/hidden trigger report):', json);
        pushLog('Background triage shown for manual copy');
    }



    function buildTriggerTracePayload() {
        const now = Date.now();
        const snap = (() => { try { return readPageState(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch (error) { return { blockers: [String(error).slice(0, 180)], missingProfileItems: [] }; } })();
        const background = (() => { try { return buildBackgroundTriagePayload(); } catch (error) { return { blockers: [String(error).slice(0, 180)], warnings: [] }; } })();
        const lease = (() => { try { const l = readSendLease(); return l ? { owner: String(l.owner || '').slice(-8), reason: l.reason || '', expiresInMs: Math.max(0, Number(l.expiresAt || 0) - now) } : null; } catch { return null; } })();
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) blockers.push('global-off-or-snoozed');
        if (!isAllowedByScope()) blockers.push('scope-blocked');
        if (document.hidden && config.ignoreWhenHidden) blockers.push('hidden-paused');
        if (snap?.composerText) blockers.push('user-draft-present');
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > now) blockers.push('conversation-locked');
        if (lease && lease.owner !== TAB_ID.slice(-8)) blockers.push('another-tab-send-lease');
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) warnings.push('pending-auto-prompt');
        if (state.pendingSendRetry) warnings.push('pending-send-retry');
        if (state.roundPendingProof) warnings.push('round-pending-proof');
        if (state.awaitingGrowth) warnings.push('awaiting-growth');
        if (snap?.isGenerating) warnings.push('currently-generating');
        if (!snap?.continueBtn && !snap?.sendBtn && !snap?.isGenerating) warnings.push('no-visible-continue-or-send-candidate');
        for (const b of background.blockers || []) if (!blockers.includes(b)) blockers.push(b);
        for (const w of background.warnings || []) if (!warnings.includes(w)) warnings.push(w);
        const trace = [
            { step: 'global', ok: isGlobalEnabled(), detail: isGlobalSnoozed() ? 'snoozed' : (config.globalEnabled === false ? 'off' : 'on') },
            { step: 'scope', ok: isAllowedByScope(), detail: getScopeStatusText() },
            { step: 'visibility', ok: !(document.hidden && config.ignoreWhenHidden), detail: `${document.visibilityState || 'unknown'} · background ${config.ignoreWhenHidden ? 'paused' : 'allowed'}` },
            { step: 'runtime', ok: !(state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > now), detail: `pending=${!!state.pendingAutoPrompt} retry=${!!state.pendingSendRetry} proof=${!!state.roundPendingProof} awaiting=${!!state.awaitingGrowth}` },
            { step: 'page', ok: !snap?.error, detail: snap?.error || `generating=${!!snap?.isGenerating} continue=${!!snap?.continueBtn} send=${!!snap?.sendBtn} composerEmpty=${!snap?.composerText}` },
            { step: 'scheduler', ok: !(state.lastTickAt && now - state.lastTickAt > 15000), detail: `lastTickAgoMs=${state.lastTickAt ? now - state.lastTickAt : 'none'} timers=${managedTimerIds.length}` },
            { step: 'wake', ok: true, detail: `rx=${state.lastWakeHubRx || 'none'} tx=${state.lastWakeHubTx || 'none'} hb=${state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat || 'none'} fanout=${state.lastForegroundFanout || 'none'}` },
            { step: 'action', ok: true, detail: `last=${state.lastActionReason || 'none'} status=${state.statusText || 'none'}` }
        ];
        const recentLogs = (state.logs || []).slice(0, 8).map((line) => String(line || '').slice(0, 180));
        const status = blockers.length ? 'blocked' : warnings.length ? 'watch' : 'ready';
        const nextActions = [];
        if (blockers.includes('global-off-or-snoozed')) nextActions.push('Turn Global on or Resume now if Snooze is active.');
        if (blockers.includes('scope-blocked')) nextActions.push('Use This chat / Only this chat / Allow all chats according to the intended scope.');
        if (blockers.includes('hidden-paused')) nextActions.push('Switch Background to allowed or apply Automation defaults.');
        if (blockers.includes('user-draft-present')) nextActions.push('Clear or send the existing composer draft before automatic prompt insertion.');
        if (warnings.includes('pending-auto-prompt') || warnings.includes('pending-send-retry') || warnings.includes('round-pending-proof')) nextActions.push('Use Repair runtime if pending state is stale, then copy runtime snapshot if it returns.');
        if (warnings.includes('no-visible-continue-or-send-candidate')) nextActions.push('Wait for composer submitter to appear after prompt fill; if it does not, copy diagnostics or runtime snapshot.');
        if (!nextActions.length) nextActions.push('Trigger gates look ready; compare recent logs and wake timestamps if behavior still differs across tabs.');
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'trigger-trace',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            status,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            blockers,
            warnings,
            trace,
            preflight: {
                blockers: preflight.blockers || [],
                missingProfileItems: preflight.missingProfileItems || [],
                ok: preflight.ok ?? null
            },
            runtime: {
                statusText: state.statusText,
                lastAction: state.lastActionReason,
                pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                pendingRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
                roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
                locked: !!(state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > now),
                lease
            },
            recentLogs,
            nextActions,
            rule: 'Text-free trace: records gates, timestamps, booleans, and short log labels only; it does not include user messages or saved prompt bodies.'
        };
    }

    function getTriggerTraceSummary() {
        try {
            const t = buildTriggerTracePayload();
            return `${t.status} · blockers=${t.blockers.length} · warnings=${t.warnings.length} · last=${t.runtime.lastAction || 'none'}`;
        } catch (error) {
            return `error: ${String(error).slice(0, 120)}`;
        }
    }

    function copyTriggerTrace() {
        const payload = buildTriggerTracePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied trigger trace · ${payload.status} · text-free`);
            setStatus('Trigger trace copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy trigger trace JSON (text-free decision timeline):', json);
        pushLog('Trigger trace shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildSafetySentinelPayload() {
        const snap = (() => { try { return readPageState(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const buttons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(isVisible).slice(0, 180);
        const composer = snap?.composer || getComposer();
        const dangerousPattern = /download|下载|open|打开|link|链接|share|分享|export|导出|import|导入|attachment|附件|file|文件|copy|复制|menu|菜单|more|更多|mic|microphone|dictate|dictation|voice|speech|record|recording|audio|语音|麦克风|听写|录音|转写|启用麦克风|permission|权限|allow|允许/i;
        const candidates = buttons.map((btn) => {
            const signal = getButtonSignalText(btn);
            const inPanel = !!btn.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID}`);
            const inComposer = !!(composer && (composer.closest?.('form')?.contains(btn) || composer.closest?.('[data-composer-surface="true"]')?.contains(btn)));
            const safeSend = !!isChatSendButton(btn, composer);
            const stopLike = /stop-button|stop answering|stop generating|停止|中止/i.test(signal);
            const dangerousSignal = dangerousPattern.test(signal);
            return {
                id: btn.id || '',
                testid: btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '',
                label: getAriaLabel(btn).slice(0, 80),
                text: normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '').slice(0, 80),
                inPanel,
                inComposer,
                safeSend,
                stopLike,
                dangerousSignal,
                automationBlocked: !!isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn) || !!isClearlyNonSendComposerButton(btn),
                signature: describeButtonForLog(btn)
            };
        });
        const dangerousVisible = candidates.filter((item) => !item.inPanel && item.dangerousSignal).slice(0, 20);
        const unsafeSendCandidates = candidates.filter((item) => item.inComposer && item.dangerousSignal && item.safeSend).slice(0, 12);
        const stopAsSend = candidates.filter((item) => item.stopLike && item.safeSend).slice(0, 12);
        const safeSubmitters = candidates.filter((item) => item.safeSend && !item.stopLike && !item.dangerousSignal).slice(0, 12);
        const warnings = [];
        if (unsafeSendCandidates.length) warnings.push('dangerous-composer-button-classified-safe');
        if (stopAsSend.length) warnings.push('stop-button-classified-safe');
        if (!safeSubmitters.length && !snap?.isGenerating) warnings.push('no-explicit-safe-submit-visible-now');
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'safety-sentinel-audit',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            status: warnings.length ? 'warning' : 'ok',
            warnings,
            gates: {
                geometryFallback: 'disabled',
                enterFallbackDefault: !!config.safeEnterSubmitFallback ? 'enabled' : 'disabled',
                strictSubmitter: !!config.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit,
                guardedClickFirewall: !!config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall,
                composerOnlySend: true,
                stopButtonMustNotBeSend: true
            },
            currentPage: {
                generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
                continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
                sendButtonVisible: !!snap?.sendBtn,
                composerTextEmpty: !normalizeText(getComposerText(composer)),
                buttonCountScanned: buttons.length
            },
            safeSubmitters,
            dangerousVisible,
            unsafeSendCandidates,
            stopAsSend,
            rule: 'Text-free safety audit: scans visible button metadata only. It never clicks buttons, never broadens submit selectors, and never includes user messages or saved prompt bodies.'
        };
    }

    function getSafetySentinelSummary() {
        try {
            const payload = buildSafetySentinelPayload();
            return `${payload.status} · safeSubmitters=${payload.safeSubmitters.length} · warnings=${payload.warnings.length} · dangerousVisible=${payload.dangerousVisible.length}`;
        } catch (error) {
            return `error: ${String(error).slice(0, 120)}`;
        }
    }

    function copySafetySentinelAudit() {
        const payload = buildSafetySentinelPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied safety sentinel · ${payload.status} · warnings ${payload.warnings.length}`);
            setStatus('Safety sentinel copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy safety sentinel JSON (text-free button safety audit):', json);
        pushLog('Safety sentinel shown for manual copy');
    }

    function buildRuntimeSnapshotPayload() {
        const pressure = (() => { try { return getMemoryPressureLevel(); } catch (error) { return { level: 'unknown', reasons: [String(error).slice(0, 160)], heap: { text: 'error' }, timers: null }; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch (error) { return { ok: null, blockers: [String(error).slice(0, 160)], missingProfileItems: [] }; } })();
        const buttonAudit = (() => { try { return buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { ok: null, error: String(error).slice(0, 160) }; } })();
        const runtimeWarnings = [];
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) runtimeWarnings.push('pending-auto-prompt');
        if (state.pendingSendRetry) runtimeWarnings.push('pending-send-retry');
        if (state.roundPendingProof) runtimeWarnings.push('round-pending-proof');
        if (state.awaitingGrowth) runtimeWarnings.push('awaiting-growth');
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now()) runtimeWarnings.push('conversation-locked');
        if (pressure.level && pressure.level !== 'ok') runtimeWarnings.push(`memory-${pressure.level}`);
        if (buttonAudit.blankCount) runtimeWarnings.push(`blank-buttons-${buttonAudit.blankCount}`);
        if (buttonAudit.missingRouterIds?.length) runtimeWarnings.push(`unrouted-buttons-${buttonAudit.missingRouterIds.length}`);
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'runtime-snapshot-triage',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            visibility: document.visibilityState || 'unknown',
            hasFocus: document.hasFocus ? document.hasFocus() : null,
            status: state.statusText,
            lastAction: state.lastActionReason,
            runtimeFlags: {
                pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                pendingSendRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
                roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
                locked: !!(state.conversationLockedUntil && state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now()),
                lease: (() => { try { const lease = readSendLease(); return lease ? { ownerSuffix: String(lease.owner || '').slice(-6), reason: lease.reason || '', expiresInMs: Math.max(0, Number(lease.expiresAt || 0) - Date.now()) } : null; } catch { return 'read-error'; } })()
            },
            scheduler: {
                managedTimers: managedTimerIds.length,
                skippedBusyTicks: state.skippedBusyTicks || 0,
                skippedThrottleTicks: state.skippedThrottleTicks || 0,
                lastTickAgoMs: state.lastTickAt ? Date.now() - state.lastTickAt : null,
                lastObserverAt: state.lastObserverAt || 0,
                observerRootKnown: !!observedRoot,
                backgroundHeartbeat: !!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker,
                wakeHub: !!config.crossTabWakeHub,
                steadyAudit: !!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle
            },
            memory: {
                level: pressure.level || 'unknown',
                heap: pressure.heap?.text || 'n/a',
                timers: pressure.timers ?? managedTimerIds.length,
                reasons: Array.isArray(pressure.reasons) ? pressure.reasons.slice(0, 10) : [],
                watchdog: state.lastMemoryWatchdogSummary || 'not run',
                autoTrimCount: state.memoryAutoTrimCount || 0
            },
            panel: {
                renderFailures: state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0,
                actionFailures: state.panelActionFailureCount || 0,
                labelRepairs: state.panelLabelRepairCount || 0,
                buttonAudit: {
                    ok: buttonAudit.ok ?? null,
                    blankCount: buttonAudit.blankCount ?? null,
                    missingFallbackCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit.missingFallbackIds) ? buttonAudit.missingFallbackIds.length : null,
                    missingOwnershipCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit.missingOwnershipIds) ? buttonAudit.missingOwnershipIds.length : null,
                    missingRouterCount: Array.isArray(buttonAudit.missingRouterIds) ? buttonAudit.missingRouterIds.length : null
                }
            },
            automationPreflight: {
                ok: preflight.ok ?? null,
                blockers: Array.isArray(preflight.blockers) ? preflight.blockers.slice(0, 10) : [],
                missingProfileItems: Array.isArray(preflight.missingProfileItems) ? preflight.missingProfileItems.slice(0, 20) : []
            },
            warnings: runtimeWarnings,
            nextActions: runtimeWarnings.length ? ['Use Repair runtime for stuck pending/proof/lease only if auto seems stalled', 'Use Copy audit lite for compact multi-signal review', 'Use Copy audit pack only for deep review'] : ['Runtime snapshot looks clean; keep v116/v120 auto-trigger core unchanged']
        };
    }

    function copyRuntimeSnapshot() {
        const payload = buildRuntimeSnapshotPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied runtime snapshot · warnings ${payload.warnings.length} · text-free`);
            setStatus('Runtime snapshot copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy runtime snapshot JSON (text-free runtime triage):', json);
        pushLog('Runtime snapshot shown for manual copy');
    }

    function sanitizePresetForExplicitExport(preset) {
        if (!preset || typeof preset !== 'object') return null;
        const text = String(preset.text || '');
        const sig = makeBoundedSignature(text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        return {
            id: preset.id,
            name: preset.name || 'Preset',
            text,
            category: preset.category || 'custom',
            builtin: !!preset.builtin,
            savedByUser: !!preset.savedByUser,
            source: preset.source || 'explicit-export',
            archived: !!preset.archived,
            textLength: text.length,
            originalLength: preset.originalLength || text.length,
            textHash: preset.textHash || sig.hash,
            createdAt: preset.createdAt || null,
            updatedAt: preset.updatedAt || null,
            savedAt: preset.savedAt || null
        };
    }

    function buildPromptPresetExplicitExportPayload(presets, label) {
        const list = (presets || []).map(sanitizePresetForExplicitExport).filter(Boolean);
        const totalTextChars = list.reduce((sum, preset) => sum + String(preset.text || '').length, 0);
        return {
            version: 4,
            manifestOnly: false,
            containsPromptText: true,
            exportType: label || 'prompt-presets-explicit',
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            libraryFingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
            totalPresets: list.length,
            totalTextChars,
            presets: list
        };
    }

    function copyExplicitPromptPresetPayload(payload, label) {
        if (!payload || !payload.presets?.length) {
            alert('No preset found to export.');
            return;
        }
        const longCount = payload.presets.filter((preset) => String(preset.text || '').length > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT).length;
        if (payload.totalTextChars > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT || longCount) {
            const ok = confirm(`${label} will copy saved prompt text.\n\nPresets: ${payload.presets.length}\nLong presets: ${longCount}\nTotal text chars: ${payload.totalTextChars}\n\nContinue?`);
            if (!ok) return;
        }
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json); } catch {}
        prompt(`Copy ${label} JSON (contains prompt text by explicit request):`, json);
        pushLog(`Copied ${label} · ${payload.presets.length} presets · ${payload.totalTextChars} chars`);
    }

    function copyActivePromptPresetJson() {
        const preset = getActivePromptPreset();
        copyExplicitPromptPresetPayload(buildPromptPresetExplicitExportPayload([preset], 'active-preset'), 'active preset');
    }

    function copyActivePromptStackJson() {
        const presets = getActivePromptPresets();
        copyExplicitPromptPresetPayload(buildPromptPresetExplicitExportPayload(presets, 'active-prompt-stack'), 'active prompt stack');
    }

    function isPresetArchived(preset) {
        return !!preset?.archived;
    }

    function shouldShowPresetInPicker(preset, activeIds = []) {
        if (!preset) return false;
        if (isPresetArchived(preset) && !getPromptPickerShowArchived() && !activeIds.includes(preset.id)) return false;
        return true;
    }

    function matchesPresetSearch(preset) {
        if (!preset) return false;
        const q = getPromptPickerSearchText().toLowerCase();
        if (!q) return true;
        const haystack = [
            preset.name,
            preset.category,
            preset.source,
            preset.savedByUser ? 'user saved' : '',
            preset.builtin ? 'built in builtin' : 'custom',
            preset.archived ? 'archived' : '',
            // Do not put full long prompt text into diagnostics, but search needs a bounded local scan.
            String(preset.text || '').slice(0, getPromptPresetTextLimit(config))
        ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
        return haystack.includes(q);
    }

    function sortPromptPresetsForDisplay(presets, activeIds = []) {
        const activeSet = new Set(activeIds || []);
        const pinnedSet = new Set(config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []);
        return (presets || []).slice().sort((a, b) => {
            const aw = activeSet.has(a?.id) ? 0 : pinnedSet.has(a?.id) ? 1 : a?.builtin ? 2 : a?.archived ? 5 : 3;
            const bw = activeSet.has(b?.id) ? 0 : pinnedSet.has(b?.id) ? 1 : b?.builtin ? 2 : b?.archived ? 5 : 3;
            if (aw !== bw) return aw - bw;
            return String(a?.name || '').localeCompare(String(b?.name || ''), undefined, { sensitivity: 'base' });
        });
    }

    function getVisiblePromptPresets(activeIds = []) {
        return getPromptPresets().filter((preset) => shouldShowPresetInPicker(preset, activeIds));
    }

    function sanitizePresetForBackup(preset) {
        if (!preset || typeof preset !== 'object') return null;
        const text = String(preset.text || '');
        if (!text) return null;
        const sig = makeBoundedSignature(text, Math.min(text.length || PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT));
        return {
            id: normalizeText(preset.id || ''),
            name: normalizeText(preset.name || text.slice(0, 28)) || 'Preset',
            text,
            category: normalizeText(preset.category || (preset.builtin ? 'general' : 'custom')) || 'custom',
            builtin: !!preset.builtin,
            source: preset.source || undefined,
            savedByUser: !!preset.savedByUser,
            originalLength: Number(preset.originalLength) || text.length,
            textLength: Number(preset.textLength) || text.length,
            textHash: preset.textHash || sig.hash,
            createdAt: Number(preset.createdAt) || undefined,
            updatedAt: Number(preset.updatedAt) || undefined,
            savedAt: Number(preset.savedAt) || undefined,
            truncated: !!preset.truncated,
            archived: !!preset.archived,
            archivedAt: Number(preset.archivedAt) || undefined
        };
    }


    function sanitizePresetForTrash(preset, reason = 'delete') {
        const saved = sanitizePresetForBackup(preset);
        if (!saved || saved.builtin) return null;
        return Object.assign({}, saved, {
            deletedAt: Date.now(),
            deletedReason: normalizeText(reason || 'delete'),
            deletedBuild: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            originalId: normalizeText(preset?.id || saved.id || '') || saved.id
        });
    }

    function readPromptLibraryTrash() {
        try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY) || '[]');
            return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.filter((item) => item && item.text && !item.builtin) : [];
        } catch {
            return [];
        }
    }

    function getPromptTrashQuotaChars() {
        return clampNumber(config.promptPresetTrashSoftQuotaChars, 40000, PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
    }

    function getPromptTrashLimit() {
        return clampNumber(config.promptPresetTrashLimit, 1, PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_LIMIT);
    }

    function shrinkPromptTrashToQuota(items, quota = getPromptTrashQuotaChars()) {
        let next = (items || []).filter(Boolean).slice(0, getPromptTrashLimit());
        while (next.length > 1 && estimateJsonChars(next) > quota) next = next.slice(0, -1);
        return next;
    }

    function writePromptLibraryTrash(items, reason = 'update-trash') {
        let next = shrinkPromptTrashToQuota(items || []);
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            if (next.length > 1) {
                try {
                    next = [next[0]];
                    localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
                    pushLog('Prompt trash saved after trimming old deleted presets');
                    return true;
                } catch {}
            }
            pushLog(`Prompt trash write failed: ${error?.message || error}`);
            return false;
        }
    }

    function addPresetsToPromptTrash(presets, reason = 'delete') {
        if (!config.promptPresetTrashEnabled) return 0;
        const items = (Array.isArray(presets) ? presets : [presets]).map((preset) => sanitizePresetForTrash(preset, reason)).filter(Boolean);
        if (!items.length) return 0;
        const existing = readPromptLibraryTrash();
        const byKey = new Set();
        const merged = [];
        for (const item of [...items, ...existing]) {
            const itemSig = makeBoundedSignature(String(item.text || ''), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
            const key = `${item.textHash || itemSig.hash}:${item.textLength || String(item.text || '').length}`;
            if (byKey.has(key)) continue;
            byKey.add(key);
            merged.push(item);
        }
        if (writePromptLibraryTrash(merged, reason)) {
            pushLog(`Prompt trash saved ${items.length} preset(s) · ${reason}`);
            return items.length;
        }
        return 0;
    }

    function getPromptLibraryTrashStats() {
        const items = readPromptLibraryTrash();
        const raw = (() => { try { return localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY) || ''; } catch { return ''; } })();
        const latest = items[0] || null;
        return {
            count: items.length,
            rawChars: raw.length,
            quota: getPromptTrashQuotaChars(),
            pct: getPromptTrashQuotaChars() ? Math.round((raw.length / getPromptTrashQuotaChars()) * 100) : 0,
            latestAt: Number(latest?.deletedAt || 0),
            latestReason: latest?.deletedReason || '',
            latestName: latest?.name || ''
        };
    }

    function getPromptLibraryTrashSummary() {
        const stats = getPromptLibraryTrashStats();
        if (!stats.count) return 'trash 0';
        const when = stats.latestAt ? `${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - stats.latestAt)} ago` : 'unknown time';
        return `trash ${stats.count} · ${stats.rawChars}/${stats.quota} chars (${stats.pct}%) · latest ${stats.latestName || 'preset'} ${when}`;
    }

    function restoreLatestDeletedPreset() {
        const trash = readPromptLibraryTrash();
        if (!trash.length) {
            alert('Prompt trash is empty.');
            return;
        }
        const item = trash[0];
        const existingHashes = new Set(getPromptPresets().map((preset) => makeBoundedSignature(String(preset.text || ''), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash));
        const sig = makeBoundedSignature(String(item.text || ''), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        if (existingHashes.has(sig.hash) && !confirm(`The latest deleted preset already appears to exist in the active library. Restore another copy anyway?\n\nName: ${item.name}`)) return;
        maybeBackupPromptLibrary('before-restore-deleted-preset');
        const restored = clonePresetForStorage(item, {
            id: `restored-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`,
            builtin: false,
            source: item.source || 'Prompt trash',
            restoredAt: Date.now(),
            updatedAt: Date.now()
        });
        config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), restored];
        config.activePromptPresetId = restored.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [restored.id];
        config.continueText = restored.text;
        writePromptLibraryTrash(trash.slice(1), 'restore-latest');
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Restored deleted preset -> ${restored.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function emptyPromptLibraryTrash() {
        const stats = getPromptLibraryTrashStats();
        if (!stats.count) {
            alert('Prompt trash is already empty.');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(`Empty prompt trash?\n\nThis permanently removes ${stats.count} deleted preset copy/copies from the local recycle bin. Active prompt library is not affected.`)) return;
        try { localStorage.removeItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY); } catch {}
        pushLog(`Prompt trash emptied · removed ${stats.count}`);
        safeUpdatePanel('empty-prompt-trash');
    }

    function archiveActivePromptPreset() {
        const active = getActivePromptPreset();
        if (!active) return;
        if (active.builtin) {
            alert('Built-in presets are not archived. Pin/unpin or use search to reduce clutter.');
            return;
        }
        const currentlyArchived = !!active.archived;
        const message = currentlyArchived
            ? `Unarchive preset "${active.name}"? It will appear in normal picker/search again.`
            : `Archive preset "${active.name}"? It will be hidden from normal picker/search but kept in the library.`;
        if (!confirm(message)) return;
        maybeBackupPromptLibrary(currentlyArchived ? 'before-unarchive-active-preset' : 'before-archive-active-preset');
        const now = Date.now();
        config.promptPresetLibrary = getPromptPresets().map((preset) => {
            if (preset.id !== active.id) return preset;
            const next = clonePresetForStorage(preset, {
                archived: !currentlyArchived,
                archivedAt: currentlyArchived ? undefined : now,
                updatedAt: now
            });
            if (currentlyArchived) {
                delete next.archived;
                delete next.archivedAt;
            }
            return next;
        });
        if (!currentlyArchived) {
            config.pinnedPromptPresetIds = (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => id !== active.id);
            const replacement = getPromptPresets().find((preset) => preset.id !== active.id && !preset.archived)
                || getPromptPresets().find((preset) => preset.id !== active.id)
                || getBuiltinPresetLibrary()[0];
            if (replacement) {
                config.activePromptPresetId = replacement.id;
                config.activePromptPresetIds = [replacement.id];
                config.continueText = replacement.text;
            }
        }
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`${currentlyArchived ? 'Unarchived preset' : 'Archived preset'} -> ${active.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function toggleShowArchivedPresets() {
        const next = !getPromptPickerShowArchived();
        setPromptPickerShowArchivedLocal(next, 'prompt-archive-filter-toggle');
        pushLog(`Archived presets -> ${next ? 'shown' : 'hidden'} (local tab/chat)`);
        markDirty(true);
        safeUpdatePanel('prompt-archive-filter-toggle');
    }

    function readPromptLibraryBackups() {
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY);
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw || '[]');
            return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.filter((item) => item && Array.isArray(item.presets)) : [];
        } catch {
            return [];
        }
    }

    function getPromptBackupQuotaChars() {
        return clampNumber(config.promptPresetBackupSoftQuotaChars, 60000, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
    }

    function estimateJsonChars(value) {
        try { return JSON.stringify(value || null).length; } catch { return 0; }
    }

    function getPromptLibraryBackupStats() {
        const backups = readPromptLibraryBackups();
        const raw = (() => { try { return localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY) || ''; } catch { return ''; } })();
        const quota = getPromptBackupQuotaChars();
        const latest = backups[0] || null;
        const latestChars = latest ? estimateJsonChars(latest) : 0;
        return {
            count: backups.length,
            rawChars: raw.length,
            quota,
            pct: quota ? Math.round((raw.length / quota) * 100) : 0,
            latestReason: latest?.reason || '',
            latestAt: Number(latest?.createdAt || 0),
            latestChars
        };
    }

    function shrinkBackupsToQuota(backups, quota) {
        const limit = clampNumber(config.promptPresetBackupLimit, 1, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_LIMIT);
        let next = (backups || []).slice(0, limit);
        while (next.length > 1 && estimateJsonChars(next) > quota) next = next.slice(0, -1);
        return next;
    }

    function writePromptLibraryBackups(backups, options = {}) {
        const quota = getPromptBackupQuotaChars();
        let next = shrinkBackupsToQuota(backups || [], quota);
        const jsonChars = estimateJsonChars(next);
        const singleOversized = next.length === 1 && jsonChars > quota;
        if (singleOversized && options.reason !== 'manual') {
            pushLog(`Prompt backup skipped: library too large for backup quota (${jsonChars}/${quota} chars)`);
            return false;
        }
        if (singleOversized && !confirm(`Prompt backup is large (${jsonChars}/${quota} chars) and may pressure browser storage. Save this backup anyway?`)) {
            pushLog('Prompt backup cancelled: backup exceeds soft quota');
            return false;
        }
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            if (next.length > 1) {
                try {
                    next = [next[0]];
                    localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY, JSON.stringify(next));
                    pushLog('Prompt backup saved after trimming old backups');
                    return true;
                } catch {}
            }
            pushLog(`Prompt backup failed: ${error?.message || error}`);
            return false;
        }
    }

    function createPromptLibraryBackup(reason = 'manual') {
        const presets = getPromptPresets().map(sanitizePresetForBackup).filter(Boolean);
        const backup = {
            version: 2,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            reason: normalizeText(reason || 'manual'),
            createdAt: Date.now(),
            stats: getPromptLibraryStats(),
            backupCharsEstimate: 0,
            activePromptPresetId: config.activePromptPresetId,
            activePromptPresetIds: Array.isArray(config.activePromptPresetIds) ? [...config.activePromptPresetIds] : [],
            continueTextHash: makeBoundedSignature(config.continueText || '', PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash,
            presets
        };
        backup.backupCharsEstimate = estimateJsonChars(backup);
        if (backup.backupCharsEstimate > PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_SINGLE_WARN_CHARS && reason === 'manual') {
            const ok = confirm(`This prompt-library backup is large (${backup.backupCharsEstimate} chars). Long user-saved prompts are stored only because you explicitly saved them. Continue?`);
            if (!ok) return false;
        }
        const ok = writePromptLibraryBackups([backup, ...readPromptLibraryBackups()], { reason });
        if (ok) pushLog(`Prompt library backup saved · ${reason} · ${presets.length} presets · ${backup.backupCharsEstimate} chars`);
        return ok;
    }

    function getPromptLibraryBackupSummary() {
        const stats = getPromptLibraryBackupStats();
        if (!stats.count) return 'backups 0';
        const when = stats.latestAt ? `${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - stats.latestAt)} ago` : 'unknown time';
        return `backups ${stats.count} · ${stats.rawChars}/${stats.quota} chars (${stats.pct}%) · latest ${stats.latestReason || 'manual'} ${when}`;
    }


    function getPromptStoragePressureStats() {
        const configChars = estimateJsonChars(config);
        const backupRaw = (() => { try { return localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY) || ''; } catch { return ''; } })();
        const trashRaw = (() => { try { return localStorage.getItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY) || ''; } catch { return ''; } })();
        const libraryStats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        const backupStats = getPromptLibraryBackupStats();
        const trashStats = getPromptLibraryTrashStats();
        return {
            configChars,
            backupChars: backupRaw.length,
            trashChars: trashRaw.length,
            totalPromptStorageChars: configChars + backupRaw.length + trashRaw.length,
            libraryChars: libraryStats.totalChars,
            libraryQuota: libraryStats.quota,
            backupCount: backupStats.count,
            backupQuota: backupStats.quota,
            trashCount: trashStats.count,
            trashQuota: trashStats.quota
        };
    }

    function getPromptStoragePressureSummary() {
        const s = getPromptStoragePressureStats();
        return `storage config ${s.configChars} · library ${s.libraryChars}/${s.libraryQuota} · backups ${s.backupCount}/${s.backupQuota} (${s.backupChars} chars) · trash ${s.trashCount}/${s.trashQuota} (${s.trashChars} chars) · total approx ${s.totalPromptStorageChars}`;
    }

    function emergencyTrimPromptStorage(reason = 'storage-pressure') {
        // v133: never delete the active prompt library during emergency storage trim.
        // Only trim redundant backup/trash copies that can multiply user-saved long prompts.
        let changed = false;
        try {
            const backups = readPromptLibraryBackups();
            if (backups.length > 1) {
                localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY, JSON.stringify(backups.slice(0, 1)));
                changed = true;
                pushLog(`Storage guard trimmed prompt backups to latest · ${reason}`);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            try {
                localStorage.removeItem(PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_KEY);
                changed = true;
                pushLog(`Storage guard removed prompt backups after quota error · ${reason}`);
            } catch {}
        }
        try {
            const trash = readPromptLibraryTrash();
            if (trash.length > 6 || estimateJsonChars(trash) > Math.floor(getPromptTrashQuotaChars() / 2)) {
                localStorage.setItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY, JSON.stringify(trimTrashItems(trash.slice(0, 6), Math.floor(getPromptTrashQuotaChars() / 2))));
                changed = true;
                pushLog(`Storage guard trimmed prompt trash · ${reason}`);
            }
        } catch (error) {
            try {
                localStorage.removeItem(PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_KEY);
                changed = true;
                pushLog(`Storage guard removed prompt trash after quota error · ${reason}`);
            } catch {}
        }
        return changed;
    }

    function promptStorageAuditInteractive() {
        const summary = getPromptStoragePressureSummary();
        const doTrim = confirm(`Prompt library storage audit:\n\n${summary}\n\nRun safe trim now?\n\nThis only trims backup/trash copies. It does not delete your active prompt library.`);
        if (!doTrim) return;
        const before = getPromptStoragePressureStats();
        const changed = emergencyTrimPromptStorage('manual-storage-audit');
        const after = getPromptStoragePressureStats();
        alert(`Storage trim ${changed ? 'completed' : 'had nothing to trim'}.\n\nBefore approx: ${before.totalPromptStorageChars} chars\nAfter approx: ${after.totalPromptStorageChars} chars`);
        safeUpdatePanel('storage-audit');
    }

    function maybeBackupPromptLibrary(reason) {
        if (!config.promptPresetAutoBackup) return true;
        return createPromptLibraryBackup(reason);
    }

    function trimPromptLibraryBackups() {
        const before = getPromptLibraryBackupStats();
        if (!before.count) {
            alert('No prompt library backups to trim.');
            return;
        }
        const backups = readPromptLibraryBackups();
        const trimmed = shrinkBackupsToQuota(backups, getPromptBackupQuotaChars());
        if (!confirm(`Trim prompt-library backups?

Before: ${before.count} backups · ${before.rawChars}/${before.quota} chars
After: ${trimmed.length} backup(s) · approx ${estimateJsonChars(trimmed)} chars

This only removes old backup copies, not your active prompt library.`)) return;
        if (writePromptLibraryBackups(trimmed, { reason: 'trim' })) {
            pushLog(`Prompt backups trimmed · ${before.count} -> ${trimmed.length}`);
            safeUpdatePanel('trim-backups');
        }
    }

    function restoreLatestPromptLibraryBackup() {
        const backups = readPromptLibraryBackups();
        if (!backups.length) {
            alert('No prompt library backups found.');
            return;
        }
        const latest = backups[0];
        const when = latest.createdAt ? new Date(Number(latest.createdAt)).toLocaleString() : 'unknown time';
        const count = Array.isArray(latest.presets) ? latest.presets.length : 0;
        if (!confirm(`Restore latest prompt library backup?\n\nReason: ${latest.reason || 'manual'}\nTime: ${when}\nPresets: ${count}\n\nCurrent library will be backed up first.`)) return;
        createPromptLibraryBackup('before-restore');
        config.promptPresetLibrary = (latest.presets || []).map((preset) => clonePresetForStorage(preset, {
            id: preset.id || `preset-restore-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9)}`,
            text: normalizePresetText(preset.text, config),
            builtin: !!preset.builtin,
            restoredAt: Date.now()
        })).filter((preset) => preset.text);
        if (!config.promptPresetLibrary.some((preset) => preset.builtin)) {
            config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getBuiltinPresetLibrary(), ...config.promptPresetLibrary];
        }
        const validIds = new Set(config.promptPresetLibrary.map((preset) => preset.id));
        config.activePromptPresetIds = (latest.activePromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
        if (!config.activePromptPresetIds.length) config.activePromptPresetIds = [config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.id].filter(Boolean);
        config.activePromptPresetId = config.activePromptPresetIds[0] || config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.id || 'continue-basic';
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(config.activePromptPresetIds, config.promptPresetLibrary, config) || config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.text || '继续';
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt library restored from backup · ${count} presets`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function dedupePromptLibrary() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const seen = new Map();
        const next = [];
        const removed = [];
        for (const preset of presets) {
            const text = normalizeText(preset?.text || '');
            if (!text) continue;
            const key = makeBoundedSignature(text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash || text;
            if (seen.has(key)) {
                // Built-ins win over duplicate customs; otherwise keep the first occurrence.
                const existing = seen.get(key);
                if (!existing.builtin && preset.builtin) {
                    const idx = next.findIndex((item) => item.id === existing.id);
                    if (idx >= 0) next[idx] = preset;
                    seen.set(key, preset);
                    removed.push(existing);
                } else {
                    removed.push(preset);
                }
                continue;
            }
            seen.set(key, preset);
            next.push(preset);
        }
        if (!removed.length) {
            alert('No duplicate prompt presets found.');
            return;
        }
        const removedCustom = removed.filter((preset) => !preset.builtin).length;
        if (!confirm(`Remove ${removed.length} duplicate preset(s)?\n\nCustom duplicates: ${removedCustom}\nA backup will be created first.`)) return;
        createPromptLibraryBackup('before-dedupe');
        config.promptPresetLibrary = next;
        const validIds = new Set(next.map((preset) => preset.id));
        config.pinnedPromptPresetIds = (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
        config.activePromptPresetIds = getActivePromptPresetIds().filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
        if (!config.activePromptPresetIds.length) config.activePromptPresetIds = [next[0]?.id].filter(Boolean);
        config.activePromptPresetId = config.activePromptPresetIds[0] || next[0]?.id || config.activePromptPresetId;
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(config.activePromptPresetIds, next, config) || next[0]?.text || config.continueText;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt library deduped · removed ${removed.length}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function auditPromptLibrary({ repair = false } = {}) {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const seenIds = new Set();
        const seenHashes = new Set();
        const issues = { emptyText: 0, duplicateIds: 0, duplicateTexts: 0, missingMetadata: 0, orphanPinned: 0, invalidActive: 0, missingBuiltins: 0 };
        const validIdsBefore = new Set(presets.map((preset) => preset?.id).filter(Boolean));
        if (!presets.some((preset) => preset?.builtin)) issues.missingBuiltins += 1;
        const activeIds = Array.isArray(config.activePromptPresetIds) ? config.activePromptPresetIds : [];
        if (!activeIds.length || activeIds.some((id) => !validIdsBefore.has(id))) issues.invalidActive += 1;
        issues.orphanPinned = (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => !validIdsBefore.has(id)).length;

        const repaired = [];
        for (const preset of presets) {
            const text = String(preset?.text || '');
            if (!normalizeText(text)) { issues.emptyText += 1; if (repair) continue; }
            let id = normalizeText(preset?.id || '');
            if (!id || seenIds.has(id)) {
                issues.duplicateIds += id ? 1 : 0;
                if (repair) id = `preset-repair-${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`;
            }
            if (id) seenIds.add(id);
            const sig = makeBoundedSignature(text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
            if (sig.hash && seenHashes.has(sig.hash)) issues.duplicateTexts += 1;
            if (sig.hash) seenHashes.add(sig.hash);
            const needsMeta = !preset.textHash || !preset.textLength || !preset.updatedAt;
            if (needsMeta) issues.missingMetadata += 1;
            if (repair) {
                repaired.push(clonePresetForStorage(preset, {
                    id,
                    text: normalizePresetText(text, config),
                    originalLength: Number(preset.originalLength) || text.length,
                    textLength: Number(preset.textLength) || text.length,
                    textHash: preset.textHash || sig.hash,
                    updatedAt: Number(preset.updatedAt) || Date.now()
                }));
            }
        }

        if (repair) {
            createPromptLibraryBackup('before-audit-repair');
            config.promptPresetLibrary = repaired.some((preset) => preset.builtin) ? repaired : [...getBuiltinPresetLibrary(), ...repaired];
            const validIds = new Set(config.promptPresetLibrary.map((preset) => preset.id));
            config.pinnedPromptPresetIds = (config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
            config.activePromptPresetIds = (config.activePromptPresetIds || []).filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
            if (!config.activePromptPresetIds.length) config.activePromptPresetIds = [config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.id].filter(Boolean);
            config.activePromptPresetId = config.activePromptPresetIds[0] || config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.id || 'continue-basic';
            config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(config.activePromptPresetIds, config.promptPresetLibrary, config) || config.promptPresetLibrary[0]?.text || '继续';
            saveConfig();
            pushLog('Prompt library audit repair applied');
            markDirty(true);
        }
        return { issues, total: presets.length };
    }

    function auditPromptLibraryInteractive() {
        const report = auditPromptLibrary({ repair: false });
        const issueCount = Object.values(report.issues).reduce((sum, n) => sum + Number(n || 0), 0);
        const lines = [
            `Prompt library audit`,
            `Presets: ${report.total}`,
            `Issues: ${issueCount}`,
            `Empty text: ${report.issues.emptyText}`,
            `Duplicate IDs: ${report.issues.duplicateIds}`,
            `Duplicate texts: ${report.issues.duplicateTexts}`,
            `Missing metadata: ${report.issues.missingMetadata}`,
            `Orphan pinned: ${report.issues.orphanPinned}`,
            `Invalid active stack: ${report.issues.invalidActive}`,
            `Missing builtins: ${report.issues.missingBuiltins}`
        ];
        if (!issueCount) {
            alert(`${lines.join('\n')}\n\nNo repair needed.`);
            pushLog('Prompt library audit passed');
            return;
        }
        if (confirm(`${lines.join('\n')}\n\nCreate backup and repair safe issues now?`)) {
            auditPromptLibrary({ repair: true });
        }
    }


    function makePromptLibraryRollbackSnapshot(reason = 'rollback') {
        return {
            reason,
            createdAt: Date.now(),
            promptPresetLibrary: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(getPromptPresets() || [])),
            activePromptPresetId: config.activePromptPresetId,
            activePromptPresetIds: Array.isArray(config.activePromptPresetIds) ? [...config.activePromptPresetIds] : [],
            pinnedPromptPresetIds: Array.isArray(config.pinnedPromptPresetIds) ? [...config.pinnedPromptPresetIds] : [],
            continueText: config.continueText,
            promptPresets: Array.isArray(config.promptPresets) ? [...config.promptPresets] : [],
            knownContinueTexts: Array.isArray(config.knownContinueTexts) ? [...config.knownContinueTexts] : []
        };
    }

    function restorePromptLibraryRollbackSnapshot(snapshot, reason = 'rollback') {
        if (!snapshot) return false;
        config.promptPresetLibrary = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(snapshot.promptPresetLibrary || []));
        config.activePromptPresetId = snapshot.activePromptPresetId;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = Array.isArray(snapshot.activePromptPresetIds) ? [...snapshot.activePromptPresetIds] : [];
        config.pinnedPromptPresetIds = Array.isArray(snapshot.pinnedPromptPresetIds) ? [...snapshot.pinnedPromptPresetIds] : [];
        config.continueText = snapshot.continueText || config.continueText || '继续';
        config.promptPresets = Array.isArray(snapshot.promptPresets) ? [...snapshot.promptPresets] : config.promptPresets;
        config.knownContinueTexts = Array.isArray(snapshot.knownContinueTexts) ? [...snapshot.knownContinueTexts] : config.knownContinueTexts;
        pushLog(`Prompt library rollback applied · ${reason}`);
        return true;
    }

    function validatePromptLibraryRuntime(reason = 'validate') {
        const report = auditPromptLibrary({ repair: false });
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const validIds = new Set(presets.map((preset) => preset?.id).filter(Boolean));
        const activeIds = Array.isArray(config.activePromptPresetIds) ? config.activePromptPresetIds.filter(Boolean) : [];
        const stackMissing = activeIds.filter((id) => !validIds.has(id));
        const activeText = buildPromptTextFromIds(activeIds, presets, config);
        const issueCount = Object.values(report.issues || {}).reduce((sum, n) => sum + Number(n || 0), 0);
        const fatal = [];
        if (!presets.length) fatal.push('empty library');
        if (!presets.some((preset) => preset?.builtin)) fatal.push('missing builtins');
        if (!activeIds.length) fatal.push('empty active stack');
        if (stackMissing.length) fatal.push(`missing active ids ${stackMissing.length}`);
        if (!normalizeText(activeText)) fatal.push('empty active prompt text');
        return {
            ok: fatal.length === 0,
            reason,
            fatal,
            issueCount,
            report,
            presets: presets.length,
            activeIds: activeIds.length,
            activeChars: activeText.length,
            stackMissing: stackMissing.length
        };
    }

    function getPromptLibraryValidationSummary(result = validatePromptLibraryRuntime('summary')) {
        return `${result.ok ? 'ok' : 'bad'} · presets=${result.presets} · active=${result.activeIds} · activeChars=${result.activeChars} · issues=${result.issueCount}${result.fatal.length ? ` · fatal=${result.fatal.join(', ')}` : ''}`;
    }

    function verifyPromptLibraryInteractive() {
        const result = validatePromptLibraryRuntime('manual-verify');
        const lines = [
            'Prompt library verify',
            `Status: ${result.ok ? 'OK' : 'BAD'}`,
            `Presets: ${result.presets}`,
            `Active stack items: ${result.activeIds}`,
            `Active prompt chars: ${result.activeChars}`,
            `Issues: ${result.issueCount}`,
            `Fatal: ${result.fatal.length ? result.fatal.join(', ') : 'none'}`,
            '',
            'This check does not print saved prompt bodies.'
        ];
        alert(lines.join('\n'));
        pushLog(`Prompt library verify -> ${result.ok ? 'ok' : 'bad'} · issues ${result.issueCount}`);
    }

    function getBuiltinPresetLibrary() {
        const now = Date.now();
        return BUILTIN_PROMPT_PRESETS.map((preset) => clonePresetForStorage(preset, {
            builtin: true,
            createdAt: preset.createdAt || now,
            updatedAt: preset.updatedAt || now
        }));
    }

    function migrateConfig(nextConfig) {
        const builtins = getBuiltinPresetLibrary();
        const builtinById = new Map(builtins.map((preset) => [preset.id, preset]));
        const existing = Array.isArray(nextConfig.promptPresetLibrary) ? nextConfig.promptPresetLibrary : [];
        const migrated = [];
        const seenIds = new Set();
        const seenTexts = new Set();

        function addPreset(preset, forceBuiltin = false) {
            const text = normalizePresetText(preset?.text || preset, nextConfig);
            if (!text) return;
            const id = normalizeText(preset?.id || '') || `preset-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9)}`;
            const key = forceBuiltin ? id : text;
            if (seenIds.has(id) || (!forceBuiltin && seenTexts.has(key))) return;
            const now = Date.now();
            migrated.push(clonePresetForStorage(preset && typeof preset === 'object' ? preset : {}, {
                id,
                name: normalizeText(preset?.name || text.slice(0, 28)) || 'Custom preset',
                text,
                category: normalizeText(preset?.category || (forceBuiltin ? 'general' : 'custom')) || 'custom',
                builtin: !!(forceBuiltin || preset?.builtin),
                createdAt: Number(preset?.createdAt) || now,
                updatedAt: Number(preset?.updatedAt) || now
            }));
            seenIds.add(id);
            seenTexts.add(text);
        }

        for (const preset of builtins) addPreset(preset, true);
        for (const preset of existing) {
            if (!preset || typeof preset !== 'object') continue;
            if (builtinById.has(preset.id)) continue;
            addPreset(preset, false);
        }

        const legacyTexts = [
            nextConfig.continueText,
            ...(Array.isArray(nextConfig.promptPresets) ? nextConfig.promptPresets : []),
            ...(Array.isArray(nextConfig.knownContinueTexts) ? nextConfig.knownContinueTexts : [])
        ];
        for (const text of legacyTexts) addPreset({ name: normalizePresetText(text).slice(0, 28), text, category: 'legacy', builtin: false }, false);

        nextConfig.promptPresetLibrary = migrated;

        const activeById = migrated.find((preset) => preset.id === nextConfig.activePromptPresetId);
        const activeByText = migrated.find((preset) => preset.text === normalizePresetText(nextConfig.continueText, nextConfig));
        const active = activeById || activeByText || migrated[0] || clonePresetForStorage(BUILTIN_PROMPT_PRESETS[0], { builtin: true });
        nextConfig.activePromptPresetId = active.id;
        if (!Array.isArray(nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds) || !nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds.length) {
            nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds = [active.id];
        } else {
            const validIds = new Set(migrated.map((preset) => preset.id));
            nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds = nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds.filter((id) => validIds.has(id));
            if (!nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds.length) nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds = [active.id];
        }
        nextConfig.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(nextConfig.activePromptPresetIds, migrated, nextConfig) || active.text;

        if (!Array.isArray(nextConfig.pinnedPromptPresetIds)) nextConfig.pinnedPromptPresetIds = [];
        nextConfig.pinnedPromptPresetIds = nextConfig.pinnedPromptPresetIds.filter((id) => nextConfig.promptPresetLibrary.some((preset) => preset.id === id)).slice(0, 12);
        nextConfig.promptSearchText = normalizeText(nextConfig.promptSearchText || '');
        if (typeof nextConfig.allowUserInputPresetSave !== 'boolean') nextConfig.allowUserInputPresetSave = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.allowLongPromptPresets !== 'boolean') nextConfig.allowLongPromptPresets = false;
        nextConfig.maxPromptPresetTextChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.maxPromptPresetTextChars, 280, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT);
        nextConfig.longPromptPresetMaxChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.longPromptPresetMaxChars, nextConfig.maxPromptPresetTextChars, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        nextConfig.promptPresetLibrarySoftQuotaChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.promptPresetLibrarySoftQuotaChars, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT, 400000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetAutoBackup !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetAutoBackup = true;
        nextConfig.promptPresetBackupLimit = clampNumber(nextConfig.promptPresetBackupLimit, 1, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_LIMIT);
        nextConfig.promptPresetBackupSoftQuotaChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.promptPresetBackupSoftQuotaChars, 60000, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetImportPreview !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetImportPreview = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetTrashEnabled !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetTrashEnabled = true;
