        nextConfig.promptPresetTrashLimit = clampNumber(nextConfig.promptPresetTrashLimit, 1, PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_LIMIT);
        nextConfig.promptPresetTrashSoftQuotaChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.promptPresetTrashSoftQuotaChars, 40000, PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetShowArchived !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetShowArchived = false;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetManifestExport !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetManifestExport = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetSingleExport !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetSingleExport = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetStackImportRestore !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetStackImportRestore = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetImportRollbackGuard !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetImportRollbackGuard = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptPresetSafeAuditPack !== 'boolean') nextConfig.promptPresetSafeAuditPack = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== 'boolean') nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable !== 'boolean') nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable = true;
        nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs, 0, 10000);
        if (!nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs) nextConfig.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs = 1600;
        if (!['newline', 'space', 'custom'].includes(nextConfig.promptJoinMode)) nextConfig.promptJoinMode = 'newline';
        if (typeof nextConfig.promptCustomSeparator !== 'string') nextConfig.promptCustomSeparator = '\n';
        if (!['comfortable', 'compact'].includes(nextConfig.panelDensity)) nextConfig.panelDensity = 'comfortable';
        if (!['system', 'dark', 'light'].includes(nextConfig.themeMode)) nextConfig.themeMode = 'system';
        nextConfig.pollMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.pollMs, 500, 10000);
        nextConfig.idleAfterFinishMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.idleAfterFinishMs, 900, 60000);
        nextConfig.refreshResumeDelayMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.refreshResumeDelayMs, 500, 30000);
        nextConfig.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars = clampNumber(nextConfig.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars, 0, 10000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.refreshResumeAllowAssistantPresenceGate !== 'boolean') nextConfig.refreshResumeAllowAssistantPresenceGate = true;
        nextConfig.cooldownMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.cooldownMs, 1000, 60000);
        nextConfig.bottomTriggerThresholdPx = clampNumber(nextConfig.bottomTriggerThresholdPx, 80, 2000);
        nextConfig.scrollSettleMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.scrollSettleMs, 80, 2000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.steadyAuditWhenIdle !== 'boolean') nextConfig.steadyAuditWhenIdle = true;
        nextConfig.steadyAuditMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.steadyAuditMs, 1200, 30000);
        nextConfig.hiddenSteadyAuditMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.hiddenSteadyAuditMs, 5000, 120000);
        nextConfig.scrollWakeThrottleMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.scrollWakeThrottleMs, 250, 5000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue !== 'boolean') nextConfig.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.hiddenTickWhenAllowed !== 'boolean') nextConfig.hiddenTickWhenAllowed = true;
        nextConfig.sendRetryDelayMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.sendRetryDelayMs, 80, 3000);
        nextConfig.sendRetryMaxAttempts = clampNumber(nextConfig.sendRetryMaxAttempts, 1, 20);
        nextConfig.submitAfterFillDelayMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.submitAfterFillDelayMs, 80, 3000);
        nextConfig.submitAfterFillMaxMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.submitAfterFillMaxMs, 500, 10000);
        if (!Array.isArray(nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs)) nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs.slice();
        nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs = nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs.map((ms) => clampNumber(ms, 20, 2000)).filter((ms) => Number.isFinite(Number(ms))).slice(0, 6);
        if (!nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs.length) nextConfig.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs.slice();
        nextConfig.sendLeaseMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.sendLeaseMs, 3000, 60000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.crossTabSendGuard !== 'boolean') nextConfig.crossTabSendGuard = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.hotkeysEnabled !== 'boolean') nextConfig.hotkeysEnabled = true;
        if (typeof nextConfig.globalEnabled !== 'boolean') {
            nextConfig.globalEnabled = typeof nextConfig.enabled === 'boolean' ? nextConfig.enabled : true;
        }
        // Keep the old `enabled` field as a compatibility alias so existing hotkeys/menu paths remain safe.
        nextConfig.enabled = nextConfig.globalEnabled;
        if (typeof nextConfig.keepAliveWhenVisible !== 'boolean') nextConfig.keepAliveWhenVisible = true;
        nextConfig.keepAlivePulseMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.keepAlivePulseMs, 5000, 120000);
        if (typeof nextConfig.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit !== 'boolean') nextConfig.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit = true;
        nextConfig.submitProofTimeoutMs = clampNumber(nextConfig.submitProofTimeoutMs, 2000, 15000);

        if (!nextConfig.hotkeys || typeof nextConfig.hotkeys !== 'object') nextConfig.hotkeys = {};
        nextConfig.hotkeys = Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_HOTKEYS, nextConfig.hotkeys);
        for (const key of Object.keys(nextConfig.hotkeys)) {
            nextConfig.hotkeys[key] = normalizeHotkeyString(nextConfig.hotkeys[key]);
        }
        return nextConfig;
    }

    function loadConfig() {
        try {
            const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}');
            const next = migrateConfig(Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_CONFIG, saved));

            // v94 test expectation: after installing/updating and refreshing an already-finished
            // conversation, auto-resume should be armed by default. Existing v93 installs may
            // have saved aggressiveAfterRefresh=false in localStorage, so migrate once.
            if (saved.__v94AutoResumeMigration !== true) {
                next.aggressiveAfterRefresh = true;
                next.__v94AutoResumeMigration = true;
            }

            // v95 expectation: refresh-resume should feel immediate after install/refresh,
            // while normal multi-round continuation remains protected by idle/cooldown checks.
            if (saved.__v95FastResumeMigration !== true) {
                next.pollMs = Math.min(Number(next.pollMs) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.pollMs, DEFAULT_CONFIG.pollMs);
                next.idleAfterFinishMs = Math.min(Number(next.idleAfterFinishMs) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.idleAfterFinishMs, DEFAULT_CONFIG.idleAfterFinishMs);
                next.refreshResumeDelayMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.refreshResumeDelayMs;
                next.cooldownMs = Math.min(Number(next.cooldownMs) || DEFAULT_CONFIG.cooldownMs, DEFAULT_CONFIG.cooldownMs);
                next.sendRetryDelayMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.sendRetryDelayMs;
                next.sendRetryMaxAttempts = DEFAULT_CONFIG.sendRetryMaxAttempts;
                next.submitAfterFillDelayMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.submitAfterFillDelayMs;
                next.submitAfterFillMaxMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.submitAfterFillMaxMs;
                next.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs.slice();
                if (typeof next.safeFormSubmitFallback !== 'boolean') next.safeFormSubmitFallback = true;
                if (typeof next.safeEnterSubmitFallback !== 'boolean') next.safeEnterSubmitFallback = false;
                if (typeof next.guardedAutomationClickFirewall !== 'boolean') next.guardedAutomationClickFirewall = true;
                if (typeof next.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit !== 'boolean') next.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit = true;
                next.submitProofTimeoutMs = clampNumber(next.submitProofTimeoutMs, 2000, 15000);
                next.crossTabSendGuard = true;
                next.sendLeaseMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.sendLeaseMs;
                next.__v95FastResumeMigration = true;
            }

            if (saved.__v97GlobalScopeSyncMigration !== true) {
                next.globalEnabled = typeof saved.globalEnabled === 'boolean' ? saved.globalEnabled : (typeof saved.enabled === 'boolean' ? saved.enabled : true);
                next.enabled = next.globalEnabled;
                next.keepAliveWhenVisible = true;
                next.keepAlivePulseMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.keepAlivePulseMs;
                next.__v97GlobalScopeSyncMigration = true;
            }

            // v111 self-check from v107 diagnostics: short replies such as “收到。”
            // must not block refresh-resume/test probing. Normal fallback still uses
            // minAssistantChars to avoid noisy multi-round continuations.
            if (saved.__v111ShortRefreshMigration !== true) {
                next.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars = DEFAULT_CONFIG.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars;
                next.__v111ShortRefreshMigration = true;
            }

            // v120: v116 was the last confirmed auto-working baseline in the user's environment.
            // Keep that execution core, but migrate background/hidden tabs to allowed by default.
            // Do not import v117+ round-counter/user-signature gating here; it can suppress auto runs.
            if (saved.__v120V116CoreBackgroundMigration !== true) {
                next.ignoreWhenHidden = false;
                next.hiddenTickWhenAllowed = true;
                next.keepAliveWhenVisible = true;
                next.steadyAuditWhenIdle = true;
                next.crossTabWakeHub = true;
                next.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue = true;
                next.aggressiveAfterRefresh = true;
                next.globalEnabled = typeof next.globalEnabled === 'boolean' ? next.globalEnabled : true;
                next.enabled = next.globalEnabled !== false;
                next.__v120V116CoreBackgroundMigration = true;
            }

            // v121 expectation: a non-focused/hidden ChatGPT tab is part of the automation chain.
            // Keep v116's working trigger core, but add a worker heartbeat and foreground wake fanout
            // so background pages do not rely only on the throttled page setInterval.
            if (saved.__v121BackgroundHeartbeatMigration !== true) {
                next.ignoreWhenHidden = false;
                next.hiddenTickWhenAllowed = true;
                next.backgroundHeartbeatWorker = true;
                next.backgroundHeartbeatMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs;
                next.foregroundWakeFanout = true;
                next.foregroundWakeFanoutMs = DEFAULT_CONFIG.foregroundWakeFanoutMs;
                next.__v121BackgroundHeartbeatMigration = true;
            }

            // v126: preserve existing promptPresetLibrary across upgrades and add explicit
            // user-input-to-preset actions. Long prompt storage remains opt-in.
            if (saved.__v126PromptLibrarySaveMigration !== true || saved.__v127PromptLibraryMaintenanceMigration !== true) {
                next.allowUserInputPresetSave = typeof saved.allowUserInputPresetSave === 'boolean' ? saved.allowUserInputPresetSave : true;
                next.allowLongPromptPresets = typeof saved.allowLongPromptPresets === 'boolean' ? saved.allowLongPromptPresets : false;
                next.maxPromptPresetTextChars = clampNumber(saved.maxPromptPresetTextChars, 280, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT);
                next.longPromptPresetMaxChars = clampNumber(saved.longPromptPresetMaxChars, next.maxPromptPresetTextChars, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
                next.__v126PromptLibrarySaveMigration = true;
            }

            // v127: prompt-library maintenance. Keep custom presets inherited, but add
            // a soft quota and metadata so user-saved long prompts stay intentional.
            if (saved.__v127PromptLibraryMaintenanceMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetLibrarySoftQuotaChars = clampNumber(saved.promptPresetLibrarySoftQuotaChars, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT, PROMPT_PRESET_LIBRARY_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
                next.__v127PromptLibraryMaintenanceMigration = true;
            }

            // v128: prompt-library safety net. Rolling backups are opt-out and only keep
            // bounded metadata + explicit preset text the user already chose to store.
            if (saved.__v128PromptLibraryBackupMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetAutoBackup = typeof saved.promptPresetAutoBackup === 'boolean' ? saved.promptPresetAutoBackup : true;
                next.promptPresetBackupLimit = clampNumber(saved.promptPresetBackupLimit, 1, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_LIMIT);
                next.__v128PromptLibraryBackupMigration = true;
            }

            // v129: size-aware backup quota so explicit long prompts do not multiply into localStorage pressure.
            if (saved.__v129PromptLibraryStoragePressureMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetBackupSoftQuotaChars = clampNumber(saved.promptPresetBackupSoftQuotaChars, 60000, PROMPT_PRESET_BACKUP_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS);
                next.__v129PromptLibraryStoragePressureMigration = true;
            }

            // v130: import preview and explicit prompt-library audit/repair should be on by default.
            if (saved.__v130PromptLibraryAuditImportMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetImportPreview = true;
                next.__v130PromptLibraryAuditImportMigration = true;
            }

            // v131: destructive prompt-library actions should have a bounded local recycle bin.
            if (saved.__v131PromptLibraryTrashMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetTrashEnabled = true;
                next.promptPresetTrashLimit = PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_LIMIT;
                next.promptPresetTrashSoftQuotaChars = PROMPT_PRESET_TRASH_SOFT_QUOTA_CHARS;
                next.__v131PromptLibraryTrashMigration = true;
            }

            // v132: archive/hide old presets instead of deleting them, and restore missing search/sort helpers.
            if (saved.__v132PromptLibraryArchiveMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetShowArchived = false;
                next.__v132PromptLibraryArchiveMigration = true;
            }

            // v133: storage audit/guard is code-only; keep existing prompt library, backups, trash, and archive flags.
            if (saved.__v133PromptLibraryStorageAuditMigration !== true) {
                next.__v133PromptLibraryStorageAuditMigration = true;
            }

            // v134: compact storage snapshots keep legacy prompt mirror arrays from duplicating long user-saved prompt text.
            if (saved.__v134PromptLibraryCompactStorageMigration !== true || saved.__v135PromptLibraryManifestMigration !== true || saved.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer !== true) {
                next.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot = true;
                next.__v134PromptLibraryCompactStorageMigration = true;
            }

            // v135: manifest export is metadata-only; it helps audit/compare long prompt libraries without copying prompt text.
            if (saved.__v135PromptLibraryManifestMigration !== true) {
                next.promptPresetManifestExport = true;
                next.__v135PromptLibraryManifestMigration = true;
            }

            // v160: local UI/diagnostic state must not persist in browser-wide config.
            // The authoritative values live in sessionStorage via readLocalPanelState().
            if (saved.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer !== true) {
                next.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer = true;
            }

            // v161: shared/local state boundary audit is code-only; keep existing config and prompt library.
            if (saved.__v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration !== true) {
                next.__v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration = true;
            }

            if (saved.__v94AutoResumeMigration !== true || saved.__v95FastResumeMigration !== true || saved.__v97GlobalScopeSyncMigration !== true || saved.__v111ShortRefreshMigration !== true || saved.__v120V116CoreBackgroundMigration !== true || saved.__v121BackgroundHeartbeatMigration !== true || saved.__v126PromptLibrarySaveMigration !== true || saved.__v127PromptLibraryMaintenanceMigration !== true || saved.__v128PromptLibraryBackupMigration !== true || saved.__v129PromptLibraryStoragePressureMigration !== true || saved.__v130PromptLibraryAuditImportMigration !== true || saved.__v131PromptLibraryTrashMigration !== true || saved.__v132PromptLibraryArchiveMigration !== true || saved.__v133PromptLibraryStorageAuditMigration !== true || saved.__v134PromptLibraryCompactStorageMigration !== true || saved.__v135PromptLibraryManifestMigration !== true || saved.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer !== true || saved.__v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration !== true) {
                try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(getCompactConfigForStorage(next))); } catch {}
            }

            return next;
        } catch {
            const next = migrateConfig({ ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, aggressiveAfterRefresh: true, __v94AutoResumeMigration: true, __v95FastResumeMigration: true, __v97GlobalScopeSyncMigration: true, __v111ShortRefreshMigration: true, __v120V116CoreBackgroundMigration: true, __v121BackgroundHeartbeatMigration: true, __v126PromptLibrarySaveMigration: true, __v127PromptLibraryMaintenanceMigration: true, __v128PromptLibraryBackupMigration: true, __v129PromptLibraryStoragePressureMigration: true, __v130PromptLibraryAuditImportMigration: true, __v131PromptLibraryTrashMigration: true, __v132PromptLibraryArchiveMigration: true, __v133PromptLibraryStorageAuditMigration: true, __v134PromptLibraryCompactStorageMigration: true, __v135PromptLibraryManifestMigration: true, __v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer: true, __v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration: true });
            try { localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(getCompactConfigForStorage(next))); } catch {}
            return next;
        }
    }

    const LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS = [
        // v160: these used to live in browser-wide config, but are now strictly per tab/chat display or diagnostics state.
        // They are stripped from storage snapshots so old values cannot silently re-link UI across pages.
        'panelCollapsed',
        'panelAdvancedOpen',
        'panelPosition',
        'panelDensity',
        'themeMode',
        'promptSearchText',
        'promptPresetShowArchived',
        'debug'
    ];

    function stripLocalOnlyConfigKeys(snapshot) {
        for (const key of LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS) {
            if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(snapshot, key)) delete snapshot[key];
        }
        return snapshot;
    }

    function getCompactConfigForStorage(sourceConfig = config) {
        const snapshot = Object.assign({}, sourceConfig);
        snapshot.enabled = snapshot.globalEnabled !== false;

        if (snapshot.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot !== false) {
            // v134: these legacy mirror arrays are only compatibility hints. The authoritative
            // prompt library is promptPresetLibrary, so do not duplicate long user-saved prompt
            // text here on every save. This keeps explicit long presets persistent without
            // multiplying them inside the main config blob.
            snapshot.promptPresets = (DEFAULT_CONFIG.promptPresets || []).slice(0, LEGACY_PROMPT_MIRROR_LIMIT);
            snapshot.knownContinueTexts = (DEFAULT_CONFIG.knownContinueTexts || [])
                .map((text) => normalizePresetText(text).slice(0, PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT))
                .filter(Boolean)
                .slice(0, LEGACY_PROMPT_MIRROR_LIMIT);
        }

        stripLocalOnlyConfigKeys(snapshot);
        snapshot.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer = true;
        snapshot.__v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration = true;
        return snapshot;
    }

    function saveConfig() {
        config.enabled = config.globalEnabled !== false;
        let payload = JSON.stringify(getCompactConfigForStorage(config));
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, payload);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[AutoContinue] save config failed:', error);
            pushLog(`Config save failed: ${error?.message || error}; trying storage guard trim`);
            const trimmed = emergencyTrimPromptStorage('saveConfig-failed');
            if (trimmed) {
                try {
                    payload = JSON.stringify(getCompactConfigForStorage(config));
                    localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, payload);
                    pushLog('Config saved after storage guard trim');
                } catch (retryError) {
                    console.error('[AutoContinue] save config retry failed:', retryError);
                    alert(`Auto Continue could not save settings after trimming backups/trash. Prompt library may be too large for browser storage. Export custom presets before adding more long prompts.\n\n${retryError?.message || retryError}`);
                }
            }
        }
        safeUpdatePanel('saveConfig');
    }

    function compactPromptStorageSnapshotInteractive() {
        const before = approximateStorageAudit();
        config.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot = true;
        saveConfig();
        const after = approximateStorageAudit();
        const msg = [
            'Compact config saved.',
            '',
            'This preserves the active prompt library, but stops legacy mirror arrays from duplicating long prompt text in the main config snapshot.',
            '',
            `Before: ${formatChars(before.configChars)} config chars · total ${formatChars(before.totalChars)}`,
            `After:  ${formatChars(after.configChars)} config chars · total ${formatChars(after.totalChars)}`
        ].join('\n');
        alert(msg);
        pushLog('Prompt config compacted');
        publishWakeHub('prompt-compact-storage');
        safeUpdatePanel('prompt-compact-storage');
    }

    function mergeConfigFromStorage(reason = CONFIG_SYNC_REASON) {
        const previousGlobal = config.globalEnabled !== false;
        const previousScopeMode = config.scopeMode;
        const previousSnoozeUntil = Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil || 0);
        const previousWhite = JSON.stringify(config.whitelistConversationIds || []);
        const previousBlack = JSON.stringify(config.blacklistConversationIds || []);
        const next = loadConfig();

        for (const key of Object.keys(config)) {
            if (!(key in next)) delete config[key];
        }
        Object.assign(config, next);
        activeConfigRef = config;
        syncContinueTextFromActivePreset();

        const globalChanged = previousGlobal !== (config.globalEnabled !== false);
        const scopeChanged = previousScopeMode !== config.scopeMode || previousWhite !== JSON.stringify(config.whitelistConversationIds || []) || previousBlack !== JSON.stringify(config.blacklistConversationIds || []);
        const snoozeChanged = previousSnoozeUntil !== Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil || 0);
        if (globalChanged) {
            if (!config.globalEnabled) {
                rollbackPendingRound('global switched off before submit proof');
                state.awaitingGrowth = false;
                state.pendingSendRetry = null;
                releaseSendLease();
            }
            pushLog(`Global switch synced -> ${config.globalEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
        } else if (snoozeChanged) {
            pushLog(`Global snooze synced -> ${getGlobalSnoozeSummary()}`);
        } else if (scopeChanged) {
            pushLog('Scope/list settings synced from another tab');
        }
        markDirty(true);
        safeUpdatePanel(reason);
    }

    function setGlobalEnabled(value, source = 'manual') {
        config.globalEnabled = !!value;
        config.enabled = config.globalEnabled;
        if (config.globalEnabled && isGlobalSnoozed()) config.globalSnoozeUntil = 0;
        if (!config.globalEnabled) {
            rollbackPendingRound('global switched off before submit proof');
            state.awaitingGrowth = false;
            state.pendingSendRetry = null;
            releaseSendLease();
        }
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Global switch -> ${config.globalEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}${source ? ` (${source})` : ''}`);
        setStatus(config.globalEnabled ? 'Ready' : 'Global disabled');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function isGlobalSnoozed(now = Date.now()) {
        const until = Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil || 0);
        return Number.isFinite(until) && until > now;
    }

    function getGlobalSnoozeSummary(now = Date.now()) {
        if (!isGlobalSnoozed(now)) return 'none';
        return `until ${new Date(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil)).toLocaleTimeString()} · ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - now)} left`;
    }

    function isEmergencyStopped(now = Date.now()) {
        const until = Number(config.emergencyStopUntil || 0);
        return Number.isFinite(until) && until > now;
    }

    function getEmergencyStopSummary(now = Date.now()) {
        if (!isEmergencyStopped(now)) return 'none';
        const reason = normalizeText(config.emergencyStopReason || 'manual emergency stop').slice(0, 160);
        const source = normalizeText(config.emergencyStopSource || 'manual').slice(0, 80);
        return `until ${new Date(Number(config.emergencyStopUntil)).toLocaleTimeString()} · ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.emergencyStopUntil) - now)} left · ${source} · ${reason}`;
    }

    function stopAutomationRuntime(reason = 'stop') {
        rollbackPendingRound(`${reason} before submit proof`);
        state.awaitingGrowth = false;
        state.pendingSendRetry = null;
        state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
        state.roundPendingProof = false;
        state.roundPendingSince = 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = '';
        releaseSendLease();
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function setEmergencyStop(minutes = 1440, reason = 'manual emergency stop', source = 'manual') {
        const n = clampNumber(minutes, 1, 10080);
        config.emergencyStopUntil = Date.now() + n * 60 * 1000;
        config.emergencyStopReason = normalizeText(reason || 'manual emergency stop').slice(0, 200);
        config.emergencyStopSource = normalizeText(source || 'manual').slice(0, 80);
        config.emergencyStopId = `${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`;
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(EMERGENCY_STOP_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
                version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
                build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
                id: config.emergencyStopId,
                until: config.emergencyStopUntil,
                reason: config.emergencyStopReason,
                source: config.emergencyStopSource,
                ts: Date.now()
            }));
        } catch {}
        stopAutomationRuntime('emergency stop');
        saveConfig();
        publishWakeHub('emergency-stop');
        pushLog(`EMERGENCY STOP -> ${n}m · ${config.emergencyStopSource}`);
        setStatus(`Emergency stopped: ${formatRemainMs(n * 60 * 1000)}`);
        consoleEmit('warn', 'emergency-stop', buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('emergency-stop'));
        safeUpdatePanel('emergency-stop');
        return buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('emergency-stop');
    }

    function clearEmergencyStop(source = 'manual') {
        const hadStop = Number(config.emergencyStopUntil || 0) > 0 || isEmergencyStopped();
        config.emergencyStopUntil = 0;
        config.emergencyStopReason = '';
        config.emergencyStopSource = normalizeText(source || 'manual').slice(0, 80);
        config.emergencyStopId = '';
        try { localStorage.removeItem(EMERGENCY_STOP_STORAGE_KEY); } catch {}
        saveConfig();
        publishWakeHub('emergency-stop-clear');
        if (hadStop) pushLog(`Emergency stop cleared${source ? ` (${source})` : ''}`);
        setStatus('Ready');
        consoleEmit('summary', 'emergency-stop-clear', buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('emergency-stop-clear'));
        markDirty(true);
        safeUpdatePanel('emergency-stop-clear');
        return buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('emergency-stop-clear');
    }

    function setGlobalSnooze(minutes, source = 'manual') {
        const n = clampNumber(minutes, 1, 1440);
        config.globalSnoozeUntil = Date.now() + n * 60 * 1000;
        rollbackPendingRound('global snoozed before submit proof');
        state.awaitingGrowth = false;
        state.pendingSendRetry = null;
        releaseSendLease();
        saveConfig();
        publishWakeHub('global-snooze');
        pushLog(`Global snooze -> ${n}m${source ? ` (${source})` : ''}`);
        setStatus(`Snoozed: ${formatRemainMs(n * 60 * 1000)}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function clearGlobalSnooze(source = 'manual') {
        if (!Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil || 0)) return;
        config.globalSnoozeUntil = 0;
        saveConfig();
        publishWakeHub('global-snooze-clear');
        pushLog(`Global snooze cleared${source ? ` (${source})` : ''}`);
        setStatus('Ready');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function toggleGlobalSnooze() {
        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) {
            clearGlobalSnooze('panel');
            return;
        }
        const raw = prompt('Snooze Auto Continue on all tabs for how many minutes?\nThis is a timed pause. It does not change Scope, lists, prompt library, or saved settings.', '30');
        if (raw === null) return;
        const minutes = Number(String(raw).trim());
        if (!Number.isFinite(minutes) || minutes <= 0) {
            alert('Please enter a positive number of minutes.');
            return;
        }
        setGlobalSnooze(minutes, 'panel');
    }

    function isGlobalEnabled() {
        return config.globalEnabled !== false && config.enabled !== false && !isGlobalSnoozed() && !isEmergencyStopped();
    }

    function isConsoleLevelEnabled(level = 'summary') {
        if (config.consoleOutputEnabled === false) return false;
        const current = normalizeText(config.consoleOutputLevel || 'summary').toLowerCase();
        if (current === 'off') return false;
        const order = { error: 1, warn: 2, summary: 3, verbose: 4 };
        return (order[current] || 3) >= (order[level] || 3);
    }

    function consoleEmit(level = 'summary', event = 'status', payload = null) {
        if (!isConsoleLevelEnabled(level)) return;
        const method = level === 'error' ? 'error' : level === 'warn' ? 'warn' : 'info';
        try {
            console[method](`[AutoContinue:${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}:${event}]`, payload || buildMinimalConsolePayload(event));
        } catch {}
    }

    function buildMinimalConsolePayload(event = 'status') {
        return {
            event,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            ts: Date.now(),
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            status: state.statusText,
            global: config.globalEnabled !== false,
            effectiveGlobal: config.globalEnabled !== false && config.enabled !== false,
            snoozed: isGlobalSnoozed(),
            emergencyStopped: isEmergencyStopped(),
            allowedByScope: isAllowedByScope(),
            visibility: document.visibilityState,
            focused: document.hasFocus?.() || false,
            rounds: `${state.autoRounds}/${config.maxAutoRounds}`,
            pending: {
                prompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                retry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
                proof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth
            },
            lastAction: state.lastActionReason || 'none'
        };
    }

    function log(...args) {
        if (isDebugEnabled()) console.log(`[AutoContinue${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}]`, ...args);
    }

    function nowTime() {
        const d = new Date();
        const hh = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
        const mm = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
        const ss = String(d.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
        return `${hh}:${mm}:${ss}`;
    }

    function pushLog(text) {
        state.logs.unshift(`[${nowTime()}] ${text}`);
        state.logs = state.logs.slice(0, config.maxLogEntries);
        renderLogs();
        log(text);
    }

    function setStatus(text) {
        const same = state.statusText === text;
        state.statusText = text;
        if (statusNode) statusNode.textContent = text;
        if (decisionNode) decisionNode.textContent = getDecisionSummary();
        if (panel) {
            panel.classList.toggle('ac-generating-state', text === 'Generating');
            panel.classList.toggle('ac-locked-state', /locked/i.test(text));
        }
        if (same) return;
    }

    function normalizeText(s) {
        return (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
    }

    function getTextContentBounded(node, limit = TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT, options = {}) {
        if (!node || limit <= 0) return '';
        const nodeLimit = Number(options.nodeLimit) || TEXT_WALKER_NODE_LIMIT;
        const budgetMs = Number(options.budgetMs) || TEXT_READ_BUDGET_MS;
        const started = performance.now ? performance.now() : Date.now();
        let out = '';
        let visited = 0;
        try {
            const walker = document.createTreeWalker(node, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT);
            let current;
            while ((current = walker.nextNode())) {
                visited += 1;
                if (visited > nodeLimit) break;
                if (budgetMs > 0) {
                    const elapsed = (performance.now ? performance.now() : Date.now()) - started;
                    if (elapsed > budgetMs) break;
                }
                if (!current.nodeValue) continue;
                const remaining = limit + 1 - out.length;
                if (remaining <= 0) break;
                out += current.nodeValue.slice(0, remaining);
                if (out.length > limit) break;
            }
        } catch {
            // Last-resort fallback remains capped. Avoid diagnostics/proof paths keeping
            // full user/assistant turns even if TreeWalker is unavailable.
            out = String(node.textContent || '').slice(0, limit + 1);
        }
        return normalizeText(out).slice(0, limit);
    }

    function makeBoundedSignature(text, limit = TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) {
        const normalized = normalizeText(String(text || '').slice(0, limit + 1)).slice(0, limit);
        let hash = 2166136261;
        for (let i = 0; i < normalized.length; i += 1) {
            hash ^= normalized.charCodeAt(i);
            hash = Math.imul(hash, 16777619) >>> 0;
        }
        return {
            preview: normalized,
            len: normalized.length,
            hash: hash.toString(36)
        };
    }

    function uniq(arr) {
        return Array.from(new Set((arr || []).filter(Boolean)));
    }

    function isVisible(el) {
        if (!el) return false;
        const style = getComputedStyle(el);
        if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.pointerEvents === 'none') return false;
        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
    }

    function isDisabled(el) {
        return !!(
            el?.disabled ||
            el?.getAttribute?.('aria-disabled') === 'true' ||
            el?.hasAttribute?.('disabled') ||
            el?.hasAttribute?.('data-disabled')
        );
    }

    function getAriaLabel(el) {
        return normalizeText(el?.getAttribute?.('aria-label') || '');
    }

    function getConversationId() {
        const p = location.pathname || '';
        const m = p.match(/^\/(?:c|chat)\/([a-zA-Z0-9-]+)/);
        return m ? m[1] : '';
    }

    function getLocalPanelStateKey() {
        // v154: panel open/collapse is intentionally local to this browser tab/session.
        // sessionStorage is per-tab, so two ChatGPT tabs no longer expand/collapse together.
        const cid = getConversationId() || (location.pathname || 'page').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]+/g, '_').slice(0, 80) || 'page';
        return `${STORAGE_KEY}:local-panel-state:${cid}`;
    }

    function readLocalPanelState() {
        try {
            const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(getLocalPanelStateKey());
            const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : null;
            return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : {};
        } catch {
            return {};
        }
    }

    function writeLocalPanelState(patch, reason = 'panel-local-state') {
        const next = Object.assign({}, readLocalPanelState(), patch || {}, { updatedAt: Date.now(), build: SCRIPT_BUILD });
        try { sessionStorage.setItem(getLocalPanelStateKey(), JSON.stringify(next)); } catch {}
        recordSyncBoundaryEvent('local-ui-write', reason, { keys: Object.keys(patch || {}) });
        safeUpdatePanel(reason);
    }

    function getLocalPanelPosition() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        const pos = state.panelPosition;
        if (!pos || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.left)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.top))) return null;
        return { left: Number(pos.left), top: Number(pos.top) };
    }

    function setLocalPanelPosition(pos, reason = 'panel-position') {
        if (!pos || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.left)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.top))) return;
        writeLocalPanelState({ panelPosition: { left: Math.round(Number(pos.left)), top: Math.round(Number(pos.top)) } }, reason);
    }

    function clearLocalPanelState(reason = 'local-ui-reset') {
        try { sessionStorage.removeItem(getLocalPanelStateKey()); } catch {}
        if (panel) {
            panel.style.left = '';
            panel.style.top = '';
            panel.style.right = '24px';
            panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
            panel.classList.remove('ac-collapsed');
        }
        pushLog('Local panel UI reset for this tab/chat only');
        safeUpdatePanel(reason);
    }

    function getPanelCollapsed() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return typeof state.panelCollapsed === 'boolean' ? state.panelCollapsed : false;
    }

    function setPanelCollapsed(value, reason = 'panel-collapse') {
        writeLocalPanelState({ panelCollapsed: !!value }, reason);
    }

    function getPanelAdvancedOpen() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return typeof state.panelAdvancedOpen === 'boolean' ? state.panelAdvancedOpen : false;
    }

    function setPanelAdvancedOpen(value, reason = 'panel-advanced') {
        const open = !!value;
        const patch = { panelAdvancedOpen: open };
        if (open) patch.panelCollapsed = false;
        writeLocalPanelState(patch, reason);
    }

    function getPanelDensity() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return ['comfortable', 'compact'].includes(state.panelDensity) ? state.panelDensity : 'comfortable';
    }

    function setPanelDensityLocal(value, reason = 'panel-density') {
        const next = value === 'compact' ? 'compact' : 'comfortable';
        writeLocalPanelState({ panelDensity: next }, reason);
    }

    function getPanelThemeMode() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return ['system', 'dark', 'light'].includes(state.themeMode) ? state.themeMode : 'system';
    }

    function setPanelThemeModeLocal(value, reason = 'panel-theme') {
        const next = ['system', 'dark', 'light'].includes(value) ? value : 'system';
        writeLocalPanelState({ themeMode: next }, reason);
    }

    function getPromptPickerSearchText() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return normalizeText(state.promptSearchText || '');
    }

    function setPromptPickerSearchTextLocal(value, reason = 'prompt-search-local') {
        writeLocalPanelState({ promptSearchText: normalizeText(value || '').slice(0, 160) }, reason);
    }

    function getPromptPickerShowArchived() {
        const state = readLocalPanelState();
        return typeof state.promptPresetShowArchived === 'boolean'
            ? state.promptPresetShowArchived
            : false;
    }

    function setPromptPickerShowArchivedLocal(value, reason = 'prompt-archive-filter-local') {
        writeLocalPanelState({ promptPresetShowArchived: !!value }, reason);
    }

    function isDebugEnabled() {
        // v159: debug logging is intentionally local to this tab/chat.
        // Turning on debug in one page should not make every ChatGPT tab verbose.
        const local = readLocalPanelState();
        if (typeof local.debug === 'boolean') return local.debug;
        return false; // v160: do not inherit old browser-wide debug into every tab
    }

    function setDebugEnabledLocal(value, reason = 'debug-local') {
        writeLocalPanelState({ debug: !!value }, reason);
        pushLog(`Debug logs -> ${value ? 'on' : 'off'} for this tab/chat`);
    }

    function getActionBadgesVisible() {
        const local = readLocalPanelState();
        return typeof local.actionBadgesVisible === 'boolean' ? local.actionBadgesVisible : true;
    }

    function setActionBadgesVisibleLocal(value, reason = 'action-badges-local') {
        writeLocalPanelState({ actionBadgesVisible: !!value }, reason);
        pushLog(`Action badges -> ${value ? 'shown' : 'hidden'} for this tab/chat`);
    }

    function toggleActionBadgesVisible() {
        setActionBadgesVisibleLocal(!getActionBadgesVisible(), 'toggle-action-badges-local');
    }

    function getLocalPanelStateSummary() {
        const pos = getLocalPanelPosition();
        return `collapsed=${getPanelCollapsed() ? 'yes' : 'no'} · advanced=${getPanelAdvancedOpen() ? 'open' : 'closed'} · density=${getPanelDensity()} · theme=${getPanelThemeMode()} · pickerSearch=${getPromptPickerSearchText() ? 'set' : 'empty'} · archived=${getPromptPickerShowArchived() ? 'shown' : 'hidden'} · debug=${isDebugEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'} · actionBadges=${getActionBadgesVisible() ? 'shown' : 'hidden'} · position=${pos ? `${Math.round(pos.left)},${Math.round(pos.top)}` : 'default'} · local=session-tab`;
    }

    function getLocalOnlySanitizerSummary() {
        let storedLocalKeys = [];
        try {
            const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}');
            storedLocalKeys = LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.filter((key) => Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(saved, key));
        } catch {}
        return `strict=yes · strippedKeys=${LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.length} · legacyStored=${storedLocalKeys.length ? storedLocalKeys.join(',') : 'none'}`;
    }


    function getStoredSharedConfigSnapshot() {
        try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY) || '{}') || {}; }
        catch { return {}; }
    }

    function getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload() {
        const stored = getStoredSharedConfigSnapshot();
        const inMemoryLocalKeys = LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.filter((key) => Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(config, key));
        const storedLocalKeys = LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.filter((key) => Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(stored, key));
        const compact = getCompactConfigForStorage(config);
        const compactLocalKeys = LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.filter((key) => Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(compact, key));
        const localPanelState = readLocalPanelState();
        const promptStats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            textFree: true,
            note: 'No prompt bodies or user message text. Audits whether browser-wide config still contains tab/chat-local UI or diagnostics state.',
            storageKey: STORAGE_KEY,
            localOnlyKeys: LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS,
            storedLocalOnlyKeys: storedLocalKeys,
            inMemoryLocalOnlyKeys: inMemoryLocalKeys,
            compactSnapshotLocalOnlyKeys: compactLocalKeys,
            localPanelState,
            sharedConfig: {
                approxChars: JSON.stringify(stored).length,
                compactApproxChars: JSON.stringify(compact).length,
                keyCount: Object.keys(stored).length,
                compactKeyCount: Object.keys(compact).length,
                migration: {
                    v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer: stored.__v160LocalOnlyStateSanitizer === true,
                    v161SyncBoundaryAudit: stored.__v161SyncBoundaryAuditMigration === true
                }
            },
            promptLibrary: {
                total: promptStats.total,
                custom: promptStats.custom,
                userSaved: promptStats.userSaved,
                long: promptStats.long,
                archived: promptStats.archived,
                fingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint()
            },
            policy: {
                browserWideShared: ['global/snooze', 'scope/whitelist/blacklist', 'automation/background toggles', 'safe-submit policy', 'prompt library + active stack', 'hotkeys', 'artifact policy'],
                tabChatLocal: LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.concat(['runtime logs', 'pending proof/retry', 'round runtime', 'send lease owner', 'observer handles', 'memory counters'])
            },
            verdict: storedLocalKeys.length || compactLocalKeys.length ? 'needs-scrub' : 'clean'
        };
    }

    function getConfigBoundaryAuditSummary() {
        const audit = getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload();
        return `storedLocal=${audit.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length ? audit.storedLocalOnlyKeys.join(',') : 'none'} · compactLocal=${audit.compactSnapshotLocalOnlyKeys.length ? audit.compactSnapshotLocalOnlyKeys.join(',') : 'none'} · verdict=${audit.verdict}`;
    }

    function copyConfigBoundaryAudit() {
        const payload = JSON.stringify(getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(), null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(payload);
            pushLog('Config boundary audit copied');
            setStatus('Boundary audit copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy config boundary audit:', payload);
        pushLog('Config boundary audit shown for manual copy');
    }


    function recordSyncBoundaryEvent(kind, reason = '', details = {}) {
        try {
            const item = {
                at: new Date().toISOString(),
                time: nowTime(),
                kind: String(kind || 'event').slice(0, 48),
                reason: String(reason || '').slice(0, 80),
                tab: TAB_ID.slice(-8),
                conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
                visibility: document.visibilityState || 'unknown',
                focused: !!document.hasFocus?.(),
                details: Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(details || {}).map(([k, v]) => [String(k).slice(0, 40), typeof v === 'string' ? v.slice(0, 160) : v]))
            };
            state.lastSyncBoundaryEvent = `${item.kind}:${item.reason || 'none'} @ ${item.time}`;
            state.syncBoundaryEvents = [item, ...(state.syncBoundaryEvents || [])].slice(0, 24);
        } catch {}
    }

    function buildSyncEventTimelinePayload() {
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            textFree: true,
            note: 'Recent shared/local sync events for diagnosing unexpected cross-page coupling. Does not include prompt bodies or user message text.',
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tab: TAB_ID.slice(-8),
            latest: state.lastSyncBoundaryEvent || 'none',
            policy: {
                sharedChangesShouldBroadcast: ['global/snooze', 'scope/whitelist/blacklist', 'automation/background toggles', 'prompt library/active stack', 'artifact policy', 'hotkeys'],
                localChangesShouldNotBroadcast: LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.concat(['runtime logs', 'pending prompt/proof', 'round runtime', 'observer/worker handles'])
            },
            events: (state.syncBoundaryEvents || []).slice(0, 24)
        };
    }

    function getSyncEventTimelineSummary() {
        const events = state.syncBoundaryEvents || [];
        const localWrites = events.filter((event) => event.kind === 'local-ui-write').length;
        const sharedWrites = events.filter((event) => /shared|storage-config|config-sync|scrub/i.test(`${event.kind} ${event.reason}`)).length;
        return `events=${events.length} · localWrites=${localWrites} · sharedSignals=${sharedWrites} · latest=${state.lastSyncBoundaryEvent || 'none'}`;
    }

    function copySyncEventTimeline() {
        const payload = JSON.stringify(buildSyncEventTimelinePayload(), null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(payload);
            pushLog('Sync event timeline copied');
            setStatus('Sync timeline copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy sync event timeline:', payload);
        pushLog('Sync event timeline shown for manual copy');
    }

    function scrubSharedConfigLocalOnlyNow(reason = 'manual-boundary-scrub') {
        const before = getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload();
        try {
            recordSyncBoundaryEvent('shared-config-scrub', reason, { beforeLocalKeys: before.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length });
            localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(getCompactConfigForStorage(config)));
            mergeConfigFromStorage(reason);
            const after = getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload();
            publishWakeHub('shared-config-scrub');
            pushLog(`Shared config scrubbed: local-only keys ${before.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length}->${after.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length}`);
            setStatus('Shared config scrubbed');
            markDirty(true);
            safeUpdatePanel(reason);
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            pushLog(`Shared config scrub failed: ${error?.message || error}`);
            setStatus('Shared config scrub failed');
            return false;
        }
    }

    function getConversationTitle() {
        return normalizeText(document.title || '');
    }

    function isConversationPage() {
        return !!getConversationId();
    }

    function getPromptPresets() {
        if (!Array.isArray(config.promptPresetLibrary)) {
            migrateConfig(config);
        }
        return config.promptPresetLibrary;
    }

    function getActivePromptPreset() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        return presets.find((preset) => preset.id === config.activePromptPresetId)
            || presets.find((preset) => preset.text === normalizePresetText(config.continueText))
            || presets[0]
            || clonePresetForStorage(BUILTIN_PROMPT_PRESETS[0], { builtin: true });
    }

    function getPromptSeparator(sourceConfig = null) {
        const cfg = sourceConfig || activeConfigRef || DEFAULT_CONFIG;
        if (cfg.promptJoinMode === 'space') return ' ';
        if (cfg.promptJoinMode === 'custom') return String(cfg.promptCustomSeparator ?? '\n');
        return '\n';
    }

    function buildPromptTextFromIds(ids, presets = getPromptPresets(), sourceConfig = null) {
        const byId = new Map((presets || []).map((preset) => [preset.id, preset]));
        return uniq((ids || [])
            .map((id) => byId.get(id)?.text)
            .map(normalizePresetText)
            .filter(Boolean)
        ).join(getPromptSeparator(sourceConfig));
    }

    function getActivePromptPresetIds() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const validIds = new Set(presets.map((preset) => preset.id));
        let ids = Array.isArray(config.activePromptPresetIds) ? config.activePromptPresetIds.filter((id) => validIds.has(id)) : [];
        if (!ids.length) ids = [getActivePromptPreset().id];
        config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
        config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
        return ids;
    }

    function getActivePromptPresets() {
        const byId = new Map(getPromptPresets().map((preset) => [preset.id, preset]));
        return getActivePromptPresetIds().map((id) => byId.get(id)).filter(Boolean);
    }

    function syncContinueTextFromActivePreset() {
        const activeIds = getActivePromptPresetIds();
        const active = getActivePromptPreset();
        const text = buildPromptTextFromIds(activeIds);
        config.activePromptPresetId = activeIds[0] || active.id;
        config.continueText = text || active.text;
        return active;
    }

    function getPromptLibrary() {
        return uniq([
            config.continueText,
            ...getPromptPresets().map((preset) => preset.text),
            ...(Array.isArray(config.knownContinueTexts) ? config.knownContinueTexts : [])
        ].map(normalizeText).filter(Boolean));
    }

    function looksLikeContinuePrompt(text) {
        const t = normalizeText(text);
        return getPromptLibrary().includes(t);
    }

    function cyclePromptPreset() {
        const list = getPromptPresets().filter((preset) => normalizeText(preset.text));
        if (!list.length) return config.continueText;
        const idx = Math.max(0, list.findIndex((preset) => preset.id === config.activePromptPresetId));
        const next = list[(idx + 1) % list.length] || list[0];
        config.activePromptPresetId = next.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [next.id];
        config.continueText = next.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt preset -> ${next.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
        return next.text;
    }

    function setActivePromptPreset(id) {
        const preset = getPromptPresets().find((item) => item.id === id);
        if (!preset) return false;
        config.activePromptPresetId = preset.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [preset.id];
        config.continueText = preset.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt preset -> ${preset.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
        return true;
    }

    function addPresetToPromptStack(id) {
        const preset = getPromptPresets().find((item) => item.id === id);
        if (!preset) return false;
        const ids = getActivePromptPresetIds();
        if (!ids.includes(id)) ids.push(id);
        config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
        config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Preset added to stack -> ${preset.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
        return true;
    }

    function removePresetFromPromptStack(id) {
        let ids = getActivePromptPresetIds().filter((item) => item !== id);
        if (!ids.length) ids = [getPromptPresets()[0]?.id].filter(Boolean);
        config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
        config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0] || config.activePromptPresetId;
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Prompt stack updated');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function movePresetInPromptStack(id, direction) {
        const ids = getActivePromptPresetIds();
        const idx = ids.indexOf(id);
        const nextIdx = idx + direction;
        if (idx < 0 || nextIdx < 0 || nextIdx >= ids.length) return;
        [ids[idx], ids[nextIdx]] = [ids[nextIdx], ids[idx]];
        config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
        config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Prompt stack reordered');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function clearPromptStack() {
        const first = getPromptPresets()[0];
        if (!first) return;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [first.id];
        config.activePromptPresetId = first.id;
        config.continueText = first.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Prompt stack cleared');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function addPromptPreset() {
        const text = prompt('New prompt preset text:', config.continueText || '继续');
        if (!text || !text.trim()) return;
        const name = prompt('Preset name:', normalizePresetText(text).slice(0, 28) || 'Custom preset');
        const preset = clonePresetForStorage({
            name: normalizeText(name || normalizePresetText(text).slice(0, 28) || 'Custom preset'),
            text: normalizePresetText(text),
            category: 'custom',
            builtin: false
        });
        config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), preset];
        config.activePromptPresetId = preset.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [preset.id];
        config.continueText = preset.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Preset added -> ${preset.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function editActivePromptPreset() {
        const active = getActivePromptPreset();
        const nextText = prompt('Edit active preset text:', active.text);
        if (!nextText || !nextText.trim()) return;
        const nextName = prompt('Preset name:', active.name || normalizePresetText(nextText).slice(0, 28));
        config.promptPresetLibrary = getPromptPresets().map((preset) => {
            if (preset.id !== active.id) return preset;
            if (preset.builtin) {
                const clone = clonePresetForStorage({
                    name: normalizeText(nextName || `${preset.name} copy`),
                    text: normalizePresetText(nextText),
                    category: preset.category || 'custom',
                    builtin: false
                });
                config.activePromptPresetId = clone.id;
                config.activePromptPresetIds = [clone.id];
                config.continueText = clone.text;
                pushLog(`Builtin cloned and edited -> ${clone.name}`);
                return preset;
            }
            const updated = clonePresetForStorage(preset, {
                name: normalizeText(nextName || preset.name || normalizePresetText(nextText).slice(0, 28)),
                text: normalizePresetText(nextText),
                updatedAt: Date.now()
            });
            config.continueText = updated.text;
            pushLog(`Preset edited -> ${updated.name}`);
            return updated;
        });
        if (active.builtin) {
            const clone = clonePresetForStorage({
                name: normalizeText(nextName || `${active.name} copy`),
                text: normalizePresetText(nextText),
                category: active.category || 'custom',
                builtin: false
            });
            config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), clone];
            config.activePromptPresetId = clone.id;
            config.activePromptPresetIds = [clone.id];
            config.continueText = clone.text;
        }
        saveConfig();
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function cloneActivePromptPreset() {
        const active = getActivePromptPreset();
        const nextText = prompt('Clone and edit preset text:', active.text);
        if (!nextText || !nextText.trim()) return;
        const nextName = prompt('Clone name:', `${active.name || 'Preset'} copy`);
        const clone = clonePresetForStorage({
            name: normalizeText(nextName || `${active.name || 'Preset'} copy`),
            text: normalizePresetText(nextText),
            category: active.category || 'custom',
            builtin: false
        });
        config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), clone];
        config.activePromptPresetId = clone.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [clone.id];
        config.continueText = clone.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Preset cloned -> ${clone.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function deleteActivePromptPreset() {
        const active = getActivePromptPreset();
        if (active.builtin) {
            alert('Built-in presets are protected. Use Clone or Edit to create a custom version.');
            return;
        }
        if (!confirm(`Delete preset "${active.name}"?`)) return;
        maybeBackupPromptLibrary('before-delete-preset');
        addPresetsToPromptTrash(active, 'delete-active-preset');
        const remaining = getPromptPresets().filter((preset) => preset.id !== active.id);
        config.promptPresetLibrary = remaining.length ? remaining : getBuiltinPresetLibrary();
        const next = config.promptPresetLibrary[0];
        config.activePromptPresetId = next.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [next.id];
        config.continueText = next.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Preset deleted -> ${active.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function resetPromptPresets() {
        if (!confirm('Reset prompt presets to the built-in library? Custom presets will be removed.')) return;
        maybeBackupPromptLibrary('before-reset-builtins');
        addPresetsToPromptTrash(getPromptPresets().filter((preset) => !preset.builtin), 'reset-builtins');
        config.promptPresetLibrary = getBuiltinPresetLibrary();
        const active = config.promptPresetLibrary[0];
        config.activePromptPresetId = active.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [active.id];
        config.continueText = active.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Prompt presets reset to built-ins');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function togglePinnedPromptPreset(id = config.activePromptPresetId) {
        const preset = getPromptPresets().find((item) => item.id === id);
        if (!preset) return;
        const pins = new Set(config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []);
        if (pins.has(id)) {
            pins.delete(id);
            pushLog(`Preset unpinned -> ${preset.name}`);
        } else {
            pins.add(id);
            pushLog(`Preset pinned -> ${preset.name}`);
        }
        config.pinnedPromptPresetIds = Array.from(pins).slice(0, 12);
        saveConfig();
    }

    function cyclePromptJoinMode() {
        const order = ['newline', 'space', 'custom'];
        const idx = Math.max(0, order.indexOf(config.promptJoinMode));
        config.promptJoinMode = order[(idx + 1) % order.length];
        if (config.promptJoinMode === 'custom') {
            const next = prompt('Custom separator between stacked presets:', config.promptCustomSeparator || '\n');
            if (next !== null) config.promptCustomSeparator = next;
        }
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(getActivePromptPresetIds());
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt join mode -> ${config.promptJoinMode}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function savePromptStackAsPreset() {
        const activePresets = getActivePromptPresets();
        if (!activePresets.length) return;
        const defaultName = activePresets.length === 1 ? `${activePresets[0].name} copy` : activePresets.map((preset) => preset.name).join(' + ').slice(0, 48);
        const name = prompt('Name this prompt stack:', defaultName || 'Prompt stack');
        if (!name || !name.trim()) return;
        const text = buildPromptTextFromIds(getActivePromptPresetIds());
        if (!text) return;
        const preset = clonePresetForStorage({
            name: normalizeText(name),
            text,
            category: 'stack',
            builtin: false
        });
        config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), preset];
        config.activePromptPresetId = preset.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [preset.id];
        config.continueText = preset.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Prompt stack saved -> ${preset.name}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function exportPromptPresets() {
        const payload = {
            version: 2,
            exportedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            settings: {
                allowLongPromptPresets: !!config.allowLongPromptPresets,
                maxPromptPresetTextChars: getPromptPresetTextLimit(config),
                libraryStats: getPromptLibraryStats()
            },
            presets: getPromptPresets().filter((preset) => !preset.builtin).map((preset) => ({
                name: preset.name,
                text: preset.text,
                category: preset.category || 'custom',
                source: preset.source || undefined,
                savedByUser: !!preset.savedByUser,
                originalLength: preset.originalLength || String(preset.text || '').length,
                id: preset.id,
                textHash: preset.textHash || makeBoundedSignature(preset.text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash,
                textLength: preset.textLength || String(preset.text || '').length,
                savedAt: preset.savedAt || preset.createdAt || undefined
            }))
        };
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json); } catch {}
        prompt('Copy prompt preset export JSON:', json);
        pushLog(`Exported ${payload.presets.length} custom presets`);
    }

    function parsePromptPresetImportRaw(raw) {
        let imported = [];
        const meta = {
            sourceFormat: 'lines',
            exportType: '',
            containsPromptText: null,
            libraryFingerprint: '',
            totalPresets: null
        };
        try {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
            const list = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : Array.isArray(parsed.presets) ? parsed.presets : [];
            imported = list.map((item) => typeof item === 'string' ? { text: item } : item).filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object');
            meta.sourceFormat = Array.isArray(parsed) ? 'array-json' : 'object-json';
            if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && !Array.isArray(parsed)) {
                meta.exportType = normalizeText(parsed.exportType || '');
                meta.containsPromptText = parsed.containsPromptText === true;
                meta.libraryFingerprint = normalizeText(parsed.libraryFingerprint || parsed.fingerprint || '');
                meta.totalPresets = Number(parsed.totalPresets) || (Array.isArray(parsed.presets) ? parsed.presets.length : null);
            }
        } catch {
            imported = raw.split(/\n+/).map((line) => line.trim()).filter(Boolean).map((text) => ({ name: text.slice(0, 28), text }));
        }
        try { Object.defineProperty(imported, '__importMeta', { value: meta, enumerable: false }); } catch { imported.__importMeta = meta; }
        return imported;
    }

    function buildPromptPresetImportPlan(imported) {
        const importMeta = imported?.__importMeta || {};
        const existingByHash = new Map();
        for (const preset of getPromptPresets()) {
            const hash = makeBoundedSignature(normalizePresetText(preset.text, config), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash;
            if (!existingByHash.has(hash)) existingByHash.set(hash, preset.id);
        }
        const seenHashes = new Set();
        const accepted = [];
        const requestedHashes = [];
        const skipped = { empty: 0, duplicateExisting: 0, duplicateImport: 0 };
        let longCount = 0;
        let truncatedCount = 0;
        let importedChars = 0;
        for (const item of imported || []) {
            const rawText = String(item?.text || '');
            const originalLen = normalizeText(rawText).length;
            const text = normalizePresetText(rawText, config);
            if (!text) { skipped.empty += 1; continue; }
            const sig = makeBoundedSignature(text, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
            requestedHashes.push(sig.hash);
            if (existingByHash.has(sig.hash)) { skipped.duplicateExisting += 1; continue; }
            if (seenHashes.has(sig.hash)) { skipped.duplicateImport += 1; continue; }
            seenHashes.add(sig.hash);
            if (originalLen > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT) longCount += 1;
            if (originalLen > text.length) truncatedCount += 1;
            importedChars += text.length;
            accepted.push({ item, text, sig, originalLen });
        }
        const stats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        const projectedChars = stats.totalChars + importedChars;
        return {
            total: Array.isArray(imported) ? imported.length : 0,
            importMeta,
            requestedHashes,
            accepted,
            skipped,
            longCount,
            truncatedCount,
            importedChars,
            currentChars: stats.totalChars,
            projectedChars,
            quota: stats.quota,
            overQuota: projectedChars > stats.quota
        };
    }

    function isPromptStackRestoreImport(plan) {
        if (!config.promptPresetStackImportRestore || !plan?.importMeta) return false;
        return ['active-prompt-stack', 'active-preset'].includes(plan.importMeta.exportType);
    }

    function resolveImportPresetIdsFromPlan(plan, presets = getPromptPresets()) {
        const byHash = new Map();
        for (const preset of presets || []) {
            const hash = makeBoundedSignature(normalizePresetText(preset.text, config), PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT).hash;
            if (!byHash.has(hash)) byHash.set(hash, preset.id);
        }
        const ids = [];
        const seen = new Set();
        for (const hash of plan?.requestedHashes || []) {
            const id = byHash.get(hash);
            if (id && !seen.has(id)) {
                ids.push(id);
                seen.add(id);
            }
        }
        return ids;
    }

    function applyImportedPromptStackIfRequested(plan, reason = 'import') {
        if (!isPromptStackRestoreImport(plan)) return false;
        const ids = resolveImportPresetIdsFromPlan(plan, getPromptPresets());
        if (!ids.length) return false;
        const label = plan.importMeta.exportType === 'active-prompt-stack' ? 'prompt stack' : 'active preset';
        if (!confirm(`Restore ${label} from this explicit export?

Presets resolved: ${ids.length}
Reason: ${reason}`)) return false;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
        config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
        config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Restored ${label} from import · ${ids.length} presets`);
        markDirty(true);
        return true;
    }

    function getPromptImportPlanText(plan) {
        return [
            `Import preview`,
            `Incoming items: ${plan.total}`,
            `Will import: ${plan.accepted.length}`,
            `Skipped: empty ${plan.skipped.empty}, existing duplicates ${plan.skipped.duplicateExisting}, in-file duplicates ${plan.skipped.duplicateImport}`,
            `Long items: ${plan.longCount}${config.allowLongPromptPresets ? ' (long presets on)' : ' (long presets off; will be truncated to current limit)'}`,
            `Truncated by current limit: ${plan.truncatedCount}`,
            `Import type: ${plan.importMeta?.exportType || plan.importMeta?.sourceFormat || 'unknown'}${isPromptStackRestoreImport(plan) ? ' · can restore active stack' : ''}`,
            `Library chars: ${plan.currentChars} -> ${plan.projectedChars}/${plan.quota}${plan.overQuota ? ' ⚠ over soft quota' : ''}`,
            `A backup will be attempted before writing when new presets are imported.`
        ].join('\n');
    }

    function importPromptPresets() {
        const raw = prompt('Paste prompt preset JSON or one prompt per line:');
        if (!raw || !raw.trim()) return;
        const imported = parsePromptPresetImportRaw(raw);
        if (!imported.length) {
            alert('No valid presets found.');
            return;
        }
        const plan = buildPromptPresetImportPlan(imported);
        if (!plan.accepted.length) {
            if (isPromptStackRestoreImport(plan) && applyImportedPromptStackIfRequested(plan, 'all presets already exist')) return;
            alert(`No new presets to import.\n\n${getPromptImportPlanText(plan)}`);
            return;
        }
        if (config.promptPresetImportPreview !== false) {
            const ok = confirm(`${getPromptImportPlanText(plan)}\n\nContinue import?`);
            if (!ok) {
                pushLog('Prompt import cancelled after preview');
                return;
            }
        }
        if (plan.overQuota && !confirm(`Prompt library will exceed soft quota (${plan.projectedChars}/${plan.quota} chars). Import anyway?`)) {
            return;
        }
        const rollbackSnapshot = config.promptPresetImportRollbackGuard !== false ? makePromptLibraryRollbackSnapshot('before-import-presets') : null;
        try {
            maybeBackupPromptLibrary('before-import-presets');
            const existingIds = new Set(getPromptPresets().map((preset) => preset.id));
            const next = plan.accepted.map(({ item, text, sig, originalLen }) => {
                const requestedId = normalizeText(item.id || '');
                return clonePresetForStorage({
                    id: requestedId && !existingIds.has(requestedId) ? requestedId : undefined,
                    name: normalizeText(item.name || text.slice(0, 28) || 'Imported preset'),
                    text,
                    category: normalizeText(item.category || 'imported') || 'imported',
                    builtin: false,
                    source: item.source || 'Imported',
                    savedByUser: !!item.savedByUser,
                    originalLength: Number(item.originalLength) || originalLen || text.length,
                    textLength: Number(item.textLength) || text.length,
                    textHash: item.textHash || sig.hash,
                    savedAt: Number(item.savedAt) || Date.now(),
                    importedAt: Date.now(),
                    truncated: originalLen > text.length
                });
            });
            config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), ...next];
            const restoredStack = isPromptStackRestoreImport(plan);
            if (restoredStack) {
                const ids = resolveImportPresetIdsFromPlan(plan, config.promptPresetLibrary);
                if (ids.length) {
                    config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
                    config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
                    config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids, config.promptPresetLibrary, config);
                }
            }
            if (!restoredStack || !config.activePromptPresetIds?.length) {
                config.activePromptPresetId = next[0].id;
                config.activePromptPresetIds = [next[0].id];
                config.continueText = next[0].text;
            }
            const validation = validatePromptLibraryRuntime('after-import');
            if (!validation.ok) {
                restorePromptLibraryRollbackSnapshot(rollbackSnapshot, `import validation failed: ${validation.fatal.join(', ')}`);
                saveConfig();
                alert(`Import was rolled back because validation failed.

${getPromptLibraryValidationSummary(validation)}`);
                return;
            }
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Imported ${next.length} presets · skipped ${plan.total - next.length}${restoredStack ? ' · restored stack' : ''} · verify ok`);
            markDirty(true);
        } catch (error) {
            restorePromptLibraryRollbackSnapshot(rollbackSnapshot, `import error: ${String(error).slice(0, 120)}`);
            try { saveConfig(); } catch {}
            console.error('[AutoContinue] prompt import failed:', error);
            alert(`Prompt import failed and was rolled back.

${String(error).slice(0, 240)}`);
        }
    }

    function addPromptPresetFromText(rawText, sourceLabel = 'User input') {
        if (!config.allowUserInputPresetSave && sourceLabel !== 'Manual') {
            alert('Saving user input as a preset is disabled. Enable it in Prompt Library first.');
            return false;
        }
        const originalText = String(rawText || '');
        const normalized = normalizePresetText(originalText, config);
        if (!normalized) {
            alert('No preset text found.');
            return false;
        }
        const limit = getPromptPresetTextLimit(config);
        const wasTrimmed = normalizeText(originalText).length > normalized.length;
        if (wasTrimmed && !confirm(`This text is longer than the current prompt library limit (${limit} chars). Save the truncated version?`)) {
            return false;
        }
        const originalLen = normalizeText(originalText).length;
        if (originalLen > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT && !config.allowLongPromptPresets) {
            alert(`Long prompt storage is off. Current limit is ${PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT} chars. Turn on Long presets first if you intentionally want to keep long user text.`);
            return false;
        }
        if (originalLen > PROMPT_PRESET_SHORT_LIMIT && config.allowLongPromptPresets) {
            const ok = confirm(`You are saving a long prompt (${originalLen} chars). This is explicit opt-in storage and will persist across script updates. Continue?`);
            if (!ok) return false;
        }
        const stats = getPromptLibraryStats();
        const projectedChars = stats.totalChars + normalized.length;
        if (projectedChars > stats.quota) {
            const ok = confirm(`Prompt library soft quota warning: ${projectedChars}/${stats.quota} chars after this save. Save anyway?`);
            if (!ok) return false;
        }
        const sig = makeBoundedSignature(normalized, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        const defaultName = `${sourceLabel}: ${normalized.slice(0, 24)}`.slice(0, 48);
        const name = prompt('Preset name:', defaultName || 'Saved user input');
        if (name === null) return false;
        const existingTexts = new Set(getPromptPresets().map((preset) => normalizePresetText(preset.text, config)));
        if (existingTexts.has(normalized) && !confirm('This preset text already exists. Save a duplicate anyway?')) {
            return false;
        }
        const preset = clonePresetForStorage({
            name: normalizeText(name || defaultName || 'Saved user input'),
            text: normalized,
            category: sourceLabel === 'Composer draft' ? 'draft' : sourceLabel === 'Last user message' ? 'user-input' : 'custom',
            builtin: false,
            source: sourceLabel,
            savedByUser: true,
            originalLength: originalLen,
            textHash: sig.hash,
            textLength: sig.len,
            savedAt: Date.now(),
            truncated: wasTrimmed
        });
        config.promptPresetLibrary = [...getPromptPresets(), preset];
        config.activePromptPresetId = preset.id;
        config.activePromptPresetIds = [preset.id];
        config.continueText = preset.text;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Saved ${sourceLabel} as preset${wasTrimmed ? ' · truncated' : ''}`);
        markDirty(true);
        return true;
    }

    function saveComposerDraftAsPreset() {
        const composer = getComposer();
        const text = getComposerText(composer);
        addPromptPresetFromText(text, 'Composer draft');
    }

    function saveLastUserMessageAsPreset() {
        const root = getScopeRoot();
        const userTurnNodes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('section[data-turn="user"][data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]'));
