        const userNodes = userTurnNodes.length ? userTurnNodes : Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('[data-message-author-role="user"]'));
        const last = userNodes[userNodes.length - 1];
        if (!last) {
            alert('No user message found on this page.');
            return;
        }
        const limit = getPromptPresetTextLimit(config);
        // This is a user-initiated action. It can read more than diagnostics, but it is still bounded.
        const text = getTextContentBounded(last, limit);
        addPromptPresetFromText(text, 'Last user message');
    }

    function saveSelectedTextAsPreset() {
        const selected = normalizeText(String(window.getSelection?.() || ''));
        if (!selected) {
            alert('No selected text found. Select text on the page first, then click Save selection.');
            return;
        }
        addPromptPresetFromText(selected, 'Selected text');
    }

    function toggleLongPromptPresets() {
        if (!config.allowLongPromptPresets) {
            const ok = confirm(`Enable long prompt presets?\n\nThis allows explicitly saved presets up to ${PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT} characters. Use it only for prompts you intentionally want to keep. Diagnostics will still avoid dumping full text.`);
            if (!ok) return;
            config.allowLongPromptPresets = true;
            config.longPromptPresetMaxChars = clampNumber(config.longPromptPresetMaxChars, config.maxPromptPresetTextChars, PROMPT_PRESET_LONG_LIMIT);
        } else {
            config.allowLongPromptPresets = false;
        }
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Long prompt presets -> ${config.allowLongPromptPresets ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function cyclePanelDensity() {
        const next = getPanelDensity() === 'compact' ? 'comfortable' : 'compact';
        setPanelDensityLocal(next, 'panel-density');
        pushLog(`Panel mode -> ${next} (local tab/chat)`);
    }


    function normalizeHotkeyString(value) {
        const raw = normalizeText(value || '');
        if (!raw || /^off$/i.test(raw) || /^none$/i.test(raw) || /^clear$/i.test(raw)) return '';
        const parts = raw.split('+').map((part) => normalizeText(part)).filter(Boolean);
        const mods = { ctrl: false, alt: false, shift: false, meta: false };
        let key = '';

        for (const part of parts) {
            const lower = part.toLowerCase();
            if (['control', 'ctrl', 'ctl'].includes(lower)) mods.ctrl = true;
            else if (['option', 'alt'].includes(lower)) mods.alt = true;
            else if (['cmd', 'command', 'meta', 'win', 'windows'].includes(lower)) mods.meta = true;
            else if (lower === 'shift') mods.shift = true;
            else key = part;
        }

        if (!key) return '';
        const lowerKey = key.toLowerCase();
        const named = {
            esc: 'Escape', escape: 'Escape', enter: 'Enter', return: 'Enter', tab: 'Tab', space: 'Space',
            backspace: 'Backspace', delete: 'Delete', del: 'Delete', home: 'Home', end: 'End',
            pageup: 'PageUp', pagedown: 'PageDown', up: 'ArrowUp', down: 'ArrowDown', left: 'ArrowLeft', right: 'ArrowRight'
        };
        if (named[lowerKey]) key = named[lowerKey];
        else if (/^f([1-9]|1[0-2])$/i.test(key)) key = key.toUpperCase();
        else if (key.length === 1) key = key.toUpperCase();
        else key = key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1);

        const hasModifier = mods.ctrl || mods.alt || mods.shift || mods.meta;
        const isFunctionKey = /^F([1-9]|1[0-2])$/.test(key);
        if (!hasModifier && !isFunctionKey) return '';

        return [mods.ctrl ? 'Ctrl' : '', mods.alt ? 'Alt' : '', mods.shift ? 'Shift' : '', mods.meta ? 'Meta' : '', key]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join('+');
    }

    function eventToHotkey(event) {
        if (!event || event.isComposing) return '';
        let key = event.key || '';
        if (!key || ['Control', 'Alt', 'Shift', 'Meta'].includes(key)) return '';
        if (key === ' ') key = 'Space';
        if (key.length === 1) key = key.toUpperCase();
        const hasModifier = event.ctrlKey || event.altKey || event.shiftKey || event.metaKey;
        const isFunctionKey = /^F([1-9]|1[0-2])$/.test(key);
        if (!hasModifier && !isFunctionKey) return '';
        return [event.ctrlKey ? 'Ctrl' : '', event.altKey ? 'Alt' : '', event.shiftKey ? 'Shift' : '', event.metaKey ? 'Meta' : '', key]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join('+');
    }

    function getHotkeyLabel(actionId) {
        return normalizeHotkeyString(config.hotkeys?.[actionId]) || 'Off';
    }

    function getHotkeyActionByCombo(combo) {
        const normalized = normalizeHotkeyString(combo);
        if (!normalized) return null;
        return HOTKEY_ACTIONS.find((action) => normalizeHotkeyString(config.hotkeys?.[action.id]) === normalized) || null;
    }

    function setHotkey(actionId, value) {
        const normalized = normalizeHotkeyString(value);
        if (!config.hotkeys || typeof config.hotkeys !== 'object') config.hotkeys = Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_HOTKEYS);
        const conflict = normalized && HOTKEY_ACTIONS.find((action) => action.id !== actionId && normalizeHotkeyString(config.hotkeys?.[action.id]) === normalized);
        if (conflict && !confirm(`Shortcut ${normalized} is already used by "${conflict.label}". Move it to this action?`)) return false;
        if (conflict) config.hotkeys[conflict.id] = '';
        config.hotkeys[actionId] = normalized;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`${HOTKEY_ACTIONS.find((action) => action.id === actionId)?.label || actionId} hotkey -> ${normalized || 'off'}`);
        return true;
    }

    function editHotkey(actionId) {
        const action = HOTKEY_ACTIONS.find((item) => item.id === actionId);
        if (!action) return;
        const raw = prompt(`Set shortcut for ${action.label}.\nExample: Alt+C, Ctrl+Alt+C, Meta+Shift+P.\nType off to disable.`, getHotkeyLabel(actionId));
        if (raw === null) return;
        const normalized = normalizeHotkeyString(raw);
        if (!normalized && !/^\s*(off|none|clear)?\s*$/i.test(raw)) {
            alert('Invalid shortcut. Use at least one modifier key, such as Alt+C, or a function key such as F8.');
            return;
        }
        setHotkey(actionId, normalized);
    }

    function resetHotkeys() {
        if (!confirm('Reset all shortcuts to defaults?')) return;
        config.hotkeys = Object.assign({}, DEFAULT_HOTKEYS);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Hotkeys reset to defaults');
    }

    function runHotkeyAction(actionId) {
        if (actionId === 'continueNow') forceContinueNow();
        else if (actionId === 'cyclePrompt') cyclePromptPreset();
        else if (actionId === 'toggleEnabled') {
            setGlobalEnabled(!isGlobalEnabled(), 'hotkey');
        } else if (actionId === 'unlock') unlockConversation(true);
        else if (actionId === 'togglePanel') {
            setPanelCollapsed(!getPanelCollapsed(), 'button-collapse');
        } else if (actionId === 'toggleAdvanced') {
            setPanelAdvancedOpen(!getPanelAdvancedOpen(), 'button-advanced');
        } else if (actionId === 'toggleDensity') cyclePanelDensity();
        else if (actionId === 'cycleTheme') cycleThemeMode();
    }

    function shouldIgnoreHotkeyEvent(event) {
        const target = event.target;
        if (!target) return false;
        if (target.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID}`)) return true;
        const tag = (target.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
        // Alt/Ctrl/Meta shortcuts are intentionally allowed while the ChatGPT composer is focused.
        // Plain text keys are blocked earlier by normalize/eventToHotkey, so normal typing is safe.
        return false;
    }

    function installHotkeyHandler() {
        if (hotkeyHandlerInstalled) return;
        hotkeyHandlerInstalled = true;
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
            if (!config.hotkeysEnabled || shouldIgnoreHotkeyEvent(event)) return;
            const combo = eventToHotkey(event);
            if (!combo) return;
            const action = getHotkeyActionByCombo(combo);
            if (!action) return;
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            runHotkeyAction(action.id);
        }, true);
    }

    function renderHotkeyWidgets() {
        if (btnHotkeysEnabled) {
            btnHotkeysEnabled.textContent = config.hotkeysEnabled ? 'Hotkeys: on' : 'Hotkeys: off';
            btnHotkeysEnabled.classList.toggle('ac-success', !!config.hotkeysEnabled);
            btnHotkeysEnabled.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.hotkeysEnabled);
        }
        if (!hotkeyListNode) return;
        hotkeyListNode.innerHTML = '';
        for (const action of HOTKEY_ACTIONS) {
            const row = document.createElement('div');
            row.className = 'ac-hotkey-row';
            row.innerHTML = `
                <div class="ac-hotkey-name">${action.label}</div>
                <button class="ac-btn ac-ghost ac-hotkey-key" type="button" data-hotkey-action="${action.id}">${getHotkeyLabel(action.id)}</button>
            `;
            hotkeyListNode.appendChild(row);
        }
    }

    function cycleThemeMode() {
        const order = ['system', 'dark', 'light'];
        const current = getPanelThemeMode();
        const idx = Math.max(0, order.indexOf(current));
        const next = order[(idx + 1) % order.length];
        setPanelThemeModeLocal(next, 'panel-theme');
        pushLog(`Theme -> ${next} (local tab/chat)`);
    }

    function getEffectiveTheme() {
        const mode = getPanelThemeMode();
        if (mode === 'light') return 'light';
        if (mode === 'dark') return 'dark';
        return window.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')?.matches ? 'dark' : 'light';
    }

    function isInWhitelist() {
        return config.whitelistConversationIds.includes(getConversationId());
    }

    function isInBlacklist() {
        return config.blacklistConversationIds.includes(getConversationId());
    }

    function isAllowedByScope() {
        const inWhite = isInWhitelist();
        const inBlack = isInBlacklist();

        if (config.scopeMode === 'all') return !inBlack;
        if (config.scopeMode === 'whitelist') return inWhite && !inBlack;
        if (config.scopeMode === 'blacklist') return !inBlack;
        return true;
    }

    function cycleScopeMode() {
        const next = { all: 'whitelist', whitelist: 'blacklist', blacklist: 'all' };
        config.scopeMode = next[config.scopeMode] || 'all';
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Scope mode -> ${config.scopeMode}`);
    }

    function addCurrentConversationToWhitelist() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) {
            pushLog('Cannot whitelist: not on a conversation page');
            return;
        }
        config.whitelistConversationIds = uniq([...config.whitelistConversationIds, cid]);
        config.blacklistConversationIds = (config.blacklistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Whitelisted conversation: ${cid}`);
    }

    function addCurrentConversationToBlacklist() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) {
            pushLog('Cannot blacklist: not on a conversation page');
            return;
        }
        config.blacklistConversationIds = uniq([...config.blacklistConversationIds, cid]);
        config.whitelistConversationIds = (config.whitelistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Blacklisted conversation: ${cid}`);
    }

    function removeCurrentConversationFromWhitelist() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) return;
        config.whitelistConversationIds = (config.whitelistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Removed from whitelist: ${cid}`);
    }

    function removeCurrentConversationFromBlacklist() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) return;
        config.blacklistConversationIds = (config.blacklistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Removed from blacklist: ${cid}`);
    }

    function toggleCurrentConversationWhitelist() {
        if (isInWhitelist()) removeCurrentConversationFromWhitelist();
        else addCurrentConversationToWhitelist();
    }

    function toggleCurrentConversationBlacklist() {
        if (isInBlacklist()) removeCurrentConversationFromBlacklist();
        else addCurrentConversationToBlacklist();
    }

    function getScopeStatusText() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) return 'Scope: no conversation id';
        const inWhite = isInWhitelist();
        const inBlack = isInBlacklist();
        const allowed = isAllowedByScope();
        const membership = inBlack ? 'blacklisted' : inWhite ? 'whitelisted' : 'unlisted';
        return `Scope: ${config.scopeMode} · ${allowed ? 'allowed' : 'blocked'} · ${membership}`;
    }

    function getScopeBlockReason() {
        if (!getConversationId()) return 'no conversation id';
        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) return `snoozed ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - Date.now())}`;
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return 'global off';
        if (isInBlacklist()) return 'blacklisted';
        if (config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isInWhitelist()) return 'not whitelisted';
        return isAllowedByScope() ? 'allowed' : `scope ${config.scopeMode}`;
    }

    function getPrimaryScopeActionLabel() {
        if (!getConversationId()) return 'Open a chat first';
        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) return 'Resume global';
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return 'Turn global on';
        if (isInBlacklist()) return 'Remove blacklist';
        if (config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isInWhitelist()) return 'Allow this chat';
        if (isInWhitelist()) return 'Whitelisted ✓';
        return `This chat: ${isAllowedByScope() ? 'allowed' : 'blocked'} · ${config.scopeMode}`;
    }


    function getDecisionSummary() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        const rawVisibility = document.visibilityState || 'visible';
        const focus = document.hasFocus ? (document.hasFocus() ? 'focused' : 'not focused') : 'focus unknown';
        const visibility = config.ignoreWhenHidden && rawVisibility === 'hidden' ? 'paused hidden' : rawVisibility;
        const list = isInBlacklist() ? 'blacklist' : isInWhitelist() ? 'whitelist' : 'unlisted';
        const global = isGlobalSnoozed() ? `Global SNOOZED ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - Date.now())}` : (isGlobalEnabled() ? 'Global ON' : 'Global OFF');
        const allowed = cid ? (isAllowedByScope() ? 'allowed' : `blocked: ${getScopeBlockReason()}`) : 'no chat id';
        const prompt = normalizeText(config.continueText).slice(0, 42) || 'empty prompt';
        return `${global} · ${allowed} · mode ${config.scopeMode} · ${list} · ${visibility} · ${focus} · rounds ${state.autoRounds}/${config.maxAutoRounds}${state.roundPendingProof ? ' pending' : ''} · prompt: ${prompt}`;
    }


    function getHeapUsageSnapshot() {
        const mem = performance?.memory;
        if (!mem || !Number.isFinite(Number(mem.usedJSHeapSize))) {
            return { supported: false, text: 'browser heap API unavailable', usedMb: 0, totalMb: 0, limitMb: 0 };
        }
        const usedMb = Math.round(Number(mem.usedJSHeapSize) / 1024 / 1024);
        const totalMb = Math.round(Number(mem.totalJSHeapSize || 0) / 1024 / 1024);
        const limitMb = Math.round(Number(mem.jsHeapSizeLimit || 0) / 1024 / 1024);
        return { supported: true, usedMb, totalMb, limitMb, text: `${usedMb}MB used${totalMb ? ` / ${totalMb}MB total` : ''}${limitMb ? ` / ${limitMb}MB limit` : ''}` };
    }

    function getMemoryPressureLevel() {
        const heap = getHeapUsageSnapshot();
        const warnMb = clampNumber(config.memoryHeapWarnMb || DEFAULT_CONFIG.memoryHeapWarnMb || MEMORY_HEAP_WARN_MB, 128, 8192);
        const criticalMb = clampNumber(config.memoryHeapCriticalMb || DEFAULT_CONFIG.memoryHeapCriticalMb || MEMORY_HEAP_CRITICAL_MB, warnMb, 16384);
        const timers = managedTimerIds.length;
        let level = 'ok';
        const reasons = [];
        if (heap.supported && heap.usedMb >= criticalMb) { level = 'critical'; reasons.push(`heap>=${criticalMb}MB`); }
        else if (heap.supported && heap.usedMb >= warnMb) { level = 'warn'; reasons.push(`heap>=${warnMb}MB`); }
        if (timers > 120) { level = 'critical'; reasons.push(`timers=${timers}`); }
        else if (timers > 60 && level === 'ok') { level = 'warn'; reasons.push(`timers=${timers}`); }
        if ((state.skippedBusyTicks || 0) + (state.skippedThrottleTicks || 0) > 500 && level === 'ok') {
            level = 'warn';
            reasons.push('many skipped ticks');
        }
        return { level, reasons, heap, timers };
    }

    function trimRuntimeCachesForMemoryPressure(reason = 'memory-watchdog') {
        const beforeLogs = state.logs.length;
        const pressureLimit = clampNumber(config.memoryLogUnderPressureLimit || DEFAULT_CONFIG.memoryLogUnderPressureLimit || MEMORY_LOG_UNDER_PRESSURE_LIMIT, 3, Math.max(3, config.maxLogEntries || 12));
        state.logs = state.logs.slice(0, pressureLimit);
        if (state.recentSelfSentPrompt && Date.now() - Number(state.recentSelfSentPrompt.confirmedAt || 0) > RECENT_SELF_SENT_TTL_MS) {
            state.recentSelfSentPrompt = null;
        }
        state.memoryAutoTrimCount = (state.memoryAutoTrimCount || 0) + 1;
        state.lastMemoryWatchdogSummary = `trimmed runtime caches (${reason}) · logs ${beforeLogs}->${state.logs.length}`;
        if (beforeLogs !== state.logs.length) renderLogs();
    }

    function runMemoryWatchdog(reason = 'memory-watchdog') {
        if (!config.memoryPressureGuard || !config.memoryWatchdogEnabled) return;
        const pressure = getMemoryPressureLevel();
        state.lastMemoryWatchdogAt = Date.now();
        state.memoryWatchdogLastLevel = pressure.level;
        const base = `${pressure.level} · heap ${pressure.heap.text} · timers=${pressure.timers}${pressure.reasons.length ? ` · ${pressure.reasons.join(', ')}` : ''}`;
        if (config.memoryAutoTrimRuntimeCaches && pressure.level !== 'ok') {
            trimRuntimeCachesForMemoryPressure(reason);
            state.lastMemoryWatchdogSummary = `${base} · auto-trim #${state.memoryAutoTrimCount}`;
        } else {
            state.lastMemoryWatchdogSummary = base;
        }
    }

    function getMemoryWatchdogDiagnosticsText() {
        const pressure = getMemoryPressureLevel();
        const last = state.lastMemoryWatchdogAt ? `${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - state.lastMemoryWatchdogAt)} ago` : 'never';
        return `${config.memoryWatchdogEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'} · level=${pressure.level} · heap=${pressure.heap.text} · timers=${pressure.timers} · last=${last} · trims=${state.memoryAutoTrimCount || 0} · ${state.lastMemoryWatchdogSummary || 'not run'}`;
    }


    function getVersionAuditPayload() {
        const expectedVersion = 215;
        const expectedBuildPattern = /215[_-]archive[_-]index[_-]completion[_-]probe/;
        const versionNumber = Number(String(SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '')) || 0;
        const buildText = String(SCRIPT_BUILD || '');
        const buildVersionMatch = buildText.match(/(?:^|[._-])([0-9]{2,4})(?:[._-]|$)/);
        const buildVersion = buildVersionMatch ? Number(buildVersionMatch[1]) : 0;
        const userscriptVersion = '2026.05.04.215-archive_index_completion_probe';
        const userscriptHeaderVersionMatch = userscriptVersion.match(/\.([0-9]+)-/);
        const userscriptHeaderVersion = userscriptHeaderVersionMatch ? Number(userscriptHeaderVersionMatch[1]) : 0;
        const currentArtifactVersion = (() => { try { return getCurrentScriptMajorVersion(); } catch { return versionNumber; } })();
        const mismatches = [];
        if (versionNumber !== expectedVersion) mismatches.push(`SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL expected ${expectedVersion} got ${versionNumber || 'unknown'}`);
        if (userscriptHeaderVersion !== expectedVersion) mismatches.push(`userscript @version expected ${expectedVersion} got ${userscriptHeaderVersion || 'unknown'}`);
        if (!expectedBuildPattern.test(buildText)) mismatches.push(`SCRIPT_BUILD does not advertise v${expectedVersion} archive index completion probe: ${buildText || 'empty'}`);
        if (buildVersion && buildVersion !== expectedVersion) mismatches.push(`SCRIPT_BUILD embedded version expected ${expectedVersion} got ${buildVersion}`);
        if (currentArtifactVersion && currentArtifactVersion !== versionNumber) mismatches.push(`artifact current-version helper expected ${versionNumber} got ${currentArtifactVersion}`);
        return {
            type: 'version-build-consistency-audit',
            expectedVersion,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            versionNumber,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            userscriptHeaderVersion: userscriptVersion,
            parsedUserscriptHeaderVersion: userscriptHeaderVersion,
            parsedBuildVersion: buildVersion || null,
            artifactCurrentVersion: currentArtifactVersion || null,
            ok: mismatches.length === 0,
            mismatches,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            rule: 'The userscript @version, SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, SCRIPT_BUILD, diagnostics, panel title, and artifact version helper must move together before release.'
        };
    }

    function buildVersionAuditPayload() {
        return getVersionAuditPayload();
    }

    function getVersionAuditSummary() {
        const audit = getVersionAuditPayload();
        return `${audit.ok ? 'ok' : 'mismatch'} · label=${audit.version} · build=${audit.build} · header=${audit.parsedUserscriptHeaderVersion || 'unknown'} · artifact=${audit.artifactCurrentVersion || 'unknown'}${audit.mismatches.length ? ` · ${audit.mismatches.join('; ')}` : ''}`;
    }

    function copyVersionAudit() {
        const payload = getVersionAuditPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied version audit · ${payload.ok ? 'ok' : 'mismatch'}`);
            setStatus('Version audit copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy version/build consistency audit JSON (no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog(`Version audit shown for manual copy · ${payload.ok ? 'ok' : 'mismatch'}`);
    }


    function buildPanelButtonAuditPayload() {
        const buttons = panel ? Array.from(panel.querySelectorAll('button')) : [];
        const ownership = (() => { try { return buildPanelActionOwnershipPayload().buttonOwners || {}; } catch { return {}; } })();
        const fallbackLabels = (() => { try { return getPanelFallbackLabels ? getPanelFallbackLabels() : {}; } catch { return {}; } })();
        const routerCoveredIds = new Set([
            'ac-global-toggle','ac-toggle','ac-now','ac-prompt-cycle','ac-unlock','ac-collapse','ac-density','ac-advanced',
            'ac-aggressive','ac-spam-lock','ac-keep-alive','ac-scope-btn','ac-rounds-btn','ac-theme','ac-reset-rounds',
            'ac-copy-diagnostics','ac-copy-health-summary','ac-copy-quick-support','ac-copy-release-note','ac-copy-upgrade-plan','ac-copy-version-audit','ac-copy-button-audit','ac-copy-state-map','ac-copy-action-map','ac-copy-badge-legend',
            'ac-copy-local-ui','ac-copy-local-ui-cache','ac-prune-local-ui-cache','ac-action-badges-toggle','ac-copy-boundary-audit',
            'ac-copy-sync-timeline','ac-scrub-shared-config','ac-reset-local-ui','ac-copy-failure-report','ac-automation-defaults',
            'ac-copy-preflight','ac-save-settings-checkpoint','ac-restore-settings-checkpoint','ac-repair-runtime','ac-global-snooze',
            'ac-artifact-auto-download','ac-artifact-download-now','ac-artifact-version-mode','ac-artifact-origin-mode','ac-artifact-scope-mode',
            'ac-artifact-idle-mode','ac-artifact-clear-history','ac-artifact-copy-status','ac-only-this','ac-allow-all','ac-pause-this',
            'ac-hidden-pause','ac-scroll-assist','ac-steady-audit','ac-wake-hub','ac-add-white','ac-add-black','ac-clear-white','ac-clear-black',
            'ac-preset-use-single','ac-preset-add-to-stack','ac-preset-clear-stack','ac-preset-add','ac-preset-edit','ac-preset-clone',
            'ac-preset-delete','ac-preset-reset','ac-preset-pin','ac-preset-save-stack','ac-preset-export','ac-preset-import',
            'ac-preset-join-mode','ac-preset-save-draft','ac-preset-save-last-user','ac-preset-save-selection','ac-preset-long-toggle',
            'ac-preset-health-pack','ac-preset-audit','ac-preset-verify','ac-preset-dedupe','ac-preset-backup','ac-preset-restore',
            'ac-preset-trim-backups','ac-preset-trash-restore','ac-preset-trash-empty','ac-preset-archive-active','ac-preset-show-archived',
            'ac-preset-storage-audit','ac-preset-compact-config','ac-preset-manifest','ac-preset-copy-active','ac-preset-copy-stack',
            'ac-preset-regression-checklist','ac-hotkeys-enabled','ac-hotkeys-reset','ac-debug-local'
        ]);
        const rows = buttons.map((btn, index) => {
            const id = btn.id || '';
            const aria = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute('aria-label') || '');
            const title = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute('title') || '');
            const rawLabel = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || aria || title || '');
            const hasVisibleLabel = !!rawLabel && rawLabel !== '•' && rawLabel !== '···';
            const badge = btn.querySelector?.('.ac-action-badge')?.textContent ? normalizeText(btn.querySelector('.ac-action-badge').textContent) : '';
            return {
                index,
                id: id || `(no-id-${index})`,
                hasVisibleLabel,
                labelLength: rawLabel.length,
                blank: !hasVisibleLabel,
                hasFallbackLabel: !!(id && fallbackLabels[id]),
                routerCovered: !!(id && routerCoveredIds.has(id)),
                ownership: ownership[id] || '',
                ownershipMapped: !!ownership[id],
                badge,
                disabled: !!btn.disabled,
                hidden: !isVisible(btn),
                classHints: Array.from(btn.classList || []).filter((name) => /^ac-/.test(name)).slice(0, 8)
            };
        });
        const blank = rows.filter((row) => row.blank).map((row) => row.id);
        const unmapped = rows.filter((row) => row.id && !row.id.startsWith('(no-id') && !row.ownershipMapped).map((row) => row.id);
        const notRouterCovered = rows.filter((row) => row.id && !row.id.startsWith('(no-id') && !row.routerCovered && !/^ac-hotkey-/.test(row.id)).map((row) => row.id);
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'panel-button-render-action-audit',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            panelPresent: !!panel,
            buttonCount: rows.length,
            blankCount: blank.length,
            ownershipMappedCount: rows.filter((row) => row.ownershipMapped).length,
            routerCoveredCount: rows.filter((row) => row.routerCovered).length,
            badgeCount: rows.filter((row) => !!row.badge).length,
            blankButtonIds: blank.slice(0, 80),
            unmappedButtonIds: unmapped.slice(0, 120),
            notRouterCoveredIds: notRouterCovered.slice(0, 120),
            rows,
            ok: blank.length === 0 && unmapped.length === 0,
            rule: 'Panel button audit is text-free: it records IDs, lengths, ownership/router coverage, and blank-label status only; it never includes prompt/user bodies or saved prompt text.'
        };
    }

    function getPanelButtonAuditSummary() {
        const audit = buildPanelButtonAuditPayload();
        return `${audit.ok ? 'ok' : 'needs attention'} · buttons=${audit.buttonCount} · blank=${audit.blankCount} · mapped=${audit.ownershipMappedCount} · router=${audit.routerCoveredCount} · badges=${audit.badgeCount}`;
    }

    function copyPanelButtonAudit() {
        const payload = buildPanelButtonAuditPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied panel button audit · ${payload.ok ? 'ok' : 'needs attention'} · blank ${payload.blankCount}`);
            setStatus('Button audit copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy panel button render/action audit JSON (no prompt/user text):', json);
        pushLog('Panel button audit shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildHealthSummaryPayload() {
        const versionAudit = buildVersionAuditPayload();
        const buttonAudit = buildPanelButtonAuditPayload();
        const boundaryAudit = getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload();
        const preflight = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
        const failure = buildFailureReportPayload();
        const memory = getMemoryPressureLevel();
        const promptValidation = validatePromptLibraryState();
        const localCache = buildLocalUiCacheAuditPayload();
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!versionAudit.ok) blockers.push('version-audit-mismatch');
        if (!buttonAudit.ok) warnings.push(`panel-button-audit:${buttonAudit.blankCount || 0}-blank`);
        if (!boundaryAudit.ok) warnings.push('shared-config-local-only-residue');
        if (preflight.missingProfileItems?.length) warnings.push(`automation-profile-missing:${preflight.missingProfileItems.length}`);
        if (failure.blockers?.length) blockers.push(...failure.blockers.map((item) => `failure:${String(item).slice(0, 60)}`));
        if (memory.level !== 'ok') warnings.push(`memory:${memory.level}`);
        if (!promptValidation.ok) warnings.push(`prompt-library-issues:${promptValidation.issues.length}`);
        if ((localCache.staleCount || 0) || (localCache.invalidCount || 0)) warnings.push(`local-ui-cache:${localCache.staleCount || 0}-stale/${localCache.invalidCount || 0}-invalid`);
        const score = Math.max(0, 100 - blockers.length * 25 - warnings.length * 7);
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'auto-continue-health-summary',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            status: state.statusText,
            score,
            level: blockers.length ? 'blocked' : warnings.length ? 'warning' : 'ok',
            blockers: blockers.slice(0, 20),
            warnings: warnings.slice(0, 40),
            checks: {
                versionAudit: { ok: !!versionAudit.ok, mismatches: (versionAudit.mismatches || []).length },
                panelButtons: { ok: !!buttonAudit.ok, buttons: buttonAudit.buttonCount, blank: buttonAudit.blankCount, mapped: buttonAudit.ownershipMappedCount, router: buttonAudit.routerCoveredCount },
                configBoundary: { ok: !!boundaryAudit.ok, sharedResidue: (boundaryAudit.storedLocalOnlyKeys || []).length + (boundaryAudit.compactLocalOnlyKeys || []).length },
                automationPreflight: { missing: preflight.missingProfileItems?.length || 0, scopeAllowed: preflight.scopeAllowed, globalEnabled: preflight.globalEnabled },
                failureReport: { blockers: failure.blockers?.length || 0, warnings: failure.warnings?.length || 0 },
                memory: { level: memory.level, heap: memory.heap?.text || 'unknown', timers: memory.timers },
                promptLibrary: { ok: !!promptValidation.ok, issues: promptValidation.issues.length },
                localUiCache: { entries: localCache.entryCount || 0, stale: localCache.staleCount || 0, invalid: localCache.invalidCount || 0 }
            },
            nextActions: blockers.length ? ['Open Copy failure report for blocker details', 'Use Repair runtime only if pending/proof/lease looks stuck', 'Use Automation defaults only if profile items are missing'] : warnings.length ? ['Open Copy audit pack for full text-free context', 'Scrub shared config if boundary residue exists', 'Prune local UI cache if stale entries accumulate'] : ['No immediate action needed'],
            rule: 'Health summary is a text-free rollup. It never includes prompt bodies, saved prompt text, user message bodies, or assistant response bodies.'
        };
    }

    function getHealthSummaryLine() {
        try {
            const h = buildHealthSummaryPayload();
            return `${h.level} · score=${h.score} · blockers=${h.blockers.length} · warnings=${h.warnings.length}`;
        } catch (error) {
            return `error · ${String(error).slice(0, 100)}`;
        }
    }

    function copyHealthSummary() {
        const payload = buildHealthSummaryPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied health summary · ${payload.level} · score ${payload.score}`);
            setStatus('Health summary copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy Auto Continue health summary JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Health summary shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildQuickSupportNotePayload() {
        const health = buildHealthSummaryPayload();
        const failure = buildFailureReportPayload();
        const preflight = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
        const versionAudit = buildVersionAuditPayload();
        const buttonAudit = buildPanelButtonAuditPayload();
        const boundaryAudit = getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload();
        const lines = [
            `Auto Continue ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL} · ${SCRIPT_BUILD}`,
            `Decision: ${getDecisionSummary()}`,
            `Health: ${health.level} · score ${health.score} · blockers ${health.blockers.length} · warnings ${health.warnings.length}`,
            `Preflight: global=${preflight.globalEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'} · scopeAllowed=${preflight.scopeAllowed ? 'yes' : 'no'} · missing=${preflight.missingProfileItems?.length || 0}`,
            `Version: ${versionAudit.ok ? 'ok' : 'mismatch'} · Buttons: ${buttonAudit.ok ? 'ok' : 'needs-attention'} · Boundary: ${boundaryAudit.ok ? 'ok' : 'residue'}`,
            `Top blockers: ${(health.blockers || []).slice(0, 6).join(' | ') || 'none'}`,
            `Top warnings: ${(health.warnings || []).slice(0, 8).join(' | ') || 'none'}`,
            `Next: ${(health.nextActions || []).slice(0, 4).join(' | ') || 'none'}`
        ];
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'quick-support-note',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            status: state.statusText,
            health: {
                level: health.level,
                score: health.score,
                blockers: (health.blockers || []).slice(0, 12),
                warnings: (health.warnings || []).slice(0, 16),
                nextActions: (health.nextActions || []).slice(0, 8)
            },
            preflight: {
                globalEnabled: !!preflight.globalEnabled,
                scopeAllowed: !!preflight.scopeAllowed,
                missingProfileItems: (preflight.missingProfileItems || []).slice(0, 20)
            },
            failure: {
                blockers: (failure.blockers || []).slice(0, 12),
                warnings: (failure.warnings || []).slice(0, 16)
            },
            audits: {
                versionOk: !!versionAudit.ok,
                panelButtonsOk: !!buttonAudit.ok,
                boundaryOk: !!boundaryAudit.ok,
                blankButtons: buttonAudit.blankCount || 0,
                unmappedButtons: buttonAudit.ownershipUnmappedCount || 0
            },
            summaryText: lines.join('\n'),
            rule: 'Compact text-free note for troubleshooting. It is safe to paste in chat and does not include prompt bodies, saved prompt text, user messages, or assistant responses.'
        };
    }

    function copyQuickSupportNote() {
        const payload = buildQuickSupportNotePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied quick support note · ${payload.health.level} · score ${payload.health.score}`);
            setStatus('Quick support note copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy quick support note JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Quick support note shown for manual copy');
    }



    function buildReleaseNotePayload() {
        const health = (() => { try { return buildHealthSummaryPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const versionAudit = (() => { try { return buildVersionAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const boundaryAudit = (() => { try { return getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const buttonAudit = (() => { try { return buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'release-note-install-guard',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            title: `${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL} release note / install guard`,
            summary: 'Adds a compact text-free release note and install guide so each upgrade can be checked before installing, without exposing prompt or user message bodies.',
            changes: [
                'Copy release note: exports current version, build, feature summary, install steps, rollback advice, and safety reminders.',
                'Copy upgrade plan: exports text-free before-upgrade, install, smoke-test, rollback, and hard-boundary guidance.',
                'Audit pack integration: release note is included in the text-free audit pack for external review and upgrade handoff.',
                'Button guard integration: Copy release note is covered by fallback labels, hard router, ownership map, button audit, and action badges.'
            ],
            installChecklist: [
                'Install only the newest chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt artifact you intentionally selected.',
                'Refresh the target ChatGPT tab after updating the userscript.',
                'Check panel version/build and Version audit after refresh.',
                'Run Copy health summary or Copy quick support if auto-continue does not behave as expected.',
                'Keep the previous known-good version available for rollback.'
            ],
            rollbackGuidance: [
                'If auto-trigger regresses, roll back to the last version known to preserve the v116/v120 auto-trigger core.',
                'If buttons are blank or unresponsive, use Copy button audit or Repair runtime before changing Global/Scope settings.',
                'If memory grows unexpectedly, check Memory watchdog and Prompt storage audit before deleting prompt library content.'
            ],
            safetyBoundaries: [
                'Does not modify the v116/v120 auto-trigger core.',
                'Does not broaden composer send selectors.',
                'Does not restore geometric icon-button fallback.',
                'Does not click microphone, dictation, voice, download, open, share, menu, or generic icon-only buttons.',
                'Does not include prompt bodies, saved prompt text, user messages, or assistant responses.'
            ],
            currentHealth: health ? { level: health.level, score: health.score, blockers: (health.blockers || []).slice(0, 8), warnings: (health.warnings || []).slice(0, 8) } : null,
            audits: {
                versionOk: versionAudit ? !!versionAudit.ok : null,
                panelButtonsOk: buttonAudit ? !!buttonAudit.ok : null,
                boundaryOk: boundaryAudit ? !!boundaryAudit.ok : null,
                automationProfileMissing: preflight ? (preflight.missingProfileItems || []).length : null
            },
            rule: 'Text-free release/install note. Safe to paste for review; full prompt text is exported only by explicit Copy active / Copy stack actions.'
        };
    }

    function copyReleaseNote() {
        const payload = buildReleaseNotePayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied release note · ${payload.version}`);
            setStatus('Release note copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy release/install note JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Release note shown for manual copy');
    }


    function buildUpgradePlanPayload() {
        const health = (() => { try { return buildHealthSummaryPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const versionAudit = (() => { try { return getVersionAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const buttonAudit = (() => { try { return buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const boundaryAudit = (() => { try { return getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const memory = (() => { try { return getMemoryPressureLevel(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const blockers = health ? (health.blockers || []).slice(0, 12) : [];
        const warnings = health ? (health.warnings || []).slice(0, 16) : [];
        return {
            type: 'upgrade-plan-safety-guard',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            decision: getDecisionSummary(),
            health: health ? { level: health.level, score: health.score, blockers, warnings } : null,
            gates: {
                versionOk: versionAudit ? !!versionAudit.ok : null,
                panelButtonsOk: buttonAudit ? !!buttonAudit.ok : null,
                boundaryOk: boundaryAudit ? !!boundaryAudit.ok : null,
                automationReady: preflight ? (preflight.missingProfileItems || []).length === 0 : null,
                memoryLevel: memory ? memory.level : 'unknown'
            },
            beforeUpgrade: [
                'Copy health summary or quick support if the current page is not behaving normally.',
                'Copy manifest or audit pack if prompt-library continuity matters for this upgrade.',
                'Keep the previous known-good artifact available for rollback.',
                'Do not enable browser microphone/download/open/share permissions to test this script.'
            ],
            installSteps: [
                'Install only the newest chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt userscript artifact you intentionally selected.',
                'Refresh one target ChatGPT tab first; do not update every tab until the first tab passes preflight.',
                'Confirm panel title, Build, and Version audit all report this same version.',
                'Run Copy preflight or Copy health summary after refresh.',
                'If buttons are blank or inert, use Copy button audit before changing settings.'
            ],
            smokeTests: [
                'Global ON + allowed chat should remain Ready when idle and Generating while a response is active.',
                'Stop answering must not be reported or used as a send button.',
                'A visible but non-focused page should not be blocked solely because it lacks focus.',
                'Hidden/background behavior should follow Background allowed/paused, not panel UI state.',
                'Panel collapsed/advanced/theme/density/debug/search/badges should stay local to this tab/chat.'
            ],
            rollbackPlan: [
                'If auto-trigger regresses, roll back to the last version known to preserve the v116/v120 auto-trigger core.',
                'If shared/local state leaks across tabs, run Copy boundary audit and Scrub shared config before changing prompt library content.',
                'If memory grows unexpectedly, check Memory watchdog and storage audits; do not delete active prompt library as a first step.',
                'If artifact auto-download misbehaves, turn Artifact auto off and use Download newest manually.'
            ],
            hardBoundaries: [
                'No geometric right-side button fallback.',
                'No microphone/dictation/voice/permission/download/open/share/menu clicks.',
                'No full user-message or saved-prompt bodies in diagnostics, health, audit, release, or upgrade-plan payloads.',
                'No changes to v116/v120 auto-trigger core from this text-free planning feature.'
            ],
            nextActions: (health && health.nextActions ? health.nextActions : []).slice(0, 12),
            rule: 'Text-free upgrade plan. Safe to paste for review; full prompt text is exported only by explicit Copy active / Copy stack actions.'
        };
    }

    function copyUpgradePlan() {
        const payload = buildUpgradePlanPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied upgrade plan · ${payload.version}`);
            setStatus('Upgrade plan copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy upgrade plan JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Upgrade plan shown for manual copy');
    }

    function buildAuditIndexPayload() {
        const health = (() => { try { return buildHealthSummaryPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const preflight = (() => { try { return buildAutomationPreflightPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const buttonAudit = (() => { try { return buildPanelButtonAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        const boundary = (() => { try { return getConfigBoundaryAuditPayload(); } catch (error) { return { error: String(error).slice(0, 180) }; } })();
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            type: 'audit-index-router',
            containsPromptText: false,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            recommendedFirst: health?.level === 'blocked' ? 'Copy failure report' : health?.level === 'warning' ? 'Copy audit lite' : 'Copy quick support',
            quickRoutes: [
                { need: 'fast troubleshooting', action: 'Copy quick support', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'deep troubleshooting / handoff', action: 'Copy audit pack', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'compact multi-signal troubleshooting', action: 'Copy audit lite', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'runtime stuck/pending/timer/memory triage', action: 'Copy runtime snapshot', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'background/non-focused/hidden page trigger triage', action: 'Copy background triage', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'why did/did not auto-trigger last tick', action: 'Copy trigger trace', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'why not auto-continue', action: 'Copy failure report', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'upgrade/install/rollback', action: 'Copy upgrade plan', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'version mismatch', action: 'Copy version audit', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'version archive / all-versions package review', action: 'Copy history audit', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'go/no-go release or install decision', action: 'Copy release gate', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'blank/inert buttons', action: 'Copy button audit', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'unexpected cross-tab sync', action: 'Copy sync timeline + Copy boundary audit', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'which buttons are shared/local/text/manual', action: 'Copy action map + Copy badge legend', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'prompt library health without text', action: 'Copy manifest + Verify library', bodyFree: true },
                { need: 'explicit prompt text export', action: 'Copy active / Copy stack', bodyFree: false, requiresUserIntent: true }
            ],
            currentSignals: {
                healthLevel: health?.level || 'unknown',
                healthScore: health?.score ?? null,
                preflightMissing: Array.isArray(preflight?.missingProfileItems) ? preflight.missingProfileItems.length : null,
                buttonAuditOk: buttonAudit?.ok ?? null,
                blankButtons: buttonAudit?.blankCount ?? null,
                boundaryOk: boundary?.ok ?? null,
                localOnlyResidue: Array.isArray(boundary?.storedLocalOnlyKeys) ? boundary.storedLocalOnlyKeys.length : null
            },
            safetyRule: 'This audit index is text-free. It points to the right report to copy next and never includes user messages or saved prompt bodies.'
        };
    }

    function copyAuditIndex() {
        const payload = buildAuditIndexPayload();
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied audit index · ${payload.recommendedFirst}`);
            setStatus('Audit index copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy audit index JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('Audit index shown for manual copy');
    }
    function getDiagnosticsText() {
        let snap = null;
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { snap = { error: String(error).slice(0, 200) }; }
        const lease = readSendLease();
        const lines = [
            `Auto Continue diagnostics ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}`,
            `Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}`,
            `Version audit: ${getVersionAuditSummary()}`,
            `Panel button audit: ${getPanelButtonAuditSummary()}`,
            `Trigger trace: ${getTriggerTraceSummary()}`,
            `Safety sentinel: ${getSafetySentinelSummary()}`,
            `History bundle audit: ${getHistoryBundleAuditSummary()}`,
            `Release gate: ${(() => { try { const gate = buildReleaseGatePayload(); return `${gate.decision} · blockers=${gate.blockers.length} · warnings=${gate.warnings.length}`; } catch (error) { return `error ${String(error).slice(0, 80)}`; } })()}`,
            `Config drift: ${(() => { try { const drift = buildConfigDriftPayload(); return `deviations=${drift.deviationCount} · safety=${drift.safetyDeviationCount} · boundary=${drift.boundaryResidue.ok ? 'ok' : 'check'}`; } catch (error) { return `error ${String(error).slice(0, 80)}`; } })()}`,
            `v183 self-check: Copy config repair plan turns config drift into a text-free, read-only repair plan with recommended buttons; it does not apply changes, inspect prompt bodies, or change the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v185 self-check: normal multi-round fallback and refresh-resume can use assistant DOM presence when bounded assistant text snapshots read empty; this rescues virtualized/long conversations without changing Global/Scope/draft/generating/lease/safe-submit/dangerous-click boundaries`,
            `v181 self-check: Copy release gate exports a text-free go/no-go summary from health, safety, version, button, boundary, storage, and history audits without touching v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v180 self-check: Copy history audit exports a text-free version/artifact bundle audit for archive and rollback checks without clicking or downloading anything and without changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `Health summary: ${getHealthSummaryLine()}`,
            `v179 self-check: Copy safety sentinel exports a text-free button safety audit for dangerous mic/download/share/menu/stop-button boundaries without clicking anything or changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v178 self-check: Copy trigger trace exports a text-free decision timeline for the last auto-trigger checks without changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v177 self-check: Copy background triage exports a text-free non-focused/hidden trigger report covering background allowed, heartbeat, wake hub, scheduler stale, scope blockers, and draft blockers without changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v176 self-check: Copy runtime snapshot exports a compact text-free runtime triage report for pending/proof/lease/timer/memory/panel issues without changing shared config or the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v175 self-check: Copy audit lite exports a compact text-free support pack without full diagnosticsText/manifest/log payloads, reducing clipboard and memory pressure while preserving core blockers and health signals; it does not change the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v174 self-check: Copy audit index routes troubleshooting to the smallest safe text-free report first and is included in audit pack without changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v173 self-check: Copy upgrade plan exports a text-free before/install/smoke/rollback plan and is included in audit pack without changing v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v172 self-check: Copy release note exports a text-free install/rollback/safety note and is covered by fallback labels, hard router, ownership map, button audit, action badges, and audit pack; it does not change the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v171 self-check: Copy quick support note creates a compact text-free troubleshooting payload for chats/issues, while full audit pack remains available for deep review; it does not change the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v170 self-check: Copy health summary rolls version, panel button, boundary, automation, failure, memory, prompt-library, and local-ui-cache health into one text-free report; it does not change the v116/v120 auto-trigger core`,
            `v169 self-check: version/build consistency is audited, and panel buttons are audited for blank labels, ownership coverage, and guarded router coverage without prompt/user text exposure`,
            `Panel local state: ${getLocalPanelStateSummary()}`,
            `Debug logs: ${isDebugEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'} · local tab/chat only`,
            `Local-only config sanitizer: ${getLocalOnlySanitizerSummary()}`,
            `Config boundary audit: ${getConfigBoundaryAuditSummary()}`,
            `v161 self-check: shared config can be audited/copied and scrubbed without touching prompt bodies or local UI session state`,
            `Panel action ownership: ${Object.keys(buildPanelActionOwnershipPayload().buttonOwners).length} mapped buttons · localOnly=${LOCAL_ONLY_CONFIG_KEYS.length}`,
            `Action ownership badges: ${getActionBadgesVisible() ? 'shown' : 'hidden'} · ${state.panelOwnershipBadgeCount || 0} buttons · last=${state.lastPanelOwnershipBadgeAt || 'none'} · local visibility · shared/local/text/audit/manual`,
            `Local UI snapshot: ${getLocalPanelStateSummary()}`,
            `Local UI cache: ${getLocalUiCacheSummary()}`,
            `v167 self-check: local UI sessionStorage cache can be audited and stale/invalid non-current records pruned without shared config sync or prompt text exposure`,
            `v166 self-check: Copy local UI snapshot exports this tab/chat sessionStorage state without prompt bodies; it helps confirm panel display changes are local-only`,
            `v154 self-check: panel collapsed/advanced state is per-tab sessionStorage, not browser-wide config`,
            `v155 self-check: panel position is also local per tab/chat; Reset local UI clears only local panel layout, and Copy state map explains shared vs local state`,
            `v156 self-check: panel density and theme are local tab/chat display state; changing compact/theme in one page no longer rewrites all other tabs`,
            `URL: ${location.href}`,
            `Title: ${getConversationTitle() || '(none)'}`,
            `Conversation: ${getConversationId() || '(none)'}`,
            `Tab: ${TAB_ID}`,
            `Status: ${state.statusText}`,
            `Decision: ${getDecisionSummary()}`,
            `Global: ${isGlobalEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'}`,
            `Global snooze: ${getGlobalSnoozeSummary()}`,
            `Artifact auto-download: ${getArtifactDownloadDiagnosticsText()}`,
            `Scope mode: ${config.scopeMode}`,
            `Scope preset: ${config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && isInWhitelist() && (config.whitelistConversationIds || []).length === 1 ? 'only this chat' : config.scopeMode === 'all' ? 'allow all' : 'custom'}`,
            `Whitelist: ${isInWhitelist() ? 'yes' : 'no'} (${(config.whitelistConversationIds || []).length})`,
            `Blacklist: ${isInBlacklist() ? 'yes' : 'no'} (${(config.blacklistConversationIds || []).length})`,
            `Visibility: ${document.visibilityState}`,
            `Has focus: ${document.hasFocus ? (document.hasFocus() ? 'yes' : 'no') : 'unknown'}`,
            `Ignore hidden: ${config.ignoreWhenHidden ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Keep warm: ${config.keepAliveWhenVisible ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Scroll assist: ${config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue ? 'yes' : 'no'} · ${getScrollDiagnosticsText()}`,
            `Hidden tick when allowed: ${config.hiddenTickWhenAllowed ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Steady audit: ${config.steadyAuditWhenIdle ? 'yes' : 'no'} · visible ${config.steadyAuditMs}ms · hidden ${config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs}ms · last=${state.lastSteadyAuditReason || 'none'}`,
            `Wake hub: ${config.crossTabWakeHub ? 'yes' : 'no'} · rx=${state.lastWakeHubRx || 'none'} · tx=${state.lastWakeHubTx || 'none'}`,
            `Scheduler health: lastTick=${state.lastTickAt ? `${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - state.lastTickAt)} ago` : 'never'} · lastObserver=${state.lastObserverHealthCheck || 'none'} · stale=${isSchedulerStale(Date.now()) ? 'yes' : 'no'}`, 
            `Rounds: ${state.autoRounds} / ${config.maxAutoRounds}${state.roundPendingProof ? ' (pending submit proof)' : ''}`,
            `Round baseline users: ${state.lastUserCount === null ? 'uninitialized' : state.lastUserCount}`,
            `Round runtime key: ${getRoundRuntimeConversationKey()}`,
            `Round runtime restored: ${state.lastRoundRuntimeRestoreReason || 'no'}`,
            `Round runtime last save: ${state.lastRoundRuntimeSaveReason || 'no'}`,
            `Assistant chars: ${snap?.lastAssistantText ? snap.lastAssistantText.length : 0} | normal min: ${config.minAssistantChars} | refresh min: ${config.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars}`,
            `Content gates: normal=${getNormalContentGateLabel(snap)} | refresh=${snap?.hasExistingConversationContent ? 'pass' : 'blocked'} | assistantPresence=${snap?.assistantPresenceGate ? 'yes' : 'no'} | turnDom=${snap?.hasTurnDom ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `v107 self-check: short assistant replies no longer block refresh-resume; submit still requires an explicit safe send/submit control`,
            `v113 self-check: empty-composer Send button=no is expected; post-fill probes verify the submitter after auto prompt insert; round counter baseline/runtime must not flash back to 0 during panel redraws`,
            `v114 self-check: visible but unfocused pages are allowed; hidden pages obey Active tab only; not-at-bottom pages can scroll-to-bottom before safe continue/submit`,
            `v115 self-check: idle/scroll audits are enabled; panel hard-router must run primary chat action, not cycle global scope`,
            `v116 self-check: wake hub, scheduler health, observer reconnect, and freeze/resume lifecycle recovery are active; hidden tabs can still be throttled by Chrome`,
            `Background heartbeat: ${config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker ? 'worker on' : 'worker off'} · ${config.backgroundHeartbeatMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs}ms · last=${state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat || 'none'}`,
            `Foreground wake fanout: ${config.foregroundWakeFanout ? 'on' : 'off'} · ${config.foregroundWakeFanoutMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.foregroundWakeFanoutMs}ms · last=${state.lastForegroundFanout || 'none'}`,
            `Background triage: ${(() => { try { const bg = buildBackgroundTriagePayload(); return `${bg.status} · blockers=${bg.blockers.length} · warnings=${bg.warnings.length}`; } catch (error) { return `error ${String(error).slice(0, 80)}`; } })()}`,
            `v121 self-check: non-focused and hidden tabs are allowed by default; worker heartbeat + foreground fanout nudge hidden tabs without simulated page clicks`,
            `v122 self-check: pending auto prompts are confirmed by matching recent user text or generation-started proof before round-reset logic; stop-button is not reported as safe send`,
            `v123 self-check: recent self-sent memory shields delayed user-count catch-up after background/generation proof; count resets only for non-auto user turns`,
            `v124 self-check: bounded text snapshots only; user tail <= ${TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT} chars x ${RECENT_USER_TAIL_LIMIT}; assistant snapshot <= ${ASSISTANT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT}; no full user input is kept for proof/diagnostics`,
            `v125 self-check: text reads are time/node capped · walker nodes<=${TEXT_WALKER_NODE_LIMIT} · read budget~${TEXT_READ_BUDGET_MS}ms · recent user scan<=${RECENT_USER_NODE_SCAN_LIMIT}`,
            `Prompt library: ${getPromptLibraryStatsText()} · long=${config.allowLongPromptPresets ? 'opt-in on' : 'off'}`,
            `v127 self-check: user-saved presets inherit across upgrades; long presets require explicit opt-in; library has a soft quota warning; diagnostics never prints full saved prompt text`,
            `Prompt backup pressure: ${getPromptLibraryBackupSummary()}`,
            `v128 self-check: prompt-library backups are rolling/bounded; destructive operations create a backup first; dedupe preserves the first/built-in copy`,
            `v129 self-check: backup storage is quota-aware; old backups are trimmed before localStorage pressure can multiply explicit long prompts`,
            `Prompt trash: ${getPromptLibraryTrashSummary()} · enabled=${config.promptPresetTrashEnabled ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Prompt archive: ${getPromptLibraryStats().archived} archived · show=${getPromptPickerShowArchived() ? 'yes-local' : 'no-local'}`,
            `v157 self-check: prompt picker search and archived visibility are local tab/chat UI state; changing them no longer affects other ChatGPT pages`,
            `v158 self-check: Archived shown/hidden toggle now writes only sessionStorage local UI state; it no longer calls saveConfig or broadcasts cross-tab config changes`,
            `Prompt storage audit: ${getPromptStoragePressureSummary()}`,
            `v131 self-check: delete/reset move non-built-in presets to a bounded local recycle bin; restore latest can recover the newest deleted prompt without printing its text`,
            `v132 self-check: prompt picker/search helpers are present; archived presets are hidden by default, reversible, and do not delete stored user-saved text`,
            `v133 self-check: saveConfig retries after trimming backup/trash copies on storage pressure; active prompt library is never silently deleted`,
            `Prompt compact storage: ${config.promptPresetCompactStorageSnapshot ? 'on' : 'off'} · legacy mirrors capped=${LEGACY_PROMPT_MIRROR_LIMIT}`,
            `v134 self-check: config saves use a compact snapshot so long user-saved prompts are not duplicated into legacy promptPresets/knownContinueTexts mirrors; active prompt library text is preserved`,
            `Prompt manifest: fp=${getPromptLibraryFingerprint()} · text-free export=${config.promptPresetManifestExport ? 'on' : 'off'} · single export=${config.promptPresetSingleExport ? 'on' : 'off'}`,
            `v135 self-check: prompt-library manifest export contains ids/names/categories/hashes/lengths only; it never includes saved prompt text and is safe for audits/comparing versions`,
            `v136 self-check: Copy active/stack are explicit user actions that may include full saved prompt text; diagnostics/manifest remain text-free`,
            `v137 self-check: Import can recognize explicit active/stack exports, restore active stack order, and avoids duplicate preset IDs/texts without printing prompt bodies`,
            `Prompt library verify: ${getPromptLibraryValidationSummary()}`,
            `v138 self-check: import/stack-restore has an in-memory rollback snapshot, validates active stack/library after import, and Verify library prints only counts/issues`,
            `v139 self-check: Copy audit pack combines diagnostics, text-free manifest, validation, and storage pressure into one JSON without saved prompt bodies`,
            `v140 self-check: Copy checklist exports a checked regression checklist and health signals without saved prompt bodies or user-message text`,
            `v141 self-check: Copy failure report exports blocker signals and next actions without saved prompt bodies or user-message text`,
            `v142 self-check: Automation defaults/preflight can arm background-safe automation without changing scope lists or exporting prompt bodies`,
            `Settings checkpoint: ${getSettingsCheckpointSummary()}`,
            `v143 self-check: settings checkpoints are text-free rollback points for automation/scope/UI settings and never copy saved prompt bodies`,
            `Runtime repair: ${getRuntimeRepairSummary()}`,
            `v144 self-check: Repair runtime clears only current-tab transient pending/proof/retry/lock/own-lease state; it does not change Global/Scope/prompt library or saved prompt text`,
            `v145 self-check: Global snooze is a timed browser-wide pause that auto-resumes and does not modify Scope, lists, prompt library, or saved prompt text`,
            `v146 self-check: artifact auto-download is a separate guarded lane requested by the user; default guard only auto-clicks assistant artifact filenames matching chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt; history/cooldown prevent loops`,
            `v147 self-check: artifact auto-download is version-aware by default; automatic mode skips older/equal chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt artifacts and prefers the highest eligible version instead of the last DOM button`,
            `v148 self-check: artifact auto-download requires assistant-turn origin proof by default and prefers the newest assistant turn containing eligible script artifacts; loose main-page filename buttons are ignored`,
            `v149 self-check: artifact auto-download now respects current Global + Scope by default; blocked chats cannot auto-download unless manual Download newest is explicitly used`,
            `v150 self-check: automatic artifact downloads wait for a brief post-generation stable-idle window and provide Retry downloads to clear only artifact history for the current conversation`,
            `Memory guard: ${config.memoryPressureGuard ? 'on' : 'off'} · timers=${managedTimerIds.length} · tick busy-skip=${state.skippedBusyTicks || 0} · throttle-skip=${state.skippedThrottleTicks || 0} · UI preview=${config.promptUiPreviewChars || DEFAULT_CONFIG.promptUiPreviewChars} chars · title=${config.promptUiTitlePreviewChars || DEFAULT_CONFIG.promptUiTitlePreviewChars} chars · cleanup=${state.lastRuntimeCleanup || 'none'}`,
            `Memory watchdog: ${getMemoryWatchdogDiagnosticsText()}`,
            `Panel guard: renderFailures=${state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0} | actionFailures=${state.panelActionFailureCount || 0} | labelRepairs=${state.panelLabelRepairCount || 0} | last=${state.lastPanelGuardSummary || 'none'}`,
            `v153 self-check: panel buttons have fallback labels and a capture-phase action router so render errors cannot leave blank/inert controls`,
            `v151 self-check: long prompts are not rendered into picker titles/full previews; duplicate wake ticks are throttled; timers/workers/BroadcastChannel are cleaned on pagehide/reinject`,
            `v152 self-check: memory watchdog audits heap/timer/tick pressure and can trim runtime-only logs/self-sent cache without touching Global/Scope or saved prompt bodies`,
            `Recent self-sent: ${state.recentSelfSentPrompt ? `${state.recentSelfSentPrompt.reason || 'confirmed'} · ${formatRemainMs(Date.now() - state.recentSelfSentPrompt.confirmedAt)} ago · users=${state.recentSelfSentPrompt.userCount} · sig=${state.recentSelfSentPrompt.hash || 'n/a'}` : 'none'}`,
            `Round pending proof: ${state.roundPendingProof ? `yes · ${state.roundPendingMode || 'send'} · ${formatRemainMs(Math.max(0, Date.now() - state.roundPendingSince))}` : 'no'}`,
            `Locked: ${isConversationLocked(Date.now()) ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Awaiting growth: ${state.awaitingGrowth ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Pending auto prompt: ${state.pendingAutoPrompt ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Pending retry: ${state.pendingSendRetry ? `attempt ${state.pendingSendRetry.attempt}` : 'no'}`,
            `Lease: ${lease ? `${String(lease.owner).slice(-6)} until ${new Date(Number(lease.expiresAt)).toLocaleTimeString()}` : 'none'}`,
            `Composer text: ${snap?.composerText ? JSON.stringify(snap.composerText.slice(0, 120)) : '(empty)'}`,
            `Submit readiness: ${getSubmitReadinessText(snap)}`,
            `Users/assistants: ${snap?.userCount ?? '?'} / ${snap?.assistantCount ?? '?'}`,
            `Generating: ${snap?.isGenerating ? 'yes' : 'no'} | Continue button: ${snap?.continueBtn ? 'yes' : 'no'} | Send button: ${snap?.sendBtn ? 'yes' : 'no'}`,
            `Composer buttons: ${snap?.composer ? describeComposerButtonsForLog(snap.composer) : '(no composer)'}`,
            `Last action: ${state.lastActionReason}`,
            `Recent logs:\n${state.logs.slice(0, 8).join('\n') || '(none)'}`
        ];
        return lines.join('\n');
    }

    function getSubmitReadinessText(snap) {
        if (!snap || snap.error) return `snapshot error${snap?.error ? `: ${snap.error}` : ''}`;
        if (!snap.composer) return 'no composer';
        const text = normalizeText(snap.composerText || getComposerText(snap.composer));
        const safeSubmitter = getSafeComposerSubmitter(snap.composer);
        const currentSend = snap.sendBtn || findBestSendButton(snap.composer, snap.root);
        if (!text) {
            return currentSend
                ? `idle composer · explicit send visible: ${describeButtonForLog(currentSend)}`
                : 'idle composer · no send button visible yet; normal on current ChatGPT UI until text is inserted';
        }
        if (text !== normalizeText(config.continueText)) {
            return 'blocked: composer contains a non-auto draft';
        }
        if (safeSubmitter) return `ready: explicit safe submitter found · ${describeButtonForLog(safeSubmitter)}`;
        if (currentSend) return `candidate found but rejected/disabled · ${describeButtonForLog(currentSend)}`;
        return 'not ready after auto prompt: no explicit safe send/submit control found';
    }

    function getNormalContentGateLabel(snap = null) {
        const source = snap || readPageState();
        if (source.lastAssistantText && source.lastAssistantText.length >= config.minAssistantChars) return 'pass';
        if (source.lastAssistantText) return 'short';
        if (config.normalFallbackAllowAssistantPresenceGate !== false && source.assistantPresenceGate && state.lastGenerationSeenAt > 0) return 'presence-rescue';
        return 'empty';
    }

    function copyDiagnostics() {
        const text = getDiagnosticsText();
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(text);
            pushLog('Diagnostics copied to clipboard');
            setStatus('Diagnostics copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy diagnostics:', text);
        pushLog('Diagnostics shown for manual copy');
    }

    function getStateScopeMap() {
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            note: 'Text-free map of which settings are browser-wide versus tab/chat-local. Does not include prompt bodies. v160: local-only UI/debug fields are stripped from browser-wide config snapshots, not just ignored by getters. v161: Copy boundary audit and Scrub shared config verify/purge legacy global UI-state residue. v162: Copy sync timeline records recent shared/local sync events without text bodies. v163: Copy action map documents panel button ownership so unexpected cross-page coupling can be audited. v164: ownership badges make shared/local/text/audit/manual actions visible in the panel itself. v165: badge visibility is a local UI toggle and Copy badge legend exports text-free badge meanings. v166: Copy local UI snapshot exports this tab/chat UI state without prompt bodies, for debugging accidental cross-page coupling.',
            browserWideShared: [
                'globalEnabled/globalSnooze', 'scopeMode', 'whitelistConversationIds', 'blacklistConversationIds',
                'background automation toggles', 'wake/heartbeat/scheduler toggles', 'safe submit toggles',
                'prompt preset library and active prompt stack', 'hotkeys',
                'artifact download policy and history', 'settings checkpoints'
            ],
            tabOrChatLocal: [
                'panelCollapsed', 'panelAdvancedOpen', 'panelPosition', 'panelDensity', 'themeMode', 'promptSearchText', 'promptPresetShowArchived', 'debug', 'runtime logs', 'pending auto prompt',
                'pending retry', 'round runtime/session mirror', 'send lease owner', 'DOM observer', 'current status text',
                'generation snapshot baselines', 'memory/watchdog counters'
            ],
            current: {
                conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
                tabId: TAB_ID,
                localPanelState: readLocalPanelState(),
                promptPickerSearchSet: !!getPromptPickerSearchText(),
                promptPickerShowArchived: getPromptPickerShowArchived(),
                effectivePanelDensity: getPanelDensity(),
                effectiveThemeMode: getPanelThemeMode(),
                localOnlySanitizer: getLocalOnlySanitizerSummary(),
                globalEnabled: isGlobalEnabled(),
                globalSnooze: getGlobalSnoozeSummary(),
                scopeMode: config.scopeMode,
                thisChatAllowed: isAllowedByScope(),
                whitelistCount: (config.whitelistConversationIds || []).length,
                blacklistCount: (config.blacklistConversationIds || []).length,
                backgroundAllowed: !config.ignoreWhenHidden,
                promptLibraryFingerprint: getPromptLibraryFingerprint(),
                promptLibraryStats: getPromptLibraryStats()
            }
        };
    }

    function copyStateScopeMap() {
        const payload = JSON.stringify(getStateScopeMap(), null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(payload);
            pushLog('State scope map copied');
            setStatus('State map copied');
            return;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy state scope map:', payload);
        pushLog('State scope map shown for manual copy');
    }

    function runPrimaryScopeAction() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) {
            pushLog('No conversation id yet; open a chat before changing chat scope');
            return;
        }
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) {
            setGlobalEnabled(true, 'scope-action');
            return;
        }
        if (isInBlacklist()) {
            removeCurrentConversationFromBlacklist();
            markDirty(true);
            return;
        }
        if (config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isInWhitelist()) {
            addCurrentConversationToWhitelist();
            markDirty(true);
            return;
        }
        // v154: make the home row a real current-chat toggle. If the chat is already
        // allowed, click pauses only this conversation by adding it to blacklist. Scope
        // mode itself is still changed by Advanced -> Scope mode.
        if (isAllowedByScope()) {
            addCurrentConversationToBlacklist();
            setStatus('This chat paused');
            markDirty(true);
            return;
        }
        pushLog(`Current chat is blocked under ${config.scopeMode}; use Advanced -> Scope mode or Only this chat to change the global scope policy.`);
        safeUpdatePanel('scope-action-blocked-noop');
    }


    function setOnlyThisChat() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) {
            pushLog('Only this chat: no conversation id yet');
            setStatus('Open a chat first');
            return;
        }
        config.globalEnabled = true;
        config.scopeMode = 'whitelist';
        config.whitelistConversationIds = [cid];
        config.blacklistConversationIds = (config.blacklistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Scope preset -> only this chat (${cid})`);
        setStatus('Only this chat allowed');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function allowAllChats() {
        config.globalEnabled = true;
        config.scopeMode = 'all';
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (cid) config.blacklistConversationIds = (config.blacklistConversationIds || []).filter((item) => item !== cid);
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Scope preset -> allow all chats except existing blacklist');
        setStatus('All chats allowed');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function pauseThisChat() {
        const cid = getConversationId();
        if (!cid) {
            pushLog('Pause this chat: no conversation id yet');
            setStatus('Open a chat first');
            return;
        }
        addCurrentConversationToBlacklist();
        setStatus('This chat paused');
        markDirty(true);
