    }

    function toggleHiddenPause() {
        config.ignoreWhenHidden = !config.ignoreWhenHidden;
        saveConfig();
        pushLog(`Active tab only -> ${config.ignoreWhenHidden ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function clearWhitelist() {
        config.whitelistConversationIds = [];
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Whitelist cleared');
    }

    function clearBlacklist() {
        config.blacklistConversationIds = [];
        saveConfig();
        pushLog('Blacklist cleared');
    }

    function isConversationLocked(now) {
        return state.conversationLockedUntil > now;
    }

    function getRecentContinueSignature(last3UserTexts) {
        const continueMsgs = last3UserTexts.filter(looksLikeContinuePrompt);
        if (continueMsgs.length < 2) return '';
        return continueMsgs.join(' | ');
    }

    function lockConversation(now, reason, signature) {
        state.conversationLockedUntil = now + config.conversationLockMs;
        if (signature) state.lockHandledSignature = signature;
        pushLog(reason);
        updateLockInfo();
    }

    function unlockConversation(manualReason = true) {
        state.conversationLockedUntil = 0;
        state.awaitingGrowth = false;
        state.lastAutoAt = 0;

        const snap = readPageState();
        state.lockHandledSignature = getRecentContinueSignature(snap.last3UserTexts || []);

        if (manualReason) {
            pushLog('Conversation unlocked and auto-continue restored');
        }

        updateLockInfo();
        setStatus('Ready');
        markDirty(true);
    }

    function formatRemainMs(ms) {
        if (ms <= 0) return '0s';
        const s = Math.ceil(ms / 1000);
        if (s < 60) return `${s}s`;
        return `${Math.ceil(s / 60)}m`;
    }

    function updateLockInfo() {
        if (!lockNode) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil > now) {
            lockNode.textContent = `yes · ${formatRemainMs(state.conversationLockedUntil - now)}`;
        } else {
            lockNode.textContent = 'no';
        }
    }

    function getScopeRoot() {
        const selectors = [
            'main',
            '[role="main"]',
            '[data-testid="conversation-view"]'
        ];

        for (const sel of selectors) {
            const el = document.querySelector(sel);
            if (el) return el;
        }

        return document.body || document.documentElement;
    }

    function getButtonSignalText(btn) {
        if (!btn) return '';
        const parts = [
            btn.innerText || '',
            btn.textContent || '',
            getAriaLabel(btn),
            btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '',
            btn.id || '',
            btn.getAttribute?.('title') || '',
            btn.getAttribute?.('type') || '',
            btn.getAttribute?.('name') || '',
            btn.getAttribute?.('value') || ''
        ];
        try {
            for (const node of Array.from(btn.querySelectorAll?.('svg title, [aria-label], [title], use[href], use[xlink\\:href]') || []).slice(0, 8)) {
                parts.push(node.textContent || '');
                parts.push(node.getAttribute?.('aria-label') || '');
                parts.push(node.getAttribute?.('title') || '');
                parts.push(node.getAttribute?.('href') || '');
                parts.push(node.getAttribute?.('xlink:href') || '');
            }
        } catch {}
        return normalizeText(parts.filter(Boolean).join(' '));
    }

    function isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn) {
        if (!btn) return true;
        if (btn.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID}`)) return true;
        if (btn.closest?.('nav, aside, header, [role="navigation"], [data-testid="conversation-sidebar"], [data-testid="modal"], [role="dialog"]')) return true;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        // Popup/download safety: never let automation click file/link/share/export/import/open buttons.
        return /download|下载|open|打开|link|链接|share|分享|export|导出|import|导入|attachment|附件|file|文件|copy|复制|menu|菜单|more|更多/i.test(all);
    }

    function isChatContinueButton(btn) {
        if (!btn || isDisabled(btn) || isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn)) return false;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        const inConversation = !!btn.closest?.('main, [role="main"], section[data-turn="assistant"], [data-testid="conversation-view"]');
        if (!inConversation) return false;
        return /continue generating/i.test(all) || /继续生成/.test(all) || /继续输出/.test(all) || /^继续$/.test(txt) || /^继续$/.test(label) || /resume generating/i.test(all) || /続け/.test(all);
    }

    function isChatStopButton(btn) {
        if (!btn || isDisabled(btn) || isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn)) return false;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        return /stop-button/i.test(all) || /stop generating/i.test(all) || /停止生成/.test(all) || /停止/.test(label) || /中止/.test(label);
    }

    function isClearlyNonSendComposerButton(btn) {
        if (!btn) return true;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const title = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('title') || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        if (/download|下载|open|打开|link|链接|share|分享|export|导出|import|导入|attachment|附件|file|文件|copy|复制|menu|菜单|more|更多/i.test(all)) return true;
        // v122: while ChatGPT is answering, the same #composer-submit-button becomes a Stop button.
        // It must never be reported as a safe send button or used as a submitter.
        if (/stop-button|stop answering|stop generating|停止|中止/i.test(all)) return true;
        if (/attach|upload|上传|add files?|添加文件|plus|composer-plus|paperclip|tool|工具|voice|voice mode|audio|record|recording|mic|microphone|dictate|dictation|speech|transcribe|语音|麦克风|听写|录音|转写|启用麦克风|read aloud|朗读/i.test(all)) return true;
        if (/model|thinking|思考|search|搜索|canvas|画布|deep research|研究|reason|web/i.test(all)) return true;
        // A visible text button in the composer that is not explicitly send/submit is usually
        // a model/tool selector, not the arrow submit button.
        if (txt && !/^(send|submit|发送|提交|送信)$/i.test(txt)) return true;
        return false;
    }

    function isChatSendButton(btn, composer = null, allowGeometricFallback = false) {
        if (!btn || isDisabled(btn) || isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn)) return false;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const title = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('title') || '');
        const type = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('type') || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        const form = composer?.closest?.('form');
        const composerSurface = composer?.closest?.('[data-composer-surface="true"]');
        const inComposer = !!(
            (form && form.contains(btn)) ||
            (composerSurface && composerSurface.contains(btn)) ||
            id === 'composer-submit-button' ||
            /composer-submit-button|send-button|submit-button/i.test(testid)
        );
        if (!inComposer) return false;

        // v101 hard safety rule: never click anonymous/icon-only composer buttons.
        // The previous geometric right-side fallback could hit the microphone/dictation button
        // when the send arrow was not positively identifiable. Only explicit submit controls pass.
        if (/composer-submit-button/i.test(id) || /composer-submit-button/i.test(testid) || /composer-submit-button/i.test(all)) return !isClearlyNonSendComposerButton(btn);
        if (/^send-button$/i.test(testid) || /^submit-button$/i.test(testid) || /(^|\s)(send-button|submit-button)(\s|$)/i.test(all)) return !isClearlyNonSendComposerButton(btn);
        if (/send prompt|send message|submit prompt|submit message|发送提示|发送消息|提交提示|提交消息|送信/i.test(label)) return true;
        if (/^(send|submit|发送|提交|送信)$/i.test(txt) || /^(send|submit|发送|提交|送信)$/i.test(label)) return true;
        if (type === 'submit' && /send|submit|发送|提交|送信|composer-submit/i.test(all) && !isClearlyNonSendComposerButton(btn)) return true;

        return false;
    }

    function findButtonsSnapshot(root) {
        const buttons = Array.from((root || document).querySelectorAll('button')).filter(isVisible);
        let continueBtn = null;
        let stopBtn = null;
        let sendBtn = null;
        const composer = getComposer();
        for (const btn of buttons) {
            if (!continueBtn && isChatContinueButton(btn)) continueBtn = btn;
            if (!stopBtn && isChatStopButton(btn)) stopBtn = btn;
            if (!sendBtn && isChatSendButton(btn, composer)) sendBtn = btn;
        }
        return { continueBtn, stopBtn, sendBtn };
    }

    function getComposer() {
        const visibleSelectors = [
            '[data-composer-surface="true"] #prompt-textarea[contenteditable="true"]',
            '#prompt-textarea[contenteditable="true"]',
            'div[data-testid="prompt-textarea"][contenteditable="true"]',
            '[data-composer-surface="true"] [contenteditable="true"][role="textbox"]',
            '[data-composer-surface="true"] [contenteditable="true"]',
            '.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]',
            'div[contenteditable="true"][role="textbox"]',
            'main div[contenteditable="true"]',
            'textarea[data-testid="prompt-textarea"]',
            'textarea[name="prompt-textarea"]',
            'textarea'
        ];

        for (const sel of visibleSelectors) {
            const el = document.querySelector(sel);
            if (el && isVisible(el) && !isDisabled(el)) return el;
        }

        // ChatGPT sometimes keeps a hidden textarea fallback while the real editor is
        // mounted/re-mounted. Return it only as a last resort; send will still verify
        // that a real send button is available.
        const fallback = document.querySelector('[data-composer-surface="true"] textarea[name="prompt-textarea"], textarea[name="prompt-textarea"]');
        return fallback || null;
    }

    function getComposerText(el) {
        if (!el) return '';
        if (el instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) return el.value || '';
        return el.textContent || '';
    }

    function setNativeTextareaValue(textarea, value) {
        const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLTextAreaElement.prototype, 'value')?.set;
        if (setter) setter.call(textarea, value);
        else textarea.value = value;
    }

    function setComposerText(el, text) {
        if (!el) return false;
        el.focus();

        if (el instanceof HTMLTextAreaElement) {
            setNativeTextareaValue(el, text);
            el.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', {
                bubbles: true,
                data: text,
                inputType: 'insertText'
            }));
            el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
            return true;
        }

        if (el.isContentEditable || el.getAttribute('contenteditable') === 'true') {
            try {
                const range = document.createRange();
                range.selectNodeContents(el);
                const sel = window.getSelection?.();
                sel?.removeAllRanges?.();
                sel?.addRange?.(range);
                document.execCommand('insertText', false, text);
            } catch {
                try {
                    document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null);
                    document.execCommand('insertText', false, text);
                } catch {
                    el.textContent = text;
                }
            }

            if (normalizeText(el.textContent || '') !== normalizeText(text)) {
                el.textContent = text;
            }
            el.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('beforeinput', {
                bubbles: true,
                data: text,
                inputType: 'insertText'
            }));
            el.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', {
                bubbles: true,
                data: text,
                inputType: 'insertText'
            }));
            el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    function pressEnter(el) {
        if (!el) return false;
        el.focus();

        el.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {
            key: 'Enter',
            code: 'Enter',
            keyCode: 13,
            which: 13,
            bubbles: true
        }));

        el.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', {
            key: 'Enter',
            code: 'Enter',
            keyCode: 13,
            which: 13,
            bubbles: true
        }));

        return true;
    }

    function isForbiddenPermissionOrPopupButton(btn) {
        if (!btn) return true;
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const title = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('title') || '');
        const all = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        return /download|下载|open|打开|link|链接|share|分享|export|导出|import|导入|attachment|附件|file|文件|copy|复制|menu|菜单|more|更多|attach|upload|上传|add files?|添加文件|plus|composer-plus|paperclip|tool|工具|voice|voice mode|audio|record|recording|mic|microphone|dictate|dictation|speech|transcribe|语音|麦克风|听写|录音|转写|启用麦克风|permission|权限|allow|允许/i.test(all);
    }

    function guardedAutomationClick(btn, reason) {
        if (!btn || !isVisible(btn) || isDisabled(btn)) return false;
        if (config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall && isForbiddenPermissionOrPopupButton(btn)) {
            pushLog(`Click firewall blocked ${reason}: ${describeButtonForLog(btn)}`);
            return false;
        }
        automationClickGuardReason = reason || 'automation-click';
        automationClickGuardUntil = Date.now() + 1200;
        try {
            btn.click();
            return true;
        } finally {
            setTimeout(() => {
                if (Date.now() >= automationClickGuardUntil) {
                    automationClickGuardUntil = 0;
                    automationClickGuardReason = '';
                }
            }, 1250);
        }
    }

    function installAutomationClickFirewall() {
        document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            if (!config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall) return;
            if (!automationClickGuardUntil || Date.now() > automationClickGuardUntil) return;
            const target = event.target?.closest?.('button, a, [role="button"], input[type="button"], input[type="submit"]');
            if (!target) return;
            const allow = isChatContinueButton(target) || isChatSendButton(target, getComposer(), false);
            if (allow) return;
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopImmediatePropagation();
            pushLog(`Click firewall stopped ${automationClickGuardReason}: ${describeButtonForLog(target)}`);
        }, true);
    }

    function clickIfPossible(btn, kind = 'generic', composer = null) {
        if (!btn || !isVisible(btn) || isDisabled(btn)) return false;
        if (kind === 'continue' && !isChatContinueButton(btn)) return false;
        if (kind === 'send' && !isChatSendButton(btn, composer, true)) return false;
        if (kind === 'generic' && isUnsafeAutomationButton(btn)) return false;
        return guardedAutomationClick(btn, kind);
    }

    function findBestSendButton(composer, root) {
        const scopes = [];
        const form = composer?.closest?.('form');
        const composerSurface = composer?.closest?.('[data-composer-surface="true"]');
        if (form) scopes.push(form);
        if (composerSurface) scopes.push(composerSurface);
        // v98 safety: do not search whole root/document for send buttons; that can hit
        // file/share/open/download controls in ChatGPT output and cause popups/downloads.

        const selectors = [
            'button#composer-submit-button[data-testid="send-button"]',
            'button#composer-submit-button',
            'button[data-testid="send-button"]',
            'button[data-testid="composer-submit-button"]',
            'button[name="composer-submit-button"]',
            'button[value="send"]',
            'button[value="submit"]',
            'button[aria-label="Send prompt"]',
            'button[aria-label="Send message"]',
            'button[aria-label="Submit prompt"]',
            'button[aria-label="Submit message"]',
            'button[aria-label*="Send"]',
            'button[aria-label*="Submit"]',
            'button[aria-label="发送提示"]',
            'button[aria-label="发送消息"]',
            'button[aria-label="提交提示"]',
            'button[aria-label="提交消息"]',
            'button[aria-label*="发送"]',
            'button[aria-label*="提交"]',
            'button[aria-label="送信"]',
            'button[type="submit"]'
        ];

        for (const scope of scopes) {
            for (const sel of selectors) {
                const btn = scope.querySelector?.(sel);
                if (btn && isVisible(btn) && isChatSendButton(btn, composer)) return btn;
            }
            const direct = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.('button') || []).find(b => isChatSendButton(b, composer));
            if (direct) return direct;
            // v101: no geometric/icon fallback. If ChatGPT changes the explicit send
            // identifiers, fail closed instead of risking microphone/download/tool clicks.
        }
        return null;
    }

    function scheduleSendRetry(attempt = 1, delayMs = null) {
        state.pendingSendRetry = {
            attempt,
            nextAt: Date.now() + clampNumber(delayMs == null ? config.sendRetryDelayMs : delayMs, 50, 10000)
        };
    }

    function schedulePostFillSubmitProbes(reason = 'post-fill') {
        const delays = Array.isArray(config.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs)
            ? config.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs
            : DEFAULT_CONFIG.postFillSubmitProbeDelaysMs;
        for (let i = 0; i < delays.length; i += 1) {
            const delay = clampNumber(delays[i], 20, 2000);
            setTimeout(() => {
                try {
                    if (!state.pendingAutoPrompt) return;
                    const snap = readPageState();
                    if (!state.pendingAutoPrompt) return;
                    if (snap.userCount > state.pendingAutoPrompt.baseUserCount) return;
                    if (!composerContainsOnlyAutoPrompt(snap.composer)) return;
                    const submitted = trySubmitComposer(snap.composer, snap.root, `${reason}-${i + 1}`);
                    if (submitted) {
                        pushLog(`Post-fill submit probe #${i + 1} executed`);
                        markDirty(true);
                    } else if (config.debug && i === delays.length - 1) {
                        pushLog(`Post-fill submit probes exhausted: ${getSubmitReadinessText(snap)}`);
                    }
                } catch (error) {
                    if (isDebugEnabled()) pushLog(`Post-fill submit probe error: ${String(error).slice(0, 90)}`);
                }
            }, delay);
        }
    }

    function describeButtonForLog(btn) {
        if (!btn) return 'none';
        const txt = normalizeText(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn.id || '');
        const type = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('type') || '');
        const name = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('name') || '');
        const value = normalizeText(btn.getAttribute?.('value') || '');
        const signals = getButtonSignalText(btn);
        return `id=${id || '-'} testid=${testid || '-'} label=${label || '-'} text=${txt || '-'} type=${type || '-'} name=${name || '-'} value=${value || '-'} sig=${signals || '-'}`.slice(0, 260);
    }

    function describeComposerButtonsForLog(composer) {
        const form = composer?.closest?.('form');
        const composerSurface = composer?.closest?.('[data-composer-surface="true"]');
        const scopes = [form, composerSurface].filter(Boolean);
        const seen = new Set();
        const buttons = [];
        for (const scope of scopes) {
            for (const btn of Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll?.('button') || [])) {
                if (seen.has(btn)) continue;
                seen.add(btn);
                buttons.push(describeButtonForLog(btn));
            }
        }
        return buttons.slice(0, 8).join(' || ') || 'no composer buttons';
    }

    function composerContainsOnlyAutoPrompt(composer) {
        return !!composer && normalizeText(getComposerText(composer)) === normalizeText(config.continueText);
    }

    function getSafeComposerSubmitter(composer) {
        const form = composer?.closest?.('form');
        if (!form || !form.contains(composer)) return null;
        const candidates = Array.from(form.querySelectorAll?.('button, input[type="submit"]') || []);
        return candidates.find((btn) => isChatSendButton(btn, composer, false)) || null;
    }

    function trySubmitComposerForm(composer, attemptReason = 'form-submit') {
        if (!config.safeFormSubmitFallback || !composerContainsOnlyAutoPrompt(composer)) return false;
        const form = composer.closest?.('form');
        if (!form || !form.contains(composer)) return false;
        const safeSubmitter = getSafeComposerSubmitter(composer);

        // v104 hardening: never call requestSubmit() without an explicitly identified
        // send submitter. requestSubmit() with no argument can pick the browser's default
        // submit control, which is too risky on a composer that also contains mic/tool buttons.
        try {
            if (typeof form.requestSubmit === 'function' && safeSubmitter) {
                form.requestSubmit(safeSubmitter);
                state.lastActionReason = `request-submitter:${attemptReason}`;
                return true;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            if (isDebugEnabled()) pushLog(`requestSubmit(submitter) failed (${attemptReason}): ${String(error).slice(0, 90)}`);
        }

        if (!safeSubmitter) {
            if (isDebugEnabled()) pushLog(`Form submit skipped (${attemptReason}): no explicit safe submitter`);
            return false;
        }

        try {
            const event = typeof SubmitEvent === 'function'
                ? new SubmitEvent('submit', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, submitter: safeSubmitter })
                : new Event('submit', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true });
            form.dispatchEvent(event);
            state.lastActionReason = `dispatch-submitter:${attemptReason}`;
            return true;
        } catch {
            return false;
        }
    }

    function trySubmitComposerEnter(composer, attemptReason = 'enter-submit') {
        if (!config.safeEnterSubmitFallback || !composerContainsOnlyAutoPrompt(composer)) return false;
        try {
            composer.focus();
            const init = { key: 'Enter', code: 'Enter', keyCode: 13, which: 13, bubbles: true, cancelable: true };
            composer.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown', init));
            composer.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keyup', init));
            state.lastActionReason = `enter-submit:${attemptReason}`;
            return true;
        } catch {
            return false;
        }
    }

    function trySubmitComposer(composer, root, attemptReason = 'submit') {
        const freshSendBtn = findBestSendButton(composer, root);
        const clicked = clickIfPossible(freshSendBtn, 'send', composer);
        if (clicked) return true;

        const formSubmitted = trySubmitComposerForm(composer, attemptReason);
        if (formSubmitted) return true;

        const enterSubmitted = trySubmitComposerEnter(composer, attemptReason);
        if (enterSubmitted) return true;

        state.lastActionReason = `submit-wait:${attemptReason}`;
        if (isDebugEnabled()) {
            pushLog(`Submit not ready (${attemptReason}): ${describeButtonForLog(freshSendBtn)}`);
            pushLog(`Composer buttons: ${describeComposerButtonsForLog(composer)}`);
        }
        return false;
    }


    function getConversationScrollContainer() {
        const candidates = [
            document.querySelector('[data-scroll-root]'),
            document.querySelector('main'),
            document.querySelector('[role="main"]'),
            document.scrollingElement,
            document.documentElement,
            document.body
        ].filter(Boolean);
        const seen = new Set();
        for (const el of candidates) {
            if (!el || seen.has(el)) continue;
            seen.add(el);
            const scrollable = (el.scrollHeight || 0) - (el.clientHeight || 0);
            if (scrollable > 80) return el;
        }
        return document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement || document.body || null;
    }

    function getScrollDistanceToBottom(container = getConversationScrollContainer()) {
        if (!container) return 0;
        const scrollTop = Number(container.scrollTop) || 0;
        const clientHeight = Number(container.clientHeight) || window.innerHeight || 0;
        const scrollHeight = Number(container.scrollHeight) || 0;
        return Math.max(0, scrollHeight - scrollTop - clientHeight);
    }

    function isNearConversationBottom(container = getConversationScrollContainer()) {
        return getScrollDistanceToBottom(container) <= config.bottomTriggerThresholdPx;
    }

    function getScrollDiagnosticsText() {
        const container = getConversationScrollContainer();
        if (!container) return 'scroll=unknown';
        const distance = Math.round(getScrollDistanceToBottom(container));
        const tag = container === document.scrollingElement ? 'document' : (container.getAttribute?.('data-scroll-root') !== null ? 'data-scroll-root' : (container.tagName || 'node').toLowerCase());
        return `${isNearConversationBottom(container) ? 'near bottom' : `not bottom ${distance}px`} · container=${tag}`;
    }

    function scrollConversationToBottom(reason = 'auto') {
        if (!config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue) return false;
        const container = getConversationScrollContainer();
        if (!container || isNearConversationBottom(container)) return false;
        try {
            container.scrollTo({ top: container.scrollHeight, behavior: 'auto' });
        } catch {
            try { container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight; } catch {}
        }
        state.lastActionReason = `scroll-bottom:${reason}`;
        pushLog(`Scrolled to bottom before ${reason}`);
        markDirty(true);
        setTimeout(safeTick, config.scrollSettleMs);
        return true;
    }

    function prepareViewportForTrigger(reason = 'trigger') {
        // Being unfocused is not a blocker. Being hidden is governed only by Active tab only.
        // If the user is reading above the bottom, ChatGPT may lazily mount/update composer
        // controls differently; scroll once, wait a short settle, then retry the same safe path.
        if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && config.ignoreWhenHidden) return false;
        if (config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue && !isNearConversationBottom()) {
            return !scrollConversationToBottom(reason);
        }
        return true;
    }

    function readPageState() {
        const root = getScopeRoot();
        const composer = getComposer();
        const composerText = normalizeText(getComposerText(composer));
        const { continueBtn, stopBtn, sendBtn } = findButtonsSnapshot(root);

        const userTurnNodes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('section[data-turn="user"][data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]'));
        const assistantTurnNodes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('section[data-turn="assistant"][data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]'));
        const userNodes = userTurnNodes.length ? userTurnNodes : Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('[data-message-author-role="user"]'));
        const assistantNodes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('[data-message-author-role="assistant"]'));
        const latestAssistantTurn = assistantTurnNodes.length ? assistantTurnNodes[assistantTurnNodes.length - 1] : null;

        const userCount = userNodes.length;
        const lastUserText = userCount ? getTextContentBounded(userNodes[userCount - 1], TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) : '';
        // Always keep only a tiny bounded tail for self-sent proof. Never store full user turns.
        // v125: additionally cap how many candidate DOM turns are scanned so virtualized/huge
        // conversations cannot make a background heartbeat spend too long reading text.
        const recentUserSourceNodes = userNodes.slice(-Math.min(RECENT_USER_NODE_SCAN_LIMIT, Math.max(RECENT_USER_TAIL_LIMIT, 1)));
        const recentUserTexts = recentUserSourceNodes
            .slice(-RECENT_USER_TAIL_LIMIT)
            .map(n => getTextContentBounded(n, TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT))
            .filter(Boolean);
        const last3UserTexts = config.enableSpamLock
            ? recentUserTexts.slice(-3)
            : [];

        const assistantCount = assistantTurnNodes.length || assistantNodes.length;
        const latestAssistantMessageNodes = latestAssistantTurn
            ? Array.from(latestAssistantTurn.querySelectorAll('[data-message-author-role="assistant"]'))
            : [];
        const lastAssistantText = latestAssistantMessageNodes.length
            ? normalizeText(latestAssistantMessageNodes.map((node) => getTextContentBounded(node, Math.ceil(ASSISTANT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT / Math.max(1, latestAssistantMessageNodes.length)))).join('\n')).slice(0, ASSISTANT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT)
            : (assistantNodes.length ? getTextContentBounded(assistantNodes[assistantNodes.length - 1], ASSISTANT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT) : '');

        const streamActive = !!document.querySelector('[data-scroll-root][data-stream-active]');
        const composerDisabled = !!document.querySelector('button#composer-plus-btn[disabled], button#composer-plus-btn[data-disabled]');
        const latestHasCompletionActions = !!(latestAssistantTurn && latestAssistantTurn.querySelector(
            'button[data-testid="copy-turn-action-button"], button[data-testid="good-response-turn-action-button"], button[data-testid="bad-response-turn-action-button"]'
        ));
        const isGenerating = !!(streamActive || stopBtn || (composerDisabled && !latestHasCompletionActions));

        const hasTurnDom = !!root.querySelector('section[data-testid^="conversation-turn-"], [data-message-author-role="user"], [data-message-author-role="assistant"]');
        const assistantTextGate = lastAssistantText.length >= config.refreshResumeMinAssistantChars;
        // v184 trigger-gate rescue: after the v124-v125 bounded text readers, huge/virtualized
        // conversations can occasionally report assistant text as empty even when assistant turns
        // are mounted. Refresh-resume should not be blocked solely by that diagnostic snapshot.
        // This does NOT bypass draft/scope/generating/safe-submit checks; it only permits the
        // existing one-shot refresh-resume probe to reach the same safe composer path.
        const assistantPresenceGate = assistantCount >= 1 && config.refreshResumeAllowAssistantPresenceGate !== false;
        const conversationPresenceGate = userCount >= 1 && (assistantTextGate || assistantPresenceGate || hasTurnDom);

        return {
            root,
            composer,
            composerText,
            continueBtn,
            stopBtn,
            sendBtn,
            userCount,
            lastUserText,
            recentUserTexts,
            last3UserTexts,
            assistantCount,
            lastAssistantText,
            streamActive,
            composerDisabled,
            latestHasCompletionActions,
            isGenerating,
            hasTurnDom,
            assistantTextGate,
            assistantPresenceGate,
            hasExistingConversationContent: conversationPresenceGate
        };
    }

    function normalizeAutoPromptSignature(text) {
        return normalizeText(String(text || '').slice(0, TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT + 1))
            .toLowerCase()
            .replace(/[\s\u200b\u200c\u200d\ufeff]+/g, '')
            .replace(/[。.!！?？,，;；:：]+$/g, '');
    }

    function isAutoPromptTextMatch(actual, expected) {
        const a = normalizeAutoPromptSignature(actual);
        const e = normalizeAutoPromptSignature(expected);
        if (!a || !e) return false;
        if (a === e) return true;
        // ChatGPT may wrap or duplicate short sent text in the turn container.
        return e.length >= 2 && (a.endsWith(e) || a.includes(e));
    }

    function rememberSelfSentPrompt(text, snap = null, reason = '') {
        const sourceText = String(text || state.pendingAutoPrompt?.text || config.continueText || '').slice(0, TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT);
        const sig = normalizeAutoPromptSignature(sourceText);
        if (!sig) return;
        const bounded = makeBoundedSignature(sourceText, TEXT_SNAPSHOT_LIMIT);
        state.recentSelfSentPrompt = {
            preview: bounded.preview,
            sig,
            hash: bounded.hash,
            len: bounded.len,
            confirmedAt: Date.now(),
            userCount: Number(snap?.userCount ?? state.lastUserCount ?? 0),
            reason: reason || 'confirmed'
        };
    }

    function matchesRecentSelfSentPrompt(snap, now) {
        const recent = state.recentSelfSentPrompt;
        if (!recent || !recent.sig) return false;
        if (now - recent.confirmedAt > 45000) return false;
        const recentTexts = Array.isArray(snap.recentUserTexts) && snap.recentUserTexts.length
            ? snap.recentUserTexts
            : [snap.lastUserText].filter(Boolean);
        if (recentTexts.some((text) => isAutoPromptTextMatch(text, recent.preview || recent.sig))) return true;
        // Some background/virtualized states expose the count before the new user turn text.
        // If generation is active soon after our confirmed submit, accept a small count catch-up
        // as self-sent rather than clearing the round counter.
        if (snap.isGenerating && !snap.composerText && snap.userCount >= Number(recent.userCount || 0) && snap.userCount <= Number(recent.userCount || 0) + 2) return true;
        return false;
    }

    function isSelfSentTurn(snap, now) {
        const p = state.pendingAutoPrompt;
        if (!p) return false;

        if (now - p.sentAt > Math.max(30000, config.submitProofTimeoutMs + 8000)) {
            state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
            return false;
        }

        if (snap.userCount < p.baseUserCount + 1) return false;

        const recentTexts = Array.isArray(snap.recentUserTexts) && snap.recentUserTexts.length
            ? snap.recentUserTexts
            : [snap.lastUserText].filter(Boolean);
        const matchedPrompt = recentTexts.some((text) => isAutoPromptTextMatch(text, p.text));
        if (matchedPrompt) {
            state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
            return true;
        }

        // v122: background/lazy hydration can make userCount jump by more than one,
        // and some ChatGPT DOM states show the new user turn only after generation starts.
        // If our auto prompt is pending, the composer is empty, and the page is already
        // generating, treat the submission as proven instead of resetting rounds as a
        // phantom real-user message.
        if (snap.isGenerating && !snap.composerText && now - p.sentAt <= config.submitProofTimeoutMs) {
            state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
            return true;
        }

        return false;
    }

    function confirmPendingAutoPromptIfSubmitted(snap, now, reason = 'submitted') {
        if (!state.pendingAutoPrompt) return false;
        const pendingText = state.pendingAutoPrompt?.text || config.continueText;
        const selfSent = isSelfSentTurn(snap, now);
        if (!selfSent) return false;
        rememberSelfSentPrompt(pendingText, snap, reason);
        clearRoundPendingProof(reason);
        state.pendingSendRetry = null;
        releaseSendLease();
        if (state.lastUserCount !== null && snap.userCount !== state.lastUserCount) {
            state.lastUserCount = snap.userCount;
        }
        persistRoundRuntime(`self-sent-${reason}`);
        pushLog(`Self-sent follow-up prompt confirmed (${reason}); not treated as human input`);
        return true;
    }

    function getSendLeaseKey() {
        const cid = getConversationId() || 'new';
        return `${SEND_LEASE_KEY_PREFIX}${cid}`;
    }

    function readSendLease() {
        if (!config.crossTabSendGuard) return null;
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(getSendLeaseKey());
            if (!raw) return null;
            const lease = JSON.parse(raw);
            if (!lease || !lease.owner || !Number.isFinite(Number(lease.expiresAt))) return null;
            if (Number(lease.expiresAt) <= Date.now()) {
                localStorage.removeItem(getSendLeaseKey());
                return null;
            }
            return lease;
        } catch {
            return null;
        }
    }

    function acquireSendLease(reason) {
        if (!config.crossTabSendGuard) return true;
        const now = Date.now();
        const existing = readSendLease();
        if (existing && existing.owner !== TAB_ID) {
            state.lastActionReason = `blocked by tab ${String(existing.owner).slice(-6)}`;
            setStatus('Another tab is handling this conversation');
            return false;
        }
        const lease = { owner: TAB_ID, reason: reason || 'auto-send', url: location.href, createdAt: now, expiresAt: now + config.sendLeaseMs };
        try {
            localStorage.setItem(getSendLeaseKey(), JSON.stringify(lease));
            const confirmed = readSendLease();
            return !!confirmed && confirmed.owner === TAB_ID;
        } catch {
            return true;
        }
    }

    function releaseSendLease() {
        if (!config.crossTabSendGuard) return;
        try {
            const lease = readSendLease();
            if (lease && lease.owner === TAB_ID) localStorage.removeItem(getSendLeaseKey());
        } catch {}
    }

    function setComposerTextReliably(composer, text) {
        if (!composer) return false;
        for (let attempt = 1; attempt <= 3; attempt += 1) {
            if (!setComposerText(composer, text)) continue;
            if (normalizeText(getComposerText(composer)) === normalizeText(text)) return true;
            try {
                composer.focus();
                composer.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, data: text, inputType: 'insertReplacementText' }));
                composer.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
            } catch {}
        }
        if (isDebugEnabled()) pushLog(`Composer set verification failed: got "${normalizeText(getComposerText(composer)).slice(0, 80)}"`);
        return normalizeText(getComposerText(composer)) === normalizeText(text);
    }

    function sendContinuePrompt(snap, reason = 'auto-send') {
        if (!snap.composer) return false;

        // strict user-safe rule: do not overwrite a real draft in the input box
        if (snap.composerText && snap.composerText !== normalizeText(config.continueText)) {
            pushLog('Send skipped: composer has a non-auto draft');
            return false;
        }

        if (!acquireSendLease(reason)) return false;

        if (!setComposerTextReliably(snap.composer, config.continueText)) {
            pushLog('Send skipped: failed to set composer text reliably');
            releaseSendLease();
            return false;
        }

        // React often enables the arrow submit button one or two frames after input.
        // v100 treats filling the composer as an armed send, then retries only the
        // form-local safe submit button for a short window. This fixes "filled but not sent"
        // without reintroducing whole-page clicks or mic/tool geometry fallback. If explicit send is unavailable, v102 may submit only the composer form.
        state.pendingAutoPrompt = {
            text: config.continueText,
            sentAt: Date.now(),
            baseUserCount: snap.userCount,
            promptSig: normalizeAutoPromptSignature(config.continueText)
        };

        schedulePostFillSubmitProbes(reason);

        if (trySubmitComposer(snap.composer, snap.root, 'immediate')) {
            scheduleSendRetry(1, config.sendRetryDelayMs);
            return true;
        }

        scheduleSendRetry(1, config.submitAfterFillDelayMs);
        pushLog('Composer filled; waiting for safe composer submit/form handler');
        markDirty(true);
        return true;
    }

    function forceContinueNow() {
        const now = Date.now();
        const snap = readPageState();

        if (snap.continueBtn && acquireSendLease('manual-click-continue')) {
            if (clickIfPossible(snap.continueBtn, 'continue')) {
                markAutoAction(now, 'click-continue');
                setStatus('Continue button clicked now');
                markDirty(true);
                return true;
            }
            releaseSendLease();
        }

        if (sendContinuePrompt(snap, 'manual-now')) {
            markAutoAction(now, 'send-continue');
            setStatus('Follow-up prompt sent now');
            markDirty(true);
            return true;
        }

        setStatus('Cannot continue right now');
        return false;
    }


    function getRoundRuntimeConversationKey() {
        const cid = getConversationId() || `url-${location.pathname || 'new'}`;
        return `${ROUND_RUNTIME_KEY_PREFIX}${cid}`;
    }

    function getRoundRuntimeSnapshot() {
        return {
            version: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
            savedAt: Date.now(),
            autoRounds: state.autoRounds,
            roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
            roundPendingSince: Number(state.roundPendingSince) || 0,
            roundPendingMode: state.roundPendingMode || '',
            awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
            lastAutoAt: Number(state.lastAutoAt) || 0,
            lastAutoAssistantLen: Number(state.lastAutoAssistantLen) || 0,
            lastUserCount: Number.isFinite(Number(state.lastUserCount)) ? Number(state.lastUserCount) : null,
            aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl: !!state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl
        };
    }

    function persistRoundRuntime(reason = '') {
        try {
            sessionStorage.setItem(getRoundRuntimeConversationKey(), JSON.stringify(getRoundRuntimeSnapshot()));
            state.lastRoundRuntimeSaveReason = reason || state.lastRoundRuntimeSaveReason || 'update';
        } catch (error) {
            if (isDebugEnabled()) console.warn('[AutoContinue] round runtime persist failed:', error);
        }
    }

    function restoreRoundRuntime(reason = '') {
        try {
            const raw = sessionStorage.getItem(getRoundRuntimeConversationKey());
            if (!raw) return false;
            const saved = JSON.parse(raw);
            if (!saved || saved.conversationId !== (getConversationId() || '')) return false;
            if (saved.url && saved.url !== location.href) return false;
            const age = Date.now() - (Number(saved.savedAt) || 0);
            if (age > 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000) return false;

            state.autoRounds = clampNumber(saved.autoRounds, 0, Math.max(1000, config.maxAutoRounds || 100));
            state.roundPendingProof = !!saved.roundPendingProof;
            state.roundPendingSince = Number(saved.roundPendingSince) || 0;
            state.roundPendingMode = normalizeText(saved.roundPendingMode || '');
            state.awaitingGrowth = !!saved.awaitingGrowth;
            state.lastAutoAt = Number(saved.lastAutoAt) || state.lastAutoAt || 0;
            state.lastAutoAssistantLen = Number(saved.lastAutoAssistantLen) || state.lastAutoAssistantLen || 0;
            state.lastUserCount = Number.isFinite(Number(saved.lastUserCount)) ? Number(saved.lastUserCount) : state.lastUserCount;
            state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = !!saved.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl;
            state.lastRoundRuntimeRestoreReason = reason || 'restore';
            updateRounds();
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            if (isDebugEnabled()) console.warn('[AutoContinue] round runtime restore failed:', error);
            return false;
        }
    }

    function clearRoundRuntime(reason = '') {
        try { sessionStorage.removeItem(getRoundRuntimeConversationKey()); } catch {}
        state.lastRoundRuntimeSaveReason = reason || 'clear';
    }

    function markAutoAction(now, mode) {
        state.lastAutoAt = now;
        state.lastAutoAssistantLen = state.lastAssistantText.length;
        state.awaitingGrowth = true;
        state.autoRounds += 1;
        state.lastActionReason = mode || 'auto';

        // A clicked native Continue button is already a real action. A typed follow-up
        // prompt is only tentative until the page shows our new user message. Keep the
        // visible counter honest by marking that round as pending proof and rolling it
        // back if submission never happens.
        const needsSubmitProof = mode === 'send-continue' || mode === 'aggressive-resume';
        state.roundPendingProof = needsSubmitProof;
        state.roundPendingSince = needsSubmitProof ? now : 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = needsSubmitProof ? mode : '';
        updateRounds();
        persistRoundRuntime(`mark-${mode || 'auto'}`);

        if (mode === 'click-continue') {
            pushLog(`Round ${state.autoRounds}: clicked Continue button`);
        } else if (mode === 'send-continue') {
            pushLog(`Round ${state.autoRounds}: sent follow-up prompt · pending proof`);
        } else if (mode === 'aggressive-resume') {
            pushLog(`Round ${state.autoRounds}: aggressive resume sent · pending proof`);
        }
    }

    function clearRoundPendingProof(reason = '') {
        if (!state.roundPendingProof) return;
        state.roundPendingProof = false;
        state.roundPendingSince = 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = '';
        updateRounds();
        persistRoundRuntime(reason ? `proof-confirmed:${reason}` : 'proof-confirmed');
        if (reason) pushLog(`Round proof confirmed: ${reason}`);
    }

    function rollbackPendingRound(reason = '') {
        if (!state.roundPendingProof) return;
        state.autoRounds = Math.max(0, state.autoRounds - 1);
        state.roundPendingProof = false;
        state.roundPendingSince = 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = '';
        updateRounds();
        persistRoundRuntime(reason ? `rollback:${reason}` : 'rollback');
        pushLog(`Round counter rolled back${reason ? `: ${reason}` : ''}`);
    }

    function updateRounds() {
        if (roundsNode) {
            const pending = state.roundPendingProof ? ' · pending' : '';
            roundsNode.textContent = `${state.autoRounds} / ${config.maxAutoRounds}${pending}`;
            roundsNode.title = state.roundPendingProof
                ? 'This round has filled/submitted a follow-up prompt, but the page has not yet shown the new user message proof. It will confirm or roll back automatically.'
                : 'Auto rounds in this conversation since the last real user message or page reset.';
        }
    }

    function updateMetaInfo() {
        if (scopeNode) {
            const cid = getConversationId() || 'none';
            scopeNode.textContent = `Version: ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL} | Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD} | Global: ${isGlobalEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'} | ${getScopeStatusText()} | Conversation: ${cid} | Tab: ${TAB_ID.slice(-6)} | Guard: ${config.crossTabSendGuard ? 'on' : 'off'} | Last: ${state.lastActionReason}`;
        }

        if (currentNode) {
            currentNode.textContent = `Title: ${getConversationTitle() || 'none'}`;
        }

        updateLockInfo();
    }

    function renderLogs() {
        if (!logsNode) return;
        logsNode.innerHTML = '';

        if (!state.logs.length) {
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'ac-log-empty';
            item.textContent = 'No activity yet';
            logsNode.appendChild(item);
            return;
        }

        for (const line of state.logs) {
            const item = document.createElement('div');
            item.className = 'ac-log-line';
            item.textContent = line;
            logsNode.appendChild(item);
        }
    }

    function escapeHtml(text) {
        return String(text || '').replace(/[&<>\"]/g, (ch) => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;' }[ch]));
    }

    function clampPreviewText(text, limit = PROMPT_UI_TITLE_PREVIEW_LIMIT) {
        const raw = String(text || '');
        const max = clampNumber(limit, 80, 8000);
        if (raw.length <= max) return raw;
        return `${raw.slice(0, max)}\n…[truncated ${raw.length - max} chars · use Copy active/Copy stack for full text]`;
    }

    function getPresetSafeTitle(preset, prefix = '') {
        const text = String(preset?.text || '');
        const max = config.promptUiTitlePreviewChars || DEFAULT_CONFIG.promptUiTitlePreviewChars || PROMPT_UI_TITLE_PREVIEW_LIMIT;
        const meta = `${preset?.name || 'Preset'} · ${text.length} chars · ${preset?.textHash || simpleHash(text) || 'nohash'}`;
        const preview = clampPreviewText(text, max);
        return `${prefix}${prefix ? '\n' : ''}${meta}${preview ? `\n${preview}` : ''}`;
    }

    function renderPromptWidgets() {
        const presets = getPromptPresets();
        const activeIds = getActivePromptPresetIds();
        const activeIdSet = new Set(activeIds);
        const activePreset = getActivePromptPreset();
        const pinnedSet = new Set(config.pinnedPromptPresetIds || []);
        const visiblePresets = getVisiblePromptPresets(activeIds);
        const filteredPresets = sortPromptPresetsForDisplay(visiblePresets.filter((preset) => matchesPresetSearch(preset)), activeIds);

        if (quickPromptRow) {
            const quickPresets = sortPromptPresetsForDisplay([
                ...getActivePromptPresets(),
                ...visiblePresets.filter((preset) => pinnedSet.has(preset.id)),
                ...filteredPresets,
                ...visiblePresets.filter((preset) => !activeIdSet.has(preset.id) && !pinnedSet.has(preset.id))
            ], activeIds).filter((preset, index, arr) => arr.findIndex((item) => item.id === preset.id) === index)
             .slice(0, getPanelDensity() === 'compact' ? 6 : 10);
            quickPromptRow.innerHTML = quickPresets.map((preset) => {
                const label = `${pinnedSet.has(preset.id) ? '★ ' : ''}${preset.name}`;
                return `<button class="ac-chip ${activeIdSet.has(preset.id) ? 'ac-active' : ''} ${pinnedSet.has(preset.id) ? 'ac-pinned' : ''}" type="button" data-preset-id="${escapeHtml(preset.id)}" title="${escapeHtml(getPresetSafeTitle(preset, '单击使用；Alt/Ctrl/⌘ 单击加入组合；Shift 单击固定到首页'))}">${escapeHtml(label)}</button>`;
            }).join('');
        }

        if (presetStackNode) {
            const byId = new Map(presets.map((preset) => [preset.id, preset]));
            presetStackNode.innerHTML = activeIds.map((id, idx) => {
                const preset = byId.get(id);
                if (!preset) return '';
                return `<span class="ac-stack-card" draggable="true" data-preset-id="${escapeHtml(id)}" title="${escapeHtml(getPresetSafeTitle(preset))}">
                    <span>${idx + 1}. ${escapeHtml(preset.name)}</span>
                    <button type="button" data-action="up" title="上移">↑</button>
                    <button type="button" data-action="down" title="下移">↓</button>
                    <button type="button" data-action="remove" title="移除">×</button>
                </span>`;
            }).join('');
        }

        if (presetPoolNode) {
            const pool = filteredPresets.filter((preset) => !activeIdSet.has(preset.id)).slice(0, 18);
            presetPoolNode.innerHTML = pool.length ? pool
                .map((preset) => `<button class="ac-chip ${pinnedSet.has(preset.id) ? 'ac-pinned' : ''}" type="button" data-preset-id="${escapeHtml(preset.id)}" title="${escapeHtml(getPresetSafeTitle(preset, '单击加入组合；Shift 单击固定到首页'))}">${pinnedSet.has(preset.id) ? '★' : '+'} ${escapeHtml(preset.name)}</button>`)
                .join('') : '<div class="ac-preset-help">No matching presets.</div>';
        }

        if (presetSelect) {
            const optionSource = filteredPresets.some((preset) => preset.id === activePreset.id) ? filteredPresets : [activePreset, ...filteredPresets];
            const optionsHtml = optionSource.filter((preset, index, arr) => arr.findIndex((item) => item.id === preset.id) === index).map((preset) => {
                const marker = preset.archived ? ' · archived' : preset.builtin ? ' · built-in' : preset.category ? ` · ${preset.category}` : ' · custom';
                const pin = pinnedSet.has(preset.id) ? '★ ' : '';
                return `<option value="${escapeHtml(preset.id)}">${escapeHtml(pin + preset.name + marker)}</option>`;
            }).join('');
            if (presetSelect.innerHTML !== optionsHtml) presetSelect.innerHTML = optionsHtml;
            presetSelect.value = activePreset.id;
        }

        if (presetSearchInput && document.activeElement !== presetSearchInput) {
            presetSearchInput.value = getPromptPickerSearchText();
        }

        if (presetPreviewNode) {
            const text = buildPromptTextFromIds(activeIds);
            const max = config.promptUiPreviewChars || DEFAULT_CONFIG.promptUiPreviewChars || PROMPT_UI_PREVIEW_LIMIT;
            const preview = config.memoryPressureGuard ? clampPreviewText(text, max) : text;
            presetPreviewNode.value = preview;
            presetPreviewNode.title = `${text.length} chars · full text is only exported by explicit Copy active/Copy stack`;
        }

        if (btnPresetPin) {
            const pinned = pinnedSet.has(activePreset.id);
            btnPresetPin.textContent = pinned ? 'Unpin active' : 'Pin active';
            btnPresetPin.classList.toggle('ac-primary', pinned);
            btnPresetPin.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !pinned);
        }

        if (btnPresetJoinMode) {
            const label = config.promptJoinMode === 'newline' ? 'newline' : config.promptJoinMode === 'space' ? 'space' : 'custom';
            btnPresetJoinMode.textContent = `Join: ${label}`;
            btnPresetJoinMode.title = `Current separator: ${JSON.stringify(getPromptSeparator())}`;
        }
        if (promptLibraryStatsNode) {
            promptLibraryStatsNode.textContent = getPromptLibraryStatsText();
        }

        if (btnPresetLongToggle) {
            btnPresetLongToggle.textContent = config.allowLongPromptPresets ? 'Long presets: on' : 'Long presets: off';
            btnPresetLongToggle.title = `User-saved prompt limit: ${getPromptPresetStorageLabel(config)}`;
            btnPresetLongToggle.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.allowLongPromptPresets);
            btnPresetLongToggle.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.allowLongPromptPresets);
        }
        if (btnPresetBackup) btnPresetBackup.title = getPromptLibraryBackupSummary();
        if (btnPresetRestore) btnPresetRestore.title = getPromptLibraryBackupSummary();
        if (btnPresetDedupe) btnPresetDedupe.title = 'Remove duplicate preset texts after creating a backup.';
        if (btnPresetCopyActive) btnPresetCopyActive.title = 'Explicitly export the active preset with full text. Diagnostics and manifest remain text-free.';
        if (btnPresetCopyStack) btnPresetCopyStack.title = 'Explicitly export the active prompt stack with full text. Use only when you intend to copy saved prompt text.';
        if (btnPresetAudit) btnPresetAudit.title = 'Preview prompt-library issues, then optionally back up and repair safe metadata/id/active-stack problems.';
        if (btnPresetHealthPack) btnPresetHealthPack.title = 'Copy diagnostics + text-free manifest + validation/storage summary as one JSON. Does not include saved prompt bodies.';
        if (btnPresetRegressionChecklist) btnPresetRegressionChecklist.title = 'Copy a text-free regression checklist with checked safety/automation/storage signals for this page.';
        if (btnPresetTrimBackups) btnPresetTrimBackups.title = 'Trim old prompt-library backups if long presets are creating localStorage pressure.';
        if (btnPresetRestoreDeleted) btnPresetRestoreDeleted.title = getPromptLibraryTrashSummary();
        if (btnPresetEmptyTrash) btnPresetEmptyTrash.title = getPromptLibraryTrashSummary();
        if (btnPresetArchive) {
            const active = getActivePromptPreset();
            btnPresetArchive.textContent = active?.archived ? 'Unarchive active' : 'Archive active';
            btnPresetArchive.title = 'Hide a custom preset from normal picker/search without deleting it.';
            btnPresetArchive.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!active?.archived);
            btnPresetArchive.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !active?.archived);
        }
        if (btnPresetShowArchived) {
            btnPresetShowArchived.textContent = getPromptPickerShowArchived() ? 'Archived: shown' : 'Archived: hidden';
            btnPresetShowArchived.title = 'Local display filter for this tab/chat only. It does not change the shared prompt library or other pages.';
            btnPresetShowArchived.classList.toggle('ac-primary', getPromptPickerShowArchived());
            btnPresetShowArchived.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !getPromptPickerShowArchived());
        }
    }

    function clampNumber(value, min, max) {
        const n = Number(value);
        if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return min;
        return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, n));
    }
