    function applyPanelPosition() {
        if (!panel) return;
        const pos = getLocalPanelPosition();
        if (!pos || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.left)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(pos.top))) return;

        const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
        const left = clampNumber(pos.left, 8, Math.max(8, window.innerWidth - rect.width - 8));
        const top = clampNumber(pos.top, 8, Math.max(8, window.innerHeight - Math.min(rect.height, window.innerHeight - 16) - 8));
        panel.style.left = `${left}px`;
        panel.style.top = `${top}px`;
        panel.style.right = 'auto';
        panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
    }

    function resetPanelPosition(reason) {
        const next = Object.assign({}, readLocalPanelState());
        delete next.panelPosition;
        try { sessionStorage.setItem(getLocalPanelStateKey(), JSON.stringify(next)); } catch {}
        if (panel) {
            panel.style.left = '';
            panel.style.top = '';
            panel.style.right = '24px';
            panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
        }
        if (reason) pushLog(`${reason} · local to this tab/chat`);
        safeUpdatePanel('reset-panel-position');
    }

    function isPanelAttached() {
        return !!(panel && document.body && document.body.contains(panel));
    }

    function ensurePanelAlive(reason = 'watchdog') {
        if (!document.body) return false;
        injectPanelStyles();

        if (!isPanelAttached()) {
            panel = null;
            createPanel();
            if (panel) {
                applyPanelPosition();
                safeUpdatePanel(`restored by ${reason}`);
            }
            if (panel && reason) pushLog(`Panel restored by ${reason}`);
            return !!panel;
        }

        const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
        const style = getComputedStyle(panel);
        const invisible =
            style.display === 'none' ||
            style.visibility === 'hidden' ||
            style.opacity === '0' ||
            rect.width < 80 ||
            rect.height < 28 ||
            rect.right < 12 ||
            rect.left > window.innerWidth - 12 ||
            rect.bottom < 12 ||
            rect.top > window.innerHeight - 12;

        if (invisible) {
            panel.style.display = '';
            panel.style.visibility = 'visible';
            panel.style.opacity = '1';
            resetPanelPosition('Panel position recovered');
            applyPanelPosition();
        }

        panel.style.zIndex = '2147483647';
        return true;
    }

    function installPanelDrag() {
        if (!panelHeader || panelHeader.dataset.acDragReady === '1') return;
        panelHeader.dataset.acDragReady = '1';

        let dragging = false;
        let startX = 0;
        let startY = 0;
        let startLeft = 0;
        let startTop = 0;

        panelHeader.addEventListener('pointerdown', (event) => {
            if (event.button !== 0) return;
            if (event.target?.closest?.('button')) return;
            if (!panel) return;

            const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
            dragging = true;
            startX = event.clientX;
            startY = event.clientY;
            startLeft = rect.left;
            startTop = rect.top;
            panel.style.left = `${rect.left}px`;
            panel.style.top = `${rect.top}px`;
            panel.style.right = 'auto';
            panel.style.bottom = 'auto';
            panelHeader.setPointerCapture?.(event.pointerId);
            event.preventDefault();
        });

        panelHeader.addEventListener('pointermove', (event) => {
            if (!dragging || !panel) return;
            const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
            const nextLeft = clampNumber(startLeft + event.clientX - startX, 8, Math.max(8, window.innerWidth - rect.width - 8));
            const nextTop = clampNumber(startTop + event.clientY - startY, 8, Math.max(8, window.innerHeight - rect.height - 8));
            panel.style.left = `${nextLeft}px`;
            panel.style.top = `${nextTop}px`;
        });

        function finishDrag(event) {
            if (!dragging || !panel) return;
            dragging = false;
            panelHeader.releasePointerCapture?.(event.pointerId);
            const rect = panel.getBoundingClientRect();
            setLocalPanelPosition({
                left: Math.round(rect.left),
                top: Math.round(rect.top)
            }, 'panel-drag-position');
        }

        panelHeader.addEventListener('pointerup', finishDrag);
        panelHeader.addEventListener('pointercancel', finishDrag);
    }


    let panelCreating = false;
    let panelUpdating = false;

    function safeUpdatePanel(reason = 'update') {
        if (panelUpdating) return;
        panelUpdating = true;
        try {
            updatePanel();
        } catch (error) {
            state.panelRenderFailureCount = (state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0) + 1;
            state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `update failed during ${reason}: ${error?.message || error}`;
            console.error(`[AutoContinue] updatePanel failed during ${reason}:`, error);
            try {
                panel = document.getElementById(PANEL_ID);
                if (panel) {
                    panel.style.display = '';
                    panel.style.visibility = 'visible';
                    panel.style.opacity = '1';
                    panel.style.zIndex = '2147483647';
                    repairPanelButtonLabels(`update-failed:${reason}`);
                }
            } catch {}
        } finally {
            panelUpdating = false;
        }
    }

    function safeAction(label, fn) {
        try {
            fn();
        } catch (error) {
            state.panelActionFailureCount = (state.panelActionFailureCount || 0) + 1;
            state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `action failed: ${label}`;
            console.error(`[AutoContinue] panel action failed: ${label}`, error);
            try {
                pushLog(`Action failed: ${label}`);
                ensurePanelAlive('action recovery');
                repairPanelButtonLabels('action recovery');
                safeUpdatePanel('action recovery');
            } catch {}
        }
    }

    function hardToggleMain() {
        setGlobalEnabled(!isGlobalEnabled(), 'panel');
    }

    function repairPanelButtonLabels(reason = 'label-repair') {
        try {
            const root = document.getElementById(PANEL_ID);
            if (!root) return;
            const fallbackLabels = {
                'ac-global-toggle': 'Global',
                'ac-now': 'Continue now',
                'ac-prompt-cycle': 'Prompt',
                'ac-toggle': 'This chat',
                'ac-unlock': 'Unlock',
                'ac-collapse': getPanelCollapsed() ? '+' : '—',
                'ac-density': getPanelDensity() === 'compact' ? '▣' : '□',
                'ac-advanced': getPanelAdvancedOpen() ? '⌃' : '⌘',
                'ac-aggressive': config.aggressiveAfterRefresh ? 'Refresh resume: on' : 'Refresh resume: off',
                'ac-spam-lock': config.enableSpamLock ? 'Spam lock: on' : 'Spam lock: off',
                'ac-keep-alive': config.keepAliveWhenVisible ? 'Keep warm: on' : 'Keep warm: off',
                'ac-scope-btn': `Scope mode: ${config.scopeMode || 'all'}`,
                'ac-rounds-btn': 'Round limit',
                'ac-theme': `Theme: ${getPanelThemeMode() || 'system'}`,
                'ac-reset-rounds': 'Reset rounds',
                'ac-copy-diagnostics': 'Copy diagnostics',
                'ac-copy-health-summary': 'Copy health summary',
                'ac-copy-quick-support': 'Copy quick support',
                'ac-copy-release-note': 'Copy release note',
                'ac-copy-upgrade-plan': 'Copy upgrade plan',
                'ac-copy-audit-index': 'Copy audit index',
                'ac-copy-audit-lite': 'Copy audit lite',
                'ac-copy-runtime-snapshot': 'Copy runtime snapshot',
                'ac-copy-background-triage': 'Copy background triage',
                'ac-copy-trigger-trace': 'Copy trigger trace',
                'ac-copy-safety-sentinel': 'Copy safety sentinel',
                'ac-copy-history-audit': 'Copy history audit',
                'ac-copy-release-gate': 'Copy release gate',
                'ac-copy-config-drift': 'Copy config drift',
                'ac-copy-config-repair-plan': 'Copy config repair plan',
                'ac-copy-version-audit': 'Copy version audit',
                'ac-copy-button-audit': 'Copy button audit',
                'ac-copy-state-map': 'Copy state map',
                'ac-copy-action-map': 'Copy action map',
                'ac-copy-badge-legend': 'Copy badge legend',
                'ac-copy-local-ui': 'Copy local UI',
                'ac-copy-local-ui-cache': 'Copy local UI cache',
                'ac-prune-local-ui-cache': 'Prune local UI cache',
                'ac-action-badges-toggle': getActionBadgesVisible() ? 'Badges: shown' : 'Badges: hidden',
                'ac-copy-boundary-audit': 'Copy boundary audit',
                'ac-scrub-shared-config': 'Scrub shared config',
                'ac-copy-sync-timeline': 'Copy sync timeline',
                'ac-reset-local-ui': 'Reset local UI',
                'ac-copy-failure-report': 'Copy failure report',
                'ac-automation-defaults': 'Automation defaults',
                'ac-copy-preflight': 'Copy preflight',
                'ac-save-settings-checkpoint': 'Save settings checkpoint',
                'ac-restore-settings-checkpoint': 'Restore settings',
                'ac-repair-runtime': 'Repair runtime',
                'ac-global-snooze': isGlobalSnoozed() ? 'Resume now' : 'Snooze all',
                'ac-artifact-auto-download': config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled ? 'Artifact auto: on' : 'Artifact auto: off',
                'ac-artifact-download-now': 'Download newest',
                'ac-artifact-version-mode': 'Version guard',
                'ac-artifact-origin-mode': 'Origin guard',
                'ac-artifact-scope-mode': 'Scope guard',
                'ac-artifact-idle-mode': 'Idle guard',
                'ac-artifact-clear-history': 'Retry downloads',
                'ac-artifact-copy-status': 'Copy artifact status',
                'ac-only-this': 'Only this chat',
                'ac-allow-all': 'Allow all chats',
                'ac-pause-this': 'Pause this chat',
                'ac-hidden-pause': config.ignoreWhenHidden ? 'Background: paused' : 'Background: allowed',
                'ac-scroll-assist': config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue ? 'Bottom assist: on' : 'Bottom assist: off',
                'ac-steady-audit': config.steadyAuditWhenIdle ? 'Steady audit: on' : 'Steady audit: off',
                'ac-wake-hub': config.crossTabWakeHub ? 'Wake hub: on' : 'Wake hub: off',
                'ac-debug-local': isDebugEnabled() ? 'Debug: on' : 'Debug: off'
            };
            let repaired = 0;
            for (const [id, label] of Object.entries(fallbackLabels)) {
                const button = root.querySelector(`#${id}`);
                if (button && !normalizeText(button.textContent)) {
                    button.textContent = label;
                    button.title = button.title || `Recovered fallback label during ${reason}`;
                    repaired += 1;
                }
            }
            if (repaired) {
                state.panelLabelRepairCount = (state.panelLabelRepairCount || 0) + repaired;
                state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `repaired ${repaired} blank button label(s) · ${reason}`;
            }
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[AutoContinue] panel label repair failed:', error);
        }
    }

    function installPanelHardClickRouter() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acPanelHardRouter === '2') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acPanelHardRouter = '2';
        document.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const target = event.target;
            const button = target?.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID} button`);
            if (!button) return;
            const id = button.id || '';
            if (!id) return;
            const handled = new Set([
                'ac-toggle', 'ac-global-toggle', 'ac-global-snooze', 'ac-now', 'ac-prompt-cycle', 'ac-unlock', 'ac-collapse', 'ac-density', 'ac-advanced',
                'ac-aggressive', 'ac-spam-lock', 'ac-keep-alive', 'ac-scope-btn', 'ac-rounds-btn', 'ac-theme', 'ac-reset-rounds',
                'ac-copy-diagnostics', 'ac-copy-health-summary', 'ac-copy-quick-support', 'ac-copy-release-note', 'ac-copy-upgrade-plan', 'ac-copy-audit-index', 'ac-copy-audit-lite', 'ac-copy-runtime-snapshot', 'ac-copy-background-triage', 'ac-copy-trigger-trace', 'ac-copy-safety-sentinel', 'ac-copy-history-audit', 'ac-copy-release-gate', 'ac-copy-config-drift', 'ac-copy-config-repair-plan', 'ac-copy-version-audit', 'ac-copy-button-audit', 'ac-copy-state-map', 'ac-copy-action-map', 'ac-copy-badge-legend', 'ac-copy-local-ui', 'ac-copy-local-ui-cache', 'ac-prune-local-ui-cache', 'ac-action-badges-toggle', 'ac-copy-boundary-audit', 'ac-copy-sync-timeline', 'ac-scrub-shared-config', 'ac-reset-local-ui', 'ac-copy-failure-report', 'ac-automation-defaults', 'ac-copy-preflight', 'ac-save-settings-checkpoint', 'ac-restore-settings-checkpoint', 'ac-repair-runtime',
                'ac-artifact-auto-download', 'ac-artifact-download-now', 'ac-artifact-version-mode', 'ac-artifact-origin-mode', 'ac-artifact-scope-mode', 'ac-artifact-idle-mode', 'ac-artifact-clear-history', 'ac-artifact-copy-status',
                'ac-only-this', 'ac-allow-all', 'ac-pause-this', 'ac-hidden-pause', 'ac-scroll-assist', 'ac-steady-audit', 'ac-wake-hub',
                'ac-add-white', 'ac-add-black', 'ac-clear-white', 'ac-clear-black',
                'ac-preset-use-single', 'ac-preset-add-to-stack', 'ac-preset-clear-stack', 'ac-preset-add', 'ac-preset-edit', 'ac-preset-clone', 'ac-preset-delete', 'ac-preset-reset', 'ac-preset-export', 'ac-preset-import', 'ac-preset-save-draft', 'ac-preset-save-last-user', 'ac-preset-save-selection', 'ac-preset-long-toggle', 'ac-preset-backup', 'ac-preset-restore', 'ac-preset-dedupe', 'ac-preset-trim-backups', 'ac-preset-storage-audit', 'ac-preset-compact-storage', 'ac-preset-manifest', 'ac-preset-copy-active', 'ac-preset-copy-stack', 'ac-preset-audit', 'ac-preset-verify', 'ac-preset-health-pack', 'ac-preset-regression-checklist', 'ac-preset-restore-deleted', 'ac-preset-empty-trash', 'ac-preset-archive', 'ac-preset-show-archived', 'ac-preset-pin', 'ac-preset-join-mode', 'ac-preset-save-stack',
                'ac-hotkeys-enabled', 'ac-hotkeys-reset', 'ac-clear-logs'
            ]);
            if (!handled.has(id)) return;
            event.preventDefault();
            event.stopPropagation();
            event.stopImmediatePropagation();
            safeAction(id, () => {
                if (id === 'ac-global-toggle') hardToggleMain();
                else if (id === 'ac-global-snooze') toggleGlobalSnooze();
                else if (id === 'ac-toggle') { runPrimaryScopeAction(); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-now') forceContinueNow();
                else if (id === 'ac-prompt-cycle') cyclePromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-unlock') unlockConversation(true);
                else if (id === 'ac-collapse') { setPanelCollapsed(!getPanelCollapsed(), 'router-collapse'); }
                else if (id === 'ac-density') cyclePanelDensity();
                else if (id === 'ac-advanced') { setPanelAdvancedOpen(!getPanelAdvancedOpen(), 'router-advanced'); }
                else if (id === 'ac-aggressive') { config.aggressiveAfterRefresh = !config.aggressiveAfterRefresh; saveConfig(); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-spam-lock') { config.enableSpamLock = !config.enableSpamLock; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-keep-alive') { config.keepAliveWhenVisible = !config.keepAliveWhenVisible; saveConfig(); pushLog(`Keep warm -> ${config.keepAliveWhenVisible ? 'on' : 'off'}`); }
                else if (id === 'ac-scope-btn') cycleScopeMode();
                else if (id === 'ac-rounds-btn') { const v = prompt('Max auto rounds:', String(config.maxAutoRounds)); if (v !== null) { config.maxAutoRounds = clampNumber(v, 1, 999); saveConfig(); } }
                else if (id === 'ac-theme') cycleThemeMode();
                else if (id === 'ac-reset-rounds') { state.autoRounds = 0; clearRoundPendingProof('manual-reset'); saveRoundRuntime('manual-reset'); updateRounds(); pushLog('Auto rounds reset'); }
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-diagnostics') copyDiagnostics();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-health-summary') copyHealthSummary();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-quick-support') copyQuickSupportNote();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-release-note') copyReleaseNote();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-upgrade-plan') copyUpgradePlan();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-audit-index') copyAuditIndex();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-audit-lite') copyAuditLite();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-runtime-snapshot') copyRuntimeSnapshot();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-background-triage') copyBackgroundTriage();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-trigger-trace') copyTriggerTrace();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-safety-sentinel') copySafetySentinelAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-history-audit') copyHistoryBundleAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-release-gate') copyReleaseGateSummary();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-config-drift') copyConfigDriftAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-config-repair-plan') copyConfigRepairPlan();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-version-audit') copyVersionAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-button-audit') copyPanelButtonAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-state-map') copyStateScopeMap();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-action-map') copyPanelActionOwnershipMap();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-badge-legend') copyActionBadgeLegend();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-local-ui') copyLocalUiSnapshot();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-local-ui-cache') copyLocalUiCacheAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-prune-local-ui-cache') pruneLocalUiSessionCache('router-prune-local-ui-cache');
                else if (id === 'ac-action-badges-toggle') toggleActionBadgesVisible();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-boundary-audit') copyConfigBoundaryAudit();
                else if (id === 'ac-scrub-shared-config') scrubSharedConfigLocalOnlyNow('router-scrub-shared-config');
                else if (id === 'ac-reset-local-ui') clearLocalPanelState('manual-reset-local-ui');
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-failure-report') copyFailureReport();
                else if (id === 'ac-automation-defaults') applyAutomationDefaults();
                else if (id === 'ac-copy-preflight') copyAutomationPreflight();
                else if (id === 'ac-save-settings-checkpoint') saveSettingsCheckpoint();
                else if (id === 'ac-restore-settings-checkpoint') restoreSettingsCheckpoint();
                else if (id === 'ac-repair-runtime') repairRuntimeState();
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-auto-download') { config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled = !config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled; saveConfig(); pushLog(`Artifact auto-download -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}`); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-download-now') { const ok = attemptArtifactDownload('manual-now', { manual: true, ignoreHistory: true, allowOlderVersion: true }); if (!ok) pushLog(`Artifact manual download skipped: ${state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary}`); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-version-mode') { config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion = !config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-origin-mode') { config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly = config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly === false; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-scope-mode') { config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope = config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope === false; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-idle-mode') { config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable = config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable === false; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-clear-history') clearArtifactDownloadHistoryForCurrentConversation();
                else if (id === 'ac-artifact-copy-status') copyArtifactStatus();
                else if (id === 'ac-only-this') setOnlyThisChat();
                else if (id === 'ac-allow-all') allowAllChats();
                else if (id === 'ac-pause-this') pauseThisChat();
                else if (id === 'ac-hidden-pause') { config.ignoreWhenHidden = !config.ignoreWhenHidden; saveConfig(); publishWakeHub('background-toggle'); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-scroll-assist') { config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue = !config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue; saveConfig(); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-steady-audit') { config.steadyAuditWhenIdle = !config.steadyAuditWhenIdle; saveConfig(); pushLog(`Steady audit -> ${config.steadyAuditWhenIdle ? 'on' : 'off'}`); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-wake-hub') { config.crossTabWakeHub = !config.crossTabWakeHub; saveConfig(); pushLog(`Wake hub -> ${config.crossTabWakeHub ? 'on' : 'off'}`); publishWakeHub('toggle'); markDirty(true); }
                else if (id === 'ac-add-white') { if (isInWhitelist()) removeCurrentConversationFromWhitelist(); else addCurrentConversationToWhitelist(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-add-black') { if (isInBlacklist()) removeCurrentConversationFromBlacklist(); else addCurrentConversationToBlacklist(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-clear-white') clearWhitelist();
                else if (id === 'ac-clear-black') clearBlacklist();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-use-single') setActivePromptPreset(presetSelect?.value || config.activePromptPresetId);
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-add-to-stack') addPresetToPromptStack(presetSelect?.value || config.activePromptPresetId);
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-clear-stack') clearPromptStack();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-add') addPromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-edit') editActivePromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-clone') cloneActivePromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-delete') deleteActivePromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-reset') resetPromptPresets();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-export') exportPromptPresets();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-import') importPromptPresets();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-save-draft') saveComposerDraftAsPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-save-last-user') saveLastUserMessageAsPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-save-selection') saveSelectedTextAsPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-long-toggle') toggleLongPromptPresets();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-backup') { createPromptLibraryBackup('manual'); safeUpdatePanel('prompt-backup'); }
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-restore') restoreLatestPromptLibraryBackup();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-dedupe') dedupePromptLibrary();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-trim-backups') trimPromptLibraryBackups();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-storage-audit') promptStorageAuditInteractive();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-compact-storage') compactPromptStorageSnapshotInteractive();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-manifest') copyPromptLibraryManifest();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-copy-active') copyActivePromptPresetJson();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-copy-stack') copyActivePromptStackJson();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-audit') auditPromptLibraryInteractive();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-verify') verifyPromptLibraryInteractive();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-health-pack') copySafeAuditPack();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-regression-checklist') copyRegressionChecklist();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-restore-deleted') restoreLatestDeletedPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-empty-trash') emptyPromptLibraryTrash();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-archive') archiveActivePromptPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-show-archived') toggleShowArchivedPresets();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-pin') togglePinnedPromptPreset(presetSelect?.value || config.activePromptPresetId);
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-join-mode') cyclePromptJoinMode();
                else if (id === 'ac-preset-save-stack') savePromptStackAsPreset();
                else if (id === 'ac-hotkeys-enabled') { config.hotkeysEnabled = !config.hotkeysEnabled; saveConfig(); }
                else if (id === 'ac-hotkeys-reset') resetHotkeys();
                else if (id === 'ac-clear-logs') { state.logs = []; renderLogs(); }
                repairPanelButtonLabels(`click:${id}`);
                safeUpdatePanel(`click:${id}`);
            });
        }, true);
    }

    function lifecycleWake(reason) {
        try {
            markDirty(true);
            safeUpdatePanel(reason || 'lifecycle');
            // v109: some ChatGPT pages do not expose the submit/continue controls until
            // the tab is focused/painted again. Run a short two-step wake tick without
            // clicking the page or changing focus outside the composer.
            setTimeout(safeTick, 0);
            setTimeout(safeTick, 320);
        } catch (error) {
            console.error(`[AutoContinue] lifecycle wake failed: ${reason}`, error);
        }
    }

    function installPanelLifecycleGuards() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acPanelLifecycleGuards === '1') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acPanelLifecycleGuards = '1';
        const recover = (reason) => () => {
            try {
                ensurePanelAlive(reason);
                lifecycleWake(reason);
            } catch (error) {
                console.error(`[AutoContinue] lifecycle recovery failed: ${reason}`, error);
            }
        };
        window.addEventListener('pageshow', recover('pageshow'));
        window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => publishWakeHub('pagehide'));
        window.addEventListener('focus', recover('window focus'));
        window.addEventListener('online', recover('network online'));
        document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', () => { recover('visibilitychange')(); publishWakeHub(`visibility:${document.visibilityState}`); });
        document.addEventListener('freeze', () => { publishWakeHub('freeze'); state.lastFreezeAt = Date.now(); });
        document.addEventListener('resume', recover('resume'));
        document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', recover('DOMContentLoaded'));
        window.addEventListener('load', recover('load'));

        const rootObserver = new MutationObserver(() => {
            if (!document.body) return;
            if (!document.getElementById(PANEL_ID)) recover('root mutation')();
        });
        rootObserver.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: false });
    }

    function createPanel() {
        if (panelCreating) return;
        if (panel && document.contains(panel)) return;
        if (!document.body) return;
        panelCreating = true;
        try {

        injectPanelStyles();

        panel = document.createElement('div');
        panel.id = PANEL_ID;
        panel.setAttribute('role', 'region');
        panel.setAttribute('aria-label', 'ChatGPT Auto Continue control panel');

        panel.innerHTML = `
            <div id="ac-drag-handle" class="ac-header" title="拖拽移动面板">
                <div class="ac-brand">
                    <span class="ac-status-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
                    <div class="ac-title-wrap">
                        <div class="ac-title">Auto Continue <span id="ac-version-title" class="ac-version-badge" title="Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}">${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}</span></div>
                        <div class="ac-subtitle"><span>Command panel</span><span id="ac-version-subtitle" class="ac-version-badge" title="Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}">${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}</span></div>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="ac-window-actions">
                    <button id="ac-density" class="ac-btn ac-icon ac-ghost" title="宽/窄模式" type="button">□</button>
                    <button id="ac-collapse" class="ac-btn ac-icon ac-ghost" title="收纳/展开" type="button">—</button>
                    <button id="ac-advanced" class="ac-btn ac-icon ac-ghost" title="高级设置" type="button">⌘</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div id="ac-panel-body" class="ac-body">
                <div class="ac-metrics">
                    <div class="ac-card">
                        <div class="ac-label">Status</div>
                        <div id="ac-status" class="ac-value">Ready</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ac-card">
                        <div class="ac-label">Rounds</div>
                        <div id="ac-rounds" class="ac-value">0 / 0</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ac-card">
                        <div class="ac-label">Lock</div>
                        <div id="ac-lock" class="ac-value">no</div>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="ac-toolbar">
                    <button id="ac-global-toggle" class="ac-btn ac-span-2" type="button"></button>
                    <button id="ac-now" class="ac-btn ac-primary" type="button">Continue now</button>
                    <button id="ac-prompt-cycle" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Prompt</button>
                    <button id="ac-toggle" class="ac-btn ac-ghost ac-span-2" type="button"></button>
                    <button id="ac-unlock" class="ac-btn ac-ghost ac-span-2" type="button">Unlock</button>
                </div>
                <div id="ac-decision" class="ac-decision" title="Current decision summary"></div>
                <div id="ac-quick-prompt-row" class="ac-quick-prompt-row" title="单击切换当前提示词；按住 Alt/Option 或 Ctrl 单击可加入复合提示词栈"></div>

                <div id="ac-advanced-body" class="ac-section" style="display:${getPanelAdvancedOpen() ? 'block' : 'none'};">
                    <div class="ac-section-title">Advanced</div>
                    <div class="ac-meta">
                        <div id="ac-scope"></div>
                        <div id="ac-current"></div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="ac-button-grid">
                        <button id="ac-aggressive" class="ac-btn" type="button"></button>
                        <button id="ac-spam-lock" class="ac-btn" type="button"></button>
                        <button id="ac-keep-alive" class="ac-btn" type="button"></button>
                        <button id="ac-scope-btn" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Scope mode</button>
                        <button id="ac-rounds-btn" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Round limit</button>
                        <button id="ac-theme" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Theme</button>
                        <button id="ac-reset-rounds" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Reset rounds</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-diagnostics" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy diagnostics</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-health-summary" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy health summary</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-quick-support" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy quick support</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-release-note" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy release note</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-upgrade-plan" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy upgrade plan</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-audit-index" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy audit index</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-audit-lite" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy audit lite</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-runtime-snapshot" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy runtime snapshot</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-background-triage" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy background triage</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-trigger-trace" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy trigger trace</button>
                        <button id="ac-copy-safety-sentinel" class="ac-btn ac-ghost" type="button">Copy safety sentinel</button>

            setPanelCollapsed(!getPanelCollapsed(), 'button-collapse');

            runPrimaryScopeAction();

            setGlobalEnabled(!isGlobalEnabled(), 'panel');

            forceContinueNow();

            cyclePromptPreset();
        });

            unlockConversation(true);
        });

        btnAdvanced.addEventListener('click', () => {
            setPanelAdvancedOpen(!getPanelAdvancedOpen(), 'button-advanced');
        });

        btnAggressive.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.aggressiveAfterRefresh = !config.aggressiveAfterRefresh;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Aggressive resume -> ${config.aggressiveAfterRefresh ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });

        btnScope.addEventListener('click', () => {
            cycleScopeMode();
            markDirty(true);
        });

        btnSpamLock.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.enableSpamLock = !config.enableSpamLock;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Spam lock -> ${config.enableSpamLock ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnKeepAlive.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.keepAliveWhenVisible = !config.keepAliveWhenVisible;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Keep warm -> ${config.keepAliveWhenVisible ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });

            cycleThemeMode();

        btnPresetRestore.addEventListener('click', () => { restoreLatestPromptLibraryBackup(); });

        btnPresetTrimBackups.addEventListener('click', () => { trimPromptLibraryBackups(); });

        btnPresetAudit.addEventListener('click', () => { auditPromptLibraryInteractive(); });
        btnPresetVerify.addEventListener('click', () => { verifyPromptLibraryInteractive(); });
        btnPresetHealthPack.addEventListener('click', () => { copySafeAuditPack(); });
        btnPresetRegressionChecklist.addEventListener('click', () => { copyRegressionChecklist(); });
        btnPresetRestoreDeleted.addEventListener('click', () => { restoreLatestDeletedPreset(); });
        btnPresetEmptyTrash.addEventListener('click', () => { emptyPromptLibraryTrash(); });
        btnPresetArchive.addEventListener('click', () => { archiveActivePromptPreset(); });
        btnPresetShowArchived.addEventListener('click', () => { toggleShowArchivedPresets(); });
        btnPresetJoinMode.addEventListener('click', () => { cyclePromptJoinMode(); });
        btnHotkeysEnabled.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.hotkeysEnabled = !config.hotkeysEnabled;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Hotkeys -> ${config.hotkeysEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
        });
        btnHotkeysReset.addEventListener('click', () => { resetHotkeys(); });
        hotkeyListNode.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const button = event.target.closest('button[data-hotkey-action]');
            if (!button) return;
            editHotkey(button.dataset.hotkeyAction);
        });

        btnRounds.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const raw = prompt('Enter round limit (recommended 1-30):', String(config.maxAutoRounds));
            if (!raw) return;
            const n = Number(raw);
            if (Number.isFinite(n) && n >= 1 && n <= 100) {
                config.maxAutoRounds = Math.floor(n);
                saveConfig();
                pushLog(`Round limit -> ${config.maxAutoRounds}`);
                updateRounds();
                markDirty(true);
            }
        });

        btnAddWhite.addEventListener('click', () => {
            toggleCurrentConversationWhitelist();
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnAddBlack.addEventListener('click', () => {
            toggleCurrentConversationBlacklist();
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnClearWhite.addEventListener('click', () => {
            clearWhitelist();
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnClearBlack.addEventListener('click', () => {
            clearBlacklist();
            markDirty(true);
        });

        btnResetRounds.addEventListener('click', () => {
            state.autoRounds = 0;
            state.roundPendingProof = false;
            state.roundPendingSince = 0;
            state.roundPendingMode = '';
            state.awaitingGrowth = false;
            state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = false;
            clearRoundRuntime('manual-reset');
            releaseSendLease();
            state.lastActionReason = 'manual-reset';
            updateRounds();
            pushLog('Rounds reset manually');
            setStatus('Ready');
            markDirty(true);
        });

        btnCopyDiag.addEventListener('click', () => {
            copyDiagnostics();
        });

        if (btnCopyUpgradePlan) btnCopyUpgradePlan.addEventListener('click', () => { copyUpgradePlan(); });
        if (btnCopyAuditIndex) btnCopyAuditIndex.addEventListener('click', () => { copyAuditIndex(); });
        if (btnCopyButtonAudit) btnCopyButtonAudit.addEventListener('click', () => { copyPanelButtonAudit(); });
        if (btnCopySafetySentinel) btnCopySafetySentinel.addEventListener('click', () => { copySafetySentinelAudit(); });
        if (btnCopyStateMap) btnCopyStateMap.addEventListener('click', () => { copyStateScopeMap(); });
        if (btnCopyBadgeLegend) btnCopyBadgeLegend.addEventListener('click', () => { copyActionBadgeLegend(); });
        if (btnCopyLocalUi) btnCopyLocalUi.addEventListener('click', () => { copyLocalUiSnapshot(); });
        if (btnCopyLocalUiCache) btnCopyLocalUiCache.addEventListener('click', () => { copyLocalUiCacheAudit(); });
        if (btnPruneLocalUiCache) btnPruneLocalUiCache.addEventListener('click', () => { pruneLocalUiSessionCache('manual-prune-local-ui-cache'); });
        if (btnActionBadgesToggle) btnActionBadgesToggle.addEventListener('click', () => { toggleActionBadgesVisible(); });
        if (btnCopyBoundaryAudit) btnCopyBoundaryAudit.addEventListener('click', () => { copyConfigBoundaryAudit(); });
        if (btnScrubSharedConfig) btnScrubSharedConfig.addEventListener('click', () => { scrubSharedConfigLocalOnlyNow('manual-scrub-shared-config'); });
        if (btnResetLocalUi) btnResetLocalUi.addEventListener('click', () => { clearLocalPanelState('manual-reset-local-ui'); });
        btnCopyFailureReport.addEventListener('click', () => {
            copyFailureReport();
        });
        btnAutomationDefaults.addEventListener('click', () => {
            applyAutomationDefaults();
        });
        btnCopyPreflight.addEventListener('click', () => {
            copyAutomationPreflight();
        });
        btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint.addEventListener('click', () => {
            saveSettingsCheckpoint();
        });
        btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint.addEventListener('click', () => {
            restoreSettingsCheckpoint();
        });
        btnRepairRuntime.addEventListener('click', () => {
            repairRuntimeState('manual-button');
        });
        btnGlobalSnooze.addEventListener('click', () => {
            toggleGlobalSnooze();
        });
        btnArtifactAutoDownload.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled = !config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled;
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('artifact-auto-download-toggle');
            pushLog(`Artifact auto-download -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnArtifactDownloadNow.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const ok = attemptArtifactDownload('manual-now', { manual: true, ignoreHistory: true, allowOlderVersion: true });
            if (!ok) setStatus('No safe artifact to download');
            safeUpdatePanel('artifact-download-now');
        });
        btnArtifactVersionMode.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion = !config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion;
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('artifact-version-guard-toggle');
            pushLog(`Artifact version guard -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion ? 'newer only' : 'any safe version'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });
        btnArtifactOriginMode.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly = !config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly;
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('artifact-origin-guard-toggle');
            pushLog(`Artifact origin guard -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly ? 'assistant only' : 'relaxed'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });
        if (btnArtifactScopeMode) btnArtifactScopeMode.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope = !config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope;
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('artifact-scope-guard-toggle');
            pushLog(`Artifact scope guard -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope ? 'respect' : 'ignored'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });
        if (btnArtifactIdleMode) btnArtifactIdleMode.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable = !config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable;
            saveConfig();
            publishWakeHub('artifact-idle-guard-toggle');
            pushLog(`Artifact idle guard -> ${config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable ? 'stable idle' : 'immediate'}`);
        });

        if (btnArtifactClearHistory) btnArtifactClearHistory.addEventListener('click', () => {
            clearArtifactDownloadHistoryForCurrentConversation();
        });

        btnArtifactCopyStatus.addEventListener('click', () => {
            copyArtifactStatus();
        });
        btnOnlyThisChat.addEventListener('click', () => {
            setOnlyThisChat();
        });
        btnAllowAllChats.addEventListener('click', () => {
            allowAllChats();
        });
        btnPauseThisChat.addEventListener('click', () => {
            pauseThisChat();
        });
        btnHiddenPause.addEventListener('click', () => {
            toggleHiddenPause();
        });
        btnScrollAssist.addEventListener('click', () => {
            config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue = !config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Scroll assist -> ${config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
            markDirty(true);
        });

        if (btnDebugLocal) btnDebugLocal.addEventListener('click', () => {
            setDebugEnabledLocal(!isDebugEnabled(), 'debug-local-button');
        });

        btnClearLogs.addEventListener('click', () => {
            state.logs = [];
            renderLogs();
        });

        quickPromptRow.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const button = event.target.closest('button[data-preset-id]');
            if (!button) return;
            if (event.shiftKey) togglePinnedPromptPreset(button.dataset.presetId);
            else if (event.altKey || event.ctrlKey || event.metaKey) addPresetToPromptStack(button.dataset.presetId);
            else setActivePromptPreset(button.dataset.presetId);
        });

        presetPoolNode.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const button = event.target.closest('button[data-preset-id]');
            if (!button) return;
            if (event.shiftKey) togglePinnedPromptPreset(button.dataset.presetId);
            else addPresetToPromptStack(button.dataset.presetId);
        });

        presetStackNode.addEventListener('click', (event) => {
            const button = event.target.closest('button[data-action]');
            if (!button) return;
            const id = button.closest('[data-preset-id]')?.dataset.presetId;
            if (!id) return;
            if (button.dataset.action === 'remove') removePresetFromPromptStack(id);
            if (button.dataset.action === 'up') movePresetInPromptStack(id, -1);
            if (button.dataset.action === 'down') movePresetInPromptStack(id, 1);
        });

        presetStackNode.addEventListener('dragstart', (event) => {
            const card = event.target.closest('[data-preset-id]');
            if (!card) return;
            event.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', card.dataset.presetId);
        });
        presetStackNode.addEventListener('dragover', (event) => {
            if (event.target.closest('[data-preset-id]')) event.preventDefault();
        });
        presetStackNode.addEventListener('drop', (event) => {
            const target = event.target.closest('[data-preset-id]');
            const sourceId = event.dataTransfer.getData('text/plain');
            if (!target || !sourceId || target.dataset.presetId === sourceId) return;
            event.preventDefault();
            const ids = getActivePromptPresetIds().filter((id) => id !== sourceId);
            const targetIdx = ids.indexOf(target.dataset.presetId);
            ids.splice(targetIdx < 0 ? ids.length : targetIdx, 0, sourceId);
            config.activePromptPresetIds = ids;
            config.activePromptPresetId = ids[0];
            config.continueText = buildPromptTextFromIds(ids);
            saveConfig();
            pushLog('Prompt stack reordered by drag');
        });

        safeUpdatePanel('createPanel');
        renderLogs();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[AutoContinue] createPanel failed:', error);
        } finally {
            panelCreating = false;
        }
    }

    function updatePanel() {
        createPanel();
        if (!panel) return;

        syncContinueTextFromActivePreset();
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-collapsed', getPanelCollapsed());
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-compact', getPanelDensity() === 'compact');
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-theme-light', getEffectiveTheme() === 'light');
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-theme-dark', getEffectiveTheme() === 'dark');
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-off', !isGlobalEnabled() || !isAllowedByScope());
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-locked-state', state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now());
        panel.classList.toggle('ac-generating-state', state.statusText === 'Generating');

        if (panelBody) {
            panelBody.style.display = getPanelCollapsed() ? 'none' : '';
        }

        if (advancedBody) {
            advancedBody.style.display = getPanelAdvancedOpen() && !getPanelCollapsed() ? 'block' : 'none';
        }

        if (btnCollapse) {
            btnCollapse.textContent = getPanelCollapsed() ? '+' : '—';
            btnCollapse.setAttribute('aria-label', getPanelCollapsed() ? '展开面板' : '收纳面板');
        }

        if (versionNode) {
            versionNode.textContent = SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL;
            versionNode.title = `Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}`;
        }

        const versionSubtitleNode = panel.querySelector('#ac-version-subtitle');
        if (versionSubtitleNode) {
            versionSubtitleNode.textContent = SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL;
            versionSubtitleNode.title = `Build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}`;
        }

        if (btnGlobalToggle) {
            btnGlobalToggle.textContent = isGlobalSnoozed() ? `Global: SNOOZED · ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - Date.now())}` : (isGlobalEnabled() ? 'Global: ON · all tabs' : 'Global: OFF · all tabs paused');
            btnGlobalToggle.classList.toggle('ac-success', isGlobalEnabled());
            btnGlobalToggle.classList.toggle('ac-warn', isGlobalSnoozed());
            btnGlobalToggle.classList.toggle('ac-danger', !isGlobalEnabled() && !isGlobalSnoozed());
            btnGlobalToggle.title = 'Browser-wide master switch. Synced through localStorage and refreshed in every ChatGPT tab.';
        }

        if (btnToggle) {
            const allowed = isAllowedByScope();
            const reason = getScopeBlockReason();
            btnToggle.textContent = `${allowed ? 'This chat: allowed' : 'This chat: blocked'} · ${config.scopeMode}${!allowed ? ` · ${reason}` : ' · click to pause'}`;
            btnToggle.classList.toggle('ac-success', allowed && isGlobalEnabled());
            btnToggle.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !allowed && isGlobalEnabled() && config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isInWhitelist() && !isInBlacklist());
            btnToggle.classList.toggle('ac-warn', !allowed && isGlobalEnabled() && !(config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isInWhitelist() && !isInBlacklist()));
            btnToggle.classList.toggle('ac-danger', !isGlobalEnabled() || isInBlacklist());
            btnToggle.title = `${getScopeStatusText()}. Click action: ${getPrimaryScopeActionLabel()}. Use Advanced -> Scope mode to change all-page scope policy.`;
        }

        if (btnPromptCycle) {
            const activePresets = getActivePromptPresets();
            const label = activePresets.length > 1 ? `${activePresets.length} presets` : (activePresets[0]?.name || 'Prompt');
            btnPromptCycle.textContent = `Prompt: ${label}`;
            btnPromptCycle.title = config.continueText;
        }

        if (btnPanelMode) {
            btnPanelMode.textContent = getPanelDensity() === 'compact' ? '▣' : '□';
            btnPanelMode.setAttribute('aria-label', getPanelDensity() === 'compact' ? '切换到宽面板' : '切换到窄方框模式');
        }

        if (btnTheme) {
            btnTheme.textContent = `Theme: ${getPanelThemeMode()}`;
        }

        if (decisionNode) {
            decisionNode.textContent = getDecisionSummary();
            decisionNode.classList.toggle('ac-success-line', isGlobalEnabled() && isAllowedByScope());
            decisionNode.classList.toggle('ac-warn-line', isGlobalEnabled() && !isAllowedByScope());
            decisionNode.classList.toggle('ac-danger-line', !isGlobalEnabled() || isInBlacklist());
        }

        if (btnCopyDiag) {
            btnCopyDiag.title = 'Copy a compact diagnostic snapshot: version, scope/list state, page visibility, composer state, lease, and recent logs.';
        }
        const btnCopyHealthSummary = panel.querySelector('#ac-copy-health-summary');
        if (btnCopyHealthSummary) {
            btnCopyHealthSummary.title = 'Copy a text-free health rollup: blockers, warnings, version, panel, boundary, automation, memory, prompt library, and local UI cache.';
        }
        const btnCopyBadgeLegend = panel.querySelector('#ac-copy-badge-legend');
        const btnActionBadgesToggle = panel.querySelector('#ac-action-badges-toggle');
        const btnCopyLocalUi = panel.querySelector('#ac-copy-local-ui');
        const btnCopyLocalUiCache = panel.querySelector('#ac-copy-local-ui-cache');
        const btnPruneLocalUiCache = panel.querySelector('#ac-prune-local-ui-cache');
        if (btnCopyBadgeLegend) {
            btnCopyBadgeLegend.title = 'Copy a text-free legend explaining shared/local/text/audit/manual action badges.';
        }
        if (btnCopyLocalUi) {
            btnCopyLocalUi.title = 'Copy this tab/chat local UI sessionStorage snapshot. Text-free; does not include prompt bodies and does not write shared config.';
        }
        if (btnCopyLocalUiCache) {
            btnCopyLocalUiCache.title = 'Copy text-free audit of local UI sessionStorage cache entries in this tab.';
        }
        if (btnPruneLocalUiCache) {
            btnPruneLocalUiCache.title = 'Remove stale/invalid non-current local UI sessionStorage records in this tab only. Does not touch shared config or prompts.';
        }
        if (btnActionBadgesToggle) {
            btnActionBadgesToggle.textContent = getActionBadgesVisible() ? 'Badges: shown' : 'Badges: hidden';
            btnActionBadgesToggle.classList.toggle('ac-success', getActionBadgesVisible());
            btnActionBadgesToggle.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !getActionBadgesVisible());
            btnActionBadgesToggle.title = 'Local UI only: show or hide action ownership badges in this tab/chat. Does not change any shared setting.';
        }
        if (btnCopyFailureReport) {
            btnCopyFailureReport.title = 'Copy a text-free blocker report with likely failure reasons and next actions.';
        }
        if (btnAutomationDefaults) {
            btnAutomationDefaults.title = 'Apply safe automation-chain defaults: Global on, background allowed, wake/heartbeat/audit/bottom assist on. Scope lists and prompt library are not changed.';
        }
        if (btnCopyPreflight) {
            btnCopyPreflight.title = 'Copy a text-free automation preflight report showing profile gaps, scope blockers, and safe-submit signals.';
        }
        if (btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint) {
            btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint.title = 'Save a text-free rollback checkpoint for automation/scope/UI settings. Prompt library bodies are not copied.';
        }
        if (btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint) {
            btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint.title = 'Restore the last settings checkpoint without overwriting prompt preset texts.';
        }
        if (btnRepairRuntime) {
            btnRepairRuntime.title = 'Clear only current-tab transient automation state: pending prompt/retry/proof/lock/own lease. Does not change settings or prompt library.';
        }

        if (btnAutomationDefaults) {
            const preflight = buildAutomationPreflightPayload();
            const armed = preflight.missingProfileItems.length === 0;
            btnAutomationDefaults.textContent = armed ? 'Automation defaults ✓' : `Automation defaults (${preflight.missingProfileItems.length})`;
            btnAutomationDefaults.classList.toggle('ac-success', armed);
            btnAutomationDefaults.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !armed);
            btnAutomationDefaults.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', false);
        }
        if (btnCopyPreflight) {
            btnCopyPreflight.textContent = 'Copy preflight';
            btnCopyPreflight.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', true);
        }
        if (btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint) {
            btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint.textContent = 'Save settings checkpoint';
            btnSaveSettingsCheckpoint.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', true);
        }
        if (btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint) {
            const checkpoint = readSettingsCheckpoint();
            btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint.textContent = checkpoint ? 'Restore settings' : 'Restore settings — none';
            btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint.classList.toggle('ac-success', !!checkpoint);
            btnRestoreSettingsCheckpoint.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !checkpoint);
        }
        if (btnRepairRuntime) {
            const needs = getRuntimeRepairSummary().startsWith('repairable');
            btnRepairRuntime.textContent = needs ? 'Repair runtime ⚠' : 'Repair runtime';
            btnRepairRuntime.classList.toggle('ac-warn', needs);
            btnRepairRuntime.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !needs);
        }
        if (btnGlobalSnooze) {
            const snoozed = isGlobalSnoozed();
            btnGlobalSnooze.textContent = snoozed ? `Resume now · ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - Date.now())}` : 'Snooze all';
            btnGlobalSnooze.title = snoozed ? 'Clear the timed browser-wide pause now.' : 'Timed browser-wide pause. Does not change Scope, lists, prompt library, or saved prompt texts.';
            btnGlobalSnooze.classList.toggle('ac-warn', snoozed);
            btnGlobalSnooze.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !snoozed);
        }

        if (btnArtifactAutoDownload) {
            btnArtifactAutoDownload.textContent = config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled ? 'Artifact auto: on ✓' : 'Artifact auto: off';
            btnArtifactAutoDownload.title = 'Guarded artifact auto-download. Default guard only allows assistant artifact buttons named chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt. This is deliberately separate from auto-continue submit clicking.';
            btnArtifactAutoDownload.classList.toggle('ac-success', !!config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled);
            btnArtifactAutoDownload.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled);
        }
        if (btnArtifactDownloadNow) {
            const candidate = findNewestSafeArtifactButton({ allowOlderVersion: true });
            btnArtifactDownloadNow.textContent = candidate ? `Download newest: ${candidate.name.slice(0, 26)}${candidate.name.length > 26 ? '…' : ''}` : 'Download newest — none';
            btnArtifactDownloadNow.title = candidate ? `Manual guarded download for ${candidate.name}` : 'No eligible assistant artifact button found. Default guard expects chatgpt_auto_continue_v*.txt.';
            btnArtifactDownloadNow.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!candidate);
            btnArtifactDownloadNow.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !candidate);
        }
        if (btnArtifactVersionMode) {
            btnArtifactVersionMode.textContent = config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion ? 'Version guard: newer ✓' : 'Version guard: any';
            btnArtifactVersionMode.title = 'Automatic artifact downloads skip older/equal script versions when enabled. Manual Download newest can still click the highest safe candidate.';
            btnArtifactVersionMode.classList.toggle('ac-success', !!config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion);
            btnArtifactVersionMode.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion);
        }
        if (btnArtifactOriginMode) {
            btnArtifactOriginMode.textContent = config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false ? 'Origin: assistant ✓' : 'Origin: relaxed';
            btnArtifactOriginMode.title = 'When enabled, artifact auto-download requires the file button to be inside an assistant turn and prefers the newest assistant turn with eligible artifacts. This prevents loose main-page filename buttons from being clicked.';
            btnArtifactOriginMode.classList.toggle('ac-success', config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false);
            btnArtifactOriginMode.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly === false);
        }
        if (btnArtifactScopeMode) {
            btnArtifactScopeMode.textContent = config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== false ? 'Scope: respect ✓' : 'Scope: ignored';
            btnArtifactScopeMode.title = 'When enabled, artifact auto-download obeys the current chat Scope/whitelist/blacklist. Manual Download newest can still be used intentionally.';
            btnArtifactScopeMode.classList.toggle('ac-success', config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== false);
            btnArtifactScopeMode.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope === false);
        }

        if (btnArtifactIdleMode) {
            btnArtifactIdleMode.textContent = config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable !== false ? 'Idle: stable ✓' : 'Idle: immediate';
            btnArtifactIdleMode.title = 'When enabled, automatic artifact downloads wait briefly after generation stops before clicking the newest safe artifact. Manual Download newest still works immediately.';
            btnArtifactIdleMode.classList.toggle('ac-success', config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable !== false);
            btnArtifactIdleMode.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable === false);
        }
        if (btnArtifactClearHistory) {
            btnArtifactClearHistory.textContent = 'Retry downloads';
            btnArtifactClearHistory.title = 'Clear artifact download history for this conversation so a previously-clicked safe artifact can be downloaded again. Does not change prompt library or automation settings.';
        }
        if (btnArtifactCopyStatus) {
            btnArtifactCopyStatus.title = 'Copy artifact auto-download status without page text or prompt bodies.';
        }

        if (btnOnlyThisChat) {
            const cid = getConversationId();
            const onlyThisActive = !!cid && config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && isInWhitelist() && (config.whitelistConversationIds || []).length === 1 && !isInBlacklist();
            btnOnlyThisChat.textContent = onlyThisActive ? 'Only this chat ✓' : 'Only this chat';
            btnOnlyThisChat.classList.toggle('ac-success', onlyThisActive);
            btnOnlyThisChat.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !onlyThisActive);
            btnOnlyThisChat.title = 'Set Global ON, switch to whitelist mode, and make the current conversation the only allowed chat.';
        }

        if (btnAllowAllChats) {
            const allActive = isGlobalEnabled() && config.scopeMode === 'all' && !isInBlacklist();
            btnAllowAllChats.textContent = allActive ? 'Allow all chats ✓' : 'Allow all chats';
            btnAllowAllChats.classList.toggle('ac-success', allActive);
            btnAllowAllChats.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !allActive);
            btnAllowAllChats.title = 'Set Global ON and Scope mode to all. Existing blacklist entries still block their chats.';
        }

        if (btnPauseThisChat) {
            btnPauseThisChat.textContent = isInBlacklist() ? 'Paused this chat ✕' : 'Pause this chat';
            btnPauseThisChat.classList.toggle('ac-danger', isInBlacklist());
            btnPauseThisChat.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !isInBlacklist());
            btnPauseThisChat.title = 'Add the current conversation to blacklist without changing the browser-wide Global switch.';
        }

        if (btnHiddenPause) {
            btnHiddenPause.textContent = config.ignoreWhenHidden ? 'Background: paused' : 'Background: allowed ✓';
            btnHiddenPause.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.ignoreWhenHidden);
            btnHiddenPause.classList.toggle('ac-warn', !config.ignoreWhenHidden);
            btnHiddenPause.title = config.ignoreWhenHidden
                ? 'Hidden/background tabs are paused. This avoids multiple background pages firing unexpectedly.'
                : 'Hidden/background tabs may continue. Use carefully when many ChatGPT tabs are open.';
        }

        if (btnScrollAssist) {
            btnScrollAssist.textContent = config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue ? 'Bottom assist: on' : 'Bottom assist: off';
            btnScrollAssist.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue);
            btnScrollAssist.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.autoScrollToBottomBeforeContinue);
            btnScrollAssist.title = 'When a page is not scrolled to the bottom, scroll to the bottom before a safe continue/submit attempt.';
        }

        if (btnSteadyAudit) {
            btnSteadyAudit.textContent = config.steadyAuditWhenIdle ? 'Steady audit: on' : 'Steady audit: off';
            btnSteadyAudit.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle);
            btnSteadyAudit.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.steadyAuditWhenIdle);
            btnSteadyAudit.title = 'Periodically re-read page state even if ChatGPT/Chrome misses a mutation, focus, or scroll wake event.';
        }

        if (btnWakeHub) {
            btnWakeHub.textContent = config.crossTabWakeHub ? 'Wake hub: on' : 'Wake hub: off';
            btnWakeHub.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.crossTabWakeHub);
            btnWakeHub.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.crossTabWakeHub);
            btnWakeHub.title = 'Cross-tab wake fan-out via BroadcastChannel/localStorage. It can wake diagnostics/ticks across tabs, but it cannot bypass browser hidden-tab throttling.';
        }

        if (btnDebugLocal) {
            btnDebugLocal.textContent = isDebugEnabled() ? 'Debug: on · local' : 'Debug: off · local';
            btnDebugLocal.classList.toggle('ac-success', isDebugEnabled());
            btnDebugLocal.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !isDebugEnabled());
            btnDebugLocal.title = 'Verbose logs for this tab/chat only. Does not sync to other ChatGPT pages.';
        }

        try {
            renderPromptWidgets();
        } catch (error) {
            state.panelRenderFailureCount = (state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0) + 1;
            state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `prompt render failed · ${error?.message || error}`;
            console.error('[AutoContinue] prompt widgets render failed:', error);
            pushLog('Panel prompt widgets render failed; fallback labels applied');
        }
        try {
            renderHotkeyWidgets();
        } catch (error) {
            state.panelRenderFailureCount = (state.panelRenderFailureCount || 0) + 1;
            state.lastPanelGuardSummary = `hotkey render failed · ${error?.message || error}`;
            console.error('[AutoContinue] hotkey widgets render failed:', error);
        }
        annotatePanelActionOwnership('updatePanel');
        repairPanelButtonLabels('updatePanel');

        if (btnPresetDelete) {
            btnPresetDelete.disabled = !!getActivePromptPreset().builtin;
            btnPresetDelete.title = getActivePromptPreset().builtin ? 'Built-in presets are protected. Clone first.' : 'Delete active custom preset';
        }

        if (btnAdvanced) {
            btnAdvanced.textContent = getPanelAdvancedOpen() && !getPanelCollapsed() ? '⌃' : '⌘';
            btnAdvanced.setAttribute('aria-label', getPanelAdvancedOpen() ? '隐藏高级设置' : '显示高级设置');
        }

        if (btnAggressive) {
            btnAggressive.textContent = config.aggressiveAfterRefresh ? 'Refresh resume: on' : 'Refresh resume: off';
            btnAggressive.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.aggressiveAfterRefresh);
            btnAggressive.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.aggressiveAfterRefresh);
        }

        if (btnSpamLock) {
            btnSpamLock.textContent = config.enableSpamLock ? 'Spam lock: on' : 'Spam lock: off';
            btnSpamLock.classList.toggle('ac-warn', !!config.enableSpamLock);
            btnSpamLock.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.enableSpamLock);
        }

        if (btnKeepAlive) {
            btnKeepAlive.textContent = config.keepAliveWhenVisible ? 'Keep warm: on' : 'Keep warm: off';
            btnKeepAlive.classList.toggle('ac-primary', !!config.keepAliveWhenVisible);
            btnKeepAlive.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !config.keepAliveWhenVisible);
            btnKeepAlive.title = 'Visible-page watchdog pulse: periodically re-checks DOM/panel so automation is less dependent on manual clicks. It does not click the page.';
        }

        if (btnScope) {
            const allowed = isAllowedByScope();
            btnScope.textContent = `Scope mode: ${config.scopeMode}`;
            btnScope.classList.toggle('ac-success', allowed && config.scopeMode === 'whitelist');
            btnScope.classList.toggle('ac-primary', allowed && config.scopeMode !== 'whitelist');
            btnScope.classList.toggle('ac-warn', !allowed);
            btnScope.title = getScopeStatusText();
        }

        if (btnAddWhite) {
            const inWhite = isInWhitelist();
            btnAddWhite.textContent = inWhite ? 'Whitelisted ✓' : 'Whitelist this';
            const shouldSuggestWhite = !inWhite && config.scopeMode === 'whitelist' && !isAllowedByScope();
            btnAddWhite.classList.toggle('ac-success', inWhite);
            btnAddWhite.classList.toggle('ac-primary', shouldSuggestWhite);
            btnAddWhite.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !inWhite && !shouldSuggestWhite);
            btnAddWhite.title = inWhite ? 'Current conversation is in whitelist. Click to remove.' : (shouldSuggestWhite ? 'Scope is whitelist and this conversation is unlisted, so it is blocked. Click to allow this chat.' : 'Click to add this conversation to whitelist and remove it from blacklist.');
        }

        if (btnAddBlack) {
            const inBlack = isInBlacklist();
            btnAddBlack.textContent = inBlack ? 'Blacklisted ✕' : 'Blacklist this';
            btnAddBlack.classList.toggle('ac-danger', inBlack);
            btnAddBlack.classList.toggle('ac-ghost', !inBlack);
            btnAddBlack.title = inBlack ? 'Current conversation is in blacklist. Click to remove.' : 'Click to add this conversation to blacklist and remove it from whitelist.';
        }

        updateRounds();
        updateMetaInfo();
        setStatus(state.statusText);
        applyPanelPosition();
    }

    function initMenu() {
        if (typeof GM_registerMenuCommand !== 'function') return;

        GM_registerMenuCommand(`Auto Continue Global: ${isGlobalEnabled() ? 'on' : 'off'}`, () => {
            setGlobalEnabled(!isGlobalEnabled(), 'menu');
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand(`Auto Continue Snooze: ${isGlobalSnoozed() ? 'resume now' : '30 minutes'}`, () => {
            if (isGlobalSnoozed()) clearGlobalSnooze('menu');
            else setGlobalSnooze(30, 'menu');
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand(`Emergency stop: ${isEmergencyStopped() ? 'clear now' : 'stop 24h'}`, () => {
            if (isEmergencyStopped()) clearEmergencyStop('menu');
            else setEmergencyStop(1440, 'menu emergency stop', 'menu');
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Copy AI control summary', () => {
            copyAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('menu');
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Continue now', () => {
            forceContinueNow();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Unlock current conversation', () => {
            unlockConversation(true);
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Toggle prompt preset', () => {
            cyclePromptPreset();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Toggle advanced panel', () => {
            config.panelAdvancedOpen = !config.panelAdvancedOpen;
            saveConfig();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Toggle compact panel', () => {
            cyclePanelDensity();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Cycle theme mode', () => {
            cycleThemeMode();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Toggle hotkeys', () => {
            config.hotkeysEnabled = !config.hotkeysEnabled;
            saveConfig();
            pushLog(`Hotkeys -> ${config.hotkeysEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'}`);
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Save current prompt stack as preset', () => {
            savePromptStackAsPreset();
        });

        GM_registerMenuCommand('Export custom prompt presets', () => {
            exportPromptPresets();
        });
    }

    function markDirty(force = false) {
        const now = Date.now();
        if (!force && now - state.lastDirtyAt < 250) return;
        state.dirty = true;
        state.lastDirtyAt = now;
    }

    function setupObserver() {
        const root = getScopeRoot();
        if (!root) return;

        if (observer && observedRoot === root) return;

        if (observer) observer.disconnect();

        observedRoot = root;
        observer = new MutationObserver((mutations) => {
            for (const m of mutations) {
                const target = m.target instanceof Node ? m.target : null;
                if (!target) continue;

                const el = target.nodeType === 1 ? target : target.parentElement;
                if (el && el.closest && el.closest(`#${PANEL_ID}`)) {
                    continue;
                }

                markDirty(false);
                break;
            }
        });

        observer.observe(root, {
            childList: true,
            subtree: true,
            characterData: false,
            attributes: false
        });
    }

    function resetForPageChange(now) {
        state.lastUrl = location.href;
        state.lastUserCount = null;
        state.lastAssistantText = '';
        state.lastAssistantChangeAt = now;
        state.lastGenerationSeenAt = 0;
        state.lastAutoAt = 0;
        state.lastAutoAssistantLen = 0;
        state.autoRounds = 0;
        state.roundPendingProof = false;
        state.roundPendingSince = 0;
        state.roundPendingMode = '';
        state.awaitingGrowth = false;
        state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
        state.recentSelfSentPrompt = null;
        state.conversationLockedUntil = 0;
        state.lockHandledSignature = '';
        state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = false;
        releaseSendLease();
        clearRoundRuntime('page-change');
        pushLog('Page changed, state reset');
        updateRounds();
        updateMetaInfo();
    }


    function normalizeArtifactFilename(text) {
        return normalizeText(String(text || '')).replace(/^Download\s+/i, '').trim();
    }

    function getCurrentScriptMajorVersion() {
        const m = String(SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL || '').match(/v(\d+)/i);
        return m ? Number(m[1]) : 0;
    }

    function parseArtifactVersion(name) {
        const n = normalizeArtifactFilename(name);
        const m = n.match(/^chatgpt_auto_continue_v(\d+)(?:[._\-][\w().\-]*)?\.txt$/i);
        return m ? Number(m[1]) : 0;
    }

    function getArtifactKind(name) {
        const n = normalizeArtifactFilename(name);
        if (/^chatgpt_auto_continue_v\d+[\w().\-]*\.txt$/i.test(n)) return 'script-txt';
        if (/^chatgpt_auto_continue_history[_\w().\-]*\.zip$/i.test(n)) return 'history-zip';
        return 'other';
    }

    function isEligibleArtifactFilename(name) {
        const n = normalizeArtifactFilename(name);
        if (!n || n.length > 180) return false;
        if (config.artifactAutoDownloadSafeScriptOnly !== false) {
            return getArtifactKind(n) === 'script-txt';
        }
        return /^[\w .()\-\u4e00-\u9fff]+\.(txt|json|md|zip)$/i.test(n);
    }

    function getArtifactButtonDangerText(btn) {
        const text = normalizeText(btn?.innerText || btn?.textContent || '');
        const label = getAriaLabel(btn);
        const testid = normalizeText(btn?.getAttribute?.('data-testid') || '');
        const id = normalizeText(btn?.id || '');
        return `${text} ${label} ${testid} ${id}`;
    }

    function isDangerousArtifactButton(btn) {
        if (!btn || btn.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID}`)) return true;
        if (btn.closest?.('form, [data-composer-surface="true"], #prompt-textarea')) return true;
        const all = getArtifactButtonDangerText(btn);
        // These remain forbidden for auto-continue. Artifact auto-download is a narrow file-name exception only.
        if (/mic|microphone|dictate|dictation|voice|speech|record|camera|share|menu|more|overflow|settings|model|tool/i.test(all)) return true;
        if (/麦克风|听写|语音|录音|转写|分享|菜单|更多|工具|模型|权限|允许/.test(all)) return true;
        return false;
    }

    function getArtifactAssistantScope(btn) {
        if (!btn || btn.closest?.(`#${PANEL_ID}`)) return null;
        if (btn.closest?.('form, [data-composer-surface="true"], #prompt-textarea')) return null;

        const assistantScope = btn.closest?.('[data-message-author-role="assistant"], section[data-turn="assistant"], article[data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]');
        if (!assistantScope) return null;

        const explicitUserScope = btn.closest?.('[data-message-author-role="user"], section[data-turn="user"]');
        if (explicitUserScope && assistantScope.contains(explicitUserScope)) return null;

        const turn = btn.closest?.('section[data-testid^="conversation-turn-"], article[data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]') || assistantScope;
        const turnRole = normalizeText(turn?.getAttribute?.('data-turn') || turn?.getAttribute?.('data-message-author-role') || '');
        if (turnRole && turnRole !== 'assistant') return null;
        return assistantScope;
    }

    function getAssistantArtifactScopeIndex(scope) {
        const root = getScopeRoot() || document;
        const scopes = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('[data-message-author-role="assistant"], section[data-turn="assistant"], article[data-testid^="conversation-turn-"]'))
            .filter((node) => {
                const role = normalizeText(node?.getAttribute?.('data-turn') || node?.getAttribute?.('data-message-author-role') || 'assistant');
                return !role || role === 'assistant';
            });
        const idx = scopes.findIndex((node) => node === scope || node.contains(scope) || scope.contains?.(node));
        return idx >= 0 ? idx : -1;
    }

    function findSafeArtifactButtons() {
        const root = getScopeRoot() || document;
        const buttons = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('button')).filter((btn) => isVisible(btn) && !isDisabled(btn));
        const out = [];
        for (const btn of buttons) {
            const name = normalizeArtifactFilename(btn.innerText || btn.textContent || btn.getAttribute?.('aria-label') || '');
            if (!isEligibleArtifactFilename(name)) continue;
            if (isDangerousArtifactButton(btn)) continue;

            const assistantScope = getArtifactAssistantScope(btn);
            if (config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false && !assistantScope) continue;
            if (!assistantScope && config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly === false) {
                // Relaxed mode is manual/diagnostic escape hatch only. Keep auto default strict.
            }

            out.push({
                btn,
                name,
                version: parseArtifactVersion(name),
                kind: getArtifactKind(name),
                rectTop: btn.getBoundingClientRect().top,
                assistantIndex: assistantScope ? getAssistantArtifactScopeIndex(assistantScope) : -1,
                hasAssistantOrigin: !!assistantScope,
                domIndex: out.length
            });
        }

        if (config.artifactAutoDownloadNewestAssistantTurnOnly !== false) {
            const assistantItems = out.filter((item) => item.hasAssistantOrigin && item.assistantIndex >= 0);
            if (assistantItems.length) {
                const newestIndex = Math.max(...assistantItems.map((item) => item.assistantIndex));
                return out.filter((item) => item.assistantIndex === newestIndex);
            }
        }
        return out;
    }

    function sortArtifactCandidates(list) {
        return (list || []).slice().sort((a, b) => {
            const av = Number(a?.version) || 0;
            const bv = Number(b?.version) || 0;
            if (av !== bv) return av - bv;
            const ai = Number(a?.assistantIndex) || -1;
            const bi = Number(b?.assistantIndex) || -1;
            if (ai !== bi) return ai - bi;
            return (Number(a?.domIndex) || 0) - (Number(b?.domIndex) || 0);
        });
    }

    function findNewestSafeArtifactButton(options = {}) {
