        const allowOlderVersion = !!options.allowOlderVersion;
        let list = findSafeArtifactButtons();
        if (!allowOlderVersion && config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion !== false) {
            const current = getCurrentScriptMajorVersion();
            const filtered = list.filter((item) => item.kind !== 'script-txt' || (Number(item.version) || 0) > current);
            if (filtered.length) list = filtered;
            else {
                state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `no newer artifact · current ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}`;
                return null;
            }
        }
        const sorted = sortArtifactCandidates(list);
        return sorted.length ? sorted[sorted.length - 1] : null;
    }

    function readArtifactDownloadHistory() {
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(ARTIFACT_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_KEY);
            const parsed = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
            return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.slice(-80) : [];
        } catch {
            return [];
        }
    }

    function writeArtifactDownloadHistory(history) {
        try { localStorage.setItem(ARTIFACT_DOWNLOAD_HISTORY_KEY, JSON.stringify((history || []).slice(-80))); } catch {}
    }

    function clearArtifactDownloadHistoryForCurrentConversation() {
        const cid = getConversationId() || '';
        if (!confirm('Clear artifact download history for this conversation so safe script artifacts can be retried?\n\nThis does not change prompt library, settings, or saved prompts.')) return;
        const before = readArtifactDownloadHistory();
        const next = before.filter((item) => (item?.conversation || '') !== cid);
        writeArtifactDownloadHistory(next);
        state.artifactDownloadSessionCount = 0;
        state.lastArtifactDownloadAt = 0;
        state.lastArtifactScanAt = 0;
        state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `history cleared · ${before.length - next.length} item(s)`;
        pushLog(`Artifact history cleared for current conversation: ${before.length - next.length}`);
        publishWakeHub('artifact-history-cleared');
        safeUpdatePanel('artifact-history-cleared');
    }

    function shouldDelayArtifactAutoDownload(now) {
        if (config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable === false) return false;
        const stableMs = clampNumber(config.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs, 0, 10000);
        if (!stableMs) return false;
        if (!state.lastGenerationSeenAt) return false;
        const idleFor = now - state.lastGenerationSeenAt;
        if (idleFor >= 0 && idleFor < stableMs) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `waiting stable idle · ${formatRemainMs(stableMs - idleFor)}`;
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    function getArtifactDownloadKey(name) {
        const sig = makeBoundedSignature(`${location.origin}${location.pathname}|${normalizeArtifactFilename(name)}`, 260);
        return sig.hash;
    }

    function hasArtifactBeenDownloaded(name) {
        const key = getArtifactDownloadKey(name);
        return readArtifactDownloadHistory().some((item) => item && item.key === key);
    }

    function rememberArtifactDownloaded(name, reason) {
        const key = getArtifactDownloadKey(name);
        const history = readArtifactDownloadHistory().filter((item) => item && item.key !== key);
        history.push({ key, name: normalizeArtifactFilename(name).slice(0, 180), at: Date.now(), reason: reason || 'auto', conversation: getConversationId() || '', build: SCRIPT_BUILD });
        writeArtifactDownloadHistory(history);
        state.lastArtifactDownloadAt = Date.now();
        state.artifactDownloadSessionCount += 1;
        state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `${reason || 'auto'} · ${normalizeArtifactFilename(name).slice(0, 72)} · ${nowTime()}`;
    }

    function attemptArtifactDownload(reason = 'tick', options = {}) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const manual = !!options.manual;
        if (!manual && !config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled) return false;
        if (!manual && isGlobalSnoozed()) return false;
        if (!manual && !isGlobalEnabled()) return false;
        if (!manual && config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== false && !isAllowedByScope()) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `scope blocked · ${getScopeStatusText()}`;
            return false;
        }
        if (!manual && now - (state.lastArtifactScanAt || 0) < 1800) return false;
        state.lastArtifactScanAt = now;
        if (!manual && state.artifactDownloadSessionCount >= (config.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession)) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = 'session limit reached';
            return false;
        }
        if (!manual && now - (state.lastArtifactDownloadAt || 0) < (config.artifactAutoDownloadCooldownMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadCooldownMs)) return false;
        if (!manual && shouldDelayArtifactAutoDownload(now)) return false;

        const candidate = findNewestSafeArtifactButton({ allowOlderVersion: manual && !!options.allowOlderVersion });
        if (!candidate) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary || 'no eligible artifact found';
            return false;
        }
        if (!options.ignoreHistory && hasArtifactBeenDownloaded(candidate.name)) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `already downloaded · ${candidate.name.slice(0, 72)}`;
            return false;
        }
        try {
            if (config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false && !getArtifactAssistantScope(candidate.btn)) {
                state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `blocked: assistant origin lost · ${candidate.name.slice(0, 72)}`;
                return false;
            }
            rememberArtifactDownloaded(candidate.name, reason);
            candidate.btn.click();
            pushLog(`Artifact download clicked: ${candidate.name}`);
            publishWakeHub('artifact-download-clicked');
            return true;
        } catch (error) {
            state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary = `click failed · ${String(error).slice(0, 80)}`;
            return false;
        }
    }

    function getArtifactDownloadDiagnosticsText() {
        const candidate = (() => { try { return findNewestSafeArtifactButton(); } catch { return null; } })();
        const manualCandidate = (() => { try { return findNewestSafeArtifactButton({ allowOlderVersion: true }); } catch { return null; } })();
        return `${config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled ? 'on' : 'off'} · safeScriptOnly=${config.artifactAutoDownloadSafeScriptOnly !== false ? 'yes' : 'no'} · scope=${config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== false ? 'respect' : 'ignored'} · origin=${config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false ? 'assistant-only' : 'relaxed'} · newestAssistant=${config.artifactAutoDownloadNewestAssistantTurnOnly !== false ? 'yes' : 'no'} · versionGuard=${config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion !== false ? 'newer-only' : 'any'} · idleGuard=${config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable !== false ? `${config.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs}ms` : 'off'} · autoCandidate=${candidate ? candidate.name : 'none'} · manualCandidate=${manualCandidate ? manualCandidate.name : 'none'} · session=${state.artifactDownloadSessionCount}/${config.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession} · last=${state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary || 'none'}`;
    }

    function copyArtifactStatus() {
        const payload = {
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            url: location.href,
            conversation: getConversationId() || null,
            enabled: !!config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled,
            safeScriptOnly: config.artifactAutoDownloadSafeScriptOnly !== false,
            assistantOriginOnly: config.artifactAutoDownloadAssistantOnly !== false,
            respectCurrentChatScope: config.artifactAutoDownloadRespectScope !== false,
            currentChatAllowedByScope: isAllowedByScope(),
            newestAssistantTurnOnly: config.artifactAutoDownloadNewestAssistantTurnOnly !== false,
            idleStableGuard: config.artifactAutoDownloadRequireIdleStable !== false,
            idleStableMs: config.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadIdleStableMs,
            versionGuard: config.artifactAutoDownloadOnlyNewerVersion !== false ? 'newer-only' : 'any-safe-version',
            currentScriptVersion: getCurrentScriptMajorVersion(),
            autoCandidate: (() => { const c = findNewestSafeArtifactButton(); return c ? { name: c.name, version: c.version, kind: c.kind, hasAssistantOrigin: !!c.hasAssistantOrigin, assistantIndex: c.assistantIndex, alreadyDownloaded: hasArtifactBeenDownloaded(c.name) } : null; })(),
            manualCandidate: (() => { const c = findNewestSafeArtifactButton({ allowOlderVersion: true }); return c ? { name: c.name, version: c.version, kind: c.kind, hasAssistantOrigin: !!c.hasAssistantOrigin, assistantIndex: c.assistantIndex, alreadyDownloaded: hasArtifactBeenDownloaded(c.name) } : null; })(),
            sessionCount: state.artifactDownloadSessionCount,
            maxPerSession: config.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadMaxPerSession,
            cooldownMs: config.artifactAutoDownloadCooldownMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.artifactAutoDownloadCooldownMs,
            last: state.lastArtifactDownloadSummary || 'none',
            recentHistory: readArtifactDownloadHistory().slice(-8).map((item) => ({ name: item.name, at: item.at, reason: item.reason, build: item.build }))
        };
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try { navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json); pushLog('Artifact status copied'); setStatus('Artifact status copied'); return; } catch {}
        prompt('Copy artifact status JSON:', json);
    }

    function tick() {
        ensurePanelAlive('tick');
        setupObserver();
        if (!state.roundRuntimeRestoreTriedForUrl || state.roundRuntimeRestoreTriedForUrl !== location.href) {
            state.roundRuntimeRestoreTriedForUrl = location.href;
            restoreRoundRuntime('tick-start');
        }

        if (isEmergencyStopped()) {
            setStatus(`Emergency stopped: ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.emergencyStopUntil) - Date.now())}`);
            return;
        }

        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) {
            setStatus(`Snoozed: ${formatRemainMs(Number(config.globalSnoozeUntil) - Date.now())}`);
            return;
        }

        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) {
            setStatus('Global disabled');
            return;
        }

        if (config.ignoreWhenHidden && document.visibilityState === 'hidden') {
            setStatus('Paused: hidden tab · Active tab only');
            return;
        }

        const now = Date.now();

        if (location.href !== state.lastUrl) {
            resetForPageChange(now);
            markDirty(true);
        }

        const hasDueSendRetry = !!(state.pendingSendRetry && now >= state.pendingSendRetry.nextAt);
        const needsRefreshResumeCheck = !!(config.aggressiveAfterRefresh && !state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl && isConversationPage());
        const needsCooldownOrGrowthCheck = !!(state.awaitingGrowth || state.lastGenerationSeenAt > 0);

        const needsSteadyAudit = shouldRunSteadyAudit(now);
        if (!state.dirty && !isConversationLocked(now) && !hasDueSendRetry && !needsRefreshResumeCheck && !needsCooldownOrGrowthCheck && !needsSteadyAudit) {
            return;
        }
        if (needsSteadyAudit && !state.dirty) {
            markSteadyAudit(document.visibilityState === 'hidden' ? 'hidden-idle-audit' : 'visible-idle-audit');
        }

        state.dirty = false;

        const snap = readPageState();
        if (!state.lastResumeCheckAt) state.lastResumeCheckAt = now;
        updateMetaInfo();

        // v146: guarded artifact auto-download is intentionally separate from composer send clicking.
        // It only touches allowed assistant artifact file buttons and never broadens submit selectors.
        if (!snap.isGenerating) attemptArtifactDownload('tick');

        // v122: if a background/heartbeat-driven submit already produced generation
        // or a matching user turn, confirm proof before retry/timeout/userCount reset logic.
        confirmPendingAutoPromptIfSubmitted(snap, now, snap.isGenerating ? 'generation-started' : 'user-turn-detected');

        if (state.pendingSendRetry && now >= state.pendingSendRetry.nextAt) {
            const retry = state.pendingSendRetry;
            state.pendingSendRetry = null;

            const isStillPendingAutoPrompt = !!state.pendingAutoPrompt;
            const pendingAge = isStillPendingAutoPrompt ? now - state.pendingAutoPrompt.sentAt : 0;
            const shouldRetrySend =
                isStillPendingAutoPrompt &&
                snap.userCount <= ((state.pendingAutoPrompt?.baseUserCount ?? snap.userCount)) &&
                retry.attempt <= config.sendRetryMaxAttempts &&
                pendingAge <= config.submitAfterFillMaxMs;

            if (shouldRetrySend) {
                const retried = trySubmitComposer(snap.composer, snap.root, `retry-${retry.attempt}`);
                if (retried) {
                    pushLog(`Send retry #${retry.attempt} executed`);
                }
                if (retry.attempt < config.sendRetryMaxAttempts && snap.userCount <= ((state.pendingAutoPrompt?.baseUserCount ?? snap.userCount))) {
                    scheduleSendRetry(retry.attempt + 1, config.sendRetryDelayMs);
                }
                markDirty(true);
            } else if (isStillPendingAutoPrompt && snap.userCount <= ((state.pendingAutoPrompt?.baseUserCount ?? snap.userCount))) {
                pushLog(`Send blocked: no safe composer submit/form handler became ready · ${getSubmitReadinessText(snap)}`);
                rollbackPendingRound('submit button/form never became ready');
                state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
                state.awaitingGrowth = false;
                releaseSendLease();
                markDirty(true);
            }
        }

        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt && now - state.pendingAutoPrompt.sentAt > config.submitProofTimeoutMs && snap.userCount <= state.pendingAutoPrompt.baseUserCount) {
            pushLog('Send proof timeout: auto prompt was not submitted; lease released');
            rollbackPendingRound('submit proof timeout');
            state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
            state.pendingSendRetry = null;
            state.awaitingGrowth = false;
            releaseSendLease();
            markDirty(true);
        }

        if (state.lastUserCount === null) {
            state.lastUserCount = snap.userCount;
            persistRoundRuntime('baseline-init');
            if (isDebugEnabled()) pushLog(`Round baseline initialized: users=${snap.userCount}`);
        } else if (snap.userCount !== state.lastUserCount) {
            const previousUserCount = state.lastUserCount;
            const selfSent = confirmPendingAutoPromptIfSubmitted(snap, now, 'user-count-change') || isSelfSentTurn(snap, now) || matchesRecentSelfSentPrompt(snap, now);
            state.lastUserCount = snap.userCount;

            if (!selfSent) {
                state.autoRounds = 0;
                state.roundPendingProof = false;
                state.roundPendingSince = 0;
                state.roundPendingMode = '';
                state.awaitingGrowth = false;
                state.lockHandledSignature = '';
                state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = false;
                clearRoundRuntime('real-user-reset');
                updateRounds();
                state.pendingSendRetry = null;
                releaseSendLease();
                pushLog(`Real user message detected, rounds reset (${previousUserCount} -> ${snap.userCount})`);
            } else {
                rememberSelfSentPrompt(state.pendingAutoPrompt?.text || state.recentSelfSentPrompt?.preview || config.continueText, snap, 'self-sent user message appeared');
                if (state.pendingAutoPrompt && matchesRecentSelfSentPrompt(snap, now)) state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
                clearRoundPendingProof('self-sent user message appeared');
                state.pendingSendRetry = null;
                releaseSendLease();
                persistRoundRuntime('self-sent-detected');
                pushLog('Self-sent follow-up prompt detected, not treated as human input');
            }
        }

        if (snap.lastAssistantText !== state.lastAssistantText) {
            state.lastAssistantText = snap.lastAssistantText;
            state.lastAssistantChangeAt = now;

            if (state.awaitingGrowth && snap.lastAssistantText.length > state.lastAutoAssistantLen + 20) {
                state.awaitingGrowth = false;
                if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) {
                    rememberSelfSentPrompt(state.pendingAutoPrompt.text, snap, 'assistant-growth-success');
                    state.pendingAutoPrompt = null;
                }
                clearRoundPendingProof('assistant-growth-success');
                state.pendingSendRetry = null;
                releaseSendLease();
                persistRoundRuntime('assistant-growth-success');
                pushLog('Assistant output growth detected, round succeeded');
            }
        }

        if (!isAllowedByScope()) {
            setStatus(`Blocked: ${getScopeBlockReason()}`);
            return;
        }

        if (isConversationLocked(now)) {
            setStatus('Conversation locked');
            return;
        }

        if (config.enableSpamLock) {
            const sig = getRecentContinueSignature(snap.last3UserTexts);
            if (sig && sig !== state.lockHandledSignature) {
                lockConversation(now, 'Repeated continue-like prompts detected, conversation locked', sig);
                setStatus('Spam-like repetition detected, locked');
                return;
            }
        }

        if (state.autoRounds >= config.maxAutoRounds) {
            setStatus('Round limit reached');
            return;
        }

        if (snap.isGenerating) {
            state.lastGenerationSeenAt = now;
            setStatus('Generating');
            return;
        }

        if (snap.composerText && snap.composerText !== normalizeText(config.continueText)) {
            setStatus('Input box has real draft, not overwriting');
            return;
        }

        if (snap.continueBtn && now - state.lastAutoAt >= 1000 && prepareViewportForTrigger('continue button') && acquireSendLease('auto-click-continue')) {
            if (clickIfPossible(snap.continueBtn, 'continue')) {
                markAutoAction(now, 'click-continue');
                setStatus('Continue button clicked');
                return;
            }
            releaseSendLease();
        }

        const normalFallbackContentReady =
            snap.lastAssistantText.length >= config.minAssistantChars ||
            (config.normalFallbackAllowAssistantPresenceGate !== false && snap.assistantPresenceGate && state.lastGenerationSeenAt > 0);

        const canFallback =
            normalFallbackContentReady &&
            now - Math.max(state.lastAssistantChangeAt || 0, state.lastGenerationSeenAt || 0) >= config.idleAfterFinishMs &&
            now - state.lastAutoAt >= config.cooldownMs &&
            state.lastGenerationSeenAt > 0 &&
            now - state.lastGenerationSeenAt <= 10 * 60 * 1000 &&
            !state.awaitingGrowth;

        if (canFallback) {
            if (!prepareViewportForTrigger('normal fallback')) return;
            if (sendContinuePrompt(readPageState(), 'normal-fallback')) {
                markAutoAction(now, 'send-continue');
                setStatus('Follow-up prompt sent');
                return;
            }
        }

        if (config.aggressiveAfterRefresh && !state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl && isConversationPage() && snap.hasExistingConversationContent && !snap.isGenerating && !snap.continueBtn && !state.awaitingGrowth) {
            const refreshWaitMs = Math.max(0, config.refreshResumeDelayMs - (now - Math.max(state.lastAssistantChangeAt || 0, state.lastResumeCheckAt || 0)));
            if (refreshWaitMs > 0) setStatus(`Refresh resume armed · ${formatRemainMs(refreshWaitMs)}`);
        }

        const canAggressiveResume =
            config.aggressiveAfterRefresh &&
            !state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl &&
            isConversationPage() &&
            snap.hasExistingConversationContent &&
            !snap.isGenerating &&
            !snap.continueBtn &&
            !state.awaitingGrowth &&
            now - Math.max(state.lastAssistantChangeAt || 0, state.lastResumeCheckAt || 0) >= config.refreshResumeDelayMs &&
            now - state.lastAutoAt >= Math.min(config.cooldownMs, config.refreshResumeDelayMs + 500);

        if (canAggressiveResume) {
            if (!prepareViewportForTrigger('refresh resume')) return;
            state.aggressiveResumeTriedForUrl = true;
            if (sendContinuePrompt(readPageState(), 'refresh-resume')) {
                markAutoAction(now, 'aggressive-resume');
                setStatus('Aggressive resume sent once after refresh');
                return;
            }
        }

        setStatus('Ready');
    }

    function getSteadyAuditIntervalMs() {
        return document.visibilityState === 'hidden'
            ? (config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.hiddenSteadyAuditMs)
            : (config.steadyAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.steadyAuditMs);
    }

    function shouldRunSteadyAudit(now) {
        if (!config.steadyAuditWhenIdle) return false;
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return false;
        if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && config.ignoreWhenHidden) return false;
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt || state.pendingSendRetry || state.awaitingGrowth) return true;
        const interval = getSteadyAuditIntervalMs();
        return now - (state.lastSteadyAuditAt || 0) >= interval;
    }

    function markSteadyAudit(reason = 'idle') {
        state.lastSteadyAuditAt = Date.now();
        state.lastSteadyAuditReason = `${reason} @ ${nowTime()}`;
    }

    function installActivityWakeGuards() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acActivityWakeGuards === '1') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acActivityWakeGuards = '1';
        const wake = (reason) => {
            if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return;
            if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && config.ignoreWhenHidden) return;
            const now = Date.now();
            if (reason === 'scroll' && now - (state.lastScrollWakeAt || 0) < (config.scrollWakeThrottleMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.scrollWakeThrottleMs)) return;
            if (reason === 'scroll') state.lastScrollWakeAt = now;
            markDirty(true);
            publishWakeHub(`activity:${reason}`);
            setTimeout(safeTick, reason === 'scroll' ? 90 : 0);
        };
        document.addEventListener('scroll', () => wake('scroll'), true);
        document.addEventListener('selectionchange', () => wake('selectionchange'), true);
        window.addEventListener('pointerup', () => wake('pointerup'), true);
        window.addEventListener('keyup', () => wake('keyup'), true);
    }


    function isSchedulerStale(now = Date.now()) {
        if (!state.lastTickAt) return false;
        const limit = document.visibilityState === 'hidden'
            ? Math.max(config.schedulerStaleMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.schedulerStaleMs, config.hiddenSteadyAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.hiddenSteadyAuditMs)
            : (config.schedulerStaleMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.schedulerStaleMs);
        return now - state.lastTickAt > limit;
    }

    function publishWakeHub(reason = 'wake') {
        if (!config.crossTabWakeHub) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - (state.lastWakeHubTxAt || 0) < (config.crossTabWakeMinIntervalMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.crossTabWakeMinIntervalMs)) return;
        state.lastWakeHubTxAt = now;
        state.lastWakeHubTx = `${reason} @ ${nowTime()}`;
        recordSyncBoundaryEvent('wake-tx', reason, { transport: 'broadcast+storage' });
        const payload = { version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, type: 'wake', reason, owner: TAB_ID, url: location.href, conversationId: getConversationId(), ts: now };
        try { wakeBroadcastChannel?.postMessage(payload); } catch {}
        try { localStorage.setItem(WAKE_STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(payload)); } catch {}
    }

    function handleWakeHubMessage(raw, transport = 'broadcast') {
        if (!config.crossTabWakeHub || !raw) return;
        let msg = raw;
        try { if (typeof raw === 'string') msg = JSON.parse(raw); } catch { return; }
        if (!msg || msg.type !== 'wake' || msg.owner === TAB_ID) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        if (now - (state.lastWakeHubRxAt || 0) < 350) return;
        state.lastWakeHubRxAt = now;
        state.lastWakeHubRx = `${msg.reason || 'wake'} via ${transport} @ ${nowTime()}`;
        recordSyncBoundaryEvent('wake-rx', msg.reason || 'wake', { transport, owner: String(msg.owner || '').slice(-8) });
        // Cross-tab wake is a nudge, not authorization. Each tab still re-checks Global, Scope,
        // hidden-tab policy, draft safety, leases, and safe submitter gates before doing anything.
        markDirty(true);
        ensurePanelAlive(`wake hub ${transport}`);
        // v121: run one immediate tick as well as a delayed tick. Hidden tabs may delay timers;
        // doing the synchronous check here makes storage/BroadcastChannel wakeups more useful.
        safeTick();
        setTimeout(safeTick, document.visibilityState === 'hidden' ? 250 : 0);
    }

    let wakeBroadcastChannel = null;
    function installWakeHub() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acWakeHub === '1') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acWakeHub = '1';
        try {
            if ('BroadcastChannel' in window) {
                wakeBroadcastChannel = new BroadcastChannel(WAKE_BROADCAST_CHANNEL);
                wakeBroadcastChannel.addEventListener('message', (event) => handleWakeHubMessage(event.data, 'broadcast'));
            }
        } catch (error) {
            wakeBroadcastChannel = null;
            pushLog('Wake hub BroadcastChannel unavailable; storage fallback only');
        }
        publishWakeHub('startup');
    }

    function schedulerHealthPulse() {
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return;
        const now = Date.now();
        const observerStale = now - (state.lastObserverHealthAt || 0) >= (config.observerHealthAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.observerHealthAuditMs);
        if (observerStale) {
            state.lastObserverHealthAt = now;
            state.lastObserverHealthCheck = `${nowTime()} · ${observedRoot && observer ? 'observer ok' : 'observer reconnect'}`;
            if (!observer || !observedRoot || !document.contains(observedRoot)) setupObserver();
        }
        if (isSchedulerStale(now)) {
            pushLog('Scheduler health: stale tick detected; forcing wake tick');
            markDirty(true);
            publishWakeHub('scheduler-stale');
            safeTick();
        } else if (config.steadyAuditWhenIdle && shouldRunSteadyAudit(now)) {
            markSteadyAudit('scheduler-health');
            markDirty(true);
            safeTick();
        }
        try { sessionStorage.setItem(SCHEDULER_HEALTH_KEY, JSON.stringify({ ts: now, visibility: document.visibilityState, focused: document.hasFocus?.() || false })); } catch {}
    }


    let backgroundHeartbeatWorker = null;
    function installBackgroundHeartbeat() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acBackgroundHeartbeat === '1') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acBackgroundHeartbeat = '1';

        const pulse = (reason = 'background-heartbeat') => {
            if (!config.backgroundHeartbeatWorker) return;
            if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return;
            if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && (config.ignoreWhenHidden || !config.hiddenTickWhenAllowed)) return;
            state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat = `${reason} @ ${nowTime()} · ${document.visibilityState} · ${document.hasFocus?.() ? 'focused' : 'not focused'}`;
            markDirty(true);
            safeTick();
        };

        try {
            const interval = Math.max(1200, Math.min(30000, config.backgroundHeartbeatMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs));
            const workerCode = `let n=0; setInterval(() => { postMessage({type:'heartbeat', n: ++n, ts: Date.now()}); }, ${interval});`;
            const blob = new Blob([workerCode], { type: 'text/javascript' });
            const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
            backgroundHeartbeatWorker = new Worker(url);
            URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
            backgroundHeartbeatWorker.onmessage = () => pulse('worker');
            backgroundHeartbeatWorker.onerror = () => {
                state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat = `worker-error @ ${nowTime()}`;
                try { backgroundHeartbeatWorker?.terminate?.(); } catch {}
                backgroundHeartbeatWorker = null;
            };
            state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat = `worker-installed @ ${nowTime()}`;
        } catch (error) {
            backgroundHeartbeatWorker = null;
            state.lastBackgroundHeartbeat = `worker-unavailable @ ${nowTime()}`;
            pushLog('Background heartbeat worker unavailable; using page timer fallback');
        }

        // Fallback page timer. It may be throttled when hidden, but it is still useful for
        // visible-but-unfocused tabs and for browsers/userscript managers that block Blob workers.
        managedSetInterval(() => pulse(backgroundHeartbeatWorker ? 'page-fallback' : 'page-timer'), Math.max(1200, Math.min(30000, config.backgroundHeartbeatMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.backgroundHeartbeatMs)));
    }

    function installForegroundWakeFanout() {
        if (document.documentElement.dataset.acForegroundWakeFanout === '1') return;
        document.documentElement.dataset.acForegroundWakeFanout = '1';
        managedSetInterval(() => {
            if (!config.foregroundWakeFanout || !config.crossTabWakeHub) return;
            if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return;
            // A visible tab can act as a gentle driver for hidden tabs. This does not authorize
            // action in other tabs; each tab still checks Global/Scope/draft/lease/safe submit.
            if (document.visibilityState !== 'visible') return;
            state.lastForegroundFanout = `tx @ ${nowTime()}`;
            publishWakeHub('foreground-fanout');
        }, Math.max(1500, Math.min(30000, config.foregroundWakeFanoutMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.foregroundWakeFanoutMs)));
    }


    function cleanupRuntimeResources(reason = 'cleanup') {
        try { if (observer) observer.disconnect(); } catch {}
        observer = null;
        observedRoot = null;
        try { wakeBroadcastChannel?.close?.(); } catch {}
        wakeBroadcastChannel = null;
        try { backgroundHeartbeatWorker?.terminate?.(); } catch {}
        backgroundHeartbeatWorker = null;
        try { if (controlEventListener) window.removeEventListener(CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, controlEventListener, false); } catch {}
        try { if (controlStorageListener) window.removeEventListener('storage', controlStorageListener, false); } catch {}
        controlEventListener = null;
        controlStorageListener = null;
        while (managedTimerIds.length) {
            const id = managedTimerIds.pop();
            try { clearInterval(id); } catch {}
            try { clearTimeout(id); } catch {}
        }
        state.lastRuntimeCleanup = `${reason} @ ${nowTime()}`;
    }
    try { window[RUNTIME_GLOBAL_KEY].cleanup = cleanupRuntimeResources; } catch {}
    window.addEventListener('pagehide', () => cleanupRuntimeResources('pagehide-cleanup'), { once: true });
    window.addEventListener('beforeunload', () => cleanupRuntimeResources('beforeunload-cleanup'), { once: true });

    window.addEventListener('storage', (event) => {
        if (!event.key) return;
        if (event.key === STORAGE_KEY) {
            recordSyncBoundaryEvent('storage-config', 'shared-config-changed', { key: STORAGE_KEY });
            mergeConfigFromStorage('storage-config');
            publishWakeHub('config-sync');
            safeTick();
            return;
        }
        if (event.key === WAKE_STORAGE_KEY) {
            handleWakeHubMessage(event.newValue, 'storage');
            return;
        }
        if (event.key.startsWith(SEND_LEASE_KEY_PREFIX)) {
            markDirty(true);
            safeUpdatePanel('storage-lease');
        }
    });

    window.matchMedia?.('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')?.addEventListener?.('change', () => {
        if (getPanelThemeMode() === 'system') updatePanel();
    });

    function safeTick() {
        const now = Date.now();
        if (config.memoryPressureGuard) {
            if (state.tickInProgress) {
                state.skippedBusyTicks = (state.skippedBusyTicks || 0) + 1;
                return;
            }
            const minInterval = clampNumber(config.safeTickMinIntervalMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.safeTickMinIntervalMs || SAFE_TICK_MIN_INTERVAL_MS, 0, 3000);
            if (minInterval > 0 && state.lastTickAt && now - state.lastTickAt < minInterval) {
                state.skippedThrottleTicks = (state.skippedThrottleTicks || 0) + 1;
                if (!state.safeTickQueued) {
                    state.safeTickQueued = true;
                    const delay = Math.min(config.safeTickQueueMaxDelayMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.safeTickQueueMaxDelayMs || SAFE_TICK_QUEUE_MAX_DELAY_MS, Math.max(40, minInterval - (now - state.lastTickAt)));
                    managedSetTimeout(() => { state.safeTickQueued = false; safeTick(); }, delay);
                }
                return;
            }
        }
        state.tickInProgress = true;
        try {
            state.lastTickAt = Date.now();
            tick();
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('[AutoContinue] tick failed:', error);
            try {
                ensurePanelAlive('error recovery');
                setStatus('Recovered from UI error');
                state.dirty = true;
            } catch (nestedError) {
                console.error('[AutoContinue] recovery failed:', nestedError);
            }
        } finally {
            state.tickInProgress = false;
        }
    }

    function keepAlivePulse() {
        if (!config.keepAliveWhenVisible) return;
        if (!isGlobalEnabled()) return;
        if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && (config.ignoreWhenHidden || !config.hiddenTickWhenAllowed)) return;
        ensurePanelAlive('keep-warm');
        setupObserver();
        markDirty(true);
        safeTick();
    }


    function getSafeButtonStateForSummary(snap) {
        const sendBtn = snap?.sendBtn || null;
        return {
            composerPresent: !!snap?.composer,
            composerDraftPresent: !!snap?.composerText,
            generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
            continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
            sendButtonCandidate: !!sendBtn,
            safeSendButton: !!(sendBtn && isSafeComposerSubmitButton(sendBtn)),
            stopAsSend: !!(sendBtn && isStopButtonLike(sendBtn)),
            submitReadiness: snap ? getSubmitReadinessText(snap).slice(0, 260) : 'unreadable'
        };
    }

    function buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(reason = 'manual') {
        let snap = null;
        let readError = '';
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { readError = String(error?.message || error).slice(0, 220); }
        const button = getSafeButtonStateForSummary(snap);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];

        if (isEmergencyStopped()) blockers.push('emergency_stop');
        if (isGlobalSnoozed()) blockers.push('global_snooze');
        if (config.globalEnabled === false || config.enabled === false) blockers.push('global_off');
        if (!isAllowedByScope()) blockers.push(`scope:${getScopeBlockReason()}`);
        if (config.ignoreWhenHidden && document.visibilityState === 'hidden') blockers.push('hidden_paused');
        if (state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now()) blockers.push('conversation_locked');
        if (button.composerDraftPresent) blockers.push('real_draft_present');
        if (button.stopAsSend) blockers.push('stop_button_visible');
        if (readError) warnings.push(`read_state_error:${readError}`);
        if (!button.safeSendButton && !button.continueButton && !button.generating) warnings.push('no_safe_submit_visible_now');
        if (state.pendingAutoPrompt) warnings.push('pending_auto_prompt');
        if (state.pendingSendRetry) warnings.push('pending_send_retry');
        if (state.roundPendingProof) warnings.push('round_pending_proof');
        if (readSendLease()) warnings.push('send_lease_present');

        const decision =
            blockers.length ? 'blocked' :
            warnings.includes('no_safe_submit_visible_now') ? 'watch' :
            button.generating ? 'generating' :
            'ready';

        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.ai_summary.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            reason,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            page: {
                url: location.href,
                conversationId: getConversationId() || '',
                tabId: TAB_ID,
                title: document.title || '',
                visibility: document.visibilityState,
                focused: document.hasFocus?.() || false
            },
            decision,
            supervisor: (() => { const s = classifySupervisorState(`ai-summary:${reason}`); return { stateCode: s.stateCode, severity: s.severity, recommendedAction: s.recommendedAction, recommendedCommand: s.recommendedCommand, canAutoContinue: s.canAutoContinue, canDownloadArtifacts: s.canDownloadArtifacts, blockers: s.blockers, warnings: s.warnings }; })(),
            statusText: state.statusText,
            control: {
                apiEnabled: config.externalControlApiEnabled !== false,
                apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
                contractSchema: AUTOMATION_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
                storageBridgeEnabled: config.externalControlStorageBridgeEnabled !== false,
                storageMutationsRequireTarget: config.externalControlRequireTargetForStorageMutations !== false,
                globalEnabled: config.globalEnabled !== false && config.enabled !== false,
                effectiveEnabled: isGlobalEnabled(),
                emergencyStopped: isEmergencyStopped(),
                emergencyStop: getEmergencyStopSummary(),
                globalSnooze: getGlobalSnoozeSummary(),
                scopeMode: config.scopeMode,
                allowedByScope: isAllowedByScope(),
                scopeReason: getScopeBlockReason(),
                backgroundAllowed: config.ignoreWhenHidden === false,
                artifactAutoDownloadEnabled: !!config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled
            },
            runtime: {
                rounds: state.autoRounds,
                maxRounds: config.maxAutoRounds,
                locked: state.conversationLockedUntil > Date.now(),
                awaitingGrowth: !!state.awaitingGrowth,
                pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
                pendingSendRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
                roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
                lease: readSendLease() ? 'present' : 'none',
                lastAction: state.lastActionReason || 'none',
                lastTickAgeMs: state.lastTickAt ? Date.now() - state.lastTickAt : null,
                lastWakeHubRx: state.lastWakeHubRx || '',
                lastWakeHubTx: state.lastWakeHubTx || '',
                moduleCount: buildAutomationModuleRegistry().length,
                recentControlCommands: (state.controlCommandHistory || []).slice(0, 3).map((item) => ({ command: item.command, ok: item.ok, time: item.time }))
            },
            pageState: button,
            safety: {
                guardedClickFirewall: !!config.guardedAutomationClickFirewall,
                strictSubmitterRequestSubmit: !!config.strictSubmitterRequestSubmit,
                safeFormSubmitFallback: !!config.safeFormSubmitFallback,
                safeEnterSubmitFallback: !!config.safeEnterSubmitFallback,
                noGeometryFallback: true,
                dangerousButtonGuard: true,
                textFreeSummary: true
            },
            blockers,
            warnings,
            logs: state.logs.slice(0, clampNumber(config.aiSelfDiagnosticMaxLogEntries, 0, 20)).map((line) => String(line || '').slice(0, 220))
        };
    }

    function copyAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(reason = 'manual-copy') {
        const payload = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(reason);
        const json = JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2);
        try {
            navigator.clipboard?.writeText(json);
            pushLog(`Copied AI control summary · ${payload.decision}`);
            setStatus('AI summary copied');
            return payload;
        } catch {}
        prompt('Copy AI-friendly control summary JSON (text-free):', json);
        pushLog('AI control summary shown for manual copy');
        return payload;
    }

    function recordControlCommand(command, args, ok, resultOrError) {
        const item = {
            ts: Date.now(),
            time: new Date().toISOString(),
            command,
            ok: !!ok,
            args: sanitizeControlArgs(args),
            result: ok ? sanitizeControlResult(resultOrError) : undefined,
            error: ok ? undefined : String(resultOrError || '').slice(0, 240)
        };
        state.controlCommandHistory = Array.isArray(state.controlCommandHistory) ? state.controlCommandHistory : [];
        state.controlCommandHistory.unshift(item);
        state.controlCommandHistory = state.controlCommandHistory.slice(0, clampNumber(config.controlCommandHistoryLimit, 0, 50));
        return item;
    }

    function sanitizeControlArgs(args) {
        const safe = {};
        const src = args && typeof args === 'object' ? args : {};
        for (const key of Object.keys(src)) {
            if (/text|prompt|body|message|content/i.test(key)) {
                safe[key] = `[redacted:${String(src[key] || '').length}]`;
            } else {
                const value = src[key];
                safe[key] = typeof value === 'string' ? value.slice(0, 180) : value;
            }
        }
        return safe;
    }

    function sanitizeControlResult(result) {
        if (!result || typeof result !== 'object') return result;
        return {
            decision: result.decision || '',
            statusText: result.statusText || '',
            blockers: Array.isArray(result.blockers) ? result.blockers.slice(0, 8) : [],
            warnings: Array.isArray(result.warnings) ? result.warnings.slice(0, 8) : [],
            version: result.version || SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: result.build || SCRIPT_BUILD
        };
    }

    function getControlCommandCategories() {
        return {
            readOnly: ['status', 'summary', 'ai_summary', 'contract', 'automation_contract', 'api_schema', 'schema', 'modules', 'module_status', 'dry_run', 'release_gate', 'automation_gate', 'supervisor_gate', 'schema_validation_summary', 'supervisor_state', 'machine_state', 'command_plan', 'can_run', 'route_table', 'state_routes', 'route_plan', 'supervisor_route_plan', 'evidence_packet', 'compact_contract', 'low_token_contract', 'supervisor_branch_contract', 'branch_contract', 'n8n_branch_contract', 'ask_router_branch_contract', 'nexusync_minimal_evidence', 'codex_step_card', 'next_command_envelope', 'webai_transfer_contract', 'relay_adapter_contract', 'relay_marker_contract', 'relay_envelope', 'nexusync_bridge_packet', 'n8n_relay_branch_contract', 'ask_router_relay_contract', 'codex_relay_step_card', 'adapter_compatibility_report', 'supervisor_template_pack', 'external_supervisor_templates', 'n8n_contract', 'ask_router_contract', 'n8n_workflow_template', 'n8n_node_plan', 'ask_router_template', 'nexusync_evidence_schema', 'codex_minimal_handoff', 'supervisor_runbook', 'supervisor_schema_fixtures', 'smoke_test_templates', 'schema_validation_pack', 'validate_supervisor_templates', 'nexusync_binding_contract', 'nexusync_vnext_binding', 'nexusync_canonical_packet', 'nexusync_canonical_sha256', 'nexusync_hash_fixtures', 'nexusync_canonical_fixtures', 'validate_nexusync_hash_fixtures', 'validate_nexusync_canonical_fixtures', 'nexusync_binding_validation_pack', 'nexusync_compatibility_matrix', 'nexusync_protocol_intake_contract', 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_template', 'validate_nexusync_protocol_descriptor', 'nexusync_protocol_binding_preview', 'nexusync_bound_canonical_record', 'nexusync_protocol_fixture_pack', 'validate_nexusync_protocol_fixtures', 'nexusync_protocol_source_template', 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_gate', 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_fingerprint', 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_diff', 'nexusync_protocol_intake_evidence', 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_runbook', 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_fixture_pack', 'validate_nexusync_protocol_adoption_fixtures', 'external_adapter_handshake', 'command_receipt_contract', 'command_receipts', 'command_receipt_ledger', 'command_replay_status', 'command_receipt_fixtures', 'validate_command_receipt_fixtures', 'command_evidence_pairing_schema', 'command_evidence_pair', 'validate_command_evidence_pairing', 'command_evidence_pairing_fixtures', 'validate_command_evidence_pairing_fixtures', 'nexusync_command_evidence_schema', 'webai_transfer_command_receipt_packet', 'n8n_command_receipt_branch_contract', 'codex_command_receipt_step_card', 'supervisor_smoke_result_relay_contract', 'supervisor_smoke_result_marker', 'supervisor_smoke_enable_policy', 'webai_transfer_smoke_result_packet', 'nexusync_smoke_result_packet', 'n8n_smoke_enable_policy_contract', 'codex_smoke_enable_policy_card', 'supervisor_smoke_result_relay_fixtures', 'validate_supervisor_smoke_result_relay_fixtures', 'real_loop_archival_envelope_contract', 'real_loop_archival_envelope', 'validate_real_loop_archival_envelope', 'real_loop_archival_envelope_fixtures', 'validate_real_loop_archival_envelope_fixtures', 'nexusync_real_loop_archival_packet', 'webai_transfer_real_loop_archival_packet', 'n8n_real_loop_archival_contract', 'codex_real_loop_archival_card'],
            browserWideSafe: ['emergency_stop', 'stop', 'kill', 'resume', 'clear_emergency_stop', 'set_global', 'snooze', 'clear_snooze', 'set_background_allowed', 'set_artifact_auto_download'],
            currentChatMutating: ['only_this_chat', 'pause_this_chat', 'repair_runtime', 'unlock'],
            sendRisk: ['continue_now'],
            manualCopy: ['copy_summary', 'emit_console_summary', 'emit_supervisor_state']
        };
    }

    function normalizeControlCommandName(command) {
        return normalizeText(command || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[-\s]+/g, '_');
    }

    function getControlCommandRisk(command) {
        const cmd = normalizeControlCommandName(command);
        const categories = getControlCommandCategories();
        if (categories.sendRisk.includes(cmd)) return 'send-risk-current-tab';
        if (categories.currentChatMutating.includes(cmd)) return 'current-chat-mutating';
        if (categories.browserWideSafe.includes(cmd)) return 'browser-wide-shared';
        if (categories.manualCopy.includes(cmd)) return 'manual-copy-or-console';
        if (categories.readOnly.includes(cmd)) return 'read-only';
        return 'unknown';
    }


    // v199: replay-safe command receipts. This is a browser-side, text-free, bounded
    // ledger for targeted external supervisor commands. It prevents accidental replay
    // of the same send-risk/current-chat command requestId on the same target while
    // still allowing browser-wide commands to fan out per tab when intentionally used.
    function getCommandReceiptTtlMs() {
        return clampNumber(config.commandReceiptTtlMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.commandReceiptTtlMs || 600000, 30000, 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    }

    function getCommandReceiptHistoryLimit() {
        return clampNumber(config.commandReceiptHistoryLimit || DEFAULT_CONFIG.commandReceiptHistoryLimit || 48, 8, 200);
    }

    function shouldReplayGuardCommand(risk) {
        return config.commandReceiptReplayGuardEnabled !== false && (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating');
    }

    function buildCommandReceiptKey(envelope = {}, risk = '') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const currentConversationId = getConversationId() || '';
        const targetTab = env.targetTabId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? TAB_ID : 'browser-wide');
        const targetConversation = env.targetConversationId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? currentConversationId : 'browser-wide');
        return [
            'v199',
            env.requestId || '',
            env.commandName || normalizeControlCommandName(env.command),
            targetTab || '',
            targetConversation || '',
            risk || getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName || env.command)
        ].map((part) => String(part || '').slice(0, 160)).join('|');
    }

    function buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(envelope = {}) {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const safe = {
            requestId: env.requestId,
            command: env.commandName,
            targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
            broadcast: !!env.broadcast,
            ts: env.ts || 0,
            expiresAt: env.expiresAt || 0,
            args: sanitizeControlArgs(env.args || {})
        };
        return makeBoundedSignature(JSON.stringify(safe), 2400).hash;
    }

    function readControlCommandReceipts(includeExpired = false) {
        let rows = [];
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(CONTROL_COMMAND_RECEIPT_KEY);
            rows = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
        } catch {
            rows = [];
        }
        if (!Array.isArray(rows)) rows = [];
        const now = Date.now();
        const ttl = getCommandReceiptTtlMs();
        rows = rows.filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object' && (includeExpired || !item.ts || now - Number(item.ts) <= ttl));
        rows.sort((a, b) => Number(b.ts || 0) - Number(a.ts || 0));
        return rows.slice(0, getCommandReceiptHistoryLimit());
    }

    function writeControlCommandReceipts(rows) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const ttl = getCommandReceiptTtlMs();
        const limit = getCommandReceiptHistoryLimit();
        const compact = (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [])
            .filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object' && (!item.ts || now - Number(item.ts) <= ttl))
            .sort((a, b) => Number(b.ts || 0) - Number(a.ts || 0))
            .slice(0, limit)
            .map((item) => ({
                schema: COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA,
                receiptKey: String(item.receiptKey || '').slice(0, 520),
                requestId: String(item.requestId || '').slice(0, 160),
                command: normalizeControlCommandName(item.command || ''),
                risk: String(item.risk || '').slice(0, 80),
                transport: String(item.transport || '').slice(0, 60),
                source: String(item.source || '').slice(0, 100),
                targetTabId: String(item.targetTabId || '').slice(0, 120),
                targetConversationId: String(item.targetConversationId || '').slice(0, 120),
                ts: Number(item.ts || now),
                time: item.time || new Date(Number(item.ts || now)).toISOString(),
                phase: String(item.phase || '').slice(0, 80),
                accepted: !!item.accepted,
                ok: typeof item.ok === 'boolean' ? item.ok : null,
                reason: String(item.reason || '').slice(0, 180),
                envelopeHash: String(item.envelopeHash || '').slice(0, 80),
                beforeEvidenceHash: String(item.beforeEvidenceHash || '').slice(0, 120),
                afterEvidenceHash: String(item.afterEvidenceHash || '').slice(0, 120),
                ownerApprovalArtifactHash: String(item.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || '').slice(0, 120),
                ownerApprovalConsumptionKey: String(item.ownerApprovalConsumptionKey || '').slice(0, 520),
                containsPromptText: false,
                containsUserText: false
            }));
        try { localStorage.setItem(CONTROL_COMMAND_RECEIPT_KEY, JSON.stringify(compact)); } catch {}
        return compact;
    }

    function findControlCommandReceipt(envelope = {}, risk = '', transport = 'event') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const actualRisk = risk || getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const key = buildCommandReceiptKey(env, actualRisk);
        const rows = readControlCommandReceipts(false);
        return rows.find((item) => item.receiptKey === key && item.accepted) || null;
    }

    function recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope = {}, accept = {}, meta = {}) {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = accept.risk || getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const receipt = {
            schema: COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA,
            receiptKey: buildCommandReceiptKey(env, risk),
            requestId: env.requestId,
            command: env.commandName,
            risk,
            transport: meta.transport || 'event',
            source: env.source || meta.source || '',
            targetTabId: env.targetTabId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? TAB_ID : ''),
            targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? (getConversationId() || '') : ''),
            ts: Date.now(),
            time: new Date().toISOString(),
            phase: meta.phase || (accept.accepted ? 'accepted' : 'ignored'),
            accepted: !!accept.accepted,
            ok: typeof meta.ok === 'boolean' ? meta.ok : null,
            reason: meta.reason || accept.reason || '',
            envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(env),
            beforeEvidenceHash: String(meta.beforeEvidenceHash || env.raw?.beforeEvidenceHash || env.args?.beforeEvidenceHash || '').slice(0, 120),
            afterEvidenceHash: String(meta.afterEvidenceHash || env.raw?.afterEvidenceHash || env.args?.afterEvidenceHash || '').slice(0, 120),
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env),
            ownerApprovalConsumptionKey: getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env) ? buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionKey(env, getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env)) : '',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false
        };
        const rows = readControlCommandReceipts(false).filter((item) => item.receiptKey !== receipt.receiptKey || item.phase !== receipt.phase);
        rows.unshift(receipt);
        writeControlCommandReceipts(rows);
        state.lastCommandReceiptSummary = `${receipt.command || 'unknown'} · ${receipt.phase} · ${receipt.reason || 'ok'}`;
        if (receipt.accepted && receipt.phase === 'completed' && receipt.ownerApprovalArtifactHash && shouldOwnerApprovalConsumptionGuardApply(risk)) {
            try { recordOwnerApprovalConsumption({ commandEnvelope: env, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: receipt.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceipt: receipt, beforeHash: receipt.beforeEvidenceHash, afterHash: receipt.afterEvidenceHash }, { source: meta.source || 'command-receipt-completed' }); } catch {}
        }
        return receipt;
    }

    function buildCommandReplayStatus(envelope = {}, transport = 'event') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const existing = shouldReplayGuardCommand(risk) ? findControlCommandReceipt(env, risk, transport) : null;
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA}.replay_status`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            transport,
            replayGuardEnabled: config.commandReceiptReplayGuardEnabled !== false,
            replayGuardApplies: shouldReplayGuardCommand(risk),
            acceptedForReplay: !existing,
            reason: existing ? 'duplicate-command-replay' : 'not-seen',
            receiptKey: buildCommandReceiptKey(env, risk),
            command: env.commandName,
            requestId: env.requestId,
            risk,
            target: {
                requestedTabId: env.targetTabId,
                requestedConversationId: env.targetConversationId,
                currentTabId: TAB_ID,
                currentConversationId: getConversationId() || ''
            },
            existingReceipt: existing ? {
                requestId: existing.requestId,
                command: existing.command,
                phase: existing.phase,
                accepted: !!existing.accepted,
                ok: existing.ok,
                time: existing.time,
                reason: existing.reason || ''
            } : null,
            rule: 'Duplicate targeted send-risk/current-chat command requestIds are ignored before side effects. Browser-wide shared commands are not globally replay-blocked.'
        };
    }

    function buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(reason = 'api-command-receipts') {
        const rows = readControlCommandReceipts(false);
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA}.ledger`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            storage: { key: CONTROL_COMMAND_RECEIPT_KEY, shared: true, ttlMs: getCommandReceiptTtlMs(), limit: getCommandReceiptHistoryLimit() },
            replayGuardEnabled: config.commandReceiptReplayGuardEnabled !== false,
            count: rows.length,
            latest: rows.slice(0, 8),
            summary: rows.length ? `${rows.length} receipt(s), newest ${rows[0].command || 'unknown'} · ${rows[0].phase || 'unknown'}` : 'empty'
        };
    }

    function clearCommandReceiptLedger(reason = 'manual-clear-command-receipts') {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(CONTROL_COMMAND_RECEIPT_KEY); } catch {}
        state.lastCommandReceiptSummary = `cleared · ${reason}`;
        pushLog('Command receipt ledger cleared');
        return buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(reason);
    }

    function buildCommandReceiptContract(profile = 'command-receipt-contract') {
        const example = buildNextCommandEnvelope(`receipt:${profile}`) || { requestId: `example-${Date.now().toString(36)}`, command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: TAB_ID, targetConversationId: getConversationId() || '', ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA}.contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Replay-safe external supervisor command receipt ledger for before-command -> targeted command -> after-evidence loops.',
            guard: {
                enabled: config.commandReceiptReplayGuardEnabled !== false,
                appliesToRisks: ['send-risk-current-tab', 'current-chat-mutating'],
                duplicateDecision: 'ignored_before_side_effects',
                keyFields: ['requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId/currentTabId', 'targetConversationId/currentConversationId', 'risk'],
                ttlMs: getCommandReceiptTtlMs(),
                historyLimit: getCommandReceiptHistoryLimit()
            },
            exampleEnvelope: example,
            exampleReplayStatus: buildCommandReplayStatus(example, 'event'),
            recommendedSupervisorFlow: [
                'Read supervisorLoopGate() and archive before evidence externally.',
                'Dispatch the provided commandEnvelope exactly once with its requestId unchanged.',
                'Listen for cgpt-auto-continue:result and archive command receipt/evidence after dispatch.',
                'If commandReplayStatus(envelope).acceptedForReplay is false, do not dispatch again; use the existing receipt and after evidence.',
                'Bind beforeHash + commandEnvelope.requestId + command receipt + afterHash in Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n evidence.'
            ],
            rules: ['Do not synthesize requestId after before evidence.', 'Do not reuse one requestId for different targets.', 'Do not treat receipt as owner approval.', 'Receipts are text-free and do not contain prompt/user bodies.'],
            ledger: buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(profile)
        };
    }

    function buildCommandReceiptFixturePack(profile = 'command-receipt-fixtures') {
        const convo = getConversationId() || 'fixture-conversation';
        const base = { requestId: 'fixture-cmd-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: TAB_ID, targetConversationId: convo, ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'targeted-send-risk-has-stable-receipt-key', envelope: base, expected: 'same key on repeated normalization' },
                { id: 'different-request-id-is-not-duplicate', envelope: { ...base, requestId: 'fixture-cmd-002' }, expected: 'different receipt key' },
                { id: 'browser-wide-emergency-stop-not-global-replay-blocked', envelope: { requestId: 'fixture-stop-001', command: 'emergency_stop', ts: Date.now() }, expected: 'replay guard does not apply' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'duplicate-targeted-send-risk-request-id-must-be-rejected', envelope: base, expected: 'duplicate-command-replay after accepted receipt exists' },
                { id: 'same-request-id-different-target-must-not-share-receipt', envelope: { ...base, targetTabId: 'other-tab' }, expected: 'different target key' },
                { id: 'receipt-must-remain-text-free', envelope: { ...base, args: { promptText: 'redacted by sanitizer' } }, expected: 'prompt/body/content fields redacted or excluded' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateCommandReceiptFixtures(profile = 'command-receipt-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildCommandReceiptFixturePack(profile);
        const pass = [];
        const fail = [];
        const base = fixtures.mustPass[0].envelope;
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(base.command);
        const key1 = buildCommandReceiptKey(base, risk);
        const key2 = buildCommandReceiptKey(normalizeControlEnvelope(base), risk);
        pass.push({ id: 'targeted-send-risk-has-stable-receipt-key', ok: key1 === key2, detail: key1 === key2 ? 'stable' : 'unstable' });
        const key3 = buildCommandReceiptKey(fixtures.mustPass[1].envelope, risk);
        pass.push({ id: 'different-request-id-is-not-duplicate', ok: key1 !== key3, detail: key1 !== key3 ? 'different key' : 'collision' });
        const stopRisk = getControlCommandRisk('emergency_stop');
        pass.push({ id: 'browser-wide-emergency-stop-not-global-replay-blocked', ok: !shouldReplayGuardCommand(stopRisk), detail: stopRisk });
        const otherTargetKey = buildCommandReceiptKey(fixtures.mustFail[1].envelope, risk);
        pass.push({ id: 'same-request-id-different-target-must-not-share-receipt', ok: key1 !== otherTargetKey, detail: key1 !== otherTargetKey ? 'target-isolated' : 'target-collision' });
        const sanitized = sanitizeControlArgs(fixtures.mustFail[2].envelope.args || {});
        pass.push({ id: 'receipt-must-remain-text-free', ok: String(sanitized.promptText || '').startsWith('[redacted:'), detail: String(sanitized.promptText || '') });
        for (const item of pass) if (!item.ok) fail.push(item.id);
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: fail.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            failCount: fail.length,
            failedIds: fail,
            results: pass,
            rule: 'Replay safety validation is static/text-free; it does not dispatch commands.'
        };
    }


    // v200: command evidence pairing schema. This does not compute authoritative
    // Nexusync archive hashes inside the browser. It binds externally computed
    // beforeHash + commandReceipt + afterHash into a text-free record that n8n,
    // WebAI Transfer, ASK_ROUTER, Nexusync, and Codex can archive and validate.
    function normalizeEvidenceHash(hash) {
        const raw = normalizeText(hash || '').trim();
        if (!raw) return '';
        const lower = raw.toLowerCase();
        if (/^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/.test(lower)) return lower;
        if (/^[a-f0-9]{64}$/.test(lower)) return `sha256:${lower}`;
        return raw.slice(0, 140);
    }

    function isValidEvidenceHash(hash) {
        if (!hash) return false;
        const normalized = normalizeEvidenceHash(hash);
        if (!config.commandEvidenceRequireSha256) return normalized.length >= 16;
        return /^sha256:[a-f0-9]{64}$/.test(normalized);
    }

    function makeCommandEvidencePairId(envelope = {}, beforeHash = '', afterHash = '') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const raw = [env.requestId, env.commandName, env.targetTabId || TAB_ID, env.targetConversationId || getConversationId() || '', risk, normalizeEvidenceHash(beforeHash), normalizeEvidenceHash(afterHash)].join('|');
        return `cep-${makeBoundedSignature(raw, 1200).hash}`;
    }

    function buildCommandEvidencePairingSchema(profile = 'command-evidence-pairing-schema') {
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.schema`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Bind one external supervisor command to externally archived before/after evidence and the browser-side replay-safe command receipt.',
            requiredFields: ['pairId', 'beforeHash', 'commandEnvelope', 'commandReceipt', 'afterHash', 'validation'],
            hashRules: {
                acceptedFormat: config.commandEvidenceRequireSha256 ? 'sha256:<64 lowercase hex>' : 'sha256:<64 hex> preferred; other external ids allowed when config disabled',
                authoritativeHasher: 'external Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n supervisor, not the userscript',
                canonicalization: 'external supervisor must canonicalize evidence before hashing; browser helper only normalizes/hash-validates the references'
            },
            commandRules: {
                requestIdStable: true,
                sendRiskRequiresTarget: true,
                duplicateReplayGuard: 'commandReplayStatus(envelope).acceptedForReplay must be true before dispatch, unless using an existing completed receipt as evidence',
                receiptIsApproval: false,
                relayMarkerIsApproval: false
            },
            safety: ['containsPromptText=false', 'containsUserText=false', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT remains hard stop', 'emergency stop remains hard stop', 'receipt does not override releaseGate/canRun/target routing']
        };
    }

    function findReceiptForEnvelope(envelope = {}) {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const key = buildCommandReceiptKey(env, risk);
        const rows = readControlCommandReceipts(false);
        return rows.find((item) => item.receiptKey === key) || null;
    }

    function buildCommandEvidencePair(envelope = {}, beforeHash = '', afterHash = '', reason = 'command-evidence-pair') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const before = normalizeEvidenceHash(beforeHash || env.raw?.beforeHash || env.raw?.beforeEvidenceHash || env.args?.beforeHash || env.args?.beforeEvidenceHash || '');
        const after = normalizeEvidenceHash(afterHash || env.raw?.afterHash || env.raw?.afterEvidenceHash || env.args?.afterHash || env.args?.afterEvidenceHash || '');
        const receipt = findReceiptForEnvelope(env) || null;
        const replay = buildCommandReplayStatus(env, 'event');
        const pair = {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.pair`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            pairId: makeCommandEvidencePairId(env, before, after),
            beforeHash: before,
            afterHash: after,
            commandEnvelope: {
                requestId: env.requestId,
                command: env.commandName,
                risk,
                targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
                targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
                broadcast: !!env.broadcast,
                ts: env.ts || 0,
                expiresAt: env.expiresAt || 0,
                envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(env)
            },
            commandReceipt: receipt ? {
                schema: receipt.schema || COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA,
                receiptKey: receipt.receiptKey,
                requestId: receipt.requestId,
                command: receipt.command,
                risk: receipt.risk,
                phase: receipt.phase,
                accepted: !!receipt.accepted,
                ok: receipt.ok,
                time: receipt.time,
                reason: receipt.reason || '',
                envelopeHash: receipt.envelopeHash || ''
            } : null,
            replayStatus: { acceptedForReplay: replay.acceptedForReplay, reason: replay.reason, receiptKey: replay.receiptKey },
            externalArchive: {
                authoritativeHashRequired: true,
                beforeHashComputedBy: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                afterHashComputedBy: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                recordPath: 'external supervisor decides; userscript only supplies text-free binding hints'
            },
            validation: null,
            ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false }
        };
        pair.validation = validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair, `${reason}:inline`).summary;
        return pair;
    }

    function validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair = {}, profile = 'command-evidence-pairing-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const before = normalizeEvidenceHash(pair.beforeHash || '');
        const after = normalizeEvidenceHash(pair.afterHash || '');
        const env = pair.commandEnvelope || {};
        const receipt = pair.commandReceipt || null;
        if (pair.containsPromptText === true || pair.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('pair-must-be-text-free');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(before)) blockers.push('beforeHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(after)) blockers.push('afterHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!env.requestId) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.requestId-missing');
        if (!env.command) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.command-missing');
        if ((env.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || env.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !env.targetTabId && !env.targetConversationId) blockers.push('targeted-command-missing-target');
        if (!receipt) blockers.push('commandReceipt-missing');
        if (receipt && receipt.requestId !== env.requestId) blockers.push('receipt-requestId-mismatch');
        if (receipt && normalizeControlCommandName(receipt.command) !== normalizeControlCommandName(env.command)) blockers.push('receipt-command-mismatch');
        if (receipt && receipt.accepted !== true) blockers.push('receipt-not-accepted');
        if (receipt && receipt.ok === false) warnings.push('receipt-completed-with-error-or-not-yet-ok');
        if (before && after && before === after && config.commandEvidenceAllowEqualBeforeAfterHash === false) blockers.push('before-after-hash-equal-not-allowed');
        if (before && after && before === after) warnings.push('before-after-hash-equal-possible-noop');
        if (pair.ownerApproval?.suppliedByReceipt === true || pair.ownerApproval?.suppliedByRelayMarker === true) blockers.push('receipt-or-marker-cannot-supply-owner-approval');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            summary: { decision, blockerCount: blockers.length, warningCount: warnings.length, beforeHashValid: isValidEvidenceHash(before), afterHashValid: isValidEvidenceHash(after), requestId: env.requestId || '', receiptPresent: !!receipt }
        };
    }

    function buildCommandEvidencePairingFixtures(profile = 'command-evidence-pairing-fixtures') {
        const before = 'sha256:' + 'a'.repeat(64);
        const after = 'sha256:' + 'b'.repeat(64);
        const env = { requestId: 'fixture-command-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: TAB_ID, targetConversationId: getConversationId() || 'fixture-conversation', ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        const receipt = { schema: COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA, receiptKey: buildCommandReceiptKey(env, 'send-risk-current-tab'), requestId: env.requestId, command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', phase: 'completed', accepted: true, ok: true, time: new Date().toISOString(), envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(env), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false };
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-before-receipt-after-pair-passes', pair: { containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: before, afterHash: after, commandEnvelope: { requestId: env.requestId, command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: env.targetTabId, targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId }, commandReceipt: receipt, ownerApproval: { suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false } } },
                { id: 'equal-before-after-is-warning-not-hold-by-default', pair: { containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: before, afterHash: before, commandEnvelope: { requestId: env.requestId, command: 'status', risk: 'read-only' }, commandReceipt: { ...receipt, command: 'status', risk: 'read-only' }, ownerApproval: { suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false } } }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-beforeHash-holds', pair: { containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: '', afterHash: after, commandEnvelope: { requestId: env.requestId, command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: env.targetTabId }, commandReceipt: receipt } },
                { id: 'receipt-requestId-mismatch-holds', pair: { containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: before, afterHash: after, commandEnvelope: { requestId: 'different', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: env.targetTabId }, commandReceipt: receipt } },
                { id: 'text-containing-pair-holds', pair: { containsPromptText: true, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: before, afterHash: after, commandEnvelope: { requestId: env.requestId, command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: env.targetTabId }, commandReceipt: receipt } },
                { id: 'receipt-as-approval-holds', pair: { containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: before, afterHash: after, commandEnvelope: { requestId: env.requestId, command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: env.targetTabId }, commandReceipt: receipt, ownerApproval: { suppliedByReceipt: true } } }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateCommandEvidencePairingFixtures(profile = 'command-evidence-pairing-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildCommandEvidencePairingFixtures(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass) {
            const validation = validateCommandEvidencePairing(item.pair, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision !== 'hold', decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail) {
            const validation = validateCommandEvidencePairing(item.pair, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === 'hold', decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
