            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            rule: 'Fixture validation is pure/static and does not dispatch commands or read conversation bodies.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferCommandReceiptPacket(reason = 'webai-transfer-command-receipt') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(reason);
        const env = gate.commandEnvelope || buildNextCommandEnvelope(reason) || {};
        const beforeHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(env.beforeEvidenceHash || env.beforeHash || 'sha256:' + '0'.repeat(64));
        const afterHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(env.afterEvidenceHash || env.afterHash || 'sha256:' + '0'.repeat(64));
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            relayMarkerIsApproval: false,
            gate: { decision: gate.decision, commandReady: !!gate.commandReady, stateCode: gate.stateCode || '', branchId: gate.branchId || '', releaseGateDecision: gate.releaseGateDecision || '' },
            commandEvidencePairTemplate: buildCommandEvidencePair(env, beforeHash, afterHash, `${reason}:template`),
            externalSupervisorMustReplace: ['beforeHash', 'afterHash'],
            recommendedRelayFields: ['requestId', 'stateCode', 'branchId', 'beforeHash', 'commandReceipt.receiptKey', 'afterHash', 'pairId']
        };
    }

    function buildN8nCommandReceiptBranchContract(profile = 'n8n-command-receipt-branch') {
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.n8n_branch_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            nodes: [
                { id: 'read_gate', kind: 'browser-evaluate', expression: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('n8n-before')` },
                { id: 'archive_before', kind: 'external-archive', output: 'beforeHash=sha256(canonical before evidence)' },
                { id: 'check_replay', kind: 'browser-evaluate', expression: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandReplayStatus(gate.commandEnvelope, 'event')` },
                { id: 'dispatch_targeted_command', kind: 'browser-dispatch-event', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, when: 'gate.commandReady && replay.acceptedForReplay' },
                { id: 'read_receipt', kind: 'browser-evaluate', expression: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandReceipts()` },
                { id: 'archive_after', kind: 'external-archive', output: 'afterHash=sha256(canonical after evidence)' },
                { id: 'bind_pair', kind: 'browser-evaluate', expression: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandEvidencePair(gate.commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash)` }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['releaseGate hold', 'gate.commandReady !== true', 'canRun rejected', 'duplicate-command-replay', 'missing beforeHash/afterHash', 'pair validation hold']
        };
    }

    function buildCodexCommandReceiptStepCard(profile = 'codex-command-receipt-step-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.codex_step_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            task: 'Use browser API only to read gate, verify replay status, dispatch one targeted command, then bind before/after evidence hashes with the command receipt.',
            minimalSteps: [
                `const gate = window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('codex-before')`,
                'archive before evidence externally and compute beforeHash',
                `const replay = window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandReplayStatus(gate.commandEnvelope, 'event')`,
                `dispatch ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} only if gate.commandReady && replay.acceptedForReplay`,
                'archive after evidence externally and compute afterHash',
                `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandEvidencePair(gate.commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash)`
            ],
            stopIf: ['emergency stop', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'releaseGate hold', 'duplicate-command-replay', 'target mismatch', 'pair validation hold']
        };
    }

    function buildControlApiSchemaPayload(reason = 'manual') {
        const categories = getControlCommandCategories();
        return {
            schema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            reason,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            transport: {
                windowApi: CONTROL_API_NAME,
                legacyWindowApi: CONTROL_API_LEGACY_NAME,
                commandEvent: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
                resultEvent: CONTROL_RESULT_EVENT,
                readyEvent: CONTROL_READY_EVENT,
                storageCommandKey: CONTROL_STORAGE_COMMAND_KEY,
                storageResultKey: CONTROL_STORAGE_RESULT_KEY,
                storageBridgeEnabled: config.externalControlStorageBridgeEnabled !== false,
                storageCommandTtlMs: clampNumber(config.externalControlStorageCommandTtlMs || CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS, 1000, 120000)
            },
            targetRouting: {
                currentTabId: TAB_ID,
                currentConversationId: getConversationId() || '',
                storageMutationsRequireTarget: config.externalControlRequireTargetForStorageMutations !== false,
                acceptedTargetFields: ['targetTabId', 'targetConversationId', 'broadcast', 'expiresAt', 'ts'],
                rule: 'For storage bridge, send-risk/current-chat commands must target this tab or conversation. Browser-wide shared commands are broadcast-safe but still text-free and bounded.'
            },
            supervisor: {
                schema: SUPERVISOR_STATE_SCHEMA,
                routeSchema: SUPERVISOR_ROUTE_SCHEMA,
                templateSchema: SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA,
                stableStates: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', 'WAIT_GENERATING', 'WAIT_PENDING_PROOF', 'WAIT_SEND_RETRY', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_SNOOZE', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'BLOCKED_SCOPE', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_HIDDEN_PAUSED', 'BLOCKED_CONVERSATION_LOCKED', 'PAGE_UNREADABLE', 'WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION', 'IDLE_ALLOWED'],
                commands: ['supervisor_state', 'machine_state', 'command_plan', 'can_run', 'route_table', 'route_plan', 'compact_contract', 'n8n_branch_contract', 'ask_router_branch_contract', 'next_command_envelope', 'nexusync_minimal_evidence', 'evidence_packet', 'release_gate', 'automation_gate', 'schema_validation_summary', 'supervisor_template_pack', 'n8n_workflow_template', 'ask_router_template', 'nexusync_evidence_schema', 'codex_minimal_handoff', 'supervisor_schema_fixtures', 'smoke_test_templates', 'schema_validation_pack', 'nexusync_binding_contract', 'n8n_owner_approval_consumption_contract', 'codex_owner_approval_consumption_card', 'owner_approval_execution_checklist_contract', 'owner_approval_execution_checklist', 'validate_owner_approval_execution_checklist', 'owner_approval_execution_checklist_fixtures', 'validate_owner_approval_execution_checklist_fixtures', 'n8n_owner_approval_execution_checklist_contract', 'webai_transfer_owner_approval_execution_checklist_packet', 'nexusync_owner_approval_execution_checklist_packet', 'codex_owner_approval_execution_checklist_card', 'execution_checklist_relay_contract', 'execution_checklist_marker', 'validate_execution_checklist_marker', 'execution_checklist_relay_fixtures', 'validate_execution_checklist_relay_fixtures', 'webai_transfer_execution_checklist_marker_packet', 'nexusync_execution_checklist_marker_packet', 'n8n_execution_checklist_marker_contract', 'codex_execution_checklist_marker_card', 'emit_supervisor_state'],
                rule: 'Supervisors should branch on supervisor.stateCode, then routeTable().routes[stateCode], not on panel text or natural-language diagnostics.'
            },
            commands: {
                readOnly: categories.readOnly,
                browserWideSafe: categories.browserWideSafe,
                currentChatMutating: categories.currentChatMutating,
                sendRisk: categories.sendRisk,
                manualCopy: categories.manualCopy
            },
            safety: {
                emergencyStopCommand: 'emergency_stop',
                resumeCommand: 'resume',
                noNetworkListener: true,
                pageLocalOnly: true,
                textFreeDiagnostics: true,
                dangerousButtonGuard: true,
                noGeometryFallback: true,
                enterFallbackDefaultOff: !config.safeEnterSubmitFallback
            },
            examples: {
                eventStatus: `window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT}', { detail: { requestId: 'probe-1', command: 'status' } }))`,
                targetedStorageContinue: `localStorage.setItem('${CONTROL_STORAGE_COMMAND_KEY}', JSON.stringify({ requestId: 'run-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: '${getConversationId() || '<conversation-id>'}', ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now()+15000 }))`,
                emergencyStop: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.emergencyStop(30, 'owner stop')`
            }
        };
    }

    function buildAutomationContractPayload(reason = 'manual') {
        const summary = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(`contract:${reason}`);
        return {
            schema: AUTOMATION_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            reason,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Low-coupling browser-side automation component for ChatGPT auto-continue, controlled by page-local APIs and text-free diagnostics.',
            page: summary.page,
            decision: summary.decision,
            control: summary.control,
            modules: buildAutomationModuleRegistry(),
            api: buildControlApiSchemaPayload('contract'),
            supervisor: buildSupervisorStatePayload(`contract:${reason}`),
            supervisorRoutes: buildSupervisorRouteTable('contract'),
            invariants: [
                'No network server/listener is opened by this userscript.',
                'External control is page-local JS/event/storage only.',
                'AI diagnostics and control history redact prompt/message/body/content fields.',
                'Emergency stop blocks isGlobalEnabled(), auto-send, and scope-sensitive artifact auto-download.',
                'Send actions require explicit safe submit/send evidence; geometry-only icon fallback remains forbidden.',
                'Round counters, logs, panel state, observer/worker handles, and pending runtime state remain tab-local.',
                'Global/scope/snooze/emergency/artifact/prompt-library settings are browser-wide shared config.'
            ],
            recommendedSupervisorFlow: [
                'Read contract() once after ready event.',
                'Poll aiSummary()/status() for text-free go/no-go.',
                'Use emergencyStop(minutes, reason) before any uncertain external workflow.',
                'Use targeted commands for continue_now, only_this_chat, pause_this_chat, repair_runtime, and unlock.',
                'Archive status/contract outputs as evidence; do not scrape full conversation text.',
                'Branch on supervisorState().stateCode for n8n/Codex/ASK_ROUTER workflows instead of parsing panel text.',
                'Use routeTable()/routePlan()/evidencePacket() when connecting this component to n8n, ASK_ROUTER, Nexusync, or Codex supervisors.',
                'For Nexusync vNext integration, call nexusyncProtocolIntakeContract() and validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(actualProtocolDescriptor) before archiving bound canonical records.',
                'For external automation loops, call supervisorLoopGate()/supervisorLoopStateEnvelope() before command dispatch, then archive supervisorLoopEvidencePair() after command completion.',
                'For replay-safe dispatch, use commandReceiptContract()/commandReplayStatus(envelope) and keep requestId stable across before/dispatch/after evidence; duplicate targeted requestIds are rejected before side effects.',
                'For Nexusync/WebAI Transfer archive binding, use commandEvidencePair(envelope, beforeHash, afterHash) and validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair) before storing beforeHash + commandReceipt + afterHash.',
                'Use supervisorTemplatePack()/n8nWorkflowTemplate()/askRouterTemplate()/nexusyncEvidenceSchema()/codexMinimalHandoff() to generate low-token external supervisor scaffolds instead of asking Codex to infer routes.',
                'Run smokeTestTemplates()/schemaValidationPack() before handing templates to external automation; failed smoke tests should block handoff.',
                'For low-token loops, prefer compactContract()/n8nBranchContract()/nextCommandEnvelope() over full evidencePacket() unless archival evidence is required.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeControlEnvelope(detail = {}, meta = {}) {
        const command = detail.command || detail.cmd || detail.action || meta.command || '';
        const args = detail.args || detail.params || {};
        const target = detail.target || {};
        return {
            requestId: detail.requestId || detail.id || `${Date.now().toString(36)}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`,
            command,
            commandName: normalizeControlCommandName(command),
            args,
            source: normalizeText(args.source || detail.source || meta.source || 'api').slice(0, 100),
            targetTabId: detail.targetTabId || target.tabId || args.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: detail.targetConversationId || target.conversationId || args.targetConversationId || '',
            broadcast: !!(detail.broadcast || target.broadcast || args.broadcast),
            ts: Number(detail.ts || args.ts || 0) || 0,
            expiresAt: Number(detail.expiresAt || args.expiresAt || 0) || 0,
            raw: detail
        };
    }

    function shouldAcceptControlEnvelope(envelope, transport = 'event') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const now = Date.now();
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        const currentConversationId = getConversationId() || '';
        const ttl = clampNumber(config.externalControlStorageCommandTtlMs || CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS, 1000, 120000);
        const isStorage = transport === 'storage';

        if (!env.commandName) return { accepted: false, reason: 'missing-command', risk, envelope: env };
        if (env.targetTabId && env.targetTabId !== TAB_ID) return { accepted: false, reason: 'target-tab-mismatch', risk, envelope: env };
        if (env.targetConversationId && env.targetConversationId !== currentConversationId) return { accepted: false, reason: 'target-conversation-mismatch', risk, envelope: env };
        if (isStorage) {
            if (env.expiresAt && env.expiresAt < now) return { accepted: false, reason: 'expired-command', risk, envelope: env };
            if (env.ts && now - env.ts > ttl) return { accepted: false, reason: 'stale-command', risk, envelope: env };
            const hasTarget = !!env.targetTabId || !!env.targetConversationId;
            const targetRequired = config.externalControlRequireTargetForStorageMutations !== false;
            if (targetRequired && !hasTarget && !env.broadcast && (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating')) {
                return { accepted: false, reason: 'storage-mutation-requires-target', risk, envelope: env };
            }
        }
        if (shouldReplayGuardCommand(risk)) {
            const existingReceipt = findControlCommandReceipt(env, risk, transport);
            if (existingReceipt) {
                return { accepted: false, reason: 'duplicate-command-replay', risk, envelope: env, receipt: existingReceipt };
            }
        }
        const approvalHash = getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env);
        if (approvalHash && shouldOwnerApprovalConsumptionGuardApply(risk)) {
            const consumption = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus({ commandEnvelope: env, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash }, `accept:${transport}`);
            if (!consumption.acceptedForConsumption) {
                return { accepted: false, reason: consumption.reason || 'duplicate-owner-approval-consumption', risk, envelope: env, ownerApprovalConsumption: consumption };
            }
        }
        return { accepted: true, reason: 'accepted', risk, envelope: env };
    }

    function buildControlDryRunPayload(detail = {}, transport = 'event') {
        const decision = shouldAcceptControlEnvelope(detail, transport);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.control_dry_run.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            transport,
            accepted: decision.accepted,
            reason: decision.reason,
            risk: decision.risk,
            command: decision.envelope.commandName,
            target: {
                requestedTabId: decision.envelope.targetTabId,
                requestedConversationId: decision.envelope.targetConversationId,
                broadcast: decision.envelope.broadcast,
                currentTabId: TAB_ID,
                currentConversationId: getConversationId() || ''
            },
            wouldRun: decision.accepted,
            replayStatus: buildCommandReplayStatus(decision.envelope, transport),
            summary: decision.accepted ? 'Command would be accepted by this page.' : `Command would be ignored: ${decision.reason}`
        };
    }

    function classifySupervisorState(reason = 'manual') {
        let snap = null;
        let readError = '';
        try { snap = readPageState(); } catch (error) { readError = String(error?.message || error).slice(0, 220); }

        const now = Date.now();
        const cid = getConversationId() || '';
        const sendBtn = snap?.sendBtn || null;
        const safeSendButton = !!(sendBtn && isSafeComposerSubmitButton(sendBtn));
        const stopAsSend = !!(sendBtn && isStopButtonLike(sendBtn));
        const composerDraftPresent = !!snap?.composerText;
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const allowedCommands = ['status', 'ai_summary', 'supervisor_state', 'machine_state', 'command_plan', 'can_run', 'contract', 'api_schema', 'modules'];
        const blockedCommands = [];
        const evidence = {
            readError: readError || '',
            conversationId: cid,
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            visibility: document.visibilityState || 'visible',
            focused: document.hasFocus?.() || false,
            scopeMode: config.scopeMode,
            allowedByScope: isAllowedByScope(),
            scopeReason: getScopeBlockReason(),
            globalRaw: config.globalEnabled !== false && config.enabled !== false,
            effectiveGlobal: isGlobalEnabled(),
            emergencyStopped: isEmergencyStopped(now),
            globalSnoozed: isGlobalSnoozed(now),
            generating: !!snap?.isGenerating,
            continueButton: !!snap?.continueBtn,
            composerPresent: !!snap?.composer,
            composerDraftPresent,
            sendButtonCandidate: !!sendBtn,
            safeSendButton,
            stopAsSend,
            pendingAutoPrompt: !!state.pendingAutoPrompt,
            pendingSendRetry: !!state.pendingSendRetry,
            roundPendingProof: !!state.roundPendingProof,
            leasePresent: !!readSendLease(),
            artifactLaneArmed: !!config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled,
            backgroundAllowed: config.ignoreWhenHidden === false,
            lastTickAgeMs: state.lastTickAt ? now - state.lastTickAt : null
        };

        let stateCode = 'IDLE_ALLOWED';
        let severity = 'info';
        let recommendedAction = 'observe';
        let recommendedCommand = '';
        let nextAction = 'Poll supervisor_state again after the next tick.';
        let canAutoContinue = false;
        let shouldAct = false;

        function block(code, detail, command = '') {
            stateCode = code;
            severity = 'blocked';
            recommendedAction = command ? 'operator_decision' : 'wait_or_repair';
            recommendedCommand = command;
            nextAction = detail;
            blockers.push(code);
        }

        if (readError) {
            stateCode = 'PAGE_UNREADABLE';
            severity = 'watch';
            recommendedAction = 'repair_or_wait';
            recommendedCommand = 'repair_runtime';
            nextAction = 'Page state is not readable right now; retry after panel/DOM recovery or repair runtime.';
            warnings.push('read_state_error');
        } else if (isEmergencyStopped(now)) {
            block('BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'Emergency stop is active; only resume after owner approval.', 'resume');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (isGlobalSnoozed(now)) {
            block('BLOCKED_GLOBAL_SNOOZE', 'Global snooze is active; wait or clear_snooze after owner approval.', 'clear_snooze');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (config.globalEnabled === false || config.enabled === false) {
            block('BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'Global switch is off; set_global(true) if this automation lane should run.', 'set_global');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (!cid) {
            block('BLOCKED_NO_CHAT_ID', 'No conversation id is available; open or target a real chat before current-chat commands.', 'status');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now', 'only_this_chat', 'pause_this_chat');
        } else if (!isAllowedByScope()) {
            block('BLOCKED_SCOPE', `Current chat is blocked by scope: ${getScopeBlockReason()}.`, 'only_this_chat');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (config.ignoreWhenHidden && document.visibilityState === 'hidden') {
            block('BLOCKED_HIDDEN_PAUSED', 'This tab is hidden and Active tab only is enabled; allow background automation if intended.', 'set_background_allowed');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (state.conversationLockedUntil > now) {
            block('BLOCKED_CONVERSATION_LOCKED', `Conversation is locked for ${formatRemainMs(state.conversationLockedUntil - now)}.`, 'unlock');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (composerDraftPresent) {
            block('BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'Composer contains a real draft; do not overwrite user text.', 'status');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (stopAsSend || snap?.isGenerating) {
            stateCode = 'WAIT_GENERATING';
            severity = 'wait';
            recommendedAction = 'wait';
            nextAction = 'Assistant is generating or Stop answering is visible; wait until generation finishes.';
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (state.pendingSendRetry) {
            stateCode = 'WAIT_SEND_RETRY';
            severity = 'wait';
            recommendedAction = 'wait';
            nextAction = 'A safe submit retry is already scheduled; avoid duplicate external continue commands.';
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (state.pendingAutoPrompt || state.roundPendingProof) {
            stateCode = 'WAIT_PENDING_PROOF';
            severity = 'wait';
            recommendedAction = 'wait';
            nextAction = 'A previous auto prompt is awaiting proof; wait or repair runtime if stale.';
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (snap?.continueBtn) {
            stateCode = 'READY_TO_CONTINUE';
            severity = 'ready';
            recommendedAction = 'command';
            recommendedCommand = 'continue_now';
            nextAction = 'Target this tab or conversation and call continue_now.';
            canAutoContinue = true;
            shouldAct = true;
            allowedCommands.push('continue_now');
        } else if (snap?.composer && !composerDraftPresent) {
            stateCode = 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT';
            severity = safeSendButton ? 'ready' : 'ready_probe';
            recommendedAction = 'command';
            recommendedCommand = 'continue_now';
            nextAction = safeSendButton ? 'Safe submitter is visible; targeted continue_now may send the configured prompt.' : 'Composer is empty and allowed; post-fill probes should verify a safe submitter after inserting the auto prompt.';
            canAutoContinue = true;
            shouldAct = true;
            allowedCommands.push('continue_now');
            if (!safeSendButton) warnings.push('safe_submit_not_visible_until_post_fill');
        } else {
            stateCode = 'WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION';
            severity = 'watch';
            recommendedAction = 'observe';
            nextAction = 'No safe continue button or composer path is visible; poll again after DOM/lifecycle recovery.';
            warnings.push('no_safe_action_visible');
            blockedCommands.push('continue_now');
        }

        const canDownloadArtifacts = !!(config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled && isGlobalEnabled() && isAllowedByScope() && !snap?.isGenerating && !composerDraftPresent);
        if (canDownloadArtifacts) allowedCommands.push('set_artifact_auto_download');
        if (!allowedCommands.includes(recommendedCommand) && recommendedCommand) allowedCommands.push(recommendedCommand);

        return { stateCode, severity, recommendedAction, recommendedCommand, nextAction, canAutoContinue, canDownloadArtifacts, shouldAct, blockers, warnings, allowedCommands: Array.from(new Set(allowedCommands)), blockedCommands: Array.from(new Set(blockedCommands)), evidence };
    }

    function buildSupervisorStatePayload(reason = 'manual') {
        const machine = classifySupervisorState(reason);
        const target = { tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', storageCommandKey: CONTROL_STORAGE_COMMAND_KEY, eventName: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT };
        const commandPlan = buildSupervisorCommandPlan(machine, target);
        const payload = {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_STATE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            stateCode: machine.stateCode,
            severity: machine.severity,
            recommendedAction: machine.recommendedAction,
            recommendedCommand: machine.recommendedCommand,
            nextAction: machine.nextAction,
            shouldAct: machine.shouldAct,
            canAutoContinue: machine.canAutoContinue,
            canDownloadArtifacts: machine.canDownloadArtifacts,
            blockers: machine.blockers,
            warnings: machine.warnings,
            allowedCommands: machine.allowedCommands,
            blockedCommands: machine.blockedCommands,
            target,
            commandPlan,
            evidence: machine.evidence,
            invariants: {
                textFree: true,
                noNetworkListener: true,
                pageLocalOnly: true,
                sendRequiresExplicitSubmitEvidence: true,
                noGeometryFallback: true,
                emergencyStopOverridesEverything: true
            }
        };
        recordSupervisorState(payload);
        return payload;
    }

    function buildSupervisorCommandPlan(machine, target) {
        const command = machine.recommendedCommand || '';
        const base = {
            safeToRunAutomatically: false,
            requiresOwnerApproval: false,
            command,
            transport: command ? 'window-api-or-targeted-event' : 'none',
            target: { tabId: target.tabId, conversationId: target.conversationId },
            eventDetail: null,
            windowApiExample: '',
            reason: machine.nextAction || ''
        };
        if (!command) return base;
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(command);
        base.risk = risk;
        base.requiresOwnerApproval = risk !== 'read-only' && risk !== 'manual-copy-or-console';
        base.safeToRunAutomatically = machine.shouldAct && command === 'continue_now' && machine.canAutoContinue && !machine.blockers.length;
        const requestId = `sup-${Date.now().toString(36)}`;
        base.eventDetail = { requestId, command, targetConversationId: target.conversationId, targetTabId: target.tabId, ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        base.windowApiExample = command === 'continue_now' ? `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.continueNow()` : `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.command('${command}', {})`;
        return base;
    }

    function recordSupervisorState(payload) {
        if (!payload || !payload.stateCode) return;
        state.supervisorStateHistory = Array.isArray(state.supervisorStateHistory) ? state.supervisorStateHistory : [];
        const last = state.supervisorStateHistory[0];
        if (!last || last.stateCode !== payload.stateCode || last.severity !== payload.severity) {
            state.supervisorStateHistory.unshift({ ts: payload.ts || Date.now(), time: payload.generatedAt || new Date().toISOString(), stateCode: payload.stateCode, severity: payload.severity, action: payload.recommendedAction });
            state.supervisorStateHistory = state.supervisorStateHistory.slice(0, clampNumber(config.supervisorStateHistoryLimit, 0, 50));
            state.lastSupervisorStateCode = payload.stateCode;
            state.lastSupervisorStateAt = payload.ts || Date.now();
            if (config.supervisorEmitStateChanges) consoleEmit(payload.severity === 'blocked' ? 'warn' : 'summary', 'supervisor-state-change', { stateCode: payload.stateCode, severity: payload.severity, recommendedAction: payload.recommendedAction, target: payload.target, blockers: payload.blockers, warnings: payload.warnings });
        }
    }

    function buildCanRunPayload(command, args = {}, transport = 'event') {
        const envelope = { command, args, targetTabId: args?.targetTabId, targetConversationId: args?.targetConversationId, broadcast: args?.broadcast, ts: args?.ts || Date.now(), expiresAt: args?.expiresAt || Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        const route = shouldAcceptControlEnvelope(envelope, transport);
        const supervisor = buildSupervisorStatePayload(`can_run:${normalizeControlCommandName(command)}`);
        const cmd = normalizeControlCommandName(command);
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(cmd);
        let accepted = route.accepted;
        const reasons = [];
        if (!route.accepted) reasons.push(route.reason);
        if (cmd === 'continue_now' && !supervisor.canAutoContinue) { accepted = false; reasons.push(`supervisor:${supervisor.stateCode}`); }
        if ((cmd === 'continue_now' || cmd === 'only_this_chat' || cmd === 'pause_this_chat' || cmd === 'repair_runtime' || cmd === 'unlock') && !envelope.targetTabId && !envelope.targetConversationId && transport === 'storage' && config.externalControlRequireTargetForStorageMutations !== false) {
            accepted = false;
            if (!reasons.includes('target-required')) reasons.push('target-required');
        }
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.can_run.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            command: cmd,
            risk,
            transport,
            accepted,
            reasons,
            route,
            supervisorState: supervisor.stateCode,
            recommendedAction: supervisor.recommendedAction,
            target: supervisor.target
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorRouteDefinitions() {
        const targetPolicy = {
            readOnly: 'no target required',
            browserWide: 'broadcast-safe; owner approval recommended for emergency/snooze changes',
            currentChat: 'targetTabId or targetConversationId required for storage bridge',
            sendRisk: 'targetTabId or targetConversationId required; run canRun first'
        };
        const routes = {
            READY_TO_CONTINUE: {
                branchId: 'auto_continue_native_button',
                n8nBranch: 'continue_now_targeted',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.auto_continue.native_continue',
                recommendedCommand: 'continue_now',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('continue_now'),
                automationPolicy: 'auto_allowed_when_targeted_and_canRun_true',
                ownerApproval: 'not required for pre-approved automation lane; required if lane/scope is uncertain',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.sendRisk,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'target.conversationId', 'target.tabId', 'evidence.continueButton', 'canRun.accepted'],
                nextPollMs: 1500,
                stopConditions: ['BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'WAIT_GENERATING']
            },
            READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT: {
                branchId: 'auto_continue_prompt_submit',
                n8nBranch: 'continue_now_targeted_after_prompt_probe',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.auto_continue.send_prompt',
                recommendedCommand: 'continue_now',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('continue_now'),
                automationPolicy: 'auto_allowed_when_targeted_and_canRun_true; post-fill submit probe must remain safe',
                ownerApproval: 'not required for pre-approved automation lane; required before changing prompt/scope',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.sendRisk,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.composerPresent', 'evidence.composerDraftPresent=false', 'warnings.safe_submit_not_visible_until_post_fill?'],
                nextPollMs: 1800,
                stopConditions: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'WAIT_PENDING_PROOF', 'WAIT_GENERATING']
            },
            WAIT_GENERATING: {
                branchId: 'wait_generation_finish',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_and_poll',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.wait.generating',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'do_not_send; poll supervisor_state',
                ownerApproval: 'none',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.readOnly,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.generating', 'evidence.stopAsSend'],
                nextPollMs: 2500,
                stopConditions: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP']
            },
            WAIT_PENDING_PROOF: {
                branchId: 'wait_submit_proof',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_or_repair_if_stale',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.wait.pending_proof',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'wait; repair_runtime only if stale and owner/supervisor policy allows',
                ownerApproval: 'recommended before repair_runtime in production lane',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.currentChat,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.pendingAutoPrompt', 'evidence.roundPendingProof', 'runtime.lastTickAgeMs'],
                nextPollMs: 2500,
                stopConditions: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT']
            },
            WAIT_SEND_RETRY: {
                branchId: 'wait_send_retry',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_and_poll',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.wait.send_retry',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'do_not_duplicate_send; poll supervisor_state',
                ownerApproval: 'none',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.readOnly,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.pendingSendRetry'],
                nextPollMs: 1800,
                stopConditions: ['WAIT_PENDING_PROOF', 'WAIT_GENERATING', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT']
            },
            BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP: {
                branchId: 'hard_stop_owner_review',
                n8nBranch: 'halt_workflow_notify_owner',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.emergency_stop',
                recommendedCommand: 'resume',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('resume'),
                automationPolicy: 'never auto-resume without owner approval',
                ownerApproval: 'required',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.browserWide,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.emergencyStopped', 'control.emergencyStop'],
                nextPollMs: 0,
                stopConditions: ['owner_approval_received']
            },
            BLOCKED_GLOBAL_SNOOZE: {
                branchId: 'global_snooze_wait',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_until_snooze_expires_or_owner_clears',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.global_snooze',
                recommendedCommand: 'clear_snooze',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('clear_snooze'),
                automationPolicy: 'wait by default; clear only with owner/supervisor policy',
                ownerApproval: 'recommended',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.browserWide,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.globalSnoozed'],
                nextPollMs: 60000,
                stopConditions: ['BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'READY_TO_CONTINUE']
            },
            BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF: {
                branchId: 'global_off_owner_policy',
                n8nBranch: 'halt_or_set_global_with_owner_policy',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.global_off',
                recommendedCommand: 'set_global',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('set_global'),
                automationPolicy: 'do not auto-enable unless this lane is explicitly authorized',
                ownerApproval: 'required unless pre-authorized automation profile',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.browserWide,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.globalRaw', 'control.globalEnabled'],
                nextPollMs: 0,
                stopConditions: ['owner_approval_received']
            },
            BLOCKED_SCOPE: {
                branchId: 'scope_blocked_route_owner_decision',
                n8nBranch: 'ask_owner_or_route_to_only_this_chat',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.scope',
                recommendedCommand: 'only_this_chat',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('only_this_chat'),
                automationPolicy: 'do not change scope unless route explicitly owns this chat',
                ownerApproval: 'required unless target route has pre-approved chat ownership',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.currentChat,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.scopeMode', 'evidence.allowedByScope', 'evidence.scopeReason'],
                nextPollMs: 0,
                stopConditions: ['owner_approval_received', 'route_has_preapproved_chat_ownership']
            },
            BLOCKED_DRAFT: {
                branchId: 'draft_protection_halt',
                n8nBranch: 'halt_notify_owner_preserve_draft',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.draft_present',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'never overwrite draft automatically',
                ownerApproval: 'required to clear/send/save draft outside this script',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.readOnly,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.composerDraftPresent'],
                nextPollMs: 0,
                stopConditions: ['draft_cleared_by_user']
            },
            BLOCKED_HIDDEN_PAUSED: {
                branchId: 'background_policy_block',
                n8nBranch: 'set_background_allowed_if_policy_allows',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.hidden_paused',
                recommendedCommand: 'set_background_allowed',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('set_background_allowed'),
                automationPolicy: 'enable only for approved automation profile',
                ownerApproval: 'recommended',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.browserWide,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.visibility', 'evidence.backgroundAllowed'],
                nextPollMs: 0,
                stopConditions: ['background_allowed', 'tab_visible']
            },
            BLOCKED_CONVERSATION_LOCKED: {
                branchId: 'conversation_lock_wait_or_unlock',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_or_unlock_with_owner_policy',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.blocked.conversation_locked',
                recommendedCommand: 'unlock',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('unlock'),
                automationPolicy: 'wait by default; unlock only if loop lock is known stale',
                ownerApproval: 'recommended',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.currentChat,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'runtime.locked'],
                nextPollMs: 30000,
                stopConditions: ['lock_expired', 'owner_approved_unlock']
            },
            PAGE_UNREADABLE: {
                branchId: 'page_unreadable_recover',
                n8nBranch: 'repair_runtime_or_refresh_policy',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.page.unreadable',
                recommendedCommand: 'repair_runtime',
                commandRisk: getControlCommandRisk('repair_runtime'),
                automationPolicy: 'repair runtime is local-only; page refresh is outside this API and needs supervisor policy',
                ownerApproval: 'recommended before browser-level refresh',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.currentChat,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.readError'],
                nextPollMs: 5000,
                stopConditions: ['page_state_readable']
            },
            WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION: {
                branchId: 'watch_no_safe_action',
                n8nBranch: 'wait_dom_recovery_or_notify',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.watch.no_safe_action',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'observe only; do not broaden selectors',
                ownerApproval: 'none for polling; required for script changes',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.readOnly,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'evidence.composerPresent', 'evidence.continueButton', 'evidence.safeSendButton'],
                nextPollMs: 5000,
                stopConditions: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT']
            },
            IDLE_ALLOWED: {
                branchId: 'idle_allowed_observe',
                n8nBranch: 'observe_or_wait_for_next_turn',
                askRouterIntent: 'chatgpt.idle.allowed',
                recommendedCommand: '',
                commandRisk: 'read-only',
                automationPolicy: 'observe; no safe action needed now',
                ownerApproval: 'none',
                targetPolicy: targetPolicy.readOnly,
                evidenceKeys: ['stateCode', 'decision', 'evidence.allowedByScope'],
                nextPollMs: 5000,
                stopConditions: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', 'BLOCKED_*']
            }
        };
        return routes;
    }

    function buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile = null) {
        const routes = buildSupervisorRouteDefinitions();
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_ROUTE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            routeTableVersion: '2026.05.04.192.release-gated-supervisor-validation-v1',
            profile: normalizeText(profile || config.supervisorRouteProfile || 'n8n-ask-router-template-v1'),
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Stable machine routing table for n8n, ASK_ROUTER, Nexusync, and Codex supervisors. Branch on stateCode, not panel text.',
            states: Object.keys(routes),
            routes,
            supervisorCommands: ['supervisor_state', 'route_plan', 'can_run', 'evidence_packet', 'release_gate', 'automation_gate', 'schema_validation_summary', 'supervisor_template_pack', 'n8n_workflow_template', 'ask_router_template', 'nexusync_evidence_schema', 'codex_minimal_handoff', 'supervisor_schema_fixtures', 'smoke_test_templates', 'schema_validation_pack'],
            invariants: {
                textFree: true,
                noNetworkListener: true,
                pageLocalOnly: true,
                noGeometryFallback: true,
                emergencyStopOverridesEverything: true,
                draftProtectionIsHardStop: true,
                storageSendRiskRequiresTarget: config.externalControlRequireTargetForStorageMutations !== false
            },
            n8nPattern: {
                poll: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.routePlan('n8n-poll')`,
                branchField: 'routePlan.route.branchId',
                stateField: 'routePlan.stateCode',
                preflight: 'canRun(command, args, transport) before mutating commands',
                evidence: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('before-command')`,
                result: 'listen for cgpt-auto-continue:result or poll evidencePacket() again after command'
            },
            askRouterPattern: {
                input: ['stateCode', 'route.askRouterIntent', 'severity', 'recommendedCommand', 'target.conversationId'],
                output: ['decision', 'commandEnvelope?', 'ownerApprovalRequired?', 'evidencePacket'],
                rule: 'Do not infer permission from natural language. Use route.automationPolicy and canRun.'
            },
            templates: {
                pack: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorTemplatePack()`,
                n8n: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.n8nWorkflowTemplate()`,
                askRouter: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.askRouterTemplate()`,
                nexusync: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncEvidenceSchema()`,
                codex: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.codexMinimalHandoff()`
            }
        };
    }

    function getSupervisorRouteForState(stateCode) {
        const routes = buildSupervisorRouteDefinitions();
        return routes[stateCode] || routes.IDLE_ALLOWED;
    }

    function buildSupervisorRoutePlan(reason = 'manual-route-plan') {
        const supervisor = buildSupervisorStatePayload(`route_plan:${reason}`);
        const validationGate = buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(`route_plan:${reason}`);
        const route = getSupervisorRouteForState(supervisor.stateCode);
        const command = route.recommendedCommand || supervisor.recommendedCommand || '';
        const args = command === 'set_background_allowed' ? { allowed: true, source: 'supervisor-route-plan' }
            : command === 'set_global' ? { enabled: true, source: 'supervisor-route-plan' }
            : command ? { source: 'supervisor-route-plan' }
            : {};
        const transport = command === 'continue_now' || route.commandRisk === 'send-risk-current-tab' ? 'event' : 'event';
        const canRun = command ? buildCanRunPayload(command, Object.assign({}, args, { targetTabId: supervisor.target.tabId, targetConversationId: supervisor.target.conversationId }), transport) : null;
        const requestId = `route-${Date.now().toString(36)}`;
        const eventDetail = command ? {
            requestId,
            command,
            args,
            targetTabId: supervisor.target.tabId,
            targetConversationId: supervisor.target.conversationId,
            ts: Date.now(),
            expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS
        } : null;
        const storageEnvelope = eventDetail ? Object.assign({}, eventDetail, { storageKey: CONTROL_STORAGE_COMMAND_KEY }) : null;
        const ownerApprovalRequired = /required/i.test(route.ownerApproval || '') || (canRun && getControlCommandRisk(command) !== 'read-only' && command !== 'continue_now' && route.automationPolicy.includes('owner'));
        const canDispatch = !!(command && canRun && canRun.accepted && validationGate.routeDispatchAllowed && (supervisor.shouldAct || route.automationPolicy.startsWith('wait') === false) && !supervisor.blockers.length);
        const autoExecutable = !!(canDispatch && !ownerApprovalRequired);
        const nextPollMs = Number(route.nextPollMs || 2500);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_route_plan.v2',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            profile: config.supervisorRouteProfile || 'n8n-ask-router-v1',
            stateCode: supervisor.stateCode,
            severity: supervisor.severity,
            route,
            target: supervisor.target,
            recommendedCommand: command,
            commandRisk: command ? getControlCommandRisk(command) : 'read-only',
            branchId: route.branchId || '',
            n8nBranchId: route.n8nBranch || '',
            askRouterIntent: route.askRouterIntent || '',
            nextPollMs,
            canDispatch,
            autoExecutable,
            canRun,
            validationGate: {
                schema: validationGate.schema,
                decision: validationGate.decision,
                routeDispatchAllowed: validationGate.routeDispatchAllowed,
                failCount: validationGate.failCount,
                failedIds: validationGate.failedIds
            },
            ownerApprovalRequired: !!ownerApprovalRequired,
            eventDetail,
            storageEnvelope,
            n8nBranch: {
                branchId: route.branchId,
                nodeHint: route.n8nBranch,
                nextPollMs: route.nextPollMs,
                stopConditions: route.stopConditions
            },
            askRouter: {
                intent: route.askRouterIntent,
                policy: route.automationPolicy,
                evidenceKeys: route.evidenceKeys
            },
            supervisor: {
                stateCode: supervisor.stateCode,
                recommendedAction: supervisor.recommendedAction,
                shouldAct: supervisor.shouldAct,
                blockers: supervisor.blockers,
                warnings: supervisor.warnings,
                evidence: supervisor.evidence
            }
        };
    }


    function buildN8nWorkflowTemplate(profile = 'n8n-supervisor-template') {
        const routeTable = buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile);
        const routePlan = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`template:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.n8n_workflow_template.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            templateKind: 'pseudo_n8n_workflow_spec',
            purpose: 'Low-token supervisor skeleton for controlling one ChatGPT tab through the page-local Auto Continue API. It is a design template, not an imported active workflow.',
            branchField: 'routePlan.route.branchId',
            stateField: 'routePlan.stateCode',
            evidencePolicy: {
                beforeCommand: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('n8n-before-command')`,
                afterCommand: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('n8n-after-command')`,
                containsPromptText: false,
                archiveHashesOnlyIfSupervisorNeedsDedup: true,
                doNotScrapeConversationText: true
            },
            nodes: [
                { id: 'poll_route_plan', type: 'browser.evaluate', action: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.routePlan('n8n-poll')`, output: 'routePlan' },
                { id: 'switch_state', type: 'switch', field: 'routePlan.route.branchId', routes: Object.keys(routeTable.routes).map((stateCode) => ({ stateCode, branchId: routeTable.routes[stateCode].branchId })) },
                { id: 'archive_before', type: 'evidence.archive', action: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('before-command')`, output: 'beforeEvidence' },
                { id: 'can_run', type: 'browser.evaluate', action: 'return routePlan.recommendedCommand ? window.__cgptAutoContinueAPI.canRun(routePlan.recommendedCommand, routePlan.eventDetail || {}, "event") : {accepted:false, reason:"no-command"}', output: 'canRun' },
                { id: 'dispatch_command', type: 'browser.dispatchEvent', guard: 'canRun.accepted === true && routePlan.autoExecutable === true', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, detailFrom: 'routePlan.eventDetail' },
                { id: 'wait_after_command', type: 'wait', ms: 'routePlan.nextPollMs || 2500' },
                { id: 'archive_after', type: 'evidence.archive', action: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('after-command')`, output: 'afterEvidence' },
                { id: 'owner_handoff', type: 'manual_review', guard: 'routePlan.ownerApprovalRequired === true || canRun.accepted !== true || routePlan.autoExecutable !== true', action: 'show routePlan.blockers/warnings and stopConditions to owner' }
            ],
            stateRoutes: routeTable.routes,
            currentRoutePlanPreview: routePlan,
            stopConditions: ['BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'PAGE_UNREADABLE without successful repair', 'unknown stateCode', 'canRun.accepted !== true for mutating command'],
            invariants: ['targeted commands only for send-risk/current-chat mutations', 'never clear drafts automatically', 'emergency stop halts auto-send and artifact auto-download', 'no selector broadening from supervisor']
        };
    }

    function buildN8nNodePlan(profile = 'n8n-node-plan') {
        const template = buildN8nWorkflowTemplate(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.n8n_node_plan.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Compact node-by-node plan for n8n/Playwright/browser-control supervisors.',
            minimumNodes: template.nodes.map((node, index) => ({ order: index + 1, id: node.id, type: node.type, guard: node.guard || '', output: node.output || '', action: node.action || node.event || '' })),
            branchPolicy: {
                ready: ['READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT'],
                wait: ['WAIT_GENERATING', 'WAIT_PENDING_PROOF', 'WAIT_SEND_RETRY', 'IDLE_ALLOWED', 'WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION'],
                haltOwner: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'BLOCKED_SCOPE'],
                repairable: ['PAGE_UNREADABLE', 'BLOCKED_CONVERSATION_LOCKED', 'BLOCKED_HIDDEN_PAUSED', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_SNOOZE']
            },
            recommendedLoop: ['routePlan', 'evidence before', 'canRun', 'targeted event command', 'wait', 'evidence after', 'routePlan again'],
            nonGoals: ['Do not parse panel text', 'Do not scrape full conversation', 'Do not click page buttons outside this API', 'Do not override BLOCKED_DRAFT']
        };
    }

    function buildAskRouterTemplate(profile = 'ask-router-template') {
        const routeTable = buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.ask_router_template.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'ASK_ROUTER contract for turning supervisor routePlan/evidence into a safe command decision without natural-language route guessing.',
            inputContract: {
                requiredFields: ['stateCode', 'route.branchId', 'route.askRouterIntent', 'recommendedCommand', 'commandRisk', 'target.tabId', 'target.conversationId', 'canRun.accepted', 'blockers', 'warnings'],
                sourceApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.routePlan('ask-router')`,
                evidenceApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('ask-router')`,
                textPolicy: 'containsPromptText must be false; ASK_ROUTER should never require full conversation text for this lane.'
            },
            outputContract: {
                requiredFields: ['decision', 'reasonCode', 'ownerApprovalRequired', 'commandEnvelope', 'evidenceRequired'],
                allowedDecisionValues: ['execute_targeted_command', 'wait_and_poll', 'halt_owner_review', 'repair_runtime_once', 'emergency_stop', 'observe_only'],
                commandEnvelopeFields: ['requestId', 'command', 'args', 'targetTabId', 'targetConversationId', 'ts', 'expiresAt']
            },
            intentMap: Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(routeTable.routes).map(([stateCode, route]) => [route.askRouterIntent, { stateCode, branchId: route.branchId, recommendedCommand: route.recommendedCommand, commandRisk: route.commandRisk, ownerApproval: route.ownerApproval, automationPolicy: route.automationPolicy }])),
            defaultRules: [
                'If BLOCKED_DRAFT, return halt_owner_review; never clear or overwrite draft automatically.',
                'If BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP, return halt_owner_review unless owner explicitly resumes.',
                'If commandRisk is send-risk-current-tab, require canRun.accepted=true and matching targetTabId or targetConversationId.',
                'If route.recommendedCommand is empty, return wait_and_poll or observe_only.',
                'If stateCode is unknown, return emergency_stop or halt_owner_review.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncEvidenceSchema(profile = 'nexusync-evidence-schema') {
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.nexusync_evidence_schema.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Text-free evidence record shape for Nexusync-style inventory, hash checking, relay, and audit handoff.',
            recordType: 'chatgpt_auto_continue_supervisor_evidence',
            requiredTopLevelFields: ['schema', 'version', 'build', 'generatedAt', 'containsPromptText', 'page', 'decision', 'routePlan', 'control', 'runtime', 'safety', 'blockers', 'warnings'],
            recommendedEnvelope: {
                nexusync_item_type: 'browser_supervisor_evidence',
                source_component: 'chatgpt_auto_continue',
                source_version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
                source_build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
                containsPromptText: false,
                evidence_before_sha256: '<hash of before evidencePacket JSON>',
                evidence_after_sha256: '<hash of after evidencePacket JSON>',
                route_state_code: '<routePlan.stateCode>',
                route_branch_id: '<routePlan.route.branchId>',
                command_request_id: '<commandEnvelope.requestId if any>',
                command_risk: '<routePlan.commandRisk>',
                owner_approval_ref: '<optional external approval reference>',
                stop_condition: '<optional stop condition if halted>'
            },
            validationRules: [
                'containsPromptText must be false.',
                'Do not store prompt bodies, user messages, cookies, localStorage raw config, or screenshots by default.',
                'For mutating commands, archive before and after evidence packets and bind them by requestId.',
                'If decision is halt_owner_review, store blocker code and owner handoff note, not conversation text.',
                'If a file artifact is downloaded, store file name and SHA256 outside this script evidence packet.'
            ],
            sampleApis: {
                before: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('nexusync-before')`,
                route: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.routePlan('nexusync-route')`,
                after: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('nexusync-after')`
            }
        };
    }

    function buildCodexMinimalHandoff(profile = 'codex-minimal-handoff') {
        const routePlan = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`codex:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.codex_minimal_handoff.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Short low-token handoff for local Codex/browser supervisor. Use API outputs; do not ask Codex to inspect DOM or infer routes.',
            currentState: {
                stateCode: routePlan.stateCode,
                branchId: routePlan.route?.branchId || '',
                recommendedCommand: routePlan.recommendedCommand || '',
                commandRisk: routePlan.commandRisk || '',
                target: routePlan.target || {},
                ownerApprovalRequired: !!routePlan.ownerApprovalRequired,
                autoExecutable: !!routePlan.autoExecutable
            },
            task: [
                `Read window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.routePlan('codex')`,
                `Archive window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('before')`,
                'Run canRun(command,args,"event") before mutating commands',
                `Send targeted ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} only when canRun.accepted=true and routePlan.autoExecutable=true`,
                `Archive window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('after') and return stateCode/branchId/requestId only`
            ],
            boundaries: ['Do not scrape conversation text', 'Do not broaden button selectors', 'Do not clear drafts', 'Do not bypass emergency stop', 'Do not use storage bridge for send-risk commands without target'],
            stopNowIf: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'unknown stateCode', 'canRun rejected', 'target mismatch', 'page unreadable after one repair attempt']
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorRunbook(profile = 'supervisor-runbook') {
        const routeTable = buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_runbook.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            purpose: 'Human/AI-readable runbook for the external supervisor lane. Prefer this over long prompt context.',
            flow: [
                '1. Wait for cgpt-auto-continue:ready or poll window.__cgptAutoContinueAPI.status().',
                '2. Read routePlan(); branch by stateCode and route.branchId.',
                '3. Archive evidencePacket("before") before any mutating command.',
                '4. Run canRun(); only send command if accepted and policy allows.',
                '5. Dispatch CustomEvent command with targetTabId/targetConversationId for current-chat or send-risk commands.',
                '6. Wait nextPollMs, archive evidencePacket("after"), then loop.',
                '7. On uncertainty, emergencyStop() or halt owner review.'
            ],
            branchSummary: Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(routeTable.routes).map(([stateCode, route]) => [stateCode, { branchId: route.branchId, command: route.recommendedCommand || '', policy: route.automationPolicy, ownerApproval: route.ownerApproval, nextPollMs: route.nextPollMs } ])),
            invariants: routeTable.invariants,
            stopConditions: ['draft present', 'emergency stop active', 'unknown state', 'target mismatch', 'unsafe submit candidate', 'selector drift requiring code change']
        };
    }

    function buildExternalSupervisorTemplatePack(profile = 'external-supervisor-template-pack') {
        const routePlan = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`templates:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile: normalizeText(profile || config.supervisorRouteProfile || 'external-supervisor-template-pack'),
            purpose: 'Practical low-coupling templates for connecting ChatGPT Auto Continue to n8n, ASK_ROUTER, Nexusync evidence inventory, and local Codex supervisors.',
            page: { url: location.href, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', tabId: TAB_ID },
            currentRoutePlan: routePlan,
            routeTable: buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile),
            n8nWorkflowTemplate: buildN8nWorkflowTemplate(profile),
            n8nNodePlan: buildN8nNodePlan(profile),
            askRouterTemplate: buildAskRouterTemplate(profile),
            nexusyncEvidenceSchema: buildNexusyncEvidenceSchema(profile),
            codexMinimalHandoff: buildCodexMinimalHandoff(profile),
            runbook: buildSupervisorRunbook(profile),
            eventBridge: {
                commandEvent: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
                resultEvent: CONTROL_RESULT_EVENT,
                readyEvent: CONTROL_READY_EVENT,
                sampleTargetedContinue: {
                    requestId: 'supervisor-continue-001',
                    command: 'continue_now',
                    targetTabId: TAB_ID,
                    targetConversationId: getConversationId() || '<conversation-id>',
                    ts: Date.now(),
                    expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS
                }
            },
            schemaFixtures: buildSupervisorSchemaFixtures(profile),
            smokeTestSummary: { availableVia: 'smokeTestTemplates()', note: 'Call separately to avoid recursive template-pack generation.' },
            safetyInvariant: 'This pack is text-free and does not grant permission. External supervisors must still apply owner policy, target matching, canRun, and emergency stop semantics.'
        };
    }

    function getStableSupervisorStateCodes() {
        return [
            'READY_TO_CONTINUE', 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', 'WAIT_GENERATING', 'WAIT_PENDING_PROOF', 'WAIT_SEND_RETRY',
            'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_SNOOZE', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'BLOCKED_SCOPE', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT',
            'BLOCKED_HIDDEN_PAUSED', 'BLOCKED_CONVERSATION_LOCKED', 'PAGE_UNREADABLE', 'WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION', 'IDLE_ALLOWED'
        ];
    }

    function hasPromptTextFlagFalse(obj) {
        return !!obj && typeof obj === 'object' && obj.containsPromptText === false;
    }

    function buildSupervisorSchemaFixtures(profile = 'schema-fixtures') {
        const routes = buildSupervisorRouteDefinitions();
        const stableStates = getStableSupervisorStateCodes();
        const routeExpectations = Object.fromEntries(stableStates.map((stateCode) => {
            const route = routes[stateCode] || {};
            return [stateCode, {
                branchId: route.branchId || '',
                n8nBranch: route.n8nBranch || '',
                askRouterIntent: route.askRouterIntent || '',
                recommendedCommand: route.recommendedCommand || '',
                commandRisk: route.commandRisk || 'read-only',
                ownerApproval: route.ownerApproval || '',
                automationPolicy: route.automationPolicy || '',
                nextPollMs: Number(route.nextPollMs) || 0
            }];
        }));
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_FIXTURE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            fixtureSetVersion: '2026.05.04.194.relay-nexusync-adapter-contract-v1',
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile: normalizeText(profile || 'schema-fixtures'),
            purpose: 'Text-free must-pass/must-fail fixtures for validating external supervisor templates before n8n/ASK_ROUTER/Nexusync/Codex consume them.',
            stableStates,
            routeExpectations,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'route-table-has-all-stable-states', type: 'route_table', expectation: 'every stable state has a route definition' },
                { id: 'ready-native-continue-targeted', stateCode: 'READY_TO_CONTINUE', expectedBranchId: 'auto_continue_native_button', expectedCommand: 'continue_now', expectedRisk: 'send-risk-current-tab' },
                { id: 'ready-prompt-submit-targeted', stateCode: 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', expectedBranchId: 'auto_continue_prompt_submit', expectedCommand: 'continue_now', expectedRisk: 'send-risk-current-tab' },
                { id: 'wait-generating-do-not-send', stateCode: 'WAIT_GENERATING', expectedCommand: '', expectedPolicyContains: 'do_not_send' },
                { id: 'blocked-draft-hard-stop', stateCode: 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', expectedCommand: '', expectedNextPollMs: 0, expectedPolicyContains: 'never overwrite draft' },
                { id: 'emergency-stop-owner-gated', stateCode: 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', expectedCommand: 'resume', expectedOwnerApprovalContains: 'required' },
                { id: 'page-unreadable-repairable', stateCode: 'PAGE_UNREADABLE', expectedCommand: 'repair_runtime', expectedBranchId: 'page_unreadable_recover' },
                { id: 'n8n-template-is-pseudo-not-active-import', template: 'n8nWorkflowTemplate', expectedTemplateKind: 'pseudo_n8n_workflow_spec' },
                { id: 'ask-router-has-output-contract', template: 'askRouterTemplate', expectedField: 'outputContract.requiredFields' },
                { id: 'nexusync-evidence-is-text-free', template: 'nexusyncEvidenceSchema', expectedContainsPromptText: false },
                { id: 'codex-handoff-stops-on-draft-and-emergency', template: 'codexMinimalHandoff', expectedStopNowIf: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP'] }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'unknown-state-must-not-route-to-send', stateCode: 'UNKNOWN_STATE', forbiddenCommand: 'continue_now', expectedDecision: 'reject_unknown_state' },
                { id: 'blocked-draft-must-not-have-command', stateCode: 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', forbiddenCommand: 'continue_now', expectedDecision: 'halt_owner_review' },
                { id: 'emergency-stop-must-not-auto-resume', stateCode: 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', forbiddenAutoExecutable: true, expectedDecision: 'owner_approval_required' },
                { id: 'send-risk-storage-command-must-have-target', command: 'continue_now', transport: 'storage', missingTarget: true, expectedReason: 'target-required' },
                { id: 'evidence-packet-must-not-contain-prompt-text', containsPromptText: true, expectedDecision: 'reject_evidence' },
                { id: 'n8n-template-must-not-be-active-import', templateKind: 'active_n8n_workflow_import', expectedDecision: 'reject_template_kind' },
                { id: 'selector-broadening-must-not-be-a-supervisor-action', requestedAction: 'broaden_button_selector', expectedDecision: 'owner_code_review_required' }
            ],
            safetyInvariants: [
                'Fixtures are text-free and do not inspect prompt/user bodies.',
                'send-risk-current-tab commands require targetTabId or targetConversationId outside direct in-page owner interaction.',
                'BLOCKED_DRAFT and BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP are hard stops for external supervisors.',
                'n8n template is pseudo spec only; not an active importable workflow.',
                'Template smoke tests validate route contracts, not real browser clicks.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function addSmokeTest(results, id, ok, details = '', severity = 'must-pass') {
        results.push({ id, ok: !!ok, severity, details: String(details || '').slice(0, 360) });
    }

    function buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(profile = 'schema-validation-summary') {
        const results = [];
        const stableStates = getStableSupervisorStateCodes();
        const routes = buildSupervisorRouteDefinitions();
        const hasAllStableRoutes = stableStates.every((state) => !!routes[state]);
        const blockedStates = ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'BLOCKED_SCOPE'];
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-has-all-stable-routes', hasAllStableRoutes, `stableStates=${stableStates.length}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-blocked-states-do-not-send', blockedStates.every((state) => (routes[state]?.recommendedCommand || '') !== 'continue_now'), 'blocked states must never recommend continue_now');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-draft-hard-stop', !routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.recommendedCommand && Number(routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.nextPollMs || 0) === 0 && /never overwrite/i.test(routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.automationPolicy || ''), routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.automationPolicy || 'missing');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-emergency-stop-owner-gated', /required/i.test(routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.ownerApproval || '') && routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.recommendedCommand === 'resume', routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.ownerApproval || 'missing');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-ready-routes-use-targeted-continue', routes.READY_TO_CONTINUE?.recommendedCommand === 'continue_now' && routes.READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT?.recommendedCommand === 'continue_now', 'ready states should only dispatch after canRun target check');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-storage-continue-needs-target', buildCanRunPayload('continue_now', { ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS }, 'storage').accepted === false, 'storage continue_now without target must be rejected');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-template-schema-current', SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA === 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_templates.v3', SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'summary-fixture-schema-current', SUPERVISOR_FIXTURE_SCHEMA === 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_template_fixtures.v2', SUPERVISOR_FIXTURE_SCHEMA);
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_schema_validation_summary.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile: normalizeText(profile || 'schema-validation-summary'),
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            routeDispatchAllowed: failed.length === 0,
            failCount: failed.length,
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            rule: 'This compact validation summary is non-recursive and safe to embed inside routePlan/evidence/releaseGate. A hold blocks external supervisor dispatch but does not alter local owner UI state.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorTemplateSmokeTestResults(profile = 'template-smoke-test') {
        const results = [];
        const stableStates = getStableSupervisorStateCodes();
        const routeTable = buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile);
        const routes = routeTable.routes || {};
        const n8nTemplate = buildN8nWorkflowTemplate(profile);
        const n8nNodePlan = buildN8nNodePlan(profile);
        const askTemplate = buildAskRouterTemplate(profile);
        const nexusyncSchema = buildNexusyncEvidenceSchema(profile);
        const codexHandoff = buildCodexMinimalHandoff(profile);
        const fixtures = buildSupervisorSchemaFixtures(profile);

        addSmokeTest(results, 'route-table-has-all-stable-states', stableStates.every((state) => !!routes[state]), `states=${stableStates.length}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'route-table-has-no-extra-active-send-for-blocked-states', ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'BLOCKED_GLOBAL_OFF', 'BLOCKED_SCOPE'].every((state) => (routes[state]?.recommendedCommand || '') !== 'continue_now'), 'blocked states must not recommend continue_now');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'ready-routes-use-targeted-continue', routes.READY_TO_CONTINUE?.recommendedCommand === 'continue_now' && routes.READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT?.recommendedCommand === 'continue_now', 'READY states should route to continue_now');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'blocked-draft-is-hard-stop', !routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.recommendedCommand && Number(routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.nextPollMs || 0) === 0 && /never overwrite/i.test(routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.automationPolicy || ''), routes.BLOCKED_DRAFT?.automationPolicy || '');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'emergency-stop-requires-owner-approval', /required/i.test(routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.ownerApproval || '') && routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.recommendedCommand === 'resume', routes.BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP?.ownerApproval || '');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'route-table-is-text-free', hasPromptTextFlagFalse(routeTable), `containsPromptText=${routeTable.containsPromptText}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'n8n-template-is-pseudo-spec', n8nTemplate.templateKind === 'pseudo_n8n_workflow_spec' && hasPromptTextFlagFalse(n8nTemplate), n8nTemplate.templateKind || 'missing');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'n8n-template-has-minimum-nodes', ['poll_route_plan', 'switch_state', 'can_run', 'dispatch_command', 'owner_handoff'].every((id) => (n8nTemplate.nodes || []).some((node) => node.id === id)), `nodes=${(n8nTemplate.nodes || []).length}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'n8n-node-plan-is-low-token', (n8nNodePlan.minimumNodes || []).length >= 6 && hasPromptTextFlagFalse(n8nNodePlan), `minimumNodes=${(n8nNodePlan.minimumNodes || []).length}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'ask-router-contract-has-required-fields', Array.isArray(askTemplate.inputContract?.requiredFields) && askTemplate.inputContract.requiredFields.includes('stateCode') && askTemplate.outputContract?.requiredFields?.includes('decision'), 'ASK_ROUTER input/output required fields present');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'nexusync-schema-is-text-free-and-hashable', hasPromptTextFlagFalse(nexusyncSchema) && nexusyncSchema.requiredTopLevelFields?.includes('containsPromptText') && /SHA256|hash/i.test(JSON.stringify(nexusyncSchema.recommendedEnvelope || {})), 'Nexusync evidence schema uses text-free hash envelope');
