        addSmokeTest(results, 'codex-handoff-has-hard-stops', hasPromptTextFlagFalse(codexHandoff) && codexHandoff.stopNowIf?.includes('BLOCKED_DRAFT') && codexHandoff.stopNowIf?.includes('BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP'), 'Codex handoff includes hard stop states');
        addSmokeTest(results, 'template-pack-carries-fixtures', SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA === 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_templates.v3' && !!fixtures.mustPass?.length && !!fixtures.mustFail?.length, `schema=${SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA}`);
        addSmokeTest(results, 'must-fail-send-risk-storage-needs-target', buildCanRunPayload('continue_now', { ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS }, 'storage').accepted === false, 'storage continue_now without target should be rejected');

        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_template_smoke_results.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile: normalizeText(profile || 'template-smoke-test'),
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            summary: failed.length ? `${failed.length}/${results.length} smoke test(s) failed` : `${results.length}/${results.length} smoke tests passed`,
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            results,
            fixtures,
            nextStep: failed.length ? 'Do not hand this template pack to external automation until failed smoke tests are fixed.' : 'Safe to hand text-free supervisor templates to external automation for dry-run integration.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSchemaValidationPack(profile = 'schema-validation-pack') {
        const smoke = buildSupervisorTemplateSmokeTestResults(profile);
        const fixtures = buildSupervisorSchemaFixtures(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_schema_validation_pack.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile: normalizeText(profile || 'schema-validation-pack'),
            decision: smoke.decision,
            smokeSummary: smoke.summary,
            schemas: {
                controlApi: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
                automationContract: AUTOMATION_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
                supervisorState: SUPERVISOR_STATE_SCHEMA,
                supervisorRoutes: SUPERVISOR_ROUTE_SCHEMA,
                supervisorTemplates: SUPERVISOR_TEMPLATE_SCHEMA,
                supervisorFixtures: SUPERVISOR_FIXTURE_SCHEMA
            },
            fixtures,
            smokeResults: smoke.results,
            supervisorTemplatePack: buildExternalSupervisorTemplatePack(profile),
            validationBoundaries: [
                'This validation pack is read-only and text-free.',
                'It validates template shape and route semantics only; it does not execute browser clicks or send prompts.',
                'External supervisors should run smokeTestTemplates() before using n8nWorkflowTemplate()/askRouterTemplate()/nexusyncEvidenceSchema().',
                'Any failed smoke test should block handoff to n8n/Codex automation until fixed.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorEvidencePacket(reason = 'manual-evidence') {
        const routePlan = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`evidence:${reason}`);
        const validationGate = buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(`evidence:${reason}`);
        const ai = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(`evidence:${reason}`);
        const history = Array.isArray(state.supervisorStateHistory) ? state.supervisorStateHistory.slice(0, 8) : [];
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_evidence_packet.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            page: ai.page,
            decision: ai.decision,
            statusText: ai.statusText,
            routePlan,
            templateValidation: {
                schema: validationGate.schema,
                decision: validationGate.decision,
                routeDispatchAllowed: validationGate.routeDispatchAllowed,
                failCount: validationGate.failCount,
                failedIds: validationGate.failedIds
            },
            control: ai.control,
            runtime: ai.runtime,
            safety: ai.safety,
            blockers: ai.blockers,
            warnings: ai.warnings,
            supervisorHistory: history,
            evidencePolicy: {
                archiveBeforeCommand: true,
                archiveAfterCommand: true,
                doNotIncludeConversationText: true,
                doNotScrapePromptBodies: true,
                useTargetedCommands: true,
                emergencyStopOnUncertainState: true
            },
            n8nHandoff: {
                branchField: 'routePlan.n8nBranch.branchId',
                stateField: 'routePlan.stateCode',
                commandEnvelopeField: 'routePlan.eventDetail',
                canRunField: 'routePlan.canRun.accepted',
                evidenceField: 'this packet JSON',
                templateValidationField: 'templateValidation.decision'
            }
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(reason = 'manual-automation-gate') {
        const routePlan = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`automation_gate:${reason}`);
        const validationGate = buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(`automation_gate:${reason}`);
        const releaseGate = buildReleaseGatePayload();
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (validationGate.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('schema-validation-hold');
        if (releaseGate.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('release-gate-hold');
        if (routePlan.validationGate?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('route-plan-validation-hold');
        if (routePlan.canRun && routePlan.canRun.accepted === false) warnings.push(`canRun:${routePlan.canRun.reason || 'not-accepted'}`);
        if (routePlan.ownerApprovalRequired) warnings.push('owner-approval-required');
        const commandReady = !!(routePlan.recommendedCommand && routePlan.canDispatch && !blockers.length);
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : commandReady ? 'ready' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'observe';
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_automation_gate.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            decision,
            commandReady,
            routeDispatchAllowed: validationGate.routeDispatchAllowed && releaseGate.decision !== 'hold',
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)),
            routePlan,
            validationGate,
            releaseGate: {
                decision: releaseGate.decision,
                blockers: releaseGate.blockers || [],
                warnings: releaseGate.warnings || [],
                summary: releaseGate.summary || {}
            },
            eventDetail: commandReady ? routePlan.eventDetail : null,
            evidencePolicy: {
                archiveBeforeCommand: true,
                archiveAfterCommand: true,
                stopIfDecisionHold: true,
                stopIfSchemaValidationHold: true,
                stopIfReleaseGateHold: true,
                doNotParsePanelText: true,
                doNotScrapeConversationText: true
            }
        };
    }


    function mapStateToCompactDecision(stateCode, routePlan, gateDecision = '') {
        const code = String(stateCode || 'IDLE_ALLOWED');
        if (gateDecision === 'hold') return 'hold_gate';
        if (code === 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP') return 'halt_emergency_stop';
        if (code === 'BLOCKED_DRAFT') return 'halt_preserve_draft';
        if (code.startsWith('BLOCKED_')) return routePlan?.ownerApprovalRequired ? 'halt_owner_policy' : 'blocked_repair_or_wait';
        if (code.startsWith('WAIT_')) return 'wait_poll';
        if (code === 'PAGE_UNREADABLE') return 'repair_once_or_halt';
        if (code === 'READY_TO_CONTINUE' || code === 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT') return routePlan?.autoExecutable ? 'dispatch_targeted_command' : 'ready_but_not_auto_executable';
        if (code === 'WATCH_NO_SAFE_ACTION') return 'observe_poll';
        return 'observe_poll';
    }

    function compactEventEnvelope(eventDetail) {
        if (!eventDetail) return null;
        return {
            requestId: eventDetail.requestId || '',
            command: normalizeControlCommandName(eventDetail.command || ''),
            args: eventDetail.args || {},
            targetTabId: eventDetail.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: eventDetail.targetConversationId || '',
            ts: Number(eventDetail.ts || 0) || Date.now(),
            expiresAt: Number(eventDetail.expiresAt || 0) || (Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS)
        };
    }

    function buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason = 'compact-contract') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(`compact:${reason}`);
        const routePlan = gate.routePlan || buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`compact-fallback:${reason}`);
        const decision = mapStateToCompactDecision(routePlan.stateCode, routePlan, gate.decision);
        const commandEnvelope = gate.commandReady ? compactEventEnvelope(gate.eventDetail || routePlan.eventDetail) : null;
        const target = routePlan.target || {};
        const branchId = routePlan.branchId || routePlan.route?.branchId || '';
        const nextPollMs = Number(routePlan.nextPollMs || routePlan.route?.nextPollMs || 2500);
        return {
            schema: LOW_TOKEN_SUPERVISOR_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            stateCode: routePlan.stateCode || 'IDLE_ALLOWED',
            branchId,
            decision,
            gateDecision: gate.decision || 'unknown',
            commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
            routeDispatchAllowed: !!gate.routeDispatchAllowed,
            autoExecutable: !!routePlan.autoExecutable,
            ownerApprovalRequired: !!routePlan.ownerApprovalRequired,
            command: routePlan.recommendedCommand || '',
            commandRisk: routePlan.commandRisk || 'read-only',
            target: { tabId: target.tabId || TAB_ID, conversationId: target.conversationId || getConversationId() || '' },
            nextPollMs,
            commandEnvelope,
            canRun: routePlan.canRun ? { accepted: !!routePlan.canRun.accepted, reasons: routePlan.canRun.reasons || [], risk: routePlan.canRun.risk || routePlan.commandRisk || '' } : null,
            n8n: {
                switchField: 'contract.branchId',
                branchId,
                action: decision,
                nextPollMs,
                eventField: 'contract.commandEnvelope',
                evidenceBeforeApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncMinimalEvidence('before')`,
                evidenceAfterApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncMinimalEvidence('after')`
            },
            askRouter: {
                inputSchema: LOW_TOKEN_SUPERVISOR_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
                intent: routePlan.askRouterIntent || routePlan.askRouter?.intent || '',
                decision,
                outputDecisionValues: ['dispatch_targeted_command', 'wait_poll', 'halt_preserve_draft', 'halt_emergency_stop', 'halt_owner_policy', 'repair_once_or_halt', 'observe_poll', 'hold_gate']
            },
            nexusync: {
                recordType: 'chatgpt_auto_continue_compact_supervisor_contract',
                hashRecommended: true,
                beforeAfterPair: !!commandEnvelope,
                requiredFields: ['schema', 'version', 'build', 'stateCode', 'branchId', 'decision', 'containsPromptText', 'target', 'commandRisk']
            },
            codex: {
                minimalInstruction: commandEnvelope ? 'Archive compact evidence, dispatch the targeted commandEnvelope once, wait nextPollMs, archive after evidence.' : 'Do not dispatch; branch by decision and poll or hand off to owner.',
                stopIf: ['containsPromptText !== false', 'decision starts with halt_', 'gateDecision === hold', 'canRun.accepted !== true for commandEnvelope', 'target mismatch']
            },
            blockers: (gate.blockers || routePlan.supervisor?.blockers || []).slice(0, 10),
            warnings: (gate.warnings || routePlan.supervisor?.warnings || []).slice(0, 10),
            policy: {
                textFree: true,
                doNotParsePanelText: true,
                doNotScrapeConversationText: true,
                requireTargetForSendRisk: true,
                emergencyStopDominates: true,
                preserveDrafts: true
            }
        };
    }

    function buildN8nBranchContract(reason = 'n8n-branch-contract') {
        const contract = buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.n8n_branch_contract.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            contract,
            switch: {
                field: 'contract.branchId',
                currentValue: contract.branchId,
                defaultBranch: 'owner_review_or_observe',
                branches: {
                    auto_continue_native_button: 'dispatch_if_commandEnvelope_and_canRun_true',
                    auto_continue_prompt_submit: 'dispatch_if_commandEnvelope_and_canRun_true',
                    wait_generation_finish: 'wait_poll',
                    wait_submit_proof: 'wait_or_repair_if_stale_policy_allows',
                    wait_send_retry: 'wait_poll',
                    hard_stop_owner_review: 'halt_owner_review',
                    composer_draft_present: 'halt_preserve_draft',
                    page_unreadable_recover: 'repair_once_then_repoll',
                    no_safe_action_watch: 'observe_poll'
                }
            },
            nodePlanCompact: [
                { id: 'read_contract', type: 'browser.evaluate', expr: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.compactContract('n8n')` },
                { id: 'switch_branch', type: 'switch', field: 'contract.branchId' },
                { id: 'archive_before', type: 'evidence.archive', expr: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncMinimalEvidence('before')` },
                { id: 'dispatch', type: 'browser.dispatchEvent', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, detailFrom: 'contract.commandEnvelope', guard: 'contract.decision === "dispatch_targeted_command" && contract.commandEnvelope' },
                { id: 'wait', type: 'wait', msFrom: 'contract.nextPollMs' },
                { id: 'archive_after', type: 'evidence.archive', expr: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncMinimalEvidence('after')` }
            ],
            stopConditions: contract.codex.stopIf
        };
    }

    function buildAskRouterBranchContract(reason = 'ask-router-branch-contract') {
        const contract = buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.ask_router_branch_contract.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            input: contract,
            output: {
                decision: contract.decision,
                reasonCode: contract.stateCode,
                ownerApprovalRequired: contract.ownerApprovalRequired,
                commandEnvelope: contract.commandEnvelope,
                evidenceRequired: !!contract.commandEnvelope,
                nextPollMs: contract.nextPollMs
            },
            rules: [
                'If contract.gateDecision is hold, return hold_gate and do not dispatch.',
                'If contract.decision is halt_preserve_draft, never clear or overwrite the composer.',
                'If contract.decision is halt_emergency_stop, only owner may resume.',
                'If commandRisk is send-risk-current-tab, require target and canRun.accepted=true.',
                'If commandEnvelope is null, do not synthesize one from natural language.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncMinimalEvidence(reason = 'nexusync-minimal') {

            blockers: contract.blockers,
            warnings: contract.warnings,
            hashFields: ['schema', 'version', 'build', 'generatedAt', 'stateCode', 'branchId', 'decision', 'target', 'commandRisk'],
            pairHint: contract.commandEnvelope ? { archiveBefore: true, archiveAfter: true, requestId: contract.commandEnvelope.requestId } : { archiveBefore: false, archiveAfter: false },
            policy: contract.policy
        };
    }

    function buildNextCommandEnvelope(reason = 'next-command-envelope') {
        const contract = buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason);

            target: contract.target,

        };
    }

    function getRelayAdapterBase(reason = 'relay-adapter') {
        const contract = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`relay:${reason}`);
        const evidence = buildNexusyncMinimalEvidence(`relay:${reason}`);
        const envelope = buildNextCommandEnvelope(`relay:${reason}`);
        const canonical = {
            schema: RELAY_ADAPTER_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            reason,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            stateCode: contract.stateCode,
            branchId: contract.branchId,
            decision: contract.decision,
            gateDecision: contract.gateDecision,
            commandReady: !!contract.commandEnvelope,
            commandRisk: contract.commandRisk,
            target: contract.target,
            nextPollMs: contract.nextPollMs,
            requestId: contract.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
            command: contract.command || '',
            evidenceRecordType: evidence.recordType,
            policy: {
                textFree: true,
                relayDoesNotAuthorizeExecution: true,
                externalSha256Required: true,
                targetAwareCommandsOnly: true,
                emergencyStopDominates: true,
                preserveDrafts: true,
                doNotScrapeConversationText: true,
                doNotInventCommandEnvelope: true
            }
        };
        const canonicalJson = JSON.stringify(canonical);
        const hint = makeBoundedSignature(canonicalJson, 12000);
        return { contract, evidence, envelope, canonical, canonicalJson, hashHint: `fnv1a:${hint.hash}`, canonicalLength: canonicalJson.length };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferAdapterContract(reason = 'webai-transfer-contract') {
        const base = getRelayAdapterBase(reason);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.webai_transfer_adapter_contract.v1',
            adapterSchema: RELAY_ADAPTER_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            purpose: 'Bridge Auto Continue supervisor state into WebAI Transfer / Nexusync / n8n without coupling those projects to panel text or ChatGPT DOM details.',
            sourceApis: {
                compactContract: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.compactContract('relay')`,
                relayEnvelope: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayEnvelope('relay')`,
                nexusyncBridgePacket: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('before')`,
                nextCommandEnvelope: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nextCommandEnvelope('relay')`,
                evidenceAfter: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('after')`
            },
            current: {
                stateCode: base.contract.stateCode,
                branchId: base.contract.branchId,
                decision: base.contract.decision,
                commandReady: !!base.contract.commandEnvelope,
                commandRisk: base.contract.commandRisk,
                target: base.contract.target,
                nextPollMs: base.contract.nextPollMs
            },
            relayProtocol: buildRelayMarkerContract(`contract:${reason}`).relayProtocol,
            compatibility: buildAdapterCompatibilityReport(`contract:${reason}`).compatibility,
            requiredExternalResponsibilities: [
                'Compute SHA256 for any source text / file bytes outside this userscript.',
                'Archive before and after evidence records in Nexusync or equivalent inventory.',
                'Dispatch only the provided commandEnvelope when canRun.accepted=true and target matches.',
                'Treat emergency stop, draft present, unknown state, and validation hold as non-dispatch branches.',
                'Never parse visible panel text or scrape conversation body text for control decisions.'
            ],
            hashHint: base.hashHint,
            canonicalLength: base.canonicalLength
        };
    }

    function buildRelayMarkerContract(reason = 'relay-marker-contract') {
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.relay_marker_contract.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            relayProtocol: {
                sourceBlockOpen: '[WEBAI_TRANSFER_SOURCE]',
                sourceBlockClose: '[/WEBAI_TRANSFER_SOURCE]',
                resultBlockOpen: '[RELAY_RESULT]',
                resultBlockClose: '[/RELAY_RESULT]',
                requiredResultFields: ['RECEIVED_TEXT_SHA256', 'RECEIVED_FILES', 'DECISION', 'NOTES'],
                recommendedDecisionValues: ['received_only', 'accepted', 'needs_target', 'hold', 'blocked', 'dispatch_done', 'evidence_archived'],
                fileHashAlgorithm: 'sha256',
                sourceTextHashAlgorithm: 'sha256',
                textPolicy: 'Do not include conversation bodies or prompt bodies in relay control packets; include compact/evidence JSON only.'
            },
            markerTemplate: [
                '[RELAY_RESULT]',
                'RECEIVED_TEXT_SHA256: <sha256 of exact source text>',
                'RECEIVED_FILES:',
                '- none | file_name: <name> sha256: <sha256>',
                'DECISION: <received_only|accepted|needs_target|hold|blocked|dispatch_done|evidence_archived>',
                'NOTES: <short text-free status>',
                '[/RELAY_RESULT]'
            ].join('\n'),
            safety: {
                noAutoExecutionFromMarker: true,
                markerIsEvidenceNotApproval: true,
                ownerApprovalStillRequiredForRiskyActions: true,
                targetAwareCommandsOnly: true,
                emergencyStopDominates: true
            }
        };
    }

    function buildRelayEnvelope(reason = 'relay-envelope') {
        const base = getRelayAdapterBase(reason);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.relay_envelope.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            relaySourceType: 'compact_supervisor_control_packet',
            relaySourceEncoding: 'json',
            relaySourceHashRequired: 'sha256_external',
            relaySourceHashHint: base.hashHint,
            markerContract: buildRelayMarkerContract(`envelope:${reason}`).relayProtocol,
            payload: {
                compactContract: base.contract,
                minimalEvidence: base.evidence,
                nextCommandEnvelope: base.envelope,
                canonicalRecord: base.canonical
            },
            handoff: {
                recommendedSourceText: 'JSON.stringify(window.__cgptAutoContinueAPI.relayEnvelope("relay"))',
                beforeEvidenceApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('before')`,
                afterEvidenceApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('after')`,
                dispatchEventName: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
                dispatchDetailField: 'payload.nextCommandEnvelope.envelope'
            },
            stopIf: [
                'containsPromptText !== false',
                'payload.compactContract.gateDecision === "hold"',
                'payload.compactContract.decision starts with halt_',
                'payload.nextCommandEnvelope.canRun.accepted !== true when envelope exists',
                'target mismatch',
                'emergency stop active'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncBridgePacket(reason = 'nexusync-bridge') {
        const base = getRelayAdapterBase(reason);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.nexusync_bridge_packet.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            recordType: 'chatgpt_auto_continue_relay_bridge_packet',
            reason,
            canonicalRecord: base.canonical,
            canonicalJsonLength: base.canonicalLength,
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', input: 'canonical JSON bytes sorted/serialized by supervisor or Nexusync adapter', inPageHint: base.hashHint },
            pair: base.contract.commandEnvelope ? { required: true, requestId: base.contract.commandEnvelope.requestId, phase: String(reason || '').includes('after') ? 'after' : 'before' } : { required: false, phase: 'observe' },
            route: { stateCode: base.contract.stateCode, branchId: base.contract.branchId, decision: base.contract.decision, nextPollMs: base.contract.nextPollMs },
            command: { ready: !!base.contract.commandEnvelope, risk: base.contract.commandRisk, envelope: base.contract.commandEnvelope || null },
            policy: base.canonical.policy,
            nexusyncIndexHints: {
                project: 'chatgpt_auto_continue',
                adapter: 'webai_transfer_browser_supervisor',
                conversationId: base.contract.target?.conversationId || '',
                tabId: base.contract.target?.tabId || '',
                branchId: base.contract.branchId,
                stateCode: base.contract.stateCode,
                requestId: base.contract.commandEnvelope?.requestId || ''
            }
        };
    }

    function buildN8nRelayBranchContract(reason = 'n8n-relay-branch') {
        const relay = buildRelayEnvelope(`n8n:${reason}`);
        const contract = relay.payload.compactContract;
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.n8n_relay_branch_contract.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            switchField: 'relay.payload.compactContract.branchId',
            currentBranchId: contract.branchId,
            currentDecision: contract.decision,
            recommendedNodes: [
                { id: 'read_relay_envelope', type: 'browser.evaluate', expr: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayEnvelope('n8n-before')`, output: 'relay' },
                { id: 'hash_and_archive_before', type: 'nexusync.archive', input: 'relay.payload.canonicalRecord', hash: 'sha256', output: 'beforeHash' },
                { id: 'switch_branch', type: 'switch', field: 'relay.payload.compactContract.branchId' },
                { id: 'guard_can_run', type: 'if', condition: 'relay.payload.nextCommandEnvelope.canRun.accepted === true && relay.payload.nextCommandEnvelope.envelope' },
                { id: 'dispatch_targeted_command', type: 'browser.dispatchEvent', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, detailFrom: 'relay.payload.nextCommandEnvelope.envelope' },
                { id: 'wait_next_poll', type: 'wait', msFrom: 'relay.payload.compactContract.nextPollMs' },
                { id: 'archive_after', type: 'nexusync.archive', expr: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('n8n-after')`, hash: 'sha256', output: 'afterHash' }
            ],
            branches: buildN8nBranchContract(`relay:${reason}`).switch.branches,
            stopConditions: relay.stopIf,
            policy: relay.payload.canonicalRecord.policy
        };
    }

    function buildCodexRelayStepCard(reason = 'codex-relay-step-card') {

            readApis: [`window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayEnvelope('codex')`, `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('before')`],
            commandEnvelope: contract.commandEnvelope || null,
            nextPollMs: contract.nextPollMs,
            evidenceAfterApi: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBridgePacket('after')`,
            returnFields: ['stateCode', 'branchId', 'decision', 'gateDecision', 'beforeHash', 'afterHash', 'requestId'],

            forbidden: ['invent command', 'scrape conversation text', 'clear draft', 'ignore emergency stop', 'use un-targeted storage command']
        };
    }

    function buildAdapterCompatibilityReport(reason = 'adapter-compatibility') {
        const modules = buildAutomationModuleRegistry();
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`compat:${reason}`);
        const missing = [];
        const need = ['control_api', 'supervisor_state_machine', 'supervisor_router', 'compact_supervisor_contract', 'relay_nexusync_adapter'];
        for (const id of need) {
            const found = modules.find((item) => item.id === id && item.status !== 'disabled');
            if (!found) missing.push(id);
        }
        if (compact.gateDecision === 'hold') missing.push('gate_not_hold');
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.adapter_compatibility_report.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            compatibility: {
                webaiTransfer: missing.length ? 'caution' : 'ready',
                nexusync: missing.length ? 'caution' : 'ready',
                n8n: missing.length ? 'caution' : 'ready',
                askRouter: missing.length ? 'caution' : 'ready',
                codex: missing.length ? 'caution' : 'ready'
            },
            modules: modules.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, status: item.status, textFree: !!item.textFree })),
            missingOrCaution: Array.from(new Set(missing)),
            current: { stateCode: compact.stateCode, branchId: compact.branchId, decision: compact.decision, gateDecision: compact.gateDecision, commandReady: compact.commandReady },
            recommendedUse: 'Prefer relayEnvelope() for transfer, nexusyncBridgePacket() for archival, n8nRelayBranchContract() for branch design, and codexRelayStepCard() for minimal local executor handoff.'
        };
    }


    // v196: Nexusync protocol-intake binding. This layer accepts an external
    // protocol descriptor supplied by Nexusync/supervisor, validates only safe
    // machine-readable binding rules, and previews the bound canonical record.
    // It still refuses to guess a protocol that was not supplied.
    function sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(value, depth = 0) {
        if (depth > 5) return '[depth-limit]';
        if (value == null || typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') return value;
        if (typeof value === 'string') return value.slice(0, 240);
        if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.slice(0, 40).map((item) => sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(item, depth + 1));
        if (typeof value === 'object') {
            const out = {};
            for (const key of Object.keys(value).slice(0, 80).sort()) {
                if (/prompt|message|body|conversationText|userText|cookie|token|secret|password/i.test(key)) {
                    out[key] = '[redacted-or-forbidden-field]';
                } else {
                    out[key] = sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(value[key], depth + 1);
                }
            }
            return out;
        }
        return String(value).slice(0, 120);
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolIntakeContract(profile = 'protocol-intake') {
        return {
            schema: NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Describe how an external Nexusync adapter should supply its actual protocol descriptor before this userscript creates a bound canonical evidence preview.',
            descriptorRequired: true,
            userscriptProtocolAssumption: 'none',
            acceptedDescriptorShape: {
                protocolName: 'string, e.g. nexusync',
                protocolVersion: 'string supplied by external Nexusync adapter',
                recordType: 'string for archive record type',
                recordPathHint: 'optional string path/index hint; not a file write by userscript',
                requiredRecordFields: 'array of field names required by adapter',
                hashFields: 'array of canonical/hash field names the adapter will populate',
                beforeAfterPairing: 'object describing before/after pair key rules',
                canonicalRules: 'object; should either match canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1 or explicitly state adapter override',
                forbiddenApprovals: 'array; should include relay_marker_as_approval',
                containsPromptText: 'must be false'
            },
            hardRules: [
                'Descriptor must be supplied by external Nexusync adapter/supervisor, not invented by this userscript.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must be false.',
                'relay marker, bridge packet, and canonical record are evidence only; never owner approval.',
                'send-risk command dispatch still requires target + canRun.accepted=true.',
                'External adapter remains authoritative for archive SHA256 and storage path.',
                'Descriptor validation is read-only and does not click, submit, download, or write files.'
            ],
            helperApis: ['nexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate', 'validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor', 'nexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate', 'nexusyncProtocolDescriptorDiff', 'nexusyncProtocolIntakeEvidence', 'nexusyncProtocolBindingPreview', 'nexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord', 'externalAdapterHandshake']
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate(profile = 'nexusync-vnext-template') {
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA}.descriptor_template`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            descriptor: {
                protocolName: 'nexusync',
                protocolVersion: '<external-adapter-supplied>',
                recordType: 'chatgpt_auto_continue_supervisor_evidence',
                recordPathHint: '<external-adapter-record-path-or-index-hint>',
                requiredRecordFields: ['schema', 'protocolVersion', 'recordType', 'canonicalJsonSha256', 'browserEvidence', 'createdAt'],
                hashFields: ['canonicalJsonSha256', 'sourceTextSha256', 'fileSha256List'],
                beforeAfterPairing: { requiredForCommandDispatch: true, pairIdField: 'beforeAfterPairId', beforeField: 'beforeEvidenceSha256', afterField: 'afterEvidenceSha256' },
                canonicalRules: { profile: 'canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1', objectKeys: 'lexicographic', arrays: 'preserve', strings: 'NFC' },
                forbiddenApprovals: ['relay_marker_as_approval', 'browser_packet_as_owner_approval'],
                commandPolicy: { sendRiskRequiresTarget: true, sendRiskRequiresCanRunAccepted: true, emergencyStopBlocksDispatch: true, blockedDraftBlocksDispatch: true },
                containsPromptText: false,
                containsUserText: false
            },
            note: 'Replace placeholder values with the real Nexusync vNext protocol supplied by the Nexusync project. Do not infer missing fields from this template.'
        };
    }

    function validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(descriptor = {}, profile = 'descriptor-validation') {
        const d = descriptor && typeof descriptor === 'object' ? descriptor : {};
        const warnings = [];
        const blockers = [];
        const requireString = (key) => { if (!normalizeText(d[key])) blockers.push(`missing:${key}`); };
        requireString('protocolName');
        requireString('protocolVersion');
        requireString('recordType');
        if (d.containsPromptText !== false) blockers.push('containsPromptText-must-be-false');
        if (d.containsUserText !== false) blockers.push('containsUserText-must-be-false');
        if (!Array.isArray(d.requiredRecordFields) || !d.requiredRecordFields.length) blockers.push('requiredRecordFields-missing');
        if (!Array.isArray(d.hashFields) || !d.hashFields.length) warnings.push('hashFields-missing-or-empty');
        const requiredFields = Array.isArray(d.requiredRecordFields) ? d.requiredRecordFields.map((x) => normalizeText(x)).filter(Boolean) : [];
        const hasSha = requiredFields.some((field) => /sha256/i.test(field));
        if (!hasSha) warnings.push('requiredRecordFields-no-sha256-field');
        const forbiddenApprovals = Array.isArray(d.forbiddenApprovals) ? d.forbiddenApprovals.join(' ').toLowerCase() : '';
        if (!forbiddenApprovals.includes('relay_marker')) warnings.push('forbiddenApprovals-should-mention-relay_marker');
        const commandPolicy = d.commandPolicy && typeof d.commandPolicy === 'object' ? d.commandPolicy : {};
        if (commandPolicy.sendRiskRequiresTarget !== true) blockers.push('sendRiskRequiresTarget-not-true');
        if (commandPolicy.sendRiskRequiresCanRunAccepted !== true) blockers.push('sendRiskRequiresCanRunAccepted-not-true');
        if (commandPolicy.emergencyStopBlocksDispatch !== true) blockers.push('emergencyStopBlocksDispatch-not-true');
        if (commandPolicy.blockedDraftBlocksDispatch !== true) blockers.push('blockedDraftBlocksDispatch-not-true');
        if (d.ownerApprovalFromRelayMarker === true || d.relayMarkerIsApproval === true) blockers.push('relay-marker-must-not-be-approval');
        if (d.commandEnvelopeSynthesisAllowed === true) blockers.push('command-envelope-synthesis-forbidden');
        if (d.untrustedCommandMutationAllowed === true) blockers.push('untrusted-command-mutation-forbidden');
        if (/prompt|message|body|conversationText|userText/i.test(JSON.stringify(Object.keys(d)))) warnings.push('descriptor-contains-text-like-field-name');
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass',
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)),
            descriptorSummary: sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(d),
            rule: 'Validation only checks safe binding constraints and required adapter-supplied fields. It does not certify the external Nexusync protocol itself.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolBindingPreview(descriptor = {}, reason = 'protocol-binding-preview') {
        const validation = validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(descriptor, reason);
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`protocol-preview:${reason}`);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA}.binding_preview`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            decision: validation.decision,
            validation,
            descriptorBound: validation.decision !== 'hold',
            protocolAssumption: 'external-descriptor-only',
            currentCompactDecision: { stateCode: compact.stateCode, branchId: compact.branchId, decision: compact.decision, commandRisk: compact.commandRisk, commandReady: compact.commandReady, target: compact.target },
            nextStep: validation.decision === 'hold' ? 'Fix descriptor before archive/dispatch.' : 'External adapter may compute canonical record sha256 and archive before/after evidence.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord(descriptor = {}, reason = 'bound-canonical-record') {
        const validation = validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(descriptor, reason);
        const basePacket = buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(`bound:${reason}`);
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`bound-compact:${reason}`);
        const record = {
            schema: NEXUSYNC_BOUND_RECORD_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            decision: validation.decision,
            protocolValidation: { decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings },
            protocolDescriptorSummary: validation.descriptorSummary,
            browserEvidence: {
                compactContract: compact,
                canonicalPacketPreviewHash: basePacket.canonicalPreviewHash,
                canonicalPacketCharLength: basePacket.canonicalCharLength,
                routePlan: buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`bound-record:${reason}`),
                gate: buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(`bound-record:${reason}`)
            },
            adapterHashRequirements: {
                externalSha256Required: true,
                authoritativeHasher: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor',
                browserHelperAvailable: !!window.crypto?.subtle,
                canonicalProfile: basePacket.canonicalProfile
            },
            dispatchPolicy: {
                routeDispatchAllowed: validation.decision !== 'hold' && compact.gateDecision !== 'hold' && compact.canRun?.accepted === true,
                sendRiskRequiresTarget: true,
                sendRiskRequiresCanRunAccepted: true,
                emergencyStopBlocksDispatch: true,
                blockedDraftBlocksDispatch: true
            }
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(record);
        return Object.assign({}, record, {
            canonicalJson,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            canonicalCharLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalHashAuthority: 'external-supervisor-or-WebCrypto-sha256'
        });
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolFixturePack(profile = 'protocol-fixtures') {
        const good = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate(profile).descriptor;
        const badNoTarget = Object.assign({}, good, { commandPolicy: Object.assign({}, good.commandPolicy, { sendRiskRequiresTarget: false }) });
        const badApproval = Object.assign({}, good, { relayMarkerIsApproval: true });
        const badText = Object.assign({}, good, { containsPromptText: true });
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-template-descriptor-passes', descriptor: good, expectDecision: 'pass' },
                { id: 'binding-preview-is-text-free', value: buildNexusyncProtocolBindingPreview(good, profile).containsPromptText === false, expect: true }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'send-risk-target-required', descriptor: badNoTarget, expectDecision: 'hold' },
                { id: 'relay-marker-not-approval', descriptor: badApproval, expectDecision: 'hold' },
                { id: 'prompt-text-flag-rejected', descriptor: badText, expectDecision: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateNexusyncProtocolFixtures(profile = 'protocol-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildNexusyncProtocolFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass) {
            const ok = item.descriptor ? validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(item.descriptor, item.id).decision === item.expectDecision : item.value === item.expect;
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok, reason: ok ? 'passed' : 'must-pass failed' });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail) {
            const decision = validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(item.descriptor, item.id).decision;
            const ok = decision === item.expectDecision;
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok, reason: ok ? 'rejected as expected' : `unexpected decision ${decision}` });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_INTAKE_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildExternalAdapterHandshake(profile = 'external-adapter-handshake') {
        const template = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.external_adapter_handshake.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            sequence: [
                { step: 1, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: `wait for ${CONTROL_READY_EVENT}` },
                { step: 2, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: `read window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.compactContract('handshake')` },
                { step: 3, actor: 'Nexusync-adapter', action: 'supply actual Nexusync protocol descriptor; do not use placeholders' },
                { step: 4, actor: 'browser-component', action: 'validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(descriptor)' },
                { step: 5, actor: 'Nexusync-adapter', action: 'if pass/caution acceptable, request nexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord(descriptor)' },
                { step: 6, actor: 'Nexusync-adapter', action: 'compute authoritative sha256 over canonicalJson and archive record' },
                { step: 7, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'only dispatch commandEnvelope when automationGate().commandReady and canRun.accepted are true' },
                { step: 8, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'archive after evidencePacket()/nexusyncMinimalEvidence() and pair before/after hashes' }
            ],
            descriptorTemplate: template.descriptor,
            stopConditions: ['validation.decision === hold', 'emergency stop active', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'canRun.accepted !== true', 'missing target for send-risk command', 'external sha256 unavailable'],
            lowTokenProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.compactContract('poll')`,
            evidenceProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord(actualDescriptor, 'before-command')`,
            note: 'This is a text-free handoff. It does not contain Nexusync secrets, prompt bodies, user messages, or approval.'
        };
    }


    // v197: Nexusync source-of-truth adoption gate. This layer does not try to
    // bind an unknown Nexusync protocol. It verifies that a supplied descriptor is
    // not merely the placeholder template, records text-free provenance/fingerprint
    // signals, and produces a low-token adoption/evidence packet for external
    // Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n/Codex supervisors.
    function buildNexusyncProtocolSourceTemplate(profile = 'protocol-source-template') {
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.source_template`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            sourceInfo: {
                sourceKind: 'external-nexusync-protocol-doc-or-adapter-output',
                sourceName: '<human-readable protocol source name>',
                protocolDocVersion: '<external protocol document version>',
                suppliedBy: '<owner-or-adapter-id>',
                suppliedAt: '<ISO timestamp from external supervisor>',
                descriptorSha256: '<sha256 of descriptor canonical JSON computed outside the browser>',
                descriptorSourceSha256: '<optional sha256 of source document / relay packet / Nexusync record>',
                sourceUriHint: '<optional non-secret path/id; never a credential>',
                ownerApprovalArtifact: 'not supplied by this userscript; relay marker is not approval'
            },
            rule: 'The userscript accepts descriptor metadata for validation only. External adapter remains source-of-truth for protocol document, archive path, and authoritative hashes.'
        };
    }

    function findDescriptorPlaceholderSignals(value, path = '$', depth = 0, out = []) {
        if (depth > 6 || out.length > 40) return out;
        if (typeof value === 'string') {
            const text = value.trim();
            if (/^<[^>]+>$/.test(text) || /placeholder|external-adapter-supplied|replace me|todo|tbd|example/i.test(text)) {
                out.push({ path, signal: text.slice(0, 120) });
            }
            return out;
        }
        if (Array.isArray(value)) {
            value.slice(0, 40).forEach((item, idx) => findDescriptorPlaceholderSignals(item, `${path}[${idx}]`, depth + 1, out));
            return out;
        }
        if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
            Object.keys(value).slice(0, 80).sort().forEach((key) => findDescriptorPlaceholderSignals(value[key], `${path}.${key}`, depth + 1, out));
        }
        return out;
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(descriptor = {}, profile = 'descriptor-fingerprint') {
        const sanitized = sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(descriptor || {});
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(sanitized);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.descriptor_fingerprint`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            canonicalProfile: 'canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1',
            previewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            canonicalCharLength: canonicalJson.length,
            keyCount: descriptor && typeof descriptor === 'object' ? Object.keys(descriptor).length : 0,
            placeholderSignals: findDescriptorPlaceholderSignals(descriptor || {}).slice(0, 20),
            note: 'previewHash is deterministic but not authoritative SHA256. External Nexusync adapter should compute canonical SHA256.'
        };
    }

    function isLikelyTemplateDescriptor(descriptor = {}) {
        try {
            const template = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate('template-compare').descriptor;
            const currentFp = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(descriptor, 'current').previewHash;
            const templateFp = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(template, 'template').previewHash;
            return currentFp === templateFp;
        } catch {
            return false;
        }
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(descriptor = {}, sourceInfo = {}, reason = 'protocol-adoption-gate') {
        const validation = validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(descriptor, reason);
        const fingerprint = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(descriptor, reason);
        const source = sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(sourceInfo || {});
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (validation.decision === 'hold') blockers.push(...(validation.blockers || []).map((item) => `descriptor:${item}`));
        if (Array.isArray(validation.warnings)) warnings.push(...validation.warnings.map((item) => `descriptor:${item}`));
        if (isLikelyTemplateDescriptor(descriptor)) blockers.push('descriptor-is-unmodified-template');
        if (fingerprint.placeholderSignals.length) blockers.push('descriptor-has-placeholder-values');
        if (!normalizeText(sourceInfo?.sourceName || sourceInfo?.sourceKind || sourceInfo?.protocolDocVersion)) warnings.push('source-info-missing-human-readable-origin');
        if (!normalizeText(sourceInfo?.descriptorSha256 || sourceInfo?.descriptorSourceSha256)) warnings.push('source-info-missing-external-sha256');
        if (sourceInfo?.relayMarkerIsApproval === true || sourceInfo?.ownerApprovalFromRelayMarker === true) blockers.push('source-relay-marker-must-not-be-approval');
        if (sourceInfo?.containsPromptText === true || sourceInfo?.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('source-info-must-be-text-free');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length || validation.decision === 'caution' ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.gate`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            decision,
            descriptorValidation: { decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers || [], warnings: validation.warnings || [] },
            descriptorFingerprint: fingerprint,
            sourceInfoSummary: source,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 24),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 24),
            canArchiveBoundRecord: decision !== 'hold',
            canDispatchCommand: decision !== 'hold' && buildCompactSupervisorContract(`adoption:${reason}`).commandReady === true,
            nextStep: decision === 'hold'
                ? 'Supply a real, non-placeholder Nexusync protocol descriptor and external descriptor/source SHA256 before binding.'
                : 'External adapter may compute authoritative descriptor/canonical-record SHA256, archive before evidence, then dispatch only if automationGate().commandReady and canRun.accepted are true.',
            rule: 'Protocol adoption gate is read-only/text-free; it does not click, submit, download, write files, or grant owner approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorDiff(baseDescriptor = {}, candidateDescriptor = {}, reason = 'protocol-descriptor-diff') {
        const changes = [];
        function walk(a, b, path, depth) {
            if (changes.length > 120 || depth > 5) return;
            const aObj = a && typeof a === 'object' && !Array.isArray(a);
            const bObj = b && typeof b === 'object' && !Array.isArray(b);
            if (aObj || bObj) {
                const keys = Array.from(new Set([...(aObj ? Object.keys(a) : []), ...(bObj ? Object.keys(b) : [])])).sort();
                for (const key of keys.slice(0, 100)) {
                    if (!aObj || !(key in a)) changes.push({ path: `${path}.${key}`, change: 'added' });
                    else if (!bObj || !(key in b)) changes.push({ path: `${path}.${key}`, change: 'removed' });
                    else walk(a[key], b[key], `${path}.${key}`, depth + 1);
                }
                return;
            }
            const aType = Array.isArray(a) ? 'array' : typeof a;
            const bType = Array.isArray(b) ? 'array' : typeof b;
            if (aType !== bType) changes.push({ path, change: 'type_changed', from: aType, to: bType });
            else if (JSON.stringify(sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(a)) !== JSON.stringify(sanitizeProtocolDescriptorValue(b))) changes.push({ path, change: 'changed', type: aType });
        }
        walk(baseDescriptor || {}, candidateDescriptor || {}, '$', 0);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.descriptor_diff`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            baseFingerprint: buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(baseDescriptor || {}, `${reason}:base`),
            candidateFingerprint: buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(candidateDescriptor || {}, `${reason}:candidate`),
            changeCount: changes.length,
            changes: changes.slice(0, 80),
            decision: changes.length ? 'changed' : 'same',
            rule: 'Diff is text-free and compares sanitized protocol metadata only. It does not compare user/prompt/conversation bodies.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolIntakeEvidenceRecord(descriptor = {}, sourceInfo = {}, reason = 'protocol-intake-evidence') {
        const gate = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(descriptor, sourceInfo, reason);
        const preview = buildNexusyncProtocolBindingPreview(descriptor, `${reason}:preview`);
        const bound = gate.decision === 'hold' ? null : buildNexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord(descriptor, `${reason}:bound-record`);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.intake_evidence`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            gate: { decision: gate.decision, blockers: gate.blockers, warnings: gate.warnings, canArchiveBoundRecord: gate.canArchiveBoundRecord },
            descriptorFingerprint: gate.descriptorFingerprint,
            sourceInfoSummary: gate.sourceInfoSummary,
            bindingPreview: { decision: preview.decision, descriptorBound: preview.descriptorBound, currentCompactDecision: preview.currentCompactDecision },
            boundRecordPreview: bound ? { decision: bound.decision, canonicalPreviewHash: bound.canonicalPreviewHash, canonicalCharLength: bound.canonicalCharLength, canonicalHashAuthority: bound.canonicalHashAuthority } : null,
            externalArchiveRequirements: {
                descriptorSha256: 'required from external Nexusync adapter/supervisor for authoritative archival',
                boundRecordSha256: 'required over canonicalJson before dispatch evidence pairing',
                beforeAfterPairing: 'archive before-command and after-command records with pair id supplied by external adapter',
                ownerApproval: 'not provided by relay marker or this userscript'
            },
            recommendedSupervisorFlow: ['validate descriptor source', 'run adoption gate', 'archive before evidence', 'dispatch targeted command only if automationGate.commandReady', 'archive after evidence', 'pair hashes externally']
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionRunbook(profile = 'protocol-adoption-runbook') {
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.runbook`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            steps: [
                { step: 1, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'obtain real Nexusync protocol descriptor and descriptor/source SHA256 outside the browser' },
                { step: 2, actor: 'browser-component', action: 'call nexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(descriptor, sourceInfo)' },
                { step: 3, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'if hold, stop; do not bind template placeholders' },
                { step: 4, actor: 'browser-component', action: 'call nexusyncProtocolIntakeEvidence(descriptor, sourceInfo, "before-command")' },
                { step: 5, actor: 'Nexusync-adapter', action: 'compute authoritative SHA256 over canonical/bound record and archive before evidence' },
                { step: 6, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'dispatch only targeted commandEnvelope with canRun.accepted=true' },
                { step: 7, actor: 'Nexusync-adapter', action: 'archive after evidence and pair before/after hashes' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['adoptionGate.decision === hold', 'descriptor has placeholders', 'descriptor is unmodified template', 'missing target for send-risk command', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop active', 'relay marker presented as approval'],
            lowTokenProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(actualDescriptor, sourceInfo)`,
            evidenceProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncProtocolIntakeEvidence(actualDescriptor, sourceInfo, 'before-command')`
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixturePack(profile = 'protocol-adoption-fixtures') {
        const template = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate(profile).descriptor;
        const valid = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(template));
        valid.protocolVersion = 'vnext-real-descriptor-fixture-2026-05';
        valid.recordPathHint = 'nexusync://records/chatgpt-auto-continue/{beforeAfterPairId}';
        valid.requiredRecordFields = Array.from(new Set([...(valid.requiredRecordFields || []), 'beforeAfterPairId', 'externalArchiveSha256']));
        const sourceInfo = { sourceName: 'fixture-nexusync-vnext-protocol', sourceKind: 'adapter-fixture', protocolDocVersion: valid.protocolVersion, descriptorSha256: '0'.repeat(64), descriptorSourceSha256: '1'.repeat(64), suppliedAt: '2026-05-04T00:00:00Z' };
        const badApprovalSource = Object.assign({}, sourceInfo, { relayMarkerIsApproval: true });
        const badTextSource = Object.assign({}, sourceInfo, { containsPromptText: true });
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'realistic-descriptor-adoption-passes', descriptor: valid, sourceInfo, expectDecision: 'pass' },
                { id: 'descriptor-diff-detects-change', value: buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorDiff(template, valid, profile).decision === 'changed', expect: true }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'unmodified-template-descriptor-holds', descriptor: template, sourceInfo, expectDecision: 'hold' },
                { id: 'placeholder-descriptor-holds', descriptor: Object.assign({}, valid, { protocolVersion: '<external-adapter-supplied>' }), sourceInfo, expectDecision: 'hold' },
                { id: 'relay-marker-source-not-approval', descriptor: valid, sourceInfo: badApprovalSource, expectDecision: 'hold' },
                { id: 'source-info-text-flag-rejected', descriptor: valid, sourceInfo: badTextSource, expectDecision: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtures(profile = 'protocol-adoption-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass) {
            const decision = item.descriptor ? buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(item.descriptor, item.sourceInfo || {}, item.id).decision : null;
            const ok = item.descriptor ? decision === item.expectDecision : item.value === item.expect;
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok, reason: ok ? 'passed' : `must-pass failed${decision ? ` decision=${decision}` : ''}` });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail) {
            const decision = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(item.descriptor, item.sourceInfo || {}, item.id).decision;
            const ok = decision === item.expectDecision;
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok, reason: ok ? 'rejected as expected' : `unexpected decision ${decision}` });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_PROTOCOL_ADOPTION_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function emitSupervisorState(reason = 'manual-console') {
        const payload = buildSupervisorStatePayload(reason);
        consoleEmit(payload.severity === 'blocked' ? 'warn' : 'summary', 'supervisor-state', payload);
        return payload;
    }

    function runControlCommand(command, args = {}, meta = {}) {
        if (config.externalControlApiEnabled === false) throw new Error('External control API disabled');
        const cmd = normalizeText(command || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[-\s]+/g, '_');
        const source = normalizeText(args.source || meta.source || 'api').slice(0, 80);
        let result;

        switch (cmd) {
            case 'status':
            case 'summary':
            case 'ai_summary':
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'contract':
            case 'automation_contract':
                result = buildAutomationContractPayload(cmd);
                break;
            case 'api_schema':
            case 'schema':
                result = buildControlApiSchemaPayload(cmd);
                break;
            case 'modules':
            case 'module_status':
                result = { schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.module_status.v1', version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, modules: buildAutomationModuleRegistry() };
                break;
            case 'dry_run':
                result = buildControlDryRunPayload(args.commandEnvelope || args.envelope || { command: args.command, args: args.args || args.params || {}, targetTabId: args.targetTabId, targetConversationId: args.targetConversationId, broadcast: args.broadcast, ts: args.ts, expiresAt: args.expiresAt }, args.transport || 'event');
                break;
            case 'release_gate':
                result = buildReleaseGatePayload();
                break;
            case 'automation_gate':
            case 'supervisor_gate':
                result = buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(cmd);
                break;
            case 'schema_validation_summary':
                result = buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'supervisor_state':
            case 'machine_state':
                result = buildSupervisorStatePayload(cmd);
                break;
            case 'command_plan':
                result = buildSupervisorStatePayload(cmd).commandPlan;
                break;
            case 'can_run':
                result = buildCanRunPayload(args.command || args.cmd || 'continue_now', args.args || args.params || args, args.transport || 'event');
                break;
            case 'route_table':
            case 'state_routes':
            case 'n8n_contract':
            case 'ask_router_contract':
                result = buildSupervisorRouteTable(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'route_plan':
            case 'supervisor_route_plan':
                result = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(cmd);
                break;
            case 'compact_contract':
            case 'low_token_contract':
            case 'supervisor_branch_contract':
            case 'branch_contract':
                result = buildCompactSupervisorContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'n8n_branch_contract':
                result = buildN8nBranchContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'ask_router_branch_contract':
                result = buildAskRouterBranchContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_minimal_evidence':
                result = buildNexusyncMinimalEvidence(cmd);
                break;
            case 'codex_step_card':
                result = buildCodexStepCard(cmd);
                break;
            case 'next_command_envelope':
                result = buildNextCommandEnvelope(cmd);
                break;
            case 'webai_transfer_contract':
            case 'relay_adapter_contract':
                result = buildWebAiTransferAdapterContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'relay_marker_contract':
                result = buildRelayMarkerContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'relay_envelope':
                result = buildRelayEnvelope(cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_bridge_packet':
                result = buildNexusyncBridgePacket(cmd);
                break;
            case 'n8n_relay_branch_contract':
                result = buildN8nRelayBranchContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'ask_router_relay_contract':
                result = buildAskRouterRelayContract(cmd);
                break;
            case 'codex_relay_step_card':
                result = buildCodexRelayStepCard(cmd);
                break;
            case 'adapter_compatibility_report':
                result = buildAdapterCompatibilityReport(cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_intake_contract':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolIntakeContract(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_template':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorTemplate(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'validate_nexusync_protocol_descriptor':
                result = validateNexusyncProtocolDescriptor(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_binding_preview':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolBindingPreview(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_bound_canonical_record':
                result = buildNexusyncBoundCanonicalRecord(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_fixture_pack':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolFixturePack(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'validate_nexusync_protocol_fixtures':
                result = validateNexusyncProtocolFixtures(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_source_template':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolSourceTemplate(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_fingerprint':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_gate':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionGate(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.sourceInfo || args.source || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_descriptor_diff':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorDiff(args.baseDescriptor || args.beforeDescriptor || args.before || {}, args.candidateDescriptor || args.afterDescriptor || args.after || args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_intake_evidence':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolIntakeEvidenceRecord(args.descriptor || args.protocolDescriptor || {}, args.sourceInfo || args.source || {}, args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_runbook':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionRunbook(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_protocol_adoption_fixture_pack':
                result = buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixturePack(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'validate_nexusync_protocol_adoption_fixtures':
                result = validateNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtures(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'external_adapter_handshake':
                result = buildExternalAdapterHandshake(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'evidence_packet':
                result = buildSupervisorEvidencePacket(cmd);
                break;
            case 'supervisor_template_pack':
            case 'external_supervisor_templates':
                result = buildExternalSupervisorTemplatePack(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'n8n_workflow_template':
                result = buildN8nWorkflowTemplate(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'n8n_node_plan':
                result = buildN8nNodePlan(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'ask_router_template':
                result = buildAskRouterTemplate(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'nexusync_evidence_schema':
                result = buildNexusyncEvidenceSchema(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'codex_minimal_handoff':
                result = buildCodexMinimalHandoff(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'supervisor_runbook':
                result = buildSupervisorRunbook(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'command_receipt_contract':
                result = buildCommandReceiptContract(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'command_receipts':
            case 'command_receipt_ledger':
                result = buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'command_replay_status':
                result = buildCommandReplayStatus(args.commandEnvelope || args.envelope || { command: args.command, args: args.args || args.params || {}, targetTabId: args.targetTabId, targetConversationId: args.targetConversationId, broadcast: args.broadcast, ts: args.ts, expiresAt: args.expiresAt }, args.transport || 'event');
                break;
            case 'command_receipt_fixtures':
                result = buildCommandReceiptFixturePack(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'validate_command_receipt_fixtures':
                result = validateCommandReceiptFixtures(args.profile || cmd);
                break;
            case 'emit_supervisor_state':
                result = emitSupervisorState(source);
                break;
            case 'copy_summary':
                result = copyAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(source);
                break;
            case 'emergency_stop':
            case 'stop':
            case 'kill':
                result = setEmergencyStop(args.minutes || args.durationMinutes || 1440, args.reason || 'external emergency stop', source);
                break;
            case 'resume':
            case 'clear_emergency_stop':
                result = clearEmergencyStop(source);
                break;
            case 'set_global':
                setGlobalEnabled(!!args.enabled, source);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'snooze':
                setGlobalSnooze(args.minutes || args.durationMinutes || 30, source);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'clear_snooze':
                clearGlobalSnooze(source);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'only_this_chat':
                setOnlyThisChat();
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'allow_all_chats':
                allowAllChats();
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'pause_this_chat':
                pauseThisChat();
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'set_background_allowed':
                config.ignoreWhenHidden = args.allowed === false;
                saveConfig();
                publishWakeHub('api-background');
                markDirty(true);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'set_artifact_auto_download':
                config.artifactAutoDownloadEnabled = !!args.enabled;
                saveConfig();
                markDirty(true);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'repair_runtime':
                repairRuntimeState(source);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'unlock':
                unlockConversation(false);
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                break;
            case 'continue_now':
                result = { ok: forceContinueNow(), summary: buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd) };
                break;
