            case 'emit_console_summary':
                result = buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary(cmd);
                consoleEmit('summary', 'api-summary', result);
                break;
            default:
                throw new Error(`Unknown control command: ${command}`);
        }

        recordControlCommand(cmd, args, true, result);
        consoleEmit(cmd === 'emergency_stop' || cmd === 'stop' || cmd === 'kill' ? 'warn' : 'summary', `api:${cmd}`, result?.summary || result);
        return result;
    }


    // v195: Nexusync vNext-ready canonical binding helpers.
    // IMPORTANT: this does not assume a latest Nexusync protocol that was not provided in this chat.
    // It creates a pluggable, text-free, canonical evidence layer so an external Nexusync adapter/supervisor
    // can bind its actual vNext schema, compute authoritative hashes, and archive before/after packets safely.
    function canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(value) {
        if (value === null || typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') return JSON.stringify(value);
        if (typeof value === 'string') return JSON.stringify(value.normalize ? value.normalize('NFC') : value);
        if (Array.isArray(value)) return `[${value.map((item) => canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(item)).join(',')}]`;
        if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
            const keys = Object.keys(value).filter((key) => typeof value[key] !== 'undefined').sort();
            return `{${keys.map((key) => `${JSON.stringify(key)}:${canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(value[key])}`).join(',')}}`;
        }
        return 'null';
    }

    function nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(text) {
        // FNV-1a preview hash for quick in-page equality checks only. Not an archival integrity hash.
        let hash = 2166136261;
        const input = String(text || '');
        for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i += 1) {
            hash ^= input.charCodeAt(i);
            hash = Math.imul(hash, 16777619) >>> 0;
        }
        return hash.toString(16).padStart(8, '0');
    }

    async function nexusyncSha256Hex(text) {
        if (!window.crypto?.subtle || typeof TextEncoder === 'undefined') {
            throw new Error('WebCrypto/TextEncoder unavailable; let external supervisor/Nexusync adapter compute sha256.');
        }
        const encoded = new TextEncoder().encode(String(text || ''));
        const digest = await window.crypto.subtle.digest('SHA-256', encoded);
        return Array.from(new Uint8Array(digest)).map((byte) => byte.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')).join('');
    }

    function buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(profile = 'vnext-adapter-pending') {
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`nexusync-binding:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: NEXUSYNC_VNEXT_BINDING_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            protocolStatus: 'adapter_supplied_protocol_required',
            protocolAssumption: 'none',
            note: 'The userscript intentionally does not guess the newest Nexusync protocol. Bind actual Nexusync vNext fields in the external adapter/supervisor, then use this canonical envelope as browser-side evidence.',
            canonicalProfile: {
                id: 'canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1',
                objectKeys: 'lexicographic ascending',
                arrays: 'preserve order',
                strings: 'NFC normalization before JSON.stringify',
                undefined: 'omitted from objects; encoded as null outside objects',
                lineEndings: 'JSON string escaping; no pretty whitespace in canonical string',
                hash: 'sha256 over UTF-8 canonicalJson; previewHash is non-authoritative FNV-1a only'
            },
            requiredExternalBindings: [
                'nexusync_protocol_version',
                'external_record_id_or_path',
                'canonical_json_sha256',
                'source_text_sha256_when_text_is_transferred',
                'file_sha256_list_when_files_are_transferred',
                'before_after_pair_id_when_command_is_dispatched'
            ],
            stableBrowserFields: ['schema', 'version', 'build', 'stateCode', 'branchId', 'decision', 'gateDecision', 'target', 'commandRisk', 'containsPromptText', 'policy'],
            commandPolicy: compact.policy,
            currentCompactDecision: {
                stateCode: compact.stateCode,
                branchId: compact.branchId,
                decision: compact.decision,
                commandRisk: compact.commandRisk,
                commandReady: compact.commandReady,
                target: compact.target
            },
            adapterRules: [
                'Do not parse ChatGPT panel text or conversation body.',
                'Do not treat relay marker or bridge packet as owner approval.',
                'Do not synthesize a commandEnvelope; use nextCommandEnvelope()/compactContract() only.',
                'If containsPromptText is not false, reject before archival.',
                'If commandRisk is send-risk-current-tab, require target + canRun.accepted=true.',
                'If emergency stop or BLOCKED_DRAFT is active, do not dispatch send-risk commands.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(reason = 'nexusync-canonical') {
        const bridge = buildNexusyncBridgePacket(`canonical:${reason}`);
        const binding = buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(reason);
        const packet = {
            schema: NEXUSYNC_CANONICAL_EVIDENCE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            ts: Date.now(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            bindingSchema: binding.schema,
            bindingProfile: binding.profile,
            canonicalProfile: binding.canonicalProfile,
            recordType: 'chatgpt_auto_continue_nexusync_canonical_browser_evidence',
            bridgePacket: bridge,
            compactContract: buildCompactSupervisorContract(`canonical-compact:${reason}`),
            externalSha256Required: true,
            browserSha256Api: `await window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncCanonicalSha256('${String(reason).replace(/'/g, '')}')`,
            adapterRule: 'Archive canonicalJson and sha256 in external Nexusync adapter. The browser preview hash is only a quick equality hint.'
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(packet);
        return Object.assign({}, packet, {
            canonicalJson,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            canonicalCharLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalHashAuthority: 'external-supervisor-or-WebCrypto-sha256'
        });
    }

    async function buildNexusyncCanonicalSha256Packet(reason = 'nexusync-canonical-sha256') {
        const packet = buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(reason);
        const sha256 = await nexusyncSha256Hex(packet.canonicalJson);
        return Object.assign({}, packet, {
            sha256,
            sha256ComputedInBrowser: true,
            hashAlgorithm: 'sha256:utf8:canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1'
        });
    }

    function buildNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile = 'nexusync-canonical-fixtures') {
        const canonicalA = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync({ b: 2, a: 1, nested: { z: '尾', m: true } });
        const canonicalB = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync({ nested: { m: true, z: '尾' }, a: 1, b: 2 });
        const altered = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync({ b: 2, a: 1, nested: { z: '尾 ', m: true } });
        const packet = buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(`fixture:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: NEXUSYNC_CANONICAL_FIXTURE_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'canonical-same-object-different-key-order', expect: 'same_canonical_json_and_preview_hash', left: canonicalA, right: canonicalB, leftHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalA), rightHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalB) },
                { id: 'canonical-packet-is-text-free', expect: 'containsPromptText_false', value: packet.containsPromptText === false && packet.containsUserText === false },
                { id: 'canonical-packet-requires-external-sha256', expect: 'externalSha256Required_true', value: packet.externalSha256Required === true },
                { id: 'binding-does-not-assume-unprovided-protocol', expect: 'protocolAssumption_none', value: buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(profile).protocolAssumption === 'none' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'hash-changes-when-content-changes', expect: 'different_preview_hash', leftHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalA), rightHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(altered) },
                { id: 'reject-evidence-with-prompt-text-flag', expect: 'containsPromptText_true_rejected', value: { containsPromptText: true } },
                { id: 'reject-command-envelope-without-target-for-send-risk', expect: 'send_risk_without_target_rejected', value: { commandRisk: 'send-risk-current-tab', commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now' } } },
                { id: 'relay-marker-is-not-owner-approval', expect: 'marker_not_approval', value: { relayMarker: true, ownerApproval: false } }
            ],
            sampleCanonicalPacketSummary: {
                previewHash: packet.canonicalPreviewHash,
                charLength: packet.canonicalCharLength,
                sha256Api: packet.browserSha256Api,
                recordType: packet.recordType
            }
        };
    }

    function validateNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile = 'nexusync-canonical-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile);
        const results = [];
        const pass1 = fixtures.mustPass.find((item) => item.id === 'canonical-same-object-different-key-order');
        results.push({ id: pass1.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: pass1.left === pass1.right && pass1.leftHash === pass1.rightHash, reason: 'canonical key sort should remove object insertion-order differences' });
        const pass2 = fixtures.mustPass.find((item) => item.id === 'canonical-packet-is-text-free');
        results.push({ id: pass2.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: pass2.value === true, reason: 'browser evidence must remain text-free by default' });
        const pass3 = fixtures.mustPass.find((item) => item.id === 'canonical-packet-requires-external-sha256');
        results.push({ id: pass3.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: pass3.value === true, reason: 'external Nexusync adapter remains authoritative for archive sha256' });
        const pass4 = fixtures.mustPass.find((item) => item.id === 'binding-does-not-assume-unprovided-protocol');
        results.push({ id: pass4.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: pass4.value === true, reason: 'no stale/guessed Nexusync schema assumptions' });

        const fail1 = fixtures.mustFail.find((item) => item.id === 'hash-changes-when-content-changes');
        results.push({ id: fail1.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: fail1.leftHash !== fail1.rightHash, reason: 'changed canonical content must change preview hash' });
        const fail2 = fixtures.mustFail.find((item) => item.id === 'reject-evidence-with-prompt-text-flag');
        results.push({ id: fail2.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: fail2.value.containsPromptText === true, blocked: true, reason: 'adapter must reject evidence containing prompt/user text' });
        const fail3 = fixtures.mustFail.find((item) => item.id === 'reject-command-envelope-without-target-for-send-risk');
        const hasTarget = !!(fail3.value.commandEnvelope.targetTabId || fail3.value.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId);
        results.push({ id: fail3.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: !hasTarget, blocked: true, reason: 'send-risk command without target must remain rejected' });
        const fail4 = fixtures.mustFail.find((item) => item.id === 'relay-marker-is-not-owner-approval');
        results.push({ id: fail4.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: fail4.value.relayMarker === true && fail4.value.ownerApproval !== true, blocked: true, reason: 'relay marker is evidence only, not approval' });

        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${NEXUSYNC_CANONICAL_FIXTURE_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            fixtures,
            externalProtocolProvided: false,
            nextBindingStep: 'When the user provides the newer Nexusync protocol, map protocol-specific fields in the external adapter and keep this canonical fixture layer as the browser-side evidence guard.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncBindingValidationPack(profile = 'nexusync-binding-validation') {
        const binding = buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(profile);
        const canonical = buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(profile);
        const validation = validateNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile);
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.nexusync_binding_validation_pack.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            decision: validation.decision,
            binding,
            canonicalSummary: {
                schema: canonical.schema,
                previewHash: canonical.canonicalPreviewHash,
                canonicalCharLength: canonical.canonicalCharLength,
                externalSha256Required: canonical.externalSha256Required,
                hashAuthority: canonical.canonicalHashAuthority
            },
            validationSummary: {
                passCount: validation.passCount,
                failCount: validation.failCount,
                failedIds: validation.failedIds
            },
            policy: {
                protocolGuessingForbidden: true,
                relayMarkerNotApproval: true,
                textFreeEvidenceOnly: true,
                authoritativeSha256ExternalOrWebCrypto: true,
                targetAwareSendRiskRequired: true
            }
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncCompatibilityMatrix(reason = 'nexusync-compatibility') {
        return {
            schema: 'cgpt_auto_continue.nexusync_compatibility_matrix.v1',
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            reason,
            knownStable: [
                { area: 'browser evidence', status: 'ready', api: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncCanonicalPacket()` },
                { area: 'canonical JSON', status: 'ready', profile: 'canonical-json-sort-keys-nfc-v1' },
                { area: 'browser sha256', status: window.crypto?.subtle ? 'available-async' : 'external-required', api: `await window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.nexusyncCanonicalSha256()` },
                { area: 'relay marker', status: 'evidence-only', api: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayMarkerContract()` },
                { area: 'targeted command', status: 'guarded', rule: 'use compactContract().commandEnvelope + canRun.accepted=true' }
            ],
            requiresUserProvidedProtocol: [
                'Exact Nexusync vNext record field names',
                'Canonicalization rules if they differ from sort-keys/NFC JSON',
                'Storage/index path or database collection naming',
                'Required before/after pairing keys',
                'External file/text SHA256 source-of-truth format'
            ],
            doNotAssume: ['old Nexusync schemas', 'unstated hash envelope shape', 'relay marker as approval', 'conversation body scraping'],
            recommendedNext: 'Provide/attach the newer Nexusync protocol, then bind those exact required fields to nexusyncBridgePacket()/nexusyncCanonicalPacket() in the external adapter.'
        };
    }



    // v204: real-loop archival envelope. This layer does not dispatch commands;
    // it helps an external supervisor/Nexusync/WebAI Transfer archive bind the
    // smoke marker hash, real before hash, targeted command envelope/receipt,
    // and real after hash into one low-token, text-free record.
    function buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeContract(profile = 'real-loop-archival-envelope-contract') {
        return {
            schema: REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Bind one real external supervisor loop to smokeMarkerHash + beforeHash + commandEnvelope + commandReceipt + afterHash without granting approval.',
            exportedApi: [
                'realLoopArchivalEnvelopeContract', 'realLoopArchivalEnvelope', 'validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope',
                'realLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixtures', 'validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixtures',
                'nexusyncRealLoopArchivalPacket', 'webaiTransferRealLoopArchivalPacket',
                'n8nRealLoopArchivalContract', 'codexRealLoopArchivalCard'
            ],
            requiredExternalSequence: [
                'run read-only smoke harness and archive its marker; compute authoritative smokeMarkerHash externally',
                'archive real before evidence; compute authoritative beforeHash externally',
                'dispatch targeted commandEnvelope only when canRun.accepted=true and replay guard accepts it',
                'read commandReceipt ledger for the exact requestId/command/target',
                'archive real after evidence; compute authoritative afterHash externally',
                'validate realLoopArchivalEnvelope before accepting the loop result'
            ],
            hardStops: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'releaseGate hold', 'missing target for send-risk command', 'missing or invalid smokeMarkerHash/beforeHash/afterHash', 'missing accepted commandReceipt'],
            invariants: [
                'receipt, relay marker, smoke marker, and archive envelope are evidence only; none supplies owner approval',
                'containsPromptText=false and containsUserText=false are mandatory',
                'authoritative SHA256 hashes must be computed by the external supervisor/Nexusync adapter',
                'this userscript helper must not click, dispatch, download, or read conversation bodies'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeRealLoopArchiveInput(input = {}, profile = 'real-loop-archive') {
        const gate = (() => { try { return buildSupervisorLoopGate(`${profile}:gate`); } catch { return {}; } })();
        const commandEnvelope = input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || gate.commandEnvelope || {};
        const beforeHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(input.beforeHash || input.beforeEvidenceHash || input.beforeSha256 || '');
        const afterHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(input.afterHash || input.afterEvidenceHash || input.afterSha256 || '');
        const smokeMarkerHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(input.smokeMarkerHash || input.smokeResultMarkerHash || input.smokeHash || '');
        return { gate, commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash, smokeMarkerHash };
    }

    function summarizeRealLoopCommandEnvelope(envelope = {}) {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
        return {
            requestId: env.requestId || '',
            command: env.commandName || '',
            risk,
            targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
            broadcast: !!env.broadcast,
            ts: env.ts || 0,
            expiresAt: env.expiresAt || 0,
            envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(env)
        };
    }

    function buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(input = {}, profile = 'real-loop-archival-envelope') {
        const normalized = normalizeRealLoopArchiveInput(input, profile);
        const commandSummary = summarizeRealLoopCommandEnvelope(normalized.commandEnvelope);
        const pair = buildCommandEvidencePair(normalized.commandEnvelope, normalized.beforeHash, normalized.afterHash, `${profile}:command-pair`);
        const receipt = pair.commandReceipt || findReceiptForEnvelope(normalized.commandEnvelope) || null;
        const smokePolicy = input.smokePolicy || input.enablePolicy || null;
        const envelope = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.envelope`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            archiveId: `rla-${makeBoundedSignature([normalized.smokeMarkerHash, normalized.beforeHash, commandSummary.requestId, commandSummary.command, normalized.afterHash].join('|'), 2000).hash}`,
            smokeMarkerHash: normalized.smokeMarkerHash,
            beforeHash: normalized.beforeHash,
            afterHash: normalized.afterHash,
            commandEnvelope: commandSummary,
            commandReceipt: receipt ? {
                schema: receipt.schema || COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA,
                receiptKey: receipt.receiptKey || '',
                requestId: receipt.requestId || '',
                command: receipt.command || '',
                risk: receipt.risk || '',
                phase: receipt.phase || '',
                accepted: receipt.accepted === true,
                ok: receipt.ok,
                time: receipt.time || null,
                reason: receipt.reason || '',
                envelopeHash: receipt.envelopeHash || ''
            } : null,
            commandEvidencePair: {
                pairId: pair.pairId,
                validationDecision: pair.validation?.decision || 'unknown',
                validationBlockers: Array.isArray(pair.validation?.blockers) ? pair.validation.blockers.slice(0, 8) : [],
                validationWarnings: Array.isArray(pair.validation?.warnings) ? pair.validation.warnings.slice(0, 8) : []
            },
            smokeEnablePolicy: smokePolicy ? {
                policyDecision: smokePolicy.policyDecision || smokePolicy.enable_policy || '',
                allowRealLoop: smokePolicy.allowRealLoop === true || smokePolicy.allow_real_loop === true,
                notApproval: smokePolicy.notApproval !== false
            } : { policyDecision: 'external-smoke-marker-hash-only', allowRealLoop: null, notApproval: true },
            externalArchive: {
                authoritativeHashRequired: true,
                smokeMarkerHashComputedBy: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                beforeHashComputedBy: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                afterHashComputedBy: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                canonicalRecordPath: 'external supervisor decides; this envelope supplies stable text-free binding fields'
            },
            ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false, suppliedBySmokeMarker: false, suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: false },
            validation: null,
            rule: 'This envelope is archival evidence only. It must not be used as owner approval or as permission to dispatch a command.'
        };
        envelope.validation = validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(envelope, `${profile}:inline`).summary;
        return envelope;
    }

    function validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(envelope = {}, profile = 'real-loop-archival-envelope-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (envelope.containsPromptText === true || envelope.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('archive-envelope-must-be-text-free');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(envelope.smokeMarkerHash || '')) blockers.push('smokeMarkerHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(envelope.beforeHash || '')) blockers.push('beforeHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(envelope.afterHash || '')) blockers.push('afterHash-invalid-or-missing');
        const env = envelope.commandEnvelope || {};
        if (!env.requestId) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.requestId-missing');
        if (!env.command) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.command-missing');
        if ((env.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || env.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !env.targetTabId && !env.targetConversationId) blockers.push('targeted-command-missing-target');
        const receipt = envelope.commandReceipt || null;
        if (!receipt) blockers.push('commandReceipt-missing');
        if (receipt && receipt.requestId !== env.requestId) blockers.push('receipt-requestId-mismatch');
        if (receipt && normalizeControlCommandName(receipt.command) !== normalizeControlCommandName(env.command)) blockers.push('receipt-command-mismatch');
        if (receipt && receipt.accepted !== true) blockers.push('receipt-not-accepted');
        if (receipt && receipt.ok === false) warnings.push('receipt-completed-with-error-or-not-yet-ok');
        const pairDecision = envelope.commandEvidencePair?.validationDecision || envelope.commandEvidencePair?.validation?.decision || 'unknown';
        if (pairDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('commandEvidencePair-validation-hold');
        else if (pairDecision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`commandEvidencePair-validation-${pairDecision}`);
        if (envelope.ownerApproval?.suppliedByReceipt === true || envelope.ownerApproval?.suppliedByRelayMarker === true || envelope.ownerApproval?.suppliedBySmokeMarker === true || envelope.ownerApproval?.suppliedByArchiveEnvelope === true) blockers.push('evidence-artifacts-cannot-supply-owner-approval');
        if (envelope.smokeEnablePolicy?.allowRealLoop === false) blockers.push('smoke-enable-policy-denied-real-loop');
        if (envelope.smokeEnablePolicy?.policyDecision === 'hold_real_loop') blockers.push('smoke-enable-policy-hold');
        if (envelope.smokeEnablePolicy?.policyDecision === 'external-smoke-marker-hash-only') warnings.push('smoke-enable-policy-not-embedded-verify-external-marker');
        if (envelope.beforeHash && envelope.afterHash && normalizeEvidenceHash(envelope.beforeHash) === normalizeEvidenceHash(envelope.afterHash)) warnings.push('before-after-hash-equal-possible-noop');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            summary: { decision, blockerCount: blockers.length, warningCount: warnings.length }
        };
    }

    function buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixturePack(profile = 'real-loop-archival-fixtures') {
        const sha = (ch) => `sha256:${String(ch).repeat(64).slice(0, 64)}`;
        const baseEnvelope = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.envelope`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            smokeMarkerHash: sha('a'),
            beforeHash: sha('b'),
            afterHash: sha('c'),
            commandEnvelope: { requestId: 'fixture-request', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetTabId: 'fixture-tab', targetConversationId: 'fixture-conv', envelopeHash: 'fnv1a:fixture' },
            commandReceipt: { receiptKey: 'fixture-receipt', requestId: 'fixture-request', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', phase: 'completed', accepted: true, ok: true, envelopeHash: 'fnv1a:fixture' },
            commandEvidencePair: { pairId: 'fixture-pair', validationDecision: 'pass', validationBlockers: [], validationWarnings: [] },
            smokeEnablePolicy: { policyDecision: 'allow_real_loop', allowRealLoop: true, notApproval: true },
            ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false, suppliedBySmokeMarker: false, suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: false }
        };
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-real-loop-archive-envelope', envelope: baseEnvelope, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'valid-envelope-with-equal-hash-warning', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { afterHash: sha('b') }), expect: 'caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-smoke-marker-hash-holds', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { smokeMarkerHash: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-before-hash-holds', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { beforeHash: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-command-receipt-holds', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { commandReceipt: null }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'receipt-owner-approval-holds', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { ownerApproval: { suppliedByReceipt: true } }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'text-leak-holds', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { containsPromptText: true }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'pair-validation-hold-blocks-archive', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { commandEvidencePair: { validationDecision: 'hold' } }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'smoke-policy-hold-blocks-archive', envelope: Object.assign({}, baseEnvelope, { smokeEnablePolicy: { policyDecision: 'hold_real_loop', allowRealLoop: false } }), expect: 'hold' }
            ],
            rule: 'Fixtures are pure/static and safe for releaseGate. They do not dispatch commands or inspect page text.'
        };
    }

    function validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixtures(profile = 'real-loop-archival-fixture-validation') {
        const pack = buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelopeFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of pack.mustPass || []) {
            const validation = validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(item.envelope, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        for (const item of pack.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(item.envelope, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncRealLoopArchivalPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-real-loop-archive') {
        const envelope = buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(input, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            recordType: 'cgpt_auto_continue_real_loop_archive',
            createdAt: envelope.generatedAt,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            archiveId: envelope.archiveId,
            smokeMarkerHash: envelope.smokeMarkerHash,
            beforeHash: envelope.beforeHash,
            commandEnvelope: envelope.commandEnvelope,
            commandReceipt: envelope.commandReceipt,
            afterHash: envelope.afterHash,
            validation: envelope.validation,
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            envelope,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalJsonLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', input: 'canonicalJson', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            rule: 'Packet is archive material. External adapter must compute authoritative SHA256 and must not treat it as approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferRealLoopArchivalPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-real-loop-archive') {
        const archive = buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResult: {
                marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVE]',
                archiveId: archive.archiveId,
                validationDecision: archive.validation?.decision || 'unknown',
                requestId: archive.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
                command: archive.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
                smokeMarkerHash: archive.smokeMarkerHash,
                beforeHash: archive.beforeHash,
                afterHash: archive.afterHash,
                notOwnerApproval: true
            },
            archive,
            requiredExternalFields: ['smokeMarkerHash', 'beforeHash', 'afterHash', 'archivePacketSha256'],
            stopIf: ['archive.validation.decision === hold', 'containsPromptText=true', 'commandReceipt missing', 'ownerApproval supplied by evidence artifact'],
            rule: 'WebAI Transfer packet is a relay/archive wrapper only; it must not dispatch or approve commands.'
        };
    }

    function buildN8nRealLoopArchivalContract(profile = 'n8n-real-loop-archival-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { if: 'smokePolicy.allowRealLoop == true', branch: 'ARCHIVE_BEFORE_AND_DISPATCH_TARGETED_COMMAND', requires: ['authoritative smokeMarkerHash', 'beforeHash', 'canRun.accepted=true', 'replay.acceptedForReplay=true'] },
                { if: 'commandReceipt accepted/completed', branch: 'ARCHIVE_AFTER_AND_BUILD_REAL_LOOP_ENVELOPE', requires: ['afterHash', 'commandReceipt', 'validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope'] },
                { if: 'archive.validation.decision == pass || caution', branch: 'STORE_NEXUSYNC_ARCHIVE_AND_RETURN_EVIDENCE', requires: ['external archive packet sha256'] },
                { if: 'archive.validation.decision == hold', branch: 'HALT_AND_NOTIFY_OWNER', requires: ['do not retry blindly', 'preserve evidence'] }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'duplicate command replay', 'missing target', 'missing authoritative hashes', 'missing receipt'],
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            rule: 'Pseudo contract only; n8n must compute hashes externally and keep command dispatch targeted.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexRealLoopArchivalCard(profile = 'codex-real-loop-archival-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Validate and archive a real supervisor loop using smokeMarkerHash + beforeHash + commandReceipt + afterHash; do not dispatch from this card.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realLoopArchivalEnvelopeContract('codex')`,
            buildArchiveAfterDispatch: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realLoopArchivalEnvelope({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, commandEnvelope, afterHash}, 'codex-after-dispatch')`,
            forbidden: ['do not parse panel text', 'do not scrape conversation body', 'do not invent hashes', 'do not treat receipt/marker/archive as owner approval', 'do not dispatch a command from this archival card'],
            stopIf: ['validation.decision === hold', 'containsPromptText true', 'commandReceipt missing', 'hash missing or not sha256']
        };
    }


    // v205: external supervisor replay-runner policy. This layer still does not
    // dispatch commands; it tells n8n/WebAI Transfer/Nexusync/Codex exactly when
    // a real targeted dispatch is allowed after smoke pass + before evidence +
    // target-aware canRun + replay precheck, then how to archive the after state.
    function buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicyContract(profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy-contract') {
        return {
            schema: REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Gate real external supervisor dispatch with smoke pass, authoritative beforeHash, target-aware commandEnvelope, canRun, replay precheck, and archive-after requirements.',
            exportedApi: [
                'realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyContract', 'realLoopReplayRunnerPolicy', 'validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy',
                'realLoopReplayRunnerEnvelope', 'realLoopReplayRunnerFixtures', 'validateRealLoopReplayRunnerFixtures',
                'n8nReplayRunnerPolicyContract', 'webaiTransferReplayRunnerPacket',
                'nexusyncReplayRunnerPolicyPacket', 'codexReplayRunnerPolicyCard',
                'realRunDryRunSplitContract', 'supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy', 'realRunSupervisorPolicy', 'dryRunSupervisorPolicy'
            ],
            requiredOrder: [
                'run read-only smoke harness and archive smoke result marker hash externally',
                'archive before evidence and compute authoritative beforeHash externally',
                'read supervisorLoopGate/compactContract and preserve the targeted commandEnvelope as-is',
                'run canRun(commandEnvelope.command, commandEnvelope, transport) and commandReplayStatus(commandEnvelope)',
                'dispatch only if policyDecision == allow_dispatch_targeted_command',
                'after dispatch, read receipt ledger, archive after evidence, compute afterHash externally, then build realLoopArchivalEnvelope'
            ],
            hardStops: ['smoke policy hold', 'releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'missing beforeHash', 'missing target', 'canRun rejected', 'duplicate-command-replay'],
            invariants: [
                'This policy helper is read-only and never dispatches.',
                'It must not be used as owner approval.',
                'authoritative hashes are external Nexusync/supervisor outputs, not mock hashes',
                'containsPromptText=false and containsUserText=false are mandatory',
                'send-risk commands require targetTabId or targetConversationId and canRun.accepted=true'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeReplayRunnerInput(input = {}, profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy') {
        const gate = input.gate && typeof input.gate === 'object' ? input.gate : (() => { try { return buildSupervisorLoopGate(`${profile}:gate`); } catch (error) { return { decision: 'hold', blockers: [`gate-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}`] }; } })();
        const commandEnvelope = input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || gate.commandEnvelope || {};
        const beforeHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(input.beforeHash || input.beforeEvidenceHash || input.beforeSha256 || '');
        const smokeMarkerHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(input.smokeMarkerHash || input.smokeResultMarkerHash || input.smokeHash || '');
        const smokePolicy = input.smokePolicy || input.enablePolicy || (() => { try { return buildSupervisorSmokeEnablePolicy(input.smokeResult || null, `${profile}:smoke-policy`); } catch { return { policyDecision: 'hold_real_loop', allowRealLoop: false, blockers: ['smoke-policy-unavailable'] }; } })();
        const canRun = input.canRun || (() => {
            const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(commandEnvelope || {});
            if (!env.commandName) return { accepted: false, reason: 'missing-command' };
            try { return buildCanRunPayload(env.commandName, commandEnvelope || {}, input.transport || 'event'); } catch (error) { return { accepted: false, reason: `canRun-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}` }; }
        })();
        const replay = input.replay || (() => { try { return buildCommandReplayStatus(commandEnvelope || {}, input.transport || 'event'); } catch (error) { return { acceptedForReplay: false, reason: `replay-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}` }; } })();
        const releaseGateDecision = input.releaseGateDecision || gate.releaseGateDecision || input.releaseGate?.decision || 'unknown';
        return { gate, commandEnvelope, beforeHash, smokeMarkerHash, smokePolicy, canRun, replay, releaseGateDecision };
    }

    function buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input = {}, profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy') {
        const normalized = normalizeReplayRunnerInput(input, profile);
        const envSummary = summarizeRealLoopCommandEnvelope(normalized.commandEnvelope || {});
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const smokeAllows = normalized.smokePolicy?.allowRealLoop === true || normalized.smokePolicy?.allow_real_loop === true || normalized.smokePolicy?.policyDecision === 'allow_real_loop' || normalized.smokePolicy?.enable_policy === 'allow_real_loop';
        if (!smokeAllows) blockers.push('smoke-policy-not-allowing-real-loop');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(normalized.smokeMarkerHash)) blockers.push('missing-or-invalid-smokeMarkerHash');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(normalized.beforeHash)) blockers.push('missing-or-invalid-beforeHash');
        if (!envSummary.command) blockers.push('missing-commandEnvelope-command');
        if ((envSummary.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || envSummary.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !envSummary.targetTabId && !envSummary.targetConversationId) blockers.push('missing-target-for-mutating-command');
        if (normalized.releaseGateDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('release-gate-hold');
        if (Array.isArray(normalized.gate?.blockers) && normalized.gate.blockers.includes('BLOCKED_DRAFT')) blockers.push('blocked-draft');
        if (Array.isArray(normalized.gate?.blockers) && normalized.gate.blockers.includes('BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP')) blockers.push('blocked-emergency-stop');
        if (normalized.gate?.stateCode === 'BLOCKED_DRAFT') blockers.push('blocked-draft');
        if (normalized.gate?.stateCode === 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP') blockers.push('blocked-emergency-stop');
        if (normalized.canRun?.accepted !== true) blockers.push(`canRun-rejected:${String(normalized.canRun?.reason || 'unknown').slice(0, 80)}`);
        if (normalized.replay?.acceptedForReplay !== true) blockers.push(`replay-rejected:${String(normalized.replay?.reason || 'unknown').slice(0, 80)}`);
        if (normalized.releaseGateDecision === 'caution') warnings.push('release-gate-caution');
        if (normalized.gate?.decision && normalized.gate.decision !== 'dispatch_targeted_command') warnings.push(`gate-decision-${normalized.gate.decision}`);
        const uniqueBlockers = Array.from(new Set(blockers));
        const uniqueWarnings = Array.from(new Set(warnings));
        const policyDecision = uniqueBlockers.length ? 'hold_real_dispatch' : 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command';
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            policyDecision,
            allowDispatch: policyDecision === 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command',
            commandEnvelope: envSummary,
            eventDetail: policyDecision === 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command' ? normalized.commandEnvelope : null,
            smoke: {
                markerHash: normalized.smokeMarkerHash,
                policyDecision: normalized.smokePolicy?.policyDecision || normalized.smokePolicy?.enable_policy || '',
                allowRealLoop: smokeAllows,
                notOwnerApproval: normalized.smokePolicy?.notApproval !== false
            },
            before: { beforeHash: normalized.beforeHash, authoritativeExternalHashRequired: true },
            prechecks: {
                releaseGateDecision: normalized.releaseGateDecision,
                gateDecision: normalized.gate?.decision || 'unknown',
                stateCode: normalized.gate?.stateCode || '',
                canRunAccepted: normalized.canRun?.accepted === true,
                canRunReason: normalized.canRun?.reason || '',
                replayAccepted: normalized.replay?.acceptedForReplay === true,
                replayReason: normalized.replay?.reason || ''
            },
            blockers: uniqueBlockers.slice(0, 16),
            warnings: uniqueWarnings.slice(0, 16),
            afterDispatchRequired: [
                'read command receipt for exact requestId/command/target',
                'archive after evidence and compute authoritative afterHash externally',
                'build and validate realLoopArchivalEnvelope({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, commandEnvelope, afterHash})',
                'store Nexusync/WebAI Transfer archive packet only if archive validation is not hold'
            ],
            stopIf: ['policyDecision !== allow_dispatch_targeted_command', 'owner revokes action-time approval', 'command result error', 'afterHash missing', 'archive validation hold'],
            ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByPolicy: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, actionTimeApprovalStillRequiredForRealDispatch: true },
            rule: 'Policy is a read-only external supervisor dispatch gate. It does not click, dispatch, download, or approve.'
        };
    }

    function buildRealLoopReplayRunnerEnvelope(input = {}, profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-envelope') {
        const policy = buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.runner_envelope`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            policyDecision: policy.policyDecision,
            allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
            requestId: policy.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
            command: policy.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
            targetTabId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
            eventName: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
            eventDetail: policy.eventDetail,
            blockers: policy.blockers,
            warnings: policy.warnings,
            beforeHash: policy.before?.beforeHash || '',
            smokeMarkerHash: policy.smoke?.markerHash || '',
            next: policy.allowDispatch ? 'dispatch eventDetail exactly once, then archive after evidence' : 'hold and notify owner/supervisor',
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(policy = {}, profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (policy.containsPromptText === true || policy.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('policy-must-be-text-free');
        if (!['allow_dispatch_targeted_command', 'hold_real_dispatch'].includes(policy.policyDecision || '')) blockers.push('unknown-policyDecision');
        if (policy.policyDecision === 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command' && policy.allowDispatch !== true) blockers.push('allow-policy-must-set-allowDispatch');
        if (policy.policyDecision === 'hold_real_dispatch' && policy.allowDispatch === true) blockers.push('hold-policy-must-not-allowDispatch');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && !policy.eventDetail) blockers.push('dispatch-policy-missing-eventDetail');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && !isValidEvidenceHash(policy.before?.beforeHash || '')) blockers.push('dispatch-policy-missing-valid-beforeHash');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && !isValidEvidenceHash(policy.smoke?.markerHash || '')) blockers.push('dispatch-policy-missing-valid-smokeMarkerHash');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && (policy.prechecks?.canRunAccepted !== true)) blockers.push('dispatch-policy-canRun-not-accepted');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && (policy.prechecks?.replayAccepted !== true)) blockers.push('dispatch-policy-replay-not-accepted');
        if (policy.allowDispatch === true && policy.prechecks?.releaseGateDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('dispatch-policy-releaseGate-hold');
        if (policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByPolicy === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByUserscript === true) blockers.push('policy-must-not-supply-owner-approval');
        if (policy.commandEnvelope?.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' && !policy.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId && !policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId) blockers.push('send-risk-policy-missing-target');
        if (Array.isArray(policy.blockers) && policy.blockers.length && policy.allowDispatch === true) warnings.push('allow-policy-has-blocker-list');
        const uniqueBlockers = Array.from(new Set(blockers));
        const uniqueWarnings = Array.from(new Set(warnings));
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: uniqueBlockers.length ? 'hold' : uniqueWarnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass',
            blockers: uniqueBlockers,
            warnings: uniqueWarnings,
            summary: { decision: uniqueBlockers.length ? 'hold' : uniqueWarnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass', blockerCount: uniqueBlockers.length, warningCount: uniqueWarnings.length }
        };
    }

    function buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicyFixturePack(profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy-fixtures') {
        const goodHashA = 'a'.repeat(64);
        const goodHashB = 'b'.repeat(64);
        const basePolicy = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            policyDecision: 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command',
            allowDispatch: true,
            eventDetail: { requestId: 'fixture-req-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-1', ts: 1, expiresAt: Date.now() + 1000 },
            commandEnvelope: { requestId: 'fixture-req-1', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetConversationId: 'conv-1' },
            smoke: { markerHash: goodHashA, policyDecision: 'allow_real_loop', allowRealLoop: true, notOwnerApproval: true },
            before: { beforeHash: goodHashB, authoritativeExternalHashRequired: true },
            prechecks: { releaseGateDecision: 'pass', gateDecision: 'dispatch_targeted_command', stateCode: 'READY_TO_SEND_PROMPT', canRunAccepted: true, replayAccepted: true },
            blockers: [],
            warnings: [],
            ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByPolicy: false, actionTimeApprovalStillRequiredForRealDispatch: true }
        };
        const mustPass = [
            { id: 'allow-dispatch-targeted-with-smoke-before-canrun-replay', policy: basePolicy }
        ];
        const mustFail = [
            { id: 'hold-if-missing-beforeHash', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { before: { beforeHash: '', authoritativeExternalHashRequired: true } }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-missing-smokeMarkerHash', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { smoke: { markerHash: '', policyDecision: 'allow_real_loop', allowRealLoop: true, notOwnerApproval: true } }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-canRun-rejected', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { prechecks: Object.assign({}, basePolicy.prechecks, { canRunAccepted: false }) }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-replay-rejected', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { prechecks: Object.assign({}, basePolicy.prechecks, { replayAccepted: false }) }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-release-gate-hold', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { prechecks: Object.assign({}, basePolicy.prechecks, { releaseGateDecision: 'hold' }) }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-send-risk-missing-target', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { commandEnvelope: { requestId: 'fixture-req-2', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab' } }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-policy-claims-owner-approval', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByPolicy: true } }) },
            { id: 'hold-if-prompt-text-leak', policy: Object.assign({}, basePolicy, { containsPromptText: true }) }
        ];
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.fixture_pack`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: mustPass.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, validation: validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(item.policy, `${profile}:${item.id}`) })),
            mustFail: mustFail.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, validation: validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(item.policy, `${profile}:${item.id}`) })),
            rule: 'Fixtures are static and safe for releaseGate. They do not call supervisorLoopGate/releaseGate and never dispatch commands.'
        };
    }

    function validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicyFixtures(profile = 'real-loop-replay-runner-policy-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicyFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: item.validation.decision !== 'hold', decision: item.validation.decision, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [] });
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: item.validation.decision === 'hold', decision: item.validation.decision, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [] });
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildN8nReplayRunnerPolicyContract(profile = 'n8n-replay-runner-policy') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { if: 'smoke enable policy != allow_real_loop', branch: 'HALT_NOTIFY_OWNER', action: 'do not dispatch' },
                { if: 'beforeHash missing or not sha256', branch: 'HALT_ARCHIVE_FAILURE', action: 'compute authoritative external beforeHash first' },
                { if: 'canRun.accepted != true or replay.acceptedForReplay != true', branch: 'HALT_NO_DISPATCH', action: 'preserve evidence and do not retry blindly' },
                { if: 'policyDecision == allow_dispatch_targeted_command', branch: 'DISPATCH_TARGETED_COMMAND_ONCE', action: `dispatch ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} with eventDetail exactly once` },
                { if: 'dispatch result ok', branch: 'ARCHIVE_AFTER_AND_BIND_ENVELOPE', action: 'compute afterHash, read command receipt, build realLoopArchivalEnvelope' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'duplicate-command-replay', 'missing target', 'missing authoritative hash'],
            rule: 'Pseudo n8n contract only; use HTTP/browser bridge nodes, not Execute Command.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferReplayRunnerPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-replay-runner-policy') {
        const policy = buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResult: {
                marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY]',
                policyDecision: policy.policyDecision,
                allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
                requestId: policy.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
                command: policy.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
                targetConversationId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
                smokeMarkerHash: policy.smoke?.markerHash || '',
                beforeHash: policy.before?.beforeHash || '',
                blockers: policy.blockers,
                warnings: policy.warnings,
                notOwnerApproval: true
            },
            policy,
            next: policy.allowDispatch ? 'external supervisor may dispatch eventDetail once if owner action-time approval is already satisfied' : 'hold and notify owner/supervisor'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncReplayRunnerPolicyPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-replay-runner-policy') {
        const policy = buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            recordType: 'cgpt_auto_continue_replay_runner_policy',
            createdAt: policy.generatedAt,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            policyDecision: policy.policyDecision,
            allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
            commandEnvelope: policy.commandEnvelope,
            smokeMarkerHash: policy.smoke?.markerHash || '',
            beforeHash: policy.before?.beforeHash || '',
            prechecks: policy.prechecks,
            blockers: policy.blockers,
            warnings: policy.warnings,
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            policy,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalJsonLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            rule: 'Archive this policy before real dispatch; after dispatch, bind commandReceipt + afterHash with realLoopArchivalEnvelope.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexReplayRunnerPolicyCard(profile = 'codex-replay-runner-policy-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_REPLAY_RUNNER_POLICY_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Read replay-runner policy; dispatch only if policyDecision=allow_dispatch_targeted_command and owner has approved this action-time step.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realLoopReplayRunnerPolicyContract('codex')`,
            policyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realLoopReplayRunnerPolicy({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash}, 'codex-before-dispatch')`,
            dispatchRule: 'Do not dispatch from this card unless external supervisor already computed smokeMarkerHash/beforeHash and owner action-time approval is explicit.',
            afterDispatch: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realLoopArchivalEnvelope({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, commandEnvelope, afterHash}, 'codex-after-dispatch')`,
            forbidden: ['do not parse panel text', 'do not invent hashes', 'do not bypass canRun/replay guard', 'do not treat policy/receipt/hash as owner approval'],
            stopIf: ['policyDecision !== allow_dispatch_targeted_command', 'missing target', 'duplicate replay', 'releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP']
        };
    }


    // v206: real-run / dry-run supervisor runner split. This layer is still
    // read-only. It prevents external supervisors from treating a positive
    // replay-runner policy as owner approval by separating dry-run probes,
    // owner approval readiness, and actual real-dispatch readiness.
    function buildRealRunDryRunSplitContract(profile = 'real-run-dry-run-split-contract') {
        return {
            schema: REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Separate read-only/dry-run supervisor checks from owner-action-time approval and real targeted dispatch readiness.',
            runnerStages: ['dry_run_only', 'ready_for_owner_approval', 'ready_for_real_dispatch', 'hold_real_run'],
            exportedApi: [
                'realRunDryRunSplitContract', 'supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy', 'realRunSupervisorPolicy', 'dryRunSupervisorPolicy',
                'validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy', 'supervisorRunnerSplitEnvelope', 'supervisorRunnerSplitFixtures',
                'validateSupervisorRunnerSplitFixtures', 'n8nSupervisorRunnerSplitContract', 'webaiTransferSupervisorRunnerSplitPacket',
                'nexusyncSupervisorRunnerSplitPacket', 'codexSupervisorRunnerSplitCard'
            ],
            requiredOrder: [
                'dry_run_only: read smoke/gate/replay/beforeHash policy without dispatching',
                'ready_for_owner_approval: all technical gates pass but owner action-time approval is still absent',
                'ready_for_real_dispatch: requested mode is real_run and ownerApproval.actionTimeApproved=true with non-expired approval id',
                'dispatch externally exactly once, then archive after evidence and command receipt'
            ],
            invariants: [
                'policyDecision=allow_dispatch_targeted_command is not approval',
                'receipt, marker, hash, archive, smoke result, and userscript output cannot supply owner approval',
                'eventDetail for real dispatch is withheld unless stage=ready_for_real_dispatch',
                'dry_run_only never dispatches and never writes command receipts',
                'containsPromptText=false and containsUserText=false are mandatory'
            ],
            hardStops: ['BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'releaseGate hold', 'missing target', 'missing authoritative hashes', 'invalid or expired owner approval', 'duplicate replay']
        };
    }

    function normalizeRunnerMode(input = {}) {
        const raw = normalizeText(input.runnerMode || input.mode || input.requestedMode || 'dry_run_only').toLowerCase().replace(/[-\s]+/g, '_');
        if (['real_run', 'real', 'dispatch', 'ready_for_real_dispatch'].includes(raw)) return 'real_run';
        if (['owner_approval', 'approval', 'request_owner_approval', 'ready_for_owner_approval'].includes(raw)) return 'request_owner_approval';
        return 'dry_run_only';
    }

    function normalizeRunnerOwnerApproval(input = {}) {
        const approval = input.ownerApproval || input.approval || {};
        const expiresAt = Number(approval.expiresAt || approval.expireAt || 0) || 0;
        return {
            actionTimeApproved: approval.actionTimeApproved === true || approval.approved === true,
            approvalId: normalizeText(approval.approvalId || approval.id || approval.ownerApprovalId || '').slice(0, 120),
            approvedByOwner: approval.approvedByOwner === true || approval.ownerApproved === true || approval.actionTimeApproved === true,
            scope: normalizeText(approval.scope || approval.approvalScope || 'single targeted command').slice(0, 160),
            expiresAt,
            source: normalizeText(approval.source || 'external-owner').slice(0, 80),
            containsPromptText: approval.containsPromptText === true,
            containsUserText: approval.containsUserText === true,
            suppliedByUserscript: approval.suppliedByUserscript === true,
            suppliedByPolicy: approval.suppliedByPolicy === true,
            suppliedByReceipt: approval.suppliedByReceipt === true,
            suppliedByRelayMarker: approval.suppliedByRelayMarker === true,
            suppliedBySmokeMarker: approval.suppliedBySmokeMarker === true,
            suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: approval.suppliedByArchiveEnvelope === true
        };
    }

    function validateRunnerOwnerApproval(approval = {}, profile = 'runner-owner-approval-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (approval.containsPromptText === true || approval.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('owner-approval-must-be-text-free-for-this-api');
        if (approval.suppliedByUserscript || approval.suppliedByPolicy || approval.suppliedByReceipt || approval.suppliedByRelayMarker || approval.suppliedBySmokeMarker || approval.suppliedByArchiveEnvelope) blockers.push('evidence-artifacts-cannot-supply-owner-approval');
        if (approval.actionTimeApproved !== true) blockers.push('owner-action-time-approval-missing');
        if (!approval.approvalId) blockers.push('owner-approval-id-missing');
        if (approval.expiresAt && Number(approval.expiresAt) <= Date.now()) blockers.push('owner-approval-expired');
        if (!approval.expiresAt) warnings.push('owner-approval-expiry-not-provided');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.owner_approval_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            summary: { decision, blockerCount: blockers.length, warningCount: warnings.length }
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(input = {}, profile = 'supervisor-runner-split-policy') {
        const requestedMode = normalizeRunnerMode(input);
        const basePolicy = input.policy && typeof input.policy === 'object'
            ? input.policy
            : buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input, `${profile}:replay-policy`);
        const policyValidation = validateRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(basePolicy, `${profile}:policy-validation`);
        const ownerApprovalArtifact = input.ownerApprovalArtifact || input.approvalArtifact || null;
        const ownerApprovalArtifactValidation = ownerApprovalArtifact ? validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(ownerApprovalArtifact, { commandEnvelope: basePolicy.commandEnvelope || basePolicy.eventDetail || {}, beforeHash: input.beforeHash || basePolicy.before?.beforeHash || '' }, `${profile}:owner-approval-artifact`) : null;
        const approval = ownerApprovalArtifact && ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision !== 'hold' ? ownerApprovalArtifactToRunnerApproval(ownerApprovalArtifact) : normalizeRunnerOwnerApproval(input);
        const approvalValidation = validateRunnerOwnerApproval(approval, `${profile}:owner-approval`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (basePolicy.containsPromptText === true || basePolicy.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('base-policy-text-leak');
        if (policyValidation.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('replay-runner-policy-hold');
        if (basePolicy.policyDecision !== 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command' || basePolicy.allowDispatch !== true) blockers.push('replay-runner-policy-not-allowing-dispatch');
        if (basePolicy.prechecks?.releaseGateDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('release-gate-hold');
        if (Array.isArray(basePolicy.blockers) && basePolicy.blockers.length) blockers.push(...basePolicy.blockers.map((item) => `policy:${String(item).slice(0, 80)}`));
        if (policyValidation.decision === 'caution') warnings.push('replay-runner-policy-caution');
        if (approvalValidation.decision === 'caution') warnings.push('owner-approval-caution');
        if (ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision && ownerApprovalArtifactValidation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-artifact-validation-${ownerApprovalArtifactValidation.decision}`);
        if (requestedMode === 'real_run' && config.ownerApprovalArtifactRequiredForRealRun !== false && !ownerApprovalArtifact) blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-required-for-real-run');
        let runnerStage = 'dry_run_only';
        if (blockers.length) runnerStage = 'hold_real_run';
        else if (requestedMode === 'dry_run_only') runnerStage = 'dry_run_only';
        else if (approvalValidation.decision === 'hold') runnerStage = 'ready_for_owner_approval';
        else runnerStage = 'ready_for_real_dispatch';
        if (runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' && requestedMode !== 'real_run') runnerStage = 'ready_for_owner_approval';
        const runnerDecision = runnerStage;
        const allowDispatch = runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch';
        const uniqueBlockers = Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 18);
        const uniqueWarnings = Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 18);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestedMode,
            runnerStage,
            runnerDecision,
            allowDispatch,
            executableWithoutOwnerApproval: false,
            commandEnvelope: basePolicy.commandEnvelope || {},
            eventDetail: allowDispatch ? basePolicy.eventDetail : null,
            basePolicy: {
                policyDecision: basePolicy.policyDecision || '',
                allowDispatch: basePolicy.allowDispatch === true,
                canRunAccepted: basePolicy.prechecks?.canRunAccepted === true,
                replayAccepted: basePolicy.prechecks?.replayAccepted === true,
                releaseGateDecision: basePolicy.prechecks?.releaseGateDecision || '',
                stateCode: basePolicy.prechecks?.stateCode || '',
                smokeMarkerHash: basePolicy.smoke?.markerHash || '',
                beforeHash: basePolicy.before?.beforeHash || ''
            },
            ownerApprovalArtifact: {
                requiredForRealDispatch: config.ownerApprovalArtifactRequiredForRealRun !== false,
                provided: !!ownerApprovalArtifact,
                validationDecision: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.decision || 'not_provided',
                validationBlockers: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.blockers || [],
                validationWarnings: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.warnings || [],
                artifactId: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.normalized?.artifactId || '',
                beforeHash: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.normalized?.beforeHash || '',
                expiresAt: ownerApprovalArtifactValidation?.normalized?.expiresAt || 0
            },
            ownerApproval: {
                requiredForRealDispatch: true,
                suppliedByUserscript: false,
                suppliedByPolicy: false,
                suppliedByReceipt: false,
                suppliedByRelayMarker: false,
                suppliedBySmokeMarker: false,
                suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: false,
                actionTimeApproved: approval.actionTimeApproved === true,
                approvalId: approval.approvalId || '',
                scope: approval.scope || '',
                expiresAt: approval.expiresAt || 0,
                source: approval.source || '',
                validationDecision: approvalValidation.decision,
                validationBlockers: approvalValidation.blockers,
                validationWarnings: approvalValidation.warnings
            },
            blockers: uniqueBlockers,
            warnings: uniqueWarnings,
            next: allowDispatch
                ? 'external supervisor may dispatch eventDetail exactly once only after preserving owner approval evidence and beforeHash'
                : runnerStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval'
                    ? 'technical gates pass; request owner action-time approval, then re-run with mode=real_run and ownerApproval'
                    : runnerStage === 'dry_run_only'
                        ? 'dry run only; do not dispatch and do not write command receipts'
                        : 'hold; do not dispatch; preserve text-free evidence and notify owner/supervisor',
            stopIf: ['runnerStage !== ready_for_real_dispatch', 'owner approval missing/expired', 'releaseGate hold', 'duplicate replay', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP'],
            rule: 'Runner split policy is read-only. It never dispatches commands and never supplies owner approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildDryRunSupervisorPolicy(input = {}, profile = 'dry-run-supervisor-policy') {
        return buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(Object.assign({}, input || {}, { mode: 'dry_run_only' }), profile);
    }

    function buildRealRunSupervisorPolicy(input = {}, profile = 'real-run-supervisor-policy') {
        return buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(Object.assign({}, input || {}, { mode: 'real_run' }), profile);
    }

    function validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(policy = {}, profile = 'supervisor-runner-split-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const allowedStages = ['dry_run_only', 'ready_for_owner_approval', 'ready_for_real_dispatch', 'hold_real_run'];
        if (policy.containsPromptText === true || policy.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('runner-policy-must-be-text-free');
        if (!allowedStages.includes(policy.runnerStage || policy.runnerDecision || '')) blockers.push('unknown-runnerStage');
        if (policy.executableWithoutOwnerApproval === true) blockers.push('runner-must-not-be-executable-without-owner-approval');
        if (policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByUserscript === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByPolicy === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByReceipt === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByRelayMarker === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedBySmokeMarker === true || policy.ownerApproval?.suppliedByArchiveEnvelope === true) blockers.push('runner-evidence-artifact-cannot-supply-owner-approval');
        if (policy.ownerApprovalArtifact?.requiredForRealDispatch === true && policy.runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' && policy.ownerApprovalArtifact?.provided !== true) blockers.push('runner-real-dispatch-missing-owner-approval-artifact');
