        if (policy.ownerApprovalArtifact?.validationDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('runner-owner-approval-artifact-validation-hold');
        if ((policy.runnerStage === 'dry_run_only' || policy.runnerStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval' || policy.runnerStage === 'hold_real_run') && policy.allowDispatch === true) blockers.push('non-real-dispatch-stage-must-not-allowDispatch');
        if (policy.runnerStage !== 'ready_for_real_dispatch' && policy.eventDetail) warnings.push('non-real-stage-should-withhold-eventDetail');
        if (policy.runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch') {
            if (policy.allowDispatch !== true) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-must-set-allowDispatch');
            if (!policy.eventDetail) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-missing-eventDetail');
            if (policy.ownerApproval?.actionTimeApproved !== true) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-missing-owner-approval');
            if (!policy.ownerApproval?.approvalId) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-missing-approvalId');
            if (policy.ownerApproval?.validationDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-owner-approval-validation-hold');
            if (policy.basePolicy?.policyDecision !== 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command') blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-base-policy-not-allowing');
            if (policy.basePolicy?.canRunAccepted !== true) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-canRun-not-accepted');
            if (policy.basePolicy?.replayAccepted !== true) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-replay-not-accepted');
            if (policy.basePolicy?.releaseGateDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-releaseGate-hold');
            const env = policy.commandEnvelope || {};
            if ((env.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || env.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !env.targetTabId && !env.targetConversationId) blockers.push('ready-real-dispatch-missing-target');
        }
        if (policy.runnerStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval' && policy.ownerApproval?.actionTimeApproved === true && policy.requestedMode === 'real_run') warnings.push('owner-approval-present-but-validation-not-pass');
        const uniqueBlockers = Array.from(new Set(blockers));
        const uniqueWarnings = Array.from(new Set(warnings));
        const decision = uniqueBlockers.length ? 'hold' : uniqueWarnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers: uniqueBlockers,
            warnings: uniqueWarnings,
            summary: { decision, blockerCount: uniqueBlockers.length, warningCount: uniqueWarnings.length }
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorRunnerSplitEnvelope(input = {}, profile = 'supervisor-runner-split-envelope') {
        const policy = buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.runner_envelope`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            runnerStage: policy.runnerStage,
            runnerDecision: policy.runnerDecision,
            allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
            eventName: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
            eventDetail: policy.eventDetail,
            command: policy.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
            requestId: policy.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
            targetTabId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
            ownerApproval: policy.ownerApproval,
            validation: validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(policy, `${profile}:validation`).summary,
            next: policy.next,
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorRunnerSplitFixturePack(profile = 'supervisor-runner-split-fixtures') {
        const hashA = 'a'.repeat(64);
        const hashB = 'b'.repeat(64);
        const future = Date.now() + 60000;
        const base = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            requestedMode: 'real_run',
            runnerStage: 'ready_for_real_dispatch',
            runnerDecision: 'ready_for_real_dispatch',
            allowDispatch: true,
            executableWithoutOwnerApproval: false,
            eventDetail: { requestId: 'fixture-runner-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-1', ts: 1, expiresAt: future },
            commandEnvelope: { requestId: 'fixture-runner-1', command: 'continue_now', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', targetConversationId: 'conv-1' },
            basePolicy: { policyDecision: 'allow_dispatch_targeted_command', allowDispatch: true, canRunAccepted: true, replayAccepted: true, releaseGateDecision: 'pass', smokeMarkerHash: hashA, beforeHash: hashB },
            ownerApproval: { requiredForRealDispatch: true, suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByPolicy: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false, suppliedBySmokeMarker: false, suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: false, actionTimeApproved: true, approvalId: 'owner-fixture-approval', expiresAt: future, validationDecision: 'pass' },
            blockers: [],
            warnings: []
        };
        const dry = Object.assign({}, base, { requestedMode: 'dry_run_only', runnerStage: 'dry_run_only', runnerDecision: 'dry_run_only', allowDispatch: false, eventDetail: null, ownerApproval: Object.assign({}, base.ownerApproval, { actionTimeApproved: false, approvalId: '', validationDecision: 'hold' }) });
        const approvalReady = Object.assign({}, base, { requestedMode: 'request_owner_approval', runnerStage: 'ready_for_owner_approval', runnerDecision: 'ready_for_owner_approval', allowDispatch: false, eventDetail: null, ownerApproval: Object.assign({}, base.ownerApproval, { actionTimeApproved: false, approvalId: '', validationDecision: 'hold' }) });
        const mustPass = [
            { id: 'dry-run-never-allows-dispatch', policy: dry, expect: 'pass' },
            { id: 'ready-for-owner-approval-withholds-eventDetail', policy: approvalReady, expect: 'pass' },
            { id: 'ready-real-dispatch-requires-valid-owner-approval', policy: base, expect: 'pass' }
        ];
        const mustFail = [
            { id: 'fail-real-dispatch-without-owner-approval', policy: Object.assign({}, base, { ownerApproval: Object.assign({}, base.ownerApproval, { actionTimeApproved: false, approvalId: '', validationDecision: 'hold' }) }), expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-dry-run-with-allowDispatch', policy: Object.assign({}, dry, { allowDispatch: true }), expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-ready-approval-with-eventDetail', policy: Object.assign({}, approvalReady, { eventDetail: base.eventDetail }), expect: 'caution' },
            { id: 'fail-artifact-supplies-owner-approval', policy: Object.assign({}, base, { ownerApproval: Object.assign({}, base.ownerApproval, { suppliedByReceipt: true }) }), expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-executable-without-owner-approval', policy: Object.assign({}, base, { executableWithoutOwnerApproval: true }), expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-prompt-text-leak', policy: Object.assign({}, base, { containsPromptText: true }), expect: 'hold' }
        ];
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: mustPass.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, expect: item.expect, validation: validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(item.policy, `${profile}:${item.id}`) })),
            mustFail: mustFail.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, expect: item.expect, validation: validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(item.policy, `${profile}:${item.id}`) })),
            rule: 'Fixtures are pure/static. They do not call supervisorLoopGate/releaseGate and never dispatch commands.'
        };
    }

    function validateSupervisorRunnerSplitFixtures(profile = 'supervisor-runner-split-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildSupervisorRunnerSplitFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: item.validation.decision === item.expect, decision: item.validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [], warnings: item.validation.warnings || [] });
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: item.validation.decision === item.expect, decision: item.validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [], warnings: item.validation.warnings || [] });
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildN8nSupervisorRunnerSplitContract(profile = 'n8n-supervisor-runner-split') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { if: 'runnerStage == dry_run_only', branch: 'READ_ONLY_PRECHECK_ONLY', action: 'do not dispatch; archive smoke/preflight evidence only' },
                { if: 'runnerStage == ready_for_owner_approval', branch: 'REQUEST_OWNER_ACTION_TIME_APPROVAL', action: 'show compact policy/evidence; do not dispatch' },
                { if: 'runnerStage == ready_for_real_dispatch', branch: 'DISPATCH_TARGETED_COMMAND_ONCE', action: `dispatch ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} with eventDetail exactly once, then archive after evidence` },
                { if: 'runnerStage == hold_real_run', branch: 'HALT_AND_NOTIFY_OWNER', action: 'preserve text-free evidence; do not retry blindly' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['eventDetail missing', 'owner approval missing/expired', 'policy/releaseGate hold', 'duplicate replay', 'missing target', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP'],
            rule: 'Pseudo n8n contract only; do not use Execute Command and do not treat policy allow as approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferSupervisorRunnerSplitPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-runner-split') {
        const policy = buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResult: {
                marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RUNNER_SPLIT]',
                runnerStage: policy.runnerStage,
                allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
                requestId: policy.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
                command: policy.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
                targetConversationId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
                approvalRequired: true,
                approvalPresent: policy.ownerApproval?.actionTimeApproved === true,
                notOwnerApproval: true
            },
            policy,
            next: policy.next
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncSupervisorRunnerSplitPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-runner-split') {
        const policy = buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(input, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            recordType: 'cgpt_auto_continue_runner_split_policy',
            createdAt: policy.generatedAt,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            runnerStage: policy.runnerStage,
            allowDispatch: policy.allowDispatch,
            requestId: policy.commandEnvelope?.requestId || '',
            command: policy.commandEnvelope?.command || '',
            targetTabId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: policy.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
            ownerApproval: { required: true, actionTimeApproved: policy.ownerApproval?.actionTimeApproved === true, approvalId: policy.ownerApproval?.approvalId || '', expiresAt: policy.ownerApproval?.expiresAt || 0 },
            basePolicy: policy.basePolicy,
            blockers: policy.blockers,
            warnings: policy.warnings,
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            policy,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalJsonLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            rule: 'Archive this split policy before dispatch. It is not owner approval and not a command receipt.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexSupervisorRunnerSplitCard(profile = 'codex-runner-split-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${REAL_LOOP_RUNNER_SPLIT_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Use runner split to distinguish dry-run, owner-approval-ready, and real-dispatch-ready; do not dispatch unless runnerStage=ready_for_real_dispatch and owner approval is explicit.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, mode:'dry_run_only'}, 'codex-dry-run')`,
            approvalProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, mode:'request_owner_approval'}, 'codex-approval-ready')`,
            realRunProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy({smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, mode:'real_run', ownerApproval}, 'codex-real-run')`,
            forbidden: ['do not parse panel text', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not dispatch from dry_run_only or ready_for_owner_approval', 'do not treat policy/receipt/hash/marker as approval'],
            dispatchOnlyIf: ['runnerStage === ready_for_real_dispatch', 'allowDispatch === true', 'eventDetail exists', 'ownerApproval.actionTimeApproved === true', 'validateSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(policy).decision !== hold']
        };
    }


    // v207: minimal owner action-time approval artifact schema.
    // This layer is read-only and does not create approval. It only validates
    // externally supplied owner approval artifacts before real dispatch. Receipts,
    // hashes, relay markers, smoke results, and userscript outputs remain evidence,
    // never approval.
    function isLikelySha256Hex(value) {
        return /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(value || ''));
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalArtifactContract(profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-contract') {
        return {
            schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Validate external owner action-time approval before exposing real-dispatch eventDetail.',
            artifactKind: 'owner_action_time_approval',
            templateOnly: true,
            requiredFields: ['schema', 'artifactKind', 'artifactId', 'actionTimeApproved', 'approvedByOwner', 'issuedAt', 'expiresAt', 'commandEnvelope', 'beforeHash', 'scope', 'sourceInfo'],
            bindingFields: {
                commandEnvelope: ['requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId?', 'targetConversationId?', 'risk?'],
                beforeHash: 'real before evidence sha256, computed by external supervisor/Nexusync adapter',
                scope: ['allowedCommand', 'targetTabId?', 'targetConversationId?', 'maxDispatchCount=1'],
                expiry: ['issuedAt', 'expiresAt'],
                sourceInfo: ['source', 'ownerActionTimeApproval=true', 'notRelayMarker', 'notReceipt', 'notSmokeResult', 'containsPromptText=false', 'containsUserText=false']
            },
            invariants: [
                'This userscript cannot self-approve real dispatch.',
                'Approval artifact must be supplied by owner/supervisor at action time.',
                'Approval artifact must be text-free for this API.',
                'Relay marker, smoke result, command receipt, evidence hash, and archive envelope cannot supply approval.',
                'Approval must bind to requestId/command/target and beforeHash; it expires.'
            ],
            exportedApi: [
                'ownerApprovalArtifactContract', 'ownerApprovalArtifactTemplate', 'validateOwnerApprovalArtifact',
                'ownerApprovalArtifactBindingPreview', 'ownerApprovalArtifactFixtures', 'validateOwnerApprovalArtifactFixtures',
                'n8nOwnerApprovalArtifactContract', 'webaiTransferOwnerApprovalArtifactPacket',
                'nexusyncOwnerApprovalArtifactPacket', 'codexOwnerApprovalArtifactCard'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalArtifactTemplate(commandEnvelope = {}, beforeHash = '', profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-template') {
        const now = Date.now();
        const env = commandEnvelope && typeof commandEnvelope === 'object' ? commandEnvelope : {};
        return {
            schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date(now).toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            templateOnly: true,
            artifactKind: 'owner_action_time_approval',
            artifactId: 'owner-approval-REPLACE-ME',
            actionTimeApproved: false,
            approvedByOwner: false,
            issuedAt: now,
            expiresAt: now + 5 * 60 * 1000,
            commandEnvelope: {
                requestId: env.requestId || '',
                command: env.command || '',
                targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
                targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
                risk: env.risk || getControlCommandRisk(env.command || '')
            },
            beforeHash: beforeHash || '',
            scope: {
                allowedCommand: env.command || '',
                targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
                targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
                maxDispatchCount: 1,
                singleUse: true
            },
            sourceInfo: {
                source: 'owner-action-time-ui-or-supervisor',
                ownerActionTimeApproval: false,
                relayMarkerIsApproval: false,
                commandReceiptIsApproval: false,
                smokeResultIsApproval: false,
                archiveEnvelopeIsApproval: false,
                userscriptGeneratedApproval: false,
                containsPromptText: false,
                containsUserText: false
            },
            note: 'Template only. External owner/supervisor must set actionTimeApproved=true and approvedByOwner=true at action time after verifying scope and hashes.'
        };
    }

    function normalizeOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact = {}) {
        const src = artifact && typeof artifact === 'object' ? artifact : {};
        const env = src.commandEnvelope && typeof src.commandEnvelope === 'object' ? src.commandEnvelope : {};
        const scope = src.scope && typeof src.scope === 'object' ? src.scope : {};
        const sourceInfo = src.sourceInfo && typeof src.sourceInfo === 'object' ? src.sourceInfo : {};
        return {
            schema: normalizeText(src.schema || OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA),
            version: normalizeText(src.version || '').slice(0, 80),
            artifactKind: normalizeText(src.artifactKind || '').slice(0, 120),
            artifactId: normalizeText(src.artifactId || src.approvalId || src.id || '').slice(0, 160),
            actionTimeApproved: src.actionTimeApproved === true || src.approved === true,
            approvedByOwner: src.approvedByOwner === true || src.ownerApproved === true || src.actionTimeApproved === true,
            issuedAt: Number(src.issuedAt || src.createdAt || 0) || 0,
            expiresAt: Number(src.expiresAt || src.expireAt || 0) || 0,
            containsPromptText: src.containsPromptText === true || sourceInfo.containsPromptText === true,
            containsUserText: src.containsUserText === true || sourceInfo.containsUserText === true,
            templateOnly: src.templateOnly === true || src.placeholder === true,
            commandEnvelope: {
                requestId: normalizeText(env.requestId || '').slice(0, 160),
                command: normalizeText(env.command || '').slice(0, 80),
                targetTabId: normalizeText(env.targetTabId || '').slice(0, 120),
                targetConversationId: normalizeText(env.targetConversationId || '').slice(0, 160),
                risk: normalizeText(env.risk || '').slice(0, 80)
            },
            beforeHash: normalizeText(src.beforeHash || src.realBeforeHash || '').slice(0, 128),
            scope: {
                allowedCommand: normalizeText(scope.allowedCommand || scope.command || env.command || '').slice(0, 80),
                targetTabId: normalizeText(scope.targetTabId || env.targetTabId || '').slice(0, 120),
                targetConversationId: normalizeText(scope.targetConversationId || env.targetConversationId || '').slice(0, 160),
                maxDispatchCount: Number(scope.maxDispatchCount || 1) || 1,
                singleUse: scope.singleUse !== false
            },
            sourceInfo: {
                source: normalizeText(sourceInfo.source || src.source || '').slice(0, 120),
                ownerActionTimeApproval: sourceInfo.ownerActionTimeApproval === true || src.ownerActionTimeApproval === true,
                relayMarkerIsApproval: sourceInfo.relayMarkerIsApproval === true || src.relayMarkerIsApproval === true,
                commandReceiptIsApproval: sourceInfo.commandReceiptIsApproval === true || src.commandReceiptIsApproval === true,
                smokeResultIsApproval: sourceInfo.smokeResultIsApproval === true || src.smokeResultIsApproval === true,
                archiveEnvelopeIsApproval: sourceInfo.archiveEnvelopeIsApproval === true || src.archiveEnvelopeIsApproval === true,
                userscriptGeneratedApproval: sourceInfo.userscriptGeneratedApproval === true || src.userscriptGeneratedApproval === true,
                containsPromptText: sourceInfo.containsPromptText === true,
                containsUserText: sourceInfo.containsUserText === true
            }
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact = {}, expected = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-validation') {
        const a = normalizeOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact);
        const expectedEnv = expected.commandEnvelope || expected.envelope || expected.eventDetail || {};
        const expectedBeforeHash = normalizeText(expected.beforeHash || expected.realBeforeHash || '');
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (a.schema && a.schema !== OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA) blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-schema-mismatch');
        if (!a.schema) blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-schema-missing');
        if (a.artifactKind && a.artifactKind !== 'owner_action_time_approval') blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-kind-invalid');
        if (!a.artifactId) blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-id-missing');
        if (a.templateOnly) blockers.push('template-or-placeholder-cannot-approve');
        if (a.actionTimeApproved !== true || a.approvedByOwner !== true) blockers.push('owner-action-time-approval-missing');
        if (!a.issuedAt) warnings.push('owner-approval-issuedAt-missing');
        if (!a.expiresAt) blockers.push('owner-approval-expiry-missing');
        else if (a.expiresAt <= Date.now()) blockers.push('owner-approval-expired');
        if (a.containsPromptText || a.containsUserText) blockers.push('owner-approval-artifact-must-be-text-free');
        if (a.sourceInfo.relayMarkerIsApproval || a.sourceInfo.commandReceiptIsApproval || a.sourceInfo.smokeResultIsApproval || a.sourceInfo.archiveEnvelopeIsApproval || a.sourceInfo.userscriptGeneratedApproval) blockers.push('evidence-artifact-cannot-supply-owner-approval');
        if (a.sourceInfo.ownerActionTimeApproval !== true) blockers.push('sourceInfo-ownerActionTimeApproval-required');
        if (!a.commandEnvelope.command) blockers.push('owner-approval-command-missing');
        if (!a.commandEnvelope.requestId) blockers.push('owner-approval-requestId-missing');
        if (!a.beforeHash) blockers.push('owner-approval-beforeHash-missing');
        else if (!isLikelySha256Hex(a.beforeHash)) blockers.push('owner-approval-beforeHash-must-be-sha256');
        if (expectedBeforeHash) {
            if (!isLikelySha256Hex(expectedBeforeHash)) warnings.push('expected-beforeHash-not-sha256');
            else if (a.beforeHash.toLowerCase() !== expectedBeforeHash.toLowerCase()) blockers.push('owner-approval-beforeHash-mismatch');
        }
        if (expectedEnv.command && a.commandEnvelope.command !== expectedEnv.command) blockers.push('owner-approval-command-mismatch');
        if (expectedEnv.requestId && a.commandEnvelope.requestId !== expectedEnv.requestId) blockers.push('owner-approval-requestId-mismatch');
        if (expectedEnv.targetTabId && a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId && a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId !== expectedEnv.targetTabId) blockers.push('owner-approval-targetTabId-mismatch');
        if (expectedEnv.targetConversationId && a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId && a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId !== expectedEnv.targetConversationId) blockers.push('owner-approval-targetConversationId-mismatch');
        if (a.scope.allowedCommand && a.scope.allowedCommand !== a.commandEnvelope.command) blockers.push('owner-approval-scope-command-mismatch');
        if (a.scope.targetTabId && a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId && a.scope.targetTabId !== a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId) blockers.push('owner-approval-scope-tab-mismatch');
        if (a.scope.targetConversationId && a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId && a.scope.targetConversationId !== a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId) blockers.push('owner-approval-scope-conversation-mismatch');
        if (a.scope.maxDispatchCount !== 1) blockers.push('owner-approval-maxDispatchCount-must-be-1');
        if (a.scope.singleUse !== true) blockers.push('owner-approval-singleUse-required');
        const risk = a.commandEnvelope.risk || getControlCommandRisk(a.commandEnvelope.command || '');
        if ((risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId && !a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId) blockers.push('owner-approval-target-required-for-mutating-command');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)),
            normalized: {
                artifactId: a.artifactId,
                command: a.commandEnvelope.command,
                requestId: a.commandEnvelope.requestId,
                targetTabId: a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId,
                targetConversationId: a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId,
                beforeHash: a.beforeHash,
                expiresAt: a.expiresAt,
                source: a.sourceInfo.source,
                scope: a.scope
            },
            summary: { decision, blockerCount: blockers.length, warningCount: warnings.length }
        };
    }

    function ownerApprovalArtifactToRunnerApproval(artifact = {}) {
        const a = normalizeOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact);
        return {
            actionTimeApproved: a.actionTimeApproved === true,
            approvedByOwner: a.approvedByOwner === true,
            approvalId: a.artifactId,
            scope: `artifact:${a.scope.allowedCommand || a.commandEnvelope.command || 'command'}:${a.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId || a.commandEnvelope.targetTabId || 'target'}`,
            expiresAt: a.expiresAt,
            source: a.sourceInfo.source || 'owner-approval-artifact',
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            suppliedByUserscript: false,
            suppliedByPolicy: false,
            suppliedByReceipt: false,
            suppliedByRelayMarker: false,
            suppliedBySmokeMarker: false,
            suppliedByArchiveEnvelope: false
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalArtifactBindingPreview(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-binding-preview') {
        const policy = input.policy && typeof input.policy === 'object' ? input.policy : buildRealLoopReplayRunnerPolicy(input, `${profile}:policy`);
        const envelope = input.commandEnvelope || policy.commandEnvelope || policy.eventDetail || {};
        const beforeHash = input.beforeHash || policy.before?.beforeHash || '';
        const artifact = input.ownerApprovalArtifact || input.approvalArtifact || buildOwnerApprovalArtifactTemplate(envelope, beforeHash, `${profile}:template`);
        const validation = validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact, { commandEnvelope: envelope, beforeHash }, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.binding_preview`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            expected: {
                command: envelope.command || '',
                requestId: envelope.requestId || '',
                targetTabId: envelope.targetTabId || '',
                targetConversationId: envelope.targetConversationId || '',
                beforeHash
            },
            validation,
            approvalForRunner: validation.decision === 'pass' || validation.decision === 'caution' ? ownerApprovalArtifactToRunnerApproval(artifact) : null,
            rule: 'Binding preview is read-only. It validates but does not approve or dispatch.'
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalArtifactFixturePack(profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-fixtures') {
        const future = Date.now() + 60000;
        const beforeHash = 'a'.repeat(64);
        const env = { requestId: 'fixture-owner-approval-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-1', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab' };
        const base = {
            schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            templateOnly: false,
            artifactKind: 'owner_action_time_approval',
            artifactId: 'owner-approval-fixture-1',
            actionTimeApproved: true,
            approvedByOwner: true,
            issuedAt: Date.now(),
            expiresAt: future,
            commandEnvelope: env,
            beforeHash,
            scope: { allowedCommand: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-1', maxDispatchCount: 1, singleUse: true },
            sourceInfo: { source: 'fixture-owner', ownerActionTimeApproval: true, relayMarkerIsApproval: false, commandReceiptIsApproval: false, smokeResultIsApproval: false, archiveEnvelopeIsApproval: false, userscriptGeneratedApproval: false, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false }
        };
        const mustPass = [
            { id: 'valid-owner-approval-artifact', artifact: base, expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'pass' }
        ];
        const mustFail = [
            { id: 'fail-template-only', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { templateOnly: true }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-missing-action-time-approval', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { actionTimeApproved: false, approvedByOwner: false }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-expired-approval', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { expiresAt: Date.now() - 1 }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-beforeHash-mismatch', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { beforeHash: 'b'.repeat(64) }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-receipt-as-approval', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { sourceInfo: Object.assign({}, base.sourceInfo, { commandReceiptIsApproval: true }) }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-text-leak', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { containsPromptText: true }), expected: { commandEnvelope: env, beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' },
            { id: 'fail-missing-target-for-send-risk', artifact: Object.assign({}, base, { commandEnvelope: Object.assign({}, env, { targetConversationId: '' }), scope: { allowedCommand: 'continue_now', maxDispatchCount: 1, singleUse: true } }), expected: { commandEnvelope: Object.assign({}, env, { targetConversationId: '' }), beforeHash }, expect: 'hold' }
        ];
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: mustPass.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, expect: item.expect, validation: validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(item.artifact, item.expected, `${profile}:${item.id}`) })),
            mustFail: mustFail.map((item) => ({ id: item.id, expect: item.expect, validation: validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(item.artifact, item.expected, `${profile}:${item.id}`) }))
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalArtifactFixtures(profile = 'owner-approval-artifact-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildOwnerApprovalArtifactFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: item.validation.decision === item.expect, decision: item.validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [], warnings: item.validation.warnings || [] });
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: item.validation.decision === item.expect, decision: item.validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: item.validation.blockers || [], warnings: item.validation.warnings || [] });
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildN8nOwnerApprovalArtifactContract(profile = 'n8n-owner-approval-artifact-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { if: 'runnerStage == ready_for_owner_approval', branch: 'REQUEST_OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT', action: 'show commandEnvelope + beforeHash + scope to owner; do not dispatch' },
                { if: 'validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact).decision == pass', branch: 'RECHECK_RUNNER_POLICY_REAL_RUN', action: 'call supervisorRunnerSplitPolicy({mode:"real_run", ownerApprovalArtifact, beforeHash})' },
                { if: 'runnerStage == ready_for_real_dispatch', branch: 'DISPATCH_ONCE', action: 'dispatch eventDetail once, then archive commandReceipt + afterHash' },
                { if: 'artifact validation hold', branch: 'HOLD_NOTIFY_OWNER', action: 'preserve evidence; do not dispatch' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['artifact missing', 'artifact expired', 'artifact beforeHash mismatch', 'artifact command/target mismatch', 'receipt/marker/smoke/archive pretending to be approval']
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferOwnerApprovalArtifactPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-owner-approval-artifact') {
        const preview = buildOwnerApprovalArtifactBindingPreview(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_VALIDATION]',
            validationDecision: preview.validation.decision,
            blockerCount: preview.validation.blockers.length,
            warningCount: preview.validation.warnings.length,
            command: preview.expected.command,
            requestId: preview.expected.requestId,
            targetConversationId: preview.expected.targetConversationId,
            beforeHash: preview.expected.beforeHash,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            next: preview.validation.decision === 'pass' ? 're-run realRunSupervisorPolicy with the same artifact and owner approval evidence archived externally' : 'hold real dispatch and notify owner/supervisor'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncOwnerApprovalArtifactPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-owner-approval-artifact') {
        const preview = buildOwnerApprovalArtifactBindingPreview(input, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: preview.generatedAt,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            validationDecision: preview.validation.decision,
            expected: preview.expected,
            normalizedArtifact: preview.validation.normalized,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            externalSha256Required: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalJsonLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            rule: 'This packet records validation. It does not itself grant approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexOwnerApprovalArtifactCard(profile = 'codex-owner-approval-artifact-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Before real dispatch, validate an external owner approval artifact bound to commandEnvelope, beforeHash, target scope, and expiry.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.ownerApprovalArtifactBindingPreview({ownerApprovalArtifact, commandEnvelope, beforeHash})`,
            realRunProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.realRunSupervisorPolicy({mode:'real_run', smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifact})`,
            forbidden: ['do not invent owner approval', 'do not use receipt/marker/hash/smoke/archive as approval', 'do not dispatch when artifact validation is hold', 'do not include prompt/user text in approval artifacts'],
            dispatchOnlyIf: ['artifact validation decision is pass', 'runnerStage === ready_for_real_dispatch', 'eventDetail exists', 'owner action-time approval evidence is archived externally']
        };
    }


    // v208: Owner Approval Artifact Receipt Binding.
    // This is the archival bridge between explicit owner approval and actual execution evidence.
    // It does not dispatch and does not approve. It binds externally archived approvalArtifactHash
    // with beforeHash, commandEnvelope, commandReceipt, afterHash, and optional archival envelope.
    function buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingContract(profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.contract`,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Bind owner action-time approval artifact hash to one targeted command receipt and before/after evidence hashes for Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n/Codex archival.',
            requiredFields: ['approvalArtifactHash', 'ownerApprovalValidation', 'beforeHash', 'commandEnvelope', 'commandReceipt', 'afterHash', 'commandEvidencePairValidation'],
            optionalFields: ['archiveEnvelope', 'smokeMarkerHash', 'externalArchivePath', 'nexusyncRecordPath'],
            invariant: [
                'Approval artifact hash is evidence of owner approval artifact archive, not approval by itself.',
                'Command receipt proves the page accepted/processed the command envelope; receipt is not approval.',
                'beforeHash and afterHash are authoritative only when computed by external supervisor/Nexusync adapter.',
                'Binding is single-command/single-target/single-use by requestId + command + target.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.'
            ],
            exportedApi: [
                'ownerApprovalReceiptBindingContract', 'ownerApprovalReceiptBinding', 'validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding',
                'ownerApprovalReceiptBindingFixtures', 'validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingFixtures',
                'nexusyncOwnerApprovalReceiptArchivePacket', 'webaiTransferOwnerApprovalReceiptPacket',
                'n8nOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingContract', 'codexOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingCard'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeApprovalReceiptBindingInput(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding-input') {
        const src = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
        const artifact = src.ownerApprovalArtifact || src.approvalArtifact || null;
        const artifactNorm = artifact ? normalizeOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact) : null;
        const envRaw = src.commandEnvelope || src.eventDetail || src.envelope || artifactNorm?.commandEnvelope || {};
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envRaw || {});
        const beforeHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.beforeHash || src.realBeforeHash || artifactNorm?.beforeHash || env.args?.beforeHash || '');
        const afterHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.afterHash || src.realAfterHash || env.args?.afterHash || '');
        const approvalArtifactHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || src.approvalArtifactHash || src.approvalHash || '');
        const receipt = src.commandReceipt || src.receipt || src.commandEvidencePair?.commandReceipt || findReceiptForEnvelope(env) || null;
        const ownerApprovalValidation = src.ownerApprovalValidation || (artifact ? validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact, { commandEnvelope: env.raw || env, beforeHash }, `${profile}:owner-approval-validation`) : null);
        let pair = src.commandEvidencePair || null;
        if (!pair) {
            const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName);
            pair = {
                schema: `${COMMAND_EVIDENCE_PAIRING_SCHEMA}.pair`,
                version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
                build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
                generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
                containsPromptText: false,
                containsUserText: false,
                reason: `${profile}:synthetic-pair`,
                pairId: makeCommandEvidencePairId(env, beforeHash, afterHash),
                beforeHash,
                afterHash,
                commandEnvelope: {
                    requestId: env.requestId,
                    command: env.commandName,
                    risk,
                    targetTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
                    targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
                    broadcast: !!env.broadcast,
                    ts: env.ts || 0,
                    expiresAt: env.expiresAt || 0,
                    envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(env)
                },
                commandReceipt: receipt,
                replayStatus: { acceptedForReplay: false, reason: receipt ? 'receipt-bound-archive' : 'receipt-missing', receiptKey: receipt?.receiptKey || '' },
                externalArchive: { authoritativeHashRequired: true },
                validation: null,
                ownerApproval: { suppliedByUserscript: false, suppliedByReceipt: false, suppliedByRelayMarker: false }
            };
        }
        const pairValidation = src.commandEvidencePairValidation || pair.validation || validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair, `${profile}:pair-validation`);
        const archiveEnvelope = src.archiveEnvelope || src.realLoopArchivalEnvelope || null;
        return { artifact, artifactNorm, env, beforeHash, afterHash, approvalArtifactHash, receipt, ownerApprovalValidation, pair, pairValidation, archiveEnvelope };
    }

    function makeOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingId(input = {}) {
        const raw = [input.approvalArtifactHash || '', input.beforeHash || '', input.afterHash || '', input.env?.requestId || '', input.env?.commandName || '', input.env?.targetTabId || '', input.env?.targetConversationId || '', input.receipt?.receiptKey || ''].join('|');
        return `oarb-${makeBoundedSignature(raw, 1600).hash}`;
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding') {
        const n = normalizeApprovalReceiptBindingInput(input, profile);
        const ownerDecision = n.ownerApprovalValidation?.decision || 'not_provided';
        const pairDecision = n.pairValidation?.decision || n.pairValidation?.summary?.decision || 'unknown';
        const archiveDecision = n.archiveEnvelope ? validateRealLoopArchivalEnvelope(n.archiveEnvelope, `${profile}:archive-validation`) : null;
        const binding = {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.binding`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            bindingId: makeOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingId(n),
            approvalArtifactHash: n.approvalArtifactHash,
            beforeHash: n.beforeHash,
            afterHash: n.afterHash,
            smokeMarkerHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(input.smokeMarkerHash || ''),
            commandEnvelope: {
                requestId: n.env.requestId,
                command: n.env.commandName,
                risk: getControlCommandRisk(n.env.commandName),
                targetTabId: n.env.targetTabId || '',
                targetConversationId: n.env.targetConversationId || '',
                envelopeHash: buildCommandEnvelopePreviewHash(n.env)
            },
            ownerApproval: {
                validationDecision: ownerDecision,
                validationBlockers: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.blockers || [],
                validationWarnings: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.warnings || [],
                artifactId: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.normalized?.artifactId || n.artifactNorm?.artifactId || '',
                artifactKind: n.artifactNorm?.artifactKind || '',
                expiresAt: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.normalized?.expiresAt || n.artifactNorm?.expiresAt || 0,
                source: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.normalized?.source || n.artifactNorm?.sourceInfo?.source || '',
                artifactHashAuthority: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter'
            },
            commandReceipt: n.receipt ? {
                schema: n.receipt.schema || COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA,
                receiptKey: n.receipt.receiptKey || '',
                requestId: n.receipt.requestId || '',
                command: n.receipt.command || '',
                risk: n.receipt.risk || '',
                accepted: n.receipt.accepted === true,
                ok: n.receipt.ok,
                phase: n.receipt.phase || '',
                time: n.receipt.time || '',
                envelopeHash: n.receipt.envelopeHash || ''
            } : null,
            commandEvidencePair: {
                pairId: n.pair?.pairId || '',
                validationDecision: pairDecision,
                validationBlockers: n.pairValidation?.blockers || n.pairValidation?.summary?.blockers || [],
                validationWarnings: n.pairValidation?.warnings || n.pairValidation?.summary?.warnings || []
            },
            archiveEnvelope: n.archiveEnvelope ? {
                schema: n.archiveEnvelope.schema || `${REAL_LOOP_ARCHIVAL_ENVELOPE_SCHEMA}.envelope`,
                archiveId: n.archiveEnvelope.archiveId || '',
                validationDecision: archiveDecision?.decision || 'unknown',
                validationBlockers: archiveDecision?.blockers || [],
                validationWarnings: archiveDecision?.warnings || []
            } : null,
            externalArchive: {
                authoritativeHasher: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter',
                approvalArtifactHashRequired: true,
                beforeAfterHashRequired: true,
                recordPath: input.externalArchivePath || input.nexusyncRecordPath || '',
                hashAlgorithm: 'sha256'
            },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            approvalIsExternal: true,
            validation: null
        };
        binding.validation = validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(binding, `${profile}:inline`).summary;
        return binding;
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(binding = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding-validation') {
        const b = binding && typeof binding === 'object' ? binding : {};
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        const approvalHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(b.approvalArtifactHash || '');
        const before = normalizeEvidenceHash(b.beforeHash || '');
        const after = normalizeEvidenceHash(b.afterHash || '');
        const env = b.commandEnvelope || {};
        const receipt = b.commandReceipt || null;
        const ownerValidation = b.ownerApproval || {};
        const pair = b.commandEvidencePair || {};
        const archive = b.archiveEnvelope || null;
        if (b.containsPromptText === true || b.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('approval-receipt-binding-must-be-text-free');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(approvalHash)) blockers.push('approvalArtifactHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(before)) blockers.push('beforeHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(after)) blockers.push('afterHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (approvalHash && approvalHash === before) warnings.push('approvalArtifactHash-equals-beforeHash-check-external-archive');
        if (approvalHash && approvalHash === after) warnings.push('approvalArtifactHash-equals-afterHash-check-external-archive');
        if (!env.requestId) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.requestId-missing');
        if (!env.command) blockers.push('commandEnvelope.command-missing');
        if ((env.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || env.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !env.targetTabId && !env.targetConversationId) blockers.push('targeted-command-missing-target');
        if (!receipt) blockers.push('commandReceipt-missing');
        if (receipt && receipt.requestId !== env.requestId) blockers.push('receipt-requestId-mismatch');
        if (receipt && normalizeControlCommandName(receipt.command) !== normalizeControlCommandName(env.command)) blockers.push('receipt-command-mismatch');
        if (receipt && receipt.accepted !== true) blockers.push('receipt-not-accepted');
        if (receipt && receipt.ok === false) warnings.push('receipt-completed-with-error-or-not-yet-ok');
        if (!ownerValidation.validationDecision || ownerValidation.validationDecision === 'not_provided') blockers.push('owner-approval-validation-missing');
        else if (ownerValidation.validationDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('owner-approval-validation-hold');
        else if (ownerValidation.validationDecision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`owner-approval-validation-${ownerValidation.validationDecision}`);
        if (pair.validationDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('commandEvidencePair-validation-hold');
        else if (!pair.validationDecision || pair.validationDecision === 'unknown') blockers.push('commandEvidencePair-validation-missing');
        else if (pair.validationDecision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`commandEvidencePair-validation-${pair.validationDecision}`);
        if (archive && archive.validationDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('archiveEnvelope-validation-hold');
        else if (archive && archive.validationDecision && archive.validationDecision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`archiveEnvelope-validation-${archive.validationDecision}`);
        if (b.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('binding-must-declare-notOwnerApproval');
        if (b.approvalIsExternal !== true) blockers.push('binding-must-declare-approvalIsExternal');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)),
            summary: {
                decision,
                blockerCount: blockers.length,
                warningCount: warnings.length,
                approvalArtifactHashValid: isValidEvidenceHash(approvalHash),
                beforeHashValid: isValidEvidenceHash(before),
                afterHashValid: isValidEvidenceHash(after),
                requestId: env.requestId || '',
                receiptPresent: !!receipt,
                ownerApprovalDecision: ownerValidation.validationDecision || 'unknown',
                pairDecision: pair.validationDecision || 'unknown'
            }
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingFixturePack(profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding-fixtures') {
        const before = 'sha256:' + 'a'.repeat(64);
        const after = 'sha256:' + 'b'.repeat(64);
        const approvalHash = 'sha256:' + 'c'.repeat(64);
        const env = { requestId: 'fixture-approval-receipt-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-1', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab' };
        const receipt = { schema: COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA, receiptKey: 'receipt-fixture-1', requestId: env.requestId, command: env.command, risk: env.risk, accepted: true, ok: true, phase: 'completed', time: new Date().toISOString(), envelopeHash: 'env-fixture' };
        const ownerApproval = { validationDecision: 'pass', validationBlockers: [], validationWarnings: [], artifactId: 'owner-artifact-1', artifactKind: 'owner_action_time_approval', expiresAt: Date.now() + 60000, source: 'fixture-owner', artifactHashAuthority: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter' };
        const pair = { pairId: 'pair-fixture-1', validationDecision: 'pass', validationBlockers: [], validationWarnings: [] };
        const base = {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.binding`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            bindingId: 'binding-fixture-1',
            approvalArtifactHash: approvalHash,
            beforeHash: before,
            afterHash: after,
            commandEnvelope: env,
            ownerApproval,
            commandReceipt: receipt,
            commandEvidencePair: pair,
            archiveEnvelope: { validationDecision: 'pass', validationBlockers: [], validationWarnings: [] },
            externalArchive: { authoritativeHasher: 'external supervisor / Nexusync adapter', approvalArtifactHashRequired: true, beforeAfterHashRequired: true, hashAlgorithm: 'sha256' },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            approvalIsExternal: true
        };
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-approval-receipt-binding-passes', binding: base, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'archive-caution-still-not-hold', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { archiveEnvelope: { validationDecision: 'caution', validationWarnings: ['noop-warning'] } }), expect: 'caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-approvalArtifactHash-holds', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { approvalArtifactHash: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'invalid-owner-approval-validation-holds', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { ownerApproval: Object.assign({}, ownerApproval, { validationDecision: 'hold' }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'receipt-requestId-mismatch-holds', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { commandReceipt: Object.assign({}, receipt, { requestId: 'other' }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-afterHash-holds', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { afterHash: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'pair-validation-hold-blocks', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { commandEvidencePair: Object.assign({}, pair, { validationDecision: 'hold' }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'text-containing-binding-holds', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { containsUserText: true }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'binding-cannot-claim-owner-approval', binding: Object.assign({}, base, { notOwnerApproval: false }), expect: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingFixtures(profile = 'owner-approval-receipt-binding-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const validation = validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(item.binding, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(item.binding, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            rule: 'Fixtures are static/text-free; they do not dispatch commands or compute authoritative external hashes.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncOwnerApprovalReceiptArchivePacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-owner-approval-receipt-archive') {
        const binding = buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(input, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            bindingId: binding.bindingId,
            approvalArtifactHash: binding.approvalArtifactHash,
            beforeHash: binding.beforeHash,
            afterHash: binding.afterHash,
            commandEnvelope: binding.commandEnvelope,
            commandReceipt: binding.commandReceipt,
            ownerApproval: binding.ownerApproval,
            commandEvidencePair: binding.commandEvidencePair,
            validation: binding.validation,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            approvalIsExternal: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalJsonStringify(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            binding,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/approval-receipt-binding/<bindingId>',
            rule: 'This packet is archival evidence only. It does not grant owner approval and does not dispatch.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferOwnerApprovalReceiptPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-owner-approval-receipt') {
        const binding = buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING]',
            bindingId: binding.bindingId,
            validationDecision: binding.validation?.decision || 'unknown',
            requestId: binding.commandEnvelope.requestId,
            command: binding.commandEnvelope.command,
            targetConversationId: binding.commandEnvelope.targetConversationId,
            approvalArtifactHash: binding.approvalArtifactHash,
            beforeHash: binding.beforeHash,
            afterHash: binding.afterHash,
            receiptKey: binding.commandReceipt?.receiptKey || '',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            next: binding.validation?.decision === 'pass' ? 'archive binding and continue external supervisor after-evidence workflow' : 'hold and notify owner/supervisor'
        };
    }

    function buildN8nOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingContract(profile = 'n8n-owner-approval-receipt-binding') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { branch: 'READ_BEFORE_EVIDENCE', action: 'Archive before evidence externally; compute beforeHash.' },
                { branch: 'VALIDATE_OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT', action: 'validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(artifact, {commandEnvelope,beforeHash}); compute approvalArtifactHash externally.' },
                { branch: 'DISPATCH_ONCE_WITH_OWNER_APPROVAL', action: 'Only after runnerStage ready_for_real_dispatch; dispatch targeted eventDetail once.' },
                { branch: 'READ_COMMAND_RECEIPT', action: 'Read commandReceipts()/commandReceiptLedger(); select matching requestId/target receipt.' },
                { branch: 'READ_AFTER_EVIDENCE', action: 'Archive after evidence externally; compute afterHash.' },
                { branch: 'BIND_AND_VALIDATE', action: 'ownerApprovalReceiptBinding({approvalArtifactHash,beforeHash,afterHash,commandEnvelope,commandReceipt,ownerApprovalArtifact}); validate.' },
                { branch: 'HOLD_NOTIFY_OWNER', action: 'If validation hold, preserve evidence and do not replay command.' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['missing approvalArtifactHash', 'approval validation hold', 'receipt missing/mismatched', 'pair validation hold', 'before/after hash missing', 'binding text leak']
        };
    }

    function buildCodexOwnerApprovalReceiptBindingCard(profile = 'codex-owner-approval-receipt-binding-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_RECEIPT_BINDING_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'After an owner-approved real dispatch, bind ownerApprovalArtifactHash + beforeHash + commandReceipt + afterHash into one text-free archive record.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.ownerApprovalReceiptBinding({ownerApprovalArtifactHash,beforeHash,afterHash,commandEnvelope,commandReceipt,ownerApprovalArtifact})`,
            validate: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(binding)`,
            forbidden: ['do not dispatch while building this binding', 'do not treat binding as approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not invent authoritative hashes in browser'],
            stopIf: ['validation decision is hold', 'approvalArtifactHash missing', 'receipt mismatch', 'before/after hash missing', 'owner approval validation hold']
        };
    }


    // v209: One-shot owner approval consumption guard.
    // This is a shared, bounded, text-free ledger that prevents a valid ownerApprovalArtifactHash
    // from being reused for repeated real dispatch on the same command/target. It complements
    // v199 requestId replay guards: requestId protects command replay; approval consumption protects approval reuse.
    function getOwnerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs() {
        return clampNumber(config.ownerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.ownerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs || (24 * 60 * 60 * 1000), 5 * 60 * 1000, 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
    }

    function getOwnerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit() {
        return clampNumber(config.ownerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit || DEFAULT_CONFIG.ownerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit || 64, 8, 300);
    }

    function getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(envelope = {}) {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        return normalizeEvidenceHash(
            env.raw?.ownerApprovalArtifactHash ||
            env.raw?.approvalArtifactHash ||
            env.args?.ownerApprovalArtifactHash ||
            env.args?.approvalArtifactHash ||
            env.args?.ownerApproval?.artifactHash ||
            ''
        );
    }

    function shouldOwnerApprovalConsumptionGuardApply(risk = '') {
        return config.ownerApprovalConsumptionGuardEnabled !== false && (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating');
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionKey(envelope = {}, approvalArtifactHash = '') {
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName || env.command);
        const targetTab = env.targetTabId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? TAB_ID : 'browser-wide');
        const targetConversation = env.targetConversationId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? (getConversationId() || '') : 'browser-wide');
        return [
            'v209',
            normalizeEvidenceHash(approvalArtifactHash),
            normalizeControlCommandName(env.commandName || env.command),
            targetTab || '',
            targetConversation || '',
            risk || ''
        ].map((part) => String(part || '').slice(0, 180)).join('|');
    }

    function readOwnerApprovalConsumptions(includeExpired = false) {
        let rows = [];
        try {
            const raw = localStorage.getItem(OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_KEY);
            rows = raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
        } catch { rows = []; }
        if (!Array.isArray(rows)) rows = [];
        const now = Date.now();
        const ttl = getOwnerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs();
        rows = rows.filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object' && (includeExpired || !item.ts || now - Number(item.ts) <= ttl));
        rows.sort((a, b) => Number(b.ts || 0) - Number(a.ts || 0));
        return rows.slice(0, getOwnerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit());
    }

    function writeOwnerApprovalConsumptions(rows = []) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const ttl = getOwnerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs();
        const compact = (Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [])
            .filter((item) => item && typeof item === 'object' && (!item.ts || now - Number(item.ts) <= ttl))
            .sort((a, b) => Number(b.ts || 0) - Number(a.ts || 0))
            .slice(0, getOwnerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit())
            .map((item) => ({
                schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA,
                consumptionKey: String(item.consumptionKey || '').slice(0, 520),
                ownerApprovalArtifactHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(item.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || ''),
                requestId: String(item.requestId || '').slice(0, 160),
                command: normalizeControlCommandName(item.command || ''),
                risk: String(item.risk || '').slice(0, 80),
                targetTabId: String(item.targetTabId || '').slice(0, 120),
                targetConversationId: String(item.targetConversationId || '').slice(0, 120),
                commandReceiptKey: String(item.commandReceiptKey || '').slice(0, 520),
                beforeHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(item.beforeHash || ''),
                afterHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(item.afterHash || ''),
                dispatchCount: Math.max(1, Number(item.dispatchCount || 1)),
                ts: Number(item.ts || now),
                time: item.time || new Date(Number(item.ts || now)).toISOString(),
                source: String(item.source || '').slice(0, 120),
                consumed: item.consumed !== false,
                notOwnerApproval: true,
                containsPromptText: false,
                containsUserText: false
            }));
        try { localStorage.setItem(OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_KEY, JSON.stringify(compact)); } catch {}
        return compact;
    }

    function findOwnerApprovalConsumption(input = {}, rows = null) {
        const src = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(src.commandEnvelope || src.eventDetail || src.envelope || src || {});
        const approvalHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || src.approvalArtifactHash || getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env));
        if (!approvalHash) return null;
        const key = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionKey(env, approvalHash);
        const list = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : readOwnerApprovalConsumptions(false);
        return list.find((item) => item.consumptionKey === key && item.consumed !== false) || null;
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-consumption-status') {
        const src = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(src.commandEnvelope || src.eventDetail || src.envelope || src || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName || env.command);
        const approvalHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || src.approvalArtifactHash || getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env));
        const applies = shouldOwnerApprovalConsumptionGuardApply(risk) && !!approvalHash;
        const existing = applies ? findOwnerApprovalConsumption({ commandEnvelope: env, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash }) : null;
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.status`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            guardEnabled: config.ownerApprovalConsumptionGuardEnabled !== false,
            guardApplies: applies,
            acceptedForConsumption: !existing,
            reason: existing ? 'duplicate-owner-approval-consumption' : (approvalHash ? 'not-consumed' : 'no-owner-approval-artifact-hash'),
            consumptionKey: approvalHash ? buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionKey(env, approvalHash) : '',
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash,
            requestId: env.requestId,
            command: env.commandName,
            risk,
            target: {
                requestedTabId: env.targetTabId || '',
                requestedConversationId: env.targetConversationId || '',
                currentTabId: TAB_ID,
                currentConversationId: getConversationId() || ''
            },
            existingConsumption: existing ? {
                requestId: existing.requestId,
                command: existing.command,
                commandReceiptKey: existing.commandReceiptKey || '',
                time: existing.time || '',
                source: existing.source || ''
            } : null,
            rule: 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash is one-shot for a command/target. requestId replay guard is not sufficient because a reused approval could be wrapped in a new requestId.'
        };
    }

    function recordOwnerApprovalConsumption(input = {}, meta = {}) {
        const src = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(src.commandEnvelope || src.eventDetail || src.envelope || src || {});
        const risk = getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName || env.command);
        const approvalHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || src.approvalArtifactHash || getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env));
        if (!approvalHash || !shouldOwnerApprovalConsumptionGuardApply(risk)) return null;
        const status = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus({ commandEnvelope: env, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash }, meta.source || 'record-owner-approval-consumption');
        if (!status.acceptedForConsumption) return status.existingConsumption || null;
        const receipt = src.commandReceipt || src.receipt || findReceiptForEnvelope(env) || null;
        const row = {
            schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA,
            consumptionKey: status.consumptionKey,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash,
            requestId: env.requestId,
            command: env.commandName,
            risk,
            targetTabId: env.targetTabId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? TAB_ID : ''),
