            targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId || (risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || risk === 'current-chat-mutating' ? (getConversationId() || '') : ''),
            commandReceiptKey: receipt?.receiptKey || src.commandReceiptKey || '',
            beforeHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(src.beforeHash || receipt?.beforeEvidenceHash || env.args?.beforeHash || env.args?.beforeEvidenceHash || ''),
            afterHash: normalizeEvidenceHash(src.afterHash || receipt?.afterEvidenceHash || env.args?.afterHash || env.args?.afterEvidenceHash || ''),
            dispatchCount: 1,
            ts: Date.now(),
            time: new Date().toISOString(),
            source: meta.source || src.source || 'record-owner-approval-consumption',
            consumed: true,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false
        };
        const rows = readOwnerApprovalConsumptions(false).filter((item) => item.consumptionKey !== row.consumptionKey);
        rows.unshift(row);
        writeOwnerApprovalConsumptions(rows);
        state.lastOwnerApprovalConsumptionSummary = `${row.command || 'unknown'} · consumed · ${row.requestId || ''}`;
        return row;
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionLedgerPayload(reason = 'owner-approval-consumption-ledger') {
        const rows = readOwnerApprovalConsumptions(false);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.ledger`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            storage: { key: OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_KEY, shared: true, ttlMs: getOwnerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs(), limit: getOwnerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit() },
            guardEnabled: config.ownerApprovalConsumptionGuardEnabled !== false,
            count: rows.length,
            latest: rows.slice(0, 8),
            summary: rows.length ? `${rows.length} consumed approval artifact(s), newest ${rows[0].command || 'unknown'} · ${rows[0].requestId || 'no-request'}` : 'empty'
        };
    }

    function clearOwnerApprovalConsumptions(reason = 'manual-clear-owner-approval-consumptions') {
        try { localStorage.removeItem(OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_KEY); } catch {}
        state.lastOwnerApprovalConsumptionSummary = `cleared · ${reason}`;
        pushLog('Owner approval consumption ledger cleared');
        return buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionLedgerPayload(reason);
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionRecord(record = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-consumption-record-validation') {
        const r = record && typeof record === 'object' ? record : {};
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (r.containsPromptText === true || r.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('consumption-record-must-be-text-free');
        if (!isValidEvidenceHash(r.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || '')) blockers.push('ownerApprovalArtifactHash-invalid-or-missing');
        if (!r.requestId) blockers.push('requestId-missing');
        if (!r.command) blockers.push('command-missing');
        if ((r.risk === 'send-risk-current-tab' || r.risk === 'current-chat-mutating') && !r.targetTabId && !r.targetConversationId) blockers.push('target-missing-for-one-shot-consumption');
        if (!r.commandReceiptKey) warnings.push('commandReceiptKey-missing');
        if (Number(r.dispatchCount || 0) !== 1) blockers.push('dispatchCount-must-be-1');
        if (r.consumed === false) blockers.push('consumption-record-not-consumed');
        if (r.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('consumption-record-must-declare-notOwnerApproval');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.record_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings))
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionContract(profile = 'owner-approval-consumption-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.contract`,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Prevent a single owner approval artifact hash from authorizing more than one real targeted dispatch for the same command/target, even if a new requestId is generated.',
            storage: { key: OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_KEY, shared: true, ttlMs: getOwnerApprovalConsumptionTtlMs(), limit: getOwnerApprovalConsumptionHistoryLimit() },
            requiredDispatchInput: ['ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId or targetConversationId'],
            exportedApi: [
                'ownerApprovalConsumptionContract', 'ownerApprovalConsumptionStatus', 'ownerApprovalConsumptionLedger',
                'clearOwnerApprovalConsumptions', 'recordOwnerApprovalConsumption', 'ownerApprovalConsumptionFixtures',
                'validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionFixtures', 'nexusyncOwnerApprovalConsumptionPacket',
                'webaiTransferOwnerApprovalConsumptionPacket', 'n8nOwnerApprovalConsumptionContract', 'codexOwnerApprovalConsumptionCard'
            ],
            invariants: [
                'Consumption ledger is text-free and does not grant approval.',
                'Approval consumption applies only after owner approval artifact validation has passed and a real dispatch is attempted/completed.',
                'requestId replay guard blocks same requestId; approval consumption guard blocks same approval artifact reused for another requestId.',
                'Clear ledger is a manual/debug action and should not be used by an autonomous supervisor to bypass single-use approval.'
            ],
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionFixturePack(profile = 'owner-approval-consumption-fixtures') {
        const approvalHash = 'sha256:' + 'd'.repeat(64);
        const before = 'sha256:' + 'e'.repeat(64);
        const after = 'sha256:' + 'f'.repeat(64);
        const env = { requestId: 'fixture-consume-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-one-shot', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab' };
        const key = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionKey(env, approvalHash);
        const valid = {
            schema: OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA,
            consumptionKey: key,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash,
            requestId: env.requestId,
            command: env.command,
            risk: env.risk,
            targetTabId: '',
            targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId,
            commandReceiptKey: 'receipt-fixture-consume-1',
            beforeHash: before,
            afterHash: after,
            dispatchCount: 1,
            ts: Date.now(),
            time: new Date().toISOString(),
            source: 'fixture',
            consumed: true,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false
        };
        const duplicateStatus = (() => {
            const existing = findOwnerApprovalConsumption({ commandEnvelope: env, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash }, [valid]);
            return existing ? 'duplicate-owner-approval-consumption' : 'not-seen';
        })();
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-consumption-record-passes', record: valid, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'duplicate-status-detected', statusReason: duplicateStatus, expect: 'duplicate-owner-approval-consumption' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-approval-hash-holds', record: Object.assign({}, valid, { ownerApprovalArtifactHash: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-target-holds', record: Object.assign({}, valid, { targetConversationId: '', targetTabId: '' }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'dispatch-count-two-holds', record: Object.assign({}, valid, { dispatchCount: 2 }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'text-leak-holds', record: Object.assign({}, valid, { containsPromptText: true }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'consumption-cannot-claim-approval', record: Object.assign({}, valid, { notOwnerApproval: false }), expect: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionFixtures(profile = 'owner-approval-consumption-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            if (item.record) {
                const validation = validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionRecord(item.record, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
                results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
            } else {
                results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: item.statusReason === item.expect, decision: item.statusReason, expected: item.expect, blockers: [], warnings: [] });
            }
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = validateOwnerApprovalConsumptionRecord(item.record, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            rule: 'Fixtures are pure/static; they do not write the real consumption ledger or dispatch commands.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncOwnerApprovalConsumptionPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-owner-approval-consumption-packet') {
        const status = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            status,
            ledger: buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionLedgerPayload(profile),
            recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/owner-approval-consumption/<consumptionKey>',
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferOwnerApprovalConsumptionPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-owner-approval-consumption') {
        const status = buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus(input, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION]',
            acceptedForConsumption: !!status.acceptedForConsumption,
            reason: status.reason,
            consumptionKey: status.consumptionKey,
            requestId: status.requestId,
            command: status.command,
            targetConversationId: status.target?.requestedConversationId || status.target?.currentConversationId || '',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            next: status.acceptedForConsumption ? 'real dispatch may proceed only if ownerApprovalArtifact validation/canRun/replay gates also pass' : 'hold; do not re-dispatch this approval artifact'
        };
    }

    function buildN8nOwnerApprovalConsumptionContract(profile = 'n8n-owner-approval-consumption-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { branch: 'READ_CONSUMPTION_STATUS', action: 'ownerApprovalConsumptionStatus({commandEnvelope, ownerApprovalArtifactHash})' },
                { branch: 'HOLD_DUPLICATE_APPROVAL', if: 'acceptedForConsumption !== true', action: 'do not dispatch; notify owner/supervisor' },
                { branch: 'DISPATCH_ONCE', if: 'acceptedForConsumption && canRun.accepted && replay.acceptedForReplay && ownerApprovalArtifactValidation.pass', action: 'dispatch targeted event once with ownerApprovalArtifactHash attached' },
                { branch: 'RECORD_AFTER_DISPATCH', action: 'command receipt completed phase records owner approval consumption automatically when hash is present' },
                { branch: 'ARCHIVE_LEDGER', action: 'archive ownerApprovalConsumptionLedger() externally with before/after evidence' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['duplicate-owner-approval-consumption', 'missing ownerApprovalArtifactHash for real-run lane', 'target missing', 'owner approval validation hold', 'canRun rejected']
        };
    }

    function buildCodexOwnerApprovalConsumptionCard(profile = 'codex-owner-approval-consumption-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_CONSUMPTION_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Before real dispatch, verify ownerApprovalArtifactHash has not already been consumed for this command/target; after dispatch, archive the ledger and receipt binding.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.ownerApprovalConsumptionStatus({commandEnvelope, ownerApprovalArtifactHash})`,
            ledgerProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.ownerApprovalConsumptionLedger()`,
            forbidden: ['do not clear consumption ledger to bypass approval single-use', 'do not dispatch if status.reason is duplicate-owner-approval-consumption', 'do not treat consumption record as approval'],
            stopIf: ['acceptedForConsumption !== true', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash missing', 'target mismatch', 'owner approval validation hold', 'canRun rejected']
        };
    }


    // v210: Owner approval execution checklist/state card.
    // This is a compact, text-free supervisor state card for other automation projects.
    // It does not dispatch commands; it makes the approval -> execution -> receipt -> archive chain explicit.
    function checklistStep(id, status, detail = '', next = '') {
        return {
            id: String(id || '').slice(0, 120),
            status: String(status || 'unknown').slice(0, 80),
            ok: ['pass', 'ready', 'done', 'not_required'].includes(String(status || '')),
            detail: String(detail || '').slice(0, 240),
            next: String(next || '').slice(0, 240)
        };
    }

    function normalizeExecutionChecklistInput(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist') {
        const src = input && typeof input === 'object' ? input : {};
        const gate = src.gate || src.supervisorLoopGate || (() => { try { return buildSupervisorLoopGate(`${profile}:gate`); } catch { return { commandReady: false, commandEnvelope: null, stateCode: 'UNKNOWN', decision: 'unknown' }; } })();
        const commandEnvelope = normalizeControlEnvelope(src.commandEnvelope || src.eventDetail || gate.commandEnvelope || src.envelope || {});
        const beforeHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.beforeHash || src.beforeEvidenceHash || commandEnvelope.args?.beforeHash || commandEnvelope.args?.beforeEvidenceHash || '');
        const afterHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.afterHash || src.afterEvidenceHash || commandEnvelope.args?.afterHash || commandEnvelope.args?.afterEvidenceHash || '');
        const smokeMarkerHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.smokeMarkerHash || src.smokeResultMarkerHash || src.smokeHash || '');
        const ownerApprovalArtifact = src.ownerApprovalArtifact || src.approvalArtifact || null;
        const ownerApprovalArtifactHash = normalizeEvidenceHash(src.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || src.approvalArtifactHash || getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(commandEnvelope) || '');
        const commandReceipt = src.commandReceipt || src.receipt || (commandEnvelope.commandName ? findReceiptForEnvelope(commandEnvelope) : null);
        const canRun = src.canRun || (() => {
            if (!commandEnvelope.commandName) return { accepted: false, reason: 'missing-command' };
            try { return buildCanRunPayload(commandEnvelope.commandName, commandEnvelope, src.transport || 'event'); } catch (error) { return { accepted: false, reason: `canRun-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}` }; }
        })();
        const replay = src.replay || (() => { try { return buildCommandReplayStatus(commandEnvelope, src.transport || 'event'); } catch (error) { return { acceptedForReplay: false, reason: `replay-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}` }; } })();
        const ownerApprovalValidation = src.ownerApprovalArtifactValidation || (ownerApprovalArtifact ? validateOwnerApprovalArtifact(ownerApprovalArtifact, { commandEnvelope, beforeHash }, `${profile}:approval-artifact`) : { decision: 'hold', blockers: ['owner-approval-artifact-missing'], warnings: [] });
        const consumption = src.ownerApprovalConsumptionStatus || buildOwnerApprovalConsumptionStatus({ commandEnvelope, ownerApprovalArtifactHash }, `${profile}:consumption`);
        const runnerPolicy = src.runnerPolicy || (() => { try { return buildSupervisorRunnerSplitPolicy(Object.assign({}, src, { commandEnvelope, beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifact, ownerApprovalArtifactHash }), `${profile}:runner`); } catch (error) { return { runnerStage: 'hold_real_run', blockers: [`runner-error:${String(error).slice(0, 120)}`], allowDispatch: false }; } })();
        const receiptBinding = src.ownerApprovalReceiptBinding || (commandReceipt && afterHash && ownerApprovalArtifactHash ? buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding({ ownerApprovalArtifactHash, beforeHash, afterHash, commandEnvelope, commandReceipt, ownerApprovalArtifact }, `${profile}:receipt-binding`) : null);
        const receiptBindingValidation = src.ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation || (receiptBinding ? validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(receiptBinding, `${profile}:receipt-binding-validation`) : { decision: 'not_ready', blockers: [], warnings: [] });
        const archiveEnvelope = src.realLoopArchivalEnvelope || (afterHash ? buildRealLoopArchivalEnvelope({ smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, afterHash, commandEnvelope, commandReceipt }, `${profile}:archive-envelope`) : null);
        return { src, gate, commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash, smokeMarkerHash, ownerApprovalArtifact, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceipt, canRun, replay, ownerApprovalValidation, consumption, runnerPolicy, receiptBinding, receiptBindingValidation, archiveEnvelope };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist') {
        const n = normalizeExecutionChecklistInput(input, profile);
        const envSummary = summarizeRealLoopCommandEnvelope(n.commandEnvelope || {});
        const steps = [];
        const smokeOk = isValidEvidenceHash(n.smokeMarkerHash) || input.smokePolicy?.allowRealLoop === true || input.smokeEnablePolicy?.allowRealLoop === true;
        steps.push(checklistStep('smoke_pass', smokeOk ? 'pass' : 'missing', smokeOk ? 'smoke marker/policy present' : 'missing smokeMarkerHash or smoke allow policy', 'run read-only smoke harness and archive marker hash'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('before_hash', isValidEvidenceHash(n.beforeHash) ? 'pass' : 'missing', n.beforeHash || 'missing beforeHash', 'archive real before evidence externally and compute sha256'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('owner_approval_artifact', n.ownerApprovalValidation?.decision === 'pass' ? 'pass' : n.ownerApprovalValidation?.decision === 'caution' ? 'ready' : 'hold', n.ownerApprovalValidation?.decision || 'not validated', 'obtain action-time owner approval artifact bound to command/request/target/beforeHash'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('approval_consumption', n.consumption?.acceptedForConsumption === true ? 'pass' : 'hold', n.consumption?.reason || 'unknown', 'do not reuse consumed owner approval artifacts'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('can_run', n.canRun?.accepted === true ? 'pass' : 'hold', n.canRun?.reason || 'unknown', 'fix target/scope/draft/emergency-stop blockers before dispatch'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('replay_guard', n.replay?.acceptedForReplay === true ? 'pass' : 'hold', n.replay?.reason || 'unknown', 'do not dispatch duplicate requestId/target command'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('runner_split', n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' ? 'ready' : n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage || 'hold', n.runnerPolicy?.next || '', 'only ready_for_real_dispatch may expose eventDetail'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('dispatch_once', n.commandReceipt ? 'done' : (n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' ? 'ready' : 'not_ready'), n.commandReceipt ? 'matching command receipt present' : 'no command receipt yet', 'dispatch targeted event exactly once only after owner approval and gates pass'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('command_receipt', n.commandReceipt ? 'pass' : 'missing', n.commandReceipt?.receiptKey || 'missing command receipt', 'read commandReceiptLedger and bind exact requestId/command/target'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('after_hash', isValidEvidenceHash(n.afterHash) ? 'pass' : 'missing', n.afterHash || 'missing afterHash', 'archive real after evidence externally and compute sha256'));
        steps.push(checklistStep('archive_binding', n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision === 'pass' ? 'pass' : (n.receiptBinding ? n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision || 'hold' : 'not_ready'), n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision || 'not ready', 'validate ownerApprovalReceiptBinding and archive Nexusync/WebAI Transfer packet'));
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        for (const step of steps) {
            if (step.status === 'hold') blockers.push(`${step.id}:${step.detail}`.slice(0, 220));
            if (step.status === 'missing' && !['command_receipt', 'after_hash'].includes(step.id)) blockers.push(`${step.id}:missing`);
        }
        if (n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval') warnings.push('technical-gates-pass-but-owner-approval-needed');
        if (n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision === 'caution') warnings.push('archive-binding-caution');
        let executionStage = 'hold_before_dispatch';
        if (!blockers.length && n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' && !n.commandReceipt) executionStage = 'ready_for_real_dispatch';
        else if (n.commandReceipt && !isValidEvidenceHash(n.afterHash)) executionStage = 'await_after_hash';
        else if (n.commandReceipt && isValidEvidenceHash(n.afterHash) && n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision !== 'pass') executionStage = 'ready_to_archive';
        else if (n.commandReceipt && isValidEvidenceHash(n.afterHash) && n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision === 'pass') executionStage = 'complete_archive_ready';
        else if (n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval') executionStage = 'ready_for_owner_approval';
        const compact = {
            stage: executionStage,
            requestId: envSummary.requestId || '',
            command: envSummary.command || '',
            targetTabId: envSummary.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: envSummary.targetConversationId || '',
            readyForDispatch: executionStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch',
            readyForArchive: executionStage === 'ready_to_archive' || executionStage === 'complete_archive_ready',
            next: executionStage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch'
                ? 'dispatch eventDetail exactly once, then read receipt and afterHash'
                : executionStage === 'ready_for_owner_approval'
                    ? 'request owner action-time approval artifact and rerun checklist'
                    : executionStage === 'await_after_hash'
                        ? 'archive after evidence externally and compute afterHash'
                        : executionStage === 'ready_to_archive'
                            ? 'build/validate archive binding and store external evidence'
                            : executionStage === 'complete_archive_ready'
                                ? 'archive binding packet externally; no replay'
                                : 'hold; inspect blockers and preserve evidence'
        };
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.checklist`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            compact,
            steps,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 18),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 18),
            signals: {
                smokeMarkerHash: n.smokeMarkerHash || '',
                beforeHash: n.beforeHash || '',
                afterHash: n.afterHash || '',
                ownerApprovalArtifactHash: n.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || '',
                ownerApprovalValidation: n.ownerApprovalValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
                consumptionAccepted: n.consumption?.acceptedForConsumption === true,
                canRunAccepted: n.canRun?.accepted === true,
                replayAccepted: n.replay?.acceptedForReplay === true,
                runnerStage: n.runnerPolicy?.runnerStage || '',
                commandReceiptPresent: !!n.commandReceipt,
                archiveBindingDecision: n.receiptBindingValidation?.decision || 'not_ready'
            },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            rule: 'Checklist is read-only/text-free. It does not dispatch, approve, hash authoritative evidence, or bypass emergency/scope/draft gates.'
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(checklist = {}, profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (checklist.containsPromptText === true || checklist.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('checklist-must-be-text-free');
        const allowedStages = ['hold_before_dispatch', 'ready_for_owner_approval', 'ready_for_real_dispatch', 'await_after_hash', 'ready_to_archive', 'complete_archive_ready'];
        if (!allowedStages.includes(checklist.compact?.stage || '')) blockers.push('unknown-execution-stage');
        if (checklist.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('checklist-must-declare-notOwnerApproval');
        if (!Array.isArray(checklist.steps) || checklist.steps.length < 8) blockers.push('checklist-steps-incomplete');
        if (checklist.compact?.readyForDispatch === true) {
            if (checklist.compact?.stage !== 'ready_for_real_dispatch') blockers.push('readyForDispatch-stage-mismatch');
            if (checklist.signals?.ownerApprovalValidation !== 'pass') blockers.push('ready-dispatch-owner-approval-not-pass');
            if (checklist.signals?.consumptionAccepted !== true) blockers.push('ready-dispatch-consumption-not-accepted');
            if (checklist.signals?.canRunAccepted !== true) blockers.push('ready-dispatch-canRun-not-accepted');
            if (checklist.signals?.replayAccepted !== true) blockers.push('ready-dispatch-replay-not-accepted');
            if (!isValidEvidenceHash(checklist.signals?.beforeHash || '')) blockers.push('ready-dispatch-beforeHash-invalid');
            if (!isValidEvidenceHash(checklist.signals?.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || '')) blockers.push('ready-dispatch-ownerApprovalArtifactHash-invalid');
        }
        if (checklist.compact?.stage === 'complete_archive_ready' && checklist.signals?.archiveBindingDecision !== 'pass') blockers.push('complete-archive-missing-pass-binding');
        if (checklist.compact?.readyForArchive === true && !isValidEvidenceHash(checklist.signals?.afterHash || '')) warnings.push('archive-stage-afterHash-not-valid');
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)),
            stage: checklist.compact?.stage || 'unknown'
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixturePack(profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist-fixtures') {
        const before = 'sha256:' + '1'.repeat(64);
        const after = 'sha256:' + '2'.repeat(64);
        const smoke = 'sha256:' + '3'.repeat(64);
        const approvalHash = 'sha256:' + '4'.repeat(64);
        const env = { requestId: 'fixture-execution-checklist-1', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'conv-checklist', risk: 'send-risk-current-tab', args: { ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash } };
        const validChecklist = {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.checklist`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            compact: { stage: 'ready_for_real_dispatch', requestId: env.requestId, command: env.command, targetTabId: '', targetConversationId: env.targetConversationId, readyForDispatch: true, readyForArchive: false, next: 'dispatch once' },
            steps: ['smoke_pass','before_hash','owner_approval_artifact','approval_consumption','can_run','replay_guard','runner_split','dispatch_once','command_receipt'].map((id) => checklistStep(id, id === 'command_receipt' ? 'missing' : 'pass')),
            blockers: [],
            warnings: [],
            signals: { smokeMarkerHash: smoke, beforeHash: before, afterHash: '', ownerApprovalArtifactHash: approvalHash, ownerApprovalValidation: 'pass', consumptionAccepted: true, canRunAccepted: true, replayAccepted: true, runnerStage: 'ready_for_real_dispatch', commandReceiptPresent: false, archiveBindingDecision: 'not_ready' },
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'ready-dispatch-checklist-passes', checklist: validChecklist, expect: 'pass' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'text-leak-holds', checklist: Object.assign({}, validChecklist, { containsUserText: true }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-approval-hash-holds', checklist: Object.assign({}, validChecklist, { signals: Object.assign({}, validChecklist.signals, { ownerApprovalArtifactHash: '' }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'consumption-rejected-holds', checklist: Object.assign({}, validChecklist, { signals: Object.assign({}, validChecklist.signals, { consumptionAccepted: false }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'canrun-rejected-holds', checklist: Object.assign({}, validChecklist, { signals: Object.assign({}, validChecklist.signals, { canRunAccepted: false }) }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'checklist-cannot-claim-approval', checklist: Object.assign({}, validChecklist, { notOwnerApproval: false }), expect: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixtures(profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const validation = validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(item.checklist, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(item.checklist, `${profile}:${item.id}`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === item.expect, decision: validation.decision, expected: item.expect, blockers: validation.blockers, warnings: validation.warnings });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistContract(profile = 'owner-approval-execution-checklist-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.contract`,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Expose a compact read-only checklist for the full external supervisor execution chain: smoke pass, beforeHash, owner approval artifact, consumption, canRun, replay, dispatch, receipt, afterHash, archive binding.',
            exportedApi: ['ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistContract', 'ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist', 'validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist', 'ownerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixtures', 'validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistFixtures', 'n8nOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistContract', 'webaiTransferOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistPacket', 'nexusyncOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistPacket', 'codexOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistCard'],
            stages: ['hold_before_dispatch', 'ready_for_owner_approval', 'ready_for_real_dispatch', 'await_after_hash', 'ready_to_archive', 'complete_archive_ready'],
            invariants: ['checklist is read-only/text-free', 'checklist does not provide owner approval', 'real dispatch requires valid owner approval artifact + consumption pass + canRun + replay pass', 'archive completion requires command receipt and afterHash binding validation']
        };
    }

    function buildN8nOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistContract(profile = 'n8n-owner-approval-execution-checklist') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { branch: 'READ_CHECKLIST', action: 'ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input)' },
                { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'validation.decision === hold or compact.stage === hold_before_dispatch', action: 'do not dispatch; preserve evidence and notify owner/supervisor' },
                { branch: 'REQUEST_OWNER_APPROVAL', if: 'compact.stage === ready_for_owner_approval', action: 'request action-time ownerApprovalArtifact; do not synthesize approval' },
                { branch: 'DISPATCH_ONCE', if: 'compact.stage === ready_for_real_dispatch && validation.pass', action: 'dispatch targeted eventDetail once using existing runner policy; then read receipt' },
                { branch: 'ARCHIVE_AFTER', if: 'compact.stage === await_after_hash', action: 'archive after evidence and compute afterHash externally' },
                { branch: 'ARCHIVE_BINDING', if: 'compact.stage === ready_to_archive', action: 'validate ownerApprovalReceiptBinding and write Nexusync/WebAI Transfer archive' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['emergency stop', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'owner approval invalid/expired', 'duplicate consumption', 'duplicate requestId replay', 'canRun rejected', 'archive binding hold']
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-owner-approval-execution-checklist') {
        const checklist = buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input, profile);
        const validation = validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(checklist, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST]',
            stage: checklist.compact.stage,
            requestId: checklist.compact.requestId,
            command: checklist.compact.command,
            targetConversationId: checklist.compact.targetConversationId,
            validationDecision: validation.decision,
            blockers: validation.blockers.concat(checklist.blockers || []).slice(0, 12),
            warnings: validation.warnings.concat(checklist.warnings || []).slice(0, 12),
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            next: checklist.compact.next
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-owner-approval-execution-checklist') {
        const checklist = buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input, profile);
        const validation = validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(checklist, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            checklist,
            validation,
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/owner-approval-execution-checklist/<requestId>',
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildCodexOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklistCard(profile = 'codex-owner-approval-execution-checklist-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${OWNER_APPROVAL_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Read ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist before any real supervisor dispatch; only dispatch when stage is ready_for_real_dispatch and validation passes.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input)`,
            validateProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(checklist)`,
            forbidden: ['do not synthesize owner approval', 'do not dispatch on ready_for_owner_approval', 'do not clear replay/consumption ledgers to force pass', 'do not include prompt/user text'],
            stopIf: ['stage is not ready_for_real_dispatch', 'validation decision is hold', 'owner approval validation not pass', 'consumption/canRun/replay not pass', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT or emergency stop']
        };
    }


    // v211: Execution checklist relay marker.
    // This compresses the v210 checklist/state card into a line-oriented, text-free marker
    // that WebAI Transfer, Nexusync, n8n, ASK_ROUTER, and Codex can relay/branch/archive
    // without scraping panel text or reading prompt/user bodies. The marker is evidence only,
    // never owner approval.
    function buildExecutionChecklistRelayContract(profile = 'execution-checklist-relay-contract') {
        return {
            schema: EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Compress ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input) into a stable line-oriented relay marker and packet for low-token external supervisor loops.',
            exportedApi: [
                'executionChecklistRelayContract', 'executionChecklistMarker', 'validateExecutionChecklistMarker',
                'executionChecklistRelayFixtures', 'validateExecutionChecklistRelayFixtures',
                'webaiTransferExecutionChecklistMarkerPacket', 'nexusyncExecutionChecklistMarkerPacket',
                'n8nExecutionChecklistMarkerContract', 'codexExecutionChecklistMarkerCard'
            ],
            markerFormat: {
                start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST]',
                end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST]',
                body: 'line-oriented key: value fields; text-free; hash externally if archived'
            },
            invariants: [
                'Marker is text-free evidence only; it is not owner approval.',
                'Marker must not contain prompt/user text, command bodies, cookies, secrets, or full conversation text.',
                'Marker must not dispatch commands or write receipts.',
                'Real dispatch still requires ownerApprovalArtifact validation, consumption pass, canRun.accepted, replay pass, and a targeted command envelope.',
                'External Nexusync/WebAI Transfer adapters compute authoritative marker hash; browser helpers only provide the marker text.'
            ],
            recommendedFlow: [
                'Read ownerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input).',
                'Build executionChecklistMarker(input).',
                'External adapter archives marker text and computes markerHash.',
                'If marker stage is ready_for_owner_approval, request a separate ownerApprovalArtifact; never infer approval from marker.',
                'If marker stage is ready_for_real_dispatch, external supervisor still checks owner approval, consumption, canRun, replay, and owner action-time approval before dispatch.',
                'After dispatch, archive commandReceipt/afterHash and bind with ownerApprovalReceiptBinding.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeMarkerValue(value, max = 180) {
        return normalizeText(String(value == null ? '' : value)).replace(/[\r\n]+/g, ' ').slice(0, max);
    }

    function buildExecutionChecklistMarkerLines(fields = {}) {
        const safe = (key, fallback = '') => normalizeMarkerValue(fields[key] == null ? fallback : fields[key], key === 'blockers' || key === 'warnings' ? 420 : 220);
        return [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST]',
            `schema: ${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}`,
            `version: ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL}`,
            `build: ${SCRIPT_BUILD}`,
            `decision: ${safe('decision', 'unknown')}`,
            `stage: ${safe('stage', 'unknown')}`,
            `next: ${safe('next', 'unknown')}`,
            `request_id: ${safe('requestId', '')}`,
            `command: ${safe('command', '')}`,
            `target_tab_id: ${safe('targetTabId', '')}`,
            `target_conversation_id: ${safe('targetConversationId', '')}`,
            `validation: ${safe('validationDecision', 'unknown')}`,
            `ready_for_real_dispatch: ${safe('readyForRealDispatch', 'false')}`,
            `await_owner_approval: ${safe('awaitOwnerApproval', 'false')}`,
            `archive_ready: ${safe('archiveReady', 'false')}`,
            `blockers_count: ${safe('blockersCount', '0')}`,
            `warnings_count: ${safe('warningsCount', '0')}`,
            `blockers: ${safe('blockers', '')}`,
            `warnings: ${safe('warnings', '')}`,
            'contains_prompt_text: false',
            'contains_user_text: false',
            'not_owner_approval: true',
            'dispatch_executed: false',
            'authoritative_hash_external: true',
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST]'
        ].join('\n');
    }

    function buildExecutionChecklistMarker(input = {}, profile = 'execution-checklist-marker') {
        const checklist = buildOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(input, profile);
        const validation = validateOwnerApprovalExecutionChecklist(checklist, `${profile}:validation`);
        const compact = checklist.compact || {};
        const blockers = (validation.blockers || []).concat(checklist.blockers || []).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 12);
        const warnings = (validation.warnings || []).concat(checklist.warnings || []).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 12);
        const stage = compact.stage || 'unknown';
        const markerDecision = validation.decision === 'hold' ? 'hold' : (stage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch' || stage === 'ready_to_archive' || stage === 'complete_archive_ready' ? 'pass' : 'caution');
        const fields = {
            decision: markerDecision,
            stage,
            next: compact.next || '',
            requestId: compact.requestId || checklist.requestId || '',
            command: compact.command || checklist.command || '',
            targetTabId: compact.targetTabId || checklist.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: compact.targetConversationId || checklist.targetConversationId || '',
            validationDecision: validation.decision || 'unknown',
            readyForRealDispatch: stage === 'ready_for_real_dispatch',
            awaitOwnerApproval: stage === 'ready_for_owner_approval',
            archiveReady: stage === 'ready_to_archive' || stage === 'complete_archive_ready',
            blockersCount: blockers.length,
            warningsCount: warnings.length,
            blockers: blockers.join('; '),
            warnings: warnings.join('; ')
        };
        const marker = buildExecutionChecklistMarkerLines(fields);
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker,
            fields,
            checklistCompact: compact,
            validation: { decision: validation.decision, blockers: blockers.slice(0, 12), warnings: warnings.slice(0, 12) },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            authoritativeHashExternal: true,
            markerHash: { required: true, authority: 'external Nexusync/WebAI Transfer supervisor', algorithm: 'sha256' }
        };
    }

    function parseExecutionChecklistMarker(marker = '') {
        const text = String(marker || '');
        const match = text.match(/\[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST\]([\s\S]*?)\[\/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST\]/);
        if (!match) return null;
        const fields = {};
        for (const line of match[1].split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().toLowerCase();
            const value = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
            if (key) fields[key] = value;
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateExecutionChecklistMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'execution-checklist-marker-validation') {
        const packet = markerOrPacket && typeof markerOrPacket === 'object' ? markerOrPacket : { marker: String(markerOrPacket || '') };
        const fields = packet.fields || parseExecutionChecklistMarker(packet.marker || '') || {};
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!fields.schema && packet.schema !== `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`) blockers.push('missing-marker-schema');
        if (fields.schema && fields.schema !== EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA) blockers.push('schema-mismatch');
        if (packet.containsPromptText === true || fields.contains_prompt_text === 'true') blockers.push('contains-prompt-text');
        if (packet.containsUserText === true || fields.contains_user_text === 'true') blockers.push('contains-user-text');
        if (packet.approvedByOwner === true || packet.actionTimeApproved === true || packet.ownerApproval === true) blockers.push('marker-misused-as-owner-approval');
        if (packet.notOwnerApproval === false || fields.not_owner_approval === 'false') blockers.push('missing-not-owner-approval-sentinel');
        if (fields.dispatch_executed === 'true' || packet.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('marker-must-not-dispatch');
        if (!fields.stage && !packet.checklistCompact?.stage) warnings.push('missing-stage');
        if (!fields.validation && !packet.validation?.decision) warnings.push('missing-validation-decision');
        if (!fields.authoritative_hash_external && packet.authoritativeHashExternal !== true) warnings.push('missing-external-hash-note');
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: blockers.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            blockers,
            warnings,
            stage: fields.stage || packet.checklistCompact?.stage || '',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            rule: 'Execution checklist markers are relay/evidence hints only. They never approve, dispatch, or replace owner action-time approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildExecutionChecklistRelayFixturePack(profile = 'execution-checklist-relay-fixtures') {
        const goodPacket = buildExecutionChecklistMarker({}, `${profile}:good`);
        const goodMarker = goodPacket.marker;
        const badPromptText = Object.assign({}, goodPacket, { containsPromptText: true });
        const badApproval = Object.assign({}, goodPacket, { approvedByOwner: true, actionTimeApproved: true });
        const badSchemaMarker = goodMarker.replace(EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA, 'cgpt_auto_continue.execution_checklist_relay_marker.placeholder');
        const badDispatchMarker = goodMarker.replace('dispatch_executed: false', 'dispatch_executed: true');
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [{ id: 'valid-generated-marker', packet: goodPacket }],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'marker-contains-prompt-text', packet: badPromptText },
                { id: 'marker-misused-as-approval', packet: badApproval },
                { id: 'marker-schema-mismatch', packet: { marker: badSchemaMarker, notOwnerApproval: true } },
                { id: 'marker-dispatch-executed', packet: { marker: badDispatchMarker, notOwnerApproval: true } }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateExecutionChecklistRelayFixtures(profile = 'execution-checklist-relay-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildExecutionChecklistRelayFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const fixture of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const validation = validateExecutionChecklistMarker(fixture.packet, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`);
            results.push({ id: fixture.id, expectation: 'pass', actual: validation.decision, ok: validation.decision === 'pass', blockers: validation.blockers || [] });
        }
        for (const fixture of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = validateExecutionChecklistMarker(fixture.packet, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`);
            results.push({ id: fixture.id, expectation: 'hold', actual: validation.decision, ok: validation.decision === 'hold', blockers: validation.blockers || [] });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferExecutionChecklistMarkerPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-execution-checklist-marker') {
        const packet = buildExecutionChecklistMarker(input, profile);
        const markerValidation = validateExecutionChecklistMarker(packet, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: packet.marker,
            markerDecision: packet.fields.decision,
            markerValidationDecision: markerValidation.decision,
            relayResultHint: {
                field: 'EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_MARKER',
                archiveHashExternal: true,
                notOwnerApproval: true
            },
            compact: packet.fields,
            blockers: markerValidation.blockers.concat(packet.validation.blockers || []).slice(0, 12),
            warnings: markerValidation.warnings.concat(packet.validation.warnings || []).slice(0, 12),
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncExecutionChecklistMarkerPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-execution-checklist-marker') {
        const packet = buildExecutionChecklistMarker(input, profile);
        const validation = validateExecutionChecklistMarker(packet, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: packet.marker,
            markerValidation: validation,
            recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/execution-checklist-marker/<requestId>',
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            beforeAfterLinkHint: {
                requestId: packet.fields.requestId || '',
                stage: packet.fields.stage || '',
                useWith: ['ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceipt', 'afterHash', 'ownerApprovalReceiptBinding']
            },
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildN8nExecutionChecklistMarkerContract(profile = 'n8n-execution-checklist-marker-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { branch: 'READ_CHECKLIST_MARKER', action: 'executionChecklistMarker(input)' },
                { branch: 'HASH_AND_ARCHIVE_MARKER', action: 'Archive marker text externally and compute markerHash.' },
                { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'marker validation hold or stage hold_before_dispatch', action: 'do not dispatch; notify owner/supervisor' },
                { branch: 'REQUEST_OWNER_APPROVAL', if: 'stage ready_for_owner_approval', action: 'request separate ownerApprovalArtifact; marker is not approval' },
                { branch: 'READY_FOR_REAL_DISPATCH', if: 'stage ready_for_real_dispatch', action: 'still check owner approval, consumption, canRun, replay, and owner action-time approval before one dispatch' },
                { branch: 'ARCHIVE_AFTER', if: 'stage ready_to_archive or complete_archive_ready', action: 'bind receipt/afterHash/approvalHash into Nexusync/WebAI Transfer archive' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['marker validation hold', 'containsPromptText true', 'marker treated as approval', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop', 'owner approval missing/expired', 'duplicate consumption/replay']
        };
    }

    function buildCodexExecutionChecklistMarkerCard(profile = 'codex-execution-checklist-marker-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_RELAY_MARKER_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Read executionChecklistMarker(input), archive/hash marker externally, and branch by stage; never treat marker as owner approval.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.executionChecklistMarker(input)`,
            validateProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateExecutionChecklistMarker(markerPacket)`,
            forbidden: ['do not dispatch from marker alone', 'do not synthesize owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not parse panel text'],
            stopIf: ['validation decision is hold', 'stage hold_before_dispatch', 'containsPromptText true', 'marker used as approval', 'missing target for send-risk command']
        };
    }


    // v212: Marker hash binding + relay ACK.
    // This layer takes the v211 execution checklist marker, the external markerHash,
    // beforeHash / ownerApprovalArtifactHash / commandReceipt / afterHash / archive hash,
    // and produces a low-token ACK marker. It is evidence only, never owner approval,
    // and does not dispatch commands, click, download, or write receipts.
    function buildMarkerHashBindingRelayAckContract(profile = 'marker-hash-binding-relay-ack-contract') {
        return {
            schema: MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Bind executionChecklistMarker hash to beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceipt, afterHash, and archiveEnvelopeHash, then emit a relay ACK marker for WebAI Transfer/Nexusync/n8n/Codex loops.',
            exportedApi: [
                'markerHashBindingRelayAckContract', 'markerHashBinding', 'validateMarkerHashBinding',
                'relayAckMarker', 'validateRelayAckMarker', 'markerHashBindingRelayAckFixtures',
                'validateMarkerHashBindingRelayAckFixtures', 'webaiTransferRelayAckPacket',
                'nexusyncRelayAckPacket', 'n8nRelayAckContract', 'codexRelayAckCard'
            ],
            requiredExternalHashes: ['markerHash', 'beforeHash'],
            optionalButRecommendedHashes: ['ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash', 'commandReceiptHash'],
            invariants: [
                'External supervisor/Nexusync adapter computes authoritative hashes; browser packets are binding helpers only.',
                'Relay ACK is evidence only; it is not owner approval and does not authorize dispatch.',
                'ACK marker must not contain prompt/user text, command bodies, cookies, secrets, or full conversation text.',
                'ACK does not dispatch commands, write command receipts, or mutate scope/global settings.',
                'send-risk commands still require target-aware canRun, replay guard, one-shot approval consumption, and owner action-time approval.'
            ],
            markerFormat: {
                start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]',
                end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]',
                body: 'line-oriented key: value fields; text-free; archive and hash externally'
            }
        };
    }

    function isLikelySha256Text(value) {
        return /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(value || '').trim());
    }

    function compactHashField(value, max = 80) {
        const text = normalizeMarkerValue(value || '', max);
        return text;
    }

    function getCommandReceiptForBinding(input = {}, envelope = {}) {
        if (input.commandReceipt && typeof input.commandReceipt === 'object') return input.commandReceipt;
        if (input.receipt && typeof input.receipt === 'object') return input.receipt;
        try {
            const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(envelope || input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || {});
            if (env.commandName) return findControlCommandReceipt(env, getControlCommandRisk(env.commandName), input.transport || 'event') || null;
        } catch {}
        return null;
    }

    function getReceiptField(receipt = {}, key = '') {
        if (!receipt || typeof receipt !== 'object') return '';
        return String(receipt[key] || '').slice(0, 520);
    }

    function buildMarkerHashBinding(input = {}, profile = 'marker-hash-binding') {
        const markerPacket = input.markerPacket || input.executionChecklistMarkerPacket || input.executionChecklistMarker || buildExecutionChecklistMarker(input, `${profile}:marker`);
        const markerValidation = validateExecutionChecklistMarker(markerPacket, `${profile}:marker-validation`);
        const fields = markerPacket?.fields || parseExecutionChecklistMarkerFields(markerPacket?.marker || '') || {};
        const commandEnvelope = input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || {
            requestId: fields.requestId || input.requestId || '',
            command: fields.command || input.command || 'continue_now',
            targetTabId: fields.targetTabId || input.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: fields.targetConversationId || input.targetConversationId || ''
        };
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(commandEnvelope || {});
        const receipt = getCommandReceiptForBinding(input, env) || {};
        const beforeHash = compactHashField(input.beforeHash || input.beforeEvidenceHash || receipt.beforeEvidenceHash || env.raw?.beforeHash || env.args?.beforeHash || env.raw?.beforeEvidenceHash || env.args?.beforeEvidenceHash || '');
        const afterHash = compactHashField(input.afterHash || input.afterEvidenceHash || receipt.afterEvidenceHash || env.raw?.afterHash || env.args?.afterHash || env.raw?.afterEvidenceHash || env.args?.afterEvidenceHash || '');
        const markerHash = compactHashField(input.markerHash || input.executionChecklistMarkerHash || input.markerSha256 || '');
        const ownerApprovalArtifactHash = compactHashField(input.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || receipt.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || getEnvelopeOwnerApprovalArtifactHash(env) || '');
        const commandReceiptHash = compactHashField(input.commandReceiptHash || input.receiptHash || '');
        const archiveEnvelopeHash = compactHashField(input.archiveEnvelopeHash || input.realLoopArchivalEnvelopeHash || input.ownerApprovalReceiptArchiveHash || '');
        const requestId = env.requestId || fields.requestId || getReceiptField(receipt, 'requestId');
        const command = env.commandName || fields.command || getReceiptField(receipt, 'command');
        const targetTabId = env.targetTabId || fields.targetTabId || getReceiptField(receipt, 'targetTabId');
        const targetConversationId = env.targetConversationId || fields.targetConversationId || getReceiptField(receipt, 'targetConversationId');
        const receiptKey = getReceiptField(receipt, 'receiptKey');
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (markerValidation.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('execution-checklist-marker-validation-hold');
        if (!markerHash) blockers.push('missing-markerHash');
        else if (!isLikelySha256Text(markerHash)) warnings.push('markerHash-not-64hex-authoritative-external-check-needed');
        if (!beforeHash) blockers.push('missing-beforeHash');
        else if (!isLikelySha256Text(beforeHash)) warnings.push('beforeHash-not-64hex-authoritative-external-check-needed');
        if (!requestId) blockers.push('missing-requestId');
        if (!command) blockers.push('missing-command');
        if (!targetTabId && !targetConversationId && getControlCommandRisk(command) !== 'browser-wide-shared') warnings.push('missing-target-hint');
        if (receipt && Object.keys(receipt).length && receipt.requestId && requestId && receipt.requestId !== requestId) blockers.push('receipt-requestId-mismatch');
        if (receipt && Object.keys(receipt).length && receipt.command && command && normalizeControlCommandName(receipt.command) !== normalizeControlCommandName(command)) blockers.push('receipt-command-mismatch');
        if (markerPacket?.containsPromptText === true || markerPacket?.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('marker-contains-text');
        if (input.containsPromptText === true || input.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('binding-input-contains-text');
        if (!afterHash) warnings.push('afterHash-missing-ack-pre-dispatch-or-await-after');
        if (!receiptKey && !commandReceiptHash) warnings.push('commandReceipt-missing-or-not-yet-archived');
        if (!ownerApprovalArtifactHash && fields.readyForRealDispatch === true) warnings.push('ownerApprovalArtifactHash-missing-for-real-dispatch');
        let evidencePair = null;
        try { evidencePair = beforeHash && afterHash ? buildCommandEvidencePair(env, beforeHash, afterHash, `${profile}:pair`) : null; } catch {}
        let receiptBinding = null;
        try {
            receiptBinding = ownerApprovalArtifactHash && beforeHash && afterHash
                ? buildOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(Object.assign({}, input, { commandEnvelope: env, commandReceipt: receipt, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, beforeHash, afterHash }), `${profile}:receipt-binding`)
                : null;
        } catch {}
        const stage = afterHash && (receiptKey || commandReceiptHash) ? 'ack_after_archive_ready' : receiptKey || commandReceiptHash ? 'ack_receipt_seen_wait_after_hash' : 'ack_marker_before_bound';
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.binding`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            stage,
            requestId,
            command: normalizeControlCommandName(command),
            targetTabId,
            targetConversationId,
            hashes: { markerHash, beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceiptHash, afterHash, archiveEnvelopeHash },
            commandReceipt: receiptKey ? {
                receiptKey,
                phase: getReceiptField(receipt, 'phase'),
                accepted: !!receipt.accepted,
                ok: typeof receipt.ok === 'boolean' ? receipt.ok : null,
                time: getReceiptField(receipt, 'time'),
                reason: getReceiptField(receipt, 'reason')
            } : null,
            marker: { validationDecision: markerValidation.decision, fields: Object.assign({}, fields, { blockers: undefined, warnings: undefined }) },
            evidencePairValidation: evidencePair ? validateCommandEvidencePairing(evidencePair, `${profile}:pair-validation`) : null,
            ownerApprovalReceiptBindingValidation: receiptBinding ? validateOwnerApprovalReceiptBinding(receiptBinding, `${profile}:receipt-binding-validation`) : null,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            authoritativeHashExternal: true,
            rule: 'Binding/ACK is text-free evidence. It is not owner approval and does not authorize or execute dispatch.'
        };
    }

    function validateMarkerHashBinding(binding = {}, profile = 'marker-hash-binding-validation') {
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!binding || typeof binding !== 'object') blockers.push('binding-not-object');
        if (binding.schema !== `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.binding`) blockers.push('schema-mismatch');
        if (binding.containsPromptText !== false || binding.containsUserText !== false) blockers.push('text-flags-not-false');
        if (binding.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('missing-not-owner-approval');
        if (binding.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('ack-must-not-dispatch');
        const hashes = binding.hashes || {};
        if (!hashes.markerHash) blockers.push('missing-markerHash');
        if (!hashes.beforeHash) blockers.push('missing-beforeHash');
        if (hashes.markerHash && !isLikelySha256Text(hashes.markerHash)) warnings.push('markerHash-not-64hex');
        if (hashes.beforeHash && !isLikelySha256Text(hashes.beforeHash)) warnings.push('beforeHash-not-64hex');
        if (hashes.afterHash && !isLikelySha256Text(hashes.afterHash)) warnings.push('afterHash-not-64hex');
        if (!binding.requestId) blockers.push('missing-requestId');
        if (!binding.command) blockers.push('missing-command');
        if (Array.isArray(binding.blockers) && binding.blockers.length) blockers.push(...binding.blockers.map((item) => `inner:${String(item).slice(0, 80)}`));
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.binding_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass',
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 24),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 24)
        };
    }

    function buildRelayAckMarker(input = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-marker') {
        const binding = input.schema === `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.binding` ? input : buildMarkerHashBinding(input, profile);
        const validation = validateMarkerHashBinding(binding, `${profile}:binding-validation`);
        const h = binding.hashes || {};
        const fields = {
            schema: MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            decision: validation.decision,
            stage: binding.stage || 'unknown',
            requestId: binding.requestId || '',
            command: binding.command || '',
            targetTabId: binding.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: binding.targetConversationId || '',
            markerHash: h.markerHash || '',
            beforeHash: h.beforeHash || '',
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: h.ownerApprovalArtifactHash || '',
            commandReceiptHash: h.commandReceiptHash || '',
            commandReceiptKey: binding.commandReceipt?.receiptKey || '',
            afterHash: h.afterHash || '',
            archiveEnvelopeHash: h.archiveEnvelopeHash || '',
            validation: validation.decision,
            blockersCount: validation.blockers.length,
            warningsCount: validation.warnings.length
        };
        const line = (key, value) => `${key}: ${normalizeMarkerValue(value, key.includes('hash') || key.includes('Hash') || key === 'command_receipt_key' ? 140 : 240)}`;
        const marker = [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]',
            line('schema', fields.schema),
            line('version', fields.version),
            line('build', fields.build),
            line('decision', fields.decision),
            line('stage', fields.stage),
            line('request_id', fields.requestId),
            line('command', fields.command),
            line('target_tab_id', fields.targetTabId),
            line('target_conversation_id', fields.targetConversationId),
            line('marker_hash', fields.markerHash),
            line('before_hash', fields.beforeHash),
            line('owner_approval_artifact_hash', fields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash),
            line('command_receipt_hash', fields.commandReceiptHash),
            line('command_receipt_key', fields.commandReceiptKey),
            line('after_hash', fields.afterHash),
            line('archive_envelope_hash', fields.archiveEnvelopeHash),
            line('validation', fields.validation),
            line('blockers_count', fields.blockersCount),
            line('warnings_count', fields.warningsCount),
            'contains_prompt_text: false',
            'contains_user_text: false',
            'not_owner_approval: true',
            'dispatch_executed: false',
            'authoritative_hash_external: true',
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]'
        ].join('\n');
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.ack_marker_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker,
            fields,
            binding,
            validation,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            authoritativeHashExternal: true
        };
    }

    function parseRelayAckMarkerFields(markerText = '') {
        const fields = {};
        const text = String(markerText || '');
        const body = text.includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]') ? text.split('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]')[1].split('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]')[0] : text;
        for (const line of body.split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().replace(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
            fields[key] = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateRelayAckMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-marker-validation') {
        const marker = typeof markerOrPacket === 'string' ? markerOrPacket : markerOrPacket?.marker || '';
        const fields = parseRelayAckMarkerFields(marker);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (!marker.includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]') || !marker.includes('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK]')) blockers.push('missing-ack-marker-block');
        if (fields.schema !== MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA) blockers.push('schema-mismatch');
        if (fields.containsPromptText !== 'false' || fields.containsUserText !== 'false') blockers.push('text-flags-not-false');
        if (fields.notOwnerApproval !== 'true') blockers.push('missing-not-owner-approval');
        if (fields.dispatchExecuted !== 'false') blockers.push('dispatch-executed-not-false');
        if (!fields.markerHash) blockers.push('missing-marker-hash');
        if (!fields.beforeHash) blockers.push('missing-before-hash');
        if (!fields.requestId) blockers.push('missing-request-id');
        if (!fields.command) blockers.push('missing-command');
        if (fields.markerHash && !isLikelySha256Text(fields.markerHash)) warnings.push('marker-hash-not-64hex');
        if (fields.beforeHash && !isLikelySha256Text(fields.beforeHash)) warnings.push('before-hash-not-64hex');
        if (Number(fields.blockersCount || 0) > 0) blockers.push('inner-binding-blockers-present');
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.ack_marker_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
