            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass',
            blockers: Array.from(new Set(blockers)).slice(0, 24),
            warnings: Array.from(new Set(warnings)).slice(0, 24),
            fields
        };
    }

    function buildMarkerHashBindingRelayAckFixturePack(profile = 'marker-hash-binding-relay-ack-fixtures') {
        const goodHash = 'a'.repeat(64);
        const beforeHash = 'b'.repeat(64);
        const afterHash = 'c'.repeat(64);
        const commandEnvelope = { requestId: 'fixture-v212-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: TAB_ID, targetConversationId: getConversationId() || 'fixture-conversation', ts: Date.now(), expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS };
        const commandReceipt = { schema: COMMAND_RECEIPT_SCHEMA, receiptKey: 'fixture-receipt-key', requestId: commandEnvelope.requestId, command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: commandEnvelope.targetTabId, targetConversationId: commandEnvelope.targetConversationId, accepted: true, ok: true, phase: 'completed', time: new Date().toISOString(), beforeEvidenceHash: beforeHash, afterEvidenceHash: afterHash, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: 'd'.repeat(64), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false };
        const passInput = { markerHash: goodHash, beforeHash, afterHash, commandEnvelope, commandReceipt, commandReceiptHash: 'e'.repeat(64), archiveEnvelopeHash: 'f'.repeat(64), ownerApprovalArtifactHash: 'd'.repeat(64) };
        const passBinding = buildMarkerHashBinding(passInput, `${profile}:pass-binding`);
        const passAck = buildRelayAckMarker(passBinding, `${profile}:pass-ack`);
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'valid-binding', value: passBinding, expect: 'pass_or_caution' },
                { id: 'valid-ack-marker', value: passAck, expect: 'pass_or_caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-marker-hash', value: buildMarkerHashBinding(Object.assign({}, passInput, { markerHash: '' }), `${profile}:fail-missing-marker`), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'missing-before-hash', value: buildMarkerHashBinding(Object.assign({}, passInput, { beforeHash: '' }), `${profile}:fail-missing-before`), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'ack-as-owner-approval', value: Object.assign({}, passAck, { marker: passAck.marker.replace('not_owner_approval: true', 'not_owner_approval: false') }), expect: 'hold' },
                { id: 'ack-dispatch-executed', value: Object.assign({}, passAck, { marker: passAck.marker.replace('dispatch_executed: false', 'dispatch_executed: true') }), expect: 'hold' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateMarkerHashBindingRelayAckFixtures(profile = 'marker-hash-binding-relay-ack-fixture-validation') {
        const pack = buildMarkerHashBindingRelayAckFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const fixture of pack.mustPass || []) {
            const validation = fixture.id.includes('ack') ? validateRelayAckMarker(fixture.value, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`) : validateMarkerHashBinding(fixture.value, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`);
            results.push({ id: fixture.id, kind: 'must-pass', ok: validation.decision === 'pass' || validation.decision === 'caution', decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers || [], warnings: validation.warnings || [] });
        }
        for (const fixture of pack.mustFail || []) {
            const validation = fixture.id.includes('ack') ? validateRelayAckMarker(fixture.value, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`) : validateMarkerHashBinding(fixture.value, `${profile}:${fixture.id}`);
            results.push({ id: fixture.id, kind: 'must-fail', ok: validation.decision === 'hold', decision: validation.decision, blockers: validation.blockers || [], warnings: validation.warnings || [] });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferRelayAckPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-relay-ack') {
        const ack = buildRelayAckMarker(input, profile);
        const validation = validateRelayAckMarker(ack, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResultHint: { field: 'CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK', archiveHashExternal: true, notOwnerApproval: true },
            marker: ack.marker,
            validation,
            compact: ack.fields,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncRelayAckPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-relay-ack') {
        const ack = buildRelayAckMarker(input, profile);
        const validation = validateRelayAckMarker(ack, `${profile}:validation`);
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: ack.marker,
            markerValidation: validation,
            recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/relay-ack/<requestId>',
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' },
            bindingHints: ['markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash'],
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildN8nRelayAckContract(profile = 'n8n-relay-ack-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { branch: 'HASH_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST_MARKER', action: 'external adapter computes markerHash' },
                { branch: 'BUILD_RELAY_ACK', action: 'relayAckMarker({ markerHash, beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceipt, afterHash, archiveEnvelopeHash })' },
                { branch: 'VALIDATE_ACK', action: 'validateRelayAckMarker(ack)' },
                { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'validation hold or missing markerHash/beforeHash/requestId/command', action: 'do not archive as complete; notify owner/supervisor' },
                { branch: 'ARCHIVE_ACK', if: 'validation pass/caution', action: 'archive ACK marker and compute external ACK hash' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['ACK marker treated as approval', 'containsPromptText true', 'missing markerHash', 'missing beforeHash', 'target mismatch', 'duplicate owner approval consumption', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop']
        };
    }

    function buildCodexRelayAckCard(profile = 'codex-relay-ack-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${MARKER_HASH_BINDING_RELAY_ACK_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: 'Build relayAckMarker only after external markerHash/beforeHash are available; validate and archive it as evidence, never as owner approval.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayAckMarker(input)`,
            validateProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateRelayAckMarker(ack)`,
            forbidden: ['do not dispatch from ACK marker alone', 'do not synthesize owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not clear ledgers to force pass'],
            stopIf: ['validation hold', 'missing markerHash/beforeHash', 'ACK treated as approval', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop']
        };
    }


    // v213: Relay ACK hash-chain finalizer.
    // This read-only layer binds the external ACK marker hash with the execution marker,
    // before evidence, owner approval artifact, command receipt, after evidence, and archive
    // envelope hashes. It produces a final text-free archive manifest/marker for WebAI
    // Transfer, Nexusync, n8n, ASK_ROUTER, and Codex. It never dispatches commands and
    // is not owner approval.
    function buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizerContract(profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer-contract') {
        return {
            schema: RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Finalize the external supervisor evidence chain by binding ackMarkerHash + markerHash + beforeHash + ownerApprovalArtifactHash + commandReceiptHash + afterHash + archiveEnvelopeHash into a final archive manifest/marker.',
            exportedApi: [
                'relayAckHashChainFinalizerContract', 'relayAckHashChainManifest',
                'validateRelayAckHashChainManifest', 'relayAckHashChainFinalizer',
                'relayAckHashChainFinalMarker', 'validateRelayAckHashChainFinalMarker',
                'relayAckHashChainFinalizerFixtures', 'validateRelayAckHashChainFinalizerFixtures',
                'webaiTransferRelayAckHashChainPacket', 'nexusyncRelayAckHashChainPacket',
                'n8nRelayAckHashChainContract', 'codexRelayAckHashChainCard'
            ],
            requiredHashChain: ['ackMarkerHash', 'markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash'],
            optionalHashChain: ['commandEvidencePairHash', 'ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash', 'finalArchiveManifestHash'],
            markerFormat: { start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]', end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]' },
            invariants: [
                'Authoritative hashes are computed by an external supervisor/Nexusync adapter, not by this marker.',
                'Final hash-chain marker is archival evidence only; it is not owner approval and does not authorize dispatch.',
                'Finalization is read-only and never clicks, sends, downloads, clears ledgers, or writes command receipts.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.',
                'A complete archive requires beforeHash + commandReceiptHash + afterHash + ackMarkerHash + markerHash + archiveEnvelopeHash.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeHashChainInput(input = {}, profile = 'hash-chain-input') {
        const ackPacket = input.ackPacket || input.relayAckPacket || input.relayAckMarker || input.ack || null;
        const ackMarker = typeof ackPacket === 'string' ? ackPacket : (ackPacket?.marker || '');
        const ackFields = ackMarker ? parseRelayAckMarkerFields(ackMarker) : (ackPacket?.fields || {});
        const ackValidation = ackPacket ? validateRelayAckMarker(ackPacket, `${profile}:ack-validation`) : { decision: 'caution', blockers: [], warnings: ['relay ACK marker not supplied; using explicit input fields only'] };
        const commandEnvelope = input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || ackPacket?.commandEnvelope || {
            requestId: input.requestId || ackFields.requestId || ackFields.request_id || '',
            command: input.command || ackFields.command || 'continue_now',
            targetTabId: input.targetTabId || ackFields.targetTabId || ackFields.target_tab_id || '',
            targetConversationId: input.targetConversationId || ackFields.targetConversationId || ackFields.target_conversation_id || ''
        };
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(commandEnvelope || {});
        const receipt = input.commandReceipt || input.receipt || getCommandReceiptForBinding(input, env) || {};
        const get = (...values) => {
            for (const value of values) {
                const text = compactHashField(value || '', 96);
                if (text) return text;
            }
            return '';
        };
        return {
            ackPacket,
            ackMarker,
            ackFields,
            ackValidation,
            commandEnvelope: env.raw || commandEnvelope || {},
            requestId: get(input.requestId, env.requestId, ackFields.requestId, ackFields.request_id, receipt.requestId),
            command: get(input.command, env.commandName, ackFields.command, receipt.command),
            targetTabId: get(input.targetTabId, env.targetTabId, ackFields.targetTabId, ackFields.target_tab_id, receipt.targetTabId),
            targetConversationId: get(input.targetConversationId, env.targetConversationId, ackFields.targetConversationId, ackFields.target_conversation_id, receipt.targetConversationId),
            ackMarkerHash: get(input.ackMarkerHash, input.relayAckMarkerHash, input.ackHash, ackFields.ackMarkerHash, ackFields.ack_marker_hash),
            markerHash: get(input.markerHash, input.executionChecklistMarkerHash, ackFields.markerHash, ackFields.marker_hash),
            beforeHash: get(input.beforeHash, input.beforeEvidenceHash, ackFields.beforeHash, ackFields.before_hash, receipt.beforeEvidenceHash),
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: get(input.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, input.approvalArtifactHash, ackFields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, ackFields.owner_approval_artifact_hash, receipt.ownerApprovalArtifactHash),
            commandReceiptHash: get(input.commandReceiptHash, input.receiptHash, ackFields.commandReceiptHash, ackFields.command_receipt_hash, receipt.receiptHash, receipt.commandReceiptHash),
            commandReceiptKey: get(input.commandReceiptKey, ackFields.commandReceiptKey, ackFields.command_receipt_key, receipt.receiptKey, receipt.key),
            afterHash: get(input.afterHash, input.afterEvidenceHash, ackFields.afterHash, ackFields.after_hash, receipt.afterEvidenceHash),
            archiveEnvelopeHash: get(input.archiveEnvelopeHash, input.archiveHash, ackFields.archiveEnvelopeHash, ackFields.archive_envelope_hash),
            commandEvidencePairHash: get(input.commandEvidencePairHash, ackFields.commandEvidencePairHash, ackFields.command_evidence_pair_hash),
            ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash: get(input.ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash, ackFields.ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash, ackFields.owner_approval_receipt_binding_hash),
            finalArchiveManifestHash: get(input.finalArchiveManifestHash, input.manifestHash, ackFields.finalArchiveManifestHash, ackFields.final_archive_manifest_hash),
            containsPromptText: !!(input.containsPromptText || ackPacket?.containsPromptText || ackFields.contains_prompt_text === 'true'),
            containsUserText: !!(input.containsUserText || ackPacket?.containsUserText || ackFields.contains_user_text === 'true'),
            notOwnerApproval: input.notOwnerApproval !== false && ackFields.not_owner_approval !== 'false',
            dispatchExecuted: input.dispatchExecuted === true || ackFields.dispatch_executed === 'true'
        };
    }

    function buildRelayAckHashChainManifest(input = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-manifest') {
        const n = normalizeHashChainInput(input, profile);
        const chain = [
            { name: 'executionChecklistMarker', field: 'markerHash', hash: n.markerHash, required: true },
            { name: 'relayAckMarker', field: 'ackMarkerHash', hash: n.ackMarkerHash, required: true },
            { name: 'beforeEvidence', field: 'beforeHash', hash: n.beforeHash, required: true },
            { name: 'ownerApprovalArtifact', field: 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', hash: n.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, required: true },
            { name: 'commandReceipt', field: 'commandReceiptHash', hash: n.commandReceiptHash, required: true, key: n.commandReceiptKey || '' },
            { name: 'afterEvidence', field: 'afterHash', hash: n.afterHash, required: true },
            { name: 'archiveEnvelope', field: 'archiveEnvelopeHash', hash: n.archiveEnvelopeHash, required: true },
            { name: 'commandEvidencePair', field: 'commandEvidencePairHash', hash: n.commandEvidencePairHash, required: false },
            { name: 'ownerApprovalReceiptBinding', field: 'ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash', hash: n.ownerApprovalReceiptBindingHash, required: false },
            { name: 'finalArchiveManifest', field: 'finalArchiveManifestHash', hash: n.finalArchiveManifestHash, required: false }
        ];
        const missingRequired = chain.filter((item) => item.required && !item.hash).map((item) => item.field);
        const malformedHashes = chain.filter((item) => item.hash && !isLikelySha256Text(item.hash)).map((item) => item.field);
        const warnings = [];
        if (n.ackValidation?.decision === 'hold') warnings.push('relay-ack-marker-validation-hold');
        if (!n.commandEvidencePairHash) warnings.push('commandEvidencePairHash missing: archive can still proceed if pair is stored separately, but final manifest is less complete');
        if (!n.finalArchiveManifestHash) warnings.push('finalArchiveManifestHash is usually computed externally after this manifest is archived');
        return {
            schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.manifest`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestId: n.requestId,
            command: n.command,
            targetTabId: n.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: n.targetConversationId,
            chain,
            missingRequired,
            malformedHashes,
            warnings,
            relayAckValidation: n.ackValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
            externalHashAuthority: 'external Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n/Codex supervisor computes authoritative sha256 over this manifest and related artifacts',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            rule: 'This manifest finalizes archival binding only. It does not approve, dispatch, retry, or mutate runtime state.'
        };
    }

    function validateRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-manifest-validation') {
        const candidate = manifest?.schema === `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.manifest` ? manifest : buildRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest, `${profile}:coerced`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (candidate.containsPromptText === true) blockers.push('containsPromptText must be false');
        if (candidate.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('containsUserText must be false');
        if (candidate.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('manifest must declare notOwnerApproval=true');
        if (candidate.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('manifest must not claim dispatchExecuted=true');
        if (!candidate.requestId) blockers.push('missing requestId');
        if (!candidate.command) blockers.push('missing command');
        if (!candidate.targetTabId && !candidate.targetConversationId) blockers.push('missing targetTabId/targetConversationId');
        const missing = Array.isArray(candidate.missingRequired) ? candidate.missingRequired : [];
        if (missing.length) blockers.push(`missing required hash fields: ${missing.join(',')}`);
        const malformed = Array.isArray(candidate.malformedHashes) ? candidate.malformedHashes : [];
        if (malformed.length) blockers.push(`malformed sha256 fields: ${malformed.join(',')}`);
        const names = new Set();
        for (const item of candidate.chain || []) {
            if (!item || !item.name) continue;
            if (names.has(item.name)) warnings.push(`duplicate chain name: ${item.name}`);
            names.add(item.name);
        }
        if ((candidate.relayAckValidation || '') === 'hold') warnings.push('relayAckValidation is hold; do not finalize as complete without fixing ACK marker');
        if (Array.isArray(candidate.warnings)) warnings.push(...candidate.warnings.slice(0, 8));
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            requiredHashFields: ['ackMarkerHash', 'markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash'],
            requestId: candidate.requestId || '',
            command: candidate.command || '',
            targetTabId: candidate.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: candidate.targetConversationId || '',
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizer(input = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer') {
        const manifest = buildRelayAckHashChainManifest(input, `${profile}:manifest`);
        const validation = validateRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest, `${profile}:validation`);
        const archiveComplete = validation.decision === 'pass' || (validation.decision === 'caution' && manifest.archiveEnvelopeHash && manifest.afterHash && manifest.commandReceiptHash);
        return {
            schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.finalizer`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: validation.decision,
            archiveComplete: !!archiveComplete,
            next: validation.decision === 'hold' ? 'HOLD_FIX_HASH_CHAIN' : archiveComplete ? 'ARCHIVE_FINAL_MANIFEST_AND_COMPUTE_EXTERNAL_HASH' : 'WAIT_FOR_MISSING_OPTIONAL_FINAL_HASH',
            manifest,
            validation,
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external adapter/supervisor; browser helper output is not authoritative' },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false
        };
    }

    function buildRelayAckHashChainFinalMarker(input = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-final-marker') {
        const finalizer = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizer(input, profile);
        const m = finalizer.manifest || {};
        const v = finalizer.validation || {};
        const line = (key, value) => `${key}: ${normalizeMarkerValue(value, 160)}`;
        const lines = [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]',
            line('schema', RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA),
            line('version', SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL),
            line('decision', finalizer.decision),
            line('archive_complete', finalizer.archiveComplete ? 'true' : 'false'),
            line('next', finalizer.next),
            line('request_id', m.requestId),
            line('command', m.command),
            line('target_tab_id', m.targetTabId),
            line('target_conversation_id', m.targetConversationId),
            line('ack_marker_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'ackMarkerHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('marker_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'markerHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('before_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'beforeHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('owner_approval_artifact_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('command_receipt_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'commandReceiptHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('after_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'afterHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('archive_envelope_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'archiveEnvelopeHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('final_archive_manifest_hash', (m.chain || []).find((item) => item.field === 'finalArchiveManifestHash')?.hash || ''),
            line('validation', v.decision),
            line('contains_prompt_text', 'false'),
            line('contains_user_text', 'false'),
            line('not_owner_approval', 'true'),
            line('dispatch_executed', 'false'),
            line('authoritative_hash_external', 'true'),
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]'
        ];
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: lines.join('\n'), finalizer, validation: v, notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function parseRelayAckHashChainFinalMarkerFields(markerText = '') {
        const fields = {};
        for (const line of String(markerText || '').split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().replace(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
            const value = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
            fields[key] = value;
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateRelayAckHashChainFinalMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-final-marker-validation') {
        const marker = typeof markerOrPacket === 'string' ? markerOrPacket : (markerOrPacket?.marker || '');
        const fields = parseRelayAckHashChainFinalMarkerFields(marker);
        const manifest = buildRelayAckHashChainManifest({
            requestId: fields.requestId,
            command: fields.command,
            targetTabId: fields.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: fields.targetConversationId,
            ackMarkerHash: fields.ackMarkerHash,
            markerHash: fields.markerHash,
            beforeHash: fields.beforeHash,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: fields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash,
            commandReceiptHash: fields.commandReceiptHash,
            afterHash: fields.afterHash,
            archiveEnvelopeHash: fields.archiveEnvelopeHash,
            finalArchiveManifestHash: fields.finalArchiveManifestHash,
            containsPromptText: fields.containsPromptText === 'true',
            containsUserText: fields.containsUserText === 'true',
            notOwnerApproval: fields.notOwnerApproval !== 'false',
            dispatchExecuted: fields.dispatchExecuted === 'true'
        }, `${profile}:from-marker`);
        const validation = validateRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest, profile);
        if (!String(marker).includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]') || !String(marker).includes('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL]')) validation.blockers.push('missing hash-chain final marker delimiters');
        if (fields.authoritativeHashExternal !== 'true') validation.warnings.push('authoritative_hash_external should be true');
        validation.decision = validation.blockers.length ? 'hold' : validation.warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        validation.fields = fields;
        return validation;
    }

    function buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizerFixturePack(profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer-fixtures') {
        const h1 = 'a'.repeat(64), h2 = 'b'.repeat(64), h3 = 'c'.repeat(64), h4 = 'd'.repeat(64), h5 = 'e'.repeat(64), h6 = 'f'.repeat(64), h7 = '1'.repeat(64), h8 = '2'.repeat(64);
        const base = { requestId: 'fixture-v213-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: 'fixture-tab', targetConversationId: 'fixture-conversation', ackMarkerHash: h1, markerHash: h2, beforeHash: h3, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: h4, commandReceiptHash: h5, afterHash: h6, archiveEnvelopeHash: h7, finalArchiveManifestHash: h8, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, notOwnerApproval: true };
        return {
            schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'complete-hash-chain-finalizes', input: base, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'missing-final-manifest-hash-cautions-only', input: Object.assign({}, base, { finalArchiveManifestHash: '' }), expect: 'caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-ack-marker-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { ackMarkerHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-before-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { beforeHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-owner-approval-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { ownerApprovalArtifactHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-command-receipt-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { commandReceiptHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-after-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { afterHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-archive-envelope-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { archiveEnvelopeHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'bad-hash-format-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { ackMarkerHash: 'not-a-sha256' }) },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { containsPromptText: true }) },
                { id: 'owner-approval-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { notOwnerApproval: false }) }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateRelayAckHashChainFinalizerFixtures(profile = 'relay-ack-hash-chain-finalizer-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizerFixturePack(`${profile}:fixtures`);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const finalizer = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizer(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const actual = finalizer.decision;
            const pass = item.expect === 'caution' ? ['caution', 'pass'].includes(actual) : actual === item.expect;
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustPass', expected: item.expect, actual, pass });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const finalizer = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizer(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const actual = finalizer.decision;
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustFail', expected: 'hold', actual, pass: actual === 'hold' });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.pass);
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass', passCount: results.length - failed.length, failCount: failed.length, failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id), results };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferRelayAckHashChainPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-relay-ack-hash-chain') {
        const finalMarker = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: finalMarker.marker, validation: finalMarker.validation, relayInstruction: 'Return/store this final hash-chain marker only after external hashes are computed; do not treat it as approval or dispatch evidence by itself.', notOwnerApproval: true };
    }

    function buildNexusyncRelayAckHashChainPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-relay-ack-hash-chain') {
        const finalizer = buildRelayAckHashChainFinalizer(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, manifest: finalizer.manifest, validation: finalizer.validation, recordPathHint: input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/hash-chain-final/<requestId>', externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' }, notOwnerApproval: true };
    }

    function buildN8nRelayAckHashChainContract(profile = 'n8n-relay-ack-hash-chain-contract') {
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, importableN8nWorkflow: false, pseudoBranches: [
            { branch: 'HASH_RELAY_ACK_MARKER', action: 'external adapter computes ackMarkerHash' },
            { branch: 'BUILD_FINAL_MANIFEST', action: 'relayAckHashChainFinalizer({ackMarkerHash, markerHash, beforeHash, ownerApprovalArtifactHash, commandReceiptHash, afterHash, archiveEnvelopeHash})' },
            { branch: 'VALIDATE_FINAL_MANIFEST', action: 'validateRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest)' },
            { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'validation hold or missing required hash', action: 'do not mark archive complete; notify owner/supervisor' },
            { branch: 'ARCHIVE_FINAL', if: 'validation pass/caution', action: 'archive manifest/marker and compute final external hash' }
        ], stopConditions: ['ACK marker treated as approval', 'containsPromptText true', 'missing ackMarkerHash', 'missing ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'missing receipt/after/archive hashes', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }

    function buildCodexRelayAckHashChainCard(profile = 'codex-relay-ack-hash-chain-card') {
        return { schema: `${RELAY_ACK_HASH_CHAIN_FINALIZER_SCHEMA}.codex_card`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, oneLineTask: 'Finalize external supervisor archive only after ACK marker hash, before/approval/receipt/after/archive hashes are available; validate the hash chain and archive, never dispatch from it.', readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.relayAckHashChainFinalizer(input)`, validateProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateRelayAckHashChainManifest(manifest)`, forbidden: ['do not dispatch from finalizer', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not clear replay/approval ledgers to force pass'], stopIf: ['validation hold', 'missing required sha256', 'final marker treated as approval', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }


    // v214: Final archive index ACK / manifest handoff.
    // This read-only layer is the last low-token archive handoff after the v213 hash-chain
    // finalizer. It binds external finalArchiveManifestHash/finalMarkerHash back to the
    // request/target/evidence chain and emits a text-free ACK marker that WebAI Transfer,
    // Nexusync, n8n, ASK_ROUTER, or Codex can archive/index without parsing large JSON.
    function buildFinalArchiveIndexAckContract(profile = 'final-archive-index-ack-contract') {
        return {
            schema: FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Close the external supervisor archive loop by acknowledging that the final archive manifest/marker hash has been externally computed and indexed.',
            exportedApi: [
                'finalArchiveIndexAckContract', 'finalArchiveIndexManifest',
                'validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest', 'finalArchiveIndexAckMarker',
                'validateFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker', 'finalArchiveIndexAckFixtures',
                'validateFinalArchiveIndexAckFixtures', 'webaiTransferFinalArchiveIndexPacket',
                'nexusyncFinalArchiveIndexPacket', 'n8nFinalArchiveIndexContract',
                'codexFinalArchiveIndexCard'
            ],
            requiredFields: ['requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId or targetConversationId', 'finalArchiveManifestHash', 'finalMarkerHash'],
            recommendedFields: ['ackMarkerHash', 'markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash', 'archiveIndexId', 'recordPathHint'],
            markerFormat: { start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]', end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]' },
            invariants: [
                'The final archive ACK is archival/index evidence only; it is not owner approval and cannot authorize dispatch.',
                'Authoritative sha256 and record path/index storage are computed and stored externally.',
                'ACK generation is read-only and never clicks, sends, downloads, dispatches commands, clears ledgers, or writes command receipts.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.',
                'A complete ACK requires finalArchiveManifestHash and finalMarkerHash plus request/command/target identity.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeFinalArchiveIndexInput(input = {}, profile = 'final-archive-index-input') {
        const finalPacket = input.finalizerPacket || input.hashChainPacket || input.finalMarkerPacket || input.finalizer || null;
        const finalMarker = typeof finalPacket === 'string' ? finalPacket : (finalPacket?.marker || input.finalMarker || '');
        const finalFields = finalMarker ? parseRelayAckHashChainFinalMarkerFields(finalMarker) : (finalPacket?.fields || {});
        const finalMarkerValidation = finalPacket ? validateRelayAckHashChainFinalMarker(finalPacket, `${profile}:final-marker-validation`) : { decision: 'caution', blockers: [], warnings: ['hash-chain final marker not supplied; using explicit input fields only'] };
        const commandEnvelope = input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || {
            requestId: input.requestId || finalFields.requestId || finalFields.request_id || '',
            command: input.command || finalFields.command || 'continue_now',
            targetTabId: input.targetTabId || finalFields.targetTabId || finalFields.target_tab_id || '',
            targetConversationId: input.targetConversationId || finalFields.targetConversationId || finalFields.target_conversation_id || ''
        };
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(commandEnvelope || {});
        const get = (...values) => {
            for (const value of values) {
                const text = compactHashField(value || '', 128);
                if (text) return text;
            }
            return '';
        };
        return {
            schema: FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA,
            profile,
            finalPacket,
            finalMarker,
            finalFields,
            finalMarkerValidation,
            commandEnvelope: env.raw || commandEnvelope || {},
            requestId: get(input.requestId, env.requestId, finalFields.requestId, finalFields.request_id),
            command: get(input.command, env.commandName, finalFields.command),
            targetTabId: get(input.targetTabId, env.targetTabId, finalFields.targetTabId, finalFields.target_tab_id),
            targetConversationId: get(input.targetConversationId, env.targetConversationId, finalFields.targetConversationId, finalFields.target_conversation_id),
            finalArchiveManifestHash: get(input.finalArchiveManifestHash, input.manifestHash, finalFields.finalArchiveManifestHash, finalFields.final_archive_manifest_hash),
            finalMarkerHash: get(input.finalMarkerHash, input.hashChainFinalMarkerHash, input.hashChainMarkerHash),
            ackMarkerHash: get(input.ackMarkerHash, finalFields.ackMarkerHash, finalFields.ack_marker_hash),
            markerHash: get(input.markerHash, finalFields.markerHash, finalFields.marker_hash),
            beforeHash: get(input.beforeHash, finalFields.beforeHash, finalFields.before_hash),
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: get(input.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, finalFields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, finalFields.owner_approval_artifact_hash),
            commandReceiptHash: get(input.commandReceiptHash, finalFields.commandReceiptHash, finalFields.command_receipt_hash),
            afterHash: get(input.afterHash, finalFields.afterHash, finalFields.after_hash),
            archiveEnvelopeHash: get(input.archiveEnvelopeHash, finalFields.archiveEnvelopeHash, finalFields.archive_envelope_hash),
            archiveIndexId: get(input.archiveIndexId, input.indexId, input.nexusyncIndexId, input.recordId),
            recordPathHint: String(input.recordPathHint || input.nexusyncRecordPath || input.archiveRecordPath || '').slice(0, 240),
            archiveTimestamp: String(input.archiveTimestamp || input.archivedAt || new Date().toISOString()).slice(0, 80),
            containsPromptText: !!(input.containsPromptText || finalPacket?.containsPromptText || finalFields.contains_prompt_text === 'true'),
            containsUserText: !!(input.containsUserText || finalPacket?.containsUserText || finalFields.contains_user_text === 'true'),
            notOwnerApproval: input.notOwnerApproval !== false && finalFields.not_owner_approval !== 'false',
            dispatchExecuted: input.dispatchExecuted === true || finalFields.dispatch_executed === 'true'
        };
    }

    function buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(input = {}, profile = 'final-archive-index-manifest') {
        const n = normalizeFinalArchiveIndexInput(input, profile);
        const hashes = {
            finalArchiveManifestHash: n.finalArchiveManifestHash,
            finalMarkerHash: n.finalMarkerHash,
            ackMarkerHash: n.ackMarkerHash,
            markerHash: n.markerHash,
            beforeHash: n.beforeHash,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: n.ownerApprovalArtifactHash,
            commandReceiptHash: n.commandReceiptHash,
            afterHash: n.afterHash,
            archiveEnvelopeHash: n.archiveEnvelopeHash
        };
        const requiredHashFields = ['finalArchiveManifestHash', 'finalMarkerHash'];
        const missingRequired = requiredHashFields.filter((key) => !hashes[key]);
        const malformedHashes = Object.entries(hashes).filter(([, value]) => value && !isLikelySha256Text(value)).map(([key]) => key);
        const warnings = [];
        if (n.finalMarkerValidation?.decision === 'hold') warnings.push('hash-chain-final-marker-validation-hold');
        if (!n.archiveIndexId) warnings.push('archiveIndexId missing: external archive may still store by finalArchiveManifestHash');
        if (!n.recordPathHint) warnings.push('recordPathHint missing: Nexusync/WebAI Transfer should provide a stable archive path when available');
        return {
            schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.manifest`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestId: n.requestId,
            command: n.command,
            targetTabId: n.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: n.targetConversationId,
            archiveIndexId: n.archiveIndexId,
            recordPathHint: n.recordPathHint,
            archiveTimestamp: n.archiveTimestamp,
            hashes,
            requiredHashFields,
            missingRequired,
            malformedHashes,
            finalMarkerValidation: n.finalMarkerValidation?.decision || 'unknown',
            warnings,
            complete: missingRequired.length === 0 && malformedHashes.length === 0,
            externalHashAuthority: 'external Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n/Codex supervisor computes authoritative sha256 and stores the index ACK',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            rule: 'This final archive index ACK is a close-loop archive handoff. It does not approve, dispatch, retry, or mutate runtime state.'
        };
    }

    function validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest = {}, profile = 'final-archive-index-manifest-validation') {
        const candidate = manifest?.schema === `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.manifest` ? manifest : buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `${profile}:coerced`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (candidate.containsPromptText === true) blockers.push('containsPromptText must be false');
        if (candidate.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('containsUserText must be false');
        if (candidate.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('manifest must declare notOwnerApproval=true');
        if (candidate.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('manifest must not claim dispatchExecuted=true');
        if (!candidate.requestId) blockers.push('missing requestId');
        if (!candidate.command) blockers.push('missing command');
        if (!candidate.targetTabId && !candidate.targetConversationId) blockers.push('missing targetTabId/targetConversationId');
        const missing = Array.isArray(candidate.missingRequired) ? candidate.missingRequired : [];
        if (missing.length) blockers.push(`missing required hash fields: ${missing.join(',')}`);
        const malformed = Array.isArray(candidate.malformedHashes) ? candidate.malformedHashes : [];
        if (malformed.length) blockers.push(`malformed sha256 fields: ${malformed.join(',')}`);
        if ((candidate.finalMarkerValidation || '') === 'hold') warnings.push('finalMarkerValidation is hold; index ACK should not be marked complete until final marker is fixed');
        if (Array.isArray(candidate.warnings)) warnings.push(...candidate.warnings.slice(0, 8));
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            requestId: candidate.requestId || '',
            command: candidate.command || '',
            targetTabId: candidate.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: candidate.targetConversationId || '',
            archiveIndexId: candidate.archiveIndexId || '',
            finalArchiveManifestHash: candidate.hashes?.finalArchiveManifestHash || '',
            finalMarkerHash: candidate.hashes?.finalMarkerHash || '',
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
    }

    function buildFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(input = {}, profile = 'final-archive-index-ack-marker') {
        const manifest = buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(input, `${profile}:manifest`);
        const validation = validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `${profile}:validation`);
        const h = manifest.hashes || {};
        const line = (key, value) => `${key}: ${normalizeMarkerValue(value, 180)}`;
        const lines = [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]',
            line('schema', FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA),
            line('version', SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL),
            line('decision', validation.decision),
            line('archive_index_complete', manifest.complete && validation.decision !== 'hold' ? 'true' : 'false'),
            line('request_id', manifest.requestId),
            line('command', manifest.command),
            line('target_tab_id', manifest.targetTabId),
            line('target_conversation_id', manifest.targetConversationId),
            line('archive_index_id', manifest.archiveIndexId),
            line('record_path_hint', manifest.recordPathHint),
            line('final_archive_manifest_hash', h.finalArchiveManifestHash),
            line('final_marker_hash', h.finalMarkerHash),
            line('ack_marker_hash', h.ackMarkerHash),
            line('marker_hash', h.markerHash),
            line('before_hash', h.beforeHash),
            line('owner_approval_artifact_hash', h.ownerApprovalArtifactHash),
            line('command_receipt_hash', h.commandReceiptHash),
            line('after_hash', h.afterHash),
            line('archive_envelope_hash', h.archiveEnvelopeHash),
            line('validation', validation.decision),
            line('contains_prompt_text', 'false'),
            line('contains_user_text', 'false'),
            line('not_owner_approval', 'true'),
            line('dispatch_executed', 'false'),
            line('authoritative_hash_external', 'true'),
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]'
        ];
        return {
            schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker: lines.join('\n'),
            manifest,
            validation,
            archiveIndexComplete: manifest.complete && validation.decision !== 'hold',
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false
        };
    }

    function parseFinalArchiveIndexAckMarkerFields(markerText = '') {
        const fields = {};
        for (const line of String(markerText || '').split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().replace(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
            fields[key] = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'final-archive-index-ack-marker-validation') {
        const marker = typeof markerOrPacket === 'string' ? markerOrPacket : (markerOrPacket?.marker || '');
        const fields = parseFinalArchiveIndexAckMarkerFields(marker);
        const manifest = buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest({
            requestId: fields.requestId,
            command: fields.command,
            targetTabId: fields.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: fields.targetConversationId,
            archiveIndexId: fields.archiveIndexId,
            recordPathHint: fields.recordPathHint,
            finalArchiveManifestHash: fields.finalArchiveManifestHash,
            finalMarkerHash: fields.finalMarkerHash,
            ackMarkerHash: fields.ackMarkerHash,
            markerHash: fields.markerHash,
            beforeHash: fields.beforeHash,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: fields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash,
            commandReceiptHash: fields.commandReceiptHash,
            afterHash: fields.afterHash,
            archiveEnvelopeHash: fields.archiveEnvelopeHash,
            containsPromptText: fields.containsPromptText === 'true',
            containsUserText: fields.containsUserText === 'true',
            notOwnerApproval: fields.notOwnerApproval !== 'false',
            dispatchExecuted: fields.dispatchExecuted === 'true'
        }, `${profile}:from-marker`);
        const validation = validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, profile);
        if (!String(marker).includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]') || !String(marker).includes('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_FINAL_ARCHIVE_ACK]')) validation.blockers.push('missing final archive ACK marker delimiters');
        if (fields.authoritativeHashExternal !== 'true') validation.warnings.push('authoritative_hash_external should be true');
        validation.decision = validation.blockers.length ? 'hold' : validation.warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        validation.fields = fields;
        return validation;
    }

    function buildFinalArchiveIndexAckFixturePack(profile = 'final-archive-index-ack-fixtures') {
        const h1 = 'a'.repeat(64), h2 = 'b'.repeat(64), h3 = 'c'.repeat(64), h4 = 'd'.repeat(64), h5 = 'e'.repeat(64), h6 = 'f'.repeat(64), h7 = '1'.repeat(64), h8 = '2'.repeat(64), h9 = '3'.repeat(64);
        const base = { requestId: 'fixture-v214-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: 'fixture-tab', targetConversationId: 'fixture-conversation', archiveIndexId: 'fixture-index-001', recordPathHint: 'nexusync://fixture/cgpt-auto-continue/final/fixture-v214-001', finalArchiveManifestHash: h1, finalMarkerHash: h2, ackMarkerHash: h3, markerHash: h4, beforeHash: h5, ownerApprovalArtifactHash: h6, commandReceiptHash: h7, afterHash: h8, archiveEnvelopeHash: h9, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, notOwnerApproval: true };
        return {
            schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'complete-final-archive-index-ack-passes', input: base, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'missing-index-id-cautions-only', input: Object.assign({}, base, { archiveIndexId: '' }), expect: 'caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-final-archive-manifest-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { finalArchiveManifestHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-final-marker-hash-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { finalMarkerHash: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-target-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { targetTabId: '', targetConversationId: '' }) },
                { id: 'bad-final-hash-format-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { finalArchiveManifestHash: 'not-a-sha256' }) },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { containsPromptText: true }) },
                { id: 'owner-approval-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { notOwnerApproval: false }) },
                { id: 'dispatch-executed-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { dispatchExecuted: true }) }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateFinalArchiveIndexAckFixtures(profile = 'final-archive-index-ack-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildFinalArchiveIndexAckFixturePack(`${profile}:fixtures`);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const manifest = buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            const actual = validation.decision;
            const pass = item.expect === 'caution' ? ['caution', 'pass'].includes(actual) : actual === item.expect;
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustPass', expected: item.expect, actual, pass });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const manifest = buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            const actual = validation.decision;
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustFail', expected: 'hold', actual, pass: actual === 'hold' });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.pass);
        return { schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass', passCount: results.length - failed.length, failCount: failed.length, failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id), results };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferFinalArchiveIndexPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-final-archive-index') {
        const markerPacket = buildFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: markerPacket.marker, validation: markerPacket.validation, archiveIndexComplete: markerPacket.archiveIndexComplete, relayInstruction: 'Return/store this final archive ACK marker after external finalArchiveManifestHash/finalMarkerHash are computed and archived; do not treat it as approval or dispatch evidence by itself.', notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildNexusyncFinalArchiveIndexPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-final-archive-index') {
        const markerPacket = buildFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, manifest: markerPacket.manifest, marker: markerPacket.marker, validation: markerPacket.validation, recordPathHint: input.recordPathHint || input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/final-archive-index/<requestId>', externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' }, notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildN8nFinalArchiveIndexContract(profile = 'n8n-final-archive-index-contract') {
        return { schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, importableN8nWorkflow: false, pseudoBranches: [
            { branch: 'WAIT_FINAL_ARCHIVE_HASH', action: 'external adapter computes finalArchiveManifestHash and finalMarkerHash' },
            { branch: 'BUILD_FINAL_INDEX_ACK', action: 'finalArchiveIndexAckMarker({finalArchiveManifestHash, finalMarkerHash, requestId, command, target})' },
            { branch: 'VALIDATE_FINAL_INDEX_ACK', action: 'validateFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(marker)' },
            { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'validation hold or missing required hash', action: 'do not mark external loop complete; notify owner/supervisor' },
            { branch: 'CLOSE_LOOP_ARCHIVE', if: 'validation pass/caution', action: 'archive ACK marker and update external index' }
        ], stopConditions: ['ACK marker treated as approval', 'containsPromptText true', 'missing finalArchiveManifestHash', 'missing finalMarkerHash', 'missing target', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }

    function buildCodexFinalArchiveIndexCard(profile = 'codex-final-archive-index-card') {
        return { schema: `${FINAL_ARCHIVE_INDEX_ACK_SCHEMA}.codex_card`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, oneLineTask: 'Read-only: build and validate the final archive index ACK marker after external finalArchiveManifestHash/finalMarkerHash exist; never dispatch from this ACK.', readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.finalArchiveIndexAckMarker(input)`, validateProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(marker)`, forbidden: ['do not dispatch from ACK', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not clear replay/approval ledgers to force pass'], stopIf: ['validation hold', 'missing required sha256', 'ACK marker treated as approval', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }


    // v215: Archive index query / completion probe.
    // This read-only layer lets external supervisors query whether a requestId has a
    // complete close-loop archive chain, what hash is still missing, and whether the
    // next action should be wait, repair, or close-loop. It never dispatches commands
    // and never treats archive markers/hashes as owner approval.
    function buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbeContract(profile = 'archive-index-completion-probe-contract') {
        return {
            schema: ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Query external archive completion for one requestId and return a low-token wait/repair/close-loop state card.',
            exportedApi: [
                'archiveIndexCompletionProbeContract', 'archiveIndexQueryContract',
                'archiveIndexCompletionProbe', 'archiveIndexQuery',
                'validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe', 'archiveIndexCompletionMarker',
                'validateArchiveIndexCompletionMarker', 'archiveIndexCompletionProbeFixtures',
                'validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbeFixtures', 'webaiTransferArchiveIndexQueryPacket',
                'nexusyncArchiveIndexCompletionPacket', 'n8nArchiveIndexQueryContract',
                'codexArchiveIndexCompletionCard'
            ],
            requiredForCloseLoop: ['requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId or targetConversationId', 'finalArchiveManifestHash', 'finalMarkerHash', 'ackMarkerHash', 'markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash'],
            statusCodes: ['COMPLETE_ARCHIVED', 'READY_CLOSE_LOOP', 'WAIT_ARCHIVE_INDEX', 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES', 'HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX'],
            markerFormat: { start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]', end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]' },
            invariants: [
                'Probe/query is read-only and never dispatches commands, clicks buttons, downloads artifacts, or writes receipts.',
                'Archive hashes, final ACK markers, receipt markers, and relay markers are evidence only and never owner approval.',
                'Authoritative sha256 and archive existence checks are external; this userscript reports text-free binding/completion state from supplied inputs.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function normalizeArchiveIndexCompletionInput(input = {}, profile = 'archive-index-completion-input') {
        const ackPacket = input.finalArchiveIndexPacket || input.finalAckPacket || input.indexAckPacket || input.ackPacket || null;
        const ackMarker = typeof ackPacket === 'string' ? ackPacket : (ackPacket?.marker || input.finalArchiveIndexAckMarker || input.ackMarker || '');
        const ackFields = ackMarker ? parseFinalArchiveIndexAckMarkerFields(ackMarker) : (ackPacket?.fields || {});
        const manifestSource = input.finalArchiveIndexManifest || input.indexManifest || ackPacket?.manifest || null;
        const manifest = manifestSource ? buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifestSource, `${profile}:manifest-source`) : buildFinalArchiveIndexManifest(Object.assign({}, input, ackFields), `${profile}:inline`);
        const ackValidation = ackMarker ? validateFinalArchiveIndexAckMarker(ackMarker, `${profile}:ack-marker-validation`) : (manifestSource ? validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `${profile}:manifest-validation`) : { decision: 'caution', blockers: [], warnings: ['final archive ACK marker not supplied; using explicit input fields only'] });
        const h = Object.assign({}, manifest.hashes || {});
        const get = (...values) => {
            for (const value of values) {
                const text = compactHashField(value || '', 160);
                if (text) return text;
            }
            return '';
        };
        const hashes = {
            finalArchiveManifestHash: get(input.finalArchiveManifestHash, h.finalArchiveManifestHash, ackFields.finalArchiveManifestHash),
            finalMarkerHash: get(input.finalMarkerHash, h.finalMarkerHash, ackFields.finalMarkerHash),
            ackMarkerHash: get(input.ackMarkerHash, h.ackMarkerHash, ackFields.ackMarkerHash),
            markerHash: get(input.markerHash, h.markerHash, ackFields.markerHash),
            beforeHash: get(input.beforeHash, h.beforeHash, ackFields.beforeHash),
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: get(input.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, h.ownerApprovalArtifactHash, ackFields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash),
            commandReceiptHash: get(input.commandReceiptHash, h.commandReceiptHash, ackFields.commandReceiptHash),
            afterHash: get(input.afterHash, h.afterHash, ackFields.afterHash),
            archiveEnvelopeHash: get(input.archiveEnvelopeHash, h.archiveEnvelopeHash, ackFields.archiveEnvelopeHash)
        };
        const env = normalizeControlEnvelope(input.commandEnvelope || input.envelope || { requestId: input.requestId || manifest.requestId || ackFields.requestId || '', command: input.command || manifest.command || ackFields.command || '', targetTabId: input.targetTabId || manifest.targetTabId || ackFields.targetTabId || '', targetConversationId: input.targetConversationId || manifest.targetConversationId || ackFields.targetConversationId || '' });
        return {
            schema: ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA,
            profile,
            requestId: get(input.requestId, env.requestId, manifest.requestId, ackFields.requestId),
            command: get(input.command, env.commandName, manifest.command, ackFields.command),
            targetTabId: get(input.targetTabId, env.targetTabId, manifest.targetTabId, ackFields.targetTabId),
            targetConversationId: get(input.targetConversationId, env.targetConversationId, manifest.targetConversationId, ackFields.targetConversationId),
            archiveIndexId: get(input.archiveIndexId, input.indexId, manifest.archiveIndexId, ackFields.archiveIndexId),
            recordPathHint: String(input.recordPathHint || input.nexusyncRecordPath || manifest.recordPathHint || ackFields.recordPathHint || '').slice(0, 240),
            expectedRecordPath: String(input.expectedRecordPath || input.expectedNexusyncRecordPath || '').slice(0, 240),
            archiveLookupStatus: String(input.archiveLookupStatus || input.lookupStatus || input.indexLookupStatus || '').slice(0, 80),
            hashes,
            finalArchiveIndexManifest: manifest,
            finalArchiveIndexValidation: validateFinalArchiveIndexManifest(manifest, `${profile}:final-ack-manifest-validation`),
            finalArchiveAckValidation: ackValidation,
            containsPromptText: !!(input.containsPromptText || manifest.containsPromptText || ackPacket?.containsPromptText),
            containsUserText: !!(input.containsUserText || manifest.containsUserText || ackPacket?.containsUserText),
            notOwnerApproval: input.notOwnerApproval !== false && manifest.notOwnerApproval !== false,
            dispatchExecuted: input.dispatchExecuted === true || manifest.dispatchExecuted === true
        };
    }

    function buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(input = {}, profile = 'archive-index-completion-probe') {
        const n = normalizeArchiveIndexCompletionInput(input, profile);
        const requiredIdentity = ['requestId', 'command'];
        const requiredHashes = ['finalArchiveManifestHash', 'finalMarkerHash', 'ackMarkerHash', 'markerHash', 'beforeHash', 'ownerApprovalArtifactHash', 'commandReceiptHash', 'afterHash', 'archiveEnvelopeHash'];
        const missingIdentity = requiredIdentity.filter((key) => !n[key]);
        if (!n.targetTabId && !n.targetConversationId) missingIdentity.push('targetTabId/targetConversationId');
        const missingHashes = requiredHashes.filter((key) => !n.hashes[key]);
        const malformedHashes = requiredHashes.filter((key) => n.hashes[key] && !isLikelySha256Text(n.hashes[key]));
        const warnings = [];
        if (!n.archiveIndexId) warnings.push('archiveIndexId missing; external index may need recordPath/finalArchiveManifestHash lookup');
        if (!n.recordPathHint) warnings.push('recordPathHint missing; external supervisor should provide a stable index path when available');
        if (n.finalArchiveAckValidation?.decision === 'hold') warnings.push('final archive ACK validation is hold');
        if (n.archiveLookupStatus && !/^(found|indexed|complete|ok|present)$/i.test(n.archiveLookupStatus)) warnings.push(`external archive lookup status=${n.archiveLookupStatus}`);
        let statusCode = 'COMPLETE_ARCHIVED';
        let nextAction = 'close_loop';
        if (missingIdentity.length || malformedHashes.length || n.containsPromptText || n.containsUserText || n.notOwnerApproval !== true || n.dispatchExecuted === true) {
            statusCode = 'HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX';
            nextAction = 'hold';
        } else if (missingHashes.length) {
            statusCode = 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES';
            nextAction = 'repair';
        } else if (!n.archiveIndexId && !n.recordPathHint && !n.archiveLookupStatus) {
            statusCode = 'WAIT_ARCHIVE_INDEX';
            nextAction = 'wait';
        } else if (warnings.length) {
            statusCode = 'READY_CLOSE_LOOP';
            nextAction = 'close_loop_with_caution';
        }
        return {
            schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.probe`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestId: n.requestId,
            command: n.command,
            targetTabId: n.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: n.targetConversationId,
            archiveIndexId: n.archiveIndexId,
            recordPathHint: n.recordPathHint,
            archiveLookupStatus: n.archiveLookupStatus || '',
            statusCode,
            nextAction,
            decision: statusCode === 'HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX' ? 'hold' : (statusCode === 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES' || warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass'),
            complete: statusCode === 'COMPLETE_ARCHIVED' || statusCode === 'READY_CLOSE_LOOP',
            archiveReadyForClose: statusCode === 'COMPLETE_ARCHIVED' || statusCode === 'READY_CLOSE_LOOP',
            missingIdentity,
            missingHashes,
            malformedHashes,
            warnings,
            hashes: n.hashes,
            validationInputs: { finalArchiveIndexValidation: n.finalArchiveIndexValidation?.decision || 'unknown', finalArchiveAckValidation: n.finalArchiveAckValidation?.decision || 'unknown' },
            externalAuthority: { archiveLookupAuthoritative: false, sha256Authority: 'external Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n/Codex supervisor', note: 'This probe only classifies supplied text-free fields; it does not read or verify an external archive store.' },
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            rule: 'Use statusCode/nextAction for wait/repair/close-loop branching. Do not dispatch or approve from this probe.'
        };
    }

    function validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probeOrInput = {}, profile = 'archive-index-completion-probe-validation') {
        const probe = probeOrInput?.schema === `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.probe` ? probeOrInput : buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probeOrInput, `${profile}:coerced`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (probe.containsPromptText === true) blockers.push('containsPromptText must be false');
        if (probe.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('containsUserText must be false');
        if (probe.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('probe must declare notOwnerApproval=true');
        if (probe.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('probe must not claim dispatchExecuted=true');
        if (Array.isArray(probe.missingIdentity) && probe.missingIdentity.length) blockers.push(`missing identity: ${probe.missingIdentity.join(',')}`);
        if (Array.isArray(probe.malformedHashes) && probe.malformedHashes.length) blockers.push(`malformed hashes: ${probe.malformedHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (probe.statusCode === 'HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX') blockers.push('statusCode=HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX');
        if (Array.isArray(probe.missingHashes) && probe.missingHashes.length) warnings.push(`missing hashes: ${probe.missingHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (Array.isArray(probe.warnings)) warnings.push(...probe.warnings.slice(0, 8));
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.validation`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, decision, blockers, warnings, requestId: probe.requestId || '', statusCode: probe.statusCode || '', nextAction: probe.nextAction || '', complete: !!probe.complete, archiveReadyForClose: !!probe.archiveReadyForClose, missingHashes: probe.missingHashes || [], malformedHashes: probe.malformedHashes || [] };
    }

    function buildArchiveIndexCompletionMarker(input = {}, profile = 'archive-index-completion-marker') {
        const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(input, `${profile}:probe`);
        const validation = validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probe, `${profile}:validation`);
        const h = probe.hashes || {};
        const line = (key, value) => `${key}: ${normalizeMarkerValue(value, 180)}`;
        const lines = [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]',
            line('schema', ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA),
            line('version', SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL),
            line('decision', validation.decision),
            line('status_code', probe.statusCode),
            line('next_action', probe.nextAction),
            line('archive_ready_for_close', probe.archiveReadyForClose ? 'true' : 'false'),
            line('request_id', probe.requestId),
            line('command', probe.command),
            line('target_tab_id', probe.targetTabId),
            line('target_conversation_id', probe.targetConversationId),
            line('archive_index_id', probe.archiveIndexId),
            line('record_path_hint', probe.recordPathHint),
            line('final_archive_manifest_hash', h.finalArchiveManifestHash),
            line('final_marker_hash', h.finalMarkerHash),
            line('ack_marker_hash', h.ackMarkerHash),
            line('marker_hash', h.markerHash),
            line('before_hash', h.beforeHash),
            line('owner_approval_artifact_hash', h.ownerApprovalArtifactHash),
            line('command_receipt_hash', h.commandReceiptHash),
            line('after_hash', h.afterHash),
            line('archive_envelope_hash', h.archiveEnvelopeHash),
            line('missing_hashes', (probe.missingHashes || []).join(',')),
            line('validation', validation.decision),
            line('contains_prompt_text', 'false'),
            line('contains_user_text', 'false'),
            line('not_owner_approval', 'true'),
            line('dispatch_executed', 'false'),
            line('authoritative_hash_external', 'true'),
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]'
        ];
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: lines.join('\n'), probe, validation, notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function parseArchiveIndexCompletionMarkerFields(markerText = '') {
        const fields = {};
        for (const line of String(markerText || '').split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().replace(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
            fields[key] = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateArchiveIndexCompletionMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'archive-index-completion-marker-validation') {
        const marker = typeof markerOrPacket === 'string' ? markerOrPacket : (markerOrPacket?.marker || '');
        const fields = parseArchiveIndexCompletionMarkerFields(marker);
        const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe({
            requestId: fields.requestId,
            command: fields.command,
            targetTabId: fields.targetTabId,
            targetConversationId: fields.targetConversationId,
            archiveIndexId: fields.archiveIndexId,
            recordPathHint: fields.recordPathHint,
            finalArchiveManifestHash: fields.finalArchiveManifestHash,
            finalMarkerHash: fields.finalMarkerHash,
            ackMarkerHash: fields.ackMarkerHash,
            markerHash: fields.markerHash,
            beforeHash: fields.beforeHash,
            ownerApprovalArtifactHash: fields.ownerApprovalArtifactHash,
            commandReceiptHash: fields.commandReceiptHash,
            afterHash: fields.afterHash,
            archiveEnvelopeHash: fields.archiveEnvelopeHash,
            containsPromptText: fields.containsPromptText === 'true',
            containsUserText: fields.containsUserText === 'true',
            notOwnerApproval: fields.notOwnerApproval !== 'false',
            dispatchExecuted: fields.dispatchExecuted === 'true'
        }, `${profile}:from-marker`);
        const validation = validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probe, profile);
        if (!String(marker).includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]') || !String(marker).includes('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_INDEX_PROBE]')) validation.blockers.push('missing archive index probe marker delimiters');
