        if (fields.authoritativeHashExternal !== 'true') validation.warnings.push('authoritative_hash_external should be true');
        validation.decision = validation.blockers.length ? 'hold' : validation.warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        validation.fields = fields;
        return validation;
    }

    function buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbeFixturePack(profile = 'archive-index-completion-probe-fixtures') {
        const h = ['a','b','c','d','e','f','1','2','3'].map((ch) => ch.repeat(64));
        const base = { requestId: 'fixture-v215-001', command: 'continue_now', targetTabId: 'fixture-tab', targetConversationId: 'fixture-conversation', archiveIndexId: 'fixture-index-001', recordPathHint: 'nexusync://fixture/cgpt-auto-continue/final/fixture-v215-001', finalArchiveManifestHash: h[0], finalMarkerHash: h[1], ackMarkerHash: h[2], markerHash: h[3], beforeHash: h[4], ownerApprovalArtifactHash: h[5], commandReceiptHash: h[6], afterHash: h[7], archiveEnvelopeHash: h[8], containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, notOwnerApproval: true };
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.fixtures`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'complete-index-probe-passes', input: base, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'no-index-id-cautions-wait-or-close', input: Object.assign({}, base, { archiveIndexId: '', recordPathHint: '' }), expect: 'caution' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-requestId-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { requestId: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-target-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { targetTabId: '', targetConversationId: '' }) },
                { id: 'bad-hash-format-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { beforeHash: 'not-a-sha256' }) },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { containsPromptText: true }) },
                { id: 'owner-approval-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, base, { notOwnerApproval: false }) }
            ],
            mustCaution: [
                { id: 'missing-afterHash-cautions-repair', input: Object.assign({}, base, { afterHash: '' }), expectedStatus: 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES' },
                { id: 'missing-commandReceiptHash-cautions-repair', input: Object.assign({}, base, { commandReceiptHash: '' }), expectedStatus: 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbeFixtures(profile = 'archive-index-completion-probe-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbeFixturePack(`${profile}:fixtures`);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probe, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustPass', expected: item.expect, actual: validation.decision, statusCode: probe.statusCode, pass: item.expect === 'caution' ? ['pass','caution'].includes(validation.decision) : validation.decision === item.expect });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probe, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustFail', expected: 'hold', actual: validation.decision, statusCode: probe.statusCode, pass: validation.decision === 'hold' });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustCaution || []) {
            const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(probe, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustCaution', expected: 'caution', actual: validation.decision, statusCode: probe.statusCode, pass: validation.decision === 'caution' && probe.statusCode === item.expectedStatus });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.pass);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass', passCount: results.length - failed.length, failCount: failed.length, failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id), results };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferArchiveIndexQueryPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-archive-index-query') {
        const markerPacket = buildArchiveIndexCompletionMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: markerPacket.marker, probe: { statusCode: markerPacket.probe.statusCode, nextAction: markerPacket.probe.nextAction, requestId: markerPacket.probe.requestId, missingHashes: markerPacket.probe.missingHashes }, validation: markerPacket.validation, relayInstruction: 'Return/store this archive index completion probe marker for low-token wait/repair/close-loop branching; do not dispatch or approve from it.', notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildNexusyncArchiveIndexCompletionPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-archive-index-completion') {
        const markerPacket = buildArchiveIndexCompletionMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, probe: markerPacket.probe, marker: markerPacket.marker, validation: markerPacket.validation, recordPathHint: input.recordPathHint || input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/archive-index/<requestId>', externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' }, notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildN8nArchiveIndexQueryContract(profile = 'n8n-archive-index-query-contract') {
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, importableN8nWorkflow: false, pseudoBranches: [
            { branch: 'QUERY_ARCHIVE_INDEX', action: 'archiveIndexCompletionProbe({requestId, hashes, finalAckMarker})' },
            { branch: 'WAIT', if: 'statusCode=WAIT_ARCHIVE_INDEX', action: 'wait/poll external archive index; do not dispatch' },
            { branch: 'REPAIR', if: 'statusCode=REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES', action: 'recover missing hash evidence; do not close loop yet' },
            { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'statusCode=HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX', action: 'stop and notify owner/supervisor' },
            { branch: 'CLOSE_LOOP', if: 'COMPLETE_ARCHIVED or READY_CLOSE_LOOP', action: 'archive probe marker, mark request complete, no dispatch' }
        ], stopConditions: ['probe treated as approval', 'containsPromptText true', 'missing request/target', 'malformed hash', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }

    function buildCodexArchiveIndexCompletionCard(profile = 'codex-archive-index-completion-card') {
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_INDEX_COMPLETION_PROBE_SCHEMA}.codex_card`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, oneLineTask: 'Read-only: query archive completion for a requestId and return wait/repair/close-loop status; never dispatch from this probe.', readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.archiveIndexCompletionProbe(input)`, markerProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.archiveIndexCompletionMarker(input)`, forbidden: ['do not dispatch from archive probe', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not clear ledgers to force pass'], stopIf: ['validation hold', 'missing identity', 'malformed hash', 'probe treated as approval', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }

    // v216: external archive repair plan / missing-hash recovery hints. This layer
    // translates archiveIndexCompletionProbe().missingHashes into per-hash source,
    // recovery, stop-condition, and low-token n8n/Codex repair cards. It is read-only:
    // it does not dispatch commands, click buttons, compute authoritative hashes, or
    // treat evidence/markers/receipts as owner approval.
    const ARCHIVE_REPAIR_HASH_SOURCE_MAP = {
        finalArchiveManifestHash: {
            role: 'final archive manifest hash',
            sourceApi: 'relayAckHashChainManifest(input) or external final archive manifest JSON',
            externalSource: 'Nexusync/WebAI Transfer final archive manifest record',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_FINAL_ARCHIVE_MANIFEST_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Read the external final archive manifest record, compute authoritative SHA256 externally, and return finalArchiveManifestHash only.'
        },
        finalMarkerHash: {
            role: 'final hash-chain marker hash',
            sourceApi: 'relayAckHashChainFinalMarker(input)',
            externalSource: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_HASH_CHAIN_FINAL] marker archived by relay/Nexusync',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_FINAL_MARKER_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Locate the final hash-chain marker, hash its exact marker text externally, and return finalMarkerHash only.'
        },
        ackMarkerHash: {
            role: 'relay ACK marker hash',
            sourceApi: 'relayAckMarker(input)',
            externalSource: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_RELAY_ACK] marker archived after command receipt/afterHash appear',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_ACK_MARKER_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Locate the relay ACK marker, compute its exact external SHA256, and return ackMarkerHash only.'
        },
        markerHash: {
            role: 'execution checklist marker hash',
            sourceApi: 'executionChecklistMarker(input)',
            externalSource: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_EXECUTION_CHECKLIST] marker before real dispatch',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_EXECUTION_MARKER_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Locate the execution checklist marker for the same requestId/target, hash it externally, and return markerHash only.'
        },
        beforeHash: {
            role: 'before evidence hash',
            sourceApi: 'evidencePacket("before-command") or supervisorLoopGate("before-command") archived externally',
            externalSource: 'Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n before-command evidence record',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_BEFORE_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Read the pre-dispatch evidence record for this requestId/target, compute authoritative SHA256 externally, and return beforeHash only.'
        },
        ownerApprovalArtifactHash: {
            role: 'owner approval artifact hash',
            sourceApi: 'ownerApprovalArtifactTemplate(commandEnvelope, beforeHash) then external owner-approved artifact',
            externalSource: 'owner action-time approval artifact, single-use, bound to requestId/command/target/beforeHash/expiry',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_OWNER_APPROVAL_ARTIFACT_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Find the explicit owner action-time approval artifact; verify it is not a template/marker/receipt, hash it externally, and return ownerApprovalArtifactHash only.'
        },
        commandReceiptHash: {
            role: 'command receipt hash',
            sourceApi: 'commandReceipts() / commandReceiptLedger() filtered by requestId',
            externalSource: 'text-free command receipt generated when targeted command was accepted/completed',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_COMMAND_RECEIPT_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Read commandReceipts for the requestId and target, archive the matching text-free receipt externally, and return commandReceiptHash only.'
        },
        afterHash: {
            role: 'after evidence hash',
            sourceApi: 'evidencePacket("after-command") archived after command completes',
            externalSource: 'Nexusync/WebAI Transfer/n8n after-command evidence record',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_AFTER_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Read the post-command evidence record for this requestId/target, compute authoritative SHA256 externally, and return afterHash only.'
        },
        archiveEnvelopeHash: {
            role: 'real loop archival envelope hash',
            sourceApi: 'realLoopArchivalEnvelope(input) / ownerApprovalReceiptBinding(input)',
            externalSource: 'real-loop archive envelope binding smokeMarkerHash, beforeHash, commandReceipt, and afterHash',
            recoveryBranch: 'RECOVER_ARCHIVE_ENVELOPE_HASH',
            codexTask: 'Build/read the real-loop archival envelope, validate it text-free, compute external SHA256, and return archiveEnvelopeHash only.'
        }
    };

    function buildArchiveRepairPlanContract(profile = 'archive-repair-plan-contract') {
        return {
            schema: ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Convert archiveIndexCompletionProbe missingHashes into per-hash recovery hints, n8n branches, Codex cards, and stop conditions for external archive repair.',
            exportedApi: [
                'archiveRepairPlanContract', 'archiveRepairPlan', 'archiveMissingHashRecoveryHints',
                'validateArchiveRepairPlan', 'archiveRepairPlanMarker', 'validateArchiveRepairPlanMarker',
                'archiveRepairPlanFixtures', 'validateArchiveRepairPlanFixtures',
                'webaiTransferArchiveRepairPacket', 'nexusyncArchiveRepairPacket',
                'n8nArchiveRepairPlanContract', 'codexArchiveRepairPlanCard'
            ],
            repairableHashes: Object.keys(ARCHIVE_REPAIR_HASH_SOURCE_MAP),
            invariants: [
                'Repair plan is read-only and never dispatches commands, clicks buttons, downloads artifacts, or writes receipts.',
                'Authoritative SHA256 and archive lookup remain external supervisor/Nexusync responsibilities.',
                'Owner approval artifact must be real action-time approval; repair hints never create or replace approval.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.',
                'Malformed hash or missing request/target identity is HOLD, not repair.'
            ],
            markerFormat: { start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]', end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]' },
            statusCodes: ['NO_REPAIR_NEEDED', 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES', 'HOLD_INVALID_REPAIR_INPUT'],
            nextActions: ['close_loop', 'repair_missing_hashes', 'hold_fix_identity_or_hashes']
        };
    }

    function buildArchiveMissingHashRecoveryHints(input = {}, profile = 'archive-missing-hash-recovery-hints') {
        const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(input, `${profile}:probe`);
        const missing = Array.isArray(probe.missingHashes) ? probe.missingHashes.slice() : [];
        const malformed = Array.isArray(probe.malformedHashes) ? probe.malformedHashes.slice() : [];
        const missingIdentity = Array.isArray(probe.missingIdentity) ? probe.missingIdentity.slice() : [];
        const hints = [];
        for (const hashName of missing) {
            const info = ARCHIVE_REPAIR_HASH_SOURCE_MAP[hashName] || {};
            hints.push({
                hashName,
                role: info.role || hashName,
                sourceApi: info.sourceApi || 'external archive/source record',
                externalSource: info.externalSource || 'external supervisor archive',
                recoveryBranch: info.recoveryBranch || `RECOVER_${String(hashName).toUpperCase()}`,
                codexTask: info.codexTask || `Recover ${hashName} from the matching requestId/target archive record and return only the external SHA256.`,
                requiredIdentity: ['requestId', 'command', 'targetTabId or targetConversationId'],
                requiredMatch: ['same requestId', 'same command', 'same targetTabId or targetConversationId'],
                stopConditions: [
                    'missing requestId or command',
                    'missing targetTabId and targetConversationId',
                    'source record contains prompt/user text unexpectedly',
                    'source hash is not authoritative external sha256',
                    'source artifact claims to be owner approval when it is only evidence',
                    'BLOCKED_DRAFT or emergency stop is active while considering dispatch'
                ],
                outputField: hashName,
                outputFormat: 'sha256:<64 lowercase hex>'
            });
        }
        return {
            schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.missing_hash_recovery_hints`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestId: probe.requestId || '',
            command: probe.command || '',
            targetTabId: probe.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: probe.targetConversationId || '',
            statusCode: probe.statusCode || '',
            missingIdentity,
            malformedHashes: malformed,
            missingHashes: missing,
            hints,
            repairable: missing.length > 0 && !missingIdentity.length && !malformed.length,
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            rule: 'Recover hashes externally, then re-run archiveIndexCompletionProbe/validateArchiveRepairPlan. Do not dispatch from repair hints.'
        };
    }

    function buildArchiveRepairPlan(input = {}, profile = 'archive-repair-plan') {
        const probe = buildArchiveIndexCompletionProbe(input, `${profile}:probe`);
        const hints = buildArchiveMissingHashRecoveryHints(input, `${profile}:hints`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (probe.containsPromptText === true) blockers.push('containsPromptText must be false');
        if (probe.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('containsUserText must be false');
        if (probe.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('archive repair plan must declare notOwnerApproval=true');
        if (probe.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('archive repair plan must not claim dispatchExecuted=true');
        if (hints.missingIdentity.length) blockers.push(`missing identity: ${hints.missingIdentity.join(',')}`);
        if (hints.malformedHashes.length) blockers.push(`malformed hashes: ${hints.malformedHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (probe.statusCode === 'HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX') blockers.push('archive completion probe is HOLD_INVALID_ARCHIVE_INDEX');
        if (hints.missingHashes.length) warnings.push(`repair required: ${hints.missingHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (Array.isArray(probe.warnings) && probe.warnings.length) warnings.push(...probe.warnings.slice(0, 8));
        let statusCode = 'NO_REPAIR_NEEDED';
        let nextAction = probe.archiveReadyForClose ? 'close_loop' : 'wait';
        if (blockers.length) {
            statusCode = 'HOLD_INVALID_REPAIR_INPUT';
            nextAction = 'hold_fix_identity_or_hashes';
        } else if (hints.missingHashes.length) {
            statusCode = 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES';
            nextAction = 'repair_missing_hashes';
        }
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.plan`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            requestId: probe.requestId || '',
            command: probe.command || '',
            targetTabId: probe.targetTabId || '',
            targetConversationId: probe.targetConversationId || '',
            archiveIndexId: probe.archiveIndexId || '',
            recordPathHint: probe.recordPathHint || '',
            statusCode,
            nextAction,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            missingHashes: hints.missingHashes,
            malformedHashes: hints.malformedHashes,
            missingIdentity: hints.missingIdentity,
            repairItems: hints.hints,
            n8nBranches: hints.hints.map((item) => ({ branch: item.recoveryBranch, missingHash: item.hashName, action: 'recover_external_hash_then_requery_archive_index', stopIf: item.stopConditions })),
            codexRepairCards: hints.hints.map((item) => ({ oneLineTask: item.codexTask, outputField: item.outputField, outputFormat: item.outputFormat, forbidden: ['do not dispatch', 'do not click', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text'], stopIf: item.stopConditions })),
            archiveCompletionProbe: { statusCode: probe.statusCode, nextAction: probe.nextAction, decision: probe.decision, archiveReadyForClose: !!probe.archiveReadyForClose },
            hashes: probe.hashes || {},
            notOwnerApproval: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            authoritativeHashExternal: true,
            rule: 'Use this plan to recover missing archive hashes externally, then rerun archiveIndexCompletionProbe. It is not approval and not a dispatch instruction.'
        };
    }

    function validateArchiveRepairPlan(planOrInput = {}, profile = 'archive-repair-plan-validation') {
        const plan = planOrInput?.schema === `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.plan` ? planOrInput : buildArchiveRepairPlan(planOrInput, `${profile}:coerced`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (plan.containsPromptText === true) blockers.push('containsPromptText must be false');
        if (plan.containsUserText === true) blockers.push('containsUserText must be false');
        if (plan.notOwnerApproval !== true) blockers.push('repair plan must declare notOwnerApproval=true');
        if (plan.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('repair plan must not claim dispatchExecuted=true');
        if (!plan.requestId) blockers.push('requestId missing');
        if (!plan.command) blockers.push('command missing');
        if (!plan.targetTabId && !plan.targetConversationId) blockers.push('targetTabId/targetConversationId missing');
        if (Array.isArray(plan.malformedHashes) && plan.malformedHashes.length) blockers.push(`malformed hashes: ${plan.malformedHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (plan.statusCode === 'HOLD_INVALID_REPAIR_INPUT') blockers.push('statusCode=HOLD_INVALID_REPAIR_INPUT');
        if (Array.isArray(plan.missingHashes) && plan.missingHashes.length && !Array.isArray(plan.repairItems)) blockers.push('missingHashes present but repairItems absent');
        if (Array.isArray(plan.missingHashes) && plan.missingHashes.length && (!plan.repairItems || plan.repairItems.length !== plan.missingHashes.length)) blockers.push('repairItems must match missingHashes length');
        for (const item of plan.repairItems || []) {
            if (!item.hashName || !item.sourceApi || !item.recoveryBranch || !item.outputFormat) blockers.push(`incomplete repair item for ${item.hashName || 'unknown'}`);
            if (!Array.isArray(item.stopConditions) || !item.stopConditions.length) blockers.push(`repair item missing stopConditions for ${item.hashName || 'unknown'}`);
        }
        if (Array.isArray(plan.missingHashes) && plan.missingHashes.length) warnings.push(`repair required: ${plan.missingHashes.join(',')}`);
        if (Array.isArray(plan.warnings)) warnings.push(...plan.warnings.slice(0, 8));
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            requestId: plan.requestId || '',
            statusCode: plan.statusCode || '',
            nextAction: plan.nextAction || '',
            missingHashes: plan.missingHashes || [],
            repairItemCount: Array.isArray(plan.repairItems) ? plan.repairItems.length : 0
        };
    }

    function buildArchiveRepairPlanMarker(input = {}, profile = 'archive-repair-plan-marker') {
        const plan = buildArchiveRepairPlan(input, `${profile}:plan`);
        const validation = validateArchiveRepairPlan(plan, `${profile}:validation`);
        const line = (key, value) => `${key}: ${normalizeMarkerValue(value, 180)}`;
        const lines = [
            '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]',
            line('schema', ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA),
            line('version', SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL),
            line('decision', validation.decision),
            line('status_code', plan.statusCode),
            line('next_action', plan.nextAction),
            line('request_id', plan.requestId),
            line('command', plan.command),
            line('target_tab_id', plan.targetTabId),
            line('target_conversation_id', plan.targetConversationId),
            line('missing_hashes', (plan.missingHashes || []).join(',')),
            line('repair_count', String((plan.repairItems || []).length)),
            line('malformed_hashes', (plan.malformedHashes || []).join(',')),
            line('record_path_hint', plan.recordPathHint),
            line('validation', validation.decision),
            line('contains_prompt_text', 'false'),
            line('contains_user_text', 'false'),
            line('not_owner_approval', 'true'),
            line('dispatch_executed', 'false'),
            line('authoritative_hash_external', 'true'),
            '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]'
        ];
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.marker_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: lines.join('\n'), plan, validation, notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function parseArchiveRepairPlanMarkerFields(markerText = '') {
        const fields = {};
        for (const line of String(markerText || '').split(/\r?\n/)) {
            const idx = line.indexOf(':');
            if (idx <= 0) continue;
            const key = line.slice(0, idx).trim().replace(/_([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
            fields[key] = line.slice(idx + 1).trim();
        }
        return fields;
    }

    function validateArchiveRepairPlanMarker(markerOrPacket = {}, profile = 'archive-repair-plan-marker-validation') {
        const marker = typeof markerOrPacket === 'string' ? markerOrPacket : (markerOrPacket?.marker || '');
        const fields = parseArchiveRepairPlanMarkerFields(marker);
        const plan = buildArchiveRepairPlan({ requestId: fields.requestId, command: fields.command, targetTabId: fields.targetTabId, targetConversationId: fields.targetConversationId, recordPathHint: fields.recordPathHint, containsPromptText: fields.containsPromptText === 'true', containsUserText: fields.containsUserText === 'true', notOwnerApproval: fields.notOwnerApproval !== 'false', dispatchExecuted: fields.dispatchExecuted === 'true' }, `${profile}:from-marker`);
        const validation = validateArchiveRepairPlan(plan, profile);
        if (!String(marker).includes('[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]') || !String(marker).includes('[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN]')) validation.blockers.push('missing archive repair plan marker delimiters');
        if (fields.authoritativeHashExternal !== 'true') validation.warnings.push('authoritative_hash_external should be true');
        validation.decision = validation.blockers.length ? 'hold' : validation.warnings.length ? 'caution' : 'pass';
        validation.fields = fields;
        return validation;
    }

    function buildArchiveRepairPlanFixturePack(profile = 'archive-repair-plan-fixtures') {
        const h = (c) => c.repeat(64);
        const complete = { requestId: 'fixture-v216-001', command: 'continue_now', targetConversationId: 'fixture-conversation', finalArchiveManifestHash: h('a'), finalMarkerHash: h('b'), ackMarkerHash: h('c'), markerHash: h('d'), beforeHash: h('e'), ownerApprovalArtifactHash: h('f'), commandReceiptHash: h('1'), afterHash: h('2'), archiveEnvelopeHash: h('3'), archiveIndexId: 'fixture-index', recordPathHint: 'nexusync://fixture/v216/complete', containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, notOwnerApproval: true };
        return {
            schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'complete-archive-needs-no-repair', input: complete, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'missing-after-hash-produces-repair-plan', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { afterHash: '' }), expect: 'caution', missing: ['afterHash'] },
                { id: 'missing-owner-approval-hash-produces-repair-plan', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { ownerApprovalArtifactHash: '' }), expect: 'caution', missing: ['ownerApprovalArtifactHash'] }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'missing-request-id-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { requestId: '' }) },
                { id: 'missing-target-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { targetConversationId: '', targetTabId: '' }) },
                { id: 'bad-before-hash-format-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { beforeHash: 'not-a-sha256' }) },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { containsPromptText: true }) },
                { id: 'owner-approval-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { notOwnerApproval: false }) },
                { id: 'dispatch-executed-claim-holds', input: Object.assign({}, complete, { dispatchExecuted: true }) }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateArchiveRepairPlanFixtures(profile = 'archive-repair-plan-fixture-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildArchiveRepairPlanFixturePack(`${profile}:fixtures`);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass || []) {
            const plan = buildArchiveRepairPlan(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateArchiveRepairPlan(plan, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            const actual = validation.decision;
            const expectedOk = item.expect === 'caution' ? ['caution', 'pass'].includes(actual) : actual === item.expect;
            const missingOk = Array.isArray(item.missing) ? item.missing.every((key) => (plan.missingHashes || []).includes(key)) : true;
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustPass', expected: item.expect, actual, pass: expectedOk && missingOk, missingHashes: plan.missingHashes || [] });
        }
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail || []) {
            const plan = buildArchiveRepairPlan(item.input, `fixture:${item.id}`);
            const validation = validateArchiveRepairPlan(plan, `fixture:${item.id}:validation`);
            results.push({ id: item.id, group: 'mustFail', expected: 'hold', actual: validation.decision, pass: validation.decision === 'hold' });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.pass);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass', passCount: results.length - failed.length, failCount: failed.length, failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id), results };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferArchiveRepairPacket(input = {}, profile = 'webai-transfer-archive-repair') {
        const markerPacket = buildArchiveRepairPlanMarker(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, marker: markerPacket.marker, plan: markerPacket.plan, validation: markerPacket.validation, relayHint: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN] marker can be forwarded as text-free repair status; hash externally if archived.', notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildNexusyncArchiveRepairPacket(input = {}, profile = 'nexusync-archive-repair') {
        const plan = buildArchiveRepairPlan(input, profile);
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, plan, recordPathHint: input.recordPathHint || input.nexusyncRecordPath || 'nexusync://cgpt-auto-continue/archive-repair/<requestId>', externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', authority: 'external Nexusync adapter/supervisor' }, repairPolicy: 'recover missing hashes externally, update archive index, then rerun archiveIndexCompletionProbe', notOwnerApproval: true, dispatchExecuted: false };
    }

    function buildN8nArchiveRepairPlanContract(profile = 'n8n-archive-repair-plan-contract') {
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.n8n_contract`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, importableN8nWorkflow: false, pseudoBranches: [
            { branch: 'READ_REPAIR_PLAN', action: 'archiveRepairPlan({requestId, hashes, finalAckMarker})' },
            { branch: 'HOLD', if: 'statusCode=HOLD_INVALID_REPAIR_INPUT', action: 'stop and notify owner/supervisor; do not dispatch' },
            { branch: 'REPAIR_MISSING_HASHES', if: 'missingHashes.length>0', action: 'for each repairItem recover external SHA256, update archive index, then requery' },
            { branch: 'NO_REPAIR_NEEDED', if: 'statusCode=NO_REPAIR_NEEDED', action: 'run archiveIndexCompletionProbe and close loop if ready' }
        ], stopConditions: ['repair plan treated as approval', 'containsPromptText true', 'malformed hash', 'missing identity', 'source record unavailable', 'external sha256 unavailable', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }

    function buildCodexArchiveRepairPlanCard(profile = 'codex-archive-repair-plan-card') {
        return { schema: `${ARCHIVE_REPAIR_PLAN_SCHEMA}.codex_card`, version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL, build: SCRIPT_BUILD, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, profile, oneLineTask: 'Read-only: recover exactly the missing archive hashes listed by archiveRepairPlan; do not dispatch or invent approval.', readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.archiveRepairPlan(input)`, markerProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.archiveRepairPlanMarker(input)`, expectedOutput: 'JSON with recovered hash fields only, each sha256:<64 lowercase hex>, plus source record ids if available', forbidden: ['do not dispatch commands', 'do not click/send/download', 'do not invent owner approval', 'do not include prompt/user text', 'do not clear ledgers to force pass'], stopIf: ['validation hold', 'missing request/target identity', 'malformed hash', 'external source unavailable', 'source text would expose prompt/user text', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'emergency stop'] };
    }


    // v203: smoke-result relay marker + enable policy. This layer compresses the
    // read-only/mock smoke harness output into a relay-safe marker and a separate
    // real-loop enable policy for WebAI Transfer, Nexusync, n8n, ASK_ROUTER, and Codex.
    function buildSupervisorSmokeResultRelayContract(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-result-relay-contract') {
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Compress the read-only supervisor smoke harness result into a relay-safe marker and a real-loop enable policy without dispatching commands.',
            exportedApi: [
                'supervisorSmokeResultRelayContract', 'supervisorSmokeResultMarker', 'supervisorSmokeEnablePolicy',
                'webaiTransferSmokeResultPacket', 'nexusyncSmokeResultPacket', 'n8nSmokeEnablePolicyContract',
                'codexSmokeEnablePolicyCard', 'supervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtures', 'validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtures'
            ],
            invariants: [
                'Smoke marker is evidence only, not owner approval.',
                'Smoke marker must not dispatch commands or write command receipts.',
                'Mock beforeHash/afterHash are not authoritative Nexusync hashes.',
                'Real supervisor loop remains gated by releaseGate, canRun, target routing, replay guard, and before/after external evidence hashes.',
                'containsPromptText and containsUserText must remain false.'
            ],
            markerFormat: {
                start: '[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SMOKE_RESULT]',
                end: '[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SMOKE_RESULT]',
                body: 'line-oriented key: value fields; text-free; hash externally if archived'
            },
            enablePolicyStates: ['allow_real_loop', 'hold_real_loop', 'manual_review']
        };
    }

    function compactSmokeHarnessResult(smokeResult = null, reason = 'compact-smoke-result') {
        const result = smokeResult && typeof smokeResult === 'object' && smokeResult.schema
            ? smokeResult
            : runExternalSupervisorSmokeHarness({ mode: 'mock' }, reason);
        const pairValidation = result?.mockEvidencePair?.validation?.decision || result?.pairValidation || 'unknown';
        const gate = result?.gate || {};
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.compact_result`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            decision: result?.decision || 'unknown',
            blockers: Array.isArray(result?.blockers) ? result.blockers.slice(0, 12) : [],
            warnings: Array.isArray(result?.warnings) ? result.warnings.slice(0, 12) : [],
            dispatchExecuted: result?.dispatchExecuted === true,
            clicked: result?.clicked === true,
            downloaded: result?.downloaded === true,
            mockHashes: true,
            pairValidation,
            gate: {
                stateCode: gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
                branchId: gate.branchId || 'unknown',
                commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
                decision: gate.decision || 'unknown',
                nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs || null
            },
            releaseGateDecision: result?.releaseGate?.decision || 'unknown',
            rule: 'Compact smoke result is text-free evidence. It is not a real command execution or owner approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSmokeEnablePolicy(smokeResult = null, profile = 'supervisor-smoke-enable-policy') {
        const compact = compactSmokeHarnessResult(smokeResult, `enable-policy:${profile}`);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (compact.dispatchExecuted) blockers.push('smoke-dispatched-command');
        if (compact.clicked) blockers.push('smoke-clicked-page');
        if (compact.downloaded) blockers.push('smoke-downloaded-artifact');
        if (compact.decision !== 'pass') blockers.push(`smoke-decision-${compact.decision}`);
        if (compact.pairValidation !== 'pass') blockers.push(`pair-validation-${compact.pairValidation}`);
        if (compact.releaseGateDecision === 'hold') blockers.push('release-gate-hold');
        if (compact.containsPromptText || compact.containsUserText) blockers.push('text-leak');
        if (compact.mockHashes) warnings.push('mock-hashes-not-authoritative');
        const allowRealLoop = blockers.length === 0;
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.enable_policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            policyDecision: allowRealLoop ? 'allow_real_loop' : 'hold_real_loop',
            allowRealLoop,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            compactSmokeResult: compact,
            requiredBeforeRealLoop: [
                'external supervisor archives real before evidence and computes authoritative beforeHash',
                'dispatch targeted commandEnvelope only when canRun.accepted=true and replay guard accepts it',
                'external supervisor archives real after evidence and computes authoritative afterHash',
                'validate commandEvidencePair before accepting the loop result'
            ],
            notApproval: true,
            rule: 'Smoke pass enables a real-loop attempt policy; it does not approve owner-sensitive actions or bypass emergency stop/scope/draft gates.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSmokeResultMarker(smokeResult = null, profile = 'supervisor-smoke-result-marker') {
        const policy = buildSupervisorSmokeEnablePolicy(smokeResult, profile);
        const c = policy.compactSmokeResult;
        const fields = [
            ['schema', SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA],
            ['version', SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL],
            ['build', SCRIPT_BUILD],
            ['generated_at', new Date().toISOString()],
            ['decision', c.decision],
            ['enable_policy', policy.policyDecision],
            ['allow_real_loop', String(!!policy.allowRealLoop)],
            ['state_code', c.gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN'],
            ['branch_id', c.gate.branchId || 'unknown'],
            ['command_ready', String(!!c.gate.commandReady)],
            ['pair_validation', c.pairValidation || 'unknown'],
            ['release_gate', c.releaseGateDecision || 'unknown'],
            ['dispatch_executed', String(!!c.dispatchExecuted)],
            ['mock_hashes', 'true'],
            ['contains_prompt_text', 'false'],
            ['contains_user_text', 'false'],
            ['not_owner_approval', 'true'],
            ['authoritative_hash', 'external-supervisor-or-nexusync-adapter-required']
        ];
        const marker = `[CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SMOKE_RESULT]\n${fields.map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${String(v).replace(/[\r\n]/g, ' ').slice(0, 240)}`).join('\n')}\n[/CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SMOKE_RESULT]`;
        const markerSignature = makeBoundedSignature(marker, 6000);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.marker`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            marker,
            markerPreviewHash: `fnv1a:${markerSignature.hash}`,
            markerCharLength: marker.length,
            policy,
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', input: 'exact marker bytes or canonical packet bytes, computed by external supervisor/Nexusync adapter' },
            rule: 'Marker is relay evidence only. It is not owner approval, not a command receipt, and not proof that a real command ran.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferSmokeResultPacket(profile = 'webai-transfer-smoke-result-packet') {
        const marker = buildSupervisorSmokeResultMarker(null, profile);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResultBlock: marker.marker,
            policyDecision: marker.policy.policyDecision,
            allowRealLoop: marker.policy.allowRealLoop,
            markerPreviewHash: marker.markerPreviewHash,
            requiredExternalFields: ['relaySourceTextSha256', 'markerSha256', 'beforeEvidenceSha256', 'afterEvidenceSha256'],
            nextStep: marker.policy.allowRealLoop ? 'External supervisor may proceed to real supervisorLoopGate before/dispatch/after flow.' : 'Do not dispatch; archive marker and notify owner/supervisor.',
            rule: 'WebAI Transfer packet carries the smoke result marker only; it must not cause automatic command dispatch by itself.'
        };
    }

    function buildNexusyncSmokeResultPacket(profile = 'nexusync-smoke-result-packet') {
        const marker = buildSupervisorSmokeResultMarker(null, profile);
        const canonicalRecord = {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.nexusync_record`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            recordType: 'cgpt_auto_continue_smoke_result',
            createdAt: marker.generatedAt,
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            policyDecision: marker.policy.policyDecision,
            allowRealLoop: marker.policy.allowRealLoop,
            markerPreviewHash: marker.markerPreviewHash,
            compactSmokeResult: marker.policy.compactSmokeResult,
            externalHashRequired: true,
            notOwnerApproval: true
        };
        const canonicalJson = canonicalizeJsonValueForNexusync(canonicalRecord);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.nexusync_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            canonicalRecord,
            canonicalJsonLength: canonicalJson.length,
            canonicalPreviewHash: nexusyncCanonicalPreviewHash(canonicalJson),
            externalHash: { required: true, algorithm: 'sha256', input: 'canonicalJson', authority: 'external-supervisor-or-nexusync-adapter' },
            enablePolicy: marker.policy,
            rule: 'Nexusync packet is an archive candidate. Adapter must compute authoritative SHA256 and must not treat it as approval.'
        };
    }

    function buildN8nSmokeEnablePolicyContract(profile = 'n8n-smoke-enable-policy-contract') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.n8n_policy`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            pseudoBranches: [
                { if: 'smoke.policyDecision == allow_real_loop', branch: 'ENABLE_REAL_SUPERVISOR_LOOP', requires: ['real beforeHash', 'targeted commandEnvelope', 'replay pass', 'real afterHash'] },
                { if: 'smoke.policyDecision == hold_real_loop', branch: 'HALT_AND_NOTIFY_OWNER', requires: ['archive marker', 'do not dispatch'] },
                { if: 'smoke.dispatchExecuted == true', branch: 'HARD_FAIL', requires: ['stop workflow', 'investigate smoke harness misuse'] }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['containsPromptText=true', 'dispatchExecuted=true', 'releaseGate hold', 'pairValidation hold', 'missing authoritative external hashes for real loop'],
            rule: 'This is a pseudo n8n contract, not an importable workflow JSON.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexSmokeEnablePolicyCard(profile = 'codex-smoke-enable-policy-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            task: 'Read the smoke result marker and enable policy before allowing any real external supervisor loop.',
            minimalPrompt: `Evaluate window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorSmokeResultMarker('codex-smoke-policy') and return only policyDecision, allowRealLoop, blockers, warnings, markerPreviewHash. Do not dispatch commands.`,
            stopIf: ['allowRealLoop !== true', 'dispatchExecuted true', 'containsPromptText true', 'notOwnerApproval false'],
            nextIfPass: 'Proceed to real supervisorLoopGate before/dispatch/after evidence flow with external authoritative hashes.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixturePack(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-result-relay-fixtures') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'smoke-pass-enables-policy', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false }, expect: 'allow_real_loop' },
                { id: 'smoke-pass-caution-enables-with-warning', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'caution', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false }, expect: 'allow_real_loop' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'smoke-hold-blocks-policy', input: { decision: 'hold', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false }, expect: 'hold_real_loop' },
                { id: 'dispatch-executed-blocks-policy', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: true, containsPromptText: false }, expect: 'hold_real_loop' },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak-blocks-policy', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: true }, expect: 'hold_real_loop' },
                { id: 'pair-validation-hold-blocks-policy', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'hold', releaseGateDecision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false }, expect: 'hold_real_loop' },
                { id: 'release-gate-hold-blocks-policy', input: { decision: 'pass', pairValidation: 'pass', releaseGateDecision: 'hold', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false }, expect: 'hold_real_loop' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtureItem(item) {
        const input = item?.input || {};
        const compact = {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.compact_result`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            containsPromptText: input.containsPromptText === true,
            containsUserText: input.containsUserText === true,
            decision: input.decision || 'unknown',
            blockers: [],
            warnings: [],
            dispatchExecuted: input.dispatchExecuted === true,
            clicked: input.clicked === true,
            downloaded: input.downloaded === true,
            mockHashes: true,
            pairValidation: input.pairValidation || 'unknown',
            gate: { stateCode: 'READY_TO_CONTINUE', branchId: 'fixture', commandReady: true, decision: 'dispatch_targeted_command', nextPollMs: 1000 },
            releaseGateDecision: input.releaseGateDecision || 'unknown'
        };
        const policy = buildSupervisorSmokeEnablePolicy({ schema: 'fixture-smoke-result', decision: compact.decision, blockers: [], warnings: [], dispatchExecuted: compact.dispatchExecuted, clicked: compact.clicked, downloaded: compact.downloaded, containsPromptText: compact.containsPromptText, containsUserText: compact.containsUserText, gate: compact.gate, releaseGate: { decision: compact.releaseGateDecision }, mockEvidencePair: { validation: { decision: compact.pairValidation } } }, 'fixture-validation');
        return policy.policyDecision === item.expect;
    }

    function validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtures(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-result-relay-validation') {
        const pack = buildSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of pack.mustPass || []) {
            const ok = validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtureItem(item);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-pass', ok, expected: item.expect });
        }
        for (const item of pack.mustFail || []) {
            const ok = validateSupervisorSmokeResultRelayFixtureItem(item);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-fail', ok, expected: item.expect });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_RESULT_RELAY_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }


    // v202: read-only external supervisor smoke harness. This layer is designed for
    // n8n/WebAI Transfer/Nexusync/Codex to verify the API contract, replay precheck,
    // and beforeHash/afterHash pair shape without dispatching a browser command.
    function buildSupervisorSmokeHarnessContract(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-harness-contract') {
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mode: 'read-only-mock',
            guarantees: [
                'Does not dispatch CustomEvent commands.',
                'Does not write command receipts.',
                'Does not click, submit, download, open links, inspect conversation bodies, or treat marker/receipt/evidence as approval.',
                'Uses mock 64-hex beforeHash/afterHash values unless an external supervisor supplies authoritative hashes.'
            ],
            recommendedExternalUse: [
                'browser.evaluate supervisorSmokeHarnessPlan() to check expected flow',
                'browser.evaluate runSupervisorSmokeHarness({ mode: "mock" }) before enabling a real command loop',
                'stop if releaseGate().decision === "hold" or smokeHarness.decision !== "pass"',
                'only then run the real beforeHash -> targeted command -> afterHash loop from supervisorLoopGate()'
            ],
            exportedApi: [
                'supervisorSmokeHarnessContract', 'supervisorSmokeHarnessPlan', 'runSupervisorSmokeHarness',
                'mockSupervisorEvidencePair', 'supervisorSmokeHarnessFixtures', 'validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtures',
                'n8nSupervisorSmokeHarnessTemplate', 'codexSupervisorSmokeHarnessCard'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSmokeHarnessPlan(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-harness-plan') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(`smoke-plan:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.plan`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            currentGate: {
                stateCode: gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
                decision: gate.decision || 'unknown',
                commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
                branchId: gate.branchId || 'unknown',
                nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs || clampNumber(config.pollMs || 1000, 250, 60000),
                hasCommandEnvelope: !!gate.commandEnvelope
            },
            smokeSteps: [
                'read supervisorLoopGate(reason)',
                'build mock before evidence hash placeholder, or accept externally computed beforeHash',
                'choose gate.commandEnvelope when present; otherwise synthesize a dryRun smoke envelope with current target',
                'run commandReplayStatus(envelope, "event") as read-only precheck',
                'build commandEvidencePair(envelope, beforeHash, afterHash)',
                'validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair)',
                'return pass/hold without dispatching, clicking, submitting, downloading, or writing receipts'
            ],
            hardStops: ['releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT for real dispatch', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'missing target for send-risk commands', 'pair validation hold'],
            rule: 'Smoke harness validates the supervisor loop shape only. It is not an owner approval and it must not be treated as a real command execution.'
        };
    }

    function buildSmokeHarnessCommandEnvelope(seed = 'smoke') {
        const cid = getConversationId() || 'smoke-conversation-placeholder';
        const requestId = `smoke-${String(seed || 'run').replace(/[^a-z0-9_.:-]/gi, '-').slice(0, 40)}-${Date.now().toString(36)}`;
        return {
            requestId,
            command: 'continue_now',
            commandName: 'continue_now',
            targetTabId: TAB_ID,
            targetConversationId: cid,
            source: 'supervisor-smoke-harness',
            dryRun: true,
            ts: Date.now(),
            expiresAt: Date.now() + CONTROL_DEFAULT_COMMAND_TTL_MS,
            args: { source: 'supervisor-smoke-harness', dryRun: true }
        };
    }

    function buildMockSupervisorEvidencePair(envelope = null, beforeHash = '', afterHash = '', reason = 'mock-supervisor-evidence-pair') {
        const env = envelope && typeof envelope === 'object' && (envelope.command || envelope.commandName || envelope.requestId)
            ? envelope
            : buildSmokeHarnessCommandEnvelope(reason);
        const before = /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(beforeHash || '')) ? String(beforeHash).toLowerCase() : 'a'.repeat(64);
        const after = /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(afterHash || '')) ? String(afterHash).toLowerCase() : 'b'.repeat(64);
        const pair = buildCommandEvidencePair(env, before, after, `smoke:${reason}`);
        const validation = validateCommandEvidencePairing(pair, `smoke:${reason}`);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.mock_pair`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            mockHashes: true,
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            commandEnvelope: sanitizeControlEnvelope(env),
            pair,
            validation,
            rule: 'Mock hashes prove schema wiring only. External supervisor/Nexusync must compute authoritative beforeHash/afterHash for real runs.'
        };
    }

    function runExternalSupervisorSmokeHarness(options = {}, reason = 'api-supervisor-smoke-harness') {
        const opts = options && typeof options === 'object' ? options : {};
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(`smoke:${reason}`);
        const releaseGate = buildReleaseGatePayload();
        const env = opts.commandEnvelope || gate.commandEnvelope || buildSmokeHarnessCommandEnvelope(reason);
        const replay = buildCommandReplayStatus(env, 'event');
        const mockPair = buildMockSupervisorEvidencePair(env, opts.beforeHash || '', opts.afterHash || '', reason);
        const blockers = [];
        const warnings = [];
        if (releaseGate?.decision === 'hold') warnings.push('release-gate-currently-hold-for-real-dispatch');
        if (opts.dispatch === true || opts.dispatchExecuted === true) blockers.push('smoke-harness-must-not-dispatch');
        if (mockPair.validation?.decision === 'hold') blockers.push('command-evidence-pair-validation-hold');
        if (mockPair.validation?.decision && mockPair.validation.decision !== 'pass') warnings.push(`command-evidence-pair-validation-${mockPair.validation.decision}`);
        if (replay?.acceptedForReplay === false) warnings.push(`replay-precheck-${replay.reason || 'not-accepted'}`);
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : 'pass';
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.run_result`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            mode: 'read-only-mock',
            dispatchExecuted: false,
            clicked: false,
            downloaded: false,
            decision,
            blockers,
            warnings,
            gate: {
                stateCode: gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
                decision: gate.decision || 'unknown',
                commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
                branchId: gate.branchId || 'unknown',
                nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs || null
            },
            releaseGate: { decision: releaseGate?.decision || 'unknown', blockers: Array.isArray(releaseGate?.blockers) ? releaseGate.blockers.slice(0, 8) : [] },
            replayPrecheck: replay,
            mockEvidencePair: mockPair,
            nextRealLoop: decision === 'pass'
                ? ['Archive real before evidence externally', 'dispatch targeted gate.commandEnvelope only after canRun/replay pass', 'archive real after evidence externally', 'validate real commandEvidencePair']
                : ['Do not dispatch; fix smoke harness blockers first']
        };
    }

    function buildN8nSupervisorSmokeHarnessTemplate(profile = 'n8n-supervisor-smoke-harness-template') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.n8n_template`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            pseudoNodes: [
                { id: 'read_smoke_plan', type: 'browser.evaluate', code: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorSmokeHarnessPlan('n8n-smoke')` },
                { id: 'run_mock_harness', type: 'browser.evaluate', code: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.runSupervisorSmokeHarness({ mode: 'mock' }, 'n8n-smoke')` },
                { id: 'switch_smoke_decision', type: 'switch', rules: ['decision=pass', 'decision=hold'] },
                { id: 'stop_on_hold', type: 'notify-owner', when: 'decision=hold' },
                { id: 'enable_real_loop_policy', type: 'policy-note', when: 'decision=pass', note: 'Proceed to the real supervisorLoopGate before/dispatch/after flow; do not reuse mock hashes.' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['smoke decision hold', 'containsPromptText=true', 'dispatchExecuted=true', 'mock pair validation hold'],
            note: 'Pseudo template only; it must be adapted to the real n8n browser/evidence nodes.'
        };
    }

    function buildCodexSupervisorSmokeHarnessCard(profile = 'codex-supervisor-smoke-harness-card') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            task: 'Run a read-only browser-evaluate smoke harness before allowing a real external supervisor loop.',
            minimalPrompt: `Evaluate window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.runSupervisorSmokeHarness({ mode: 'mock' }, 'codex-smoke') and return only decision, blockers, warnings, gate.stateCode, and mockEvidencePair.validation.decision. Do not dispatch commands.`,
            stopIf: ['decision != pass', 'dispatchExecuted true', 'containsPromptText true', 'releaseGate hold for real dispatch']
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixturePack(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-harness-fixtures') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'mock-harness-no-dispatch', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, beforeHash: 'a'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'b'.repeat(64), commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-pass-1', targetTabId: 'tab-1' } }, expect: 'pass' },
                { id: 'hold-state-readonly-still-smoke-valid', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, containsUserText: false, gateDecision: 'hold', commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-pass-2', targetConversationId: 'conv-1' }, beforeHash: 'c'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'd'.repeat(64) }, expect: 'pass' }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'dispatch-attempted', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: true, containsPromptText: false, commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-fail-1', targetTabId: 'tab-1' }, beforeHash: 'a'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'b'.repeat(64) }, expect: 'reject' },
                { id: 'prompt-text-leak', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: true, commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-fail-2', targetTabId: 'tab-1' }, beforeHash: 'a'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'b'.repeat(64) }, expect: 'reject' },
                { id: 'send-risk-missing-target', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-fail-3' }, beforeHash: 'a'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'b'.repeat(64) }, expect: 'reject' },
                { id: 'bad-after-hash', input: { decision: 'pass', dispatchExecuted: false, containsPromptText: false, commandEnvelope: { command: 'continue_now', requestId: 'smoke-fail-4', targetConversationId: 'conv-1' }, beforeHash: 'a'.repeat(64), afterHash: 'not-sha' }, expect: 'reject' }
            ]
        };
    }

    function validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtureItem(item) {
        const input = item?.input || {};
        const env = input.commandEnvelope || {};
        const sendRisk = normalizeControlCommandName(env.command || env.commandName) === 'continue_now';
        const hasTarget = !!(env.targetTabId || env.targetConversationId);
        const hashOk = (value) => /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(value || ''));
        return input.dispatchExecuted !== true && input.containsPromptText !== true && input.containsUserText !== true && (!sendRisk || hasTarget) && hashOk(input.beforeHash) && hashOk(input.afterHash);
    }

    function validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtures(profile = 'supervisor-smoke-harness-validation') {
        const pack = buildSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of pack.mustPass || []) {
            const ok = validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtureItem(item);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-pass', ok, expected: item.expect || 'pass' });
        }
        for (const item of pack.mustFail || []) {
            const accepted = validateSupervisorSmokeHarnessFixtureItem(item);
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-fail', ok: accepted === false, expected: item.expect || 'reject' });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_SMOKE_HARNESS_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }


    // v201: concrete external supervisor loop examples. These are read-only/text-free helper
    // contracts for other automation projects. They do not dispatch commands, calculate
    // authoritative archive hashes, treat relay markers as approval, or inspect conversation bodies.
    function buildExternalSupervisorLoopExampleContract(profile = 'external-supervisor-loop-example-contract') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(`example:${profile}`);
        const pairSchema = buildCommandEvidencePairingSchema('example-contract');
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_LOOP_EXAMPLES_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Concrete minimal examples for wiring Auto Continue into n8n, WebAI Transfer, Nexusync archival, ASK_ROUTER, and Codex with low coupling.',
            currentGate: {
                stateCode: gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
                decision: gate.decision || 'unknown',
                commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
                branchId: gate.branchId || 'unknown',
                nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs || clampNumber(config.pollMs || 1000, 250, 60000),
                hasCommandEnvelope: !!gate.commandEnvelope
            },
            minimalLoop: [
                'read supervisorLoopGate(reason)',
                'if gate.decision is hold, stop or notify owner',
                'if gate.commandReady is false, wait gate.nextPollMs and poll again',
                'archive before evidence externally and compute beforeHash',
                'verify commandReplayStatus(gate.commandEnvelope).acceptedForReplay === true',
                `dispatch ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} with gate.commandEnvelope as-is`,
                'archive after evidence externally and compute afterHash',
                'build commandEvidencePair(gate.commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash) and validate it'
            ],
            pairSchemaSummary: {
                schema: pairSchema.schema,
                requiredTopLevel: pairSchema.requiredTopLevel || [],
                hashPattern: pairSchema.hashPattern || 'sha256 hex'
            },
            adapters: {
                n8n: 'Use n8nSupervisorLoopExample() as a pseudo node graph, not as an importable workflow.',
                webaiTransfer: 'Use webaiTransferSupervisorExamplePacket() to pass text-free relay markers and external hashes.',
                nexusync: 'Use nexusyncCommandArchiveExample() to map before/command/after records to your real Nexusync protocol.',
                codex: 'Use codexSupervisorLoopExample() as a short local browser-evaluate task card.'
            },
            invariants: [
                'Never parse the visual panel text for decisions; use API JSON only.',
                'Never broadcast send-risk commands without targetTabId or targetConversationId.',
                'Never treat commandReceipt, relay marker, browser evidence, or afterHash as owner approval.',
                'BLOCKED_DRAFT, BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP, and releaseGate hold are stop states.',
                'Authoritative SHA256 and archive paths are external supervisor/Nexusync responsibilities.'
            ]
        };
    }

    function buildN8nSupervisorLoopExample(profile = 'n8n-minimal-supervisor-loop-example') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(`n8n-example:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_EXAMPLES_SCHEMA}.n8n_minimal_loop`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            currentStateHint: { stateCode: gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN', decision: gate.decision || 'unknown', branchId: gate.branchId || 'unknown', commandReady: !!gate.commandReady },
            pseudoNodes: [
                { id: 'browser_probe_gate', type: 'browser.evaluate', code: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('n8n-before')` },
                { id: 'switch_gate_decision', type: 'switch', rules: ['decision=dispatch_targeted_command', 'decision=wait_or_notify', 'decision=hold'] },
                { id: 'archive_before_evidence', type: 'external.archive', when: 'dispatch_targeted_command', input: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('before')`, output: 'beforeHash' },
                { id: 'check_replay', type: 'browser.evaluate', code: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandReplayStatus($json.gate.commandEnvelope, 'event')` },
                { id: 'dispatch_targeted_command', type: 'browser.dispatchEvent', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, when: 'replay.acceptedForReplay=true && gate.canRun.accepted=true' },
                { id: 'archive_after_evidence', type: 'external.archive', input: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.evidencePacket('after')`, output: 'afterHash' },
                { id: 'validate_pair', type: 'browser.evaluate', code: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.validateCommandEvidencePairing(window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandEvidencePair($json.gate.commandEnvelope, $json.beforeHash, $json.afterHash))` },
                { id: 'stop_or_wait', type: 'notify-or-wait', when: 'hold/wait_or_notify or validation not pass' }
            ],
            branchMap: {
                dispatch_targeted_command: 'archive_before -> replay_check -> dispatch -> archive_after -> validate_pair',
                wait_or_notify: 'wait gate.nextPollMs and poll again, or notify owner if stale',
                hold: 'do not dispatch; inspect blockers and owner policy'
            },
            stopConditions: ['releaseGate hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'missing target', 'duplicate command receipt', 'pair validation hold'],
            note: 'This is a pseudo workflow spec for supervisor design. It is intentionally not an n8n import JSON.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferSupervisorExamplePacket(profile = 'webai-transfer-supervisor-loop-example') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(`webai-transfer-example:${profile}`);
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`webai-transfer-example:${profile}`);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_EXAMPLES_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayMarkerBlockExample: {
                marker: 'CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SUPERVISOR_LOOP_V1',
                stateCode: gate.stateCode || compact.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
                decision: gate.decision || compact.decision || 'unknown',
                branchId: gate.branchId || compact.branchId || 'unknown',
                commandReady: !!gate.commandReady,
                beforeHash: '<external-sha256-before-evidence>',
                afterHash: '<external-sha256-after-evidence>',
                commandReceiptKey: '<from commandReceipts()/commandEvidencePair()>',
                approval: 'not_provided_by_marker'
            },
            requiredExternalFields: ['sourceTextSha256', 'beforeHash', 'afterHash', 'routeId', 'targetConversationId or targetTabId', 'commandEnvelope.requestId'],
            receiverRules: [
                'Verify marker text is evidence only, not approval.',
                'Verify containsPromptText=false and containsUserText=false before archival.',
                'Verify commandEnvelope was accepted by canRun and replay guard before dispatch.',
                'Verify beforeHash/afterHash are 64-character lowercase sha256 hex strings.'
            ]
        };
    }

        };
    }

            ],
