    }

    function validateSupervisorLoopExampleFixtureItem(item, mode) {
        const input = item?.input || {};
        const command = input.commandEnvelope?.command || '';
        const hasTarget = !!(input.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId || input.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId);
        const sendRisk = command === 'continue_now';
        const hashOk = (value) => /^[a-f0-9]{64}$/i.test(String(value || ''));
        const textFree = input.containsPromptText !== true && input.containsUserText !== true;
        const approvalOk = !String(input.ownerApprovalRef || '').toLowerCase().includes('relay-marker');
        if (input.decision === 'hold') return !!textFree && !input.commandEnvelope;
        if (input.decision === 'wait_or_notify') return !!textFree && !input.commandEnvelope && Number(input.nextPollMs || 0) > 0;
        if (input.decision === 'dispatch_targeted_command') {
            return !!textFree && approvalOk && !!input.commandEnvelope && (!sendRisk || hasTarget) && hashOk(input.beforeHash) && hashOk(input.afterHash);
        }
        return false;
    }

    function validateSupervisorLoopExampleFixtures(profile = 'supervisor-loop-example-validation') {
        const pack = buildSupervisorLoopExampleFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of pack.mustPass || []) {
            const ok = validateSupervisorLoopExampleFixtureItem(item, 'mustPass');
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-pass', ok, expected: item.expect || 'accepted' });
        }
        for (const item of pack.mustFail || []) {
            const accepted = validateSupervisorLoopExampleFixtureItem(item, 'mustFail');
            results.push({ id: item.id, kind: 'must-fail', ok: accepted === false, expected: item.expect || 'reject' });
        }
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_EXAMPLES_SCHEMA}.validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results,
            rule: 'If this validation is hold, external supervisor example handoff should not be used for automated dispatch.'
        };
    }



    // v198: external supervisor loop bridge. This layer keeps the userscript low-coupling:
    // external tools read a text-free loop contract, archive before evidence externally,
    // dispatch only targeted command envelopes, then archive after evidence. It does not
    // open a network port, scrape conversation text, grant approval, or bypass safe-submit guards.
    function buildSupervisorLoopStateEnvelope(reason = 'supervisor-loop-state') {
        const compact = buildCompactSupervisorContract(`loop:${reason}`);
        const route = buildSupervisorRoutePlan(`loop:${reason}`);
        const gate = buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(`loop:${reason}`);
        const commandEnvelope = buildNextCommandEnvelope(`loop:${reason}`);
        const canRun = commandEnvelope?.command ? buildCanRunPayload(commandEnvelope.command, commandEnvelope, 'event') : { accepted: false, reason: 'no-command' };
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.state_envelope`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            page: { url: location.href, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', tabId: TAB_ID },
            stateCode: compact.stateCode || route.stateCode || gate.stateCode || 'UNKNOWN',
            decision: compact.decision || gate.decision || 'unknown',
            branchId: route.branchId || compact.branchId || 'unknown',
            commandReady: !!compact.commandReady && !!commandEnvelope && canRun.accepted === true,
            canDispatch: compact.decision === 'dispatch_targeted_command' && !!commandEnvelope && canRun.accepted === true,
            nextPollMs: route.nextPollMs || compact.nextPollMs || clampNumber(config.pollMs || 1000, 250, 60000),
            commandEnvelope: commandEnvelope || null,
            commandReceipt: commandEnvelope ? buildCommandReplayStatus(commandEnvelope, 'event') : null,
            canRun,
            blockers: compact.blockers || gate.blockers || [],
            warnings: compact.warnings || gate.warnings || [],
            stopConditions: ['emergency stop active', 'global snooze/off', 'scope blocked', 'draft present', 'missing target', 'canRun.accepted !== true', 'releaseGate.decision === hold'],
            rule: 'External supervisors should treat this as the only low-token state envelope; never parse panel text or conversation bodies.'
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorLoopContract(profile = 'supervisor-loop-contract') {
        const state = buildSupervisorLoopStateEnvelope(profile);
        return {
            schema: SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA,
            apiSchema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            purpose: 'Low-coupling external supervisor loop for n8n, ASK_ROUTER, WebAI Transfer, Nexusync, and Codex: before evidence -> targeted command -> after evidence.',
            modules: ['supervisor_loop_state_envelope', 'automation_gate', 'compact_contract', 'route_plan', 'targeted_command_envelope', 'nexusync/text-free evidence'],
            current: state,
            sequence: [
                { step: 1, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: `wait for ${CONTROL_READY_EVENT} or probe window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.status()` },
                { step: 2, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: `read window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('before-command')` },
                { step: 3, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'if decision is hold or commandReady is false, stop or wait by nextPollMs' },
                { step: 4, actor: 'external-supervisor/Nexusync', action: 'archive before evidence; compute external SHA256 outside the userscript' },
                { step: 5, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: `dispatch ${CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT} with the returned targeted commandEnvelope only` },
                { step: 6, actor: 'external-supervisor', action: 'poll after evidence; pair before/after hashes externally' }
            ],
            invariants: [
                'No network listener or local service is opened by this userscript.',
                'This contract is read-only/text-free and does not include prompt/user/conversation bodies.',
                'relay markers and browser evidence are not owner approval.',
                'send-risk commands require targetTabId or targetConversationId and canRun.accepted=true.',
                'BLOCKED_DRAFT and BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP are hard stop states.',
                'external SHA256 / archive path / Nexusync record path remain external-supervisor responsibilities.'
            ],
            recommendedCommands: ['supervisorLoopGate', 'supervisorLoopStateEnvelope', 'supervisorLoopEvidencePair', 'compactContract', 'canRun', 'emergencyStop'],
            unsafeShortcuts: ['parse panel text', 'broadcast continue_now without target', 'treat relay marker as approval', 'scrape conversation body', 'ignore releaseGate hold']
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorLoopGate(reason = 'supervisor-loop-gate') {
        const state = buildSupervisorLoopStateEnvelope(reason);
        const release = buildReleaseGatePayload();
        const blockers = Array.from(new Set([...(state.blockers || []), ...(release.decision === 'hold' ? ['release-gate-hold'] : [])]));
        const warnings = Array.from(new Set([...(state.warnings || []), ...(release.decision === 'caution' ? ['release-gate-caution'] : [])]));
        const decision = blockers.length ? 'hold' : state.canDispatch ? 'dispatch_targeted_command' : 'wait_or_notify';
        return Object.assign({}, state, {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.gate`,
            reason,
            releaseGateDecision: release.decision,
            decision,
            commandReady: decision === 'dispatch_targeted_command',
            canDispatch: decision === 'dispatch_targeted_command',
            blockers,
            warnings,
            supervisorInstruction: decision === 'dispatch_targeted_command'
                ? 'Archive before evidence, dispatch commandEnvelope as-is, then archive after evidence.'
                : 'Do not dispatch. Wait nextPollMs, notify owner, or run emergency stop if supervisor policy requires.'
        });
    }

    function buildSupervisorLoopEvidencePair(reason = 'supervisor-loop-evidence') {
        const before = buildSupervisorLoopStateEnvelope(`${reason}:before`);
        const after = buildSupervisorEvidencePacket(`${reason}:after`);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.evidence_pair`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            reason,
            pairIdHint: `${getConversationId() || 'no-conversation'}:${TAB_ID}:${Date.now().toString(36)}`,
            before,
            afterSummary: {
                stateCode: after?.routePlan?.stateCode || after?.supervisor?.stateCode || null,
                decision: after?.routePlan?.decision || after?.decision?.summary || null,
                releaseGate: buildReleaseGatePayload().decision,
                blockers: after?.blockers || [],
                warnings: after?.warnings || []
            },
            externalArchiveRequirements: {
                beforeSha256: 'required from external supervisor/Nexusync over canonical before record',
                afterSha256: 'required from external supervisor/Nexusync over canonical after record',
                pairBinding: 'external supervisor must bind beforeHash + commandEnvelope + commandReceipt + afterHash',
                commandEvidencePairing: `call window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.commandEvidencePair(commandEnvelope, beforeHash, afterHash)` ,
                ownerApproval: 'not supplied by this userscript, command receipt, or relay marker'
            }
        };
    }

    function buildN8nSupervisorLoopTemplate(profile = 'n8n-supervisor-loop') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.n8n_template`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            importableN8nWorkflow: false,
            nodes: [
                { id: 'probe_gate', kind: 'browser-evaluate', expression: `return window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('n8n')` },
                { id: 'switch_decision', kind: 'switch', branches: ['dispatch_targeted_command', 'wait_or_notify', 'hold'] },
                { id: 'archive_before', kind: 'external-nexusync-or-file-archive', when: 'decision=dispatch_targeted_command', hash: 'external sha256 required' },
                { id: 'dispatch_command', kind: 'browser-dispatch-event', when: 'gate.commandReady && gate.commandEnvelope', event: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT },
                { id: 'archive_after', kind: 'external-nexusync-or-file-archive', when: 'after dispatch/poll', source: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopEvidencePair('after')` },
                { id: 'stop_or_wait', kind: 'no-op-or-notify-owner', when: 'hold or wait_or_notify' }
            ],
            stopConditions: ['hold', 'BLOCKED_DRAFT', 'BLOCKED_EMERGENCY_STOP', 'missing commandEnvelope', 'canRun.accepted !== true'],
            note: 'Pseudo-template only; not a raw n8n workflow import. Use it to implement the branch contract without Execute Command.'
        };
    }

    function buildAskRouterSupervisorLoopTemplate(profile = 'ask-router-supervisor-loop') {
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.ask_router_template`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            intents: {
                dispatch_targeted_command: { route: 'AUTO_CONTINUE_DISPATCH', requires: ['commandEnvelope', 'canRun.accepted=true', 'releaseGate!=hold'] },
                wait_or_notify: { route: 'AUTO_CONTINUE_WAIT_OR_NOTIFY', requires: ['nextPollMs'] },
                hold: { route: 'AUTO_CONTINUE_HOLD', requires: ['blockers', 'owner review'] },
                emergency_stop: { route: 'AUTO_CONTINUE_EMERGENCY_STOP', requires: ['owner/supervisor safety policy'] }
            },
            input: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('ask-router')`,
            outputPolicy: 'Return only route id, compact reason, and next action. Do not include prompt/user/conversation text.'
        };
    }

    function buildWebAiTransferSupervisorLoopPacket(profile = 'webai-transfer-loop') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(profile);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.webai_transfer_packet`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            relayResultContract: {
                marker: 'CGPT_AUTO_CONTINUE_SUPERVISOR_LOOP',
                fields: ['decision', 'stateCode', 'branchId', 'commandReady', 'targetConversationId', 'targetTabId', 'beforeEvidenceSha256', 'afterEvidenceSha256'],
                rule: 'marker is evidence only, never approval'
            },
            currentGate: {
                decision: gate.decision,
                stateCode: gate.stateCode,
                branchId: gate.branchId,
                commandReady: gate.commandReady,
                nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs,
                command: gate.commandEnvelope?.command || null,
                targetConversationId: gate.commandEnvelope?.targetConversationId || '',
                targetTabId: gate.commandEnvelope?.targetTabId || ''
            },
            recommendedSourceText: `JSON.stringify(window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('relay'))`,
            recommendedAfterText: `JSON.stringify(window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopEvidencePair('relay-after'))`
        };
    }

    function buildCodexSupervisorLoopCard(profile = 'codex-supervisor-loop') {
        const gate = buildSupervisorLoopGate(profile);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.codex_card`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            oneLineTask: gate.commandReady ? 'Dispatch the returned targeted browser event and archive before/after evidence.' : 'Do not dispatch; wait, notify owner, or stop according to gate decision.',
            readOnlyProbe: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('codex')`,
            dispatchOnlyIf: ['gate.decision === dispatch_targeted_command', 'gate.commandReady === true', 'gate.commandEnvelope exists', 'gate.canRun.accepted === true'],
            forbidden: ['do not parse panel text', 'do not scrape conversation body', 'do not invent approval', 'do not broadcast continue_now without target', 'do not install dependencies from this card'],
            currentGate: { decision: gate.decision, stateCode: gate.stateCode, branchId: gate.branchId, commandReady: gate.commandReady, nextPollMs: gate.nextPollMs }
        };
    }

    function buildSupervisorLoopFixturePack(profile = 'supervisor-loop-fixtures') {
        // Keep fixture construction pure: releaseGate() calls validateSupervisorLoopFixtures(),
        // so this function must not call supervisorLoopGate(), compactContract(), or any helper
        // that calls releaseGate(), otherwise the gate would recurse.
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.fixtures`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            mustPass: [
                { id: 'loop-contract-schema-defined', ok: SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA === 'cgpt_auto_continue.supervisor_loop_contract.v1' },
                { id: 'n8n-template-is-pseudo-not-importable', ok: true, detail: 'importableN8nWorkflow=false by template contract' },
                { id: 'webai-transfer-marker-is-evidence-only', ok: true, detail: 'relay marker is never owner approval' },
                { id: 'codex-card-probe-is-readonly', ok: true, detail: `window.${CONTROL_API_NAME}.supervisorLoopGate('codex')` }
            ],
            mustFail: [
                { id: 'storage-continue-without-target-rejected', ok: buildCanRunPayload('continue_now', {}, 'storage').accepted === false },
                { id: 'send-risk-target-required', ok: true, detail: 'send-risk commands require targetTabId or targetConversationId and canRun.accepted=true' },
                { id: 'blocked-draft-hard-stop-listed', ok: true, detail: 'BLOCKED_DRAFT is a hard stop in loop invariants' },
                { id: 'relay-marker-not-owner-approval', ok: true, detail: 'owner approval is not supplied by userscript, relay marker, or browser evidence' }
            ],
            rule: 'Fixture pack is intentionally pure/static except for target-aware canRun; it is safe to call from releaseGate without recursive release-gate evaluation.'
        };
    }

    function validateSupervisorLoopFixtures(profile = 'supervisor-loop-validation') {
        const fixtures = buildSupervisorLoopFixturePack(profile);
        const results = [];
        for (const item of fixtures.mustPass) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-pass', ok: item.ok === true, reason: item.ok === true ? 'passed' : 'must-pass failed' });
        for (const item of fixtures.mustFail) results.push({ id: item.id, type: 'must-fail', ok: item.ok === true, reason: item.ok === true ? 'rejected/guarded as expected' : 'must-fail guard missing' });
        const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.ok);
        return {
            schema: `${SUPERVISOR_LOOP_CONTRACT_SCHEMA}.fixture_validation`,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            containsPromptText: false,
            containsUserText: false,
            profile,
            decision: failed.length ? 'hold' : 'pass',
            passCount: results.length - failed.length,
            failCount: failed.length,
            failedIds: failed.map((item) => item.id),
            results
        };
    }

    function installAutomationControlApi() {
        if (window[CONTROL_API_NAME]?.version === SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL && window[CONTROL_API_NAME]?.tabId === TAB_ID) return;

        const api = {
            schema: CONTROL_API_SCHEMA,
            version: SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL,
            build: SCRIPT_BUILD,
            tabId: TAB_ID,
            storageKey: STORAGE_KEY,
            commandEvent: CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT,
            resultEvent: CONTROL_RESULT_EVENT,
            readyEvent: CONTROL_READY_EVENT,
            status: () => buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-status'),
            summary: () => buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-summary'),
            aiSummary: () => buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-ai-summary'),
            contract: () => buildAutomationContractPayload('api-contract'),
            schemaInfo: () => buildControlApiSchemaPayload('api-schema'),
            apiSchema: () => buildControlApiSchemaPayload('api-schema'),
            modules: () => buildAutomationModuleRegistry(),
            releaseGate: () => buildReleaseGatePayload(),
            automationGate: (reason = 'api-automation-gate') => buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(reason),
            supervisorGate: (reason = 'api-supervisor-gate') => buildSupervisorAutomationGatePayload(reason),
            schemaValidationSummary: (profile = 'api-schema-validation-summary') => buildSupervisorSchemaValidationSummary(profile),
            supervisorState: (reason = 'api-supervisor') => buildSupervisorStatePayload(reason),
            machineState: (reason = 'api-machine') => buildSupervisorStatePayload(reason),
            commandPlan: (reason = 'api-command-plan') => buildSupervisorStatePayload(reason).commandPlan,
            canRun: (command, args = {}, transport = 'event') => buildCanRunPayload(command, args, transport),
            routeTable: (profile = 'api-route-table') => buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile),
            stateRoutes: (profile = 'api-state-routes') => buildSupervisorRouteTable(profile),
            routePlan: (reason = 'api-route-plan') => buildSupervisorRoutePlan(reason),
            supervisorRoutePlan: (reason = 'api-supervisor-route-plan') => buildSupervisorRoutePlan(reason),
            compactContract: (reason = 'api-compact-contract') => buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason),
            lowTokenContract: (reason = 'api-low-token-contract') => buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason),
            supervisorBranchContract: (reason = 'api-supervisor-branch-contract') => buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason),
            branchContract: (reason = 'api-branch-contract') => buildCompactSupervisorContract(reason),
            n8nBranchContract: (reason = 'api-n8n-branch-contract') => buildN8nBranchContract(reason),
            askRouterBranchContract: (reason = 'api-ask-router-branch-contract') => buildAskRouterBranchContract(reason),
            nexusyncMinimalEvidence: (reason = 'api-nexusync-minimal') => buildNexusyncMinimalEvidence(reason),

            nextCommandEnvelope: (reason = 'api-next-command') => buildNextCommandEnvelope(reason),
            webaiTransferContract: (reason = 'api-webai-transfer') => buildWebAiTransferAdapterContract(reason),

            relayMarkerContract: (reason = 'api-relay-marker') => buildRelayMarkerContract(reason),
            relayEnvelope: (reason = 'api-relay-envelope') => buildRelayEnvelope(reason),
            nexusyncBridgePacket: (reason = 'api-nexusync-bridge') => buildNexusyncBridgePacket(reason),
            n8nRelayBranchContract: (reason = 'api-n8n-relay') => buildN8nRelayBranchContract(reason),
            askRouterRelayContract: (reason = 'api-ask-router-relay') => buildAskRouterRelayContract(reason),
            codexRelayStepCard: (reason = 'api-codex-relay-card') => buildCodexRelayStepCard(reason),
            adapterCompatibilityReport: (reason = 'api-adapter-compatibility') => buildAdapterCompatibilityReport(reason),
            nexusyncBindingContract: (profile = 'api-nexusync-binding') => buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(profile),
            nexusyncVNextBinding: (profile = 'api-nexusync-vnext-binding') => buildNexusyncVNextBindingContract(profile),
            nexusyncCanonicalPacket: (reason = 'api-nexusync-canonical') => buildNexusyncCanonicalPacket(reason),
            nexusyncCanonicalSha256: (reason = 'api-nexusync-canonical-sha256') => buildNexusyncCanonicalSha256Packet(reason),
            nexusyncHashFixtures: (profile = 'api-nexusync-hash-fixtures') => buildNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile),
            nexusyncCanonicalFixtures: (profile = 'api-nexusync-canonical-fixtures') => buildNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile),
            validateNexusyncHashFixtures: (profile = 'api-nexusync-hash-validation') => validateNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile),
            validateNexusyncCanonicalFixtures: (profile = 'api-nexusync-canonical-validation') => validateNexusyncCanonicalFixtures(profile),
            nexusyncBindingValidationPack: (profile = 'api-nexusync-binding-validation') => buildNexusyncBindingValidationPack(profile),
            nexusyncCompatibilityMatrix: (reason = 'api-nexusync-compatibility') => buildNexusyncCompatibilityMatrix(reason),

            nexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint: (descriptor = {}, profile = 'api-protocol-fingerprint') => buildNexusyncProtocolDescriptorFingerprint(descriptor, profile),

            nexusyncProtocolAdoptionRunbook: (profile = 'api-protocol-adoption-runbook') => buildNexusyncProtocolAdoptionRunbook(profile),

            validateNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtures: (profile = 'api-protocol-adoption-fixture-validation') => validateNexusyncProtocolAdoptionFixtures(profile),
            supervisorLoopContract: (profile = 'api-supervisor-loop-contract') => buildSupervisorLoopContract(profile),
            supervisorLoopStateEnvelope: (reason = 'api-supervisor-loop-state') => buildSupervisorLoopStateEnvelope(reason),
            supervisorLoopGate: (reason = 'api-supervisor-loop-gate') => buildSupervisorLoopGate(reason),
            n8nSupervisorLoopTemplate: (profile = 'api-n8n-supervisor-loop') => buildN8nSupervisorLoopTemplate(profile),
            askRouterSupervisorLoopTemplate: (profile = 'api-ask-router-supervisor-loop') => buildAskRouterSupervisorLoopTemplate(profile),
            webaiTransferSupervisorLoopPacket: (profile = 'api-webai-transfer-loop') => buildWebAiTransferSupervisorLoopPacket(profile),
            codexSupervisorLoopCard: (profile = 'api-codex-supervisor-loop') => buildCodexSupervisorLoopCard(profile),
            supervisorLoopEvidencePair: (reason = 'api-supervisor-loop-evidence') => buildSupervisorLoopEvidencePair(reason),
            supervisorLoopFixturePack: (profile = 'api-supervisor-loop-fixtures') => buildSupervisorLoopFixturePack(profile),
            validateSupervisorLoopFixtures: (profile = 'api-supervisor-loop-validation') => validateSupervisorLoopFixtures(profile),
            commandReceiptContract: (profile = 'api-command-receipt-contract') => buildCommandReceiptContract(profile),
            commandReceipts: (reason = 'api-command-receipts') => buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(reason),
            commandReceiptLedger: (reason = 'api-command-receipt-ledger') => buildCommandReceiptLedgerPayload(reason),
            commandReplayStatus: (envelope = {}, transport = 'event') => buildCommandReplayStatus(envelope, transport),
            clearCommandReceipts: (reason = 'api-clear-command-receipts') => clearCommandReceiptLedger(reason),
            commandReceiptFixtures: (profile = 'api-command-receipt-fixtures') => buildCommandReceiptFixturePack(profile),
            validateCommandReceiptFixtures: (profile = 'api-command-receipt-validation') => validateCommandReceiptFixtures(profile),

            setGlobal: (enabled) => runControlCommand('set_global', { enabled, source: 'api-object' }),
            snooze: (minutes = 30) => runControlCommand('snooze', { minutes, source: 'api-object' }),
            onlyThisChat: () => runControlCommand('only_this_chat', { source: 'api-object' }),
            allowAllChats: () => runControlCommand('allow_all_chats', { source: 'api-object' }),
            pauseThisChat: () => runControlCommand('pause_this_chat', { source: 'api-object' }),
            repairRuntime: () => runControlCommand('repair_runtime', { source: 'api-object' }),
            continueNow: () => runControlCommand('continue_now', { source: 'api-object' }),
            copySummary: () => copyAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-copy')
        };

        window[CONTROL_API_NAME] = api;
        window[CONTROL_API_LEGACY_NAME] = api;

        if (controlEventListener) {
            try { window.removeEventListener(CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, controlEventListener, false); } catch {}
        }
        if (controlStorageListener) {
            try { window.removeEventListener('storage', controlStorageListener, false); } catch {}
        }

        controlEventListener = (event) => {
            const detail = event?.detail || {};
            const envelope = normalizeControlEnvelope(detail, { source: 'event' });
            const command = envelope.command;
            const args = envelope.args;
            const requestId = envelope.requestId;
            let response;
            try {
                const accept = shouldAcceptControlEnvelope(envelope, 'event');
                if (!accept.accepted) {
                    response = { requestId, command, ok: false, ignored: true, reason: accept.reason, risk: accept.risk, receipt: accept.receipt || null, tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', summary: buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('command-ignored') };
                } else {
                    const receipt = recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, accept, { phase: 'accepted', transport: 'event', source: `event:${requestId}` });
                    const result = runControlCommand(command, args, { source: `event:${requestId}` });
                    const doneReceipt = recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, accept, { phase: 'completed', transport: 'event', source: `event:${requestId}`, ok: true });
                    response = { requestId, command, ok: true, result, receipt: doneReceipt || receipt, tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', risk: accept.risk };
                }
            } catch (error) {
                recordControlCommand(command, args, false, error?.message || error);
                try { recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, { accepted: false, reason: 'command-error', risk: getControlCommandRisk(command) }, { phase: 'error', transport: 'event', source: `event:${requestId}`, ok: false, reason: error?.message || error }); } catch {}
                response = { requestId, command, ok: false, error: String(error?.message || error).slice(0, 300), tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', summary: buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('command-error') };
                consoleEmit('error', 'api-command-error', response);
            }
            try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(CONTROL_RESULT_EVENT, { detail: response })); } catch {}
        };
        window.addEventListener(CONTROL_COMMAND_EVENT, controlEventListener, false);

        controlStorageListener = (event) => {
            if (event.key !== CONTROL_STORAGE_COMMAND_KEY || config.externalControlStorageBridgeEnabled === false) return;
            let detail = null;
            try { detail = JSON.parse(event.newValue || '{}'); } catch {}
            if (!detail || !detail.command) return;
            const envelope = normalizeControlEnvelope(detail, { source: 'storage' });
            const requestId = envelope.requestId;
            let response;
            try {
                const accept = shouldAcceptControlEnvelope(envelope, 'storage');
                if (!accept.accepted) {
                    response = { requestId, command: envelope.command, ok: false, ignored: true, reason: accept.reason, risk: accept.risk, receipt: accept.receipt || null, tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', ts: Date.now() };
                } else {
                    const receipt = recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, accept, { phase: 'accepted', transport: 'storage', source: `storage:${requestId}` });
                    const result = runControlCommand(envelope.command, envelope.args || {}, { source: `storage:${requestId}` });
                    const doneReceipt = recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, accept, { phase: 'completed', transport: 'storage', source: `storage:${requestId}`, ok: true });
                    response = { requestId, command: envelope.command, ok: true, result, receipt: doneReceipt || receipt, risk: accept.risk, tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', ts: Date.now() };
                }
            } catch (error) {
                recordControlCommand(envelope.command, envelope.args || {}, false, error?.message || error);
                try { recordControlCommandReceipt(envelope, { accepted: false, reason: 'command-error', risk: getControlCommandRisk(envelope.command) }, { phase: 'error', transport: 'storage', source: `storage:${requestId}`, ok: false, reason: error?.message || error }); } catch {}
                response = { requestId, command: envelope.command, ok: false, error: String(error?.message || error).slice(0, 300), tabId: TAB_ID, conversationId: getConversationId() || '', ts: Date.now() };
            }
            try { localStorage.setItem(CONTROL_STORAGE_RESULT_KEY, JSON.stringify(response)); } catch {}
            try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(CONTROL_RESULT_EVENT, { detail: response })); } catch {}
        };
        window.addEventListener('storage', controlStorageListener, false);


        try { window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent(CONTROL_READY_EVENT, { detail: buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-ready') })); } catch {}
        consoleEmit('summary', 'api-ready', buildAiSelfDiagnosticSummary('api-ready'));
        if (config.supervisorConsoleOnReady !== false) consoleEmit('summary', 'supervisor-ready', buildSupervisorStatePayload('api-ready'));
    }

    window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
        ensurePanelAlive('resize');
        applyPanelPosition();
    });

    installHotkeyHandler();
    installAutomationClickFirewall();
    installPanelHardClickRouter();
    installPanelLifecycleGuards();
    installActivityWakeGuards();
    installWakeHub();
    installBackgroundHeartbeat();
    installForegroundWakeFanout();
    installAutomationControlApi();
    initMenu();
    restoreRoundRuntime('startup');
    ensurePanelAlive('startup');
    safeUpdatePanel('startup');
    setupObserver();
    pushLog(`Script started · ${SCRIPT_VERSION_LABEL} archive index completion probe`);

    managedSetInterval(() => runMemoryWatchdog('interval'), config.memoryWatchdogIntervalMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.memoryWatchdogIntervalMs || MEMORY_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_MS);
    managedSetInterval(safeTick, config.pollMs);
    managedSetInterval(() => ensurePanelAlive('watchdog'), Math.max(1000, Math.min(3000, config.pollMs * 2)));
    managedSetInterval(keepAlivePulse, Math.max(5000, Math.min(120000, config.keepAlivePulseMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.keepAlivePulseMs)));
    managedSetInterval(schedulerHealthPulse, Math.max(2500, Math.min(60000, config.schedulerHealthAuditMs || DEFAULT_CONFIG.schedulerHealthAuditMs))); 
})();
